Genesis5:1 Hih pen Adamʼ suanlekhakteʼ laibu ahi hi. Pasian in mi a piansakin
Genesis5:2 Amah in numei le pasal a piangsak hi. Amaute a kipiansakin amah in amaute
Genesis5:3 Adam kum za le kum sawm thum a phak khit ciangin
Genesis5:4 Seth a suah khit ciangin Adam kum za giat sung nungta lai hi. Amah in tanu le tapa dang zong a nei hi.
Genesis5:5 Tua ahih ciangin Adamʼ nuntak hun sungteng pen kum za kua le kum sawm thum hi a
Genesis5:6 Seth kum za le kum nga a phak ciangin Enosh kici tapa khat a nei hi.
Genesis5:7 Enosh a suah khit ciangin Seth kum za giat le kum sawm thum nungta a

Genesis5:12 Kenan kum sawm sagih a phak ciangin

Genesis5:14 Tua ahih ciangin Kenanʼ khan sungteng pen kum za kua le kum sawm hi a

Genesis5:16 Jaredʼ suah khit ciangin Mahalalel kum za giat le kum sawm thum nungta a

Exodus23:1 “Thuman lo na gen khia kei ding uh hi. Elna tawh teci pang dingin migilo pa tawh na kipawl kei ding uh hi.

Exodus23:3 Ama thu neihna ah mizawng pa na langneih kei ding uh hi.
Exodus23:4 Na langneih miteʼ bawngtal ahi a
Exodus23:5 Nangmah a hong mudah paʼ la a van tawh a puk na muh leh a la tawh amah na nusia kei dinga
Exodus23:6 Ama thu neihna ah mizawng pa a thutang kimlai na lelsak kei ding uh hi.
Exodus23:7 A man lopi a mi mawhsak ding panin kikem unla
Exodus23:8 Sumgolh na la kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh sumgolh in ulianteʼ mittawsak a
Exodus23:9 Khualmi na nengniam kei ding uh hi. Khualmiʼ lungsim na thei uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note zong Egypt gamah khualmi na hi ngei uh hi.
Exodus23:10 Note in na leitang uh ah kum guk sung khai tuhin a piangte na kaikhawm ding uh hi.
Exodus23:11 Ahih hangin a kum sagihna ciangin
Exodus23:12 Ni guk sung na nasep uh na sem ding uh hi. Ahih hangin na bawngtal le na la in tawlngakna a neih theih nading le
Exodus23:13 Noteʼ tunga kong gente khempeuh thudon un; pasian dangteʼ min genin nei kei unla
Exodus23:14 Kum khatin thum vei
Exodus23:15 Silngo sawh loh anlum pawi na bawl ding uh hi. Keimah in note kong thupiak bangin Abib kha sung a kiseh sa hun ciangin ni sagih sung silngo sawh loh anlum na ne ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua kha sungin Egypt panin note na paikhia uh hi. Khut hawmguak tawh keima mai ah kuamah hong kilak lo ding hi.
Exodus23:16 Note in lo-a na tuh uh
Exodus23:17 Topa Pasian ’ mai ah pasal khempeuh kum khatin thum vei kilaak ding uh hi.
Exodus23:18 Note in silngo sawh anlum tawh keimah biakpiakna si na pia khawm kei ding uh a
Exodus23:19 Note in na anpalte uh lakah a tung masa pen Topa na Pasian uh inn ah na paipih ding uh hi. Note in a piʼ nawizu tawh keel no na huan kei ding uh hi.

Exodus23:28 Noteʼ mai panin Hiv mite

Exodus26:1 “Tua tham loin a kopin a kikhuk khau hoih tawh a kigan dalna puan sawm le a dum
Exodus26:2 Dalna puan a dung pi sawm li le pi nih hi dinga
Exodus26:3 Dalna puan ngate khatlekhat kikhuituah ding hi.
Exodus26:4 A kikhuituah a masa dalna puan a nawlnung penʼ nawl dungsuk ah khau dum tawh a bilvangte na bawl ding hi. Tua bangmahin a kikhuituah a nihna dalna puan a nawlnung penʼ nawl dung suk mahah a bilvangte na bawl ding hi.
Exodus26:5 Dalna puan khat tungah bilvang sawm nga bawlin
Exodus26:6 Biakbuk pen bup khat a suah theih nadingin nangmah in kham kilhna sawm nga bawlin
Exodus26:7 “Biakbuk a tung khuh nadingin keel mul tawh puante zong na bawl dinga

Exodus26:9 Tua puan ngate amau le amau khui tuahin
Exodus26:10 A kikhuituah puan khat nawl ah a bilvang sawm nga bawlin
Exodus26:11 Tua pen bup khat a suah theih nadingin nangmah in sumngo kilhna sawm nga bawlin
Exodus26:12 Puanbuk puan a val khia
Exodus26:13 Puanbuk puan a dunglam

Exodus26:15 “Biakbuk adingin a po to ding khuampeekte singkha sing na bawl ding hi.
Exodus26:16 A khuampeek khat a tun pi sawm le nga hi dinga
Exodus26:17 A bulh nadingin a khuampeek khat ah a zang nih ciat om ding hi. Biakbuk khuampeek khempeuh tua bangin na bawl ding hi.
Exodus26:18 Biakbuk khuampeekte na bawl ding hi: Leitaw lam pang adingin khuampeek sawm nih hi ding hi.
Exodus26:19 A khuampeek sawm nihteʼ bulah bullen sawm li ngun tawh na bawl dinga
Exodus26:20 Biakbuk a pang nihna lam
Exodus26:21 ngun tawh kibawl a bullen sawm lite adingin
Exodus26:22 Nitumna lam
Exodus26:23 Biakbuk nung lam kiute adingin khuampeek nih na bawl ding hi.
Exodus26:24 Tuate a bul lamah kikak dinga
Exodus26:25 Ngun tawh kibawl amauʼ bullen sawm le gukte ading a khuampeek giat pha dinga
Exodus26:26 “Singkha sing

Exodus26:28 A zawl laita
Exodus26:29 A khuampeekte kham tawh zutin
Exodus26:30 A lim ding geelna
Exodus26:31 “A dum

Exodus26:33 A kilhnate ah dalna puan khai sukin

Exodus26:35 Dalna puan pua lamah sabuai koihin
Exodus26:36 “Puanbuk kongkhak dingin a dum
Exodus26:37 Kong puankhai adingin singkha khuampi nga bawlin kham tawh na zut ding hi. A vankhainate kham hi dinga
Exodus27:1 “Biakna tau ding singkha sing tawh bawl in. Pi sagih le alang sau-in pi sagih le alang mah na zaisak ding hi. Biakna tau a ning kikim dinga
Exodus27:2 A kiu lite ah ki na bawl ding hi. A kite pen a biakna tau tawh sakhat hi dinga
Exodus27:3 Ama adingin vut koih nading beelte le kawbiate
Exodus27:4 Ama adingin siklen
Exodus27:5 Siklen in biakna tau kimciang a bat suk theih nadingin biakna tau zawl nuai panin na bulh ding hi.
Exodus27:6 Biakna tau adingin singkha sing zawlte bawlin sumngo tawh tuate na zut ding hi.
Exodus27:7 A kipuak ciangin biakna tau pang nihte ah a zawlte a om theih nadingin a kualteʼ vang sungah a zawlte kikhum ding hi.
Exodus27:8 Singpekte tawh kuak nei-in biakna tau na bawl dinga
Exodus27:9 “Biakbuk tual na bawl ding hi. A tual in leitaw lam pangah pang khat adingin pi za le sawm nga a sau
Exodus27:10 A khuam sawm nih le a bullen sawm nih pen sumngo tawh a kibawl hi dinga
Exodus27:11 Leilu lam pang ading zong a sauna tua bangmah hi-in
Exodus27:12 Nitumna lam pangah buktual a vailam adingin khuampi sawm le bullen sawmte tawh pi sawm sagih le nga a sau a kikhai suk dalna puan om ding hi.
Exodus27:13 A mailam

Exodus27:15 A pang lang khat ah a kikhai suk dalna puan pen pi sawm nih le nih le alang hi dinga

Exodus28:1 “Tua ciangin keima tungah siampi na a sem dingin Israel mite lak panin na sanggampa Aaron le a tapate Nadab le Abihu

Exodus28:6 “Amaute in siampi puan pen

Exodus29:1 “Amaute in keima tungah siampi na a sep theih nadingun amaute na sianthosak nadingin amauteʼ tungah na hih ding thute: Bawngtalno khat le a sitbaang lo tuutal nih

Exodus29:6 Ama lu tungah dialpi khimsakin
Exodus29:7 Nangmah in nilh sathau la-in

Exodus29:29 “Aaronʼ biakna puan siangthote pen ama sih khit ciangin a tapateʼ tungah kipia dinga
Exodus29:30 Ama za luahin siampi na a sem a tapa in siangtho munah nasem dingin kikhopna buk ah a pai ciangin ni sagih sung tuate silh ding hi.
Exodus29:31 “Nangmah in kipsakna tuutal la-in a siangtho biakna mun khat ah a sa na huan ding hi.
Exodus29:32 Aaron le a tapate in kikhopna buk kongkhak ah tuutal sa le lawh sunga om anlum ne ding uh hi.
Exodus29:33 Amaute in amaute a kikipsak nading le a siangthosak dingin kilemna a kibawlna tua ante ne ding uh a

Exodus29:36 Kilem nadingin mawhna hanga biakna-in nisimin bawngtal khat na pia ding hi. Sianthosak nadingin sathau na nilh ciang le kilemna na bawl ciangin biakna tau adingin khialhna hanga biakna khat zong na pia ding hi.

Leviticus1:2 “Israel mite tungah gen inla
Leviticus1:3 “Ama biakna pen bawng hon panin meihal biakna ahihleh
Leviticus1:4 Amah in meihal biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga dinga

Leviticus1:6 Tua ciangin amah in meihal biakna ganhing a vun hawkin semnen dinga
Leviticus1:7 Aaronʼ suan siampite in biakna tau tungah mei koihin
Leviticus1:8 Tua ciangin Aaronʼ suan siampite in a sanente
Leviticus1:9 ahih hangin a sungkuate le a khete tui tawh sil ding hi. Tua ciangin siampipa in mei tawh kihal biakna
Leviticus1:10 “Meihal biak nadingin ama letsong pen tuu hitaleh keel hitaleh a hon lak panin ahihleh

Leviticus1:12 Tua ciangin amah in semnen dinga

Leviticus1:17 Amah in a khate-in bal kek dinga
Leviticus2:1 “Mi khatpeuh in Topaʼ tungah an tawh biakna hong paipih leh
Leviticus2:2 tua ciangin Aaronʼ suan siampite kiangah paipih ding hi. Tua ciangin siampipa in annel khut dim le sathau
Leviticus2:3 An tawh biakna a val teng pen Aaron le a tapate ading hi ding hi. Tua pen Topaʼ tungah mei tawh biakna sung panin a siangtho pen ahi hi.
Leviticus2:4 “Nangmah in biak nadingin meibung sunga ki-em an tawh biakna na paipih ciangin
Leviticus2:5 “Na biakna pen beelpei daii tunga ki-em an tawh biakna ahihleh
Leviticus2:6 Balnenin a tungah sathau na sung ding hi. Tua pen an tawh biakna ahi hi.
Leviticus2:7 “Na biakna pen sikbeel daii sunga kihuan an tawh biakna ahihleh
Leviticus2:8 Nangmah in hih nate tawh a kibawl an tawh biakna
Leviticus2:9 Siampipa in an tawh biakna panin a phawkna biakna teng la-in
Leviticus2:10 An tawh biakna a val teng pen Aaron le a tapate ading hi ding hi. Tua pen Topaʼ tungah mei tawh biakna sung panin a siangtho pen ahi hi.
Leviticus2:11 “ Topaʼ tungah na paipih an tawh biakna pen silngo tawh kibawl lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh silngo hitaleh khuaizu hitaleh khat peuhpeuh Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna-in na hal kei ding hi.
Leviticus2:12 Anpal tawh biakna ahihleh Topaʼ kiangah na paipih thei ding hi. Ahih hangin a gim namtui dingin biakna tau tungah kipia lo ding hi.
Leviticus2:13 An tawh na biaknate khempeuh ci na sawh ding hi. An tawh na biakna ah na Pasian tawh na thuciamna ci sawh loin na om kei dinga
Leviticus2:14 “Anpal tawh Topaʼ tungah biakna na piak leh
Leviticus2:15 Nang in a tungah sathau sungin
Leviticus2:16 Siampipa in phawk nadingin a kigawi vui an pawl khat
Leviticus3:1 “Mi khatʼ biakna pen thunuam a biakna ahih a
Leviticus3:2 Tua ciangin amah in a biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga-in kikhopna buk kongah go dinga
Leviticus3:3 Thunuam a biakna panin Topaʼ tungah mei tawh biakna-in a gilpi tuam a thaute le a sungkuateʼ tunga a om a thau khempeuh tawh
Leviticus3:4 a kawnga om a kal nihte a thau le a kalte tawh a lakkhiat khop ding ahi a sintuamte pia ding uh hi.
Leviticus3:5 Tua ciangin Aaronʼ suante in mei tunga om sing tunga meihal biakpiakna tau tung mahah hal ding uh hi. Tua pen Topa adingin a gim namtui
Leviticus3:6 “ Topaʼ tungah thunuam a a piak ding ama biakna pen tuu le keel honte sung panin a nu hitaleh a pa hitaleh ganhing khat ahihleh
Leviticus3:7 Amah in biak nadingin tuuno khat a piak leh
Leviticus3:8 a biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga-in kikhopna buk mai ah go ding hi. Tua ciangin Aaronʼ suante in biakna tau kimkot tungah a si theh ding uh hi.
Leviticus3:9 Tua ciangin thunuam a biakna panin Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna-in a thau
Leviticus3:10 a kawnga om a kal nihte a thau tawh
Leviticus3:11 Tua ciangin siampipa in Topaʼ tungah mei tawh kihal an tawh biakna-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi.
Leviticus3:12 “Ama biakna keel ahihleh
Leviticus3:13 a lu tungah a khut nga-in kikhopna buk mai ah go ding hi. Tua ciangin Aaronʼ suante in biakna tau kimkot tungah a si theh ding uh hi.
Leviticus3:14 Tua ciangin Topaʼ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna-in piak dingin a gilpi tuam a thau le a sungkuate tunga om a thau khempeuh tawh
Leviticus3:15 a kawnga om a kal nihte a thau tawh
Leviticus3:16 Tua ciangin siampipa in a gim namtui dingin mei tawh kihal an tawh biakna-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi. A thau khempeuh Topa -aʼ ahi hi.
Leviticus3:17 Tua pen na khang tawntungun na teenna khempeuh uh ah note in a thau le sisan na nek loh nadingun a tawntungin ngeina kip hi ding hi
Leviticus4:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus4:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Hih lo ding ci-in Topa in a thupiakte khat peuhpeuh
Leviticus4:3 a khial pa pen sathau a kinilh siampipa ahih a
Leviticus4:4 Amah in Topaʼ mai kikhopna buk kongah a bawngtal paipihin
Leviticus4:5 Tua ciangin sathau a kinilh siampipa in a bawngtal si tawm khat la-in
Leviticus4:6 Tua ciangin siampipa in a si sungah a khutme diahin
Leviticus4:7 Tua ciangin siampipa in kikhopna buk sung Topaʼ mai-a om paknamtui biakna tau kite a si kim khat nuhin
Leviticus4:8 Tua ciangin amah in khialhna hanga biakna bawngtal thau khempeuh a gilpi tuam a thau le a sungkuate tunga om a thau khempeuh tawh
Leviticus4:9 a kawnga om a kal nihte a thau tawh
Leviticus4:10 (thunuam a biakna bawngtal panin hihte a kilak mah bangin) la dinga
Leviticus4:11 Ahih hangin bawngtal vun le a sa khempeuh
Leviticus4:12 a bawngtal buppi pua khia-in vut kibuakna
Leviticus4:13 “Israel mihonte khempeuh in theih lohna hangin khialhna khat gamta-in tua pen mihonte in a phawk kei a
Leviticus4:14 amauʼ gamtatna sa khialhna a kitheih ciangin
Leviticus4:15 Tua ciangin mihonteʼ upate in Topaʼ mai
Leviticus4:16 Tua ciangin sathau a kinilh siampipa in kikhopna buk ah bawngtal si kim khat paipih dinga
Leviticus4:17 a si sungah a khutme diahin dalna puan mai Topaʼ mai ah sagih vei theh ding hi.
Leviticus4:18 Tua ciangin amah in Topaʼ mai kikhopna buk sunga om biakna tau kite tungah a si kim khat zut dinga
Leviticus4:19 Tua ciangin amah in a thau khempeuh la-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi.
Leviticus4:20 Tua bangin a bawngtal hih ding hi. Amah in khialhna hanga biakna bawngtal a hih sa mah bangin hih zong hih ding hi. Siampipa in amau aʼ dingin kilemna bawlsak dinga
Leviticus4:21 Amah in giahphual pua ah bawngtal pua khia dinga
Leviticus4:22 “Ukpa khat khialin
Leviticus4:23 ama gamtatna sa khialhna ama tungah a va kihilh leh
Leviticus4:24 keel lu tungah a khut nga-in
Leviticus4:25 Tua ciangin siampipa in a khutme tawh khialhna hanga biakna si tawm la-in meihal biakna tau kite nuhin meihal biakna tau bulah a si om lai teng sung ding hi.
Leviticus4:26 Thunuam a biakna sathaute mah bangin amah in biakna tau tungah a thau khempeuh hal ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin siampipa in ama khialhna hangin kilemna bawlsak dinga
Leviticus4:27 “Hih lo ding
Leviticus4:28 ama gamtatna sa a khialhna ama tungah a kihilh ciangin amah in a gamtatna sa a khialhna hangin biak nading a sitbaang lo keel a nu khat paipih ding hi.
Leviticus4:29 Amah in a khialhna hanga biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga-in
Leviticus4:30 Siampipa in a khutme tawh si tawm la-in meihal biakna tau kite nuh dinga
Leviticus4:31 Thunuam a biakna panin a thaute a kilakkhiat mah bangin amah in a thau khempeuh la khia dinga
Leviticus4:32 “Amah in khialhna hanga biakna-in a piak dingin tuuno khat a paipih leh
Leviticus4:33 khialhna hanga biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga-in
Leviticus4:34 Tua ciangin siampipa in khialhna hanga biakna si tawm khat a khutme tawh la-in meihal biakna tau kite nuh dinga
Leviticus4:35 Thunuam a biakpiakna panin tuuno thau a kilakkhiat mah bangin amah in a thau khempeuh la khia dinga
Leviticus5:1 “Mi khatpeuh teci pang dingin a kisap ciangin a muh sa a theih sa thute gen loin a ip leh
Leviticus5:2 “Tua ahih kei leh mi khatpeuh in gamlak ganhing nin a si sa hitaleh inn ganhing nin a si sa hitaleh a bokvak a nin ganhing a si sa hitaleh
Leviticus5:3 “Tua ahih kei leh amah in mihing nitna hitaleh
Leviticus5:4 “Tua ahih kei leh mi khatpeuh in a sia bawl ding hitaleh a pha bawl ding hitaleh mite a kiciam theih ngei kiciamna nam khat peuhpeuh ama kam tawh a theih lohin a kiciam pak khak leh
Leviticus5:5 “Hihte khat peuhpeuh ah mi khat a mawh ciangin
Leviticus5:6 mawhna hanga biakna-in tuu hon pan ahi a
Leviticus5:7 “Ahih hangin amah in tuuno khat a piak zawh kei leh a gamtatna sa a khialhna hangin Topaʼ tungah biakna-in vakhu nih ahi a
Leviticus5:8 Amah in siampipa tungah tuate paipih dinga
Leviticus5:9 Amah in khialhna hanga biakna si tawm khat biakna tau pangah theh dinga
Leviticus5:10 Tua ciangin amah in ngeina kip om bangin meihal biak nadingin a khat pia ding hi. Siampipa in a gamtatna sa a khialhna hangin kilemna bawlsak dinga
Leviticus5:11 “Ahih hangin amah in vakhu nih ahi a
Leviticus5:12 Amah in siampipa kiangah paipih dinga
Leviticus5:13 Tua bangin siampipa in hihte khat peuhpeuh a gamtatna sa a khialhna hangin kilemna bawlsak dinga
Leviticus5:14 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus5:15 “Mi khatpeuh in theih lohna hangin thu palsatin Topaʼ na a siangtho khat peuhpeuh ah a khialh leh
Leviticus5:16 Amah in a siangtho na a hih khialhna ah lohkikna zong bawl dinga
Leviticus5:17 “Hih lo ding
Leviticus5:18 Tuu hon lak pan a sitbaang lo tuutal khat
Leviticus5:19 Tua pen Topaʼ tungah khial ahih manin mawhna hanga biakna ahi hi
Leviticus6:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus6:2 “Mi khatpeuh khialin
Leviticus6:3 tua ahih kei leh a mang na khat mu-in tua thu ah zuau-in a man loin kiciam a
Leviticus6:4 khialin a mawh ciangin amah in a suhte hitaleh
Leviticus6:5 a man loin a kiciamnasa na khat peuhpeuh hitaleh loh ding hi. Amah in a cingin lohin seh nga ah khat piak beh dinga
Leviticus6:6 Tua ciangin a mawhna hanga a biak nading
Leviticus6:7 Siampipa in Topaʼ mai ah ama ading kilemna bawlsak dinga
Leviticus6:8 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus6:9 “Aaron le a tapate thu pia inla
Leviticus6:10 Siampipa in a saihadial puan silhin
Leviticus6:11 Tua ciangin amah in a puante suahin puan dang silh dinga
Leviticus6:12 Biakna tau tunga mei kikuangsak den dinga
Leviticus6:13 Biakna tau tungah mei kikuangsak tawntung dinga
Leviticus6:14 “Tua ciangin an tawh biakna ngeina hih bang ahi hi. Aaronʼ suante in biakna tau mai
Leviticus6:15 Mi khat in
Leviticus6:16 Aaron le a tapate in a om lai teng ne ding uh hi. A siangtho mun khat ah silngo sawh lohin ne ding uh a
Leviticus6:17 Tua pen silngo sawhin a ki-em hi lo ding hi. Meihal biakna hong kipiakna sung panin amauʼ tanh dingin ka piak sa ahi hi. Tua pen khialhna hanga biakna le mawhna hanga biakna bangin a siangtho pen ahi hi.
Leviticus6:18 Na khang tawntung uh adingin thu hong kipiak mah bangin
Leviticus6:19 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus6:20 “Aaron le a suante sathau a kinilh ni-in Topaʼ tungah hih bangin biakna kipia ding hi: An tawh biakna ngeina bangin annel lawh khat
Leviticus6:21 Tua pen beelpei tung khat ah sathau tawh kibawl ding hi. An tawh biakna mah bangin limtakin hel sa le balnen sa-in na paipih dinga
Leviticus6:22 Aaronʼ suante sung panin amah a laih dingin sathau a kinilh siampipa in
Leviticus6:23 Siampipa in an tawh a biakna peuhmah a vekpi-in kihal dinga
Leviticus6:24 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus6:25 “Aaron le a tapate tungah hih bangin gen in: Khialhna hanga biakna ngeina hih bang ahi hi. Meihal biakna a kigawhna mun Topaʼ mai ah khialhna hanga biakna kigo dinga
Leviticus6:26 Khialhna hanga biakna a pia siampipa in kikhopna buktual sung a siangtho mun khat ah ne ding hi.
Leviticus6:27 A sa a lawng peuhmah a siangtho suak ding hi. Puan tungah a si a kitheh khak ciangin
Leviticus6:28 Tua ciangin a kihuanna leibeel kisukham ding hi. Ahih hangin taaubeelin a kihuan ahihleh a beel kikiatin tui sungah kisawp siang sitset ding hi.
Leviticus6:29 Siampiteʼ lak panin pasal peuhmah in ne thei ding uh hi. Tua in a siangtho pen ahi hi.
Leviticus6:30 Ahih hangin siangtho munah kilemna bawl nadingin kikhopna buk sungah a kipaipih si a kilak khiatna
Leviticus7:1 “Mawhna hanga biakna ngeina
Leviticus7:2 Amaute in meihal biakna a gawhna mun uh ah mawhna hanga biakna go ding uh a
Leviticus7:3 Tua ciangin a thau khempeuh
Leviticus7:4 a kawnga om a kal nihte a thau tawh
Leviticus7:5 Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna-in siampipa in biakna tau tungah hal dinga
Leviticus7:6 Siampite lakah pasal peuhmah in a siangtho mun khat ah ne thei ding uh hi; tua in a siangtho pen ahi hi.
Leviticus7:7 “Mawhna hanga biakna pen khialhna hanga biakna tawh kibang a
Leviticus7:8 Mi khatpeuhʼ meihal biakna a piaksak siampipa in ama piaksak tua meihal biakna a vun ngah ding hi.
Leviticus7:9 Mei bung sunga a ki-em an tawh biakna peuhmah leh sikbeel daii ahi a
Leviticus7:10 An tawh biakna khempeuh
Leviticus7:11 “Mi khatpeuh in Topaʼ tungah a piak theih ding
Leviticus7:12 Amah in lungdam kohna-in a piak leh
Leviticus7:13 Amah in lungdam koh nadingin thunuam a ama biakpiakna tawh silngo kisawh anlum mohte ama biakna-in paipih khawm ding hi.
Leviticus7:14 Amah in Topa biak nadingin tua biakna sung panin moh khat ciat pia ding a
Leviticus7:15 Lungdam kohna-in thunuam a ama biakpiakna a sa pen a piak ni-in kine dinga
Leviticus7:16 “Ahih hangin ama biakpiakna pen thuciamna hanga biakpiakna ahi a
Leviticus7:17 Ahih hangin a ni thum ni-in biakpiakna sa a om lai teng mei tawh kihal ding hi.
Leviticus7:18 A ni thum ni-in thunuam a ama biakpiakna sa khat peuhpeuh a kinek leh
Leviticus7:19 “A nin na khat peuhpeuh tawh a kisawh kha sa kine lo dinga
Leviticus7:20 A nin hi napi-in thunuam a Topaʼ tungah biakpiakna sa a ne pa ama mipihteʼ lak panin kihawl khia ding hi.
Leviticus7:21 Mi khatpeuh in mihing nin hitaleh ganhing nin hitaleh a kihhuai a nin khat peuhpeuh hitaleh lawng a
Leviticus7:22 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus7:23 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note in bawngtal ahi a
Leviticus7:24 A mawk sih ganhing thau leh gamsate in a bal gawp ganhing thaute
Leviticus7:25 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna ganhing thau a ne mi peuhmah ama mipihteʼ lak panin kihawl khia ding hi.
Leviticus7:26 Tua tham loin note in na teenna uh mun khat peuhpeuh ah vasa sisan hitaleh ganhing sisan hitaleh si peuhmah na ne kei ding uh hi.
Leviticus7:27 Si khat peuhpeuh a ne mi peuhmah ama mipihteʼ lak panin kihawl khia ding hi
Leviticus7:28 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus7:29 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Topaʼ tungah thunuam a ama biakpiakna a pia pa in Topaʼ kiangah ama biakna paipih ding hi. Thunuam a ama biakpiakna panin
Leviticus7:30 amah in Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna a khutin paipih ding hi. Topaʼ mai ah vei-a biak nadingin a iik a kivei theih nadingin amah in a thau a iik tawh paipih ding hi.
Leviticus7:31 Siampipa in biakna tau tungah a thau hal dinga
Leviticus7:32 Thunuam a na biakpiakna panin biakna-in siampipa tungah a taklam phei na pia ding uh hi.
Leviticus7:33 Aaronʼ suante sung panin thunuam a biakna si le a thau a pia pa in a taklam phei a ngah ding ahi hi.
Leviticus7:34 Bang hang hiam cih leh a kivei a iik le a kipia a phei pen keimah in Israel miteʼ tung panin thunuam a amauʼ biakpiakna sung panin la khia-in
Leviticus7:35 Hih pen
Leviticus7:36 Israel mite in amaute tungah a piak nadingin amaute sathau a kinilh ni-in Topa in hih thu pia a
Leviticus7:37 Hihte pen amauʼ biaknate Topaʼ tungah a piak nadingun amah in Israel mite Sinai sehnel gamah a thupiak ni-in Topa in Sinai Mual tungah Moses a thupiak
Leviticus7:38 
Leviticus8:1 Topa in Moses kiangah

Leviticus8:3 kikhopna buk kongah Israel mihonte khempeuh khawm in
Leviticus8:4 Topa in amah a thupiak bangin Moses in hih a
Leviticus8:5 Moses in mihonte kiangah
Leviticus8:6 Tua ciangin Moses in Aaron le a tapate paipihin tui tawh amaute a sil hi.
Leviticus8:7 Amah in a puan tungsilh amah silhsak a
Leviticus8:8 Amah in ama tungah a awmdal bulhin
Leviticus8:9 Amah in Aaronʼ lu tungah a dialpi khimsakin
Leviticus8:10 Tua ciangin Moses in nilh sathau la-in
Leviticus8:11 Amah in biakna tau tungah tuate kim khat sagih vei thehin
Leviticus8:12 Amah in nilh sathau kim khat Aaronʼ tungah sung a
Leviticus8:13 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin
Leviticus8:14 Tua ciangin amah in khialhna hanga biakna bawngtal paipih a
Leviticus8:15 Kilemna bawl nadingin Moses in a bawngtal go a
Leviticus8:16 A sungkuate tunga om a thau khempeuh le a sintuamte le a kal nihte a thau tawh la-in
Leviticus8:17 Ahih hangin
Leviticus8:18 Tua ciangin Moses in meihal biakna tuutal pia a
Leviticus8:19 Moses in tua tuutal go-in
Leviticus8:20 Tuutal a kisem nen ciangin
Leviticus8:21 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin
Leviticus8:22 Tua ciangin Moses in a tuutal dang
Leviticus8:23 Moses in tuutal go a
Leviticus8:24 Aaronʼ tapate hong kipaipih a
Leviticus8:25 Tua ciangin amah in a thau
Leviticus8:26 Topaʼ mai ah a om silngo sawh loh anlum lawh sung panin amah in silngo sawh loh moh khat le sathau sawh anlum moh khat le mohpheng khat la-in
Leviticus8:27 Amah in hihte khempeuh
Leviticus8:28 Tua ciangin Moses in amauteʼ khut sung panin tuate la-in
Leviticus8:29 Moses in a iik la-in vei-a biakna-in Topaʼ mai ah a vei hi. Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin tua pen kipsakna tuutal panin Mosesʼ tanh ahi hi.
Leviticus8:30 Tua ciangin Moses in nilh sathau kim khat le biakna tau tunga om a si la-in
Leviticus8:31 Moses in Aaron le a tapate kiangah
Leviticus8:32 a sa le anlum na khamvalte uh mei tawh na hal ding uh hi.
Leviticus8:33 Note hong kikipsak nading hun ni sagih sung hi ding ahih manin

Leviticus9:1 A ni giat ni-in Moses in Aaron le a tapate le Israel upate a sam hi.
Leviticus9:2 Amah in Aaronʼ kiangah
Leviticus9:3 Israel mite kiangah
Leviticus9:4 le thunuam a biakna-in Topaʼ mai ah piak dingin bawngtal khat le tuutal khat le sathau tawh a kibawl an tawh biakna la un. Bang hang hiam cih leh tu ni-in note tungah Topa hong kilang ding hi
Leviticus9:5 Amaute in zong kikhopna buk mai ah Mosesʼ thupiak teng hong paipih uh a
Leviticus9:6 Moses in
Leviticus9:7 Aaronʼ kiangah
Leviticus9:8 Tua ahih ciangin Aaron in biakna tau naihin
Leviticus9:9 Aaronʼ tapate in ama tungah a si pia uh a
Leviticus9:10 Ahih hangin
Leviticus9:11 A sa le a vunte ahihleh giahphual pua lamah mei tawh a hal hi.
Leviticus9:12 Tua ciangin a meihal biakna a go hi. A tapate in ama tungah a si pia uh a
Leviticus9:13 Amaute in meihal biakna ama tungah a nennenin a lutang tawh pia uh a
Leviticus9:14 Tua ciangin amah in a sungkuate le a khete sawp a
Leviticus9:15 Tua ciangin a masa-a khialhna hanga biakna mah bangin amah in miteʼ biakna pia-in
Leviticus9:16 Tua ciangin meihal biakna paipihin ngeina kip om sa bangin a pia hi.
Leviticus9:17 Amah in zingsang a meihal biakna banah an tawh biakna paipihin
Leviticus9:18 Mosesʼ thupiak bangin amah in mite adingin thunuam a biakna bawngtal le tuutal zong a go hi. A tapate in ama kiangah a si paipih uh a
Leviticus9:19 bawngtal le tuutal thau
Leviticus9:20 le a thau
Leviticus9:21 Ahih hangin Aaron in a iikte le a taklam pheite
Leviticus9:22 Tua ciangin Aaron in miteʼ lamah a khutte laam to-in thupha a piak khit ciangin khialhna hanga biakna le meihal biakna le thunuam a biakna a piakna panin hong pai suk hi.
Leviticus9:23 Kikhopna buk sungah Moses le Aaron hong tum uh a
Leviticus9:24 Topaʼ mai panin mei hong piang khia-in meihal biakna le biakna tau tunga om sathau a kang hi. Mi khempeuh in a muh uh ciangin awng uh a
Leviticus10:1 Tu-in Aaronʼ tapate Nadab le Abihu in amauʼ paknamtui beel tuak la-in
Leviticus10:2 Topaʼ omna mun panin mei hong pai khia-in amaute kaang a
Leviticus10:3 Tua ciangin Moses in Aaronʼ kiangah
Leviticus10:4 Moses in Aaronʼ paʼ sanggampa Uzzielʼ tapate Mishael le Elizafan samin amaute kiangah
Leviticus10:5 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in hong naihin
Leviticus10:6 Tua ciangin Moses in Aaron le a tapate Eleazar le Ithamar kiangah
Leviticus10:7 Kikhopna buk kong panin a pua lamah paikhia kei un. Na pai uh leh na si ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ nilh sathau noteʼ tungah om hi
Leviticus10:8 Topa in Aaron kiangah
Leviticus10:9 “Nang hitaleh na tapate hitaleh kikhopna buk ah na pai uh ciangin leenggahzu hitaleh khamtheih zu hitaleh ne kei un. Na nek uh leh na si ding uh hi. Tua pen na suan na khakte uh tungah khang tawntungin ngeina kip khat hi ding hi.
Leviticus10:10 Note in a siangtho le a mawkmawk le a nin le a siang na khen ding uh hi.
Leviticus10:11 Topa in Moses tungtawnin amauteʼ tunga a gen sa thukhamte khempeuh note in Israel mite a hilh ding na hi uh hi
Leviticus10:12 Moses in Aaron le a om lai a tapate Eleazar le Ithamar kiangah
Leviticus10:13 Tua an pen Topaʼ tungah meihal biaknate lak panin nang le na tapateʼ kaih ding ahih manin a siangtho mun khat ah na ne ding uh hi. Tua bang ding mahin keiʼ tungah thu hong kipia hi.
Leviticus10:14 Ahih hangin a kivei a iik le a kipia a pheite pen nang le na tapate le na tanute in a siangtho mun khatpeuh ah ne ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen Israel mite in thunuam a a biakpiakna panun nang le na tapateʼ kaih dinga hong kipia ahi hi.
Leviticus10:15 Topa in a thupiak sa bangin a kipia a phei le a kivei a iikte ahihleh Topaʼ mai ah vei-a biakna-in vei dingin amaute in meihal biakna sathau tawh hong paipih ding uh a
Leviticus10:16 Tu-in Moses in khialhna hanga biakna keel tawh kisai thu limtakin kan a
Leviticus10:17 “Note in mihonte adingin Topaʼ mai ah kilemna bawlin
Leviticus10:18 En un
Leviticus10:19 Tua ciangin Aaron in Moses kiangah
Leviticus10:20 Moses in tua thu a zak ciangin a lungkim hi.
Leviticus11:1 Topa in Moses le Aaron tungah
Leviticus11:2 “Israel mite kiangah hih bangin gen un: Hihte pen leitung a om ganhing khempeuh lak panin na nek theih ding uh a nungta ganhing ahi hi.
Leviticus11:3 Ganhingte lak panin a khecin a ka
Leviticus11:4 Ahi zongin eknel haite lak pan hitaleh khecin-kate lak pan hitaleh
Leviticus11:5 Sakikh ganhing in eknel a hai hangin a khecin ka lo ahih ciangin note adingin a nin ahi hi.
Leviticus11:6 Bilpi in eknel a hai hangin a khecin ka lo ahih ciangin note adingin a nin ahi hi.
Leviticus11:7 Vok pen khecin ka ahih hangin eknel hai lo ahih ciangin note adingin a nin ahi hi.
Leviticus11:8 Note in tuateʼ sa na ne kei ding uh a
Leviticus11:9 “Tui sunga omte sung panin nek theih dingte: Tuipi sung hitaleh gun sung hitaleh tui sungah a om phe le lip a neite peuhmah na ne thei ding uh hi.
Leviticus11:10 Ahih hangin tuipi sung
Leviticus11:11 Tuate pen note adingin a kihhuai hi ding hi. Note in tuateʼ sa na ne kei ding uh a
Leviticus11:12 Tui sunga a omte sung panin phe le lip a nei lo peuhmah note adingin a kihhuai ahi hi.
Leviticus11:13 “Vasate lak panin note in na kih ding uh
Leviticus11:14 mumeika
Leviticus11:15 va-ak nam khempeuh
Leviticus11:16 vasa-kalaoh
Leviticus11:17 keising
Leviticus11:18 gam vatawt
Leviticus11:19 gun vapi
Leviticus11:20 “Khe li tawh a pai
Leviticus11:21 Ahi zongin khe li tawh a pai
Leviticus11:22 Tuate lak panin na nek theih dingte uh: Kauphe kitom nam khempeuh
Leviticus11:23 Ahih hangin khe li nei-in kha a nei ganhing dangte khempeuh note adingin a kihhuai ahi hi.
Leviticus11:24 “Hihte tawh note a nin na suak ding uh hi. A si sa a lawng peuhmahte a nitak mateng a nin hi dinga
Leviticus11:25 a si sa them khat a pua peuhmah in a puan sawpin
Leviticus11:26 A khecin a ka ahih hangin eknel a hai lo ganhing peuhmah note adingin a nin ahi hi. Tuate a lawng peuhmah a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus11:27 Khe li tawh a pai ganhingte khempeuh lak panin amauʼ khebom tawh a paite khempeuh note adingin a nin ahi hi. Tuate a si sa a lawng kha peuhmahte a nitak dong a nin hi dinga
Leviticus11:28 a si sa a pua pa in a puan sawpin
Leviticus11:29 “Leitungah a vak kawikawi
Leviticus11:30 tawlbawk pi
Leviticus11:31 A hon tat ganhing khempeuhte lak panin hihte pen note adingin a nin ahi hi. Tuate a si sa a lawng peuhmah a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus11:32 Tuate a si sa khat peuhpeuh a tukna nate
Leviticus11:33 Tuate khat peuhpeuh leibeel khat peuhpeuh sungah a kiat leh
Leviticus11:34 Tua leibeel sungah a om a kine thei ding an tungah tua bang tui a tuk leh a nin hi ding hi. Tua bang beel sunga om dawn theih ding peuhmah a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus11:35 Tua bang a si sa them khat a tukna peuhmah a nin hi ding hi. Meibung hitaleh beelpei hitaleh kisuzan ding hi. Tuate a nin hi a
Leviticus11:36 Ahi zongin tuinak le tuibeem ahihleh a siang hi dinga
Leviticus11:37 A kivawh ding khaici tungah tua a si sate them khat a tuk leh
Leviticus11:38 Ahih hangin khaici tui kidiah a
Leviticus11:39 “Noteʼ nek theih ding ganhing khat peuhpeuh a sih leh a si sa a lawng pa pen a nitak mateng a nin hi dinga
Leviticus11:40 a si sa a ne pa in ama puante sawpin a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi. A si sa a pua pa in zong ama puante sawpin a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus11:41 “Leitungah a hon tat ganhing peuhmah a kihhuai hi a
Leviticus11:42 A awmtal peuhmah le khe li-a a pai peuhmah
Leviticus11:43 A hon tat ganhing khat peuhpeuh tawh nomau mah a kihhuai-in na kibawl tawm kei ding uh a
Leviticus11:44 Kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. Tua ahih ciangin note ki-ap unla
Leviticus11:45 Bang hang hiam cih leh noteʼ Pasian ahi dingin Egypt gam panin note a hong paikhiatpih pa pen keimah Topa ka hi hi. Tua ahih ciangin kei siangtho ka hih manin note na siangtho ding uh hi
Leviticus11:46 Hih pen a nin le a siang
Leviticus11:47 
Leviticus12:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus12:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Nupi khat gai-in ta pasal a neih leh ni sagih sung tua nu a nin hi dinga
Leviticus12:3 A ni giat ni-in a naungek vun dawn ki-at ding hi.
Leviticus12:4 Tua ciangin nupi in ama si luanna hangin a sian nadingin ni sawm thum le ni thum sung om lai ding hi. Amah in kisiansuahna ni a cin mateng a siangtho na khat peuhpeuh lawng loin
Leviticus12:5 “Ahih hangin amah in ta numei a neih leh

Leviticus13:1 Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah
Leviticus13:2 “Mi khat in ama pumpi vun tungah a bawk ahi a
Leviticus13:3 Siampipa in ama pumpi vun tunga natna mun vel ding hi. A natna munah a om a multe kangin ama vun sangin a natna thuktum zaw-in a kimuh leh
Leviticus13:4 Ahih hangin ama pumpi vun sungah a natna mun kang napi-in
Leviticus13:5 Siampipa in a ni sagih ni-in amah vel dinga
Leviticus13:6 Siampipa in a ni sagih ni-in amah velkik dinga
Leviticus13:7 Ahih hangin amah a sian nadingin siampipa kiangah a kilah khit ciangin a meima in a vun sung a lawh leh siampipa mai ah kilakkik ding hi.
Leviticus13:8 Siampipa in vel dinga
Leviticus13:9 “Mi khat in meima a neih ciangin siampipa kiangah kipaipih ding hi.
Leviticus13:10 Siampipa in vel dinga
Leviticus13:11 tua pen ama pumpi vun sungah a om lui sa phak natna hi a
Leviticus13:12 Siampipaʼ muh theihna ciangah tua natna in a vun phukhamin
Leviticus13:13 siampipa in vel dinga
Leviticus13:14 Ahih hangin ama tungah ma thak a kilat ciangin amah a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus13:15 Siampipa in a ma thak velin
Leviticus13:16 Ahih hangin a ma thak pen kikheel kikin a kang a suah leh
Leviticus13:17 siampipa in amah velin a natna pen a kang a suah leh
Leviticus13:18 “Mi khatpeuhʼ pumpi vun sungah a dam sa meimatum khat om a
Leviticus13:19 a meimatum munah a bawk kang ahi a
Leviticus13:20 Siampipa in vel dinga
Leviticus13:21 Ahih hangin siampipa in velin
Leviticus13:22 Tua in a vun sung a lawh leh phak natna hi a
Leviticus13:23 Ahih hangin a natna mun pen mun khat bekah omin a kilawh kei leh meimatum pawn hi a
Leviticus13:24 “Tua ahih kei leh
Leviticus13:25 siampipa in vel ding hi. Tua mun a om a multe kangin a vun sangin a natna a thuk zawk leh
Leviticus13:26 Ahih hangin siampipa in velin
Leviticus13:27 Siampipa in a ni sagih ni-in amah vel ding hi. Tua in a vun sung a lawh leh phak natna hi a
Leviticus13:28 Ahih hangin a natna mun pen mun khat bekah omin a vun sung lawh loin mualin a om leh
Leviticus13:29 “Numei ahi a
Leviticus13:30 siampipa in tua natna vel ding hi. Tua natna pen a vun sangin thuk zaw-in a kimuh a
Leviticus13:31 Siampipa in cithak natna velin
Leviticus13:32 a ni sagih ni-in siampipa in a natna vel ding hi. A cithak kilawh loin
Leviticus13:33 amah le amah a mul kikiat dinga
Leviticus13:34 A ni sagih ni-in siampipa in a cithak vel dinga
Leviticus13:35 Ahih hangin amah a kisiansak khit ciangin a cithak in a vun sung a lawh leh
Leviticus13:36 siampipa in vel dinga
Leviticus13:37 Ahih hangin ama mitah
Leviticus13:38 “Numei ahi a
Leviticus13:39 siampipa in vel dinga
Leviticus13:40 “Mi khat a sam pulh a
Leviticus13:41 Mi khat a taltang le a paang panin a sam le a mul a pulh leh
Leviticus13:42 Ahih hangin a lutol tung hitaleh a talkolh tung hitaleh a san kang meima a om leh
Leviticus13:43 Tua ciangin siampipa in amah vel dinga
Leviticus13:44 amah pen miphak hi a
Leviticus13:45 “Tua natna a nei miphak pa in puan kekte silhin a sam phiahsak dinga
Leviticus13:46 Amah in a natna a neih lai teng a nin hi ding hi. Amah a nin ahih manin giahphual pualam mun khat ah amah guak teeng ding hi.
Leviticus13:47 “Samul puan hitaleh saihadial puan hitaleh
Leviticus13:48 tua saihadial puan
Leviticus13:49 tua natna pen a hing melin ahi a
Leviticus13:50 Siampipa in a natna vel dinga
Leviticus13:51 Tua ciangin amah in a ni sagih ni-in a natna velkik ding hi. A natna pen puan tungah kizelin
Leviticus13:52 Amah in a puan hal ding hi. Tua natna pen puan a tung a phei ah hitaleh
Leviticus13:53 “Siampipa in velin
Leviticus13:54 siampipa in tua natna a banna pen amaute in a sawp ding uh thu pia dinga
Leviticus13:55 Siampipa in tua natna a banna pen a kisawp khit ciangin vel ding hi. Tua natna a banna mun a mel a kikheel kei leh
Leviticus13:56 Ahih hangin siampipa in vel a
Leviticus13:57 Tua ciangin a puan tung hitaleh puan a tung a phei tungah hitaleh savun tawh a kibawl na khat peuhpeuh tungah a kilatkik leh
Leviticus13:58 Ahih hangin a puan hitaleh puan a tung a phei hitaleh savun tawh a kibawl na khat peuhpeuh a kisawp khit ciangin tua natna a pai khiatna na pen
Leviticus13:59 Hih pen samul puan hitaleh saihadial puan hitaleh puan a tung hitaleh a phei hitaleh
Leviticus14:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus14:2 “Hih pen amah a kisiansak ni-in miphak paʼ zuih ding ngeina hi ding hi. Siampipa kiangah amah kipaipih dinga
Leviticus14:3 giahphual pua lamah siampipa pai khia-in vel ding hi. Tua ciangin a phak natna pen a phakpaʼ tung pan a dam leh
Leviticus14:4 a kisiangsak ding mipa adingin a hing vasa siang nih le taamtak sing le a ausan puan le puknah a la dingin siampipa in amaute sawl ding hi.
Leviticus14:5 Amaute in leibeel khat sunga kikoih tui luang tungah a vasa khat a gawh ding uh siampipa in thu pia ding hi.
Leviticus14:6 Amah in a hing lai vasa pen taamtak sing le a ausan puan le puknah tawh la khawmin
Leviticus14:7 Amah in phak natna panin a kisiangsak ding paʼ tungah sagih vei theh dinga
Leviticus14:8 A kisiangsak ding mipa in a puante sawpin
Leviticus14:9 A ni sagih ni-in amah in a sam
Leviticus14:10 “A ni giat ni-in amah in a sitbaang lo tuuno a pa nih le a sitbaang lo kum khat a pha tuuno a nu khat le an tawh biakna ahi sathau tawh annel lawh thum le sathau biingta khat la ding hi.
Leviticus14:11 Amah a siangsak ding siampipa in a kisiangsak ding mipa le hih nate
Leviticus14:12 Siampipa in tuuno a pa khat la-in sathau biingta khat tawh mawhna hanga biakna-in pia-in
Leviticus14:13 Amaute in khialhna hanga biakna le meihal biakna
Leviticus14:14 Siampipa in mawhna hanga biakna si tawm khat la-in
Leviticus14:15 Tua ciangin sathau biingta panin kim khat la-in a mahmahʼ veilam khut sungah sungin
Leviticus14:16 a veilam khut sunga om sathau sungah a taklam khutme diahin
Leviticus14:17 Ama khut sungah a om lai sathau kimkhatte pen siampipa in a kisiangthosak ding mipaʼ taklam bilteep
Leviticus14:18 Siampipa in a khut sunga sathau om lai teng a kisiangthosak ding mipaʼ lu nilh ding hi. Tua ciangin siampipa in ama adingin Topaʼ mai ah kilemna bawlsak ding hi.
Leviticus14:19 “A nitna panin a kisiangthosak ding mipa ading kilemna bawl nadingin siampipa in a khialhna hanga biakna pia ding hi. Tua khit ciangin amah in meihal biakna go dinga
Leviticus14:20 meihal biakna le an tawh biaknate
Leviticus14:21 “Ahih hangin amah zawngin tua zah a piak zawh kei leh
Leviticus14:22 vakhu nih ahi a
Leviticus14:23 A ni giat ni-in amah in Topaʼ mai
Leviticus14:24 Siampipa in mawhna hanga biakna tuuno le a sathau biingta khat la-in
Leviticus14:25 Amah in mawhna hanga biakna tuuno go ding hi. Siampipa in mawhna hanga biakna si tawm khat la-in
Leviticus14:26 Siampipa in a mahmahʼ veilam khut sungah a sathau kim khat sung dinga
Leviticus14:27 a veilam khut sunga a om sathau tawm khat a taklam khutme tawh Topaʼ mai ah sagih vei theh ding hi.
Leviticus14:28 Siampipa in ama khut sunga a om sathau tawm khat a kisiangthosak ding mipaʼ taklam bilteep
Leviticus14:29 Siampipa in a khut sunga a om lai sathau teng a kisiangthosak ding mipa ading Topaʼ mai ah kilemna bawl nadingin a lu nilhsak ding hi.
Leviticus14:30 Amah in vakhu hitaleh kawl vakhu no hitaleh
Leviticus14:31 khat pen khialhna hanga biak nading
Leviticus14:32 Hih pen phak natna a vei
Leviticus14:33 Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah
Leviticus14:34 “Note adingin kong piak Kanaan gamah na om ciangun noteʼ leitang a inn khat sungah phak natna kong tunsak ciangin
Leviticus14:35 inn nei pa pai-in siampipa kiangah
Leviticus14:36 Tua ciangin
Leviticus14:37 Amah in a natna vel ding hi. A natna pen tua inn kawm tungah omin
Leviticus14:38 inn sung panin inn kongah siampipa paikhia dinga
Leviticus14:39 A ni sagih ni-in siampipa hong paikikin en ding hi. Tua inn kawm tungah a natna a kizelh leh
Leviticus14:40 natna a banna suang la khia-in khuapi pualam a nin mun khat ah a paipih nadingun siampipa in thu pia ding hi.
Leviticus14:41 Amah in a inn sung kimkot kiatsakin
Leviticus14:42 Tua ciangin amaute in suang dang la-in
Leviticus14:43 “Amah in a suangte la khia-in a inn kiatin a zut khit ciangin tua inn sungah natna hong suahkik leh
Leviticus14:44 siampipa pai-in en ding hi. Inn sungah a natna a kizelh leh
Leviticus14:45 Amah in tua inn
Leviticus14:46 Tua tham loin tua inn a kikhakcip sungteng a sungah a lut mipa a nitak dong a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus14:47 Tua inn sungah a lum mipa le an a ne mipa in ama puante sawp ding hi.
Leviticus14:48 “Ahih hangin siampipa hong pai-in a vel a
Leviticus14:49 Tua inn siangthosak nadingin amah in vasa neu nih
Leviticus14:50 beel sunga kikoih tui luang tungah a vasa khat go dinga
Leviticus14:51 taamtak sing le puknah le a ausan khau pen a vasa hing tawh la khawmin
Leviticus14:52 Tua bangin amah in vasa si tawh
Leviticus14:53 vasa hing pen khuapi pualam gamlak ah khah khia ding hi. Tua bangin amah in tua inn adingin kilemna bawlsak dinga
Leviticus14:54 Hih pen phak natna khat peuhpeuh tawh kisai-in ngeina ahi hi: Cithak tawh kisai
Leviticus14:55 puan tung hitaleh inn sung hitaleh ah a om phak natna tawh kisai
Leviticus14:56 a bawk hitaleh meima hitaleh a tuampianʼ khat peuhpeuh tawh kisai-in
Leviticus14:57 bang hunin nin a
Leviticus15:1 Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah
Leviticus15:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Pasal khatpeuh
Leviticus15:3 Amah a ninsak a natui paikhia tawh kisai-in ngeina hih bang ahi hi: A natui a paipai a
Leviticus15:4 A natui a paikhia mipaʼ lupna le a tutna peuhmah a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus15:5 Ama lupna a lawng peuhmah in a puante sawp dinga
Leviticus15:6 A natui a paikhia mipaʼ tutnasa na khat peuhpeuh tungah a tu mi peuhmah in a puante sawp dinga
Leviticus15:7 A natui a paikhia mipaʼ pumpi a lawng mi peuhmah in a puante sawp dinga
Leviticus15:8 A natui a paikhia mipa in a siang mipaʼ tungah cil a siat leh
Leviticus15:9 A natui a paikhia mipa a tutna tutphah khat peuhpeuh zong a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus15:10 Ama nuai ah a om na khat peuhpeuh a lawng mipa pen a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi. Tua bang na a pua mipa in a puante sawp dinga
Leviticus15:11 A natui a paikhia mipa in tui sungah a khut sil lopi-in a lawn mi peuhmah in ama puante sawp dinga
Leviticus15:12 A natui a paikhia mipa in a lawn lei tawh kibawl umlebeelte kisukham dinga
Leviticus15:13 “A natui a paikhia mipa a natui a kan ciangin a kisiansak nadingin amah in ni sagih sung ngak dinga
Leviticus15:14 A ni giat ni-in amah in vakhu nih ahih kei leh kawl vakhu no nih la-in
Leviticus15:15 Siampipa in tuate
Leviticus15:16 “Mi khat in a natui a teh leh
Leviticus15:17 A tungah a natui a tukna puan le savun peuhmah tui tawh kisawp dinga
Leviticus15:18 Pasal le numei a lup khawm khit ciangin
Leviticus15:19 “Numei khat in nin a neih ciangin
Leviticus15:20 Amah a nit hun sungin a lupna le a tutna peuhpeuh a nin hi ding hi.
Leviticus15:21 Ama lupna a lawng peuhmah in a puan sawp dinga
Leviticus15:22 Ama tutna a lawng peuhmah in ama puante sawp dinga
Leviticus15:23 Ama tutna ahi lupna hitaleh na khat peuhpeuh hitaleh
Leviticus15:24 Pasal khat peuhmah tua nu tawh lumin
Leviticus15:25 “Numei khat in ama nit hun hi lo napi-in ni tampi sung a si a suak ahi a
Leviticus15:26 Ama nin neih hunsung tengin a tutna khempeuh zong a nit sungin ama lupna tawh kibang dinga
Leviticus15:27 Hih nate a lawng peuhmah a nin hi dinga
Leviticus15:28 Ahih hangin tua nu a nin a bei zawh ni sagih khit ciangin a siang hi ding hi.
Leviticus15:29 A ni giat ni-in tua nu in vakhu nih ahih kei leh kawl vakhu no nih la-in
Leviticus15:30 Siampipa in khialhna hanga biak nadingin khat pia-in
Leviticus15:31 “Amauʼ laizang a om ka biakbuk ninsak kha le-uh amaute in sih lawh ding uh ahih ciangin
Leviticus15:32 Hih pen a natui a paikhia mipa ahih kei leh a natui tehin
Leviticus15:33 nin a nei nu ading zong ahi hi. Hihte pen pasal a natui a paikhia mi
Leviticus16:1 Aaronʼ tapa nihte in ngeina lopi-in Topaʼ mai ah mei tawh va pai-in a sih lawh khit uh ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah thu a gen hi.
Leviticus16:2 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus16:3 Ahih hangin siangtho munah Aaron hong pai ding zia in: Khialhna hanga biak nadingin bawngtalno khat le meihal biak nadingin tuutal khat hong paipih ding hi.
Leviticus16:4 “Amah in a siangtho saihadial puan tungsilh silhin
Leviticus16:5 “Amah in Israel mihonte tung panin khialhna hanga biak nadingin keeltal nih le meihal biak nadingin tuutal khat la ding hi.
Leviticus16:6 Aaron in a mahmah adingin khialhna hanga biakna-in a bawngtal pia-in
Leviticus16:7 Tua ciangin amah in keeltal nih la-in
Leviticus16:8 Aaron in tua keel nihte tungah ai saanin
Leviticus16:9 Aaron in Topa ading ai a pha keel paipihin
Leviticus16:10 Ahih hangin Azazel adingin ai a pha keel pen gamlak ah Azazelʼ kiangah a kipuak theih nadingin kilemna bawl nadingin a hingin Topaʼ mai ah kipaipih ding hi.
Leviticus16:11 “Aaron in a mahmah adingin khialhna hanga biakna-in a bawngtal pia-in
Leviticus16:12 Amah in Topaʼ biakna tau panin mei-am a dim paknamtui beel khat le a kisu nen paknamtui khut nih dim la ding hi. Amah in dalna puan sungah paipihin
Leviticus16:13 thuciamna singkuang tungah a om hehpihna tokhom pen paknamtui khu in a tuam theih nadingin Topaʼ mai ah a om mei tungah a paknamtui koih ding hi. Tua hikeileh amah si ding hi.
Leviticus16:14 Amah in bawngtal si tawm khat la-in
Leviticus16:15 “Tua ciangin amah in mite ading ahi khialhna hanga biakna keel go-in
Leviticus16:16 Amah in tua bangin Israel miteʼ nitna hang
Leviticus16:17 Siangtho munah kilemna bawl dingin amah tumin ama ading
Leviticus16:18 Tua ciangin Topaʼ mai ah a om biakna tau ah amah va pai-in
Leviticus16:19 Amah in a khutme tawh a si tawm khat biakna tau tungah sagih vei thehin
Leviticus16:20 “Amah in siangtho mun
Leviticus16:21 Aaron in keel hing lu tungah a khut tegel nga-in
Leviticus16:22 Keel in amauʼ mawhnate khempeuh pua-in gam daihna ah a pai dingin a keel khah ding hi.
Leviticus16:23 “Tua ciangin kikhopna buk ah Aaron hong pai-in
Leviticus16:24 Amah in a siangtho mun khat ah
Leviticus16:25 Amah in biakna tau tungah khialhna hanga biakna sathau hal ding hi.
Leviticus16:26 Azazelʼ kiangah keel a paisak pa in a puante sawpin
Leviticus16:27 Siangtho munah kilemna bawl nadingin hong kipaipih si a kilakna
Leviticus16:28 Tuate a hal pa in ama puante sawpin
Leviticus16:29 “Hih pen
Leviticus16:30 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih ni-in note siansak nadingin note-aʼ ding kilemna kibawl dinga
Leviticus16:31 Tua pen note adingin a thupi tawlngakna Sabbath hi a
Leviticus16:32 A paʼ tanga siampi dingin sathau a kinilh a ki-ap siampipa in kilemna bawlin
Leviticus16:33 Amah in biakbuk siansuahna bawlin
Leviticus16:34 Hih pen Israel mite adingin amauʼ khialhnate khempeuh hangin kum khatin khatvei kilemna a kibawlsak theih nadingin note adingin a om tawntung ngeina kip khat hi ding hi
Leviticus17:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus17:2 “Aaron
Leviticus17:3 Israel mi khatpeuh in bawngtal ahi a
Leviticus17:4 Topaʼ biakbuk mai
Leviticus17:5 Hih pen
Leviticus17:6 Siampipa in kikhopna buk kong a Topaʼ biakna tau tungah a si thehin
Leviticus17:7 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in a biak uh keeldawite adingin amauʼ biakpiaknate go nawn lo ding uh hi. Hih pen amauʼ khang tawntungin amauteʼ tungah ngeina kip khat hi ding hi.
Leviticus17:8 “Nangmah in amaute tungah hih bangin na gen ding hi: Israel mite sung pan hitaleh
Leviticus17:9 Topaʼ tungah piak dingin kikhopna buk kongah a paipih kei leh
Leviticus17:10 “Israel mite sung pan hitaleh amauʼ lakah a peem khual mite sung pan hitaleh mi khat in si khat peuhpeuh a nek leh
Leviticus17:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh pumpi nuntakna pen si sungah om hi. Note ading kilemna bawl nadingin note adingin biakna tau tungah tua si ka pia zo hi. Si pen nuntakna ahih manin kilemna a piangsak na ahi hi.
Leviticus17:12 Tua ahih ciangin keimah in Israel mite tungah hih bangin ka ci khin hi: Note lakah kuamah in si ne lo dinga
Leviticus17:13 “Israel mite khatpeuh hitaleh
Leviticus17:14 Ganhing khempeuhʼ nuntakna pen a si ahih manin Israel mite tungah hih bangin ka ci khinzo hi: Ganhing khat peuhpeuh si na ne kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ganhing khempeuhʼ nuntakna pen a si ahi hi. Si a ne mi peuhmah a mipihte kiang panin kihawl khia ding hi.
Leviticus17:15 “A mawk sih hitaleh gamsate in a bal gawp hitaleh a ne mi peuhmah
Leviticus17:16 Ahih hangin amah in tuate sawp loin ahi zongin
Leviticus18:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus18:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi.
Leviticus18:3 Note na teenna uh Egypt gamah amaute a gamtat bangin note na gamta kei ding uh a
Leviticus18:4 Note in keima biakna ngeina kipte semin ka thukhamte lenin tuate na zui ding uh hi. Kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi.
Leviticus18:5 Tua ahih ciangin note in ka thukhamte le ka biakna ngeina kipte na zui ding uh hi. Tuate a zui mi peuhpeuh nungta ding hi. Kei pen Topa ka hi hi.
Leviticus18:6 “Note kuamah in na kinaipih na behte uh mawhpih dingin na naih kei ding uh hi. Kei pen Topa ka hi hi.
Leviticus18:7 Na nu mawhpihna tawh na paʼ tungah maizumna na tun kei ding hi. Amah pen na nu ahih manin na mawhpih kei ding hi.
Leviticus18:8 Nangmah in na paʼ zi dangte zong na mawhpih kei ding hi. Tua pen na paʼ mindai nading ahi hi.
Leviticus18:9 Nangmah in na sanggamnu
Leviticus18:10 Nangmah in na tapaʼ tanu ahih kei leh na tanuʼ tanu na mawhpih kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amauʼ mindaina pen nangma mindaina mah ahi hi.
Leviticus18:11 Na paʼ ziʼ tanu
Leviticus18:12 Na ni na mawhpih kei ding hi; tua nu pen na paʼ sanggam numei ahi hi.
Leviticus18:13 Na nuʼ sanggamnu na mawhpih kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah pen na nu tawh a kinai beh numei ahi hi.
Leviticus18:14 Na paʼ sanggampaʼ tungah mindaina na tun kei ding hi; tua pen ama zi na naih kei ding hi
Leviticus18:15 Na monu na mawhpih kei ding hi; tua nu pen na tapaʼ zi ahi hi; amah na mawhpih kei ding hi.
Leviticus18:16 Na sanggampaʼ zi na mawhpih kei ding hi; tua pen na sanggampaʼ mindai nading ahi hi.
Leviticus18:17 Na luppih numei khatʼ tanu na mawhpih kei dinga
Leviticus18:18 Nangmah in a sanggamnu a hingsuan dingin numei khat zi-in na la kei dinga
Leviticus18:19 “Nangmah in numei khat nin a neih laitak
Leviticus18:20 Na veengpaʼ zi tawh na lum khawm kei dinga
Leviticus18:21 Nangmah in Molek tungah meihal biakna-a piak dingin na tate khat peuhpeuh na pia kei dinga
Leviticus18:22 Numei khat tawh lup khop bangin pasal khat tawh na lum khawm kei ding hi; tua pen a kihhuai ahi hi.
Leviticus18:23 Ganhing khatpeuh tawh mawhin tua tawh na kininsak kei dinga
Leviticus18:24 “Hih nate khatpeuh tawh note kininsak kei un; bang hang hiam cih leh noteʼ mai-a ka paihkhiat minamte in hihte khempeuh tawh amaute kininsak uh hi.
Leviticus18:25 Leitung a nin suak ahih manin keimah in a leitang gimna pia-in
Leviticus18:26 Ahih hangin
Leviticus18:27 (bang hang hiam cih leh noteʼ ma-a a om gam mite in hih a kihhuaite khempeuh gamta uh ahih manin leitang a nin a suak hi;)
Leviticus18:28 tua bang hikeileh leitang in noteʼ ma-a a om minamte a luakkhiat bangin note in amah na nitsak uh ciangin amah in note hong lua khia ding hi.
Leviticus18:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih a kihhuaite khatpeuh a hihte peuhmah
Leviticus18:30 “Tua ahih ciangin noteʼ ma-a a kizang hih a kihhuai ngeinate khat peuhpeuh na gamtat ngei loh nading uh le tuate tawh nomau na kinitsak loh nadingun kong thuhilhte zui un; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi
Leviticus19:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus19:2 “Israel mihonte khempeuh kiangah hih bangin gen in: Note na siangtho ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa noteʼ Pasian keimah ka siangtho hi.
Leviticus19:3 Note a kuamah peuh in na nu le na pa uh zahtakin
Leviticus19:4 “Milimte lamah kihei kei unla
Leviticus19:5 “Note in Topaʼ tungah thunuama biakpiakna na piak uh ciangin
Leviticus19:6 Tua pen na piak ni mah uh ahih kei leh a zing ciangin kine dinga
Leviticus19:7 A ni thum ni-in a kinek peuhmah leh
Leviticus19:8 Tua a ne mi peuhmah in ama mawhna pua ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Topaʼ na a siangtho ninsak ahih manin ama mite sung panin kihawl khia ding hi.
Leviticus19:9 “Na leitang tung panun an na lak uh ciangin
Leviticus19:10 Note in na leenggui lo uh hawkmai loin
Leviticus19:11 “Note na guta kei ding uh hi. A man loin na gamta kei ding uh a
Leviticus19:12 Note in a man lopi-in keima min tawh na kiciam kei ding uh a
Leviticus19:13 “Note in na veengte uh na nengniam kei ding uh a
Leviticus19:14 Note in bilngongte phuisam loin
Leviticus19:15 “Note in thukhenna-ah thu a tang loin na khen kei ding uh hi. Mizawngte lang gen loin
Leviticus19:16 Note in na mipihte lak uh ah mi gensia-in vaksuk-vakto loin
Leviticus19:17 “Note in na lungsim sung uh ah na sanggampa uh na mudah kei ding uh a
Leviticus19:18 Note in nomauʼ mipihte tungah phu la loin
Leviticus19:19 “Note in ka thukhamte na zui ding uh hi. Note in na ganhingte uh a namdang tawh ta na neisak kei ding uh hi. Note in na lo uh ah khaici nam nih na pawikhawm kei ding uh a
Leviticus19:20 “Sila ahi numei
Leviticus19:21 Ahih hangin tua pa in a mahmah adingin mawhna hanga biak nadingin tuutal khat
Leviticus19:22 Siampipa in
Leviticus19:23 “Note
Leviticus19:24 A kum lina ciangin amauʼ gah khempeuh siangtho-in
Leviticus19:25 Ahih hangin a kum ngana ciangin tuate pen note adingin hong gah semsem nadingin tuateʼ gah na ne thei ding uh hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi.
Leviticus19:26 “Note in sa khat peuhpeuh a sunga si tawh na nekhawm kei ding uh hi. Mailam thugen kholhna
Leviticus19:27 Note in na baa samte uh met loin na khamul mongte uh zong na tan kei ding uh hi.
Leviticus19:28 Note in mi siteʼ hangin dahna limin na ci tung uh liamsak loin noteʼ tungah ciaptehna khat peuhpeuh zong na sun kei ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi.
Leviticus19:29 “Na tanu uh biakinn sungah paktat dinga piakna tawh siasak kei un. Tua bang hileh pasian dangte biakna sungah na tung ding uh a
Leviticus19:30 Note in ka Sabbath ni tangin keimah hong kibiakna mun na zahtak ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi.
Leviticus19:31 “Vankahte le aisanna lamah kihei kei un. Amaute tawh a kininsak dingin amaute zong kei un; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi.
Leviticus19:32 “Note
Leviticus19:33 “Na gam sung uh ah note lakah khualmi khat hong peem leh
Leviticus19:34 Note lakah a hong peem khualmite tualsung mi mah bangin na ngaihsun ding uh a
Leviticus19:35 “Note in thukhenna
Leviticus19:36 Note in tawi khaina man
Leviticus19:37 Note in ka thukhamte khempeuh le ka biakna ngeina kipte khempeuh zui-in tuate na sem ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi
Leviticus20:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus20:2 “Israel mite kiangah hih bangin gen in: Israel mite khat peuhpeuh hitaleh Israel sunga a peem khual mite hitaleh
Leviticus20:3 Kei mahmah in tua mipa ka maisiat dinga
Leviticus20:4 Amah in Molek tungah a tate khat a piak ciangin mihonte in tua pa kimuhmawh bawlin amah a thah kei uh leh
Leviticus20:5 keimah in tua mipa le ama innkuanpihte maisiatin
Leviticus20:6 “Mi khat vankahna le aisan lamah kihei-in tuate thu a dot leh
Leviticus20:7 Tua ahih ciangin note ki-ap unla siangtho un; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi.
Leviticus20:8 Ka thukhamte zui unla
Leviticus20:9 “Bang hang hiam cih leh a nu ahih kei leh a pa a samsia mi peuhmah kithat ding hi. Amah in a nu ahih kei leh a pa samsia khin a
Leviticus20:10 “Pasal khatpeuh a veengpaʼ zi tawh a mawh leh
Leviticus20:11 A paʼ zi tawh a lum khawm mipa in a pa a mindaisak a suak hi. Amau tegel kithat ding hi. Amauʼ sihna amau mah ngawh ding ahi hi.
Leviticus20:12 Pasal khat a monu tawh a lup khop leh
Leviticus20:13 Pasal khat in numei khat tawh lup khop bangin pasal dang khat tawh a lup khop leh
Leviticus20:14 Pasal khat in zi nei-in
Leviticus20:15 Pasal khatpeuh ganhing khat tawh a mawh leh amah le a ganhing kithat ding hi.
Leviticus20:16 Numei khat in ganhing khat naihin tua tawh a mawh leh
Leviticus20:17 “Pasal khat in ama sanggamnu
Leviticus20:18 Pasal khat
Leviticus20:19 “Note pen na nuʼ sanggamnu ahih kei leh na paʼ sanggamnu tawh na mawh kei ding uh hi. Tua pen a nai behte tawh mawhna ahih manin amaute in amauʼ mawhna pua ding uh hi.
Leviticus20:20 Pasal khat
Leviticus20:21 Pasal khat in a sanggampaʼ zi a lak leh
Leviticus20:22 “Tua ahih ciangin note in ka thukham khempeuh le ka biakna ngeina kipte khempeuh zui-in
Leviticus20:23 Noteʼ mai ah keimah in ka paihkhiat minamteʼ ngeinate na zui kei ding uh hi. Amaute in hih nate khempeuh hih uh ahih manin amaute ka kih hi.
Leviticus20:24 Ahih hangin keimah in note kiangah
Leviticus20:25 Tua ahih ciangin note in ganhing a siang le a nin
Leviticus20:26 Note pen keima adingin na siangtho ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa ahi keimah ka siangtho a
Leviticus20:27 “Numei ahi a
Leviticus21:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus21:2 
Leviticus21:3 ahih kei leh nungak ahi a sanggamnu (tua nu in pasal nei nai lo ahih manin amah tawh a kinai ahi hi; tua nu hangin amah kininsak thei ding hi) longal ama mite lakah misiteʼ hangin kininsak lo ding hi.
Leviticus21:4 Amah in pasal nei sa numei khatpeuh hangin ama mite lakah va kininsakin
Leviticus21:5 “Amaute in a lu uh mettol loin
Leviticus21:6 Amaute pen amauʼ Pasian adingin siangtho ding uh a
Leviticus21:7 Amaute in numei paktat ahih kei leh a kininsak sa numei teenpih lo ding uh a
Leviticus21:8 Amah in noteʼ Pasianʼ anlum pia ahih manin note in amah na ap ding uh a
Leviticus21:9 Siampipa khat peuhpeuhʼ tanu in paktatna tawh amah le amah a kidaisak leh
Leviticus21:10 “Ama sanggamte lakah siampi lianpen
Leviticus21:11 Amah in a nu le a pa nangawn ahi zongin misi khat peuhpeuh kiangah pai loin
Leviticus21:12 Biakbuk panin zong paikhia loin
Leviticus21:13 Amah in a zi dingin nungak la ding hi.
Leviticus21:14 Meigong numei
Leviticus21:15 Tua pen ama mite lakah a tate a daisak loh nading ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah a siangthosak pa pen keimah Topa ka hi hi
Leviticus21:16 Topa in Moses tungah
Leviticus21:17 “Aaron kiangah hih bangin gen in: Na suanlekhakte sung panin poina a nei mi in a khangkhangin ama Pasianʼ anlum pia dingin hong neh thei lo ding hi.
Leviticus21:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh poina a nei
Leviticus21:19 khut liam
Leviticus21:20 elkul le mi cingtaak lo
Leviticus21:21 Siampi Aaronʼ suanlekhakte sung panin poina a nei mi khatpeuh in Topa ading meihal biakna a pia dingin a nai ah hong pai lo ding hi. Amah in poina nei ahih manin
Leviticus21:22 Amah in ama Pasianʼ anlum
Leviticus21:23 Ahih hangin amah in poina nei ahih manin
Leviticus21:24 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Aaron le a tapate le Israel mi khempeuh tungah hih thute a gen hi.
Leviticus22:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus22:2 “Aaron le a tapate in keima min siangtho a daisak loh nadingun amaute in keima tungah a hong ap uh ahi
Leviticus22:3 Amaute kiangah
Leviticus22:4 “‘Aaronʼ gui sung panin meima nei le a natui a paikhia mi peuhmah in amah a siangtho mateng a siangtho an ne thei lo ding hi. Misi lawnna hitaleh a natui a teh pa lawnna hitaleh a nin na khat peuhpeuh a lawng pa
Leviticus22:5 amah a nit theih nadingin a bokvak ganhing khat hitaleh nitna a ngah theih nading mi khat hitaleh a lawng pa
Leviticus22:6 tua bang na a lawng mipa pen a nitak mateng a nin hi dinga
Leviticus22:7 Ni a tum ciangin amah siang dinga
Leviticus22:8 A mawk sihte hitaleh gamsate in a bal gawpte hitaleh amah in tuate nekna tawh amah kininsak lo ding hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi
Leviticus22:9 “Tua ahih ciangin amaute in ka thuhilhna zui ding uh hi. Tua hikeileh amaute in tua thu a daisak uh ciangin khialhna thuakin sihpih ding uh hi. Amaute a siangthosak pa pen keimah Topa ka hi hi.
Leviticus22:10 “A pualam mi in a siangtho an ne lo ding hi. Siampipaʼ inn ah a om peemta ahi a
Leviticus22:11 Ahih hangin siampipa khat in ama adingin sum tawh sila khat a lei leh
Leviticus22:12 Siampipaʼ tanu khat a pualam mi khat tawh a kiteen leh tua nu in a siangtho biakna an ne thei lo ding hi.
Leviticus22:13 Ahih hangin siampipaʼ tanu pen meigong ahi a
Leviticus22:14 “Mi khat in theih lohna hangin a siangtho an khat peuhpeuh a nekkhak leh
Leviticus22:15 Amaute in Topaʼ tungah a piak ahi
Leviticus22:16 tua bangin amauʼ an a siangthote nekna tawh mawhna le khialhna amaute puasak lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen amaute a siangthosak Topa ka hi hi
Leviticus22:17 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus22:18 “Aaron le a tapate le Israel mi khempeuh tungah hih bangin gen in: Israel mite sung panin ahi zongin Israel mite sungah a peem mite lak pan ahi zongin mi khatpeuh in biakna a piak ciangin
Leviticus22:19 hong kisan theih nadingin bawngtal hitaleh tuu hitaleh keel hitaleh
Leviticus22:20 Note in a sitbaang khat peuhpeuh na pia kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh hong kisang zo lo ding hi.
Leviticus22:21 Mi khatpeuh in bawng hon panin ahi a
Leviticus22:22 Ganhing a mittaw
Leviticus22:23 Bawngtal hitaleh tuuno hitaleh a na khat peuhpeuh a sau lua ahih kei leh a tom luate pen note in utthu-a biakna-in na pia thei ding uh hi. Ahih hangin thuciamna tunsakna a piak dingin tua bangte kisang zo lo hi.
Leviticus22:24 A ciltangte a sanim
Leviticus22:25 “Gamdang mite khat peuhpeuh tung panin a kingah ganhingte zong na Pasian uhʼ an dingin note in na pia kei ding uh hi. Amaute sitbaang a
Leviticus22:26 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus22:27 “Bawng ahih kei leh tuu ahih kei leh keel khat a suah ciangin a pi tawh ni sagih sung om khawm ding hi. A ni giat ni a kipanin tua gan no pen Topaʼ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna-in kisang thei ding hi.
Leviticus22:28 A pi pen bawng hitaleh tuu hitaleh
Leviticus22:29 Note in Topaʼ tungah lungdam koh biakna na piak uh ciangin
Leviticus22:30 A tua ni mahin kine dinga
Leviticus22:31 “Tua ahih ciangin note in ka thupiaknate zui-in tuate na sem ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi.
Leviticus22:32 Note in keima min siangtho na daisak kei ding uh a
Leviticus22:33 noteʼ Pasian ahi dingin Egypt gam panin note a hong paikhiatpih pa ka hi hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi
Leviticus23:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus23:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note in a siangtho biak kikhopnate hi
Leviticus23:3 Ni guk sungin nasep kizo dinga
Leviticus23:4 “Hihte pen amaute adingin a kiseh hunin note in na gen ding uh ahi Topaʼ pawi a kisehte
Leviticus23:5 “A kha masa
Leviticus23:6 Tua kha mah
Leviticus23:7 A ni masa ni-in note in a siangtho kikhopna khat na nei ding uh a
Leviticus23:8 Ahih hangin note in Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna ni sagih sung na pia ding uh hi. A ni sagih ni pen a siangtho kikhopna ni hi dinga
Leviticus23:9 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus23:10 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note tungah ka hong piak leitang ah note tungin an na lak uh ciangin
Leviticus23:11 Note hong kisan theih nadingin amah in Topaʼ mai ah anlom vei dinga
Leviticus23:12 Note in anlom na vei ni-un
Leviticus23:13 Tua tawh a kipia khawm ding an tawh biakna pen sathau tawh a kibawl annel lawh nih hi dinga
Leviticus23:14 Note in na Pasian uh biakna na paipih ma
Leviticus23:15 “Note in Sabbath khit a zing ciang
Leviticus23:16 A Sabbath sagihna khit a zing ciang dong ni sawm nga dong na sim to ding uh a
Leviticus23:17 Note in na teenna uh panin vei dingin an lawh nih a kibawl anlum nih nong paipih ding uh hi. Tuate pen annel a kibawl
Leviticus23:18 Note in anlum tawh
Leviticus23:19 Note in khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat le thunuam a biakpiakna-in kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nih na pia ding uh hi.
Leviticus23:20 Siampipa in Topaʼ mai ah vei-a biakna-in anpal-anlum le tuuno nih tawh tuate vei dinga
Leviticus23:21 Note in tua ni mahin thu zaksakna na bawl ding uh a
Leviticus23:22 “Note in na leitang panun an na lak uh ciangin
Leviticus23:23 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus23:24 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: A kha sagihna
Leviticus23:25 Note in thatang nasep na sem kei ding uh a
Leviticus23:26 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus23:27 “Hih a kha sagihna ni sawm ni pen kilemna ni ahi hi. Tua pen note adingin a siangtho kikhop hun hi dinga
Leviticus23:28 Note in tua ni-in na na sem kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ mai ah note adingin kilemna bawl nadingin kilemna bawl ni ahi hi.
Leviticus23:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua ni-in bang khat peuhpeuh a ne kha mi peuhmah ama mite kiang panin kihawl khia ding hi.
Leviticus23:30 Tua ni-in na khat peuhpeuh a sem mi peuhmah keimah in ama mite lak panin ka that ding hi.
Leviticus23:31 Note in na na sem kei ding uh hi. Tua pen na khang tawntungun na teenna khempeuh uh ah ngeina khat hi tawntung ding hi.
Leviticus23:32 Tua pen note adingin a thupi tawlngakna Sabbath ni hi dinga
Leviticus23:33 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus23:34 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Hih kha sagihna a ni sawm le nga ni a kipan ni sagih sung pen Topa ading buk pawi ahi hi.
Leviticus23:35 A ni masa ni pen a siangtho kikhopna ni hi dinga
Leviticus23:36 Ni sagih sung note in Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna na pia ding uh a
Leviticus23:37 “Hihte pen Topaʼ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna
Leviticus23:38 Note in Topaʼ tungah na piak uh Topaʼ Sabbath-te
Leviticus23:39 “Note in leitang a piangte na kaihkhop khit uh
Leviticus23:40 Note in a ni masa ni-in singkung hoih gahte
Leviticus23:41 Note in tua pen kum simin ni sagih sung pawi-in na nei ding uh a
Leviticus23:42 No Israel mi khempeuh ni sagih sung buk sungah na teeng ding uh hi.
Leviticus23:43 Tua pen keimah in Egypt gam panin amaute ka paikhiatpih lai-in Israel mite
Leviticus23:44 Tu-a bangin Moses in Israel mite tungah Topaʼ pawi a kisehte a gen hi.
Leviticus24:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus24:2 “Meivak khat a tawntungin a kivak suak theih nadingin meivak adingin oliv gah a kisuzante panin sathau siangtho nang kiangah hong paipih nading uh Israel mite thu pia in.
Leviticus24:3 Kikhopna buk sung
Leviticus24:4 Amah in kham citak meivak khuam tungah meivakte a ngeina bangin Topaʼ mai ah omsak tawntung ding hi.
Leviticus24:5 “Nangmah in annel la inla
Leviticus24:6 Nangmah in kham citak sabuai tungah tuate gual nihin na koih dinga
Leviticus24:7 Phawkna-in Topaʼ tungah mei tawh biakna-in piak dingin anlum tawh a pai khawm theih nadingin nangmah in a gual nihte ah paknamtui siangtho na koih ding hi.
Leviticus24:8 Sabbath nisimin Aaron in a tawntung thuciamna-in Israel mite tang dingin Topaʼ mai ah a ngeina bangin koih tawntung ding hi.
Leviticus24:9 Tua pen Topaʼ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna sung panin amah in a tawntung a a ngah ding
Leviticus24:10 Tu-in Israel numei khatʼ tapa
Leviticus24:11 Israel numeiʼ tapa in Min Siangtho gensia-in samsia hi. Amaute in Moses kiangah amah paipih uh hi. Ama nuʼ min pen Shelomith hi a
Leviticus24:12 Topaʼ deihna amaute tungah a kigen mateng amaute in tua mipa khumcip uh hi.
Leviticus24:13 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus24:14 “A samsia mipa pen giahphual pua lamah paipih in. Ama samsiat a za mi khempeuh ama lu tungah amauʼ khut ngasak inla
Leviticus24:15 Tua ciangin Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Ama Pasian a samsia mi peuhmah in ama khialhna thuak ding hi.
Leviticus24:16 Topaʼ min a gen sia mipa kithat ding hi. Mihonte khempeuh in amah deng lum ding uh hi. Peemta hitaleh tualsung mi hitaleh
Leviticus24:17 “Mi a that pa kithat ding hi.
Leviticus24:18 Ganhing a that pa in a ganhing mahin loh ding hi. A thu-in ci lehang nuntakna le nuntakna a kithuk ding ahi hi.
Leviticus24:19 “Mi khat in a veengte khat a poisak leh
Leviticus24:20 guh kitan tang ding guh kitan
Leviticus24:21 Ganhing a that pa in loh dinga
Leviticus24:22 Note in peemta le tualsung mi adingin ngeina a kibang khat na nei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi
Leviticus24:23 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Israel mite tungah hih thu a gen hi. Amaute in a samsia mipa giahphual pua lamah paipih uh a
Leviticus25:1 Topa in Sinai Mual tungah Moses kiangah
Leviticus25:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note kong piak leitang ah na tun uh ciangin
Leviticus25:3 Kum guk sung note in na lo uh na pawi ding uh a
Leviticus25:4 Ahih hangin a kum sagihna ah leitang ading a thupi tawlngakna sabbath
Leviticus25:5 A li pote note in na kaikhawm kei ding uh a
Leviticus25:6 Lo na khawh loh uh hangin leitang tawlngak kumin a piang tawmte in note ading
Leviticus25:7 A piang khempeuhte pen na bawngte uh le na leitang uh ah a om ganhingteʼ an ding ahi hi.
Leviticus25:8 “Kum nipi sagih hun pen note adingin kum sawm li le kua ahih theih nadingin note in kum nipi sagih
Leviticus25:9 Tua ciangin note in kha sagihna a ni sawm ni-in nakpi-in peengkul na tum ding uh a
Leviticus25:10 Note in a kum sawm ngana siangthosakin
Leviticus25:11 Tua a kum sawm ngana pen note adingin jubilee hi ding hi. Tua kum sungin note in lo pawi loin
Leviticus25:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen jubilee ahi hi. Tua pen note-aʼ dingin siangtho dinga
Leviticus25:13 “Hih jubilee kum sungin note khempeuh in nomauʼ neihsa ciat na ngahkik ding uh hi.
Leviticus25:14 Note in na veengteʼ tungah na zuak uh ahi zongin na veengteʼ kiang panin na lei uh ahi zongin note khatlekhat na kikhem kei ding uh hi.
Leviticus25:15 Jubilee khit ciangin a jubilee kik dong a kum phazah tawh kituakin note in na veengte uh kiang panin lei-in
Leviticus25:16 A kum a tam lai leh a man na tamsak ding uh a
Leviticus25:17 Note khatlekhat kikhem loin na Pasian uh na zahtak ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Topa ka hi hi.
Leviticus25:18 “Tua ahih ciangin note in ka thukhamte le ka biakna ngeina kipte zui-in tuate na sem ding uh hi. Tua hileh note lungmuang takin gam sungah na teeng ding uh hi.
Leviticus25:19 Leitang in an hong piangsak dinga
Leviticus25:20 “Note in
Leviticus25:21 keimah in a kum gukna ah note tungah thupha kong pia dinga
Leviticus25:22 A kum giatna ah lo na pawi ding uh ciangin
Leviticus25:23 “Leitang pen keima-aʼ ahih manin neih suak dingin leitang kizuak lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh note pen kei tawh a om khawm khualmi le peemtate na hi uh hi.
Leviticus25:24 “Note in na neih uh leitang khempeuh na kitanhkiksak thei ding uh hi.
Leviticus25:25 Na sanggampa zawngin a neihsa leitang khen khat a zuak leh
Leviticus25:26 Mi khat in tua na a tatsak ding mi a neih kei a
Leviticus25:27 amah in tua na a zuak zawh a kumte sim dinga
Leviticus25:28 Ahih hangin amah in ama adingin ngahkik zawh nading lampi a neih kei leh
Leviticus25:29 “Mi khat in khuapi kulh sungah teenna inn khat a zuak leh
Leviticus25:30 Tua pen kum khat bit sungin a kitatkik kei leh
Leviticus25:31 Ahih hangin a kimkot ah kulh a nei lo khua neu-a innte pen gam sung lote tawh a kibangin kingaihsun ding hi. Tuate kitanhkik thei dinga
Leviticus25:32 Ahi zongin Levi miteʼ khuapite
Leviticus25:33 Levi mi khatpeuh in ama tatkik theih ding hi napi a tatkik zawh kei leh
Leviticus25:34 Ahih hangin amauʼ khuapi taang gamte kizuak thei lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen amauʼ neih tawntung na ahi hi.
Leviticus25:35 “Na sanggampa uh zawngin
Leviticus25:36 Na sanggampa uh no kiangah hong ten theih nadingin ama tung panin a meet a khang la kei unla
Leviticus25:37 Note in ama tungah a meetin sum leitawi pia loin
Leviticus25:38 Kei pen noteʼ Pasian ahi ding le
Leviticus25:39 “Na gei-a om na sanggampa zawngin
Leviticus25:40 Amah pen a kicial nasem le peemta bangin nang kiangah om ding hi. Amah in jubilee kum mateng nangma na hong sem dinga
Leviticus25:41 tua ciangin nang kiang panin amah le ama kiangah a om a tate paikhia dinga
Leviticus25:42 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen Egypt gam panin ka paikhiatpih keima nasemte hi a
Leviticus25:43 Note in hih gawpgawpna tawh amah na uk kei ding uh a
Leviticus25:44 Note in na neih theih ding uh sila numei le sila pasalte hih bang ahi hi: Na kimkot uh a om minam dangte lak panin sila numei le sila pasal na lei thei ding uh hi.
Leviticus25:45 Note in na gam sung uh ah a suak
Leviticus25:46 Note in amaute pen noteʼ khit ciangin na tapate uh tungah amauʼ neih tawntung dingin a luah dingin na pia thei ding uh hi. Note in sila-in amaute na nei thei ding uh a
Leviticus25:47 “Note lakah a teeng khualmi ahih kei leh peemta khat hong hau a
Leviticus25:48 amah a kizuak khit ciangin amah kitanhkik thei dinga
Leviticus25:49 Ama innlak pa ahih kei leh a innlak sanggampa in tanh thei ding hi. Ama innkuan sunga a kinaipih a beh khatpeuh in amah tanh thei ding hi. Tua ahih kei leh zong amah a hauh leh a mahmah kitanhkik thei ding hi.
Leviticus25:50 Midang tungah a mahmah a kizuak a kipan jubilee kum dong amah a leipa tawh tuat dinga
Leviticus25:51 Kum tampi in a sap lai leh
Leviticus25:52 Ahih hangin jubilee kum ding kum tawm khat bek in a sap leh amah in a topa tawh tuatna khat nei ding hi. Ama sepsak ding kum a om lai tawh kituakin ama kitatkhiat nadingin sum piakik ding hi.
Leviticus25:53 Amah pen a topa tungah a kumkumin a kicial nasem pa tawh kibang ding hi. A topa in noteʼ muhna ah hih gawpgawpna tawh amah uk lo ding hi.
Leviticus25:54 Hih bang danin amah a kitatkhiat kei leh
Leviticus25:55 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite pen kei adingin nasemte ahi uh hi. Amaute pen Egypt gam panin keimah in ka paikhiatpih keima nasemte ahi uh hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi.
Leviticus26:1 “Note in nomau adingin a mai ah na kun dingun milim bawl loin
Leviticus26:2 Note in ka sabbath-te tangin keimah hong kibiakna mun na zahtak ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi.
Leviticus26:3 “Note in ka thukham zui-in
Leviticus26:4 keimah in note tungah guahtui a hunin kong pia dinga
Leviticus26:5 Na cil uh ante leenggah lawh hun dong kimang dinga
Leviticus26:6 “Keimah in gam sungah nopsakna hong pia-in
Leviticus26:7 Note in na galte uh na delh ding uh a
Leviticus26:8 Note nga in za khat zo-in
Leviticus26:9 Keimah in note ka hong pi ngaihsut dinga
Leviticus26:10 Note in sau veipi a kikhol anluite ne-in
Leviticus26:11 Keimah in note lakah omna ka bawl dinga
Leviticus26:12 Keimah
Leviticus26:13 Note pen amauʼ sila na hih loh nadingun Egypt gam panin note a hong paikhiatpih Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. Keimah in noteʼ gimna hakkolte kuaitanin note a ding tangin kong paisak hi.
Leviticus26:14 “Ahih hangin note in ka thu ngai loin
Leviticus26:15 ka thukhamte nialin
Leviticus26:16 keimah in note tungah hih bangin kong hih ding hi: Noteʼ tungah hong tung dingin keimah in thakhat thu a dipkuatna
Leviticus26:17 Keimah in note kong maisiat dinga
Leviticus26:18 “Tua bang hi napi-in note in ka thu nong ngaih kei veve uh leh
Leviticus26:19 keimah in na kiphatsakpih uh noteʼ vangliatna susia-in
Leviticus26:20 Na leitang un an piangsak loin
Leviticus26:21 “Tua ciangin kei hong demin
Leviticus26:22 Keimah in noteʼ lakah gamsate hong khahin
Leviticus26:23 “Hih banga hihna tawh note hong kihei tuan loin
Leviticus26:24 kei zong note hong gawtin
Leviticus26:25 Keimah in
Leviticus26:26 Keimah in noteʼ nuntakna an ka suksiat ciangin
Leviticus26:27 “Tua bang hi napi-in note in keima thu ngai loin
Leviticus26:28 note ka hong heh ngawh bawl dinga
Leviticus26:29 Note na gil uh kial lua ding ahih manin na tapate uh le na tanute uhʼ sa na ne ding uh hi.
Leviticus26:30 Keimah in mual dawna na biaknate uh susia-in
Leviticus26:31 Keimah in na khuapite uh siasakin
Leviticus26:32 Keimah in leitang ka siasak dinga
Leviticus26:33 Keimah in minam dangte lakah note kong thehthang dinga
Leviticus26:34 Tua ciangin na galte uh leitang ah na om tanvei uh
Leviticus26:35 Ama tungah na ten laitakun na ngahsak loh uh tawlngakna ahi a sabbath-te
Leviticus26:36 “Noteʼ sung panin galteʼ leitang ah a om lai mite tungah lungsim gimna ka tungsak ding hi. Nahthel ging in amaute taisak dinga
Leviticus26:37 Kuamah in delh lo napi-in namsau mai pan a tai khia bangin khatlekhat na kiphupai ding uh a
Leviticus26:38 Minam dangte lakah note na sia ding uh a
Leviticus26:39 Noteʼ sung panin galteʼ leitang ah a omlaite amauʼ mawhna hangin kiam ding uh a
Leviticus26:40 “Ahih hangin kei tungah khemna tawh hong gamtatna sa uh le kei hong demna uh hangin amaute gawt bawlin
Leviticus26:41 
Leviticus26:42 keimah in Jakob tawh ka thuciamna
Leviticus26:43 Ahih hangin amaute in leitang nusia-in
Leviticus26:44 Bangbang ahi zongin
Leviticus26:45 Ahih hangin keimah in amaute ka ngaihsutna-in amauʼ Pasian ka hih theih nadingin
Leviticus26:46 Hihte pen Moses tungtawnin Sinai Mual tungah Topa in amah le Israel mite kikalah a bawl thukhamte le biakna ngeina kipte le thute ahi hi.
Leviticus27:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Leviticus27:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Mi khat in a tuam vilvelin kiciamna a bawl ciangin
Leviticus27:3 Pasal kum sawm nih panin kum sawm guk a phate a man na sehna pen
Leviticus27:4 Numei ahihleh shekel sawm thum hi ding hi.
Leviticus27:5 Kum nga pan kum sawm nih ciang a phate
Leviticus27:6 Kha khat pan kum nga ciang a phate pen pasal ahihleh ngun shekel nga hi dinga
Leviticus27:7 Kum sawm guk pan a tungsiahte pen pasal ahihleh shekel sawm le nga hi dinga
Leviticus27:8 “Mi khatpeuh zawng lua-in nangma sehzah a piak zawh kei leh
Leviticus27:9 “Mite in Topaʼ tungah biakna-in a piakte pen ganhing ahihleh
Leviticus27:10 Amah in na khat peuhpeuh
Leviticus27:11 Tua pen Topaʼ tungah a kipia thei lo ganhing nin khat ahihleh
Leviticus27:12 siampipa in hoih hi
Leviticus27:13 Ahih hangin amah in tua ganhing a tatkik nop leh
Leviticus27:14 “Mi khatpeuh in a siangtho dingin Topaʼ tungah a inn a ap ciangin
Leviticus27:15 A ap pa in ama inn a tatkik nop leh
Leviticus27:16 “Mi khat in a luah ama leitang phel khat Topaʼ tungah a ap leh
Leviticus27:17 Amah in jubilee kum a kipanin a lo a ap leh
Leviticus27:18 Ahih hangin jubilee kum khit ciangin amah in a lo a ap leh
Leviticus27:19 Lo a ap pa in a tatkik nop leh
Leviticus27:20 Ahih hangin amah in a lo a tanh nuam lo ahi a
Leviticus27:21 A lo pen
Leviticus27:22 “Amah in luahna tawh a neih ahi lo
Leviticus27:23 siampipa in jubilee kum ciang dong ding tua man seh dinga
Leviticus27:24 Jubilee kum ciangin a lo pen a kileina pa
Leviticus27:25 “A kisehna peuhmah biakinn shekel kizang ding hi; gerah sawm nih ciangin shekel khat hi ding hi.
Leviticus27:26 “Ahih hangin tacil pen Topa aʼ hi khinzo ahih mah bangin
Leviticus27:27 Ganhing nin ahihleh
Leviticus27:28 “Ahih hangin mi khat in a neih
Leviticus27:29 Mite lak nangawn panin a kisusia mang dingin a ki-ap sa mi peuhmah
Leviticus27:30 “Leitang panin a piang khempeuh khaici hitaleh singgah hitaleh sawm-ah-khat Topa aʼ hi a
Leviticus27:31 Mi khatpeuh in sawm-ah-khat a piak na khat peuhpeuh a tat nop leh
Leviticus27:32 Bawng hon leh tuu le keel hon sawm-ah-khat khempeuh le a cing paʼ ciangkhut nuai-a a pai ganhing khempeuh sawm-ah-khat peuhmah Topa adingin a siangtho hi ding hi.
Leviticus27:33 Mi khat in pha hiam sia hiam ci-in kantel lo dinga
Leviticus27:34 Hihte pen Sinai Mual tungah Topa in Israel mite adingin Moses tungah a piak thute ahi hi.
