Numbers3:1 Hihte pen Sinai Mual tungah Topa in Moses tawh a thugen hun lai-a Aaron le Mosesʼ huna mite ahi hi.
Numbers3:2 Aaronʼ tapateʼ minte in: A ta upa Nadab
Numbers3:3 sathau a kinilh siampi
Numbers3:4 Ahih hangin Sinai sehnel gam Topaʼ mai ah mei siangtho lo a zat uh ciangin Topaʼ mai ah Nadab le Abihu si hi. Amaute in ta nei lo uh ahih ciangin Eleazar le Ithamar in a pa uh Aaronʼ nuntak sungteng bek siampi na a sem uh ahi hi.
Numbers3:5 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers3:6 “Levi minamte va paipih inla
Numbers3:7 Amaute in biakbuk ah a sep uh ciangin amah le mihonpi adingin kikhopna buk mai ah na sem ding uh hi.
Numbers3:8 Amaute in kikhopna buk sung nazat khempeuh vaan ding uh a
Numbers3:9 Nangmah in Aaron le a tapateʼ tungah Levi mite na pia dinga
Numbers3:10 Nangmah in Aaron le a tapate na seh dinga
Numbers3:11 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers3:12 “En in
Numbers3:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh tacil khempeuh keima-aʼ ahi hi. Egypt gam sungah tacil khempeuh ka thah ni-in
Numbers3:14 Topa in Sinai sehnel gam Moses kiangah
Numbers3:15 “Levi mite
Numbers3:16 Tua ahih ciangin Moses thu a kipiak bangin amah in Topaʼ thupiakna tawh kizui-in amaute a sim hi.
Numbers3:17 Leviʼ tapateʼ min in: Gershon
Numbers3:18 Gershonʼ tapateʼ min in: Libni le Shimei ahi hi.
Numbers3:19 Kohathʼ tapateʼ min in: Amram
Numbers3:20 Merariʼ tapateʼ min in: Mahli le Mushi ahi hi. Hih mite pen Levi mite beh lutangte ahi uh hi.
Numbers3:21 Gershon-te beh pen Libni mite le Shimei mite hi a
Numbers3:22 Amaute
Numbers3:23 Gershon-te beh in nitumna lam biakbuk nungah giahphual sat ding uh a
Numbers3:24 tua Gershon mite sung pan a beh ukpi pen Laelʼ tapa Eliasaf hi ding hi.
Numbers3:25 Gershon-te beh in kikhopna buk sungah a et dingte pen a biakbuk
Numbers3:26 buktual a puan kikhaite
Numbers3:27 Kohath-te beh pen Amram mite
Numbers3:28 Pasal khempeuh kha khat pan a tungsiah
Numbers3:29 Kohath-te beh in biakbuk leitaw lam pangah giahphual sat ding uh a
Numbers3:30 Kohath mite sung pan a beh ukpi pen Uzzielʼ tapa Elizafan hi ding hi.
Numbers3:31 Amauʼ et dingte pen thuciamna singkuang
Numbers3:32 Siampi Aaronʼ tapa Eleazar pen Levi mi makaite tungah a ukpi hi dinga
Numbers3:33 Merari-te beh pen Mahli mite le Mushi mite hi a
Numbers3:34 Amaute kha khat panin a tungsiah pasal peuhmah tul guk le za nih ahi hi.
Numbers3:35 Merari-te beh sung pan a beh ukpi pen Abihailʼ tapa Zuriel hi dinga
Numbers3:36 Merari-te behʼ et dinga a kisehte pen biakbuk khuampeekte
Numbers3:37 Buktual kimkot a khuampite le a bullente tawh
Numbers3:38 Nisuahna lam pang biakbuk mai
Numbers3:39 Moses le Aaron in Topaʼ thupiakna tawh a inn kuankuanun a sim Levi mi pasal kha khat panin a tungsiah peuhmah tul sawm nih le tul nih a pha hi.
Numbers3:40 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers3:41 Israel mite lak panin tacil khempeuh tang dingin Levi mite nong laksak dinga
Numbers3:42 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Topaʼ thupiak bangin Israel mite lakah tacil khempeuh a sim hi.
Numbers3:43 Kha khat panin a tungsiah tacil pasal a kisim peuhmah tul sawm nih le tul nih le za nih le sawm sagih le thum ahi hi.
Numbers3:44 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers3:45 “Israel mite lakah tacil khempeuh le a ganhingte uh tang dingin Levi mite le a ganhingte uh la in. Levi mite keima aʼ hi ding hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi.
Numbers3:46 Levi mi pasal khempeuh sangin Israel mi tacil khempeuh za nih le sawm sagih le thumin tam zaw ahih manin
Numbers3:47 tuate tat nadingin shekel khat ah gerah sawm nih a pha
Numbers3:48 tua a tam zaw teng a kitatna uh sumte Aaron le a tapate tungah pia in
Numbers3:49 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Levi mite banah a val lai mite tung panin kitatkhiatna sum la a
Numbers3:50 biakinn shekel zangin Israel mi tacilte tung panin sum shekel tul khat le za thum le sawm guk le nga a la hi.
Numbers3:51 Tua ciangin
Numbers4:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers4:2 “Levi mite lak panin Kohath mite amauʼ innkuankuan le a behbehin
Numbers4:3 kikhopna buk sungah na a sem thei ding kum sawm thum pan kum sawm nga a pha mi khempeuh sim in.
Numbers4:4 Kikhopna buk sungah Kohath mite in a siangtho pen nate tawh kisai nasepte sem ding uh hi.
Numbers4:5 “Giahphual a kisuan ding ciangin Aaron le a tapate tumin kidalna puan la khia ding uh a
Numbers4:6 Tua ciangin amaute in savun tawh tuam ding uh a
Numbers4:7 “Ompihna Anlum sabuai tungah amaute in puan a dum phah ding uh a
Numbers4:8 Tua ciangin amaute in a ausan puan tawh tuate khuh ding uh a
Numbers4:9 “Mei vakna mei khuam pen
Numbers4:10 Amaute in a nazat khempeuh savun-in tunin a puak nading tal tungah koih ding uh hi.
Numbers4:11 “Puan a dum khat tawh kham biakna tau khuh ding uh a
Numbers4:12 Amaute in biakbuk sungah a kizang nazat khempeuh la-in puan dum khat tawh tunin
Numbers4:13 Amaute in a biakna tau panin a vutte luak khia ding uh a
Numbers4:14 Tua lai ah nasep nadinga a kizang
Numbers4:15 Aaron le a tapate in biakbuk le biakbuk nazat khempeuh a tun khit uh giahphual a kisuan ciangin
Numbers4:16 “Siampi Aaronʼ tapa Eleazar in meivak tui
Numbers4:17 Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah
Numbers4:18 “Levi mite lakah Kohath minamte a sih loh nadingin hih un.
Numbers4:19 A siangtho pen nate nai ah amaute a pai ciangun si loin a hin nadingun hih un. Aaron le a tapate pai-in a nasep ding uh le a van puak ding ciat uh ah amaute seh ding uh hi.
Numbers4:20 Ahih hangin a siangtho nate tom kha no sung bek nangawn a en dingin amaute tum lo ding uh hi; tum le-uh si ding uh hi

Numbers4:22 “Gershon mite zong

Numbers4:26 buktual a puan kikhaite

Numbers4:28 Hih pen kikhopna buk sungah Gershon beh pasalteʼ nasep hi a
Numbers4:29 “Merari mite zong amauʼ innkuankuan le a behbehin
Numbers4:30 kikhopna buk sungah na a sem thei ding kum sawm thum pan kum sawm nga a pha mi khempeuh na sim ding hi.

Numbers4:32 a kimkot a om buktual a khuampite a bullente tawh

Numbers5:6 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Topaʼ tungah mite a khialh theihna ahi khialhna khat peuhpeuh
Numbers5:7 a gamtatna sa a khialhna pulak ding hi. Amah in a tatkhialhna ah a kicingin dinkik dinga

Numbers6:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers6:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Numei ahi a
Numbers6:3 leenggahzu le khamtheih zu ne lo ding hi. Leenggahzu le khamtheih zu pan a kibawl tui thuk dawn lo dinga
Numbers6:4 Amah a kituam koih hun sungteng leenggui panin a piang bangmah ne lo dinga
Numbers6:5 “Tuam om dingin a kiciam hun sungteng ama lu tungah mulkiatna kitah lo ding hi. Topa adingin a tuam om hun a cin mateng amah a siangtho hi dinga
Numbers6:6 Topa adingin a tuam om hun sungteng misi luang kiangah pai lo ding hi.
Numbers6:7 A nu
Numbers6:8 A tuam om hun sungteng Topa adingin a siangtho ahi hi.
Numbers6:9 “Mi khatpeuh ama gei ah thakhatin si-in
Numbers6:10 A ni giat ni-in amah in siampipa kiang kikhopna buk kongah vakhu nih ahih kei leh kawl vakhu no nih paipih dinga
Numbers6:11 siampipa in khialhna hanga biak nadingin khat pia-in
Numbers6:12 a tuam om ding hun sungteng Topa adingin amah tuam omin

Numbers6:14 amah in Topaʼ tungah letsong ahi meihal biak nadingin kum khat a pha a sitbaang lo tuuno a pa khat
Numbers6:15 le silngo sawh loh anlum lawh khat
Numbers6:16 “Siampipa in Topaʼ mai ah tuate paipihin a khialhna hanga biakna le a meihal biakna pia dinga

Numbers6:18 Tua Nazir mipa in a ki-ap a sam

Numbers6:20 Topaʼ mai ah vei-a biak nadingin siampipa in tuate vei ding hi. Tuate pen a kivei a sa-iik le a kipia a phei tawh siampipa adingin a siangtho ama tanh ahi hi. Tua khit ciangin Nazir mipa in leenggahzu ne thei ding hi.
Numbers6:21 “Hih pen kiciamna a la Nazir mipa adingin ngeina ahi hi. Ama piak zawh zahzah a piak banah

Numbers8:1 Tu-in Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers8:2 “Aaron tungah hih bangin gen in. Meivakte na koih ciangin
Numbers8:3 Aaron in tua bangmahin hih a
Numbers8:4 Meivak khuam a kibawlna zia in: Kham a kiseek hi a
Numbers8:5 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers8:6 “Israel mite lak panin Levi mi teng la khia inla
Numbers8:7 Amaute siansak nadingin hih bangin na hih ding hi: Siansuahna tui amaute tungah theh inla
Numbers8:8 Tua ciangin bawngtalno khat le sathau le annel a kibawl an tawh biakna amaute na lasak dinga
Numbers8:9 Kikhopna buk mai ah Levi mite paipihin
Numbers8:10 Topaʼ mai ah Levi mite na paipih ciangin
Numbers8:11 amaute in Topaʼ na a sep theih nadingun Aaron in Israel mite sung panin Levi mite Topaʼ mai ah vei-a biakna-in a pia ding hi.
Numbers8:12 Tua ciangin Levi mite in bawngtalteʼ lu tungah a khut uh nga ding uh hi. Levi mite ading kilemna bawlsak nadingin khialhna hanga biakna-in khat
Numbers8:13 “Aaron le a tapateʼ mai ah Levi mite na koih dinga
Numbers8:14 Tua bangin Israel mite lak panin Levi mite na khen khia dinga
Numbers8:15 Amaute siangthosakin vei-a biakna-in na piak khit ciangin kikhopna buk ah na a sem dingin Levi mite pai ding uh hi.
Numbers8:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel miteʼ lak panin keiʼ tungah amaute hong kipia khin hi. Israel miteʼ tacil khempeuh tang dingin keima adingin amaute ka la khin hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel miteʼ lakah tacil khempeuh mihing hitaleh ganhing hitaleh keima-aʼ ahi hi.
Numbers8:17 Egypt gam sungah tacil khempeuh ka thah ni-in keima adingin amaute ka tuam koih a
Numbers8:18 Israel miteʼ lak panin tacil khempeuh tang dingin Levi mite ka la khin hi.
Numbers8:19 Kikhopna buk ah Israel mite adingin na a sem ding le
Numbers8:20 Tua bangin Moses le Aaron le Israel mihonpite khempeuh in Levi miteʼ tungah a hih uh hi. Topa in Levi mite tawh kisai-in Mosesʼ tungah a thupiak khempeuh tawh kizui-in Israel mite in amaute tungah a hih uh hi.
Numbers8:21 Israel mite
Numbers8:22 Tua khit ciangin Aaron le a tapateʼ omna kikhopna buk sungah na a sem dingin Levi mite a pai uh hi. Topa in Levi mite tawh kisai-in Moses a thupiak bangin amaute in Levi miteʼ tungah a hih uh hi.
Numbers8:23 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers8:24 “Hih pen Levi mite tawh a kisai thu ahi hi. Kum sawm nih le kum nga pan a tungsiah a phate
Numbers8:25 Kum sawm nga a phak uh a kipan nasepna panin amau kihem khia-in na sem nawn lo ding uh hi.
Numbers8:26 Ahih hangin kikhopna buk sungah a sanggamte uh huh dinga

Numbers10:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers10:2 “Ngun peengkul nih bawl in. Tuate na bawl ciangin na seek dinga
Numbers10:3 A nihin a kitum ciangin kikhopna buk kong nangma kiangah mihon khempeuh hong kikhawm ding uh hi.
Numbers10:4 Ahih hangin khat bek a kitum leh Israel minamteʼ lutang ahi makaite nangma kiangah hong kikhawm ding uh hi.
Numbers10:5 Dinkhiat nading zaksakna na tum ciangin nisuahna lam pang a giahphual-ate ding khia masa ding uh hi.
Numbers10:6 A nih veina na tum ciangin leitaw lam pang a giahphual-ate ding khia ding hi. Amaute a dinkhiat ding peuhmah ciangun zaksakna kitum ding hi.
Numbers10:7 Mihonte a kikaihkhop ding ciangin na tum dinga
Numbers10:8 Aaronʼ tapa siampite in peengkulte tum ding uh hi. Peengkul zatna pen na khang tawntungun note adingin a kip den ngeina khat hi ding hi.
Numbers10:9 Na gam sung uh ah
Numbers10:10 Na lungdam hun uh
Numbers10:11 A kum nihna
Numbers10:12 Sinai sehnel gam panin Israel mite phual khat pan phual khat ah ding khia uh a
Numbers10:13 Mosesʼ tungtawnin Topaʼ thupiakna tawh khualzin cilna kipan uh hi.
Numbers10:14 Judah miteʼ giahphual dialkhai a neite a pawlpawlin ding khia masa uh hi. Tua mihonte
Numbers10:15 Issakhar minam honte
Numbers10:16 Zebulun minam honte
Numbers10:17 Biakbuk a kiphel khit ciangin
Numbers10:18 A zomah Reubenʼ giahphual dialkhai a neite a pawlpawlin ding khia uh hi. Tua mihonte
Numbers10:19 Simeon minam honpite
Numbers10:20 Gad minam honpite
Numbers10:21 Tua ciangin a siangtho nate pua-in Kohath mite ding khia uh a
Numbers10:22 A zomah Efraim miteʼ giahphual dialkhai a neite a pawlpawlin ding khia uh hi. Tua mihonte
Numbers10:23 Manasseh minam honte
Numbers10:24 Benjamin minam honte
Numbers10:25 Tua ciangin a dang khempeuhʼ nungdalin Dan miteʼ giahphual dialkhai a neite a pawlpawlin ding khia uh hi. Tua mihonte
Numbers10:26 Asher minam honte
Numbers10:27 Naftali minam honte
Numbers10:28 Hih pen Israel mite a dinkhiat uh ciangin amauʼ mihonte tawh kizui-in a paina zia uh ahi hi.
Numbers10:29 Moses in ama ziʼ sanggampa ahi
Numbers10:30 Ahih hangin amah in
Numbers10:31 Moses in
Numbers10:32 Kote hong zui lecin
Numbers10:33 Tua ciangin Topaʼ mual panin amaute ding khia-in ni thum lam a pai uh hi. A tawlngak nading mun uh a zonsak dingin Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang

Numbers10:36 A khawl ciangin
Numbers11:1 Mihonte in amauʼ tuahsiatna hangin Topaʼ zakin a phun uh hi. Topa in tua thu a zak ciangin heh mahmah a
Numbers11:2 Tua ciangin Mosesʼ zak dingin mite kiko uh hi. Moses in Topaʼ tungah thu ngen a
Numbers11:3 Tua ahih manin tua mun pen Taberah kici hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amauteʼ lakah Topaʼ mei a kuang hi.
Numbers11:4 Tu-in amauteʼ lakah a om gamdang mite in an lim a lunggulh mahmah uh hi. Israel mite zong kapkik uh a
Numbers11:5 Egypt ah man pia loin i nek ngasate
Numbers11:6 Ahih hangin tu-in i tha bei ta a
Numbers11:7 Manna pen nannan tang tawh kibang a
Numbers11:8 Mite pai kawikawi-in khawm uh a
Numbers11:9 Zanin giahphual tungah daitui a kiat ciangin manna tawh kia khawm hi.
Numbers11:10 Mite a inn kuankuanun a milipin a puanbuk kongah a kahna uh Moses in a za hi. Topa nak heh lua mahmah ahih manin Moses lungkim lo hi.
Numbers11:11 Moses in Topaʼ kiangah
Numbers11:12 Keimah in hih mite khempeuh paii ka hi hiam? Nangmah in keiʼ kiangah
Numbers11:13 Hih mite khempeuh piak ding koi ah sa ngah ding ka hi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh ka mai ah amaute kapin
Numbers11:14 Kei guak in hih mite khempeuh ka si zo kei a
Numbers11:15 Hih bangin kei hong bawl ding na hih leh
Numbers11:16 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers11:17 Keimah hong pai sukin tua munah nang tawh i kiho dinga
Numbers11:18 Mite tungah
Numbers11:19 Note in ni khat sung
Numbers11:20 na ikkhiat dong uh le na kih dongun kha khat sung tawntung sa na ne ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh noteʼ lakah a om Topa nialin a mai ah na kap uh a
Numbers11:21 Ahih hangin Moses in
Numbers11:22 Amauteʼ khamzah dingin tuuhonte le bawnghonte amau adingin kigo zo ding ahi hiam? Tua ahih kei leh tuipi ngasate khempeuh amauʼ khamzah ding kiman zo ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi.
Numbers11:23 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers11:24 Tua ahih ciangin Moses pai khia-in miteʼ tungah Topaʼ thugente a gen sawn hi. Amah in mite a makai mi sawm sagih kaikhawmin
Numbers11:25 Tua ciangin meii sungah Topa hong pai sukin amah hopih a
Numbers11:26 Giahphual ah mi nih om uh a
Numbers11:27 Tangval khat va tai-in Moses kiangah
Numbers11:28 Ama teel mite lakah khat ahi
Numbers11:29 Ahih hangin Moses in ama kiangah
Numbers11:30 Tua ciangin Moses le Israel upate giahphual ah a ciahkik uh hi.
Numbers11:31 Topaʼ kiang panin huih nungin
Numbers11:32 Tua sun tawntung le a zan tawntung le a zing ciang tawntung mite dingin vamimte a khawm uh hi. Tawm a khawm pen mipa in beem sawm dim khawm a
Numbers11:33 Sa a kigaih ma
Numbers11:34 Tua ahih ciangin tua mun pen Kibroth-hattaavah kici hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in sa a lunggulh mite tua lai munah a vui uh hi.
Numbers11:35 Kibroth-hattaavah panin Hazeroth munah mite pai uh a

Numbers13:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers13:2 “Israel mite tungah ka piak Kanaan leitang a vaan dingin mi sawl inla
Numbers13:3 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Topaʼ thupiakna tawh Paran gamlak panin Israel miteʼ lutang ahi mi khempeuh a sawl hi.
Numbers13:4 A sawl miteʼ min hih bang ahi hi: Reuben minam panin Zakkurʼ tapa Shammua; Simeon minam panin Horiʼ tapa Shafat; Judah minam panin Jefunnehʼ tapa Kaleb; Issakhar minam panin Josefʼ tapa Igal; Efraim minam panin Nunʼ tapa Hoshea; Benjamin minam panin Rafuʼ tapa Palti; Zebulun minam panin Sodiʼ tapa Gaddiel; Josef minam (Manasseh minam) panin Susiʼ tapa Gaddi; Dan minam panin Gemalliʼ tapa Ammiel; Asher minam panin Mikhaelʼ tapa Shethur; Naftali minam panin Vofsiʼ tapa Nahbi; Gad minam panin Makhiʼ tapa Geuel ahi hi.
Numbers13:5 Hihte pen gam vaan dingin Moses in a sawl miteʼ min ahi hi. Moses in Nunʼ tapa Hoshea pen Joshua ci-in a min kheelsak hi.
Numbers13:6 Moses in Kanaan gam a vaan dingin amaute sawlin amaute kiangah
Numbers13:7 leitang bangci hiam
Numbers13:8 amauʼ teenna gam pen nuntak olna gam hiam
Numbers13:9 a leitang a leihoih hiam

Numbers13:11 Amaute Negeb lamah pai to uh a
Numbers13:12 Amaute Eshkol kuam tung uh a
Numbers13:13 Tua lai panin Israel mite in leenggah bawk a lawhna hangin tua mun pen Eshkol Kuam kici hi.
Numbers13:14 Ni sawm li a cin ciangin gam vaanna panin amaute hong ciahkik uh hi.
Numbers13:15 Paran gamlak Kadesh mun a Moses le Aaron le Israel mihonte khempeuh kiangah amaute hong tung uh hi. Amaute le mihon khempeuh tungah thu puakkik uh a

Numbers13:18 Amalek mite Negeb gamah teeng uh hi. Hit mite

Numbers13:22 Tua lai ah Nefilim mite (Nefilim pan a hong piang Anak mite) ka mu uh hi. Kote pen kauphe bang lelin ka kingaihsun uh a
Numbers14:1 Tua ciangin mihon khempeuh nakpi takin kiko uh a
Numbers14:2 Israel mite khempeuh in Moses le Aaron phunsan uh a

Numbers14:4 Amaute khatlekhat kiangah
Numbers14:5 Tua ciangin Israel mihon kikhawmte khempeuhʼ mai ah Moses le Aaron bok suk uh hi.

Numbers14:18 
Numbers14:19 A lian nangma itna kip tawh a kizui le Egypt panin tu hun dong hih mite na maisak sa tawh kizui-in hih miteʼ mawhna maisak in
Numbers14:20 Tua ciangin Topa in
Numbers14:21 Ahih hangin a taktakin

Numbers14:23 amauʼ pate tungah piak dinga ka kiciam leitang a mu kuamah om lo ding uh hi. Kei hong simmawh mi kuamah in tua leitang mu lo ding hi.

Numbers14:27 “Hih a gilo mihonte in bang tanvei kei hong phunsan ding uh ahi hiam? Israel mite in kei hong phunsanna ka za khin hi.
Numbers14:28 Amaute tungah hih bangin gen in: Topa in
Numbers14:29 Na luanghawmte uh hih gamlak ah lum ding hi. Note khempeuh
Numbers14:30 Jefunnehʼ tapa Kaleb le Nunʼ tapa Joshua sim loh

Numbers14:32 Ahih hangin note na hih uh leh
Numbers14:33 Na luanghawmte uh a nunung pen gamlak ah a kisial mateng
Numbers14:34 Na gam vaan sung uh ni phazah tawh kizui-in
Numbers14:35 Topa ahi keimah in thu ka gen hi. Keimah langpangin a kikaikhawm hih a gilo mihonte khempeuh tungah hih thu ka hih taktak ding hi. Hih gamlak ah amaute bei mang ding uh a
Numbers14:36 Moses in gam vaan dingin a sawl mite hong ciahkikin a gam thu a sia lamin gen uh ahih manin mihonte Topa a phunsansak
Numbers14:37 a gam thu a sia lamin a gen tua mite
Numbers14:38 Ahih hangin gam vaan dingin a pai mite lak panin Nunʼ tapa Joshua le Jefunnehʼ tapa Kaleb-te hing lai uh hi.
Numbers14:39 Moses in Israel mite khempeuh tungah hih thute gen a
Numbers14:40 Amaute zingsangin tho baih uh a
Numbers14:41 Ahih hangin Moses in
Numbers14:42 Na galte uh mai ah note hong kisat puk kha ding ahih manin kuan to kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh noteʼ lakah Topa om lo hi.
Numbers14:43 Amalek mite le Kanaan mite na mai uh ah om ahih ciangin namsau tawh note na puk ding uh hi. Topa zuihna panin nungkik na hih uh ciangin note tawh Topa hong om lo ding hi
Numbers14:44 Ahih hangin Topaʼ thuciamna singkuang hitaleh Moses hitaleh giahphual panin ding khia lo napi-in gamlak mual dawnah kuan toh ding amaute in ngaihsun veve uh hi.
Numbers14:45 Tua ciangin mual tung gamah a teeng Amalek mite le Kanaan mite hong pai suk uh a

Numbers15:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note kong piak leitang ah a teeng dingin na tun uh ciangin

Numbers15:5 Tuuno khat tawh piak khawm dingin meihal biakna ahih kei leh biakpiakna tawh
Numbers15:6 Tua ahih kei leh tuutal khat tawh piak khawm dingin annel lawh nih sathau biing nih tawh a kibawl an tawh biak nading na bawl ding uh hi.
Numbers15:7 Topaʼ tungah a gim namtui-in tuibuah dingin leenggahzu thawl khat na pia ding uh hi.
Numbers15:8 Meihal biak nading ahi a

Numbers16:32 Leitang a kam ka-in

Numbers16:37 “Siampi Aaronʼ tapa Eleazar in meikuang sung panin paknamtui beelte a lakkhiat ding gen inla
Numbers16:38 amauʼ nuntakna a beina dongin a khial hih miteʼ paknamtui beelte a siangtho hi. Tua ahih ciangin biakna tau sitna kuangdai dingin seek un; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Topaʼ mai ah tuate pia uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua nate siangtho hi. Israel mite tungah tua bangin hih nate pen lim khat hi ding hi

Numbers16:49 Tu-in Korahʼ tungtang ah a site sim loh

Numbers18:2 Amaute in nang hong pawlin
Numbers18:3 Amaute in note hong huhin puanbuk nasep khempeuh sem ding uh a
Numbers18:4 Amaute in note hong pawlin
Numbers18:5 Israel mite tungah hehna a om nawn loh nadingin biakbuk nasep le biakna tau nasep note in na sem ding uh hi.
Numbers18:6 En un
Numbers18:7 Nang le na tapate in biakna tau tawh kisai nate le dalna puan sunga om nate khempeuh ah na siampi nasep uh na sem ding uh hi. Na siampi nasep uh letsongin kong piak hi a
Numbers18:8 Tua ciangin Topa in Aaron kiangah
Numbers18:9 Mei tawh hal dingte lak panin a kisit
Numbers18:10 A siangtho pen mun khat ah na ne ding uh hi. Pasal peuhmah in ne thei ding hi; note adingin a siangtho ahi hi.
Numbers18:11 “Amauʼ letsong biakna
Numbers18:12 “Sathau limci pen khempeuh le leenggahzu le an a limci pen khempeuh
Numbers18:13 Amaute in Topaʼ tungah a piak uh
Numbers18:14 “Israel-teʼ sungah a ki-ap na peuhmah nomau aʼ hi ding hi.
Numbers18:15 “Mihing le ganhing khempeuh sung panin Topaʼ tungah mite in a piak tacil khempeuh
Numbers18:16 Tuate a kitatna man (kha khat a phak ciangin tuate na tan khia ding uh hi) gerah sawm nih a pha biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in ngun shekel nga-in na seh ding uh hi.
Numbers18:17 Ahih hangin bawng tacil
Numbers18:18 Ahih hangin a kivei sa-iik le a taklam phei nomau-aʼ ahih mah bangin
Numbers18:19 “Israel mite in Topaʼ tungah a piak a siangtho biaknate khempeuh
Numbers18:20 Topa in Aaron kiangah
Numbers18:21 “Kikhopna buk sungah amauteʼ nasepna thaman dingin Israel sunga sawm-ah-khat khempeuh
Numbers18:22 Amaute in khialhna thuakin si kha ding uh ahih manin
Numbers18:23 Ahih hangin Levi mite in kikhopna buk nasep sem ding uh a
Numbers18:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in biakna-in Topaʼ tungah a piak uh Israel miteʼ sawm-ah-khat pen Levi mite tungah luah dingin ka pia khin hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite lakah amaute in luah a neih loh ding uh ka gen sa ahi hi
Numbers18:25 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers18:26 “Levi mite kiangah hih bangin na gen lai ding hi: ‘Noteʼ luah dingin amauteʼ tung panin kong piak sawm-ah-khat
Numbers18:27 Tua na biaknate uh
Numbers18:28 Tua ahih ciangin Israel miteʼ tung panin na ngah uh sawm-ah-khat khempeuh tung panin Topaʼ tungah biakna na pia ding uh hi. Tua bangin siampi Aaronʼ tungah Topa a kibiakna na pia ding uh hi.
Numbers18:29 Note tungah hong kipia letsong lakah a limci pen
Numbers18:30 Tua ahih ciangin amaute kiangah
Numbers18:31 Nang le na innkuanpihte in mun khat peuhpeuh ah na ne thei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen kikhopna buk sungah noteʼ nasepna thaman ahi hi.
Numbers18:32 Tua sung panin a limci pen na piak nak uh leh tua thu hangin mawhsakna na thuak kei ding uh hi. Israel miteʼ na a siangthote na ninsak kei ding uh hi. Na nitsak uh leh na si ding uh hi
Numbers19:1 Tu-in Topa in Moses le Aaronʼ kiangah
Numbers19:2 “ Topaʼ thupiak thukham le ngeina hih bang ahi hi: Poina a nei lo
Numbers19:3 Siampi Eleazar kiangah na pia ding uh a
Numbers19:4 Siampi Eleazar in a khutme tawh a si tawm khat la-in
Numbers19:5 Ama muhna ah a bawngla kihal dinga
Numbers19:6 Siampipa in taamtak sing le puknah le a ausan khaute la-in bawngla a kihalna sungah tuate khul ding hi.
Numbers19:7 Tua ciangin siampipa in ama puante sawpin tui sungah kipumsil dinga
Numbers19:8 Bawngla a hal mipa in ama puante sawpin tui sungah kipumsil dinga
Numbers19:9 Mi a siang khat in bawngla vu khawmin
Numbers19:10 Bawngla vute a khawm mipa in ama puante sawpin
Numbers19:11 “Misi luang khatpeuh a lawng pa ni sagih sung a nin hi ding hi.
Numbers19:12 A ni thum ni le a ni sagih ni-in a mahmah tui tawh kisiangsakin
Numbers19:13 Misi khatpeuh a lawng mi in a mahmah a kisiansak tawm kei leh a mahmah in Topaʼ biakbuk a ninsak hi a
Numbers19:14 “Mi khat puanbuk sungah a sih ciangin puanbuk sungah a pai mi peuhmah le puanbuk sungah a om mi peuhmah ni sagih sung a nin hi ding hi.
Numbers19:15 A kisiincip lo a kihong beel peuhmah a nin ahi hi.
Numbers19:16 Namsau tawh gamlak ah a kithat mi ahi a
Numbers19:17 “Amaute in a nin mipa adingin a kihal khialhna hanga biakna vute la-in beel sung khat ah tui luang lai tawh hel ding uh hi.
Numbers19:18 Tua ciangin a siang mi khat in puknah la-in a sungah diah dinga
Numbers19:19 A ni thum ni le a ni sagih ni-in a siang mipa in a nin mipa tungah theh dinga
Numbers19:20 “Ahih hangin a nin hi napi-in a kisiangsak lo mipa in Topaʼ biakbuk ninsak ahih manin mihonpi panin tua mipa kihawl khia ding hi. Nitna hangin ama tungah tui kibuak lo ahih manin amah a nin ahi hi.

Numbers19:22 A nin mipa in a lawn na khat peuhpeuh a nin hi dinga

Numbers27:20 Israel mihon khempeuh in ama thu a man theih nadingin thuneihna pawl khat amah na guan ding hi.
Numbers27:21 Siampi Eleazarʼ mai ah amah ding dinga
Numbers27:22 Topa in amah a thupiak bangin Moses gamta a
Numbers27:23 amah in ama tungah a khutte nga-in
Numbers28:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers28:2 “Israel mite thu pia-in amaute tungah
Numbers28:3 “ Topaʼ tungah na piak ding uh mei tawh kihal biakna in: A sitbaang lo kum khat a pha tuuno nih
Numbers28:4 Tuuno khat zingsangin na pia ding uh a
Numbers28:5 An tawh biakna-in oliv thau hai khat tawh a kibawl annel lawh khat na pia ding uh hi.
Numbers28:6 Tua pen Topaʼ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna
Numbers28:7 Leenggahzu tawh biakna pen tuuno khat ciangin hai khat hi ding hi. Topaʼ tungah leenggah-zucil tawh biakna pen siangtho munah na sung ding uh hi.
Numbers28:8 A tuuno khat nitakin na pia ding uh hi. Zingsang a an tawh biakna le a leenggahzu tawh biakna mah bangin
Numbers28:9 “Sabbath ni-in a sitbaang lo
Numbers28:10 Hih pen tatsat loin meihal biakna le a leenggahzu tawh biaknate banah Sabbath simin meihal biakna ahi hi.
Numbers28:11 “Kha simin a ni masa ni-in Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna na pia ding uh hi. Bawngtal nih
Numbers28:12 Bawngtal khat ciangin an tawh biakna-in sathau tawh a kibawl annel lawh thum zong hi ding hi. A tuutal khat ciangin an tawh biakna-in sathau tawh a kibawl annel lawh nih hi ding hi.
Numbers28:13 Tuuno khat adingin an tawh biakna-in sathau tawh a kibawl annel lawh khat ciat hi dinga
Numbers28:14 Leenggahzu tawh biaknate pen
Numbers28:15 Khialhna hanga biakna-in Topaʼ tungah keel a pa khat zong kipia ding hi. Tua pen a kitatsat loin meihal biakna le a leenggahzu tawh biaknate banah a kipia ding ahi hi.
Numbers28:16 “Kha masa a ni sawm le ni li ni pen Topaʼ Paisan Pawi ni ahi hi.
Numbers28:17 Tua kha a ni sawm le ni nga ni pen biakna pawi ni hi a
Numbers28:18 A ni masa ni-in a siangtho kikhopna khat om ding hi. Tua ni-in leitung nasep na sem kei ding uh a
Numbers28:19 Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna na pia ding uh hi. Tuate pen bawngtalno nih
Numbers28:20 Sathau tawh a kibawl annel ahi an tawh biaknate zong hi ding hi. Bawngtal khat ciangin annel lawh thum le tuutal khat ciangin annel lawh nih tawh na pia khawm ding uh hi.
Numbers28:21 Tuuno sagihte khat ciangin annel lawh khat mah tawh na pia khawm ding uh hi.
Numbers28:22 Note adingin kilemna bawl nadingin khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi.
Numbers28:23 Meihal biak nading ahi zingsang a meihal biakna banah tatsat lo-a biakna-in hihte na pia ding uh hi.
Numbers28:24 Tua bangmahin mei tawh kihal an tawh biakna ahi
Numbers28:25 A ni sagih ni-in a siangtho kikhopna khat na nei ding uh a
Numbers28:26 “Na nipikal pawi hunun Topaʼ tungah an thak tawh biakna na piak hun uh anpal piak ni-in a siangtho kikhopna khat na nei ding uh hi. Tua ni-in leitung nasep na sem kei ding uh a
Numbers28:27 meihal biakna
Numbers28:28 Sathau tawh a kibawl ahi an tawh a biak nadingin zong
Numbers28:29 tuuno sagihte khat ciangin lawh khat tawh na pia khawm ding uh hi.
Numbers28:30 Note adingin kilemna bawl nadingin keel a pa khat zong na pia ding uh hi.
Numbers28:31 A kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna le an tawh biaknate banah tuate le leenggahzu tawh biakna na pia ding uh hi. Tuate a sitbaang lo ahih ding thei ta un.
Numbers29:1 “A kha sagihna a ni masa ni-in kikhopna siangtho khat na nei ding uh a
Numbers29:2 meihal biakna
Numbers29:3 Bawngtal tawh piak dingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel ahi an tawh biaknate lawh thum
Numbers29:4 le tuuno sagihte khat ciangin lawh khat hi ding hi.
Numbers29:5 Note adingin kilemna bawl nadingin khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi.
Numbers29:6 A khasim meihal biakna le an tawh biakna le a kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna le an tawh biakna le tuate ading ngeina a om bangin a gim namtui
Numbers29:7 “Hih kha sagihna a ni sawm ni-in a siangtho kikhopna khat na nei ding uh a
Numbers29:8 Topaʼ tungah a gim namtui meihal biakna na piak dingte un: Bawngtalno khat
Numbers29:9 Sathau tawh a kibawl annel tawh biaknate pen
Numbers29:10 tuuno sagihte khat ciangin lawh khat hi ding hi.
Numbers29:11 Kilem nadingin khialhna hanga biakna le a kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna le an tawh biakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate banah khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi.
Numbers29:12 “A kha sagihna ni sawm le ni nga ni-in a siangtho kikhopna khat nei-in tua ni-in leitung nasep na sem kei ding uh a
Numbers29:13 A ni masa ni-in meihal biakna
Numbers29:14 Sathau tawh a kibawl annel ahi an tawh biaknate pen
Numbers29:15 le tuuno sawm le lite khat ciangin lawh khat hi ding hi.
Numbers29:16 A kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna
Numbers29:17 “A ni nih ni-in bawngtalno sawm le nih
Numbers29:18 ngeina kip om bangin a phazah tawh kizui-in bawngtalte
Numbers29:19 A kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna le an tawh biakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate banah khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi.
Numbers29:20 “A ni thum ni-in bawngtal sawm le khat
Numbers29:21 ngeina kip om bangin a phazah tawh kizui-in bawngtalte
Numbers29:22 A kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna le an tawh biakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate banah khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi.
Numbers29:23 “A ni li ni-in bawngtal sawm
Numbers29:24 ngeina om bangin a phazah tawh kizui-in bawngtalte
Numbers29:25 A kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna
Numbers29:26 “A ni nga ni-in bawngtal kua
Numbers29:27 ngeina kip om bangin a phazah tawh kizui-in bawngtalte
Numbers29:28 A kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna le an tawh biakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate banah khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi.
Numbers29:29 “A ni guk ni-in bawngtal giat
Numbers29:30 ngeina kip om bangin a phazah tawh kizui-in bawngtalte
Numbers29:31 A kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna
Numbers29:32 “A ni sagih ni-in bawngtal sagih
Numbers29:33 ngeina kip om bangin a phazah tawh kizui-in bawngtalte
Numbers29:34 A kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna
Numbers29:35 “A ni giat ni-in a thupi kikhopna khat na nei ding uh a
Numbers29:36 Meihal biakna
Numbers29:37 ngeina kip om bangin bawngtal
Numbers29:38 A kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna le an tawh biakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate banah khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi.
Numbers29:39 “Na thuciam biakpiakna uh le utthu-a na biakpiaknate uh banah na meihal biaknate le an tawh na biaknate le leenggahzu tawh na biaknate le thunuam a na biak nadingun a kiseh na pawi hunte uh ah hihte
Numbers29:40 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin amah in Israel mite tungah a thu a kimin a gen sawn hi.
Numbers30:1 Moses in Israel minam lutangte tungah
Numbers30:2 Mi khat in Topaʼ tungah thuciamna a ciam ciang ahi a
Numbers30:3 “Tua ahih kei leh
Numbers30:4 amah in a zuih dingin thuciamna le kamciamnate a bawlna a pa in za napi-in ama tungah bangmah a cih kei leh
Numbers30:5 Ahih hangin a pa in a zak ni-in a lungkim lohna a tanuʼ tungah a gen leh
Numbers30:6 “Tua numei
Numbers30:7 a pasal in za a
Numbers30:8 Ahih hangin
Numbers30:9 “Ahih hangin meigong numeiʼ thuciamna ahi a
Numbers30:10 “Numei khat in a pasalʼ inn sungah thu a ciam ahi a
Numbers30:11 a pasal in za a
Numbers30:12 Ahih hangin a pasal in tua thute a zak ni-in a phiatsak leh
Numbers30:13 Thuciamna khatpeuh ahi a
Numbers30:14 Ahih hangin a pasal in tua a kiciam ni a kipanin a ziʼ tungah bangmah a cih kei leh
Numbers30:15 Ahih hangin amah in tuate a zak khit ciangin a nung phiat leh
Numbers30:16 Hihte pen
Numbers31:1 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers31:2 “Israel miteʼ phu Midian-te tungah la in. Tua khit ciangin na mipihte kiang na zuan ding hi
Numbers31:3 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in mite kiangah
Numbers31:4 Israel minamte nam khat panin mi tul khat ciat gal sungah na kuansak ding uh hi
Numbers31:5 Tua ahih ciangin Israel mi tul tampi sung panin minam khat ah tul khat
Numbers31:6 Moses in amaute
Numbers31:7 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Midian-te do uh a
Numbers31:8 Amaute in midangte le Midian kumpi ngate Evi
Numbers31:9 Israel-te in Midian nupite le a tate uh manin
Numbers31:10 Amauʼ teenna a khuapi khempeuh uh le a giahphual khempeuh uh mei tawh halsak uh a
Numbers31:11 a mat sa khempeuh uh
Numbers31:12 Tua ciangin amaute in Jerikho nai
Numbers31:13 Moses
Numbers31:14 Galdona panin a hong ciah mi tul tampi a ukte le mi za tampi a uk galkap ulianteʼ tungah Moses heh hi.
Numbers31:15 Moses in amaute tungah
Numbers31:16 En un
Numbers31:17 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in
Numbers31:18 Ahih hangin pasal tawh a lum khawm nai lo nungaknote khempeuh note adingin kem un.
Numbers31:19 Tu-in note lakah mi khat peuhpeuh a thatte le a kithat sa a lawng mi peuhmahte
Numbers31:20 Puan khempeuh
Numbers31:21 Siampi Eleazar in galdona ah a va kuan galkapte tungah
Numbers31:22 Kham
Numbers31:23 mei a do zo peuhmahte bek mei ah na hal ding uh a
Numbers31:24 A ni sagih ni-in na puante uh na sawp ding uh a
Numbers31:25 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers31:26 “Nang le siampi Eleazar le mihon beh lutangte in gal sunga a kiman mihing le ganhingte sim un.
Numbers31:27 Gal sunga a kingahte khen nih suah inla
Numbers31:28 Galdo dingin a kuan khia galkapteʼ tung panin mite
Numbers31:29 Alang a ngah uh sung panin la inla
Numbers31:30 Israel mihonte in alang a ngah uh sung panin mite
Numbers31:31 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Moses le siampi Eleazar in a sem uh hi.
Numbers31:32 Tu-in galkapte in a lak gal sunga a mat uh a om lai a kihawm dingte: Tuu tul za guk le tul sawm sagih le tul nga
Numbers31:33 bawng tul sawm sagih le tul nih
Numbers31:34 la tul sawm guk le tul khat
Numbers31:35 le pasal tawh a lum khawm nai lo nungak a vekpi-in tul sawm thum le tul nih ahi hi.
Numbers31:36 Alang ahi
Numbers31:37 Topaʼ tuu-siah pen tuu za guk le sawm sagih le nga ahi hi.
Numbers31:38 Bawngte tul sawm thum le tul guk hi a
Numbers31:39 Late tul sawm thum le za nga hi a
Numbers31:40 Nungak tul sawm le tul guk hi a
Numbers31:41 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Moses in siampi Eleazarʼ tungah Topa biak nading siah a pia hi.
Numbers31:42 Galdo dingin a kuan khia mite adingin Moses in a khenkhiat zah mah Israel mihonte in ngah uh a
Numbers31:43 mihonte in a ngah alang teng pen tuu tul za thum le tul sawm thum le tul sagih le za nga
Numbers31:44 bawng tul sawm thum le tul guk
Numbers31:45 la tul sawm thum le za nga
Numbers31:46 nungak tul sawm le tul guk ahi hi.
Numbers31:47 Israel-te in a ngah alang sung panin Moses in mihing le ganhing sawm nga ciangin khat ciat la-in
Numbers31:48 Tua ciangin galkap tul tampite tunga uliante ahi
Numbers31:49 “Koteʼ ukna nuai-a a om galkapte
Numbers31:50 Kote in Topaʼ mai ah ko adingin kilemna bawl nading
Numbers31:51 Moses le siampi Eleazar in amauteʼ tung panin na-a a kibawl khamte a sang uh hi.
Numbers31:52 Tul tampi a ukte le za tampi a ukteʼ tung panin a kingah
Numbers31:53 (Gal sunga a kuan mite in amau ading ciat a la uh hi.)
Numbers31:54 Moses le siampi Eleazar in tul tampi le za tampi a uk miteʼ tung panin khamte sang uh a
Numbers32:1 Reuben minamte le Gad minamte in ganhing hon tampi nei uh hi. Amaute in Jazer gam le Gilead gam a muh uh ciangin gan khawi nading munin hoih sa mahmah uh hi.

Numbers32:3 “Ataroth
Numbers32:4 Topa in Israel mihonte a hong luahsak gamte pen a gan gam hi a
Numbers32:5 Nong hehpihna-un hih gam hong pia unla
Numbers32:6 Ahih hangin Moses in Gad minamte le Reuben minamte tungah
Numbers32:7 Topa in amaute a piakna gamah a pai nading uh ah Israel mite bang hangin lungkiasak ding na hi uh hiam?
Numbers32:8 Na pu na pate uh Kadesh-barnea panin gam vel dingin ka sawl lai-in zong tu-a mah a bang uh hi.
Numbers32:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute Eshkol Kuam ah pai to-in tua gam a muh uh ciangin
Numbers32:10 Tua hunin Topa heh mahmah ahih manin amah kiciamin
Numbers32:11 ‘Amaute in kei hong zui taktak lo uh ahih manin Egypt gam pan a paikhia mite kum sawm nih panin a tungsiah peuhmah khat beek in
Numbers32:12 Ahi zongin Kenaz mi Jefunnehʼ tapa Kaleb le Nunʼ tapa Joshua in Topa zui taktak uh ahih manin a mu ding uh hi
Numbers32:13 Israel mite tungah Topa heh a
Numbers32:14 En un
Numbers32:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah zuihna panin note na pial uh leh amah in gamlak ah amaute nusiakik dinga
Numbers32:16 Tua ciangin ama kiang nai ah amaute hong pai-in
Numbers32:17 ahih hangin kote in hiam tawi-in amauʼ munah Israel mite ka tunpih mateng uh amauʼ mai ah a pai dingin ka kiging ding uh hi. Tua kikal sungin hih gam sungah a teeng miteʼ kiang pan kihut nadingin khuapi muanhuai sungah ka zi ka tate uh a na om ding uh kisam hi.
Numbers32:18 Israel mite in amauʼ luah ding ciat a luah khit matengun ka inn uh ah ka ciah kei ding uh hi.
Numbers32:19 Jordan gal khat le tua bansiah ah amaute tawh ka luah khawm kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Jordan hih lam gal nisuahna lam koteʼ luah hong suak hi
Numbers32:20 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in amaute kiangah
Numbers32:21 Topa in a mai panin a galte a hawlkhiat matengin hiam a tawi note khempeuh in ama mai ah Jordan kantanin
Numbers32:22 Topaʼ mai ah leitang a kilak matengin na om uh leh
Numbers32:23 Ahih hangin note tua bangin na gamtat kei uh leh
Numbers32:24 Na zi na tate uh adingin khuapite satin
Numbers32:25 Tua ciangin Gad minamte le Reuben minamte in Moses kiangah
Numbers32:26 Ka tate uh
Numbers32:27 Koteʼ topa in nong thupiak bangin na nasemte
Numbers32:28 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in amauteʼ thu tawh kisai-in siampi Eleazarʼ tung le Israel minam beh lutang khempeuh tungah thu a pia hi.
Numbers32:29 Moses in amaute tungah

Numbers35:1 Jerikho nai Jordan kiang Moab zanglei ah Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers35:2 “Amaute in amauʼ neih a luah uh sung panin ten nadingin Levi mite tungah khuapite a piak dingun Israel mite thu pia in. Khuapi kiim a lo nona gamte Levi mite tungah na pia ding hi.
Numbers35:3 Khuapite pen amauʼ teenna hi dinga
Numbers35:4 Levi mite tungah na piak ding uh khuapi lo nona gamte pen khuapi kulh panin a kimkot pi tul le za nga ciang ban ding hi.
Numbers35:5 Khuapi laizang panin na teh dinga
Numbers35:6 Levi mite tungah na piak uh khuapite pen bukna khuapi gukte hi dinga
Numbers35:7 Levi mite tungah na piak ding uh khuapi vekpi sawm li le giat hi-in
Numbers35:8 Israel miteʼ neihsa sung panin na piak ding khuapite pen minam tamte tung panin tam la-in
Numbers35:9 Topa in Moses kiangah
Numbers35:10 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Jordan kantanin Kanaan gamah na tun uh ciangin
Numbers35:11 sawm lopi-in mi khatpeuh a that kha mi thatte a va tai theih nading
Numbers35:12 Thu kikhen dingin mihonpi mai ah a din ma-in mi thatte a sih loh nadingin tua khuapite pen phula paʼ kiang panin note adingin bukna hi ding hi.
Numbers35:13 Na piak uh tua khuapite
Numbers35:14 Bukna khuapi dingin Jordan gal khat ah khuapi thum
Numbers35:15 Sawm lopi-in mi khatpeuh a that khate a tai theih nadingin hih khuapi gukte pen Israel mite
Numbers35:16 “Ahih hangin mi khat in na-a kizang sik khat tawh midang khat satin a sih leh
Numbers35:17 Amah in mi a sih theih nading mah ahi a khut sunga om suang khat tawh a suk a
Numbers35:18 Tua ahih kei leh
Numbers35:19 A kinaipih pen khat in a phu la-in mi that pa that dinga
Numbers35:20 “Amah in muhdahna tawh sunin
Numbers35:21 tua ahih kei leh galbawlna tawh a khutin tumin a sih leh
Numbers35:22 “Ahih hangin galbawl lopi-in thakhatin amah sunin
Numbers35:23 ahih kei leh
Numbers35:24 tua mi that pa le a phula paʼ kikalah hih ngeina kipte tawh kizui-in mihonpi in khen ding hi.
Numbers35:25 A phula paʼ khut sung panin mihonpi in mi that pa hon khia-in
Numbers35:26 Ahih hangin hun khat peuhpeuh ah amah a taina bukna khuapi gamgi khengin a pai a
Numbers35:27 a phula pa in ama bukna khuapi daihual pua lamah amah mu-in
Numbers35:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh siampi lianpen pa a sih matengin tua mipa a bukna khuapi sungah a om ding ahi hi. Ahih hangin siampi lianpen pa a sih khit ciangin mi that pa a neihsa leitang ah ciahkik thei ding hi.
Numbers35:29 “Hihte pen na teenna khempeuh uh ah na khang tawntungun thukham le ngeina hi ding hi.
Numbers35:30 Khatpeuh in mi khat a thah leh
Numbers35:31 Tua tham loin
Numbers35:32 Siampi lianpen pa a sih ma-in bukna khuapi ah a tai sa mipa a gamah a ciahkik theih nadingin ama nuntakna tat nading sum na sang kei ding uh hi.
Numbers35:33 Na teenna uh leitang na ninsak kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh mi thahna in leitang ninsak a
Numbers35:34 A laizang ah keimah ka teenna leitang na ninsak kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa keimah
Numbers36:1 Josefʼ tapate beh Manasseh

Numbers36:3 Ahih hangin Israel sungah minam dangteʼ tapate khat peuhpeuh tawh amaute kiteeng leh ka pate uhʼ gamhluah panin amau aʼ teng kilakhia-in a manawh minamte tungah tua gamh kipia beh ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin koʼ ngah sa gamh a kikhen khia ding ahi hi.

Numbers36:7 Israel miteʼ gamhte minam khat pan namdang khat ah paikhia lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mi khempeuh a minam gamhluah ciat uh tawh kip ding uh hi.

Deuteronomy33:29 Na galte in hong mai-etin
Deuteronomy34:1 Tua ciangin Moab zanglei panin Jerikho gal Nebo Mual
Deuteronomy34:2 Naftali gam khempeuh
Deuteronomy34:3 Negeb gam le nisuh kung khuapi kuam a kici Jerikho panin Zoar ciang dong a kikhung zanglei a lak hi.
Deuteronomy34:4 Tua ciangin Topa in ama kiangah
Deuteronomy34:5 Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ thugenna bangin Topaʼ nasem Moses pen Moab gamah si a
Deuteronomy34:6 Beth-peor gal khat
Deuteronomy34:7 Moses a sihin kum za le kum sawm nih pha hi. A mit maang lo a
Deuteronomy34:8 Moab zanglei ah Israel mite ni sawm thum sung Moses hangin a kah khit uh ciangin Moses hangin kahna le thumna a veng ta hi.
Deuteronomy34:9 Tua ciangin Moses in
Deuteronomy34:10 Israel mite sungah Moses bangin Topa in maitang kimu-in a theih kamsang dang kuamah om lo hi.
Deuteronomy34:11 Egypt gam sungah Faro le a nasemte le a gam khempeuh ah a hih dingin Topa in ama tungah a piak limte le nalamdangte khempeuh a nei kuamah dang om lo hi.
Deuteronomy34:12 Israel-te khempeuh muhna ah Moses in a hih a lian vangliatna le a lauhuaite khempeuh a hih thei
Joshua1:1 Topaʼ nasem Moses a sih khit ciangin Topa in Mosesʼ nasem
Joshua1:2 “Ka nasem pa Moses si ta ahih ciangin tu-in ding inla
Joshua1:3 Moses tungah ka ciam sa bangin na khe in a sikna mun khempeuh nang tungah kong pia hi.
Joshua1:4 Sehnel gam le hih Lebanon panin gun lianpi Eufratis gun dong
Joshua1:5 Na nuntak sung tawntung kuamah in na mai hong khak zo lo ding hi. Moses tawh ka om mah bangin nang tawh zong kong om ding hi. Nang kong tamasak kei dinga
Joshua1:6 Thahat inla
Joshua1:7 Thahat-in hang inla
Joshua1:8 Hih thukham laibu na mangngilh ngei kei ding hi. A sunga kigelh thute khempeuh tawh kizui-in na gamtat theih nadingin sun le zanin na lung ngaingai ding hi. Tua hileh na maa vang dinga
Joshua1:9 Thu hong pia khin hi lo ka hi hiam? Thahat inla hang in. Lau kei inla lungkia kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh na paina peuhpeuh ah Topa na Pasian nang tawh hong om hi
Joshua1:10 Tua ciangin Joshua in mi makaite thu pia-in
Joshua1:11 “Giahphual ah pai unla

Joshua1:17 Na khempeuh ah Mosesʼ thu ka man uh mah bangin nangma thu zong kong mang ding uh hi. Moses a ompih mah bangin Topa na Pasian in nang hong ompih tahen!

Joshua4:11 Mite khempeuh a gal kah khit uh ciangin Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang le siampite

Joshua5:5 Hong paikhia mite khempeuh vun a ki-at khit hangin Egypt panin hong paikhiat khit uh sehnel gam lamkal a suak mite khempeuh a vun uh ki-at nai lo hi.

Joshua6:2 Tua ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah
Joshua6:3 Khuapi kimkot ah galkap mi khempeuh khatvei na pai ding uh hi. Tua bangin ni guk sung na pai ding uh hi.
Joshua6:4 Siampi sagih in Thuciamna Singkuang mai ah tuutal ki peengkul sagih tawi ding uh hi. A ni sagih ni-in khuapi kimkot ah sagih vei na pai ding uh a
Joshua6:5 Amaute in tuutal ki sau veipi a ginsak khit uh ciangin
Joshua6:6 Tua ahih ciangin Nun tapa Joshua in siampite samin amaute kiangah
Joshua6:7 Tua ciangin amah in mite kiangah
Joshua6:8 Joshua in mite a thupiak bangin Topaʼ mai ah a pai tuutal ki peengkul a tawi siampi sagihte mai nawtin pai-in peengkul tum uh a
Joshua6:9 Tua ciangin peengkul a tum siampiteʼ mai ah hiam tawi mite pai uh a
Joshua6:10 Ahih hangin Joshua in mite thu pia-in

Joshua6:12 Tua ciangin zingsangin Joshua tho baih a
Joshua6:13 Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang mai ah a pai tuutal ki peengkul sagih a tawi siampi sagihte pai suakin peengkulte tum suak uh hi. Amauteʼ mai ah hiam tawite pai-in
Joshua6:14 A ni nih ni-in khuapi kimkot ah khatvei pai uh a
Joshua6:15 A ni sagih ni-in khuavak tungin tho baih uh a
Joshua6:16 A sagih veina ah
Joshua6:17 Khuapi le a sunga omte khempeuh pen Topaʼ tungah biakna-in kisusia ding hi. Amah in i sawl kamtaite na seel ahih manin numei paktat Rahab le ama inn sungah amah tawh a om khawmte khempeuh bek hing ding hi.
Joshua6:18 Ahih hangin suksiat dingin a kiseh nate panin nomau mah na kikem ding uh hi. Tua hikeileh tuate na suksiat ding uh ciangin a kisusia ding nate khat peuhpeuh iplahin la kha-in Israel-teʼ giahphual sungah siat nading na khat suaksakin haksatna na tun kha ding uh hi.
Joshua6:19 Ahih hangin ngun le kham
Joshua6:20 Tua ahih ciangin mite awng a
Joshua6:21 Tua ciangin amaute in khuapi sunga om khempeuh numei le pasal
Joshua6:22 Tua ciangin Joshua in tua gam thu a va kansim mi nihte kiangah
Joshua6:23 Tua ahih ciangin thu kansim tangvalte va tum uh a
Joshua6:24 Amaute in khuapi le a sunga om khempeuh mei tawh hal uh a
Joshua6:25 Ahih hangin numei paktat Rahab le tua nu tawh a kizomte khempeuh Joshua in a hingkhawi hi. Jerikho khua thu a kansim dingin Joshua in a sawl kamtaite tua nu in na seel ahih manin tu ni dongin Israel mite lakah a suanlekhakte a teeng uh hi.
Joshua6:26 Tua hun laitakin Joshua in amaute tungah thuciamna khat koih a

Joshua10:1 Joshua in Ai a lakna zia le Jerikho le a kumpipa tungah a bawl bangin Ai le a kumpipa tungah a bawlna le Gibeon khua sunga teeng mite in Israel-te tawh kilemna a bawlna le amaute lakah a omna thu Jerusalem kumpipa Adonizedek in a zak ciangin
Joshua10:2 nakpi takin a lau hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Gibeon pen kumpi khuate khat mah bangin khua lian khat hi a

Joshua10:4 “Kei kiangah hong pai un. Hong huh unla

Joshua10:21 Makkedah giahphual Joshua kiangah mi khempeuh cidamin a ciahkik uh hi. Israel mite khatpeuh a paupih ngam kuamah om lo hi.

Joshua11:1 Hazor kumpipa Jabin in Israel-teʼ gualzawhna thu a zak ciangin amah in Madon kumpipa Jobab le Shimron kumpipa
Joshua11:2 saklam mual tung le Khinneroth leitaw lam a om Arabah gam sung le Jordan gunkuam le nitumna lamah Nafathdor gam sunga om kumpite
Joshua11:3 nisuahna le nitumna lam a om Kanaan mite
Joshua11:4 Tua ciangin amaute tampi a pha a galkap honpite tawh
Joshua11:5 Hih kumpite khempeuh in amauʼ galkapte gawmin Israel mite tawh a kido dingin hong pai-in Merom lui ah giahphual a sat khawm uh hi.
Joshua11:6 Tua ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah
Joshua11:7 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua zong a galkapte khempeuh tawh thakhat thu-in Merom lui gei amaute kiangah pai-in va sim uh hi.

Joshua11:9 Topaʼ sawl bangin Joshua in amaute hih a
Joshua11:10 Tua hun laitakin Joshua kiheikikin Hazor la a
Joshua11:11 Amaute in tua sunga om mi khempeuh namsau tawh that khin mang uh hi. Khat zong hingkhawi lo uh a
Joshua11:12 Topaʼ nasem Moses in a thupiak sa bangin Joshua in tua kumpiteʼ khuapite le a kumpi khempeuh la-in namsau tawh amaute vatin that mangkhin hi.
Joshua11:13 Ahih hangin Hazor khua longal mual tunga om khuapite khat zong Israel mite in hal lo uh a
Joshua11:14 Israel mite in tua khuapite sunga van kinusiate le ganhingte amauʼ gal zawh van dingin a la uh hi. Ahih hangin amaute a thah khit matengun namsau tawh vat gawp uh a

Joshua11:16 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in gam khempeuh
Joshua11:17 Seir lamah a kikhung to Halak Mual panin Hermon Mual nuai Lebanon kuama om Baalgad ciang dong a la hi. Amah in amauʼ kumpite khempeuh la-in amaute vat gawpin a that hi.
Joshua11:18 Hih kumpite khempeuh le Joshua sau veipi sung a kido hi.
Joshua11:19 Gibeon khua-a teeng Hiv mite longal
Joshua11:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Moses a thupiakna bangin amaute a kisuksiat mang nading le hehpihna ngah loin a kibeisak theih nadingin Israel-te a do nadingin a lungsim uh a khauhsak pa pen Topa ahi hi.
Joshua11:21 Tua hun laitakin Joshua hong pai-in mual tung gam
Joshua11:22 Israel miteʼ leitang ah Anak mite khat zong om nawn lo a
Joshua11:23 Topa in Moses tungah a gen sa bangin Joshua in leitang khempeuh a la hi. Tua ciangin Joshua in amau minam tawh kizui-in a ngah ding bangin Israel mite tungah gamh-in a pia hi. Tua hun a kipan galdona panin tua gam a tawlnga hi.

Joshua13:1 Tu-in Joshua teekin a kum tampi pha hi. Topa in ama kiangah

Joshua13:3 (Kanaan miteʼ gam ci-a a kiciamteh
Joshua13:4 leitaw lamah
Joshua13:5 le Gebal miteʼ leitang le Lebanon gam khempeuh
Joshua13:6 Lebanon le Misrefoth-maim kikalah a teeng Sidon mite khempeuh ahi hi. Kei mahmah in Israel miteʼ mai panin amaute ka hawl khia dinga
Joshua13:7 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in minam kua le Manasseh minam a langte tungah luah dingin hih leitang hawm in
Joshua13:8 Reuben mite le Gad mite in Manasseh minam alang dang khatte tawh Topaʼ nasem Moses in amaute a piak sa ahih manin nisuahna lam Jordan gal khat ah gamh ngah khin uh hi.
Joshua13:9 Arnon kuam mong a om Aroer pan le kuam laizang a om khuapi le Dibon ciang dong Medeba mualzang khempeuh;
Joshua13:10 le Ammon miteʼ gamgi ciang dong Heshbon ah a uk Amor kumpi Sihonʼ khuapi khempeuh;
Joshua13:11 Gilead le Geshur mite le Maakath miteʼ gam le Hermon Mual khempeuh le Salekah dong Bashan gam khempeuh;
Joshua13:12 Ashtaroth le Edrei ah a uk Bashan gam sunga Og kumpi gam khempeuh (Refaim a a suaktate lakah amah bek om hi); Moses in hihte zo-in a hawl khia hi.
Joshua13:13 Ahi zongin Israel mite in Geshur mite ahi a
Joshua13:14 Levi minamte tung bekah Moses in gamh pia lo hi. Topa in Moses kiangah a gen sa mah bangin Israel-teʼ Topa Pasianʼ tungah a kipia mei tawh kihal biaknate pen amauʼ gamh ahi hi.

Judges20:33 Israel mite khempeuh amauʼ omna mun panin dingin Baal-tamar ah a gualin pang uh hi. A pangsim Israel mite Gibeah nitumna lam amau omna panin hong ding khia uh hi.
Judges20:34 Gibeah khua a sim dingin Israel-te khempeuh sung pan a kiteng khia mi tul sawm hong kuan uh a

Judges20:37 Tua ciangin a pangsim mite manlangin hong pai-in Gibeah khua sungah lut uh a
Judges20:38 Israel mite le a pangsim mite a kiciamna lim in
Judges20:39 Israel mite galsim dingin hong tum ding uh hi. Tu-in Benjamin mite in Israel mite sawm thum bang vat gawpin thah ding kipan uh hi. Amaute in
Judges20:40 Ahih hangin amauʼ kiciamna lim meikhu khuapi sung panin suak to dingin a kipat ciangin Benjamin mite nunghei uh a
Judges20:41 Tua ciangin Israel mite hong kilehhei uh a
Judges20:42 Tua ahih ciangin Israel-teʼ mai panin amaute kilehkikin gamlak lam manawh uh hi. Ahih hangin gal in amaute pha a

1Samuel6:15 Levi mite in Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang le a gei-a om kham milim a omna singkuang la-in suangtumpi tungah a koih uh hi. Beth-shemesh mite in tua ni-in Topaʼ tungah meihal biaknate le biakpiaknate a pia uh hi.

1Samuel18:11 Saul in a teipi-in David nih vei a khawh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh
1Samuel18:12 Saul in David kihta hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in amah ompih a
1Samuel18:13 Tua ahih ciangin Saul in a omna panin David la khia-in mihing tul khat a ukin koih a

1Samuel18:15 Amah in matut zawhna lianpi a neih lam Saul in a muh ciangin amah lamdang sa-in om hi.
1Samuel18:16 Ahih hangin Israel-te khempeuh le Judah-te khempeuh in David it uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute makaihin amah kuan khia-in hong ciah hi.

1Samuel25:6 Hih bangin amah na hopih ding uh hi: ‘Nang tungah nopna om tahen
1Samuel25:7 Gan mul mette na neihna ka za hi. Na tuucingte kote tawh omin amaute tungah siatna ka bawl kei uh a
1Samuel25:8 Na tangvalte uh dong lecin amaute in nang kiangah hong gen thei ding uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka tangvalte maipha na musak in; bang hang hiam cih leh pawi ni-in kong pai uh hi. Na neih sung pan nong piak theih peuhpeuh na nasemte le na tapa David tungah pia in

2Samuel3:1 Saulʼ innkuan le Davidʼ innkuanteʼ kikalah sau veipi gal kidona om hi. David thahat semsem a
2Samuel3:2 Hebron ah Davidʼ tapate suak hi: A tacil pen Jezreel khuami Ahinoam tawh a neih Amnon ahi hi.
2Samuel3:3 A ta nihna pen Karmel khuami Nabalʼ zi meigongnu Abigail tawh a neih Khileab ahi hi. A thumna pen Geshur kumpipa Talmaiʼ tanu Maakahʼ tapa Absalom ahi hi.
2Samuel3:4 A lina pen Haggithʼ tapa Adonijah ahi hi. A ngana pen Abitalʼ tapa Shefatiah ahi hi.
2Samuel3:5 A gukna pen Davidʼ zi Eglah ta Ithream ahi hi. Hihte pen Hebron khua ah Davidʼ sung pan a suak ahi hi.

2Samuel12:7 Tua ciangin Nathan in David kiangah
2Samuel12:8 Keimah in na topaʼ inn le na topaʼ zite na khut sungah kong pia a
2Samuel12:9 Ama muhna ah a sia a gamta dingin bang hangin Topaʼ thu simmawh na hi hiam? Nangmah in Hit mi Uriah namsau tawh vatin
2Samuel12:10 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in nangmah in kei hong simmawhin Hit mi Uriahʼ zi nangma zi dingin la khin na hih manin na inn sungah namsau tawh kidona veng ngei lo ding hi
2Samuel12:11 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘En in
2Samuel12:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in a simthamin na hih hi; ahih hangin keimah in Israel-te khempeuhʼ muh dingin suntangpi-in ka hih ding hi
2Samuel12:13 David in hih thu a zak ciangin Nathan kiangah
2Samuel12:14 Ahi zongin
2Samuel12:15 Tua ciangin Nathan a inn ah a ciah hi. Tua ciangin Uriahʼ zi in David tawh a neih naungek Topa in vat a
2Samuel12:16 Tua ahih ciangin David in naungek adingin Pasianʼ tungah thum hi. David in an tangin zan tawntung leilak ah a lum hi.
2Samuel12:17 Tua ciangin leilak panin a phong dingin a inn sung upate ama kiangah ding uh hi. Ahih hangin amah tho lo a
2Samuel12:18 A ni sagih ni-in naungek si hi. Ama kiangah
2Samuel12:19 Ahih hangin ama nasemte a kihuauna uh David in a muh ciangin naungek si hi
2Samuel12:20 Tua ciangin David leilak panin tho-in kisil a
2Samuel12:21 Tua ciangin a nasemte in ama kiangah
2Samuel12:22 Amah in
2Samuel12:23 Ahih hangin tu-in amah si ta hi; bang hangin an tang nawn ding ka hi hiam? Amah lakik thei ding ka hi hiam? Ama kiangah kei ka pai dinga

2Samuel13:1 Tu-in Davidʼ tapa Absalom in Tamar min nei sanggam numei a melhoih mahmah khat nei hi. Tawl khat khit ciangin Davidʼ tapa Amnon in tua nu ngai hi.
2Samuel13:2 Amnon in ngai lua mahmah ahih manin a sanggamnu Tamar hangin cinat lawh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nungak le tangval kituam omsak ahih manin Amnon in tua nu a muh theih nading om theih tuak lo hi.

2Samuel13:17 Amah in a nasem tangvalpa samin

2Samuel13:19 Tua ciangin Tamar in a lu tungah vut koihin ama silh puan tualpi bansau bal kek hi. Tua ciangin a lu tungah a khut koihin paikhia a

1Kings2:9 Ahi ta zongin tu-in amah a mawhbaang loin ngaihsun kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang mipil na hi hi. Ama tungah na bawl dinga a kilawm na thei ngawn ding hi. Amah thatin a lutang hanah na paipih suk ding hi

1Kings2:11 Israel-te tungah David in kum sawm li sung uk hi. Amah in Hebron ah kum sagih sung ukin
1Kings2:12 Tua ahih ciangin a pa Davidʼ tokhom tungah Solomon tu a
1Kings2:13 Tua ciangin Solomonʼ nu Bathsheba kiangah David in Haggith tawh a neih a tapa Adonijah hong pai hi. Tua nu in
1Kings2:14 Tua ciangin Adonijah in
1Kings2:15 Adonijah in
1Kings2:16 Tu-in nangma tung panin kong nget ding khat om hi; kei hong nial kei in
1Kings2:17 Amah in
1Kings2:18 Bathsheba in
1Kings2:19 Tua ahih ciangin Adonijah tangin ama tungah thu a gen dingin Kumpi Solomon kiangah Bathsheba va pai hi. Tua ciangin tua nu a dawn dingin kumpipa dingin tua nu mai ah a kun hi. Tua ciangin ama tokhom tungah tu-in kumpipaʼ nu adingin tutna khat lasak hi. Tua nu ama tak lamah a tu hi.
1Kings2:20 Tua ciangin amah in
1Kings2:21 Amah in
1Kings2:22 Kumpi Solomon in a nu dawngin
1Kings2:23 Tua ciangin Kumpi Solomon zong Topa tawh kiciamin
1Kings2:24 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in
1Kings2:25 Tua ahih ciangin Kumpi Solomon in Jehoiadaʼ tapa Benaiah sawl hi. Amah in tua pa sat puk sukin
1Kings2:26 Tua ciangin siampi Abiatharʼ kiangah kumpipa in
1Kings2:27 Tua ahih ciangin Solomon in Topaʼ siampi hihna panin Abiathar hawl khia-in
1Kings2:28 Hih thu Joab kiang a tun ciangin Topaʼ puanbuk ah Joab tai-in biakna tau kite a len hi. (Joab in Absalom pawlpih loin Adonijah a na pawlpihna hang ahi hi.)
1Kings2:29 Kumpi Solomon kiangah
1Kings2:30 Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ puanbuk ah Benaiah hong pai-in ama kiangah
1Kings2:31 Kumpipa in amah dawngkikin
1Kings2:32 Topa in ama mawhna ama lu tung mahah tungsakkik ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka pa Davidʼ theih loh kalin amah in Israel galkapte a uk Nerʼ tapa Abner le Judah galkapte a uk Jetherʼ tapa Amasa
1Kings2:33 Tua ahih ciangin mi thahna hangin gimna pen Joabʼ lu tung le ama suanlekhakteʼ lu tungah a tawntungin hong tungkik ding hi. Ahih hangin Davidʼ tung
1Kings2:34 Tua ciangin Jehoiadaʼ tapa Benaiah pai to-in amah sat puk sukin that a
1Kings2:35 Kumpipa in Joab tangin galkapteʼ tungah Jehoiadaʼ tapa Benaiah koih a
1Kings2:36 Tua ciangin kumpipa in mi sawlin Shimei samsakin ama kiangah
1Kings2:37 Bang hang hiam cih leh nang pai khia-in Kidron lui na kantan ni-in na sih ding teltakin thei in; na sih leh nangma khialhna hang hi ding hi
1Kings2:38 Tua ciangin Shimei in kumpipa kiangah
1Kings2:39 Ahih hangin kum thum a cin ciangin Gath kumpipa Maakahʼ tapa Akhish kiangah Shimeiʼ silate nih va tai uh hi. Shimeiʼ kiangah
1Kings2:40 Shimei dingin la khat a van vawhin a silate a zong dingin Gath a Akhish kiangah pai a
1Kings2:41 Jerusalem panin Gath ah Shimei pai-in a ciahkikna thu Solomon kiangah a kigen ciangin
1Kings2:42 kumpipa in mi sawlin Shimei samsakin ama kiangah
1Kings2:43 Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin Topaʼ tungah na kiciamna le nang hong thuhilhin kong thupiakna zui lo na hi hiam?” a ci hi.
1Kings2:44 Tua banah kumpipa in Shimei kiangah
1Kings2:45 Ahih hangin Kumpi Solomon thupha kipia-in
1Kings2:46 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Jehoiadaʼ tapa Benaiah thu pia hi. Amah pai khia-in Shimei sat puk sukin
1Kings3:1 Solomon in Egypt kumpipa Faro tawh numei-a kizopna bawl hi. Amah in Faroʼ tanu la a
1Kings3:2 Ahi zongin Topa adingin biakinn kilam nai lo ahih manin mite in mual tunga biaknate ah biakna pia uh hi.
1Kings3:3 Solomon in Topa itin
1Kings3:4 Tua ciangin biakna a pia dingin Gibeon ah kumpipa pai hi; bang hang hiam cih leh mual tunga biakna mun a lian pen ahi hi. Solomon in tua biakna tau tungah meihal biakna tam veipi tak a piaknasa mun ahi hi.
1Kings3:5 Gibeon ah zanin mang sungah Solomonʼ tungah Topa kilang hi. Pasian in
1Kings3:6 Solomon in

1Kings3:8 A lian

1Kings3:10 Solomonʼ thungetna in Topa lungkimsak hi.

1Kings3:12 en in

1Kings3:14 Na pa David in a tot bangin nangmah in ka lampite tawnin
