1Kings4:1 Kumpi Solomon pen Israel mi khempeuh tungah kumpi hi a
1Kings4:2 ama nuai ah panmunte le a semte hih bang ahi hi: Siampi nasep: Zadokʼ tapa Azariah ahi hi.
1Kings4:3 Lai-at nasep: Shishaʼ tapa Elihoref le Ahijah ahi uh hi. Thu ciamteh nasep: Ahiludʼ tapa Jehoshafat ahi hi.
1Kings4:4 Galkapte a uk nasep: Jehoiadaʼ tapa Benaiah ahi hi. Siampite nasep: Zadok le Abiathar ahi uh hi.
1Kings4:5 Uliante tungah a uk nasep: Nathanʼ tapa Azariah ahi hi. Kumpi thulamlak nasep: Nathanʼ tapa Zabud ahi hi.
1Kings4:6 Kumpi inn uk nasep: Ahishar ahi hi. Aana tawh nasemte a uk nasep: Abdaʼ tapa Adoniram ahi hi.
1Kings4:7 Solomon in Israel khempeuh tungah ulian sawm le nih nei-in tuate in kumpipa le a innkuan adingin an nek tui dawn vaihawmsak uh hi. Mi khat in kum khatin kha khat sung an nek tui dawn vaihawmsak ciat uh hi.
1Kings4:8 Tua a vaihawm uliante: Benhur: Efraim mual tung gam sungah;
1Kings4:9 Bendeker: Makaz khua
1Kings4:10 Benhesed: Arubboth khua sungah (Soko le Hefer gam khempeuh ama aʼ hi);
1Kings4:11 Benabinadab: Nafathdor gam sung khempeuh ah (amah in Solomonʼ tanu Tafath zi-in nei hi);
1Kings4:12 Ahiludʼ tapa Baana: Taanak khua
1Kings4:13 Bengeber: Ramoth-gilead gam sungah (amah in Gilead sunga om Manassehʼ tapa Jairʼ khuaneute le Bashan sungah a om Argob gam sung
1Kings4:14 Iddoʼ tapa Ahinadab: Mahanaim khua sungah;
1Kings4:15 Ahimaaz: Naftali gam sungah (amah in Solomonʼ tanu Basemath zi-in la hi);
1Kings4:16 Hushaiʼ tapa Baana: Asher gam le Bealoth khua sungah;
1Kings4:17 Paruahʼ tapa Jehoshafat: Issakhar gam sungah;
1Kings4:18 Elaʼ tapa Shimei: Benjamin gam sungah;
1Kings4:19 Uriʼ tapa Gebal: Amor miteʼ kumpi Sihon le Bashan kumpi Og gam ahi Gilead gam sungah ahi hi. Tua ciangin hih sawm le nihte banah Judah gam sung khempeuh a uk ulian khat om lai hi.
1Kings4:20 Judah mi le Israel mi tuipi gei-a sehnel bangin tam uh a
1Kings4:21 Solomon in Eufratis panin Filistia gam le Egypt gamgi ciang dong kumpi gam khempeuh uk hi. Amaute in siah hong puak uh a
1Kings4:22 Solomon ading ni khatin an nek tui dawn
1Kings4:23 bawngtal a thau sawm le lo nona a kivak bawng sawm nih; tuu za khat; sakhitalte le Syria sakhite
1Kings4:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Eufratis nitumna lam gam sung khempeuh Tifsah panin Gaza ciang dong
1Kings4:25 Solomonʼ hunsung khempeuh Judah le Israel lungmuang takin omin
1Kings4:26 Solomon in a leengte adingin buk a nei ciat sakol tul sawm li le sakol tung tuang mi tul sawm le tul nih zong nei hi.
1Kings4:27 Tua uliante in Kumpi Solomon le Kumpi Solomonʼ sabuai ah a hong pai mite khempeuh adingin amau ciat sik kha sunga dingin an nek tui dawn vaihawm uh a
1Kings4:28 Amauʼ nasep ciat tawh kizui-in a kisapna munah sakolte le sakol zaptelte adingin mangbuhham le buhtu zong paipih uh hi.
1Kings4:29 Pasian in Solomonʼ tungah teh zawh lohin a thuk mahmah pilna le theihna le gen zawh loh lungsim zaina pia a
1Kings4:30 Solomonʼ pilna in nisuahna lam mi khempeuh le Egypt pilna khempeuh khum let hi.
1Kings4:31 Bang hang hiam cih leh midang khempeuh sangin amah pil zaw a
1Kings4:32 Amah in paunak tul thum zong gen khia a
1Kings4:33 Amah in Lebanon-a om taamtak a kipan phungmai a po puknahte dongin singkung thu a gen hi. Amah in khe li nei ganhingte
1Kings4:34 Mi khempeuh le leitung kumpi khempeuh sung panin Solomonʼ pilna thu a ngai dingin ama pilna thu a za ngeisate hong pai uh hi.
1Kings5:1 Amaute in ama paʼ munah kumpi-in amah sathau a nilhna thu a zak ciangin Taia kumpi Hiram in a nasemte Solomon kiangah sawl hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Hiram in David it tawntung hi.
1Kings5:2 Tua ciangin Solomon in Hiram kiangah kam khak a
1Kings5:3 “ Topa in ama khe nuai ah amaute a koihsak matengin amah a umcih a galte tawh kidona hangin ka pa David in Topa ama Pasianʼ min dingin biakinn a lam theih lohna thu na thei hi.
1Kings5:4 Ahih hangin tu-in Topa ka Pasian in na khempeuh ah tawlngakna kei tungah hong pia hi. Hong langpang ahi a
1Kings5:5 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in ka pa David kiangah
1Kings5:6 Tua ahih ciangin Lebanon taamtak singte kei adingin a kiphuk nading thu pia in; ka nasemte in nangma nasemte seppih ding uh a
1Kings5:7 Hiram in Solomonʼ kam a zak ciangin nakpi takin lungdam a
1Kings5:8 Tua ciangin Hiram in Solomon kiangah mi sawlin
1Kings5:9 Ka nasemte in Lebanon panin tuipi ah tuate hong puak suk ding uh hi. Nangma cihna munah a pai dingin tuipi a tawn dingin keimah in tuate phongin ka bawl dinga
1Kings5:10 Tua ahih ciangin Hiram in ama deih taamtak le taaksan singte Solomon pia a
1Kings5:11 Solomon in Hiram tungah a miteʼ an dingin mangbuh beem tul sawm nih le oliv thau bungpi tul sawm nih dim a pia hi. Solomon in Hiramʼ tungah a kumkumin hihte a pia hi.
1Kings5:12 Ama tungah a ciam bangin Topa in Solomon tungah pilna pia hi. Solomon le Hiram kilem uh a
1Kings5:13 Kumpi Solomon in Israel sung panin aana tawh na a sem mite la hi. A lak mite mihing tul sawm thum pha hi.
1Kings5:14 Amah in Lebanon ah tua mite kha khatin tul sawm a kikhelin puak hi. Amaute Lebanon ah kha khat omin inn ah kha nih om ding uh hi. Adoniram in hih a kila mite uk hi.
1Kings5:15 Solomon in van pua mi tul sawm sagih le mual tung gamah suangseek mi tul sawm giat zong nei a
1Kings5:16 na a sem mite a uk
1Kings5:17 Suangseek sa tawh biakinn bulpi a phuh theih nadingin kumpipaʼ thupiakna tawh amaute in a lian
1Kings5:18 Tua ahih ciangin biakinn lam nadingin Solomonʼ mi innlamte le Hiramʼ mi innlamte le Gebal mite in sing phuk le sing le suang nasep a sem uh hi.
1Kings6:1 Egypt gam panin Israel mite a paikhiat zawh kum za li le kum sawm giatna
1Kings6:2 Kumpi Solomon in Topa adingin a lam biakinn
1Kings6:3 Biakinn mai ah a innliim pen biakinn zaina zahin pi sawm thum sau a
1Kings6:4 Tua ciangin amah in biakinn adingin a pualam a kihui tawlette a bawl hi.
1Kings6:5 Amah in biakinn pang tuak le a nung lam biakinn kawm kimkotin a kawm tungah zong inn lam a
1Kings6:6 A dawl nuainung pen pi sagih le alang zai-in
1Kings6:7 Biakinn a kilam ciangin a kitawhna mun panin a kibawl sa suangte tawh kilam hi. Tua ahih manin a kilam laitakin hei ahi a
1Kings6:8 A dawl nuainung lut nading pen biakinn leitaw lam pangah om hi. A dawl laita ah kahlei zui-in kipai-in a dawl laita panin a thumna ah kipai hi.
1Kings6:9 Tua ahih ciangin amah in biakinn lamin a zo hi. Amah in innkamte khungin taamtak peekte tawh inndap a bawl hi.
1Kings6:10 Amah in a inn buppi tungah a lambehte zomin
1Kings6:11 Tu-in Topaʼ thu Solomonʼ tungah hong tunga
1Kings6:12 “Nangmah in na lam hih biakinn tawh kisai-in
1Kings6:13 Tua ciangin na lam biakinn sung Israel mite lakah ka teeng dinga
1Kings6:14 Tua ahih ciangin Solomon in biakinn lamin a zo hi.
1Kings6:15 Amah in taamtak peekte tawh biakinn sung kawm dap hi. Sual panin inndap innsunte dongin amah in sing tawh a sung lam tuam hi. Tua ciangin amah in taaksan peekte tawh a sual tuam hi.
1Kings6:16 Amah in sual panin innsun dong inn nung lam pi sawm thum taamtak peekte tawh lam a
1Kings6:17 Biakinn sung nung mai-a inn sung
1Kings6:18 Inn sunga om taamtak singte tungah umgah le pakpalh lim kigelh hi. A vekpi-in taamtak a kidap hi a
1Kings6:19 Amah in Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang koih nadingin a sung tawng pen ah biakinn sung nung a bawl hi.
1Kings6:20 Biakinn sung nung
1Kings6:21 Tua ciangin Solomon in kham citak tawh inn sung zut a
1Kings6:22 Amah in a inn buppi a zawh dongin kham tawh a zut hi. Biakinn sung nung a biakna tau buppi zong amah in kham tawh a zut hi.
1Kings6:23 Amah in biakinn sung nungah oliv sing tawh kherub nih bawl a
1Kings6:24 Kherub kha lang khat
1Kings6:25 Kherub a dang khat zong pi sawm le nga mah sau a
1Kings6:26 Kherub khat a sauna pi sawm le nga hi a
1Kings6:27 Amah in biakinn sung tawngnung pen ah kherub-te a koih hi. Kherub-teʼ khate kizal a
1Kings6:28 Amah in kham tawh tua kherub-te a zut hi.
1Kings6:29 Amah in a sung nung le a pua nung inn deite
1Kings6:30 A sung nung le a pua nung inn dei sung innsualte amah in kham tawh a zut hi.
1Kings6:31 Biakinn sung nung lut nadingin amah in oliv sing kongkhak peekte a bawl hi; a baang tung zawl le kongkhak khuamte in kiu nga piangsak hi.
1Kings6:32 Amah in kherub-te
1Kings6:33 Tua bangmahin amah in kiu li nei-in biakinn sung lutna oliv sing kongkhak khuamte
1Kings6:34 le taaksan sing kongkhak peek nihte a bawl hi. Kongkhak a peek nihte kikhepin
1Kings6:35 Tuate tungah amah in kherub-te le nisuh kungte le pakpalhte bawl a
1Kings6:36 Amah in a kiseek suang gual thum le taamtak sing gual khat tawh a tual sung nung a bawl hi.
1Kings6:37 A kum lina
1Kings6:38 A kum sawm le kum khatna
1Kings7:1 Solomon in ama inn ding zong kum sawm le kum thum sung lamin a inn buppi a zo hi.
1Kings7:2 Amah in Lebanon Tulak Inn a kici khat a lam hi. A sauna pi za le sawm nga hi a
1Kings7:3 Gual khat ah sawm le nga a om khuampi sawm li le nga tunga kilam inn dei tung san teng taamtak sing tawh kituam hi.
1Kings7:4 A pang kawm tegel tungah tawlet gual thum tuak om a
1Kings7:5 A kongkhakte le a tawlet khempeuhte a pang kikim kiu li nei vive hi a
1Kings7:6 Tua ciangin amah in Khuampi Innpi a kici khat lam hi. A sauna pi sawm sagih le nga hi a
1Kings7:7 Tua ciangin amah in a thukhen nading mun Thukhenna Innpi ahi Kumpi Tokhom Innpi a kici khat lam a
1Kings7:8 Kumpi Tokhom Innpi nung lamah ama ten nading inn zong tua mah bangin a kilam ahi hi. Solomon in zi a a lak Faroʼ tanu adingin hih innpi tawh a kibang inn dang khat zong a lam hi.
1Kings7:9 Hihte khempeuh
1Kings7:10 A bulpi pen a manpha suang
1Kings7:11 Tuateʼ tung a te pen limtakin tehin a kitan a manpha suang le taamtak sing ahi hi.
1Kings7:12 Tual lianpi in a kimkot ah a kiseek suang gual thum simin taamtak sing gual khat nei hi. Tua mah bangin Topaʼ biakinn tual sung nung le innliim in zong a nei hi.
1Kings7:13 Tua ciangin Kumpi Solomon in mi sawlin Taia khua-a om Huram samsak hi.
1Kings7:14 Amah pen Naftali minam meigongnuʼ tapa hi a
1Kings7:15 Amah in sumngo khuampi nih sung hi. Khuampi khat a sauna pi sawm nih le sagih hi a
1Kings7:16 Khuampite tungah a bulh dingin amah in a kisung sumngo khuam luzepna nih zong a bawl hi. Khuam luzepna khat a sauna pi sagih le alang hi a
1Kings7:17 Tua ciangin amah in khuampite lu dawna khuam luzepna adingin khainiang a kihuiheek tawh a kibawl ngen banga kikalh simsiam nih a bawl hi. Ngen khat pen khuam luzepna khat ading hi a
1Kings7:18 Tua mah bangin amah in mang kawlsing gahte a bawl hi. Khuampi lu dawna om khuam luzepna tuam nadingin ngen tawh kibangin a bawl tung kimkot ah gual nih bawl a
1Kings7:19 Tua ciangin inn lim a om khuampi dawnah a om khuamluzepnate pi guk pha a
1Kings7:20 A khuamluzepnate pen a khuampi nihte tung le ngen tawh kibanga kibawl gei-a a om a bem a dawk tungah om hi. A kimkot ah gual nihin mang kawlsing gah za nih om a
1Kings7:21 Amah in biakinn inn liimah khuampite a phut hi. Leitaw lamah a khuam khat phutin a min Jakhin phuak a
1Kings7:22 A khuampite dawnah unok pak a kibawl om hi. Tua bangin khuampite a bawl a man khin hi.
1Kings7:23 Tua ciangin amah in a kisung tuikuangpi a bawl hi. Tua tuikuang a bem hi a
1Kings7:24 A geivial nuai pi sawm li le nga sung
1Kings7:25 Bawngtal sawm le nihte tungah tua tuikuangpi kinga a
1Kings7:26 A tuikuang sahna khut peek mai cia ahi hi. A geivial pen unok pak tawh a kibang hai geivial bangin kibawl hi. Tua sungah tui tambong tul li bang ta thei hi.
1Kings7:27 Amah in sumngo kibawl tuikuang a kingakna sawm zong a bawl hi. Tua a bawlte pi guk sau
1Kings7:28 Tua a kingaknate hih bangin kibawl hi: Tuate in a khawkte nei-in
1Kings7:29 tua ciangin a kungah a kibulh a khawkte tungah humpi-nelkaite
1Kings7:30 Tua tham loin tua ngaknate in sumngo tawh a kibawl leengpeite le leengpei zawlte nei ciat a
1Kings7:31 A gong pen a kingakna pan pi khat le alang sang to hi. A gong pen kingakna a kibawl bangin bem a
1Kings7:32 A leengpei lite pen a khawkteʼ nuai ah om hi. Leengpei zawlte a kingakna tawh sakhat mah hi a
1Kings7:33 A peite pen sakol leengpei bangin kibawl hi; a pei zawl
1Kings7:34 A kingaknateʼ kiu ciatah a nanna li om ciat a
1Kings7:35 Tua ciangin a ngakna dawnah letmat kua a sang vial bem khat om hi. A ngakna dawnah a kipsaknate le a khawkte pen a ngakna tawh sakhat ahi hi.
1Kings7:36 Tua ciangin a kipsaknate le a khawkte tungah a mun awng zah ciat tawh kizui-in amah in kherub-te
1Kings7:37 Tu-a bangin amah in a kingakna sawm bawl hi. A vekpi-in a kibangin kisungin
1Kings7:38 Tua ciangin amah in sumngo tuikuang sawm bawl hi. Tuikuang khat ah tui tambong sawm giat bang ta-in
1Kings7:39 Tua ciangin amah in tua a kingaknate
1Kings7:40 Huram in beelte
1Kings7:41 Khuampi nihte
1Kings7:42 khuampite tungah a om khuam luzepna nihte a tuam dingin ngen tawh a kibanga kibawl khat adingin mang kawlsing gah gual nih ahi
1Kings7:43 a kingakna sawmte le a kingaknate tungah a om tuikuang sawmte;
1Kings7:44 tuikuangpi khat le tuikuangpi nuai ah a om bawngtal sawm le nihte ahi hi.
1Kings7:45 Tu-in beelte
1Kings7:46 Jordan zanglei
1Kings7:47 Tam lua ahih manin Solomon in hih nate khempeuh tawi teh zo lo hi; sumngo gik zah kithei lo hi.
1Kings7:48 Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ biakinn sunga om nazat khempeuh Solomon in bawl hi. Kham biakna tau
1Kings7:49 biakinn sung nung mai
1Kings7:50 paknamtui adingin haite
1Kings7:51 Tua ahih ciangin Kumpi Solomon in Topaʼ biakinn a hih nasep khempeuh kizo hi. Tua ciangin Solomon in a pa Davidʼ ap sa nate
1Kings8:1 Tua ciangin Solomon in Zion a kici David khuapi panin Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang la-in Biakinn sungah a paipih dingin Jerusalem khua sung ama kiangah Israel upate le minam lutang
1Kings8:2 Tua ciangin Israel mite khempeuh a kha sagihna Ethanim kha sunga pawi hunin Kumpi Solomon kiangah kikhawm uh hi.
1Kings8:3 Israel upate khempeuh hong pai uh a
1Kings8:4 Tua ciangin amaute in kikhopna buk le puanbuk sunga om a siangtho nazatte khempeuh a paipih uh hi. Siampite le Levi mite in tuate paipih to uh hi.
1Kings8:5 Thuciamna Singkuang mai ah a kikhawm Kumpi Solomon le Israel mihonte khempeuh in biakna-in tuu le bawngtalte tampi tak pia uh ahih manin tuate a phazah kisim zo lo hi.
1Kings8:6 Tua ciangin siampite in a kherub-teʼ kha nuai
1Kings8:7 Kherub-te in Thuciamna Singkuang omna mun tungah a kha uh zak ahih manin Thuciamna Singkuang le a zawlte tungah kherub-te in khuhna piangsak uh hi.
1Kings8:8 A zawlte sau mahmah ahih manin biakinn sung nung mai siangtho mun panin a zawl mongte kimu a
1Kings8:9 Tua Thuciamna Singkuang sungah
1Kings8:10 Siangtho mun panin siampite a paikhiat ciangin meii in Topaʼ biakinn tuam a
1Kings8:11 meii hangin siampite nasem dingin om thei lo uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ minthanna vang in Topaʼ biakinn a tuam hi.
1Kings8:12 Tua ciangin Solomon in
1Kings8:13 Keimah in nangma adingin a kipahtawi mun khat
1Kings8:14 Tua ciangin Israel a kikhawmte a din laitakin kumpipa in en kawikawi-in Israel a kikhawmte khempeuh thupha a pia hi.
1Kings8:15 Tua ciangin amah in
1Kings8:16 
1Kings8:17 Israel Pasian
1Kings8:18 Ahih hangin Topa in ka pa David kiangah
1Kings8:19 Ahi zongin nangmah in a biakinn na lam kei dinga
1Kings8:20 Tu-in ama bawl sa thuciamna Topa in tungsak khin hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka pa Davidʼ munah keimah khangin
1Kings8:21 Amah in Egypt leitang panin amaute a paikhiatpih lai-in amah in i pu i pate tawh a bawl Topaʼ thuciamna a omna Thuciamna Singkuang adingin tua lai ah mun khat ka bawlsak hi
1Kings8:22 Tua ciangin Israel a kikhawmte khempeuh a omna Topaʼ mai ah Solomon dinga
1Kings8:23 Amah in
1Kings8:24 Na nasem ka pa David tungah na gen sa thu na kipsak hi. Nangmah in na kam tawh na gen a
1Kings8:25 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Israel Pasian
1Kings8:26 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Israel Pasian aw
1Kings8:27 “Ahih hangin leitungah Pasian teeng taktak ding ahi hiam? Vantung le vantung a sang pen in nang hong huam zo lo hi. Tua ahih manin keima lam sa hih biakinn in bangzahin nang hong huam zo lo zaw kan ding ahi hiam?
1Kings8:28 Ahi zongin na nasem paʼ thungetna le a hong thumna hong don inla
1Kings8:29 ‘Tua lai ah ka min om ding hi
1Kings8:30 Amaute in hih mun lamah hong nget uh ciangin na mi Israel-teʼ hong thumna zong ngai in. Na teenna mun vantung panin hong za inla
1Kings8:31 “Mi khat a veengpa tungah khialin
1Kings8:32 nangmah in vantung panin za-in gamta inla
1Kings8:33 “Nangma tungah hong khialhna hangin galte mai ah na mi Israel-te a guallelh ciangin
1Kings8:34 vantung panin za-in na mi Israel-teʼ khialhna maisak inla
1Kings8:35 “Nangma tungah hong khialhna hangin vantung kikhakcipin guah a zuk loh ciangin
1Kings8:36 vantung panin za-in na mi Israel
1Kings8:37 “Gam sungah kialpi tungin
1Kings8:38 mi khatpeuh ahi a
1Kings8:39 na teenna vantung panin za-in maisak in. Tua ciangin amauʼ gamtatna khempeuh tawh kizui-in a lungsim uh na theih bangin amaute tungah pia ciat in (bang hang hiam cih leh nang
1Kings8:40 Tua hileh ka pu ka pate uh tungah na piak leitang tungah a nuntak hunsung khempeuh uh amaute in nang hong zahtak ding uh hi.
1Kings8:41 “Tua mah bangin na mi Israel ahi lo gamdang mi khat nangma min hangin a gamlapi panin hong pai-in
1Kings8:42 (bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a lian nangma minthanna le nangma mite adingin na sepsak na lianteʼ thu za ding uh hi)
1Kings8:43 na teenna vantung panin za inla
1Kings8:44 “A galte uh a do dingin na mite kuan khia-in
1Kings8:45 amauʼ hong thungetna le hong thumna vantung panin za-in amauʼ vai huh in.
1Kings8:46 “Amaute nang tungah hong khialin - bang hang hiam cih leh mi a khial lo kuamah om lo hi - amaute tungah nang heh a
1Kings8:47 ahi zongin amaute a kipuak khiatna leitang ah amaute in a lungsim uh ah thu ngaihsunin kisikkik a
1Kings8:48 amaute manin a pua khia a galte uh leitang ah a ngaihsutna khempeuh uh le a lungsim khempeuh uh tawh amaute kisikkikin
1Kings8:49 vantung na teenna mun panin amauʼ hong thungetna le hong thumna za-in
1Kings8:50 Nang tungah hong khial na mite le nang tunga hong gamtatna uh amauʼ thupalsatnate khempeuh maisakin
1Kings8:51 (Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen Egypt panin na paikhiatpih
1Kings8:52 Na nasem paʼ hong thumna le na mi Israel-teʼ hong thumna ah maipha tawh hong en tawntung inla
1Kings8:53 Egypt panin ka pate uh na paikhiatpih lai-in na nasem pa Moses tungtawnin na gen bangin nangma luah ahi dingin leitung mi khempeuh lak panin amaute na teng khia hi
1Kings8:54 Tu-in Solomon in hih thungetna le thumnate khempeuh Topaʼ tungah a bawl khit ciangin
1Kings8:55 Tua ciangin amah dingin awging pha tawh Israel a kikhawmte khempeuh thupha pia-in
1Kings8:56 “Ama hong ciam sa khempeuh tawh kizui-in ama mi Israel-te tungah tawlngakna a pia Topa in thupha ngah tahen! A nasem pa Moses tungtawnin a gen sa ama thuciam hoihte khempeuh kam khat zong maimawk lo hi.
1Kings8:57 I pu i pate a ompih mah bangin Topa i Pasian in eite hong ompih henla
1Kings8:58 Amah in i pu i pate a thupiak sa ahi ama lampi khempeuh a zui ding le ama thupiaknate
1Kings8:59 Topaʼ mai ah ka thumna kammalte sun le zanin Topa i Pasian in hong za henla
1Kings8:60 Tua hileh mi khempeuh in Topa pen Pasian hi
1Kings8:61 Tua ahih ciangin Topa i Pasianʼ tungah na lungsim khempeuh uh tawh thuman unla
1Kings8:62 Tua ciangin kumpipa le amah tawh a om Israel mi khempeuh in Topaʼ mai ah biakna a pia uh hi.
1Kings8:63 Solomon in thunuam a biakna-in Topaʼ tungah bawngtal tul sawm nih le tul nih le tuu tul za khat le tul sawm nih a pia hi. Tua bangin kumpipa le Israel mi khempeuh in Topaʼ biakinn a ap uh hi.
1Kings8:64 Tua ni mahin kumpipa in Topaʼ biakinn mai-a om inntual laizang ap hi; bang hang hiam cih leh meihal biakna le an tawh biakna le thunuam a biakna a thaute a ta zo dingin Topaʼ mai-a sumngo biakna tau neu lua ahih manin tua lai ah meihal biakna le an tawh biakna le thunuam a biakna thaute a pia hi.
1Kings8:65 Tua hi a
1Kings8:66 A ni giat ni-in amah in mite ciahsak hi. Amaute in kumpipa thupha pia uh a
1Kings9:1 Solomon in Topaʼ biakinn le kumpi inn le a lam nop khempeuh a lam a man khit ciangin
1Kings9:2 Gibeon-a ama tungah a kilah sa bangin Solomon tungah Topa a nih veina kilang hi.
1Kings9:3 Topa in ama kiangah
1Kings9:4 Nang na hih leh
1Kings9:5 na pa David tungah
1Kings9:6 Ahih hangin nang na hi a
1Kings9:7 amaute ka piak sa leitang panin Israel mite ka la khia ding hi. Tua ciangin ka min dingin ka ap sa biakinn pen ka muhna panin ka lawn khia dinga
1Kings9:8 Tua ciangin hih biakinn pen ninbu lomtang suak dinga
1Kings9:9 Tua ciangin amaute in
1Kings9:10 Solomon in inn nihte
1Kings9:11 Taia kumpi Hiram in Solomonʼ deih zahzah taamtak sing le taaksan sing le kham a piak khit ciangin
1Kings9:12 Ahih hangin Solomon in amah a piak sa khuapite a en dingin Taia panin Hiram hong pai ciangin
1Kings9:13 Tua ahih ciangin amah in
1Kings9:14 Hiram in kumpipa kiangah a piak kham talen za khat le talen sawm nih a pha hi.
1Kings9:15 Topaʼ biakinn
1Kings9:16 (Egypt kumpi Faro pai to a
1Kings9:17 Tua ahih manin Solomon in Gezer khua lamkik hi). Tua banah Beth-horon nuainung
1Kings9:18 le Baalath le Judah gam sung gamlak ah Tamar
1Kings9:19 le Solomon in a neih vankoihna khuapi khempeuh le a leengte-aʼ ding khuapite le a sakol tung tuangte ading khuapite le Jerusalem sung
1Kings9:20 Israel mi ahi lo Amor mite
1Kings9:21 Israel mite in a suksiat khit siang zawh loh
1Kings9:22 Ahih hangin Solomon in Israel mite salin bawl lo hi. Amaute pen galkapte
1Kings9:23 Solomonʼ inn lam nasep a uk ulianpite mi za nga le sawm nga ahi hi.
1Kings9:24 Faro tanu adingin Solomon in a lamsak ama inn ah a om dingin David khuapi panin amah a paikhiat khit ciangin Solomon in Millo a lam hi.
1Kings9:25 Solomon in Topa adingin a lam biakna tau tungah meihal biakna le thunuam a biakna kum khatin thum vei pia-in Topaʼ mai ah paknamtui a hal hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a biakinn a zo hi.
1Kings9:26 Kumpi Solomon in Edom gam sung San Tuipi gei dunga om Eloth nai-a Ezion-geber ah teembaw hon khat a bawl hi.
1Kings9:27 Tua ciangin Hiram in tua teembaw honte tawh tuipi tung nasep a thei tuipi mi a nasemte
1Kings9:28 Tua ciangin amaute Ofir ah pai-in tua lai panin kham talen za li le sawm nih hong pua uh a
1Kings10:1 Tu-in Sheba kumpinu in Topaʼ min tawh kisai-in Solomonʼ minthanna a zak ciangin thudotna haksate tawh amah a ze-et dingin hong pai hi.
1Kings10:2 Amah nungzui honpi
1Kings10:3 Tua ciangin Solomon in ama dotna khempeuh dawng hi. Kumpipa in ama tungah a gen tel theih loh
1Kings10:4 Sheba kumpinu in Solomonʼ pilna
1Kings10:5 a sabuai ah a an
1Kings10:6 Tua ciangin amah in kumpipa kiangah
1Kings10:7 Kei hong pai-in keima mit in a muh mateng a kigente ka um kei hi. Ahi zongin alang zong kei tungah hong kigen lo na hi a
1Kings10:8 Na zite a hampha mahmah hi a
1Kings10:9 Nang tungah lungdamin Israel kumpi tokhom tungah nang a hong koih Topa na Pasian in thupha ngah tahen! Topa in Israel it tawntung ahih manin nangmah in thutang le thuman na sepkhiat theih nadingin amah in kumpi-in nang hong bawl hi
1Kings10:10 Tua ciangin amah in kumpipa tungah kham talen za le sawm nih le a namtui nate tampi tak le suang manphate a pia hi. Sheba kumpinu in Kumpi Solomon tungah a piak hih banga a tam a namtui nate hong pai ngei nawn lo hi.
1Kings10:11 Tua tham loin Ofir panin kham hong pua Hiramʼ teembaw honte in Ofir panin cingsing le suangmanpha tampi tak hong pua uh hi.
1Kings10:12 Tua ciangin kumpipa in cingsingte Topaʼ biakinn le kumpipaʼ innkhuamte
1Kings10:13 Tua ciangin Kumpi Solomon in citna tawh ama tungah a piak banah ama deih a nget khempeuh zong Sheba kumpinu tungah a pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah le a nasemte a gam uh ah a ciahkik uh hi.
1Kings10:14 Tu-in sum bawlte le sumbukte
1Kings10:15 
1Kings10:16 Kumpi Solomon in a kiseek kham tawh kibawl lum lianpi za nih bawl a
1Kings10:17 Tua ciangin amah in a kiseek kham tawh kibawl lum za thum bawl a
1Kings10:18 Kumpipa in saiha kumpi tokhom a lian khat zong bawl a
1Kings10:19 Kumpi tokhom in kahlei cial guk nei-in
1Kings10:20 kahlei cial gukteʼ mong ciatah khat ciat a om humpinelkai sawm le nih ding hi. Kumpi gam sung khat peuhpeuh ah tua tawh a kibang kibawl ngei lo hi.
1Kings10:21 Kumpi Solomonʼ tuidawnna haite khempeuh kham hi a
1Kings10:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa in Hiramʼ teembaw honte tawh Tarshish teembaw hon khat tuipi ah a pai nei hi. Tarshish teembaw honte kum thumin khatvei hong pai-in kham
1Kings10:23 Tua bangin Kumpi Solomon in hauhna le pilna tawh leitung kumpi khempeuh khumkhelh hi.
1Kings10:24 Tua ciangin Pasian in ama lungsim sunga a koih ama pilna a ngai dingin leitung mi buppi in Solomonʼ omna zong uh hi.
1Kings10:25 Amaute khempeuh in letsong
1Kings10:26 Tua ciangin Solomon in leengte le sakol tung tuangte khawm hi. Amah in leeng tul le za li le tuanna sakol tul sawm le tul nih nei a
1Kings10:27 Kumpipa in Jerusalem ah suang bangin ngun olsak a
1Kings10:28 Solomonʼ sakol lakte Egypt le Kue pan hi a
1Kings10:29 Egypt panin leeng khat ciangin ngun shekel za guk
1Kings11:1 Tu-in Kumpi Solomon in gamdang numei tampi ngai hi. Faroʼ tanu le Moab mi
1Kings11:2 Topa in Israel mite tungah
1Kings11:3 Amah in kumpiteʼ tanu vive zi za sagih le zineu za thum nei hi. A zite in ama lungsim hei khia uh hi.
1Kings11:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Solomon a teek ciangin a zite in pasian dangteʼ lamah ama lungsim hei khia uh a
1Kings11:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Sidon miteʼ nusian Ashtoreth le Ammon mite aʼ ahi a kihhuai Milkom
1Kings11:6 Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ muhna ah Solomon a sia gamta a
1Kings11:7 Tua ciangin Solomon in Jerusalem nisuahna lam mual tungah Moab mite aʼ ahi a kihhuai Khemosh le Ammon mite aʼ ahi a kihhuai Molek adingin mual tunga biakna khat a lam hi.
1Kings11:8 Tua mah bangin amah in paknamtui halin a pasian-te uh tungah biakna a pia a gamdang zite khempeuh adingin hihsak hi.
1Kings11:9 Ama tungah nih vei kilak khinin
1Kings11:10 
1Kings11:11 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Solomon kiangah
1Kings11:12 Ahi zongin na pa Davidʼ hangin nangma hun sungin ka hih kei dinga
1Kings11:13 Ahi zongin kumpi gam khempeuh ka bal khia kei ding hi. Ka nasem pa David hang le ka teel sa Jerusalem hangin na tapaʼ tungah minam khat ka pia lai ding hi
1Kings11:14 Tua ciangin Topa in Solomon a langpang ding Edom mi Hadad khangsak hi. Amah pen Edom kumpi innkuan sung mi khat ahi hi.
1Kings11:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh Edom ah David a om lai
1Kings11:16 (Bang hang hiam cih leh Joab in Edom sunga pasal khempeuh a suksiat khit matengin amah le Israel-te khempeuh tua lai ah kha guk sung om uh hi).
1Kings11:17 Ahih hangin Hadad naupang no ahih lai-in
1Kings11:18 Amaute Midian panin ding khia-in Paran tung uh a
1Kings11:19 Hadad in Faroʼ mai ah maipha lianpi mu a
1Kings11:20 Tua ciangin Tahpenes sanggamnu in amah tawh tapa Genubath nei a
1Kings11:21 Ahih hangin Hadad in David le galkap a ukpa Joab a sihna thu Egypt panin a zak ciangin Faroʼ kiangah
1Kings11:22 Ahih hangin Faro in ama kiangah
1Kings11:23 Tua ciangin Pasian in ama topa ahi Zobah kumpi Hadadezer kiang panin a tai Eliada tapa Rezon zong Solomon a langpang dingin a khangsak hi.
1Kings11:24 Amah in ama kiimah mi khawmin miteʼ na a sut pawl a makai a suak hi. Amaute Damaskas ah pai-in tua lai munah teeng uh a
1Kings11:25 Hadad mah bangin Solomonʼ hunsung khempeuh Israel-te a langpangin amah omin siatna a bawl hi. Amah in Israel mite mudah a
1Kings11:26 Solomonʼ nasem
1Kings11:27 Amah in kumpipa a lehdona thu hih bang ahi hi: Solomon in Millo lamin a pa Davidʼ khuapi a vangte a hu hi.
1Kings11:28 Jeroboam pen nasep siam mahmah khat hi a
1Kings11:29 Tua hun sungin Jerusalem panin Jeroboam a paikhiat ciangin Shiloh khuami kamsang Ahijah in lampi ah amah na dawn hi. Ahijah in puan thak khat na silh tawm a
1Kings11:30 Tua ciangin Ahijah in ama tungah a silh a puan thak lenin seh sawm le nih suahin a bal kek hi.
1Kings11:31 Tua ciangin amah in Jeroboam kiangah
1Kings11:32 (Ahih hangin ka nasem David le Israel minam khempeuh sung panin ka teel sa khuapi Jerusalem hangin amah in minam khat nei ding hi).
1Kings11:33 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in kei hong nusia a
1Kings11:34 Ahi zongin ama khut sung panin kumpi gambup ka la khia kei ding hi. Ka thupiaknate le ka thukhamte a zui
1Kings11:35 Ahih hangin ama tapaʼ khut sung panin kumpi gam la-in nangma tungah minam sawm kong pia ding hi.
1Kings11:36 Ahi zongin ka min koih nadingin ka teel sa khuapi Jerusalem ah ka nasem pa David in keima mai ah suanlekhak a neih tawntung theih nadingin a tapa tungah minam khat ka pia ding hi.
1Kings11:37 Tua ciangin keimah in nang hong la-in na deih khempeuh tungah na uk dinga
1Kings11:38 Ka nasem pa David bangin ka thukhamte zuihna tawh nang kong thupiak khempeuh ngai-in
1Kings11:39 Hih thu hangin Davidʼ suanlekhakte ka gimsak dinga
1Kings11:40 Tua ahih ciangin Solomon in Jeroboam thah dingin zong hi. Ahih hangin Jeroboam dingin Egypt kumpipa Shishak kiangah tai a
1Kings11:41 Tu-in Solomonʼ sep a omlaite le a hih khempeuh le a pilna
1Kings11:42 Jerusalem panin Israel-te khempeuh tungah Solomon in a uk hun kum sawm li sung ahi hi.
1Kings11:43 Tua ciangin Solomon si a
1Kings12:1 Shekhem ah Rehoboam pai hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah kumpi a suaksak Israel mi khempeuh Shekhem ah hong pai uh hi.
1Kings12:2 Nebatʼ tapa Jeroboam in tua thu a zak ciangin (bang hang hiam cih leh kumpi Solomon kiang panin a taina Egypt ah amah om lai hi)
1Kings12:3 Tua ciangin amaute in mi sawlin amah sam uh hi. Tua ciangin Jeroboam le a kikhawm khempeuhte hong pai-in Rehoboam kiangah
1Kings12:4 “Na pa in kote hong gimbawlin van gikpi hong suan hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na paʼ nasep haksate le kote tungah a gik lua thuhaksate zangsak in. Tua hileh kote in nangma na kong sem ding uh hi
1Kings12:5 Amah in amaute kiangah

1Kings12:8 Ahih hangin khanghamte in ama tungah ngaihsutna a piakte nusia-in
1Kings12:9 Amah in amaute kiangah
1Kings12:10 Tua ciangin amah tawh a khangkhawm khangnote in ama kiangah
1Kings12:11 Tu-in ka pa in note tungah van gik hong suat banah kong behlap lai ding hi. Ka pa in ciang tawh note hong thuhilh hi. Ahih hangin keimah in ciang lingnei tawh note kong thuhilh ding hi

1Kings12:15 Tua bangin kumpipa in miteʼ deihna zui lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Shiloh khuami Ahijahʼ tungtawnin Nebatʼ tapa Jeroboamʼ tungah a gen sa thu a tunsak nadingin Topa in a piansak thu kiheina ahi hi.

1Kings12:17 Ahih hangin Rehoboam in Judah khuapite sungah a teeng Israel mite a uk hi.
1Kings12:18 Tua ciangin Kumpi Rehoboam in aana tawh nasemte a uk Adoram
1Kings12:19 Tua ahih ciangin tu ni dongin leilu lam Israel-te in Davidʼ suanteʼ ukna lehdo uh hi.
1Kings12:20 Jeroboam hong ciahkik khitna thu Israel-te khempeuh in a zak uh ciangin amaute in mi sawlin kikhopna ah amah samsak uh a
1Kings12:21 Jerusalem ah Rehoboam a tun ciangin

1Kings12:26 Tua ciangin Jeroboam in a lungsim sungah
1Kings12:27 Jerusalem-a Topaʼ biakinn ah biakna pia dingin hih mite pai to leh

1Kings13:1 Tua laitakin Topaʼ sawlna tawh Judah panin Pasianʼ mi khat Bethel ah hong pai hi. Paknamtui hal dingin biakna tau gei ah Jeroboam na ding hi.
1Kings13:2 Tua ciangin Topaʼ sawlna bangin biakna tau langpangin mipa kiko a
1Kings13:3 Tua ciangin tua ni mahin amah in lim khat pia a
1Kings13:4 Bethel a biakna tau langpangin Pasianʼ mipaʼ thugenna kumpipa in a zak ciangin biakna tau panin Jeroboam in a khut zan a
1Kings13:5 Topaʼ sawlna bangin Pasianʼ mipa in lim khat a piakna tawh kizui-in biakna tau zong kiphelkhamin biakna tau panin a vutte kithehthang hi.
1Kings13:6 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Pasianʼ mipa kiangah
1Kings13:7 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Pasianʼ mipa kiangah
1Kings13:8 Tua ciangin Pasianʼ mipa in kumpipa kiangah
1Kings13:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kei tungah thu hong pia khinzo a
1Kings13:10 Tua ahih ciangin amah lampi dangah pai a
1Kings13:11 Tua hun laitakin kamsang khangham khat Bethel ah a teeng hi. Ama tapate hong pai-in tua ni-in Pasianʼ mipa in Bethel ah a hih thu teng ama kiangah a gen uh hi. Kumpipa kiangah a gen thute zong
1Kings13:12 Tua ciangin a pa un amaute kiangah
1Kings13:13 Amah in a tapate kiangah
1Kings13:14 Tua ciangin Pasianʼ mipa nungah amah pai a
1Kings13:15 Tua ciangin amah in
1Kings13:16 Amah in
1Kings13:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kei tungah
1Kings13:18 Tua ciangin amah in
1Kings13:19 Tua ahih ciangin amah zui-in hong ciahkik a
1Kings13:20 Amaute sabuai ah a tut laitakun amah a ciah pihkik kamsang teekpa tungah Topaʼ thu hong tung hi.
1Kings13:21 Judah panin hong pai Pasianʼ mipa tungah amah kiko a
1Kings13:22 nang hong paikikin
1Kings13:23 Tua ciangin amah in an ne-in tui a dawn khit ciangin
1Kings13:24 Amah a paikhiat ciangin humpinelkai khat in lampi ah na dawntuahin amah that hi. Ama luanghawm lampi ah kipaai a
1Kings13:25 Tua laitakin mite in va nawk kha uh a
1Kings13:26 Lampi panin amah a ciah pihkik kamsang pa in tua thu a zak ciangin amah in
1Kings13:27 Tua ciangin amah in a tapate kiangah
1Kings13:28 Tua ciangin amah pai a
1Kings13:29 Tua ciangin kamsang pa in Pasianʼ mipaʼ luanghawm la-in la tungah koih a
1Kings13:30 Tua ciangin amah in ama hanah a luanghawm a vui hi. Tua ciangin ama hangin amaute kap uh a
1Kings13:31 Amah a vui khit ciangin a tapate kiangah
1Kings13:32 Bang hang hiam cih leh Bethel a biakna tau le Samaria khuapite sunga om mual tunga biaknate khempeuh langpangin Topaʼ sawlna bangin a thugenna hong tung taktak ding hi
1Kings13:33 Hih thu khit ciangin zong ama gamtat sia panin Jeroboam kihei tuan lo a
1Kings13:34 Hih pen lei maitang panin khen khia-in a susia zah dongin Jeroboamʼ innkuan tungah khialhna lianpi a suak hi.
1Kings14:1 Tua hun laitakin Jeroboamʼ tapa Abijah a ci na hi.
1Kings14:2 Jeroboam in a zi kiangah
1Kings14:3 Anlum sawm
1Kings14:4 Jeroboamʼ zi tua bangmahin gamta hi. Amah kithawi-in Shiloh ah pai a
1Kings14:5 Tua ciangin Topa in Ahijah kiangah
1Kings14:6 Ahih hangin Ahijah in amah kongkhak hong tun a kheging a zak ciangin
1Kings14:7 Pai inla Jeroboam kiangah hih bangin gen in
1Kings14:8 Davidʼ suanteʼ tung panin kumpi gam bal khia-in nangma tungah kong pia hi. Ahi zongin nang pen ka thupiaknate zui-in
1Kings14:9 nangmah in na mai-a om mite khempeuh sangin siatna bawl zaw-in
1Kings14:10 Tua ahih ciangin en in
1Kings14:11 Tua ahih ciangin Jeroboamʼ mi
1Kings14:12 “Tua ahih ciangin ding inla na inn ah ciah in. Na khua na tun ciangin na tapa si ding hi.
1Kings14:13 Tua ciangin Israel mi khempeuh ama hangin kapin vui ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel Pasian
1Kings14:14 Tua tham loin tu ni-in Jeroboam innkuan a beisak ding
1Kings14:15 tui sunga pumpeeng a kilin mah bangin Topa in Israel mite vatin amau pute pate tungah a piak hih gam hoih panin Israel zunglot dinga
1Kings14:16 Tua ciangin ama khialhna le Israel-te a khialhsakna ahi Jeroboamʼ khialhna hangin amah in Israel nusia ding hi
1Kings14:17 Tua ciangin Jeroboamʼ zi dingin kihem khia a
1Kings14:18 Tua ciangin a nasem kamsang Ahijah tungtawnin Topaʼ thugenna tawh kizui-in Israel mi khempeuh in amah vui-in ama hangin a kap uh hi.
1Kings14:19 Tu-in Jeroboamʼ gamtatna a omlaite
1Kings14:20 Jeroboamʼ uk hunsung kum sawm nih le nih ahi hi. Tua ciangin amah si a
1Kings14:21 Tu-in Solomonʼ tapa Rehoboam in Judah ah uk hi. Gam uk dingin a kipatin Rehoboam kum sawm li le khat pha a
1Kings14:22 Tua ciangin Judah mite
1Kings14:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in amau adingin mual tunga biaknate
1Kings14:24 biakna phualte ah numei pasal paktat pawlte zong om uh hi. Topa in Israel miteʼ mai ah a hawlkhiat minam dangteʼ gamtatna a kihhuai khempeuh bangin amaute gamta uh hi.
1Kings14:25 Kumpi Rehoboamʼ kum ngana kumin Jerusalem a sim dingin Egypt kumpi Shishak hong kuan to hi.
1Kings14:26 Amah in Topaʼ biakinn-a van manphate le kumpipaʼ inn-a van manphate la khia hi. Amah in na khempeuh la khia hi. Amah in Solomonʼ bawl sa kham lumte khempeuh zong la hi.
1Kings14:27 Tua ciangin Kumpi Rehoboam in tuateʼ tangin sumngo lumte bawl a
1Kings14:28 Topaʼ biakinn ah kumpipa a pai simin inn cingte in tuate pua-in
1Kings14:29 Tu-in Rehoboamʼ gamtatna a omlaite le a sep khempeuh
1Kings14:30 Tua ciangin Rehoboam le Jeroboamʼ kikalah gal kidona om tawntung hi.
1Kings14:31 Tua ciangin Rehoboam si a
1Kings15:1 Tu-in Nebatʼ tapa Kumpi Jeroboamʼ kum sawm le kum giatna kumin Abijam in Judah tungah uk ding kipan hi.
1Kings15:2 Amah in Jerusalem ah kum thum sung uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Maakah hi a
1Kings15:3 Ama mai-a a paʼ khialhna khempeuh amah in zui hi. A pusawn David a thuman bangin Topa a Pasianʼ tungah a lungsim thuman bup lo hi.
1Kings15:4 Ahi zongin Davidʼ hangin Topa a Pasian in Jerusalem ah amah tapa khat pia a
1Kings15:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Hit mi Uriah thu ah cih sim loh ama nuntak sung tawntung Topaʼ mitah David a manin gamta-in a thupiakte khat peuhpeuh panin amah pial lo hi.
1Kings15:6 Tu-in Abijamʼ nuntak sung tawntung amah le Jeroboamʼ kikalah kidona om hi.
1Kings15:7 Abijamʼ gamtatna a omlaite le a sep khempeuh
1Kings15:8 Tua ciangin Abijam si a
1Kings15:9 Israel kumpi Jeroboamʼ kum sawm nihna kumin Asa in Judah tungah uk ding kipan a
1Kings15:10 amah in Jerusalem ah kum sawm li le khat sung uk hi. Ama piʼ min Maakah hi a
1Kings15:11 Ama pupi David a gamtat bangin Topaʼ muhna ah Asa a manin gamta hi.
1Kings15:12 Amah in gam sung panin pasal paktat pawlte koih khia-in a pateʼ bawl sa milim khempeuh khiin khia hi.
1Kings15:13 Amah in Asherah milim dingin a kibawl a kihhuai milim khat nei ahih manin kumpinuʼ nu hihna panin a pi Maakah zong khiin khia hi. Tua hi a
1Kings15:14 Ahih hangin mual tunga biaknate kila khia lo hi. Ahi zongin ama hunsung khempeuh Asaʼ lungsim Topaʼ tungah thuman bup hi.
1Kings15:15 Tua ciangin amah in a paʼ ap sa letsongte le ama ap sa letsongte
1Kings15:16 Amauʼ hunsung tawntung Asa le Israel kumpi Baasha kikalah gal kidona om hi.
1Kings15:17 Judah a sim dingin Israel kumpi Baasha kuan to a
1Kings15:18 Tua ciangin Asa in Topaʼ biakinn sung vankoihna le kumpipa inn vankoihna sungah a om lai ngun le kham khempeuh la-in ama nasemteʼ khut sungah tuate a pia hi. Tua ciangin kumpi Asa in Damaskas ah a teeng
1Kings15:19 “Ka pa le na pa mah bangin kei le nang kikalah kipawlna khat omsak ni. Ngun le kham letsong nangma tungah kong puak hi. Keima kiang panin amah a nungkik theih nadingin Israel kumpi Baasha tawh na kipawlna va su tat in
1Kings15:20 Tua ciangin Benhadad in Kumpi Asaʼ thu mang a
1Kings15:21 Baasha in tua thu a zak ciangin Ramah a lam khawlin Tirzah ah om hi.
1Kings15:22 Tua ciangin kumpi Asa in Judah gam khempeuh ah thu genzakna khat bawl a
1Kings15:23 Tu-in Asaʼ gamtatna a omlaite khempeuh
1Kings15:24 Tua ciangin Asa si a
1Kings15:25 Judah kumpi Asaʼ kum nihna kumin Jeroboamʼ tapa Nadab in Israel tungah uk ding kipan a
1Kings15:26 Topaʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta a
1Kings15:27 Issakhar minam Ahijahʼ tapa Baasha in Nadab sawm sim hi. Baasha in Filistia-teʼ khua Gibbethon ah amah sat tuk hi. Nadab le Israel khempeuh in Gibbethon umcihin a om laitakun a thah ahi hi.
1Kings15:28 Tua ahih ciangin Judah kumpi Asaʼ kum thumna kumin Baasha in Nadab that a
1Kings15:29 Amah kumpi ahih phetin Jeroboamʼ innkuan khempeuh that hi. Topa in Shiloh khuami a nasem pa Ahijah tungtawnin a gen sa bangin a vekpi-in a suksiat khit dongin mi khat zong Jeroboamʼ innkuan ah nusia lo hi.
1Kings15:30 Tua pen ama khialhna le Israel a khialhsakna ahi Jeroboamʼ khialhnate hang le Israel Pasian
1Kings15:31 Tu-in Nadabʼ gamtatna a omlaite le a sep khempeuh
1Kings15:32 Amauʼ hunsung khempeuh Asa le Israel kumpi Baasha kikalah gal kidona a om hi.

1Kings20:1 Syria kumpipa Benhadad in ama galkap khempeuh khawm hi. Amah a huh ding kumpi sawm thum le nih le sakolte le leengte om hi. Amah pai to-in Samaria umcihin sim gawp hi.

1Kings20:3 ‘Na ngun le na kham keima aʼ hi a

2Kings11:3 Athaliah in Israel gam sungah a uk sungteng a cingnu tawh amah kum guk sung omin Topaʼ biakinn sungah a bu hi.
2Kings11:4 Ahih hangin a kum sagihna kumin siampi Jehoiada in mi sawlin Kar mite le kumpi inncing a ukte kiangah paisak a
2Kings11:5 Tua ciangin amah in amaute thu pia a
2Kings11:6 (a dang seh thum ah seh khatte Sur kulh kongpi ah omin a dang seh thum ah seh khatte a cingteʼ nung kulh kongpi ah om hi) kumpi inn na cing ding uh hi.
2Kings11:7 Tua ciangin Sabbath ni-in na semin Topaʼ biakinn a cing no a khen nihte in
2Kings11:8 na khut sung uh ah na hiam ciat uh tawh kumpi Joash na cing ding uh hi. Note kiang nai ah a hong pai peuhpeuh kithat ding hi. Kumpipa a paikhiat ciang le a sung tum ciangin amah na cing ding uh hi
2Kings11:9 A ukte in siampi Jehoiadaʼ thupiak khempeuh bangin hih uh a
2Kings11:10 Tua ciangin siampipa in a ukte tungah Topaʼ biakinn sungah a om David-aʼ ahi teipite le lumte a pia hi.

2Kings11:12 Tua ciangin amah in kumpipaʼ tapa paikhiat pihin

2Kings11:14 Amah a khuadak ciangin a ngeina ding bangin biakna song gei ah kumpi thak pa dingin

2Kings11:16 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in tua nu man uh a

2Kings11:18 Tua ciangin tua gam mi khempeuh Baal biakinn ah pai-in a biakinn a phelkek uh hi. A biakna taute le a milimte amaute in sukham uh a
2Kings11:19 Tua ciangin amah in a ukte
2Kings11:20 Tua ahih ciangin tua gam mi khempeuh a lungdam uh hi. Kumpipaʼ inn ah namsau tawh Athaliah a kithah khit ciangin khuapi sung a gamdai hi.
2Kings11:21 Joash in uk ding a kipat ciangin ama khan kum sagih pha pan hi.
2Kings12:1 Jehuʼ kum sagihna kumin Joash in uk ding kipan a
2Kings12:2 Siampi Jehoiada in amah thuhilh ahih manin Joash in ama uk hunsung tawntung Topaʼ muhna ah a man gamta hi.
2Kings12:3 Ahi zongin mual tunga biaknate kila khia lo hi. Mite in tuate tungah biakna pia-in paknamtui hal lai uh hi.
2Kings12:4 Joash in siampite kiangah
2Kings12:5 nomauʼ nasepna mite ciat panin no siampite in khawm un. Tua ciangin biakinn puahphat nading a kisapna a kimuhna khempeuh puahsak un
2Kings12:6 Ahih hangin Kumpi Joashʼ uk kum sawm nih le thumna kum dongin siampite in biakinn puah kipan nai lo uh hi.
2Kings12:7 Tua ahih ciangin Kumpi Joash in siampi Jehoiada le siampi dangte samin amaute kiangah
2Kings12:8 Tua ahih ciangin mite tung pan sum kaihkhop tavuan la nawn loin
2Kings12:9 Tua ciangin siampi Jehoiada in singkuang khat la-in a siin vut vang a
2Kings12:10 Singkuang sungah sum tam om hi
2Kings12:11 Tua ciangin amaute in Topaʼ biakinn a en nasemteʼ khut sungah a tawi tehkhiat uh sumte pia uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in Topaʼ biakinn a sem khutsiamte le innlamte tung
2Kings12:12 le leilesuang inn lam siamte le suangseekte tungah Topaʼ biakinn puah nadingin sing lei nading le suang tawh nading le biakinn puahna khat peuhpeuh a zat dingin pia khia uh hi.
2Kings12:13 Ahih hangin Topaʼ biakinn adingin ngun kuangte
2Kings12:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ biakinn a puah nasemte tungah tua sumte kipia hi.
2Kings12:15 Amaute in thuman takin na sem uh ahih manin nasemte tungah piak dingin a khut sung uh ah sum a apnate uh tung panin amaute in sazian ngen lo uh hi.
2Kings12:16 Mawhna hanga piak sum le khialhna hanga piak sumte Topaʼ biakinn sungah kipaipih lo hi; tuate pen siampite-aʼ ahi hi.
2Kings12:17 Tua hun laitakin Syria kumpipa Hazael kuan to-in Gath simin a la hi. Ahih hangin Hazael in Jerusalem simin a pai to dingin a mai a ngat ciangin
2Kings12:18 Judah kumpi Joash in Judah kumpite ahi ama hun ma-a sem Jehoshafat

2Kings16:3 Israel kumpi dangteʼ khekhap mah zui hi. Topa in Israel miteʼ mai ah a hawlkhiat minamteʼ zat a kihhuai a gamtatte mah uh bangin biakna-in ama tapa nangawn a hal hi.
2Kings16:4 Amah in mual tunga biaknate tung le mual dawnte tung le singniim nuai khempeuh ah biakna pia-in paknamtui a hal hi.
2Kings16:5 Tua ciangin Syria kumpi Rezin le Israel kumpi

2Kings16:9 Tua ciangin Assiria kumpipa in ama thu ngai hi. Assiria kumpipa zong Damaskas a sim dingin hong kuan to-in tua khua la a

2Kings16:11 Tua ciangin siampi Urijah in biakna tau bawl hi. Damaskas panin Kumpi Ahaz hong tun ma-in Kumpi Ahaz in Damaskas panin a khakna tawh kizui-in siampi Urijah in na bawl hi.
2Kings16:12 Damaskas panin kumpipa hong tun ciangin kumpipa in tua biakna tau a en hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in biakna tau hong naihin pai to a

2Kings17:9 Tua ciangin Israel mite in Topa a Pasian uh langpangin a man lo na vaihawm uh hi. Amaute in amau adingin galvilna bukno a kipan kulh a nei khuapi dongin khuapi khempeuh ah mual tunga biakna bawl uh hi.

2Kings17:15 Amaute in ama thukhamte le a pu a pate uh tawh a bawl a thuciamna le amaute tungah a piak hilh kholhnate simmawh uh hi. Amaute in a mawkna milimte zui-in a mawkna suak uh a
2Kings17:16 Amaute in Topa a Pasian uh thupiakte khempeuh nusia-in amau adingin a kisung bawng no lim nih bawl uh hi. Amaute in Asherah milim khat bawl uh a

2Kings17:22 Israel mite in Jeroboamʼ khialhna khempeuh hih uh hi. Kamsangte ahi a nasemte khempeuh tungtawnin a gen sa bangin Topa in ama muhna panin Israel a hepkhiat zah dongin tuate panin amaute kihem khia lo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amauʼ gam panin Assiria ah tu ni dongin Israel-te salin a om uh hi.

2Kings21:1 Manasseh in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm le kum nih pha a

2Kings22:5 Tua ciangin Topaʼ biakinn nasemte tungah a sum piasak in. Topaʼ biakinn ah a om inn a puah nasemte tungah amaute tua sum piasak in.

2Kings23:1 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Judah le Jerusalem upate khempeuh samsak a
2Kings23:2 Tua ciangin Topaʼ biakinn ah kumpipa pai to a
2Kings23:3 Tua ciangin khuampi gei ah kumpipa dingin hih laibu sunga a kigelh thuciamna kammalte khempeuh a sep nading
2Kings23:4 Tua ciangin kumpipa in siampi lianpen pa Hilkiah le a nihna siampi le kongcingte in Topaʼ biakinn sung panin Baal le Asherah nusian milim adingin a kibawl nazatte khempeuh le vantung a om nate khempeuh biak nadingin a kibawlte hong paikhiatpih nading uh thu a pia hi. Amah in Jerusalem pualam Kidron leikang halna munah tuate halin a vute Bethel khua ah a pua hi.
2Kings23:5 Tua ciangin amah in Judah khuapite le Jerusalem kiim a om mual tunga biaknate tungah paknamtui hal dingin Judah kumpite in a kipsak sa milim biateʼ siampite a hawl khia hi. Baal tung
2Kings23:6 Tua ciangin amah in Topaʼ biakinn panin Jerusalem pualam
2Kings23:7 Tua ciangin amah in numeite in Asherah milim adingin a kizang puante a gatna mun Topaʼ biakinn sunga om a paktat pawlteʼ innte a phel khia hi.
2Kings23:8 Tua ciangin amah in Judah khuapite panin siampite khempeuh paikhiatpih a
2Kings23:9 Tua lai-a sem siampite ahihleh Jerusalem-a Topaʼ biakna tau ah hong pai to thei lo uh a
2Kings23:10 Tua ciangin kuamah in Molek pasian tungah a tanu ahi a
2Kings23:11 Tua ciangin amah in a kiimnai-a om
2Kings23:12 Tua ciangin Judah kumpite in a bawl sa

2Kings23:14 Tua ciangin amah in a biakna songte sat khamin

2Kings23:21 Tua ciangin kumpipa in mi khempeuh thu pia a

2Kings25:1 Tua ciangin Zedekiah in Babylon kumpipa lehdo hi. Tua ahih manin ama uk a kum kuana
2Kings25:2 Tua ahih ciangin Kumpi Zedekiahʼ kum sawm le kum khatna kum dong tua khuapi ki-umcih hi.
2Kings25:3 A kha lina a ni kua ni-in tua khuapi sungah kialpi nasia mahmah ahih manin tua gam mite ading an om lo hi.
2Kings25:4 Tua ciangin khuapi kulh su let uh hi. Khaldea mite khuapi kiimah a om pi mahin
2Kings25:5 Ahih hangin Khaldea miteʼ galkapte in kumpipa delh uh a
2Kings25:6 Tua ciangin amaute in kumpipa man uh a
2Kings25:7 Amaute in Zedekiahʼ muhna ah a tapate thatin
2Kings25:8 A kha ngana
2Kings25:9 Amah in Topaʼ biakinn a kipan kumpipaʼ inn le Jerusalem khua sunga om inn khempeuh hal a
2Kings25:10 Tua ciangin a cingte a ukpa tawh a om Khaldea mi galkapte khempeuh in Jerusalem kimkot a kulhpi susia uh hi.
2Kings25:11 Tua ciangin a cingte a ukpa Nebuzaradan in khuapi sungah a kinusia a om lai mite le Babylon kumpipa a taisan mite
2Kings25:12 Ahih hangin a cingte a ukpa in leenggui lote a en ding le lokho dingin tua gam mi a zawng pente pawl khat nusia lai hi.
2Kings25:13 Tua ciangin Topaʼ biakinn sungah a om sumngo khuampite
2Kings25:14 Tua ciangin amaute in beelte
2Kings25:15 vutluahna le haite la khia uh hi. A cingte a ukpa in kham ahite kham mahin la-in
2Kings25:16 Solomon in Topaʼ biakinn ading a
2Kings25:17 Khuampi khat a sanna pi sawm nih le sagih hi a
2Kings25:18 Tua ciangin a cingte a ukpa in siampi lianpa Seraiah
2Kings25:19 Tua ciangin khuapi panin galkapte a uk ngei ulian khat le khuapi sungah a om kumpipaʼ thukuppihte mi nga a la hi. Tua ciangin gam sung mite a khawm galkapte a ukpaʼ lai-at pa a la hi. Tua ciangin khuapi sungah a om tua gam sung mi sawm guk a la hi.
2Kings25:20 Tua ciangin a cingte a ukpa Nebuzaradan in amaute la-in Riblah a Babylon kumpipa kiangah amaute a paipih hi.
2Kings25:21 Tua ciangin Babylon kumpipa in amaute vat a
2Kings25:22 Tua ciangin Judah gam sungah a om lai
2Kings25:23 Tu-in gam sunga om galkap a ukte le a mite in Babylon kumpipa in a uk dingin Gedaliah a sehna thu a zak uh ciangin amaute a mite uh tawh Mizpah a Gedaliah kiangah hong pai uh hi. Tuate pen Nethaniahʼ tapa Ishmael
2Kings25:24 Tua ciangin amaute le a mite uh tungah Gedaliah kiciamin
2Kings25:25 Ahih hangin a kha sagihna sungin kumpi innkuan sung panin Elishamaʼ tapa Nethaniah
2Kings25:26 Tua ciangin a lian a neu-in mi khempeuh le galkap a ukte kithawi-in Egypt ah pai uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Khaldea mite kihta uh hi.
2Kings25:27 Judah kumpi Jehoiakhin thong sungah a om zawh kum sawm thum le kum sagihna kum
2Kings25:28 Amah in migitna kam tawh amah hopih a
2Kings25:29 Tua ahih ciangin Jehoiakhin in a thong puante suah khia hi. Tua ciangin a nuntak sung nisimin kumpipaʼ sabuai ah a manmanin an a ne hi.
2Kings25:30 Tua ciangin ama ngah thuap dingin

1Chronicles17:9 Amauʼ inn ciatah a ten theih nading le a kinawngkaisak nawn loh nadingin ka mi Israel-te adingin mun khat sehin amaute ka phut ding hi. 1Chronicles27:16 Israel minamte tungah a ukpite: Reuben mite adingin Zikriʼ tapa Eliezer ahi hi. Simeon mite adingin Maakahʼ tapa Shefatiah ahi hi.
1Chronicles27:17 Levi mite adingin Kemuelʼ tapa Hashabiah ahi hi. Aaron mite adingin Zadok ahi hi.
1Chronicles27:18 Judah mite adingin Davidʼ sanggamteʼ sung panin Elihu ahi hi. Issakhar mite adingin Mikhaelʼ tapa Omri ahi hi.
1Chronicles27:19 Zebulun mite adingin Obadiahʼ tapa Ishmaiah ahi hi. Naftali mite adingin Azrielʼ tapa Jeremoth ahi hi.
1Chronicles27:20 Efraim mite adingin Azariahʼ tapa Hoshea ahi hi. Manasseh minam a langte adingin Pedaiahʼ tapa Joel ahi hi.
1Chronicles27:21 Gilead gam sunga Manasseh minam a langte adingin Zekhariahʼ tapa Iddo ahi hi. Benjamin mite adingin Abnerʼ tapa Jaasiel ahi hi.
1Chronicles27:22 Dan mite adingin Jehoramʼ tapa Azarel ahi hi. Hihte pen Israel minamteʼ makaite ahi uh hi.
1Chronicles27:23 Israel mite vantung aksi zahin a tamin a bawl nading Topa in thu ciam khin ahih manin David in kum sawm nih le a nuaisiah mite sim lo hi.
1Chronicles27:24 Zeruiahʼ tapa Joab in sim ding kipan a
1Chronicles27:25 Kumpipaʼ van manpha a ukte: Kumpipaʼ van manpha koihnate ah Adielʼ tapa Azmaveth ahi hi. Gam sunga van manpha koihnate
1Chronicles27:26 Lo khawh nasep a sem mite tungah Khelubʼ tapa Ezri ahi hi.
1Chronicles27:27 Leenggui lote tungah Ramah khuami Shimei ahi hi. Leenggui lo panin a piang leenggahzu koihnate tungah Shifmoth khuami Zabdi ahi hi.
1Chronicles27:28 Shefelah gam sunga om oliv le theithek kungte tungah Gederah khuami Baal-hanan ahi hi. Sathau koihnate tungah Joash ahi hi.
1Chronicles27:29 Sharon gam sungah a gamta ganhonte tungah Sharon khuami Shitrai ahi hi. Kuam sunga om ganhonte tungah Adlaiʼ tapa Shafat ahi hi.
1Chronicles27:30 Kalaohte tungah Ishmael mi Obil ahi hi. La a nute tungah Meronoth khuami Jehdeiah ahi hi. Tuuhonte tungah Hagri mi Jaziz ahi hi.
1Chronicles27:31 Hihte khempeuh pen Kumpi Davidʼ neihsa a kemte ahi hi.
1Chronicles27:32 Davidʼ pano Jonathan pen thu thei mi le lai thei mi ahih manin thulamlak pa ahi hi. Amah le Hakmoniʼ tapa Jehiel in kumpipaʼ tapate cing uh hi.

2Chronicles3:2 Amah in ama uk a kum lina a kha nihna sungin lam ding kipan hi.
2Chronicles3:3 Pasianʼ biakinn lam nading Solomonʼ geelna hih bang ahi hi: A dung pi sawm kua hi a
2Chronicles3:4 Inn mai-a innliim pen inn vai tawh kikimin pi sawm thum sau a
2Chronicles3:5 Amah in taaksan tawh innpi kawm dapin kham hoih tawh zut a
2Chronicles3:6 Amah in suangmanpha phutin a inn zem hi. A kham zatte Parvaim kham ahi hi.
2Chronicles3:7 Tua ahih ciangin amah in a inn
2Chronicles3:8 Tua ciangin amah in siangtho pen mun bawl hi. A dung pen a vai tawh kizui-in pi sawm thum hi a
2Chronicles3:9 A kilhnate a gihna kham shekel sawm nga ahi hi. Tua ciangin amah in a inn dawl tungnungte kham tawh a zut hi.
2Chronicles3:10 Amah in siangtho pen mun sungah sing kherub nih bawlin kham tawh tuate zut hi.
2Chronicles3:11 Tua kherub tegelʼ kha a kizalin pi sawm thum ahi hi. A khatʼ kha pen pi sagih le alang hi-in inn kawm ban a
2Chronicles3:12 Tua mah bangin a kherub dang khatʼ kha lang khat zong pi sagih le alang hi-in inn kawm lang khat ban a
2Chronicles3:13 Hih kherub-teʼ khate in pi sawm thum huam hi. Kherub-te amauʼ khe-in dingin innpi sung lam nga uh hi.
2Chronicles3:14 Tua ciangin amah in a dum
2Chronicles3:15 Amah in inn mai sanah pi sawm nga le pi nih le alang a sang
2Chronicles3:16 Amah in ngawng a awhte bangin khainiangte bawlin khuampite dawnah khai hi. Tua ciangin amah in mang kawlsing za khat bawlin khainiangte tungah koih hi.

2Chronicles5:4 Tua ciangin Israel upate khempeuh hong pai uh a
2Chronicles5:5 Tua ciangin amaute in Thuciamna Singkuang le kikhopna buk le puanbuk sunga om a siangtho umlebeel khempeuh pua to uh a
2Chronicles5:6 Tua ciangin Kumpi Solomon le ama mai ah a kikhawm Israel-te khempeuh Thuciamna Singkuang mai ah om uh a
2Chronicles5:7 Tua ahih ciangin siampite in kherub-teʼ kha nuai
2Chronicles5:8 Kherub-te in Thuciamna Singkuang tungah a khate uh zak uh ahih manin kherub-te pen Thuciamna Singkuang le a zawlte tungah khuhna khat a suak uh hi.
2Chronicles5:9 A zawlte sau ahih manin siangtho mun panin biakinn sung nung mai ah a mongte kidawk a
2Chronicles5:10 Egypt panin amaute hong paikhiat lai-in Topa in Israel mite tawh thuciamna a bawlna mun Horeb ah Moses in suangpek nihte a koih sim loh Thuciamna Singkuang sungah bangmah dang om lo hi.
2Chronicles5:11 Siangtho mun panin siampite hong pusuakin (bang hang hiam cih leh amauʼ pawlte cih tuam om loin tua lai-a om siampite khempeuh amau mahmah kisiansuah uh hi.
2Chronicles5:12 Tua ciangin Levi mi lasate Asaf
2Chronicles5:13 Aw kikhatin phatin Topaʼ tungah lungdam koh ding pen peengkul tumte le lasateʼ nasep ahi hi) peengkulte le daltuahte le a dang lasaknate tawh

2Chronicles7:1 Solomon a thunget a tawp ciangin
2Chronicles7:2 Topaʼ minthanna vang biakinn dim ahih manin Topaʼ biakinn sungah siampite lut thei lo uh hi.
2Chronicles7:3 Israel mite khempeuh in meikuang hong pai sukin Topaʼ minthanna vang biakinn tungah a om a muh uh ciangin suangphah tungah lei lam maingatin kun uh a
2Chronicles7:4 Tua ciangin kumpipa le mi khempeuh in Topaʼ mai ah biakna pia uh hi.
2Chronicles7:5 Kumpi Solomon in biakna-in bawngtal tul sawm nih le tul nih le tuu tul za khat le tul sawm nih pia hi. Tua bangin kumpipa le mi khempeuh in Pasianʼ biakinn a ap uh hi.
2Chronicles7:6 Siampite amau panmun uh ah ding uh hi. Levi mite zong
2Chronicles7:7 Tua ciangin Solomon in Topaʼ biakinn mai ah a om inntual laizang ap hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Solomon in a bawl sumngo biakna tau ah meihal biakna le a thaute ta zo lo ahih manin tua lai munah amah in meihal biakna le thunuam a biakna thaute a pia hi.
2Chronicles7:8 Tua hun laitakin Solomon le amah tawh a om Israel khempeuh mihon tampi in Hamath lutna panin Egypt lui ciang dongah ni sagih sung pawi a kham uh hi.
2Chronicles7:9 Tua ciangin a ni giat ni-in amaute in a thukhupna khat nei uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in biakinn apna ni sagih sung pawi kham uh a
2Chronicles7:10 A kha sagihna a ni thum ni-in
2Chronicles7:11 Tua bangin Solomon in Topaʼ biakinn le kumpi inn zo hi. Solomon in Topaʼ biakinn le ama inn sungah hih dinga a geel khempeuh nuam takin zo hi.
2Chronicles7:12 Tua ciangin zanin Solomon tungah Topa kilangin ama kiangah

2Chronicles9:4 a sabuai ah a an
2Chronicles9:5 Tua ciangin amah in kumpipa kiangah
2Chronicles9:6 Ahih hangin kei hong pai-in ka mit in a muh matengin a kigen thute ka um kei hi. A taktakin
2Chronicles9:7 Na zite hampha mahmah hi. Na mai ah ding tawntungin na pilna a za hih na nasemte hampha mahmah hi.
2Chronicles9:8 Na tungah lungkimin Topa na Pasian adingin kumpi-in a kumpi tokhom tungah nang hong tusak Topa na Pasian in thupha ngah tahen! Na Pasian in Israel mite itin a tawntungin amaute kipsak ding ahih manin
2Chronicles9:9 Tua ciangin amah in kumpipa tungah kham talen za khat le sawm nih le a namtui nate tampi tak le suang manphate a pia hi. Sheba kumpinu in Kumpi Solomon tungah a piak tua banga a namtui nate zahin a hoih omngei lo hi.
2Chronicles9:10 Tua tham loin Ofir panin kham hong pua Kumpi Hiramʼ nasemte le Solomonʼ nasemte in cingsing le suang manphate hong pua uh hi.
2Chronicles9:11 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Topaʼ biakinn le kumpi inn-a cingsing kahlei ding le lasate-aʼ dingin laiza lasaknate le harp lasaknate-in zong a bawl hi. Tua hun ma-in Judah gam sungah tua bang kimu ngei lo hi.
2Chronicles9:12 Tua ciangin kumpinu in amah a puakte a thuhna-in letsong a piakte banah
2Chronicles9:13 Tu-in kum khat sungin Solomon tungah a tung kham a gihna talen za guk le sawm guk le guk hi a
2Chronicles9:14 sum bawlte le sumbukteʼ tutte a kisim lo ahi hi. Arabia kumpite khempeuh le gam sung a ukte in Solomon kiangah kham le ngun puak uh hi.
2Chronicles9:15 Kumpi Solomon in kham a kiseek lumpi za nih bawl hi; lum khat ciangin a kiseek kham shekel za guk bei hi.
2Chronicles9:16 Tua ciangin amah in a kiseek kham lum za thum bawl hi; lum khat ciangin kham shekel za thum bei hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in Lebanon Tulak Inn sungah tuate koih hi.
2Chronicles9:17 Kumpipa in saiha kibawl kumpi tokhom a lian khat zong bawl a
2Chronicles9:18 Kumpi tokhom in cial guk le kham a kibawl khengakna khat nei-in
2Chronicles9:19 kahlei cial guk mong ciatah khat ciat
2Chronicles9:20 Kumpi Solomonʼ dawnna haite khempeuh kham hi a
2Chronicles9:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh Kumpi Hiramʼ nasemte tawh kumpipaʼ teembawte
2Chronicles9:22 Tua bangin kumpi Solomon in hauhna le pilna tawh leitung kumpi khempeuh khumkhelh hi.
2Chronicles9:23 Tua ciangin Pasian in ama lungsim sungah a koihsak pilna a za dingin leitung kumpi khempeuh in Solomonʼ omna hong zong uh hi.
2Chronicles9:24 Amaute khempeuh in a letsong ciat uh

2Chronicles9:29 Tu-in Solomonʼ gamtatna a omlaite

2Chronicles32:11 Hezekiah in note kiangah
2Chronicles32:12 Hih Hezekiah mah in mual dawna a biakpiaknate le ama biakna taute la khia-in Judah le Jerusalem thu pia a
2Chronicles32:13 Keimah le ka pu ka pate in gamdang mi khempeuh tungah ka hihna sate uh thei lo na hi uh hiam? Tua gam minamteʼ pasian in keima khut sung panin a gam uh hon khia zo ahi uh hiam?
2Chronicles32:14 Na Pasian un keima khut sung panin note hong hotkhiat theih nadingin ka pu ka pate in a suksiat mang tua minamteʼ pasian khempeuh lakah kua in a mite hon khia zo ngei ahi hiam?
2Chronicles32:15 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in note
2Chronicles32:16 Tua ciangin ama nasemte in Topa Pasian le a nasem pa Hezekiah langpangin thu tam zaw gen lai uh hi.
2Chronicles32:17 Tua ciangin amah in Israel Pasian
2Chronicles32:18 Amaute in khuapi a lak theih nadingin khuapi mite lau-in a liinglawnsak nadingun kulh tungah a om Jerusalem mite tungah Judah pau tawh nakpi takin kiko uh hi.
2Chronicles32:19 Amaute in
2Chronicles32:20 Tua ciangin kumpipa Hezekiah le Amozʼ tapa
2Chronicles32:21 Tua ciangin Topa in Assiria kumpipaʼ giahphual ah a thahat galhang khempeuh le galkap a ukte le uliante a susia vantungmi khat a sawl hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama gamah maizumna tawh a ciahkik hi. Ama pasianʼ inn sungah amah a tun ciangin ama tapate pawl khat in namsau tawh amah sat lum uh hi.
2Chronicles32:22 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Assiria kumpipa Sennakheribʼ khut le ama galte khempeuh panin Hezekiah le Jerusalem-a a teengte hon khia a
2Chronicles32:23 Tua ciangin mi tampi in Jerusalem khua Topa kiangah letsongte hong puakin
2Chronicles32:24 Tua hun lai-in Hezekiah cina-in si dektak a
2Chronicles32:25 Ahih hangin a lungsim kiphasak ahih manin ama tungah phattuamna a kibawl zahin Topaʼ tungah Hezekiah in lungdam ko nuam lo hi. Tua ahih manin amah le Judah le Jerusalem tungah Topaʼ hehna hong tung hi.
2Chronicles32:26 Ahi zongin a nung ciangin Hezekiah a lungsim kiphatsakna thu ah amah le Jerusalem-a teeng mite tawh kiniamkhiat uh ahih manin amauteʼ tungah Topaʼ hehna hong tung lo hi.
2Chronicles32:27 Hezekiah hau mahmah in a min thang mahmah hi. Amah in ngun
2Chronicles32:28 An
2Chronicles32:29 Amah in tua bangmahin a mahmah adingin khuapite le tuuhonte le ganhonte tampi a koih hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in ama tungah neihsa tampi tak pia hi.
2Chronicles32:30 Hih Hezekiah mah in Gihon tui tungnungte khaktanin David khuapi nitumna lam pangah luangsak hi. Hezekiah a nasepna khempeuh ah a maa vang hi.
2Chronicles32:31 Tua ahih ciangin gam sung om zia lim a kan dingin ama kiangah a kisawl Babylon ulianteʼ kamtaite tawh kisai-in
2Chronicles32:32 Tu-in Hezekiahʼ gamtatna a omlaite le ama nasep hoihte
2Chronicles32:33 Tua ciangin Hezekiah si a

2Chronicles33:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh a pa Hezekiah in a suksiat sa mual dawna biakpiaknate amah in lamkikin

2Chronicles33:9 Manasseh in Judah le Jerusalem-a teengte zol ahih manin

2Chronicles33:13 Amah in ama kiangah thu ngen a
2Chronicles33:14 Tua khit ciangin amah in kuam sung
2Chronicles33:15 Tua ciangin amah in Topaʼ biakinn panin gamdang pasian-te le a milim la khia a
2Chronicles33:16 Amah in Topaʼ biakna tau zong koihkikin tua tungah thunuam a biakna le lungdamkohna a pia hi. Tua ciangin amah in Israel Pasian
2Chronicles33:17 Ahi zongin mite in mual dawna biakpiaknate ah biakna pia lai uh a
2Chronicles33:18 Tu-in Manassehʼ gamtatna a omlaite le a Pasianʼ tungah a thungetna le Israel Pasian
2Chronicles33:19 Tua ciangin ama thungetna le ama kutna Pasian in a sanna le ama khialhna le a cihtak lohna khempeuh le amah a kiniamkhiat ma-in mual dawna biakpiaknate bawlin Asherah-te le milim dangte a koihna munte thu
2Chronicles33:20 Tua ciangin Manasseh si a
2Chronicles33:21 Amon in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm nih le nih pha a
2Chronicles33:22 A pa Manassehʼ gamtatna sa khempeuh bangin Topaʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta hi. Amon in a pa Manassehʼ bawl sa milim khempeuh tungah biakna pia a
2Chronicles33:23 A pa Manasseh a kiniamkhiat bangin Topaʼ mai ah amah kiniamkhiat lo a
2Chronicles33:24 Tua ciangin ama nasemte in amah sawm simin ama inn sungah amah that uh hi.
2Chronicles33:25 Ahih hangin tua gam mite in Kumpi Amon a sawm sim khempeuh that leuleu uh hi. Tua ciangin tua gam mite in ama tangin a tapa Josiah kumpi-in a koih uh hi.

2Chronicles34:2 Topaʼ mitah a man gamta a
2Chronicles34:3 Ama uk a kum giatna sung
2Chronicles34:4 Tua ciangin amah in Baal-teʼ biakna taute ama muhna ah su paisak hi. Tua ciangin amah in tuate tungah a om paknamtui biakna taute phuk a
2Chronicles34:5 Amah in amauʼ biakna taute tungah a siampiteʼ guhte zong hal a
2Chronicles34:6 Tua ciangin Manasseh
2Chronicles34:7 amah in biakna taute sukhamin Asherah milimte le milim dangte satvui a

2Chronicles34:9 Siampi lianpen pa Hilkiah kiangah amaute hong pai uh a
2Chronicles34:10 Amaute in Topaʼ biakinn a vaan nasemte tungah tua sumte pia uh hi. Tua ciangin Topaʼ biakinn ah a sem nasemte in biakinn puah nading le a ngei batsakkik nadingin pia uh hi.
2Chronicles34:11 Amaute in a kito suangte lei nading le Judah kumpite in a siatsak
2Chronicles34:12 Tua ciangin mite in cihtakna tawh na sem uh hi. Amaute tungah a en dingin Levi mi Merari-te beh sung pan Jahath le Obadiah le Kohath-te beh sung pan Zekhariah le Meshullam kikoih hi. Levi mi
2Chronicles34:13 van gik puate a uk le nasep namkim a sem khempeuh a makaih uh hi. Tua ciangin Levi mi pawl khatte pen laigelhte le zaneite le kulh kongpi cingte ahi hi.
2Chronicles34:14 Amaute in Topaʼ biakinn ah a kipaipih sumte a lakkhiat laitakun siampi Hilkiah in Moses tungtawnin a kipia thukham laibu a mu hi.
2Chronicles34:15 Tua ciangin Hilkiah in lai-at pa Shafan kiangah

2Chronicles34:18 Tua ciangin lai-at pa Shafan in kumpipa kiangah
2Chronicles34:19 Kumpipa in thukham kammalte a zak ciangin a puante bal kek hi.
2Chronicles34:20 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Hilkiah
2Chronicles34:21 “Pai unla

2Chronicles34:33 Tua ciangin Josiah in Israel miteʼ neihsa gam sung khempeuh panin a kihhuaite khempeuh la khia a
2Chronicles35:1 Josiah in Topa adingin Jerusalem ah Paisan Pawi bawl hi. Amaute in a kha masa a ni sawm le li ni-in Paisan Pawi tuuno go uh hi.
2Chronicles35:2 Amah in siampite amauʼ panmunte ah seh a
2Chronicles35:3 Tua ciangin amah in Israel khempeuh hilhin Topaʼ tungah a siangtho Levi mite tungah
2Chronicles35:4 Note a khenkhenin na beh uh tawh kizui-in kithawi unla
2Chronicles35:5 Tua ciangin mi nautang na sanggamte uh beh kikhenna tawh kizui-in siangtho munah ding uh henla
2Chronicles35:6 Tua ciangin Paisan Pawi bawlna ganhing go-in nomau mah kisiansuah unla
2Chronicles35:7 Tua ciangin Josiah in tua lai-a a om mi khempeuhte adingin Paisan Pawi piakna-in a gan hon panin mi nautangte tungah tuunote le keelnote tul sawm thum ciang dong le bawngtal tul thum a pia hi. Hihte pen kumpipaʼ neihsa sung pan a kipia ahi hi.
2Chronicles35:8 Tua ciangin ama uliante in zong utna lungsim tawh mite tung
2Chronicles35:9 Levi mi ukpite Konaniah
2Chronicles35:10 Nasep nading a kithawi khit uh ciangin
2Chronicles35:11 Tua ciangin amaute in Paisan tuuno go uh a
2Chronicles35:12 Tua ciangin amaute in
2Chronicles35:13 Tua ciangin amaute in biakna ngeina kip tawh kizui-in Paisan tuuno sa mei ah a hang uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in beel sung
2Chronicles35:14 Tua khit ciangin amau ading le siampite adingin amau mah in a sa bawl uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Aaronʼ suan siampite zankim ciang dong meihal biakna pia-in manlah uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Levi mite in amau ading le Aaronʼ suan siampite adingin a sa bawl uh hi.
2Chronicles35:15 Davidʼ thupiak bangin Asafʼ behte ahi lasate le Asaf le Heman le kumpipaʼ thumu pa Jeduthun-te amauʼ munah om uh hi. Kulh kongpi cingte a kulh kongpi ciatah om uh a
2Chronicles35:16 Tua ahih ciangin Kumpi Josiahʼ thupiakna bangin Paisan Pawi bawl nading le Topaʼ biakna tau tungah meihal biaknate piak nadingin tua ni-in Topaʼ nasep nading khempeuh a kithawi uh hi.
2Chronicles35:17 Tua lai ah a om Israel mite in tua hunin Paisan Pawi le Silngo Sawh loh Anlum Pawi ni sagih sung a bawl uh hi.
2Chronicles35:18 Kamsang Samuel huna kipan Israel sungah tua bang Paisan Pawi kibawl ngei lo hi. Josiah le siampite le Levi mite le tua lai ah a om Judah le Israel mi khempeuh le Jerusalem-a a teeng mite in a bawl Paisan Pawi tawh a kibang
2Chronicles35:19 Josiahʼ uk a kum sawm le kum giatna kumin hih Paisan Pawi kibawl hi.
2Chronicles35:20 Hih thute khempeuh khit
2Chronicles35:21 Ahih hangin Neko in ama kiangah kamtaite sawlin
2Chronicles35:22 Ahi zongin ama kiang panin Josiah kihei khia nuam lo a
2Chronicles35:23 Tua ciangin thaltawite in Kumpi Josiah kap hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in a nasemte kiangah
2Chronicles35:24 Tua ahih ciangin a nasemte in leeng sung panin amah la khia-in ama leeng nihna sungah amah pua-in Jerusalem ah a paipih uh hi. Tua ciangin amah si a
2Chronicles35:25 Jeremiah in zong Josiahʼ hangin kah la a phuak hi. Numei lasate le pasal lasate khempeuh in tu ni dongin amauʼ kahna ah Josiah tamlawh uh hi. Amaute in Israel sungah hih thu biakna ngeina kipin a bawl uh hi. Kah la sungah tuate kikhum hi.

2Chronicles35:27 le ama gamtatna
2Chronicles36:1 Tua gam mite in Josiahʼ tapa Jehoahaz la-in Jerusalem ah a paʼ tangin kumpi-in a koih uh hi.

2Chronicles36:5 Jehoiakim in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm nih le nga pha a
2Chronicles36:6 Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar amah a simin hong kuan to a
2Chronicles36:7 Nebukhadnezzar in Topaʼ biakinn-a umlebeel pawl khatte zong Babylon ah pua-in Babylon-a a kumpi inn ah tuate a koih hi.
2Chronicles36:8 Tu-in Jehoiakimʼ gamtatna a omlaite le ama hih a kihhuaite le amah a hoih lohna a kimute
2Chronicles36:9 Jehoiakhin in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm le kum giat pha a
2Chronicles36:10 Tua kum khuakhal sungin Kumpi Nebukhadnezzar in mi sawlin Topaʼ biakinn-a umlebeel manphate tawh amah Babylon ah lasak a
2Chronicles36:11 Zedekiah in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm nih le khat pha a
2Chronicles36:12 Topa a Pasianʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta hi. Topaʼ kammal a gen sawn kamsang Jeremiah mai ah amah kiniamkhiat lo hi.
2Chronicles36:13 Pasian tawh amah a kiciamsak kumpi Nebukhadnezzar zong amah in lehdo hi. Israel Pasian
2Chronicles36:14 A makai siampite le mi khempeuh zong tua bangmahin citak lo mahmah uh a
2Chronicles36:15 A mite le ama teenna mun khasiat ahih manin amauʼ pute pateʼ Pasian
2Chronicles36:16 Ahih hangin a mite tungah Topa a heh ciang dong
2Chronicles36:17 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Khaldea miteʼ kumpipa amauteʼ lang khat ah paipih a
2Chronicles36:18 Tua ciangin Topaʼ biakinn-a umlebeel khempeuh a lian a neu le Topaʼ biakinn-a van manphate le kumpipa le a ulianteʼ van manphate khempeuh amah in Babylon ah paipih hi.
2Chronicles36:19 Tua ciangin amaute in Pasianʼ biakinn halin Jerusalem khua susia uh a
2Chronicles36:20 Amah in namsau panin a suakta mite Babylon ah salin la a
2Chronicles36:21 Tua sungin Israel leitang in a sabbath-te a kicingin na tang hi. Kamsang Jeremiah tungtawnin Topaʼ thugen a tun nadingin kum sawm sagih a cin nadingin leitang a kinusiat sung khempeuh leitang in sabbath tawlngakna a nei ahi hi.
2Chronicles36:22 Tu-in Persia kumpipa Sairasʼ kum khatna kumin
2Chronicles36:23 “Persia kumpipa Sairas in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Vantung Pasian

Ezra1:7 Tua tham loin

Ezra1:10 kham kuang-uk sawm thum

Ezra2:63 Urim le Thummim aisanna tawh ai a san ding siampi khat a om mateng amaute in biakna an siang pente a nek loh nading uh gam ukpa in a gen hi.
Ezra2:64 Mi a vekpi - tul sawm li le tul nih le za thum sawm guk pha uh a
Ezra2:65 amauteʼ nasem numei le pasal mihing - tul sagih le za thum sawm thum le sagihte kisim lo hi. Amaute in lasa numei le pasal mihing za nih nei uh hi.
