Ezra3:1 A kha sagihna hong cin ciangin Israel mite amauʼ khuapi ciatah teeng khin uh ahih manin
Ezra3:2 Tua ciangin Jozadakʼ tapa Jeshua le a siampipihte le Shealtielʼ tapa Zerubbabel le a behte hong kipan uh a
Ezra3:3 Amaute in tua gam a midang a teengte kihta uh ahih manin a mun lui mahah biakna tau phut pahin zing le nitak simin Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna a pia uh hi.
Ezra3:4 Tua ciangin amaute in a kikipsak sa bangin buk pawi bawl uh a
Ezra3:5 Tua ciangin hihte banah a tawntung a meihal biakna
Ezra3:6 Topaʼ biakinnpi a bul a kiphuh nai loh hangin a kha sagihna a ni masa ni a kipanin amaute in Topaʼ tungah meihal biaknate piak ding kipan uh hi.
Ezra3:7 Tua hi a
Ezra3:8 Amaute
Ezra3:9 Jeshua a tapate le a behte tawh le Hodaviah-te beh Kadmiel le a tate in Henadadʼ tapate le Levi mi a tapate uh le a behte uh tawh Pasianʼ biakinn ah nasemte tungah ukna tavuan a la khawm uh hi.
Ezra3:10 Innlamte in Topaʼ biakinn a bul a phuh uh ciangin
Ezra3:11 Tua ciangin amaute in Topa phatna le lungdamkohna a kidawngin sa uh a
Ezra3:12 Midang tampi lungdamin a aw neih zahun a kiko uh hangin a biakinn masa a mu ngeisa siampite
Ezra3:13 Mite nakpi takin kiko ahih manin lungdamna awging le kahna le thumna awgingte mite in khen thei lo uh hi. Gamlapi pek panin tua awgingte a kiza hi.
Ezra4:1 Salsuahna panin a hong ciahkik mite in Israel Pasian Topa adingin biakinn khat a lamna thu Judah le Benjamin miteʼ galte in a zak uh ciangin
Ezra4:2 Zerubbabel
Ezra4:3 Ahih hangin Zerubbabel le Israel sunga innkuan lutang a omlaite in amaute kiangah
Ezra4:4 Tua ciangin tua gam a teeng midangte in Judah mite lungkiasakin biakinn a lam zom lai ding uh a lausak uh hi.
Ezra4:5 Amauʼ ngimna a tangtun theih loh nadingin amaute in a langpang dingin zum nasemte golhguk pia uh hi. Persia kumpipa Sairasʼ hun a kipan kumpi Darias hun dong hih bangin hih ngitnget uh hi.
Ezra4:6 Ahasueras in uk ding hong kipat ciangin Judah gam le Jerusalem-a a teengte a khiatna thu tua gamah a na teeng sate in lai-in a gelh uh hi.
Ezra4:7 Tua ciangin Persia kumpi Artakzaksis hun ciangin Mithredath
Ezra4:8 Menzipipa Rehum le lai-at pa Shimshai in Kumpi Artakzaksis tungah Jerusalem tawh kisai thu a nuai-a bangin gelh uh hi.
Ezra4:9 Menzipipa Rehum
Ezra4:10 le a lian a minthang Ashurbanipal in hong pua khia-in Samaria khuapi ah a hong tensak mite le Eufratis Gun lang khat a kizawhna gam sunga a om mite tung panin lai puak
Ezra4:11 A lai sung thu hih a nuai-a bang ahi hi: “Artakzaksis Kumpipa tungah
Ezra4:12 “Nangma kiang panin ko kiangah a hong pai Judah mite
Ezra4:13 Amauʼ khuapi kilam kikin kulhte kizo leh amaute in siah ahi a
Ezra4:14 Kote in kumpipa tawh thuciamna kip nei khin ka hih manun kumpipaʼ min siatna ka muh ding uh kilawm lo hi. Tua ahih manin nangma mai-a a semteʼ thuciaptehna laibute a ki-etkik theih nadingin kumpipa tungah thu kong zasak uh hi. Thuciaptehna laibu sung en lecin hih khuapi pen a lehdo thei khuapi
Ezra4:15 
Ezra4:16 Hih khuapi kilam kikin a kulhte kizo khin leh Eufratis Gun gal gam na uk nawn loh nading thu
Ezra4:17 Tua ciangin kumpipa in a lai uh hih bangin thuk hi: “Menzipipa Rehum
Ezra4:18 “Keima tungah nong khak uh lai pen a kitel takin keima zakna ah hong kisim khin hi.
Ezra4:19 Keimah in hih thu a kikanna ding thu ka pia a
Ezra4:20 A vanglian kumpite in Jerusalem ah uk ngei-in
Ezra4:21 Tua ahih ciangin hih mite a nasep uh a khawl nading thu pia in. Keimah in thu kong piakkik mateng hih khuapi kilamkik lo ding hi.
Ezra4:22 Hih thu tawh kisai-in na sep ding don loin om mawk kei in. Tua hikeileh kumpi tungah siatna le gimna hong khang ding hi
Ezra4:23 Menzipipa Rehum
Ezra4:24 Tua hun a kipanin Jerusalem-a om Pasianʼ biakinn a kisepna a khawl hi. Persia kumpi Dariasʼ uk a kum nihna dong tua bangin a khawlcip phot hi.
Ezra5:1 Tu-in kamsangte Haggai le Iddoʼ suan Zekhariah in Judah gam le Jerusalem ah a om Judah mite hanthawnin
Ezra5:2 Tua ciangin Shealtielʼ tapa Zerubbabel le Jozadakʼ tapa Jeshua
Ezra5:3 Tua laitakin Eufratis Gun gal gam sungteng a uk sawn Tattenai
Ezra5:4 Hih biakinn lam nasepna ah a sem miteʼ min zong amaute in dong uh hi.
Ezra5:5 Ahi zongin Pasian in Judah upate huh ahih manin Darias kiangah a thu va tungin ama tung pan thu a kingahkik hun dong a nasep zop suakna uh kikhak tan lo hi.
Ezra5:6 Eufratis Gun gal gam a uk sawn Tattenai
Ezra5:7 Amaute in thu zaksakna lai hih bangin a gelh uh hi: “Kumpi Darias tungah thupha namcin hong tung tahen.
Ezra5:8 “Judah gam
Ezra5:9 “Hih biakinn a kilamkikna ding le a nate a zawh nadingin kua in thu pia hiam
Ezra5:10 Nangmah in a makai teng na theih nadingin amauteʼ min zong ka dong uh hi.
Ezra5:11 “Amaute in hih bangin hong dawng uh hi: ‘Kote pen vantung le leitung Pasianʼ nasemte ka hi uh a
Ezra5:12 Ahi zongin ka pu ka pate un vantung Pasian hehsak kha uh ahih manin Babylon kumpipa
Ezra5:13 Ahi zongin Babylon kumpipa Sairasʼ uk a kum khatna kumin hih Pasianʼ biakinn a kilamkikna ding amah in thu pia hi.
Ezra5:14 Tua tham loin Jerusalem-a biakinn sung panin Nebukhadnezzar in la-in Babylon biakinn sunga a koih ahi Pasianʼ biakinn sunga om ngeisa kham le ngun kibawl umlebeelte zong kumpi Sairas in Babylon biakinn panin la khia-in gam ukin a hong koih Sheshbazzar min nei pa tungah ap hi.
Ezra5:15 Kumpipa in ama tungah
Ezra5:16 Tua ciangin Sheshbazzar hong pai-in Jerusalem-a Pasianʼ biakinn a bulpi hong phut hi. Tua hun a kipanin tu dong lamkik kisem suak a
Ezra5:17 “Tua ahih ciangin hoih na sak leh
Ezra6:1 Tua ciangin Kumpi Darias in thu pia a
Ezra6:2 Ahi zongin Babylon khua sungah na om lo a
Ezra6:3 “Kumpi Sairasʼ kum khatna kumin Jerusalem khua-a Pasianʼ biakinn tawh kisai-in kumpipa in thu pia hi: Biakna kipia-in meihal biakna a kipaipihna munah biakinn lamsakkik un. A sanna pi sawm kua
Ezra6:4 a kawm pen suang thuap thum le sing thuap khat tawh a kibawl
Ezra6:5 Nebukhadnezzar in Jerusalem biakinn panin la khia-in Babylon ah a hong tunpih Pasianʼ biakinn sunga om kham le ngun tawh kibawl umlebeelte zong kipiakik ding hi. Tuate khempeuh Jerusalem biakinn ah kipuakik dinga
Ezra6:6 Tua ciangin Kumpi Darias in hih bangin thu a pia hi: “Tu-in Eufratis Gun gal gam a uk Tattenai
Ezra6:7 Judah mi a ukpa le a upate in hih Pasianʼ biakinn a lamkik theih nadingun na tua ci omsak ding uh hi. Ama mun ngei mahah a biakinn lamsakkik un.
Ezra6:8 Hih a kigen Pasianʼ biakinn a kilamkik theih nadingin hih Judah upate adingin na hih dingte uh zong thu kong pia hi. Hih nasepna a mawk khawl loh nadingin
Ezra6:9 Vantung Pasianʼ tungah meihal biakna-in piak dingin a kisam khempeuh - bawngtal note
Ezra6:10 Tua hileh amaute in vantung Pasianʼ tungah a namtui biaknate pia-in kumpipa le a tapateʼ nuntak nading thu hong ngetsak thei ding uh hi.
Ezra6:11 Tua tham loin
Ezra6:12 Hih ka thupiakna a siasak nuam
Ezra6:13 Tua ciangin Kumpi Darias in amaute tungah a thupiak bang teekteekin Eufratis Gun gal gam sung a uk sawn Tattenai
Ezra6:14 Tua hi a
Ezra6:15 Tua hi a
Ezra6:16 Tua ciangin Israel mite
Ezra6:17 Amaute in Pasianʼ biakinn apna-in bawngtal za khat
Ezra6:18 Tua ciangin Moses laibu sungah a kigelh bangin Jerusalem-a Pasianʼ nasep nadingin siampite amauʼ panmun ngei ah pangsak uh a
Ezra6:19 A kha masa a ni sawm le li ni-in sal a suak sa a hong ciahkik mite in Paisan Pawi a bawl uh hi.
Ezra6:20 Siampite le Levi mite a vekpi-un kisiansuah khin uh a
Ezra6:21 Salsuahna panin a hong ciahkik Israel-te le Israel Pasian
Ezra6:22 Tua hi a
Ezra7:1 Hih thu teng khit ciangin Persia kumpi Artakzaksis uk hun sungin Ezra
Ezra7:2 a pa Shalum
Ezra7:3 a pa Amariah
Ezra7:4 a pa Zerahiah
Ezra7:5 a pa Abishua
Ezra7:6 hih Ezra pen Babylon panin hong tung to hi. Amah pen Israel Pasian
Ezra7:7 Kumpi Artakzaksis in a uk a kum sagihna kumin Israel mite
Ezra7:8 Kumpipaʼ uk kum sagih a cin kum
Ezra7:9 A kha masa a ni khat ni-in Babylon pan a ding khia dingin Ezra in a ni sehkhol a
Ezra7:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Ezra in Topaʼ thukham sinin zuih ding le Israel mite a hilh dingin amah kipia hi.
Ezra7:11 Kumpi Artakzaksis in siampi ahi
Ezra7:12 “Kumpiteʼ kumpi ahi Artakzaksis kiang panin vantung Pasianʼ thukham a siam
Ezra7:13 “Ka lungsim khensatna hih bang ahi hi: Ka gam sunga om Israel mi khatpeuh ahi a
Ezra7:14 Nang tungah hong kipia ahi na Pasianʼ thukham tawh kisai-in Judah le Jerusalem ah thu bangci om hiam cih a va thei dingin kumpipa keimah le thu hong lamlak mihing sagihte in kong sawl uh hi.
Ezra7:15 Kumpipa le a thulamlakte in Jerusalem ah a teeng Israel Pasian tungah lungkim takin a piak ngun le khamte zong
Ezra7:16 Babylon gamah na muh uh ngun le khamte le Jerusalem-a noteʼ Pasianʼ biakinn dingin mite le siampite in lungkim takin a piakkhiat zuazuate uh tawh a va puakkhawm ding na hi uh hi.
Ezra7:17 “Hih ka thupiakna tawh kizui-in hih sumte pen Jerusalem-a noteʼ Pasianʼ biakinn-a biakna tau tungah piak dingin bawngtalte
Ezra7:18 Tua banah ngun le kham a val a om lai leh
Ezra7:19 Na Pasianʼ biakinn ah zat dingin hong kipia umlebeelte pen Jerusalem Pasian tungah na va pia ding hi.
Ezra7:20 Na Pasianʼ biakinn adingin a kisam
Ezra7:21 “Tua hi a
Ezra7:22 ngun talen za khat
Ezra7:23 Vantung Pasian in a deih peuhpeuh
Ezra7:24 Siampite
Ezra7:25 “Tua hi a
Ezra7:26 Na Pasianʼ thukham le kumpipaʼ thukham a mang lo peuhmah
Ezra7:27 Tua ciangin Ezra in
Ezra7:28 
Ezra8:1 Kumpi Artakzaksisʼ uk hun sungin Babylon panin kei tawh hong ciah to khawm a behbehin a kiciamteh beh lutangte hih bang ahi hi:
Ezra8:2 Gershom: Finehas-te beh pan ahi hi. Daniel: Ithamar-te beh pan ahi hi. Hattush: David-te beh panin Shekaniahʼ tapa ahi hi.
Ezra8:3 Zekhariah: Parosh-te beh sung pan hi a
Ezra8:4 Eliehoenai: Pahath-moab-te beh panin Zerahiahʼ tapa hi a
Ezra8:5 Shekaniah: Zattu-te beh panin Jahazielʼ tapa hi a
Ezra8:6 Ebed: Adin-te beh panin Jonathanʼ tapa hi a
Ezra8:7 Isaiah: Elam-te beh panin Athaliahʼ tapa hi a
Ezra8:8 Zebadiah: Shefatiah-te beh panin Mikhaelʼ tapa hi a
Ezra8:9 Obadiah: Joab-te beh panin Jehielʼ tapa hi a
Ezra8:10 Shelomith: Bani-te beh panin Josifiahʼ tapa hi a
Ezra8:11 Zekhariah: Bebai-te beh panin Bebaiʼ tapa hi a
Ezra8:12 Johanan: Azgad-te beh panin Hakkatanʼ tapa hi a
Ezra8:13 Elifelet
Ezra8:14 Uthai le Zabbud: Bigvai-te beh pan hi uh a
Ezra8:15 Ahava gam lamah a luang lui gei khat ah amaute ka khawm a
Ezra8:16 Tua ahih ciangin a lawmte lakah a makai
Ezra8:17 Kasifia mun a a makai pa Iddo kiangah va pai-in
Ezra8:18 Tua hi a
Ezra8:19 le Merari-te beh panin Isaiah
Ezra8:20 Levi miteʼ na a sem dingin David le a uliante in a tuam koih ahi biakinn nasem za nih le sawm nih hong pia hi. Hih mite khempeuh amauʼ min ciat tawh a kisam ahi hi.
Ezra8:21 Tua ciangin eiteʼ Pasianʼ mai ah kote kiniamkhiat thei-in
Ezra8:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa kiangah
Ezra8:23 Tua hi a
Ezra8:24 Tua ciangin siampi liante sung panin mi sawm le nih - Sherebiah
Ezra8:25 Tua ciangin i Pasianʼ biakinn nasep nadingin kumpipa le a thulamlakte le a uliante le tua lai-a a om Israel mi khempeuh in a tuam khen ciat uh ngun le kham le umlebeelte
Ezra8:26 Amaute tungah ka apte: Ngun talen za guk sawm nga
Ezra8:27 kham darik tul khat man tawh a kibawl kuang-uk sawm nih
Ezra8:28 Tua ciangin amaute kiangah
Ezra8:29 Siampi liante
Ezra8:30 Tua ahih manin siampite le Levi mite in Jerusalem-a i Pasianʼ biakinn ah puak dingin ngun
Ezra8:31 Tua ciangin Jerusalem a zuan dingin kha masa a ni sawm le nih ni-in Ahava lui panin ka ding khia uh hi. I Pasian in kote hong ompih ahih manin lamkal ah galte le pansimna a tuamtuamte tawh hong kipelhsak hi.
Ezra8:32 Jerusalem khua ka tun uh ciangin ni thum sung ka tawlnga uh hi.
Ezra8:33 A ni li ni-in Uriahʼ tapa siampi Meremothʼ tavuan lakna tawh i Pasianʼ biakinn sungah ngun
Ezra8:34 Vante a ki-ap ciangin limtakin kivel a
Ezra8:35 Tua ciangin salsuahna panin inn hong zuankik mite in Israel-te khempeuh adingin Israel Pasian tungah meihal biakna-in bawngtal sawm le nih
Ezra8:36 Amaute in Eufratis Gun gal gam sungteng a kumpipaʼ nuai ah a uk sawn a lian pente le uliante tungah kumpipaʼ thupiaknate zong a va gen uh hi. Tua hi a
Ezra9:1 Hih thute khempeuh a kisep khit ciangin keima kiangah makaite pawl khat hong pai-in
Ezra9:2 Amaute le a tapate un hih gam a teeng minam dangteʼ numeite teenpih uh a
Ezra9:3 Hih thu ka zak ciangin dah mahmah in ka puante bal kekin
Ezra9:4 Tua ciangin sal a suak hih miteʼ cihtak lohna hangin Israel Pasianʼ gim piak ding lau-in a liing mite khempeuh kei kiangah hong kikhawm uh a
Ezra9:5 Tua hi a
Ezra9:6 “Ka biak Pasian aw
Ezra9:7 Ka pu ka pate uh hun a kipanin tu hun dong mawhna lianpi ka nei uh hi. Tua thu hangin ka kumpite uh le ka siampite un gamdang kumpiteʼ khut sungah sihna
Ezra9:8 Ahi zongin tu-in Topa ka Pasian un tom kha sung kote hong hehpih a
Ezra9:9 Kote pen sal ka hi takpi uh hi; ahi zongin ka salsuahna uh ah ka Pasian un nong nusia kei a

Ezra9:12 
Ezra9:13 Tu-in koteʼ gamtat siate le a lian ka mawhnate uh hangin hih bang gimna lian ka thuak uh hi; ahi zongin nangmah in koteʼ tuah dinga kilawm zah gimna hong tuaksak loin
Ezra9:14 Hih banga ka thuak khit uh ciangin kote in na thupiaknate mang lo kikin
Ezra9:15 Israel Pasian
Ezra10:1 Ezra in tu-a bangin thu ngenin mawhna pulakin khitui naptui tawh Pasianʼ biakinn mai ah kunin a om laitakin Israel mi numei
Ezra10:2 Tua ciangin Elam-te beh sung panin Jehielʼ tapa Shekaniah hong pau-in Ezra kiangah
Ezra10:3 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in
Ezra10:4 Kipan in; nangma nasep ding ahi hi; kote in kong huh ding uh hi. Hang inla sem in
Ezra10:5 Tua ciangin Ezra dingin
Ezra10:6 Tua ciangin Pasianʼ biakinn panin Ezra pai khia-in Eliashibʼ tapa Jehohananʼ omna inn dei ah pai-in tua lai ah a giak hi. Salsuahna pan a hong ciahkik miteʼ khialhna hangin dah ahih manin amah in anletui ne zo lo hi.
Ezra10:7 Tua ciangin Judah le Jerusalem sunga a om a hong ciahkik salte khempeuh Jerusalem ah a hong kikhop nading uh
Ezra10:8 le ni thum sungin a hong tung lo a om leh uliante le upateʼ hoihsakna bangin a neihsa khempeuh uh kimanin
Ezra10:9 Tua ahih ciangin Judah le Benjamin mi khempeuh ni thum sungin Jerusalem ah hong kikhawm uh a
Ezra10:10 Tua ciangin siampi Ezra ding to-in amaute kiangah
Ezra10:11 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na pu na pate uh Pasian ahi Topaʼ tungah na mawhna uh pulak unla
Ezra10:12 Tua ciangin a kikhawm mi khempeuh in dawngin kiko uh a
Ezra10:13 Ahi zongin mi tampi hi hang a
Ezra10:14 A kikhawm mihonpiteʼ tangin i makaite semsak inla
Ezra10:15 Asahelʼ tapa Jonathan le Tikvahʼ tapa Jahzeiah tegel bek in hih thu nial uh a
Ezra10:16 Tua hi a
Ezra10:17 a kha masa a ni khat ni-in gamdang numei a teenpih miteʼ thu a kan uh a zo uh hi.

Ezra10:19 Amaute in a zite a mak ding uh kiciam uh a

Ezra10:22 Pashhur-te beh sung panin Elioenai
Ezra10:23 Levi mite sung panin Jozabad
Ezra10:24 Lasate sung panin Eliashib ahi hi. Kongcingte sung panin Shallum

Nehemiah1:1 Hakaliahʼ tapa Nehemiahʼ thugen hih bang ahi hi. A kum sawm nihna Khislev kha sungin kumpi khuapi Susa ah ka om laitakin
Nehemiah1:2 ka sanggampa Hanani le midang pawl khat Judah gam panin hong tung uh hi. Tua ciangin keimah in Jerusalem khua thu le sal a matna panin a suakta ahi a omsuak Judah miteʼ thu tawh kisai amaute kiangah ka dong hi.
Nehemiah1:3 Salsuahna panin a suakta
Nehemiah1:4 Hih thu ka zak ciangin tu sukin ka kap niloh a
Nehemiah1:5 Ka thungetna ah
Nehemiah1:6 Israel mi ahi na nasemteʼ tangin sun le zanin kong thunget nilohna a ngai dingin na bil hong ngat inla
Nehemiah1:7 Nangma tungah kong khial khin uh a
Nehemiah1:8 Na nasem Moses tungah
Nehemiah1:9 Ahi zongin kei kiangah hong ciahkikin ka thupiaknate zui-in na sep uh leh leimong dongah a kithehthang sa na mite uh kaikhawmin keima min om nadingin ka teelna sa munah amaute ka ciahpih ding hi
Nehemiah1:10 Topa aw
Nehemiah1:11 Keima hong thungetna le nangma min a zahtak nuam na nasemteʼ thungetna na bil hong ngat in. Tu-in kei tungah maavanna hong pia inla
Nehemiah2:1 Kumpi Artakzaksisʼ kum sawm nihna Nisan kha sungin khatvei
Nehemiah2:2 Amah in
Nehemiah2:3 kumpipa ka dawng a
Nehemiah2:4 Tua ciangin kumpipa in
Nehemiah2:5 tua khit ciangin kumpipa dawngin
Nehemiah2:6 Tua ciangin kumpipa in (kumpinu a gei ah tu kawmin)
Nehemiah2:7 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah
Nehemiah2:8 le biakinn hutna ding mun muanhuai kongpi ding
Nehemiah2:9 Tua ahih ciangin Eufratis Gun gal gam a uk sawn mite kiang ka tung a
Nehemiah2:10 Ahi zongin Israel miteʼ phattuam nading a sem dingin mi khat a paina thu Horonaim khuami Sanballat le Ammon mi sal ahi Tobiah in a zak uh ciangin nakpi takin lungkim lo uh hi.
Nehemiah2:11 Jerusalem khua ka tun ciangin ni thum sung ka tawlnga hi.
Nehemiah2:12 Tua ciangin zanin vak khia-in mi tawm khat ka tonpih hi. Ahi zongin Jerusalem adingin ka bawlsak ding ka Pasian in ka lungsimah hong suahsak thu kuama kiangah ka gen kei hi. Keima tuanna sim loh ganhing dang ka kizuisak kei hi.
Nehemiah2:13 Kuam Kongpi tawnin Gulpi Tuikhuk le Nin Kongpi lamah ka pai a
Nehemiah2:14 Tua ciangin Tuinak Kongpi le Kumpipaʼ Bual ah ka paisuak hi. Ahi zongin ka tuanna ganhing a paisuak theih nading mun om lo hi.
Nehemiah2:15 Tua hi a
Nehemiah2:16 Tua hi a
Nehemiah2:17 Tua ciangin amaute kiangah
Nehemiah2:18 Tua ciangin a dik ka Pasian in kei hong ompihna le kumpipa in kei tungah hong gen thute zong amaute tungah ka gen hi. Tua ciangin amaute in
Nehemiah2:19 Ahi zongin Horonaim khuami Sanballat
Nehemiah2:20 Tua ciangin amaute dawngin
Nehemiah3:1 Tua ciangin siampi lianpen pa Eliashib le a siampipihte in nasep kipanin Tuu Kongpi a bawl uh hi. Amaute in a khuamte le a zawlte bawlin a kongkhakte bulh uh hi. Amaute in Za Khat Tausang ciang banah Hananel Tausang dong sem uh a
Nehemiah3:2 A zomah Jerikho khua mite in sem uh hi. Amauteʼ zomah Imriʼ tapa Zakkur in sem hi.
Nehemiah3:3 Tua ciangin Hassenaahʼ tapate in Ngasa Kongpi bawl uh hi. Amaute in a zawlte khungin a kongkhakte a kalhna bulh uh hi.
Nehemiah3:4 Amauteʼ zomah Hakkozʼ tapa Uriah
Nehemiah3:5 A zom kik ah Tekoa khua mite in puah uh a
Nehemiah3:6 Tua ciangin Paseahʼ tapa Joiada le Besodeiahʼ tapa Meshullam in Jeshanah Kongpi puah uh a
Nehemiah3:7 Amauteʼ zomah Gibeon le Mizpah khuami ahi
Nehemiah3:8 Tua zomah kham seek pa Harhaiahʼ tapa Uzziel in puah a
Nehemiah3:9 Amauteʼ zomah Jerusalem gam phel khat a uk
Nehemiah3:10 A zomah Harumafʼ tapa Jedaiah in ama inn mai san teng puah hi. Tua ciangin a zomah Hashabneiahʼ tapa Hattush in puah hi.
Nehemiah3:11 Harimʼ tapa Malkhijah le Pahathmoabʼ tapa Hasshub in Meikhuk Tausang a huam khawk dang khat sung puah uh hi.
Nehemiah3:12 Amauteʼ zomah Jerusalem gam a phel khat a uk
Nehemiah3:13 Hanun le Zanoah khua-a teeng mite in Kuam Kongpi puah uh hi. Amaute in tua kongpi bawl pha-in a kongkhakte a kalhna bulh uh a
Nehemiah3:14 Beth-hakkherem gam a uk
Nehemiah3:15 Mizpah gam a uk
Nehemiah3:16 Ama zomah Bethzur gam phel khat a uk
Nehemiah3:17 Ama zomah a puah Levi mite: Baniʼ tapa Rehum hi a
Nehemiah3:18 Ama zomah a puah a behte: Keilah gam phel khat a uk
Nehemiah3:19 A zomah Mizpah gam a uk
Nehemiah3:20 Ama zomah Zabbaiʼ tapa Baruk in a Kiu panin siampi lianpen pa Eliashibʼ inn kongkhak ciang dong khawk khat sung puah hi.
Nehemiah3:21 Ama zomah Hakkozʼ tapa Uriah
Nehemiah3:22 Ama zomah Jerusalem kiimnai-a om siampite in puah uh hi.
Nehemiah3:23 A zomah Benjamin le Hasshub in amauʼ inn mai san puah uh hi. A zomah Ananiahʼ tapa Maaseiah
Nehemiah3:24 Ama zomah Henadadʼ tapa Binnui in Azariahʼ inn panin a Kiu
Nehemiah3:25 le kulh kiu ciang khawk khat sung puah hi. Uzaiʼ tapa Palal in a Kiu gal san teng le kumpipaʼ inn panin hong dawk khia
Nehemiah3:26 Ama zomah Paroshʼ tapa Pedaiah in nisuahna lam manawhin Tui Kongpi gal san ciang le tausang dawk puah hi.
Nehemiah3:27 Ama zomah Tekoa khua mite in a lian tausang dawk panin Ofel mualbo kulh ciang
Nehemiah3:28 Sakol Kongpi tung san teng ahihleh siampite in amauʼ inn mai san ciat puah uh hi.
Nehemiah3:29 Amauteʼ zomah Immerʼ tapa Zadok in ama inn mai san puah hi. Ama zomah Nisuahna Kongpi a cing
Nehemiah3:30 Ama zomah Shemaiahʼ tapa Hananiah le Zalafʼ tapa gukna Hanun in khawk dang khat sung puah uh hi. Amau zomah Berekhiahʼ tapa Meshullam in ama inn dei mai san teng puah hi.
Nehemiah3:31 Ama zomah kham seek pa Malkhijah in Kikaihkhopna Kongpi mai san a om biakinn nasemteʼ inn le sumbukteʼ inn ciang le a kiu-a inn dei tungnung ciang dong puah hi.
Nehemiah3:32 Tua ciangin kham seekte le sumbukte in a kiu-a inn dei tungnung le Tuu Kongpi kikal a puah uh hi.
Nehemiah4:1 Sanballat in koteʼ kulh cianna thu a zak ciangin lungkim loin heh mahmah a
Nehemiah4:2 Amah in a kikholhpihte le Samaria galkapteʼ kiangah
Nehemiah4:3 Ama kiangah a om Ammon mi Tobiah in
Nehemiah4:4 Tua ciangin keimah Nehemiah in thu ka ngen a
Nehemiah4:5 Amaute in a langtangin kulh ciangteʼ mai ah nang hong hehsak uh ahih manin amauʼ mawhna maisak kei inla
Nehemiah4:6 Tua ahih ciangin kulh ka ciang uh a
Nehemiah4:7 Ahi zongin Sanballat
Nehemiah4:8 Tua hi a
Nehemiah4:9 Tua ahih ciangin ka Pasian uh tungah thu ka ngen uh a
Nehemiah4:10 Tua ciangin Judah gam mite in
Nehemiah4:11 Tua ciangin ka galte un
Nehemiah4:12 Amaute lakah a teeng Jew mite khuapi sungah hong pai ciangin
Nehemiah4:13 Tua ahih ciangin kulh nung lam mun niam penna mun awng tengah a namsau uh
Nehemiah4:14 Miteʼ launa ka muh ciangin
Nehemiah4:15 Amauʼ hong sawmna thu kote in ka phawkna uh le Pasian in amauʼ geelna a suksiatna thu ka galte un thei uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka nasepna ciat uh kulh tungah ka vekpi-un ka kuankik uh hi.
Nehemiah4:16 Tua hun a kipanin ka khutnuai-a om mite kim khat in na sem a
Nehemiah4:17 Kulh-a cian ding na a nawn mite in a khut lang khat uh tawh a van puak uh lenin a khut lang khat uh ah galhiam tawi uh hi.
Nehemiah4:18 Kulh ciangte in na a sep kawmun a kawng ciat uh ah a namsau uh kuah uh hi. Peengkul tum pa ahihleh keima kiangah om hi.
Nehemiah4:19 Tua ciangin mi liante
Nehemiah4:20 Peengkul kitum na zakna peuhpeuh panun ko kiangah hong kikhawm un. I Pasian in eite adingin hong dosak ding hi
Nehemiah4:21 Tua hi a
Nehemiah4:22 Tua hun mahin mite kiangah
Nehemiah4:23 Tua ahih ciangin keimah a kipan ka behte
Nehemiah5:1 Tu-in mi nautang numei le pasalte in a Jew mipihte uh tungah lungkim lohna kam hong gingsak uh hi.
Nehemiah5:2 Mi pawl khatte in an lei nadingin a tanute uh le a tapate uh a piakna thu hong gen uh hi.
Nehemiah5:3 Pawl khatte in kial tun huhau-in an lei nadingin a lote
Nehemiah5:4 Pawl khatte in kumpipa tungah siah piak dingin a lote uh le a leenggui lote uh khamin a piakna uh hong gen uh hi.
Nehemiah5:5 Amaute in
Nehemiah5:6 Amauteʼ kikona le hih thute ka zak ciangin ka heh mahmah hi.
Nehemiah5:7 Kei zong hih thu limtakin ka ngaihsun a
Nehemiah5:8 “Minam dangte tungah sal a kizuak sa i Jew mipihte ahi zo zahzahin i tanhkik hi. Tua hi napi-in note in na mipihte uh na zuak uh a
Nehemiah5:9 Tua ciangin keimah in
Nehemiah5:10 Kei le ka behte le ka nasemte in zong an le sum leitawi-in ka pia khia uh hi. Leiba manin mi kilakna phiat ni.
Nehemiah5:11 Tu ni mahmah in a lote
Nehemiah5:12 Tua ciangin amaute in
Nehemiah5:13 Tua ciangin kei zong ka puan singin
Nehemiah5:14 Tua tham loin
Nehemiah5:15 Keima hun ma-in a ukte in mite tungah van gikpi suan uh a
Nehemiah5:16 Hih kulh cianna ah kei mahmah in zong ka sem a
Nehemiah5:17 Kiim le pam a minam dangteʼ kiang pan hong paite banah
Nehemiah5:18 Nisimin inn sung annek tawm dinga kibawl bawngtal khat le tuu limci guk ahi hi. Tua mah bangin ak zong kibawl a
Nehemiah5:19 Pasian aw
Nehemiah6:1 Kongpite ah kongkhak ka bulh nai loh uh hangin
Nehemiah6:2 Sanballat le Geshem zong Ono zanglei sunga om Hakkofirim khua ah pai-in amaute tawh thu a kikum dingin hong sam uh hi. Hih pen kei hong suksiat nopna uh ahi hi.
Nehemiah6:3 Tua ahih ciangin kei zong amaute kiangah kamtaite ka sawl a
Nehemiah6:4 Amaute in tu-a bangmahin li vei tak hong sam uh a
Nehemiah6:5 Tua bangmahin Sanballat in a nga veina hong sam a
Nehemiah6:6 A laikhak sungah
Nehemiah6:7 Judah gam in kumpi khat nei ta hi
Nehemiah6:8 Tua ciangin keimah in
Nehemiah6:9 Kote in ka hanciamna uh khiamin nasep a kizawh loh nading deihna tawh amaute in kote hong lausak theih nading uh a hanciam uh ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka hahkat semsem zaw uh hi.
Nehemiah6:10 Mehetabelʼ tapa Delaiah
Nehemiah6:11 Ahih hangin keimah in
Nehemiah6:12 Tua ciangin a thusim ka phawk khia hi. Pasian in tua bang thu a gen dingin amah a sawl hi lo a
Nehemiah6:13 Ama thugen bangin gamta-in mawhna ka bawl theih nadingin keimah hong lausak nadingin a kicial ahi hi. Tua bangin zui kha leng kei hong minsiasakin hong simmawh ding uh hi.
Nehemiah6:14 Ka Pasian aw
Nehemiah6:15 Elul kha ni sawm nih le nga ni-in kulh kizo a
Nehemiah6:16 Ka galte un hih thu za-in
Nehemiah6:17 Hih hun sungteng khempeuh Jew uliante in Tobiah kiangah lai tampi khak uh a
Nehemiah6:18 Tobiah pen Arahʼ tapa Shekaniahʼ makpa hi a
Nehemiah6:19 Amaute in ama hoihnate zong keima zak ah hong gen uh a
Nehemiah7:1 Kulh kiciang khinin
Nehemiah7:2 ka sanggampa Hanani le biakinn a uk Hananiah in a et dingin Jerusalem ka pia hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Hananiah pen midang tampi sangin a citak zaw
Nehemiah7:3 Tua hi a
Nehemiah7:4 Khuapi lianin zai a
Nehemiah7:5 Tua ciangin uliante
Nehemiah7:6 Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in a zawhna gam panin salin a lak mite sung panin hih mite pen Zerubbabel
Nehemiah7:7 
Nehemiah7:8 Parosh suante - mi tul nih za khat sawm sagih le nih ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:9 Shefatiah suante - mi za thum sawm sagih le nih ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:10 Arah suante - mi za guk sawm nga le nih ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:11 Pahath-moab-te beh sung panin Jeshua le Joab suante - mi tul nih za giat le sawm le giat ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:12 Elam suante - mi tul khat za nih sawm nga le li ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:13 Zattu suante - mi za giat sawm li le nga ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:14 Zakkai suante - mi za sagih sawm guk ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:15 Binnui suante - mi za guk sawm li le giat ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:16 Bebai suante - mi za guk sawm nih le giat ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:17 Azgad suante - mi tul nih za thum sawm nih le nih ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:18 Adonikam suante - mi za guk sawm guk le sagih ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:19 Bigvai suante - mi tul nih sawm guk le sagih ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:20 Adin suante - mi za guk sawm nga le nga ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:21 Ater a kici Hezekiahʼ suante - mi sawm kua le giat ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:22 Hashum suante - mi za thum sawm nih le giat ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:23 Bezai suante - mi za thum sawm nih le li ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:24 Harif suante - mi za khat sawm le nih ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:25 Gibeon suante - mi sawm kua le nga ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:26 Bethlehem le Netofah khuami - za khat sawm giat le giat ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:27 Anathoth khuami - za khat sawm nih le giat ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:28 Beth-azmaveth khuami - sawm li le nih ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:29 Kiriath-jearim
Nehemiah7:30 Ramah le Geba khuami - za guk sawm nih le khat ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:31 Mikmash khuami - za khat sawm nih le nih ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:32 Bethel le Ai khuami - za khat sawm nih le thum ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:33 Nebo a dang khat khuami - sawm nga le nih ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:34 Elam a dang khat suante - tul khat za nih sawm nga le li ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:35 Harim khuami - za thum sawm nih ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:36 Jerikho khuami - za thum sawm li le nga ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:37 Lod
Nehemiah7:38 Senaah khuami - tul thum za kua sawm thum ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:39 Siampite sung panin: Jeshua-te beh panin Jedaiah suante - za kua sawm sagih le thum ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:40 Immer suante - mi tul khat sawm nga le nih ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:41 Pashhur suante - mi tul khat za nih sawm li le sagih ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:42 Harim suante - mi tul khat sawm le sagih ahi uh hi.
Nehemiah7:43 Levi mite sung panin: Hodevah te beh panin Jeshua suante le Kadmiel suante - sawm sagih le li ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:44 Lasate sung panin Asaf suante - mi za khat sawm li le giat ahi hi.
Nehemiah7:45 Kongcingte nam sung panin Shallum suante
Nehemiah7:46 Biakinn nasemte sung panin a hong ciahkikte: Ziha suante
Nehemiah7:47 Keros suante
Nehemiah7:48 Lebana suante
Nehemiah7:49 Hanan suante
Nehemiah7:50 Reaiah suante
Nehemiah7:51 Gazzam suante
Nehemiah7:52 Besai suante
Nehemiah7:53 Bakbuk suante
Nehemiah7:54 Bazlith suante
Nehemiah7:55 Barkos suante
Nehemiah7:56 Neziah suante le Hatifa suante ahi uh hi.
Nehemiah7:57 Solomonʼ nasemteʼ suanlekhakte sung panin: Sotai suante
Nehemiah7:58 Jaala suante
Nehemiah7:59 Shefatiah suante
Nehemiah7:60 Biakinn nasemte le Solomonʼ nasemteʼ suanlekhakte mi a vekpi-in za thum sawm kua le nih a pha uh hi.
Nehemiah7:61 Temelah
Nehemiah7:62 Delaiah suante
Nehemiah7:63 Siampiteʼ sung panin zong: Hobaiah suante
Nehemiah7:64 Hih mite in khang ciaptehna sungah a kiciamteh mite lakah amauʼ min a zon uh hangin mu lo uh ahih manin amaute a siang loin seh uh a
Nehemiah7:65 Tua hi a
Nehemiah7:66 Mi a vekpi-in tul sawm li tul nih za thum sawm guk pha a
Nehemiah7:67 amauteʼ nasem numei le pasal tul sagih za thum sawm thum le sagihte kisim lo lai hi. Tua banah amaute in lasa numei le pasal za nih sawm li nga nei uh hi.
Nehemiah7:68 Amauʼ sakol za sagih sawm thum guk
Nehemiah7:69 a kalaoh uh za li sawm thum nga le a late uh tul guk za sagih sawm nih a pha hi.
Nehemiah7:70 Beh lutang mi pawl khat in nasep nadingin nate pia uh hi. Gam ukpa in van manpha koihna ah kham darik tul khat
Nehemiah7:71 Tua ciangin beh lutang pawl khatte in van manpha koihna ah kham darik tul sawm nih le ngun mina tul nih za nih a pia uh hi.
Nehemiah7:72 Tua ciangin midangteʼ piakte pen kham darik tul sawm nih
Nehemiah7:73 Tua ciangin siampite
Nehemiah8:1 Kha sagihna hong cin ciangin Israel mite amauʼ khuapi ciatah teeng khin uh hi. Tua ciangin Tui Kongpi mai tualpi ah mi khempeuh khekhat khai bangin hong kikhawm tuah diam hi. Tua ciangin Topa in Israel mite tungah a piak ahi Moses thukham laibu pen lai thei pa Ezra in hong paipih nadingin a gen uh hi.
Nehemiah8:2 Tua hi a
Nehemiah8:3 Tua ciangin amah in Tui Kongpi mai-a om tualpi lam mai ngatin zingsang tung a kipan sun ciang dong
Nehemiah8:4 Tua ciangin thugenna dinga sing tawh kibawl tau tungah lai thei pa Ezra ding to a
Nehemiah8:5 Mi khempeuh sangin a sang zaw munah amah om ahih manin mi khempeuhʼ muh theih dingin Ezra in a laibu a hong hi. A laibu a hon ciangin mi khempeuh a ding uh hi.
Nehemiah8:6 Tua ciangin Ezra in a lian Pasian
Nehemiah8:7 Mite amauʼ omna san ciatah a om sungun mite in thukham a tel theih nadingun Levi mi Jeshua
Nehemiah8:8 Amaute in Pasianʼ thukham laibu sung panin a kitel takin sim uh a
Nehemiah8:9 Tua ciangin a gam ukpa Nehemiah
Nehemiah8:10 Tua ciangin amah in amaute kiangah
Nehemiah8:11 Tua ahih ciangin Levi mite in mite gamdaisak a
Nehemiah8:12 Tua ahih ciangin mi khempeuh an ne tui dawnin midangte a kholh ding le lungdam a om dingin a ciah uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute tungah a kigen thute amaute in a thei tel uh hi.
Nehemiah8:13 A ni nih ni-in thukham sin dingin siampite le Levi mite tawh beh lutang khempeuh lai thei pa Ezra kiangah hong kikhawm uh hi.
Nehemiah8:14 Tua ciangin
Nehemiah8:15 
Nehemiah8:16 Tua ahih ciangin mite kuan khia-in tua sing hiangte hong pua-in amauʼ inn khumzang ciat le a inntual uh le Pasianʼ biakinn tual
Nehemiah8:17 Tua hi a
Nehemiah8:18 Tua hi a

Nehemiah9:4 Levi miteʼ kahlei tungah Jeshua
Nehemiah9:5 Tua ciangin Levi mi Jeshua
Nehemiah9:6 Nang bek Topa na hi hi. Nangmah in a sang pen vantung le van a om khempeuh
Nehemiah9:7 Nang pen Abram teelin Khaldea gam Ur khuapi panin paikhiat pihin Abraham min a phuak Pasian
Nehemiah9:8 Nangma tungah amah a cihtakna na mu a
Nehemiah9:9 “‘Nangmah in Egypt gam sunga ka pute ka pate uhʼ gimna mu-in San Tuipi ah hong kikona uh na za a
Nehemiah9:10 amaute in ka pu ka pate uh kihihsakna tawh a hih gawpna thei na hih manin Faro le a nasemte le a gam mi khempeuh langpangin lim le nalamdang na bawl hi. Tua hi a
Nehemiah9:11 Amauteʼ mai ah tuipi phel kham na hih manin tuipi laizang lei keu tungah amaute paisuak uh a
Nehemiah9:12 Sunin meii khuam khat tawh amaute lam na lak a
Nehemiah9:13 Sinai Mual tungah kum sukin
Nehemiah9:14 na nasem pa Moses tungtawnin amaute tungah na Sabbath siangtho na theisak a
Nehemiah9:15 A gilkialna uh a vahsak dingin vantung panin an na pia a
Nehemiah9:16 “‘Ahi zongin koteʼ pute pate kihisakin lungkhauh uh a
Nehemiah9:17 Amaute in thu mang nuam lo uh a
Nehemiah9:18 Amaute in a kisung bawng no khat amau mah adingin bawlin
Nehemiah9:19 nang in na hehpih mahmah manin amaute gamlak ah na nusia kei hi. Sunin lam a lak meii khuam in amaute nusia lo a
Nehemiah9:20 Amaute hoihtakin thu na hilh a
Nehemiah9:21 Kum sawm li tawntung gamlak ah amaute na vak a
Nehemiah9:22 Nangmah in amaute tungah kumpi gamte le mite na pia a
Nehemiah9:23 Nangmah in amauʼ suanlekhakte van a aksi zahin sim zawh lohin na tamsak a
Nehemiah9:24 A suan a khakte uh tua gamah lutin a lak uh ciangin
Nehemiah9:25 Tua hi a
Nehemiah9:26 “‘Ahi zongin amaute in demnopna lungsim nei-in nang hong lehdo uh hi. Amaute in na thukham nungngat uh a
Nehemiah9:27 Hih thu hangin a galte uh khut sungah amaute na ap a
Nehemiah9:28 Ahi zongin a tawldam khit uh ciangin nangma muhna ah a sia gamta zel uh a
Nehemiah9:29 Tua hi a
Nehemiah9:30 Kum tampi sung lungduaina tawh amaute na thuak a
Nehemiah9:31 Ahi ta zongin na hehpihna lian hangin amaute beisak loin
Nehemiah9:32 “‘Tua ahih ciangin tu-in a lian
Nehemiah9:33 Kote tungah hong tung sa thu khempeuh ah nang a thutang na hi a
Nehemiah9:34 Ka kumpite uh
Nehemiah9:35 Amaute tungah na piak gamzai leihoih ah omin
Nehemiah9:36 Tu-in kote sal ka hi uh hi. Ka pu ka pate un a leitang pan a piangte ne-in a na hoih khempeuhte nuam takin a ngah nadingun na piak gam hih lai munah kote sal ka hi ta uh hi.
Nehemiah9:37 Tu-in leitang tunga piang khempeuh pen koteʼ mawhna hangin koteʼ tungah nong koih kumpite tungah tung ta hi. Tua kumpite in kote tungah thu hong nei-in
Nehemiah9:38 Hih thute khempeuh hangin a kip thuciamna khat bawlin lai-in ka gelh uh a

Nehemiah10:33 
Nehemiah10:34 Tua ciangin thukham sunga a kigelh bangin a kiseh hunin a kumkumin Topa eiteʼ Pasianʼ biakna tau tungah cih dingin beh a banbanin i Pasianʼ biakinn sungah sing a kitut nadingin siampite
Nehemiah10:35 I leitang panin a piang anpalte le singgah kungte panin a gah masa khempeuh a kumkumin Topaʼ biakinn ah puak ding ka kiciam uh hi.
Nehemiah10:36 Thukham sunga kigelh mah bangin i Pasianʼ biakinn ah a om
Nehemiah10:37 le annel lom meek masak pen siampite tungah puak ding le gah nei sing khempeuh panin a gah masa
Nehemiah10:38 Levi mite in sawm-ah-khat a khop uh ciangin Aaronʼ suan siampite tawh hih khawm ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Levi mite in i Pasianʼ biakinn sunga vankoihna a kilawm mun inn deite ah sawm-ah-khat a ngah uh sung pan sawm-ah-khat puak sawn ding uh hi.
Nehemiah10:39 Bang hang hiam cih leh biakinn umlebeelte a kikoihna inn deite le na a sem siampite
Nehemiah11:1 Tua ciangin Jerusalem ah mi makaite teeng uh hi. Tua lo midang teng
Nehemiah11:2 Tua hi a
Nehemiah11:3 Hih a nuai-ate pen Jerusalem-a a teeng a uk sawn ukpite ahi uh hi. Ahi zongin Judah khuapi dangte ah Israel midangte
Nehemiah11:4 Judah minam le Benjamin minam sung panin mi pawl khat zong Jerusalem ah teeng uh hi. Perezʼ suan Mahalalel
Nehemiah11:5 le Shelahʼ suan Zekhariah
Nehemiah11:6 Jerusalem ah a teeng Perezʼ suante khempeuh galhang mi za li sawm guk le giat a pha uh hi.
Nehemiah11:7 Jeshaiahʼ tapa Ithiel
Nehemiah11:8 le a beh Gabbai le Sallai hi uh a
Nehemiah11:9 Zikriʼ tapa Joel pen amauʼ mapi hi a
Nehemiah11:10 Pasianʼ biakinn a uk Ahitubʼ tapa Meraioth
Nehemiah11:11 
Nehemiah11:12 le inn nasep a sem a behte hi uh a
Nehemiah11:13 le beh lutang ahi a beh dangte hi a
Nehemiah11:14 le a thahat a vanglian a behte hi a
Nehemiah11:15 Bunniʼ tapa Hashabiah
Nehemiah11:16 le Pasianʼ biakinn pualam nasep a uk
Nehemiah11:17 le lungdam koh thungetna patkhiat ding a makai Asaf
Nehemiah11:18 Khuapi siangtho sungah Levi mi a om khempeuh mi za nih sawm giat le li a pha uh hi.
Nehemiah11:19 Akkub
Nehemiah11:20 A om lai Israel-te
Nehemiah11:21 Ahi zongin biakinn nasemte ahihleh Ofel mualbo ah teeng uh a
Nehemiah11:22 Jerusalem-a Levi mite ukin Pasianʼ biakinn nasepna a vaan pa pen Mikaʼ tapa Mattaniah
Nehemiah11:23 Tuate beh in kumpipaʼ thupiakna tawh na sem uh a
Nehemiah11:24 Tua ciangin Judahʼ tapa Zerah
Nehemiah11:25 Khuaneute le a kiim a lote tawh kisai-in: Mi pawl khatteʼ teenna pen Kiriath-arba le a khuaneute

Nehemiah11:34 Hadid
Nehemiah11:35 Lod
Nehemiah11:36 Tua ciangin Judah gam a Levi mite pawl khat Benjamin gamah kigawm hi.

Nehemiah12:4 Iddo
Nehemiah12:5 Mijamin
Nehemiah12:6 Shemaiah
Nehemiah12:7 Sallu
Nehemiah12:8 Jeshua
Nehemiah12:9 Tua ciangin a sanggamte uh Bakbukiah le Unno in amaute tawh kigalsai-in omin a dawng uh hi.
Nehemiah12:10 Tua hi a
Nehemiah12:11 Joiada pen Jonathanʼ pa
Nehemiah12:12 Tua ciangin Joiakim hun lai-in beh lutang ahi siampite: Seraiah suante sung panin Meraiah
Nehemiah12:13 Ezra suante sung panin Meshullam
Nehemiah12:14 Malukhi suante sung panin Jonathan

Nehemiah12:22 Eliashib

Nehemiah12:24 Tua ciangin Levi mi ukpite: Hashabiah
Nehemiah12:25 Mattaniah
Nehemiah12:26 Hih pen Jozadakʼ tapa Jeshua
Nehemiah12:27 Tua ciangin amaute in daltuahte
Nehemiah12:28 Tua hi a
Nehemiah12:29 Beth-gilgal khua le Geba kiimnai le Beth-azmaveth khua panin zong hong pai uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh lasate pawl in Jerusalem kiimah amau adingin khuaneute sat uh hi.
Nehemiah12:30 Tua ciangin siampite le Levi mite amau mah kisiansuah tawm uh a
Nehemiah12:31 Tua ciangin khuapi kulhzang ah Judah mi uliante ka paipih a

Nehemiah12:33 le Azariah
Nehemiah12:34 Judah

Nehemiah12:37 Tuinak Kongpi panin kulh kah tohna David khuapi kahlei ah pai to-in
Nehemiah12:38 Lungdamna a ko a pawldang khat pen veilam manawhin pai uh a
Nehemiah12:39 tua panin Efraim Kongpi
Nehemiah12:40 Tua hi a
Nehemiah12:41 Tua ciangin siampi Eliakim
Nehemiah12:42 Maaseiah
Nehemiah12:43 Pasian in nakpi takin amaute lungdamsak ahih manin amaute in tua ni-in biakpiakna lian tampi pia-in lungdam uh a
Nehemiah12:44 Tua ciangin khuapiteʼ kiimah lo omte panin a golna le a neuna tawh kizui-in siampite le Levi mite adingin thukham sunga om bangin a kaihkhop ding uh a kipia nate
Nehemiah12:45 Tua hi a
Nehemiah12:46 Bang hang hiam cih leh Davidʼ hun lai-in lasate a ukpi le phatna le lungdamkohna a makai-in Asaf om hi.
Nehemiah12:47 Zerubbabel le Nehemiahʼ hun lai-in Israel mite khempeuh in lasate le kongcingte adingin a nisim tanh uh pia uh a
Nehemiah13:1 Tua ciangin amaute in mipiʼ zakin Mosesʼ laibute sim uh a
Nehemiah13:2 bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in anletui tawh Israel mite na dawn lo uh a
Nehemiah13:3 Mite in hih thukham a zak uh ciangin Israel mite lak panin gamdang suan peuhmah khen khia uh hi.
Nehemiah13:4 Ahi zongin tua hun ma-in
Nehemiah13:5 Levi mite
Nehemiah13:6 Babylon kumpipa Artakzaksis in a uk kum sawm thum le nihna kumin ama kiangah pai ka hih manin hih thu a pian laitakin Jerusalem ah ka om kei hi. Tawl khat khit ciangin kumpipa kiangah a khuan ka ngen a
Nehemiah13:7 Jerusalem ah ka ciahkik hi. Tua ciangin Tobiah adingin Pasianʼ biakinn huang sungah inn dei khat a vaihawmsakna thu
Nehemiah13:8 Hih thu ah lungkim het lo ka hih manin inn dei sung panin Tobiahʼ van teng ka lawn khia hi.
Nehemiah13:9 Tua ciangin tua inn dei a siansak nading uh le Pasianʼ biakinn-a umlebeelte
Nehemiah13:10 Levi miteʼ ngah dingte amauʼ tungah kipia lo ahih manin Levi mite le lasate in a nasep ngeite uh nusia-in a lote uh ah na a sepna uh zong ka phawk khia hi.
Nehemiah13:11 Tua ahih ciangin uliante tungah ka lungkim kei a
Nehemiah13:12 Tua ciangin Judah mite khempeuh in an
Nehemiah13:13 Tua ciangin tua vankoihna innte a kem dingin siampi Shelemiah
Nehemiah13:14 Ka Pasian aw
Nehemiah13:15 Tua hun lai-in Judah gam sungah mite in Sabbath ni-in leenggah sukin
Nehemiah13:16 Jerusalem khua sunga teeng Taia khua mite in zong ngasa le van namkim hong paipihin Judah mite tung le Jerusalem khua sungah Sabbath ni-in zuak uh hi.
Nehemiah13:17 Tua ciangin Judah uliante tungah lungkim loin amaute kiangah
Nehemiah13:18 Na pu na pate uh tu-a bang teekin a gamtat manin eite tung le hih khuapi tungah hih bang siatna khempeuh hong tung hi lo ahi hiam? Tua hi napi-in note in Sabbath ni nitsakna tawh Israel tungah hehna tam zaw na tungsak uh hi
Nehemiah13:19 Tua hi a
Nehemiah13:20 Tua ahih manin sumbukte le na nam tuamtuam a zuakte
Nehemiah13:21 Ahi zongin amaute hilh kholin amaute kiangah
Nehemiah13:22 Tua ciangin Sabbath ni a siangtho-in a omsak theih nadingun amaute kisiansuah tawmin kongpite hong cin nadingun Levi mite ka sawl hi. Ka Pasian aw
Nehemiah13:23 Tua hun lai mahin zong Judah mite in Ashdod numei
Nehemiah13:24 le a tate uh kim khat in Ashdod kampau a zatna le Judah kampau zang thei loin
Nehemiah13:25 Amaute tai gawpin ka samsia a
Nehemiah13:26 Israel kumpipa Solomon zong tua bang numeiteʼ hangin khial hi lo ahi hiam? Minam tampite lakah amah tawh a kibang kumpi khat zong om lo a
Nehemiah13:27 Tua ahih ciangin Solomon aw
Nehemiah13:28 Siampi lianpen pa Eliashibʼ tapa Jehoiadaʼ tapate khat pen Horonaim khuami Sanballatʼ makpa na hi hi. Tua ahih manin keima kiang panin amah ka hawl khia hi.
Nehemiah13:29 Ka Pasian aw
Nehemiah13:30 Tua bangin gamdang tawh a kizom nate khempeuh panin amaute ka siangsak a
Nehemiah13:31 Tua ciangin a kiseh hunin zat dingin cih ding sing tawh biakna le anpal tawh biakna ding ka vaihawmsak hi. Ka Pasian aw
Esther1:1 Hih lai-a kigelh thupiangte pen India gam panin Ethiopia gam dong
Esther1:2 Hih hun laitakin kumpi khua ahi Susa khuapi sunga kumpi tokhom tungah amah tu hi.
Esther1:3 Ama uk a kum thumna kumin ama nuai-a a uliante khempeuh le a nasemte adingin pawi khat bawlsak hi. Ama khutnuai-a om Persia le Media galkap maangte le ama nuai-a uliante le ama nuai ah gam a uksawnte a om laitakin
Esther1:4 a kumpi gam hauhna le ama thupi ziazuana ni tampi sung
Esther1:5 Hih pawi hun a bei khit ciangin kumpi khua Susa khuapi sunga om mi lian mi neu mi khempeuh adingin kumpipa in pawi khat a bawl hi. Tua pawi pen kumpi inn huang sungah kibawl a
Esther1:6 Tua huang sungah suangkang khuamte kiphut a
Esther1:7 Kham hai nam tuamtuamte tawh zu kihawm a
Esther1:8 Tua lai ah zunekna zia pen kihah piak cih om lo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh mi khempeuh in amauʼ duh zahzah bek a neksakna ding uh kumpipa in a nuai-a a uliante thu pia hi.
Esther1:9 Tua banah Kumpinu Vashti in zong numeite adingin Kumpipa Ahasuerasʼ inn sung mahah pawi khat a bawl hi.
Esther1:10 A ni sagih ni
Esther1:11 
Esther1:12 Ahih hangin Kumpinu Vashti in innsung maangteʼ thupuak kumpipaʼ sapna a nial hi. Hih a nialna thu ah kumpipa heh mahmah a
Esther1:13 Tua ciangin kumpipa in upadi siam a mipilte thu dong hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh upadi le biakna lam thu theite khempeuh thu dot pen kumpipaʼ zat ngei khat ahi hi.
Esther1:14 Ama gei nai pen ah a tu mite pen Persia le Media gam ulian sagihte ahi Karshena
Esther1:15 “Inn sung mangteʼ tungtawnin keimah kumpi Ahasuerasʼ thupiakna bangin Kumpinu Vashti gamta lo ahih manin Kumpinu Vashti tungah upadi tawh kizui-in bangci kihih ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi.
Esther1:16 Tua ciangin kumpipa le ulianteʼ zakin Memukan in dawng a
Esther1:17 Kumpinuʼ gamtatna thu numei dangte khempeuh in thei ding uh a
Esther1:18 Hih banga kumpinuʼ gamtatna thu a za Persia le Media gam numei liante in kumpipa nuai-a uliante tungah tu ni mahmah in hih thu gen ding uh a
Esther1:19 Kumpipa in hoih na sak leh
Esther1:20 Tua banga kumpipaʼ thupiakna thu kumpi gam sung khempeuh ah a kizak ciangin numei khempeuh in a neu a lian amauʼ pasal ciat zahtak ding uh hi
Esther1:21 Kumpipa le uliante in hih ngaihsutna hoih sa uh a
Esther1:22 Pasal khempeuh pen ama inn sung ukpa ahih nading le ama kampau a kizuih kim nadingin kumpipaʼ ukna gam khempeuh ah amauʼ lai ciat le mi khempeuh tungah amauʼ pau ciatin laikhakte kigelh hi.
Esther2:1 Hih thu teng a pian khit
Esther2:2 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipaʼ nasemte in ama kiangah
Esther2:3 Kumpi khua ahi Susa khuapi a numeiteʼ omna ah a melhoih nungak khangno khempeuh hong paipih nadingun na ukna gam tuamtuam khempeuh ah uliante sawl in. Tua numeite pen numeite a uk
Esther2:4 Tua sung panin kumpipaʼ deih bel nungak pen Vashtiʼ tangin kumpinu suak hen
Esther2:5 Tu-in kumpi khua Susa khuapi sungah Benjamin minam Kish
Esther2:6 Amah pen
Esther2:7 Amah in a innlak pate khatʼ tanu
Esther2:8 Kumpipaʼ thupiakna kithei kimin
Esther2:9 Amah in tua nungak hoih sa-in pakta mahmah ahih manin paknamtuite le a annek ding pia pah a
Esther2:10 Mordekai in kham ahih manin Esther in ama namlephung gen khia lo hi.
Esther2:11 Esther bangci om a
Esther2:12 Numeite a kigin hun a vekpi-in kha sawm le nih sung hi a
Esther2:13 Kigin kholhna hun cing a
Esther2:14 Nitakin kumpipa kiangah va pai a
Esther2:15 Mordekai in ama tanu dingin a lak a innlak pa Abihailʼ tanu Esther pen kumpipa kiangah a pai ding hun a tun ciangin
Esther2:16 Ama uk a kum sagihna
Esther2:17 kumpipa in ama numei dangte khempeuh sangin it zaw a
Esther2:18 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Esther pahtawina-in ama uliante le a nasem khempeuh adingin pawi lianpi khat a bawl hi. Amah in ama ukna gam khempeuh ah tua ni nasep khawlin zum a khak nading uh zong thu zasak kim a
Esther2:19 Tua hun sungin Mordekai in kumpi nasep a ngah hi.
Esther2:20 Ama hilhna tawh kizui-in Esther in ama minam ahi a
Esther2:21 Ni khat
Esther2:22 Hih thu Mordekai in phawkin Kumpinu Esther kiangah ko a
Esther2:23 A thu kikanin a manna a kitheih ciangin khuampite tungah tua mi nih tegel kikhailum hi. Hih thupiangte khempeuh kumpipaʼ theihin Kumpi Gam Tangthu Laibu sungah kiciamteh hi.
Esther3:1 Hih thute khit ciangin Kumpipa Ahasueras in Agag-te beh Hammedathaʼ tapa Haman a za khangsak a
Esther3:2 Tua ahih ciangin kumpi huang sunga om kumpipaʼ nasem khempeuh in Haman zahtak bawlin ama mai ah kun uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua banga a hih ding uh kumpipa in thu pia hi. Ahih hangin Mordekai pen amah zahtakna limin a mai ah kun lo hi.
Esther3:3 Tua ciangin kumpipaʼ huang sunga om kumpipaʼ nasemte in Mordekai kiangah
Esther3:4 Nisimin amaute in Mordekai kiangah gengen uh a
Esther3:5 Ama mai ah Mordekai a kun lohna
Esther3:6 Amah in Mordekaiʼ mipihte a theih ciangin amah bek suk taak sa lo a
Esther3:7 Kumpi Ahasuerasʼ uk a kum sawm le kum nihna
Esther3:8 Tua ciangin Haman in Kumpipa Ahasuerasʼ kiangah
Esther3:9 Kumpipa in hoih na sak leh amaute a kisuksiatna ding thu pia-in lai-in gelh in. Tua hileh nangma sumkholna sungah koih dingin na khutnuai-a na uliante tungah ngun talen tul sawm ka pia ding hi
Esther3:10 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in ama khut sung panin a minthuhna zungbuh suahin Jew miteʼ gal
Esther3:11 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Haman kiangah
Esther3:12 A kha masa a ni sawm le thum ni-in kumpipaʼ lai-atte khempeuh kisam a
Esther3:13 Tua bangin kumpipaʼ ukna gam khempeuh ah laitaite kipiasak a
Esther3:14 Tua a ni seh ni-in amaute a baih sa-in a om theih nadingun hih thupiakna lai pen gam khempeuh ah dal khat ciat kipuakin tua thu pen a gam sung mi khempeuh tungah a kizasak kim ding ahi hi.
Esther3:15 Kumpipaʼ thupiakna tawh laitaite kinawh sawl a
Esther4:1 Mordekai in hih thupiang teng a theih ciangin a puan bal kekin puanhampi silhin vut kibuak a
Esther4:2 Puanhampi silh kawmpi-in kongpi ah kuamah kilutsak lo ahih manin kumpi inn kongpi panin a kimuhna mun ciangah pai hi.
Esther4:3 Kumpipaʼ thupiakna a tunna gam Jew miteʼ omna khempeuh ah nakpi tak a thumna le tauna
Esther4:4 Estherʼ nasem numeite le a innsung maangte hong pai-in ama kiangah tua thu a gen ciangun kumpinu in lamdang sa mahmah hi. A puanhampi a laih nadingin amah in Mordekai ading puante khak a
Esther4:5 Tua ciangin Esther in ama na a sem dingin a kiseh
Esther4:6 Kumpi inn kongpi mai-a om khuapi kongzing tualpi a om Mordekai kiangah Hathak va pai a
Esther4:7 Mordekai in ama tunga thupiangte khempeuh le Jew mite suk mang nadingin kumpipaʼ sumkholna ah Haman in piak dinga a sum ciamzah thute khempeuh ama kiangah na gen hi.
Esther4:8 Amaute a kisuk mang nadingin Susa khua panin a kihawm khia laidal khat zong Mordekai in ama tungah pia a
Esther4:9 Hathak zong ciahin Mordekaiʼ thugen teng Esther kiangah va gen hi.
Esther4:10 Tua ciangin Esther in Hathak mah sawlkikin Mordekaiʼ tungah thu zasak a
Esther4:11 “Numei ahi a
Esther4:12 Tua hi a
Esther4:13 Tua ciangin Mordekai in Esther a dawnkikna thu a mahmah puasakkik a
Esther4:14 Hih bang hunin bangmah hih loin na omcip leh
Esther4:15 Tua ciangin Esther in Mordekai a dawnna lai amah puasak leuleu a
Esther4:16 “Pai-in Susa khua sunga om Jew mi khempeuh khawm inla
Esther4:17 Tua ahih ciangin Mordekai pai-in Estherʼ sawl bang teekteekin a gamta hi.
Esther5:1 A ni thum ni-in Esther in a kumpi puan silhin kumpipaʼ inntual sung nungah dingin kumpi inn lam a nga hi. Kumpi inn sung a kumpi tokhom tungah kumpipa tu-in kongpi lam na nga hi.
Esther5:2 Inntual ah Kumpinu Esther dinga a om kumpipa in a muh ciangin Esther in kumpipaʼ maipha ngah a

Esther5:4 Tua ciangin Esther in

Esther5:6 Amaute in zu a nek laitakun kumpipa in Estherʼ kiangah
Esther5:7 Esther in dawngin
Esther5:8 Topa aw

Esther6:10 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Haman kiangah
Esther6:11 Tua ahih ciangin Haman in kumpi puante le sakol la-in Mordekai zem a
Esther6:12 Tua ciangin kumpipaʼ kongpi ah Mordekai ciahkik hi. Haman ahihleh kilukhuh sa-in a thum kawmin a inn ah ciah pah vingveng hi.
Esther6:13 Tua ciangin Haman in a zi Zeresh le a lawmte khempeuh tungah ama tunga thupiang teng a gen hi. Tua ciangin a zi Zeresh le a lawmte in ama kiangah
Esther6:14 Tua bangin Haman tawh amaute a kiho laitakin kumpipaʼ innsung maangte hong pai a
Esther7:1 Tua ahih ciangin Kumpinu Esther tawh an a ne dingin kumpipa le Haman va pai uh hi.
Esther7:2 A ni nih ni

Esther7:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh kei le ka mite suksiat ding

Esther7:6 Tua ciangin Esther in
Esther7:7 Tua ciangin kumpipa a hehsa-in annekna pan ding khia-in kumpi huan sungah a pai hi. Ahi zongin Haman ahihleh tua lai mahah omin Kumpinu Esther in a nuntakna a suahtaksakna ding a thum hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa in amah thah dingin a ngaihsutna a lungsim a thei hi.
Esther7:8 Kumpi huan panin a annekna mun uh ah kumpipa hong paikik ciangin Estherʼ tutna lamah Haman na awn phei-in a om mu a
Esther7:9 Tua ciangin kumpipaʼ na a sem innsung maangte lakah Harbona in
Esther7:10 Tua ciangin kumpipa in
Esther8:1 Tua ni mahin Kumpipa Ahasueras in Jew miteʼ gal ahi Hamanʼ neihsa khempeuh Kumpinu Esther tungah pia hi. Tua ciangin kumpipaʼ omna ah Mordekai hong tung hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah tawh a kinaina zia
Esther8:2 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Hamanʼ tung panin a lakkik sa minthuhna zungbuh pen suah khia-in Mordekai a pia hi. Tua hi a
Esther8:3 Kumpipaʼ mai ah Esther khatvei va paikikin khitui naptui tawh a khe mai ah va puk a
Esther8:4 Kumpipa in Estherʼ lamah a kham ciangkhut na zan a
Esther8:5 tua ciangin Esther tho to-in kumpipa mai ah dingin
Esther8:6 Ka mipihte tungah hih siatna lianpi a tung ka muh ding bangci thuak zawh ding ka hi hiam? Ahih kei le ka innkuan pih tungah a tung hih siatna ka muh ding bangci thuak zawh ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi.
Esther8:7 Tua ciangin Kumpipa Ahasueras in Kumpinu Esther le Jew mi Mordekai tungah
Esther8:8 Kumpipaʼ min tawh kigelhin
Esther8:9 Tua ahih ciangin a kha thumna ahi Sivan kha a ni sawm le thum ni-in kumpipaʼ lai-atte kisam a
Esther8:10 Tua lai pen Kumpipa Ahasuerasʼ minin kigelhin kumpipaʼ minthuhna zungbuh mah tawh kithuh a
Esther8:11 Kha sawm le nihna ahi Adar kha a ni sawm le thumna ni khat sungin Kumpi Ahasuerasʼ ukna gam sung khempeuh ah Jew mite in amau a sim ding mi ahih kei leh a gamteʼ hih nading panin khua khempeuh ah amau na kipawlin na kihu-in
Esther8:12 
Esther8:13 Tua thupiakna lai pen gam khempeuh ah kihawmin mi khempeuh kitheisakin
Esther8:14 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipaʼ sakolte tungah laitaite tuangin kumpipaʼ thu-kin sawl mah bangin nawh tai uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpi khua Susa khuapi sungah zong tua thupiakna lai a kihawm hi.
Esther8:15 Tua ciangin kumpi puan a san le a kang silhin
Esther8:16 Tua hi a
Esther8:17 Kumpipaʼ thupiakna a tunna gam le khua khempeuh ah Jew mite adingin lungdamna le kipahna
Esther9:1 A kha sawm le nihna ahi Adar kha a ni sawm le thum ni-in kumpipaʼ thupiakna bangin sep khiatna ding hun hong tung hi. Jew miteʼ galte in gualzo dinga a ki-up ni teek pen amau a mudah miteʼ tungah Jew mite a gualzawh ni ding hong hizaw hi.
Esther9:2 Tua ni-in amauteʼ siat nading a geelte a su gawp dingin Kumpipa Ahasuerasʼ ukna gam khempeuh a amauʼ khuapite sungah Jew mite kikhawm uh hi. Mi khempeuh in Jew mite kihta uh ahih manin kuamah in Jew mite nang ngam lo uh hi.
Esther9:3 Mordekai kihta uh ahih manin gam tampi a ukte le gam khat a ukte le gam sunga ulian tuamtuamte le kumpi ulian khempeuh in Jew mite panpih uh hi.
Esther9:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpi inn sungah Mordekai ulianpi khat suak a
Esther9:5 Tua ahih ciangin Jew mite in namsau tawh a galte uh tampi tak that lum uh a
Esther9:6 Kumpi khua Susa khuapi sung mahmah ah Jew mite in mi za nga thatin susia uh hi.
Esther9:7 Tua hi a
Esther9:8 
Esther9:9 
Esther9:10 
Esther9:11 Kumpi khua Susa khuapi sunga a kithat zah tua ni mahmah in kumpipa kiangah kizasak hi.
Esther9:12 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Kumpinu Esther kiangah
Esther9:13 Tua ciangin Esther in
Esther9:14 Tua ahih manin tua banga a hih nadingin kumpipa in a sawl hi. Susa khuapi sungah hih thu suakkhiasak a
Esther9:15 Susa khuapi sunga om Jew mite Adar kha a ni sawm le li ni-in kikhawmkikin Susa khua sungah mi za thum that uh hi. Ahi zongin amauʼ neihsate suksak lo uh hi.
Esther9:16 Tua mah bangin kumpipaʼ ukna gam tuamtuam a om Jew mite zong amauʼ kihut nadingin kikhawm uh hi. Amaute in zong amau a mudah mihing tul sawm sagih le tul nga thatin a galte uh tungah phu la uh hi. Ahih hangin a neihsate uh suksak lo uh hi.
Esther9:17 Hih banga a hih pen Adar kha a ni sawm le thum ni hi a
Esther9:18 Ahih hangin Susa khua sunga om Jew mite ahihleh a ni sawm le thum le sawm le li ni-in kikaikhawm uh a
Esther9:19 Hih thu hangin gam sung khuaneute-a teng Jew mite in Adar kha a ni sawm le li ni pawi bawlna le lungdam ni dingin tawlngak ni-in nei uh a
Esther9:20 Tua ciangin Mordekai in hih thupiangte khempeuh lai-in ciamteh a
Esther9:21 A kumkumin Adar kha ni sawm le li ni le sawm le nga ni a tan nadingun thu a pia hi.
Esther9:22 Tua nite pen Jew mite a galte uh tung panin a suahtak ni
Esther9:23 Tua ahih ciangin Mordekaiʼ laigelhna tawh kizui-in Jew mite in a pat sa uh hih banga a hihnate uh a zom uh hi.
Esther9:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh Jew mi khempeuhʼ gal ahi
Esther9:25 Ahih hangin kumpipa in hih thu a theih ciangin
Esther9:26 Tua ahih ciangin Pur min tamin hih hun sungteng Purim ci-in min a phuak uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin hih lai sunga a kigelh thute khempeuh le hih thute amauʼ mit tawh mu-in a pumpi uh tawh a tuahna uh hangin
Esther9:27 Jew mite amau mahmah le a suan a khakte uh le amau a pawlpih khempeuh in lai sunga kigelh bangin a kiseh hunin kum simin hih ni nihte a pel loin a tan ding uh kipsak uh a
Esther9:28 a khangkhangin innkuan sim
Esther9:29 Tua ciangin Abihailʼ tanu Kumpinu Esther in Purim thu tawh kisai hih laikhak nihna a kipsak nadingin Jew mi Mordekai tungah aana a kicingin a piakna lai-in a gelh hi.
Esther9:30 Kumpi Ahasuerasʼ ukna gam za le sawm nih le sagih sungah a om Jew mite khempeuh tungah kilemna le nopna a om nading deihsakna laite kikhak a
Esther9:31 Jew mi Mordekai in a gelh sa bangin a kiseh sa tawh kizui-in hih Purim nite a tan nadingun thu kipia hi. Tua mah bangin amaute le a suanlekhakte uh adingin antanna ding le thumna bawlna ding ngeinate a gelh uh hi.
Esther9:32 Kumpinu Estherʼ thupiakna in hih Purim bawlna ding ngeinate kipsak a
Esther10:1 Kumpipa Ahasueras in a ukna gam leitung le tuikulh tunga teengte tung panin siah kai hi.
Esther10:2 Ama vangliatna le a sepnate khempeuh le Mordekai tungah a piak minphatnate
Esther10:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Kumpipa Ahasuerasʼ zomah Mordekai a lian pen ahi hi. Mordekai in ama miteʼ phattuam nading le a suanlekhakte uh a khantoh nading hanciam ahih manin Jew mite lakah mi lian khat hi a
Job1:1 Uz gamah Job kici min nei mi khat a om hi. Tua mipa a paubaang lo
Job1:2 Amah in tapa sagih le tanu thum nei hi.

Job1:18 Amah in a thugen a khit ma-in kamtai dang khat hong tung leuleu a

Job4:1 Tua ciangin Teman khuami Elifaz in thu hong gen a
Job4:2 “Mi khatpeuh in thu hong genpih leh na heh ding hiam? Kua in a kam ip zo nawn ding ahi hiam?
Job4:3 Lunghiang mite na hanthotna
Job4:4 a puk mite na thugenna tawh na kipsakna
Job4:5 Ahi zongin nang tungah tuate hong tung a
Job4:6 Na biakna in hong hehnem zo lo ahi hiam? A paubaang lo
Job4:7 Tu-in ngaihsun in: Midik kimlai kua sia ngei ahi hiam? A thutang mi a kisuksiatna koi ah mu ngei na hi hiam?
Job4:8 Mawhna bawlin buaina a piangsak mi in a gamtatna bangin a gah a atna ka thei hi.
Job4:9 Pasianʼ husanna tawh tua bang mite sia a
Job4:10 Humpinelkai hawk bangin migiloteʼ hawkna dai ta a
Job4:11 Annek ding a mu lo a thahat humpinelkai bangin amaute si mangkhin uh a

Job4:13 Mi a ihsip hun zankim laitak
Job4:14 launa le linna kei tungah hong tung a

Job4:16 A mel ka khen theih loh lim khat hong dinga
Job4:17 ‘Pasianʼ mai ah mi khatpeuh paubaang loin om zo ngei ding ahi hiam? Amah a Bawlpaʼ mai ah sitbaang loin om zo ngei ding ahi hiam?

Job4:19 inn umna kawmin buan a kizatna inn sunga a teeng mite
Job4:20 zing kal nitak kalin
Job4:21 amauʼ liatna in taisan pak dinga
Job5:1 “Tu-in na thu ko in: Nang hong huh ding om ahi hiam? A siangthote kua penʼ lam zuan ding na hi hiam?
Job5:2 Mihai pa in a hehna sih lawh a
Job5:3 Mihai pa in limtakin zungkha ngei napi
Job5:4 A tapate suahtaksak zawh ding hi nawn lo hi. Kulh kongpi gei ah amaute kisu gawp a
Job5:5 Midangte in a neihsate liah tumsak uh a
Job5:6 Leilak panin gimna hong piangtawm lo a
Job5:7 Mei-ek a to leen mah bangin mihingte in amauʼ lungkhamna ding mah a piangsak uh hi.
Job5:8 “Nang hi leng

Job5:14 Sun thapai-in khuamial sung kidenna a

Job8:2 “Tua bang thu bang tanvei gengen dinga

Job9:1 Tua ciangin Job in Pasian dawng a
Job9:2 “Kuamah in Pasian a zawhzawh lohna a teltakin ka thei ta hi.
Job9:3 Mi khatpeuh Pasian tawh thu a kinial ding hileh tul khat sungah khatvei nangawn dawng thei lo ding hi.
Job9:4 Amah pil mahmah a
Job9:5 Pasian in mualte liingsak a
Job9:6 Amah in leitung lok gawp a
Job9:7 Amah in ni a suak lo dingin thu pia a
Job9:8 Amah bek in vanpi zal a
Job9:9 Amah pen van a a om Khawlei-uikai
Job9:10 Amah in kuama theih zawh loh na lian tampi bawl a
Job9:11 “Ka kiangah amah hong pai a
Job9:12 Amah in la khia nuam leh a khaktan zo ding kua om ahi hiam? Bang hih na hi hiam
Job9:13 Pasian in ama hehna dokkik het lo mah ding hi. Rahabʼ pawlte nangawn a khe nuai ah kun uh hi.
Job9:14 Tua ahih ciangin keimah in bangci dawn theih dinga
Job9:15 Kei ka dik hangin amah ka dawng thei kei hi. Kei hong mawhsak pa tungah hong hehpih ding ka nget kul hi.
Job9:16 Thukhen zumah amah samin hong pai hi ta mah leh zong ka thumna hong ngai dingin ka um tuan kei hi.
Job9:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh thu themno khat hangin nakpi takin kei hong hih a
Job9:18 Ka hu nangawn hong sangsak man lo a
Job9:19 Thatang hat thu ding hileh
Job9:20 Kei ka dik hangin keima kam mah siksanin kei hong man dinga
Job9:21 Paubaanna ka neih loh hangin kei a thupi-in ka kingaihsun tuan het kei a
Job9:22 Thu khat bek om hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a paubaang lote le a gilote susia khawm hi
Job9:23 Lauhuai lianpi hong tung pakin sihna a om ciangin mawhbaang loteʼ thumna a nuihsan lel hi.
Job9:24 Migiloteʼ khut sungah leitung kipia a
Job9:25 “Laitaite sangin ka hun nawh tai zaw a
Job9:26 Pumpeeng gunkuang bangin ka hun nawhpai a
Job9:27 Ka dahnate kimangngilh bawlin kimaitaisak ding ci taleng zong
Job9:28 a dikin nong seh loh ding lamtak thei khin ka hih manin ka thuak ding thute hangin kei ka lau mahmah hi.
Job9:29 Kei a mawhin hong kiseh veve ding ahihleh bang hangin a mawkna-in na sem ding ka hi hiam?
Job9:30 Satpiang tawh kei kisilin
Job9:31 buannawng sungah kei nong hencip veve dinga
Job9:32 Amah ka dawn theih nadingin amah
Job9:33 Ko tegel kikalah thu hong khen ding khat om thei henla
Job9:34 kei hong kisatna ciang hong paih khiatsak dinga
Job9:35 Bangbang ahi zongin amah kihta het loin ka pau ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh keiʼ om zia ding bangin kei ka om loh lamtak teltakin ka kithei hi.
Job10:1 “Ka nuntakna ka cimtak mahmah ta hi. Ka dahna thu ka ututin ka gen dinga
Job10:2 Pasian kiangah hih bangin ka ci ding hi: Kei hong mawhsak kei in. Kei nong langpanna thu hong gen in.
Job10:3 Na khut tawh na sep sate simmawh bawlin
Job10:4 Mihing bang lelin gamta na hi hiam?
Job10:5 Na nuntak hun tan koteʼ nuntak tan bang lelin ngaihsun na hi hiam?
Job10:6 Bang hangin ka mawhna hong sulzuihin
Job10:7 Ka mawh lohna na thei a
Job10:8 “Nangma khut tawh kei hong lomin na hong piangsak a
Job10:9 Leivui pan a kei nong bawlna hong phawkkik in. Leivui mahin hong deng vuikik takpi ding na hi hiam?
Job10:10 Kei ka pian nadingin ka paʼ tungah tha na guan a
Job10:11 Guh le thaguite tawh ka pumpi ding nong bawl a
Job10:12 Kei
Job10:13 Ahi zongin a beisa hunsung khempeuh ah kei ading thusim khat na neihna tu-in ka thei ta hi.
Job10:14 Ka khialh khaknate hong ensim niloh na hih manin ka mawhnate hong maisak nuam lo na hi hi.

Job23:2 “Tu laitakin Pasianʼ tungah a phun lo
Job23:3 Amah ka zon dan ding thei-in
Job23:4 a mai ah ka thu ka gen dinga
Job23:5 Ama hong gen ding thute le kei a hong dawnna ding thute ka thei nuam hi.
Job23:6 Pasian in a thaneih khempeuh tawh keima lang khat ah hong pang ding ahi hiam? Hong langpan lo dinga
Job23:7 Kei a thuman ka hi a
Job23:8 “Ahi zongin Nisuahna lam ka zong a
Job23:9 Leilu lam ka zon hangin amah ka mu thei kei a
Job23:10 Ahi zongin Pasian in ka kalsuanna khempeuh thei a
Job23:11 Ama hong lamlahna citakin ka zui cinten a
Job23:12 Pasianʼ thupiakna bangin ka gamta ngitnget a
Job23:13 “Amah kikheel ngei lo a
Job23:14 Tua ahih manin kei adingin a geel sate tungsak ding hi. Amah in hih bangin geelna tampi tak a nei ahi hi.
Job23:15 Tua hi a
Job23:16 Vanglian Pasian in ka lungsim hanna hong mangsak hi.
Job23:17 Khuamial in ka mit a mialsak hangin keima kihtak pen khuamial hi lo a
Job24:1 “Pasian in bang hangin a thukhen ni ding seh lo a
Job24:2 “Mihingte in leitang zaipi a ngah theih nadingun gisuangte khiin sim uh a
Job24:3 Mi tagahteʼ la neihsunte guksak uh a
Job24:4 Mizawngteʼ ngah theih dingte khaktan uh a
Job24:5 “Tua ahih manin gamlak a om la bangin gam keu sungah a an ding uh zong tawm uh a
Job24:6 Midangteʼ lo sungah anlak na sem uh a
Job24:7 Zanin puan silh loin lum uh a
Job24:8 Mual tung gam panin a hong zu guahtui in amaute kawtciimsak a
Job24:9 “Migilote in pa nei nawn lo naupangte sila-in nei uh a
Job24:10 Tua mizawngte in puan silh loin na sem uh a
Job24:11 A thau ngah nadingin oliv gahte gawi-in leenggahzu ngah nadingin leenggahte cil napi-in
Job24:12 Khuapi sungah a liam le a si kuanteʼ kikona kiza napi-in Pasian in amauʼ thungetnate don lo hi.
Job24:13 “Sun khuavak a nial
Job24:14 A zawng a cimawhte a that lum dingin khuavak ma-in mi that pa kuan khia a
Job24:15 Numei tunga a mawh mipa in khuamial ding ngakin om a
Job24:16 Gutate in sun sungin a ciapteh sa teng zanin a inn luh uh a
Job24:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh zan khuamial pen amaute khempeuh adingin zing khuavak bang hi a
Job24:18 “Tua bang migilo peuhpeuh tuikhang in taai a
Job24:19 Nisat hun le khuakhal hunin vukkhalte a manthan bangin mihingteʼ gam sung panin mawhnei mi a mangthang hi.
Job24:20 Amah kiphawk kha nawn lo a
Job24:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua bang mite
Job24:22 Pasian in a thahatna tawh mi vangliante susia a
Job24:23 Pasian in a lungnuamin amah nungtasak a
Job24:24 Migilo pa tom kha sung a liat hangin kiak bangin vulkik pah a
Job24:25 Hih thu kua in nial zo ding na hi uh hiam? Ka thugennate man lo hi
Job25:1 Tua ciangin Shuah gam mi Bildad in dawng a
Job25:2 “Pasian vanglian a
Job25:3 Ama na a sem vantung mite bangzah pha cih kua in sim zo ding ahi hiam? Pasianʼ khuavak in a bat lohna koi lai mun om ahi hiam?
Job25:4 Pasianʼ muhna ah kua dik zo dinga
Job25:5 Ama mitah khapi nangawn taang sa zo lo lai a
Job25:6 Tua ahihleh
Job26:1 Tua ciangin Job in dawng a
Job26:2 “A hehpihhuai kei nong huhna
Job26:3 Kei bang mihai tungah thu manpha nong gen a
Job26:4 Tua bang thu a gen dingin kua in hong sawl a
Job26:5 “Misiteʼ gam kiliing a
Job26:6 Pasianʼ muhna ah misiteʼ gam kilang sinsen a
Job26:7 Pasian in mun awng tungah vanpi hong zal khia a
Job26:8 Amah in meii lom lakah tuite khol a
Job26:9 Amah in kha a liah ding bawl a
Job26:10 Amah in muh tawpna ah git dinden a
Job26:11 Amah in vanpi a pua khuampite a taii ciangin tua khuampite lau-in a liing uh hi.
Job26:12 Ama thahatna tawh tuipi zo a
Job26:13 A hu a san ciangin vantung teng siang pah a
Job26:14 Hihte pen ama vangliatna them khat bek hi pan a
Job27:1 Tua ciangin Job in thu genkik a
Job27:2 “Keima dikna a hong seelcipsak Pasian
Job27:3 ka sungah nuntakna a om lai teng
Job27:4 ka muk tawh thusia peuhmah ka gen het kei dinga
Job27:5 Note a thuman hi
Job27:6 Kei thuman ka kisakna ka khia ngei kei ding hi. Ka lungsimah kisuanna om loin siang mahmah hi.
Job27:7 “Kei a hong langpan
Job27:8 Pasian in amauteʼ nuntakna a laksak hun ciangin
Job27:9 Lungkhamna a thuak uh ciangin Pasian in amauʼ kikona awging ngai ding ahi hiam?
Job27:10 Pasianʼ piak ding lungdamna a deih ding uh kilawm ahih manin
Job27:11 “Pasianʼ vangliatna bangzahin lian mahmah cih hong gensak unla
Job27:12 Ahi zongin tuate khempeuh na theih khit sa uh ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin mawk pau na hi uh hiam?
Job27:13 “Vanglian Pasian in migilote
Job27:14 Tapa tampi a neih hangun
Job27:15 A nungta lai sunte zong pulnatna tawh si ding uh a
Job27:16 Migilote in kuama sim zawh loh ngun tampi tak nei ding uh a
Job27:17 Ahi zongin mihoih pawl khat in tua puante silhin
Job27:18 Migiloteʼ lam innte kho lo a
Job27:19 Amaute a hau sa-in lum uh a
Job27:20 Lauhuaina in tuikhang pak bangin nawk gawp dinga
Job27:21 Nisuahna huihpi in amaute leen khia-in a inn panun gamlapi ah leen khia ding hi.
Job27:22 Amaute a suahtak theih nading a hanciam tantan kimlai mah
Job27:23 Amaute a tai laitakun huih in nawk gawpin
Job28:1 “Ngun a kitawh khiatna a khuk om a
Job28:2 Mihingte in lei sung panin sik to khia a
Job28:3 Mihingte in khuamial thuk pen sung zongin
Job28:4 Mihingteʼ teenna panin a gamlapi mun
Job28:5 I annek dingte leitungah hong po khia a
Job28:6 Lei sunga om suangte sungah sapfaia suangmanpha om a
Job28:7 Simbung in zong tua lampi thei ngei lo a
Job28:8 Humpinelkai ahi a
Job28:9 “Mihingte in suang a sak pente to uh a
Job28:10 Suangte a tawhvang uh ciangin suang manphate a mu uh hi.
Job28:11 Amaute in tuinak kipatna dong lei sung to uh a
Job28:12 Ahi zongin koi lai ah pilna kimu ding ahi hiam? Koi lai ah thutheihna nak om ahi hiam?
Job28:13 “Mihingte in a kimuh nading a lampi thei lo uh a
Job28:14 A thuk mahmah tuipi liante in
Job28:15 Pilna pen kham tawh a kilei zo hi lo a
Job28:16 Ofir kham tawh pilna a kilei zo hi lo a
Job28:17 Pilna a manphatna kham le limlang tawh tehtheih hi lo a
Job28:18 Pilna a manphatna suangkhi le limlang tawh genteh theih hi lo a
Job28:19 Ethiopia gamah a piang topaz suang manphate tawh tehtheih ding hi lo a
Job28:20 “Tua ahihleh koi lai panin pilna hong piang ahi hiam? Thutheihna koi lai ah om ahi hiam?
Job28:21 Nuntakna a nei sung pan a mu thei kuamah om lo a
Job28:22 Sihna le siatna nangawn in a thu hem zak bek ung
Job28:23 “Pasian bek in pilna lampi thei a
Job28:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in leimong dong mu a
Job28:25 Pasian in huih a gik ding zah bawlin
Job28:26 guahzukna ding mun thu pia-in
Job28:27 amah in pilna mu-in a manphate en tel a
Job28:28 “Tua ciangin amah in mihingte tungah thu genin
Job29:1 Tua ciangin Job in a thu genkik a
Job29:2 “Ka nuntakna nidang a bang hikik henla
Job29:3 Tua hun lai-in Pasian in kei hong ompih tawntung a
Job29:4 Tua hun pen ka cihtheih hun laitak hi a
Job29:5 Tua hun lai-in Vanglian Pasian in kei hong ompih a
Job29:6 Ka bawngte le ka keelte in nawi deih zahzah hong pia uh a
Job29:7 Khua sung upate a kikhop uh ciangin a kikhawm dingin kei ka pai ciangin
Job29:8 kei hong muh phetun khangnote in tutna hong awn uh a
Job29:9 Khua sung uliante a kiho na khawl pah uh a
Job29:10 Mi a thupi pente nangawn na gamdai pah uh a
Job29:11 “Ka thugen a za mi peuhmah in a hoih lamin na za uh a
Job29:12 Mizawng ka theih peuhmah ka huh tawntung a
Job29:13 A lungkham a cimawhte in kei hong phat uh a
Job29:14 Thuman
Job29:15 Mittaw mite adingin mittang ka hi a
Job29:16 Mizawngte adingin a pa uh ka hi a
Job29:17 Migiloteʼ gitlohna khempeuh ka susia gawp mang a
Job29:18 “Ka nuntak kum sehnel zahin a tam dingin ka ngaihsun a
Job29:19 A zung in tui a ngah tawntung singkung tawh ka kibang a
Job29:20 Mi khempeuh in kei hong phat tawntung uh a
Job29:21 Mite in ka thugen ngai-in hong ngak dimdem uh a
Job29:22 Thu ka gen khit ciangin a gen thuah ding uh bangmah thei nawn lo uh a
Job29:23 Lokhote in khuapi guah deih mahmah in a ngak bangin
Job29:24 Itna tawh ka nuihsat ciangin amaute lungnuam mahmah uh a
Job29:25 Amaute ukin a vai ding uh ka hawmsak a
Job30:1 “Ahi zongin tu-in
Job30:2 Amauʼ hatna khempeuh tu-in bei khinta ahih manin
Job30:3 Amaute zawng mahmah in gilkial uh ahih manin gamlak singzung keu peuh teep lel ding uh hi.
Job30:4 Amaute in singkungnote botin ne uh a
Job30:5 Gutate otkhai-in a kidelhkhiat bangin mite lak panin amaute kihawl khia hi.
Job30:6 Amaute pen hawkguam sung
Job30:7 Ganhing bangin gamlak ah amaute ham uh a
Job30:8 Bangmahin a kimang lo hih bang misia honte
Job30:9 Tu-in amaute in kei hong simmawh bawlin hong nuihsan uh a
Job30:10 Amaute in kei hong kih uh a
Job30:11 Pasian in hong zawngkhalsak
Job30:12 Amaute in hong sim gawpin
Job30:13 Ka suahtak theih nading lampi na khaktan uh a
Job30:14 Kei ka bukna leihawm ah amaute hong tuak suk uh a
Job30:15 Launa tawh ka kidim a
Job30:16 “Tu-in a si ding ka hi ta a
Job30:17 Zan thapai-in ka guh sung
Job30:18 Pasian in ka puan ngawng pan kei hong manin ka puan tawh hong heekcip hi.
Job30:19 Buannawng ciim sungah kei hong lawn khia a
Job30:20 “Pasian aw
Job30:21 Kei tungah nong gilo mahmah a
Job30:22 Huih lakah na hong lawn a
Job30:23 Mi khempeuh adingin seh kholhin a kikoih sa sihna ah a hong paipih na hihna ka thei hi.
Job30:24 Na hehpih ding a hong thum ding cih loh buang
Job30:25 A lungkham mite tawh kei kap khawmin
Job30:26 Lungdamna le khuavakna ka lamet laitakin
Job30:27 Lunggimna le natna in kei hong su gawp a
Job30:28 Lungkham sinkhamin ka om a
Job30:29 Kei pen gamkhing sunga a om ngia le vasa-kalaohte tawh kipawlin a kikhawl ka hi ta hi.
Job30:30 Ka vun vomin dulh khia a
Job30:31 Nidangin lungdamna la a kisa ka zakna munah tu-in thumna le kahna aw bek ka za ta hi.
Job31:1 “Lunggulhna tawh nungak khatpeuh ka et ngei loh nading
Job31:2 Vanglian Pasian in eite bang hong cih a
Job31:3 A man loin a gamtate tungah siatna le gimna a tungsak hi.
Job31:4 Pasian in ka gamtatna khempeuh thei a
Job31:5 “Ka gitloh gamtat ngei lohna
Job31:6 Pasian in tawikhaina man ah hong tawikhai hen; ka paubaan het lohna hong mu ding hi.
Job31:7 Lampi man panin ka pial a
Job31:8 ka khawh sa ante midangteʼ nek suak henla
Job31:9 “Ka veengteʼ zi zawlmitin
Job31:10 ka it ka zi in midangteʼ an suksak henla
Job31:11 (Tua bang mawhna pen a siahuai hi a
Job31:12 Ka neih khempeuh a kaang tum thei mei husia tawh a kibang ahi hi.)
Job31:13 “Ka nasemte khat peuhpeuh kei tungah hong phun ciangin
Job31:14 Tua ci kei leng
Job31:15 Kei a hong piangsak Pasian mah in keima nasemte zong a piangsak ahi hi.
Job31:16 “Mizawngte ka huh ding ka mangngilh ngei kei a
Job31:17 Keimah in an ne napi-in
Job31:18 Ka khang tawntungin tua bangte ka en tawntung hi.
Job31:19 “Mi a cimawh
Job31:20 ka tuu hon panin ka ngah tuumul puan kibawl ka pia hi. Amah in zong a lungsim neih khempeuh tawh kei a hong phat hi.
Job31:21 “Zum thukhenna ah zo na ning cih ngaihsutna tawh tagah khatpeuh ka khem taak leh
Job31:22 ka khutte buisum henla
Job31:23 Pasianʼ gimpiak ding kihta ka hih manin
Job31:24 “Leitung hauhna muan le suanin ka nei ngei kei a
Job31:25 ka hauhna zong ka kisaktheih pih ngei kei hi.
Job31:26 A taang mahmah ni ahi a
Job31:27 Tuate pahtawina le zahtakna limin ka khut lapna tawh cikmah hunin ka khial ngei het kei hi.
Job31:28 Tua bang mawhna in sihna a thuak ding hi a
Job31:29 “Ka galteʼn gim a thuak teh ka kipak ngei kei a
Job31:30 A sih ding uh deihna tawh ka samsia ngei kei hi.
Job31:31 Zin le leengte limtakin ka do tawntungna thu ka na a hong sepsak mi khempeuh in a thei uh hi.
Job31:32 Khualzin mi khempeuh ka inn ah ka tungsak tawntung a
Job31:33 Midangte in a mawhnate uh pulak loin imcip uh a
Job31:34 Midangteʼ hong kampau ding kihtakin ka nei ngei kei hi. Amauʼ hong simmawh ding ka kihtakna hangin pau loin ka omngei kei a
Job31:35 “Ka thugente kuamah in na ngai lo ding ahi hiam? Ka gen thu khempeuh man hi
Job31:36 tua mawhsaknate kisialhna tawh ka ngawng ah ka ok dinga
Job31:37 Ka gamtatna khempeuh Pasian kiangah ka gen dinga
Job31:38 “Ka khawh leitang ka guk ahih a
Job31:39 tua leitang a piang ante ka nek a
Job31:40 tua lo sungah mangbuh le mangbuhham tangin kiak le ling po tahen
Job32:1 Job a mahmah dik kisa tawntung ahih manin hih mihing thumte in Jobʼ thugente dawn ding ngaihsun nawn lo uh hi.
Job32:2 Ahi zongin a thu a za
Job32:3 Jobʼ lawm thumte tungah zong a heh suak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Job a dawnna ding uh thei lo uh ahih manin Pasian a khial tawh hong kibang hi.
Job32:4 Elihu ahihleh amaute lak panin a khangno pen ahih manin a dangte a pau kim khit mateng bangmah pau loin a om hi.
Job32:5 Ahi zongin hih mihing thumte in Job a dawn theih loh a muh ciangin a hehna thuak zo nawn lo hi.
Job32:6 Tua ahih ciangin Buz-te beh Barakhelʼ tapa Elihu in thu gen ding hong kipan a
Job32:7 No a khangham zawte in thu a gen ding kilawm hi
Job32:8 Ahi zongin mihingte tungah a hong tung pilna pen Vanglian Pasianʼ kha in a hong piak ahi hi.
Job32:9 Khanghamna in mi pilsak lo a
Job32:10 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in keima thugen dingte nong ngaih ding uh ka deih hi. Keima ngaihsutna hong gensak dih un.
Job32:11 “Thu na gengen laitakun lungduai takin kong ngaingai a
Job32:12 Limtakin kong ngai a
Job32:13 Bang hangin pilna a nei-in kigen thei ding na hi uh hiam? Note in lel na hih manun Pasian in Job dawng ding hi.
Job32:14 Job in note tungah thu tampi hong gen a
Job32:15 “Job aw
Job32:16 Amaute pau loin a om ciangun kei zong pau loin ngak lailai ding ka hi hiam? Amaute in a gen ding uh thei nawn loin om mawk uh hi.
Job32:17 Tu petpetin kei zong nang kong dawng dinga
Job32:18 Thu a gen dingin kha in kei hong sawl a
Job32:19 Thugen theih nading hun a nei lo hi leng
Job32:20 Ka thuak zo nawn kei a
Job32:21 Hih ka thugenna ah kuamah ka pawlpih kei dinga
Job32:22 Kuamah ka mawk phat thei kei hi. Tua ci mawk phat leng Pasian in kei hong su mang pak ding hi.

Job34:1 Tua ciangin Elihu in
Job34:2 “No a pilin a kinei mite aw
Job34:3 An na ciap uh ciangin a lim a lim lo na thei uh hi. Thu kigen na zak uh ciangin pil kampau le hai kampau na khen thei uh hi.
Job34:4 Thuman bang hiam cih teng khia ni. Thuhoih bang hiam cih mu khia ni.
Job34:5 Job in
Job34:6 Kei a thuman hi napi zuau thu genin hong seh hi. Kei a khial hi lo napi gim thuakin ka cimawh hi
Job34:7 “Hih Job tawh a kibang mi na mu ngei uh hiam? Amah in Pasian zahtakna lim bangmah nei het lo hi.
Job34:8 Amah in migilote tawh kikholh nuamsa mahmah a
Job34:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in
Job34:10 “Ahi zongin thu ngaihsun thei a kinei note khempeuh in ka thugenna hong ngai un. Pasian a giloin gamta ngei dinga
Job34:11 Pasian in a gamtatna tawh kizui-in mite tungah thaman pia a
Job34:12 A taktakin ci lehang
Job34:13 Pasian in ama vangliatna mi khatpeuh tung panin a ngah ahi hiam? Leitung khempeuh a uk dingin mi khatpeuh in amah a koih ahi hiam?
Job34:14 Pasian in ama ngaihsutna kheel henla
Job34:15 nuntakna a nei khempeuh si pah ding uh a
Job34:16 “Job aw
Job34:17 Vanglian pa in thutang a deih lo dingin ngaihsun na hi hiam? Nang in a thuman Pasian mawhsak na hi hiam?
Job34:18 Kumpite le uliante bangmahin kimang loin a gitloh uh ciangin
Job34:19 Pasian pen mi khempeuh a hong piangsak pa hi a
Job34:20 Mihingte ahihleh zan khat thu-in sipak thei hi. Pasian in mite sat pukin sisak thei a
Job34:21 Pasian in mihingteʼ gamtatna khempeuh hong encik a
Job34:22 Gamtat sia mite a buk theih nadingun a seelcip zo ding
Job34:23 Pasianʼ mai ah mihingte in thukhenna a thuak ni ding
Job34:24 Amah in a thu kan kul loin mi vangliante su gawp a
Job34:25 Amah in amauteʼ gamtatnate a vekpi-in thei ahih manin zan khat thu-in amaute lumletin a susia gawp hi.
Job34:26 Pasian in mi khempeuhʼ muhin mawhneite gim a pia hi.
Job34:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in ama thu mang nawn lo uh a
Job34:28 Amaute in mizawngte kapsak gawp uh a
Job34:29 “Pasian in bangmah hih het kei taleh zong
Job34:30 Migilote hong uksak taleh zong
Job34:31 “Job aw
Job34:32 Pasian in na khialhnate a hong lah nading ngenin
Job34:33 Pasian nial na hih manin amah in nangma utna a bang hangin hong hihsak ding ahi hiam? Hih thu pen keiʼ ngaihsut ding hi loin
Job34:34 “Thu a ngaihsun theite in hih thu man hi
Job34:35 ‘Thu a thei lopi-in Job in thu gen a
Job34:36 Jobʼ thugente khempeuh ngaihsun le-uhcin
Job34:37 Amah a khialhna khawl nuam het lo a

Job35:2 “Job aw
Job35:3 Pasian kiangah
Job35:4 Nang le na lawmte tungah thu kong gen ding hi.
Job35:5 “Vantung en to dih un. Meiite bangzah takin sang om to ahi hiam?
Job35:6 Mawhna na gamtat manin
Job35:7 Na thumanna hangin Pasian in phattuamna ngah ahi hiam? Pasian in nang kiang panin bangmah deih lo hi.
Job35:8 Na khialhna hangin na mipihte bek in thuak a
Job35:9 “Mite in gim a thuak ciangin tau uh a
Job35:10 Lungzin hun laitakin thahatna a pia
Job35:11 Eite mi pilin a hong bawl

Job35:13 Ngetnget
Job35:14 “Job aw
