Job36:1 Elihu in a thugen zom lai a
Job36:2 “Lungduai takin tawm khat hong ngai lai in. Pasianʼ tangin ka gen ding thu pawl khat om lai hi.
Job36:3 Kei a hong Piangsak Pasian thuman hi
Job36:4 Ka thugente khempeuh a khial om het lo a
Job36:5 “Pasian a thahat mahmah hi napi-in
Job36:6 Amah in mimawhte daupaisak lo a
Job36:7 Amah in thuman mite hu a
Job36:8 Ahi zongin mite sikkol kibulh a
Job36:9 Pasian in amauʼ mawhna le a kiphatsaknate uh a lak khia ahi hi.
Job36:10 A gamtat siatna panun a khawl nadingun amauʼ bil sungah thu a gengen hi.
Job36:11 Amaute in Pasianʼ thu mangin ama na sem le-uh amaute nuamsa-in a khan uh a sau hi.
Job36:12 Ahi zongin ama thu mang kei le-uh
Job36:13 “Migilote a hehin ni tum uh a
Job36:14 Amaute khansih uh a
Job36:15 Ahi zongin Pasian in gimna tawh mite thuhilh a
Job36:16 Pasian in lungkhamna panin nang hong paikhiat pihin
Job36:17 Ahi zongin tu-in na ngah dinga kilawm gimna a thuak ta na hi hi.
Job36:18 Sumgolhʼ khem sa-in gamta kei inla
Job36:19 Huh ding na nget hangin a phattuamna om nawn lo a
Job36:20 Mihingte a bei mang hun ding
Job36:21 Siatna lamah na kihei khak lohna ding limtakin kidawm in. Na siat khak loh nadingin gimna hong kithuaksak ahi hi.
Job36:22 “Pasian a vangliat mahmahna limtakin phawktel in. Pasian pen sia khempeuh lakah sia lian pen ahi hi.
Job36:23 Pasianʼ gamtatzia ding kuamah in sawl thei lo a
Job36:24 Pasian a nasepna hangin mi khempeuh in a phat tawntung mah bangin nang zong amah phat zaw in.
Job36:25 Mi khempeuh in Pasianʼ sep sate mu uh a
Job36:26 Pasian a liatna a kicingin i thei zo kei a
Job36:27 “Amah in tuipi panin tuite la to a
Job36:28 Amah in meii sung panin guah piangsak a
Job36:29 Meiite a pai henhanna hitaleh
Job36:30 Amah in vantungah khua phiasak a
Job36:31 Amah in tu-a bangin mihingte hong vak a
Job36:32 Amah in keek thu pia a
Job36:33 Amah a heh ciangin huihpi sam a
Job37:1 “Hih huihpi in ka dip hong kuasak a
Job37:2 Ama kam panin a hong ging khia hih vanging Pasianʼ pauna awging
Job37:3 Amah in vanah khua phiasak a
Job37:4 Tua ciangin a vanglian vanging
Job37:5 Pasianʼ sawlna tawh nalamdang pipi piang a
Job37:6 Amah in leitungah vuk a kia dingin sawl a
Job37:7 Amah in mihingte a nasep uh khawlsak a
Job37:8 Gamsate in a lupna ngei delh uh a
Job37:9 Leitaw lam panin guahpi hong zu a
Job37:10 Pasianʼ husanna in tuite khalsak a
Job37:11 Amah in meiipi nomsak a
Job37:12 Pasianʼ deihna zui-in a kikhiin kawikawi hi. Leitung mun khempeuh ah pai-in
Job37:13 Pasian in mihingte gim a piak nading ahi a
Job37:14 “Job aw
Job37:15 Pasian in thu pia a
Job37:16 Bangmah in a len lopi-in vantungah meii a omsak theihna
Job37:17 Leitaw lam huihpi nasia takin a nun laitakin na puan sungah khua-ul kai-in na om hi.
Job37:18 Limlang bangin a sak mahmah van peekpi ama hih bangin zal zo na hi hiam?
Job37:19 Pasian kiangah ka gen ding uh hong hilh in. A hawmpi-in ka om uh a
Job37:20 Pasian tawh kiho theih nading ka ngen kei ding hi. Kei hong suksiat nadingin kei kipia ding ka hi hiam?
Job37:21 “Tawl khat sung khuavak kimu vet lo a
Job37:22 Kham mel khuavak leilu lam pan hong taang a
Job37:23 Pasian vanglian mahmah a
Job37:24 Tua ahih manin mi khempeuh in amah a zahtakna
Job38:1 Tua ciangin huihpi lak panin Topa in Job tungah thu hong gen a
Job38:2 “Keiʼ pilna a nial dingin nang kua na hi hiam? Thu na theih loh lam a kilangsak na hi bek hi.
Job38:3 Kipasalsakin ding to inla
Job38:4 Leitung ka bawl laitakin nang om na hi hiam? Thei kisa na hih leh tua thu hong gen in.
Job38:5 Bang cia-in golsak ding cih kua in seh ahi hiam? Kua in a golna ding zah khau khai ahi hiam? Hihte khempeuh thei kisa na hi hiam?
Job38:6 Leitung a pua khuampite bang tungah kiphut ahi hiam? Kua in leitung a bulpi phut ahi hiam?
Job38:7 Tua ni-in zingsang aksite in la sa khawm uh a
Job38:8 “Lei sung panin tuipi hong suahkhiat laitakin
Job38:9 Meii tawh tuipi a tuamcip pa
Job38:10 Tuipi gamgi ding ciamteh sakin
Job38:11 Tuipi kiangah
Job38:12 Job aw
Job38:13 Zing khuavak in leitung a mongin manin
Job38:14 Khuavak in mualleguamte kilangkhiasak a
Job38:15 Migilote adingin sun khuavak taang lua a
Job38:16 “Tuipi sung tawng tuinak ah pai ngei na hi hiam? Tuipi nuai lei tam tungah lam pai ngei na hi hiam?
Job38:17 Misiteʼ gam khuamial kongkhakpi
Job38:18 Leitung bangcia lian ding cih na thei hiam? Hih thute thei na hih leh hong dawng in.
Job38:19 “Leitung khuavak hong kipat khiatna mun ahi a
Job38:20 Nangmah in amauʼ omna mun ciang dong va thei a
Job38:21 Na nuntakna sawt ta a
Job38:22 “Vuk a kikoihna munah nang va lut ngei a
Job38:23 Tuate
Job38:24 Leitung nitaang a hong suah khiatna mun ahi a
Job38:25 “Kua in guahzukna ding tui lampi bawlsak a
Job38:26 Mihing om lohna mun leilak ah
Job38:27 Lopate a po theih nadingin lei keu-in a sak bekbakte kua in tui buak ahi hiam?
Job38:28 Guah in pa nei ahi hiam? Daitui in pa nei ahi hiam?
Job38:29 Kuaʼ sung panin tuikhal hong piang khia a
Job38:30 Tua tuite suang bangin sak a
Job38:31 “Van a om Seguk henkop thei a
Job38:32 Ama hunhunin aksite lam lak thei a
Job38:33 Van a om nateʼ zuih ding ngeina bawlsak thei a
Job38:34 “Van a om meiite in guah hong zuksak nading nangmah in sawl na hi hiam?
Job38:35 ‘Khua phia in
Job38:36 Nail gun a khan ding a thei gunvapite kua in hilh a
Job38:37 Leivuite khalcipin
Job38:38 
Job38:39 “Humpinelkai le a note leihawm sungah bu-in
Job38:40 
Job38:41 Va-akte a gil kialin leng kawikawi-in
Job39:1 “Sathakte a suah hun ding thei ngei na hi hiam? Sakhite a suah laitakin nau va dom ngei na hi hiam?
Job39:2 Tuate a ni ciamtehin
Job39:3 A no suak dingin lei ah a bawh suk hun laitak thei na hi hiam?
Job39:4 A note gamlak ah khangin
Job39:5 “Kua in gam-late tungah suahtakna pia ahi hiam? Kua in khahin a ututin vaksak ahi hiam?
Job39:6 Amauʼ om nadingin gamlak ka pia a
Job39:7 Gamlumna mun khuapite tawh a kigamla ah om uh a
Job39:8 Mualte tungah an zongin vak kawikawi uh a
Job39:9 “Gam bawngtal in nangma na hong sem ding ahi hiam? Na ganbuk ah gam bawngtal hong giak nuam ding ahi hiam?
Job39:10 Nangmah in khauhual tawh khih zo dinga
Job39:11 Nasem dingin a hat mahmah hangin
Job39:12 Lo a na an piangte hong kaihkhop sakin
Job39:13 “Vasa-kalaohte in a kha uh bangzah takin nawh zap thei ahi hiam! Ahi zongin gun vapi bangin vasa-kalaoh leng thei lo hi.
Job39:14 Vasa-kalaoh in leilak ah a tui nusia a
Job39:15 Mi khatpeuh in a khe tawh a tuite a sikkhap khak ding
Job39:16 A tuite ama aʼ bangin ngaihsun khol lo a
Job39:17 Amah a hai-in a bawlpa ama tungah pilna a guan lopa keimah ka hi hi.
Job39:18 Ahi zongin a tai ciangin sakol sangin hat zaw hi.
Job39:19 “Job aw
Job39:20 Sakolte kauphe bangin diangsak thei-in
Job39:21 Amaute in lawpna tawh a khe-un lei khuat uh a
Job39:22 Amaute in launa mel bangmah thei lo uh a
Job39:23 Amauteʼ tungah a tuang miteʼ galhiam
Job39:24 Lawp mahmahna tawh sakolte in mainawt uh a
Job39:25 Peengkul a kitum ciangin ham hathat uh a
Job39:26 “Simbung in a kha zalin leitaw lamah a leentheih nading nangma kiang panin hong sin ahi hiam?
Job39:27 Muvanlai in sang leenin mual tungah bu a tomna ding nangʼ thupiakna hong ngak ahi hiam?
Job39:28 Suangpi dawnah bu bawl a
Job39:29 Tua lai mun panin khuadak kawikawi a
Job39:30 Gan sihna kimkot ah musanete kikhawm uh a
Job40:1 Tua ciangin Topa in Job kiangah
Job40:2 “Job aw
Job40:3 Tua ciangin Job in dawng a
Job40:4 “ Topa aw
Job40:5 Ka gen dinga kilawm zahval gen kha ka hih manin
Job40:6 Tua ciangin huihpi sung panin Topa in Job tungah thu genkik a
Job40:7 “Kipasalsakin ding to inla
Job40:8 Kei a thutang loin hong seh a
Job40:9 Kei zahin nang hat na hi hiam? Keiʼ awging zahin nang aʼ ging zo ding ahi hiam?
Job40:10 Na ngap nakleh na minthan nading le na kihihsak theih nadingin tu-in hong kipan inla
Job40:11 A kiphasak mite en inla
Job40:12 Mi kiphasakte en inla
Job40:13 Amaute khempeuh lei sungah phumcip inla
Job40:14 Tua bangin na hih zawh nakleh nang a hong phat masa pen pa
Job40:15 “Tui-sakol ganhing golpi ngaihsun dih in. Amah le nang a piangsak pa keimah ka hi hi. Amah in bawngtal bangin lopa bek mah ne a
Job40:16 ahi zongin ama pum sungah bangzah hatna om a
Job40:17 Ama mei
Job40:18 Ama guhte sumngo bangin khauh a
Job40:19 “Ganhing khempeuh lak pan a lamdang pen hi a
Job40:20 Gamsate omna mual tung panin ama an ding lopa kipuak hi.
Job40:21 Amah lingkung nuai ah lum a
Job40:22 Lingkungte le lui gei-a gialhek kungte in ama ading niliim piangsak hi.
Job40:23 Amah in gun tuikhangte kihta het lo a
Job40:24 Kua in ama mit tawsakin man zo ding ahi hiam? Kua in a nakpheh ah khau vawh zo ding ahi hiam?
Job41:1 “Ngasa siahna sikkawi tawh Awle man zo dinga
Job41:2 A nakpheh ah khau vawh zo dinga
Job41:3 Amah in na khah nading hong thum dinga
Job41:4 Na sila ahi tawntung dingin nangma tungah thu hong ciam ding ahi hiam?
Job41:5 Na nasem numeite na mawlpih bangin mawlpih zo dinga
Job41:6 Ngasa bengte in lei dingin hong deek dinga
Job41:7 Ngasa khawhna teipi tawh a vun khawh let zo dinga
Job41:8 Khat vei su kha khin lecin na hihkik nawn kei dinga
Job41:9 “Awle a mu mi peuhmah lau-in lei ah a puk uh hi.
Job41:10 Awle a heh ciangin kihtakhuai mahmah a
Job41:11 Leitung a om mihingte lakah Awle a suk manin a sih lawh lo kua om ahi hiam?
Job41:12 “Awle khete
Job41:13 Kua in ama puan tungnung hawk khiatsak zo a
Job41:14 A kihtakhuai a hate a kam sungah om ahih manin
Job41:15 A nung zang suk ah a lipte lum bangin kithuap suk cinten a
Job41:16 Tua lipte khatlekhat kithuapcip bikbek ahih manin
Job41:17 Tuate kinak mat lua ahih manin
Job41:18 Amah a hetchiai ciangin mei-ek bangin taang zaizai a
Job41:19 A kam panin mei kuang khia a
Job41:20 A nak panin meikhu suak a
Job41:21 Ama husanna in mei tawhkuang a
Job41:22 A ngawng zong thakhauh mahmah ahih manin
Job41:23 A vun tung khempeuh a nipna mun mahmah om lo a
Job41:24 A lungsim in suangtum bangin kihtak khat zong nei lo a
Job41:25 Amah hong kithawi ciangin mi thahat pente nangawn lau a
Job41:26 Namsau tawh a kisut hangin bun zo vet lo a
Job41:27 Ama adingin sikte
Job41:28 Amah khua a phawksak zo ding
Job41:29 Ama adingin molhtum pen buhkung bang hi lel a
Job41:30 A khecinte
Job41:31 Amah in tuipi tokin beel sunga tui so bangsak zo a
Job41:32 A paina sa khempeuh ah tuihual om dandan a
Job41:33 Amah tehpih theih ding leitungah bangmah om lo a
Job41:34 Amah in a kihtakhuai ganhing a kihisak pente nangawn nuai-et lai a
Job42:1 Tua ciangin Job in Topa dawng a
Job42:2 “ Topa aw
Job42:3 Kei bangmah a thei lo kimlai
Job42:4 Thu na gen laitakin ka na ngaihna ding
Job42:5 Nidangin miʼ gen sawn bekin nang ka hong thei a
Job42:6 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ka pauna sate khempeuh hangin ka maizum mahmah a
Job42:7 Topa in hih thute khempeuh Job tungah a gen khit ciangin
Job42:8 Tu-in bawngtal sagih le tuutal sagih la-in Job kiangah paipih unla
Job42:9 Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ sawl bangin Elifaz
Job42:10 Job in a lawm thumte ading thu a ngetsak khit ciangin
Job42:11 Tua ciangin Jobʼ sanggam pasalte
Job42:12 Tua tham loin Topa in Jobʼ nuntakna a masa lam sangin a nunung lamah thupha lim piak zaw hi. Job in tuu tul sawm le tul li
Job42:13 Amah in tapa sagih le tanu thum neikik a
Job42:14 a tanu upa pen Jemimah phuak a
Job42:15 Jobʼ tanute zahin a melhoih leitungah numei dang khat zong om lo a
Job42:16 Hih hun khit ciangin Job kum za le kum sawm li sung nungta lai a
Job42:17 Tua khit ciangin a khan khinin a teeksih ta hi.
Psalms1:1 Mi nuamsa i cihte pen migiloteʼ thu a zui lo mi
Psalms1:2 Ama nopsakna pen Topa thu sung bek mah hi a
Psalms1:3 Amah pen luitui luang gei-a a kisuan
Psalms1:4 Migilote ahihleh tua bang hi lo uh a
Psalms1:5 Tua ahih ciangin migilote in thukhenna thuak zo lo ding uh a
Psalms1:6 bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in midikte lamlakin hu tawntung a
Psalms2:1 Bang thu hangin minam dangte siat nading ah kithukhat sim uh a
Psalms2:2 Leitung kumpite le gam ukte in Topa le ama sathau nilh pa langpangin vaihawm uh a
Psalms2:3 “Amauʼ hong henna khaute su tat khia-in
Psalms2:4 Vantung a a tupa in amaute na nuihsan a
Psalms2:5 Tua ciangin hehna tawh amau kiangah thu gen dinga
Psalms2:6 “Ka mual siangtho Zion tungah ka kumpi ka tusak khin hi
Psalms2:7 Topaʼ thukhenna tu-in kong gen ding hi: Amah in keima tungah
Psalms2:8 Keima tungah hong ngen in; nangma luah dingin minamte ka bawl dinga
Psalms2:9 Sik tawn khat tawh amaute na satkham dinga
Psalms2:10 Tua ahih ciangin kumpite aw
Psalms2:11 Launa tawh Topaʼ na sem unla

Psalms3:7 Tho in
Psalms3:8 Gualzawhna pen Topa nangma hang ahi hi. Na mite tungah na thupha hong tung tahen!

Psalms10:4 Migilo in kiphatsakna lungsim nei a
Psalms10:5 Ahihna khempeuh ah a maa pai ngitnget hi. Na thukhennate khempeuh ama muhna in a bat zawh lohin sang mahmah a

Psalms10:12 Tho in

Psalms11:2 bang hang hiam cih leh

Psalms73:1 Israel mite bangin a lungsim a siangtho a thutang mite tungah Pasian hoih takpi hi.
Psalms73:2 Ahih hangin kei ka hih leh ka khe kisui puk dektak a
Psalms73:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh migiloteʼ daupaina ka muh ciangin mi kihisakte ka eng hi.
Psalms73:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in nat velvalna bangmah thuak lo uh a
Psalms73:5 Amaute in midangte bangin haksatna thuak lo uh a
Psalms73:6 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in khainiang bangin kiphatsakna ok uh a
Psalms73:7 A lungsim panun gitlohna pusuaksak uh a
Psalms73:8 Amaute in mi thusim loin el pau uh a
Psalms73:9 Amauteʼ gensiatna in vantung dong ban to a
Psalms73:10 Tua ahih ciangin mite in amaute phat uh a
Psalms73:11 Amaute in
Psalms73:12 Amaute migilo ahi uh hi. A tawntungin nuam takin om hithiat uh a
Psalms73:13 Ka lungsim siangsak a
Psalms73:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh sun thapai-in gimna ka thuak a
Psalms73:15 Tu-a bangin thu a gen hi leng
Psalms73:16 Ahih hangin hih thu a bangci hiam
Psalms73:17 Pasianʼ biakinn sungah ka pai ciangin a thutawpna dongte ka tel hi.
Psalms73:18 Nangmah in amaute mun nalna ah na koih takpi dinga
Psalms73:19 Tomno sungin amaute kisusia-in
Psalms73:20 Amaute pen zan a mangmat tawh kibang lel a
Psalms73:21 Ka lung khamin ka lungsim hong nat ciangin
Psalms73:22 keimah hai-in bangmah ka thei kei a
Psalms73:23 Ahih hangin nangmah tawh ka om khawm ngitnget a
Psalms73:24 Thulahna tawh keimah nong makaih a
Psalms73:25 Nang sim loh vantungah kua nei ka hi hiam? Nang sim loh ka deih ding leitungah kuamah om lo hi.
Psalms73:26 Ka lungsim le ka pumpi zawngkhal kha dinga
Psalms73:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh nang tawh a kigamlate kisia ding uh a

Ecclesiastes5:3 Lunghimawh semsem lecin na mang sia semsem dinga

Ecclesiastes7:3 Nuihna sangin dahna hoih zaw hi; na mai hong gumsak zahin na thutheihna hong khangsak hi.

Ecclesiastes7:11 Pilna pen hauhna zahin hoih a

Ecclesiastes7:17 Gilo lua

Ecclesiastes7:19 Khuapi a uk mihing sawm sangin pilna in mi khat hatsak zaw hi.
Ecclesiastes7:20 A manin a gamta
Ecclesiastes7:21 Miʼ gen khempeuh thudon kei in. Na nasem paʼ hong samsiatna na za kha ding hi.
Ecclesiastes7:22 Nang zong midang na samsiat zelzelna teltakin na kithei hi.
Ecclesiastes7:23 Hihte khempeuh ka pilna tawh ka ze-et a
Ecclesiastes7:24 Mihing nuntakna kua in thei khia zo ding ahi hiam? Eite adingin thuk lua a
Ecclesiastes7:25 Keimah in pilna siamna ka theih nading
Ecclesiastes7:26 Sihna sangin numei a siahuai zawkna ka thei khia hi. Ama hong piak itna in thang bangin hong tep cip a
Ecclesiastes7:27 Thugen siampa in hih bangin ci hi: Thu ka kan ciangin
Ecclesiastes7:28 A thudang ka zonzon hangin bangmah ka mu zo nawn kei hi. Pasal tul khat sung pan khat bang bek a pil a om khak theihna
Ecclesiastes7:29 Keima theihkhiat thu in: Pasian in eite a thuman dingin hong bawl hi napi-in
Ecclesiastes8:1 Mipilte bek in na a khiatna taktak theithei uh hi. Pilna in mipilte maitaisak a
Ecclesiastes8:2 Kumpipaʼ hong sawl bangin gamta inla
Ecclesiastes8:3 Kumpipa in a ut peuhpeuh hih thei ahih manin ama kiang panin paikhia in; ama lungkim lohna hih teitei kei in.
Ecclesiastes8:4 Kumpipa aana neihna tawh gamta hi. Ama gen bangin gamta in; kuamah in amah nial zo lo hi.
Ecclesiastes8:5 Ama thu a mangte in haksatna tuak kha lo ding hi. Mipilte in a gamtatna zia le a hunhoih thei uh hi.
Ecclesiastes8:6 Na khatpeuh i hih ding ciangin a kilawm hun
Ecclesiastes8:7 A hong piang ding thu i thei kei a
Ecclesiastes8:8 A sih ding a pelh thei
Ecclesiastes8:9 Leitung a gamtatnate ka ngaihsut ciangin hih thute ka mu khia hi. Mi khat in midang tungah vangliatna nei-in
Ecclesiastes8:10 Migilote si-in kivui a
Ecclesiastes8:11 A mawhte gim kipia pahpah lo ahih manin mihingte in khialh ding haksa sa lo uh hi.
Ecclesiastes8:12 Mawhnei khat in zavei dong siatna bawl napi-in a khansau veve hi. Ahi zongin “Pasian a zahtakte adingin thu khempeuh nuam ding hi.
Ecclesiastes8:13 Migilote adingin thu nuam lo dinga
Ecclesiastes8:14 Ahi zongin hih thugenna a mawknapi ahi hi. Leitung a thupiangte ngaihsun dih in: Khat veivei midikte in migiloteʼ gimthuak ding teng thuak zawsop a
Ecclesiastes8:15 Tua ahih ciangin mihing in hih leitungah nuam a sak theih ding a dang om lo ahih manin an ne tui dawnin nuamsa-in a om ding bek ahi hi. Pasian in hih leitungah nuntak a piak sungteng a sep thaman a ngah theih ding hih bek om hi.
Ecclesiastes8:16 Pil ding hahkatin
Ecclesiastes8:17 Pasianʼ nasepna i theih zawh lohna ka phawk hi. Mihingte in bangzahin i hahkat hangin kithei khia zo lo hi. Mipilte in thei a kisak hangun bangmah thei lo uh hi.
Ecclesiastes9:1 Nakpi takin sau veipi ngaihsunin ka phawk thu in: Mipilte le midikteʼ gamtatna a vekpi-in Pasian in uk a
Ecclesiastes9:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khempeuh a thumong kibang a
Ecclesiastes9:3 Mi khempeuhʼ thumong kibang kim a
Ecclesiastes9:4 Ahi zongin a hing laite ading lametna om thei a
Ecclesiastes9:5 A hing laite in a si ding ahih lam uh thei a
Ecclesiastes9:6 Amau adingin itna
Ecclesiastes9:7 An ne-in lungdam inla
Ecclesiastes9:8 Na puante siangsakin paaksak tawntung inla
Ecclesiastes9:9 Pasian in hih leitungah nang a hong piak
Ecclesiastes9:10 Na mai ah sep ding a om khempeuh
Ecclesiastes9:11 Hih leitungah ka phawk dang thu khat in: A tai hat mite in tai kidemna ah zo tawntung lo a
Ecclesiastes9:12 Mihing in ama hun ding thei ngei lo hi. Thang ah a awk vasate le ngen ah a awk ngasate tawh i kibang hi. Lamet loh hun laitak keekin hunsia sungah mihingte i tung hi.
Ecclesiastes9:13 Thudang khat zong ka mu khia hi: Hih leitungah pilna a hoihna gentehna a hoih khat om hi.
Ecclesiastes9:14 Mi tawmno bek a omna khua khat om a
Ecclesiastes9:15 Tua khua sungah a zawng mipil khat om a
Ecclesiastes9:16 Thahatna sangin pilna hoih zaw ka ci hi; ahi zongin kuamah in mizawngte a pil dingin ngaihsun lo a
Ecclesiastes9:17 Mihai hon lakah gam ukpa in thu a gen lualua sangin mipil pa in dam takin a gen hiathiat ngaihhuai zaw hi.
Ecclesiastes9:18 Galhiamte sangin pilna hoih zaw a
Ecclesiastes10:1 A si sa thote in paknamtui bung sungah a om paknamtui uihsak thei a
Ecclesiastes10:2 Mipilte a manin a gamtat ding a ngeina hi a
Ecclesiastes10:3 Mihaite lampi ah a paikawm nangawnin hai tat uh a
Ecclesiastes10:4 Nang tungah gam ukpa a heh leh na nasep za taisan pah kei in. Dai tak a om hithiatna in khialhna lianpi maisak thei hi.
Ecclesiastes10:5 Hih leitungah a thuman lo gam ukteʼ piansak ka muhte:
Ecclesiastes10:6 Mihaite
Ecclesiastes10:7 Sakol tungah silate tuang a
Ecclesiastes10:8 Gum a tote gum sung mahah kia dinga
Ecclesiastes10:9 Suang a to khiate suang mah in liamsak dinga
Ecclesiastes10:10 I hei mawl napi-in i tat kei leh nakpi takin sat kul a
Ecclesiastes10:11 Gul khim thei napi i khim kei leh a kimanna om tuan lo hi; gul in hong tu veve ding hi.
Ecclesiastes10:12 Mipilteʼ kampauna in pahtawina ngahsak a
Ecclesiastes10:13 Thugen a kipat ciangun bangtum loteng tawh kipan pah malam uh a
Ecclesiastes10:14 Mihaite in thu gengenin ciakciak uh hi. Mailam a thupiang ding kuamah in thei lo a
Ecclesiastes10:15 A inn zuat nading lampi a thei lo mihai luate bek
Ecclesiastes10:16 A kumpipa miʼ cih bangbangin gamta lel a
Ecclesiastes10:17 A kumpipa in lungsim khensatna nei thei a
Ecclesiastes10:18 Thadah lua-in a inn vang nangawn a hu nuam lo mipa
Ecclesiastes10:19 An in lungdamsak a
Ecclesiastes10:20 Na lungsim nangawn ah kumpipa gensia kei in. Kuama zak lohna mun na lupna tung nangawn ah mihaute samsia kei in. Thopi in na thugen teng na puak kha ding hi.
Ecclesiastes11:1 Sum bawl nadingin na sumte zang in. Ni khat ni peuh teh a meet na ngah ding hi.
Ecclesiastes11:2 Na sumbuk vante mun sagih ah ahi a
Ecclesiastes11:3 Meii sungah tui a tam luat ciangin leitungah guahin hong zu suk a
Ecclesiastes11:4 Huih le guah ngakin khuahun hoih dong a ngak mi in khaici tuh ngei lo dinga
Ecclesiastes11:5 Nupi gai khat sungah nuntakna thak bangci kipat hiam
Ecclesiastes11:6 Zingsang a kipan khaici tuh inla
Ecclesiastes11:7 Khuavak hoih mahmah a
Ecclesiastes11:8 Mi khat sau veipi a nuntak le a nuntak sung nuam takin om tahen. Sau veipi tak a hing zongin a sih khit hun a sauvei zawkna phawk tahen. Mai lamah a lamethuai bangmah a om kei hi.
Ecclesiastes11:9 Khangnote aw
Ecclesiastes11:10 Note kilunggimsak kei unla

Ecclesiastes12:7 I pumpi

Ecclesiastes12:12 Ka ta aw
Ecclesiastes12:13 Hih thute khempeuh banah gen ding thu khat bek om hi. Mihing hong kipiansakna a thu bulpi pen in: Pasian zahtakna le a thupiakte manna ahi hi.
Ecclesiastes12:14 A pha hitaleh a sia hitaleh a simthamin ihih simte nangawn ihihna khempeuh ah Pasian in thu hong khen ding hi.

Isaiah1:11 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Noteʼ biakpiakna a tampite pen keiʼ tungah bang hi leltak ahi hiam? Tuutalte le ganhing thauteʼ sathau tawh meihal biaknate ka kham ta hi. Bawngtalte
Isaiah1:12 Keiʼ mai ah a kilaak dingin na hong pai uh ciangin hih bangin ka huang sung na tuatcil gawpna uh kuaʼn hong deih ding ahi hiam?
Isaiah1:13 Bangmahin a kimang lo piaknate hong paipih nawn kei un. Paknamtui halna ka kih hi. Khadet ni
Isaiah1:14 Noteʼ Khadet nite le na pawite uh ka mudah hi. Tuate pen kei adingin van gikpi khat suak khin a

Isaiah1:18 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Tu-in hong pai unla
Isaiah1:19 Note in utna lungsim nei-in thu na man nak uh leh lei pan a piang a gah hoihte na ne ding uh hi.

Isaiah5:1 Ka lawm it paʼ tangin a leenggui lo a itna la keʼn hong sa ning: Ka lawm it pa in leitang a hoih mahmahna mual tung khat ah leenggui lo khat a nei hi.
Isaiah5:2 Amah in lei to-in a suangte paikhia a
Isaiah5:3 Tu-in
Isaiah5:4 Ka leenggui lo adingin ka hih nai loh ka hih ding a kilawm bang om lai ahi hiam? Leenggah hoih gah ding ka lamet laitakin bang hangin gam leenggah hong gah mawk ahi hiam?
Isaiah5:5 Tu-in
Isaiah5:6 Lokhulin ka bawl ding hi. Kipuah loin
Isaiah5:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa ’ leenggui lo pen Israel mite hi a

Isaiah5:9 Vanglian Topa in ka zakna ah hih bangin kiciam a
Isaiah5:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh leenggah lo eka sawm in phelpi khat dim bek gah dinga
Isaiah5:11 Zingsang tungin tho-in
Isaiah5:12 Amaute in a pawi sung uh ah laiza lasakna le harp lasakna
Isaiah5:13 Tua hi a
Isaiah5:14 Tua ahih ciangin Leinuai in a duhna khangsakin bangmah tawh a kiteh thei lo zahin a kam ka beba a
Isaiah5:15 Mi khempeuh a niamin kikoih suk hi. A kiphasak mite kiniamkhiat suk hi.
Isaiah5:16 Ahih hangin thutang sepna tawh Vanglian Topa in a liatna hong kilangsak a

Isaiah7:21 “Tua ni ciangin mi khat in bawngla khat le tuu nih bang bek suahtak zo dinga
Isaiah7:22 ahi zongin tuate in nawi tampi a piakna hangin amah in bawngnawi-thaukhal ne zo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh gam sungah a om lai mi khempeuh in bawngnawi-thaukhal le khuaizu ne ding uh hi.
Isaiah7:23 “Tua ni ciangin ngun tang tul khat a man leenggui tul khat a omna mun khempeuh pen lingkungte le lingteʼ omna suak ding hi.
Isaiah7:24 Gam khempeuh lingkungte le lingte tawh kidim ding ahih manin
Isaiah7:25 Lingkungte le lingte na kihtakna hangin tupeek tawh a kikho ngei mual neute ah na pai ngam kei ding hi. Tua munte pen bawng khahna le tuuteʼ gamtatna mun suak ding hi

Isaiah15:1 Moab gam tawh kisai thu: Zan khat thu-in Ar khua kisiasak ahih manin Moab gam a bei hi. Zan khat thu-in Kir khua kisiasak ahih manin Moab gam a bei ta ahi hi.
Isaiah15:2 A sangna munte ah a kap dingin Dibon khua mite pai to uh hi. Nebo le Medeba khuateʼ hangin Moab mite nakpi takin kap uh hi. Dahna limin lu khempeuh kimettol a
Isaiah15:3 Kongzing lakah amaute in puanhampi silh uh hi. Innkhum zang le kongzing lampi kituahnate ah mi khempeuh nakpi-in kapin khitui tawh a kawt uh hi.
Isaiah15:4 Heshbon khua le Elealeh khua kiko uh a
Isaiah15:5 Moab gam adingin ka lungsim kiko hi. A galtai ama mite Zoar khua le Eglath-shelishiah khuate ah a tai uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Luhith lampi ah amaute a kap sa-in pai to uh hi. Horonaim khua zuatna lampi ah amaute in siatna a thuakna uh hangin nakpi-in kiko uh hi.
Isaiah15:6 Nimrim luite kang hi. Lopa keu-in a sel thak om lo a
Isaiah15:7 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in a ngah sa uh le a khol sa uh na tampite pua-in Gialhek Lui ah a paipih uh hi.
Isaiah15:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh Moab gam kiim khempeuh ah kahna aw a ging hi. Kahna in Eglaim khua ban a
Isaiah15:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Dibon lui tuite sisan tawh kidim hi. Ahi zongin Dibon khua in a thuak ding a nasia zaw om lai a
Isaiah16:1 Moab mite in Jerusalem-a om gam ukpa tungah sehnel gam Sela khua panin tuunote a puak uh hi.
Isaiah16:2 A bu a kipaih khiatsak ciangin a cih nading thei loin a leng kawikawi vasate bangin Arnon gun tui ngahmun ah Moab mite om uh hi.
Isaiah16:3 Amaute in Judah mite kiangah
Isaiah16:4 A kihawl khia ko Moab mite note lakah hong tengsak unla
Isaiah16:5 itna kip tawh kumpi tokhom khat kiphut dinga
Isaiah16:6 Tua ciangin Judah mite in
Isaiah16:7 Tua ahih ciangin a thuakna uh hangin Moab mite kap henla
Isaiah16:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh a hiang zaai-in tuipi kantan a
Isaiah16:9 Tua ahih ciangin Jazer khua mite a kah bangin Sibmah leengguiteʼ hangin kei ka kap hi. Heshbon le Elealeh khua mite aw
Isaiah16:10 An tampi a pian ngeina lo lai ah lungdamna le nuamna om nawn lo hi. Leenggui lote ah lasakna om lo a
Isaiah16:11 Tua ahih ciangin Moab gam hangin laiza lasakna bangin ka lungsim kisat gaihgaih a
Isaiah16:12 Moab a mahmah hong kilaakin
Isaiah16:13 Hih bang thu pen Topa in a beisa hun lai-in Moab tawh kisai-in a gen sa thu ahi hi.
Isaiah16:14 Ahih hangin tu-in Topa in
Isaiah17:1 Damaskas tawh kisai thu hih bangin gen hi: En un
Isaiah17:2 Ama khuapite kinusiacip paisuak ding hi. Tuuhonteʼ omna mun suak dinga
Isaiah17:3 Efraim gam panin kulhpi bei-in
Isaiah17:4 Tua ni ciangin Jakobʼ liatna bei dinga
Isaiah17:5 An a la mi in ankung ding laite kaikhawmin ante a kilak khit ciangin leitang a hawmguakin a om tawh kibang dinga
Isaiah17:6 Oliv kung a kisin khit ciangin a hiang sang pen dawnah pum nih pum thum singkung hiang dawnah pum li pum nga a om lai tawh kibang lel ding hi
Isaiah17:7 Tua ni ciangin mite in amaute a Bawlpa pi ngaihsut ding uh a
Isaiah17:8 Amaute in amau khut tawh a bawl sa uh biakna taute don lo ding uh a
Isaiah17:9 Tua ni ciangin amauʼ khuapi muanhuaite pen Hiv mite le Amor mite in Israel miteʼ hangin a nusiat uh munte tawh kibang dinga
Isaiah17:10 Nomau hong hon khia Pasian note in mangngilhin
Isaiah17:11 tuate na suan ni mahun thakhatin khang a
Isaiah17:12 Ah
Isaiah17:13 Tui lianpi a ging bangin minamte awng uh hi. Ahih hangin amah in amaute tai dinga
Isaiah17:14 En un
Isaiah18:1 Ah
Isaiah18:2 
Isaiah18:3 Leitung a teeng mi khempeuh
Isaiah18:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kei tungah
Isaiah18:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh leenggah lawh hun ma deuh
Isaiah18:6 Tuate khempeuh mual tunga om vasateʼ nek ding le leitung a ganhingteʼ nek dingin kinusia ding hi. Khuakhal ciangin vasate in ne dinga
Isaiah18:7 Tua hun ciangin
Isaiah19:1 Egypt tawh kisai thu hih bangin gen hi: A manlang mahmah meii tungah Topa tuangin Egypt gamah a pai hi. Ama mai ah Egypt gam milimte lau-in liing ding uh a
Isaiah19:2 Egypt mite amau le amau ka kitawngsak ding hi. Mi kim in ama veengte ciat do dinga
Isaiah19:3 Egypt miteʼ lungsim hawmsuak dinga
Isaiah19:4 A thuak hak topaʼ khut sungah Egypt mite ka pia dinga
Isaiah19:5 Nail gun tuite keu dinga
Isaiah19:6 Lei zui-a tui kilate uihin
Isaiah19:7 Nail gun gei
Isaiah19:8 Nail gun sungah nga siahna sikkawi a khia ngei
Isaiah19:9 Anthul khau ciingin na a semte le patpuan a gante lungkham ding uh hi.
Isaiah19:10 Gam sung makaite kisusiacip dinga
Isaiah19:11 Zoan uliante hai cihtakin hai uh a
Isaiah19:12 Tua ahih kei leh Egypt kumpipa Faro aw
Isaiah19:13 Zoan uliante mihai suak khin uh a
Isaiah19:14 Topa in amauteʼ lungsim kitukalhsak khinzo hi. Zukham pa ama luak lakah a puk bangin Egypt gam miteʼ hihna khempeuh khialin hoi mang khin hi.
Isaiah19:15 A hau a zawng
Isaiah19:16 Tua ni ciangin Egypt mite
Isaiah19:17 Judah gam pen Egypt miteʼ kihtak hong suak ding hi. Vanglian Topa in amaute gimpiak ding a ngimna hangin

Isaiah19:19 Tua ni ciangin Egypt gamah Topa ading biakna tau khat
Isaiah19:20 Tua pen Vanglian Topa adingin Egypt gam sungah lim le teci hi ding hi. A nengniam miteʼ bawlsiatna hangin Topa tungah amaute a kiko ciangin
Isaiah19:21 Topa in Egypt mite tungah a mahmah kitheisak ding hi. Tua ni ciangin Egypt mite in Topa thei-in biakpiakna le meihal biakna tawh bia ding uh a

Isaiah48:5 note in

Isaiah48:9 Note khempeuh kong suksiat khak loh nadingin ka min ka ngaihsutna tawh ka hehna diahin
Isaiah48:10 Meikhuk sungah ngun a kisiansak bangin gimna meikhuk sungah note kong ze-et hi. Ahi zongin note bangmahin a kimang lo na hihna uh hong kimu khin hi.

Tua ahih kei leh zong note khah khiatna ding vangliatna nei lo ka hi hiam? Keima taina tawh tuipi ka keusak a

Jeremiah32:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Judah kumpipa Zedekiah in ama kiangah
Jeremiah32:4 Judah kumpipa Zedekiah zong Khaldea miteʼ khut sung pan a suakta kei dinga
Jeremiah32:5 Amah in Babylon khua ah Zedekiah la dinga
Jeremiah32:6 Jeremiah in zong
Jeremiah32:7 En in

Jeremiah32:17 ‘Topa Pasian! Nangma vangpi le na khut tawh vantung le leitung na bawl khinzo hi. Nang adingin a haksa lua khat beek om lo hi.
Jeremiah32:18 Nangmah in a kikheel ngei lo itna mi tul tampiteʼ tungah na lak a
Jeremiah32:19 na ngimnate lian mahmah a

Jeremiah42:2 kei kiangah

Jeremiah51:45 Ka mite aw
Jeremiah51:46 Gam sungah kamdawn a kigen sawnte hangin lungkia kei un; lau kei un. Kum khatin thu khat kigen a
Jeremiah51:47 Tua ahih manin en un
Jeremiah51:48 Tua ciangin vantung
Jeremiah51:49 Babylon khua in leitung khempeuh ah mite a sihsak mah bangin tu-in amah in sihna a thuak ding hi.
Jeremiah51:50 “Namsau in a hong thah khak loh a nungta lai note aw
Jeremiah51:51 Note in
Jeremiah51:52 Tua ahih manin en un
Jeremiah51:53 Babylon khua vantungah kah to thei a
Jeremiah51:54 “Ngai un! Babylon khua ah mi kiko hi. Khaldea gam sung mite a kisuksiatna kahna awging ahi hi.
Jeremiah51:55 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Babylon khua maimangsak a
Jeremiah51:56 Babylon khua a susia ding mi khat hong pai khinzo hi. A galkapte uh kiman khin a
Jeremiah51:57 A kumpi uliante le a mipilte uh a kipan ukpite
Jeremiah51:58 Vanglian Topa in ka hong genin ah: Babylon khua kulhpi sah mahmah in a muanhuai mahmah leilak ah cim suk dinga
Jeremiah51:59 Neriahʼ tapa
Jeremiah51:60 Keimah in Babylon khua tawh kisai-in Babylon khua ah a tung ding gimna khempeuh laibu khat sungah ka gelh hi.
Jeremiah51:61 Seraiah kiangah
Jeremiah51:62 tua khit ciangin
Jeremiah51:63 Hih laibu sunga thute miteʼ zakin na sim khit ciangin suang khat tawh hen khawm inla
Jeremiah51:64 ‘Babylon khuapiʼ gitlohna hangin a tungah gimna ka tungsak dinga
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekiah kumpi a suahin kum sawm nih le kum khat pha a
Jeremiah52:2 Amah in kumpi Jehoiakim bangmahin Pasianʼ hoihsak lohte hong sem hi.
Jeremiah52:3 Topa in Jerusalem khua mite le Judah gam mite ama kiang panin a hawl khiatna zah dong dingin a hehna a lian hi. Zedekiah in Babylon kumpipa langpan hi.
Jeremiah52:4 Tua ciangin amah kumpi a suah zawh a kum kua kum
Jeremiah52:5 Zedekiah in a uk zawh kum sawm le kum khat a phak dong khuapi a kisim hi.
Jeremiah52:6 Tua kum a kha lina
Jeremiah52:7 Tua ciangin khua kulhpi kiphu let a
Jeremiah52:8 Ahih hangin Khaldea galkapte in kumpi Zedekiah nung delh uh a
Jeremiah52:9 Amaute in kumpipa a mat khit uh ciangin Hamath gam Riblah khua-a Babylon kumpipa kiangah puak uh a
Jeremiah52:10 Riblah khua ah Babylon kumpipa in Zedekiahʼ muh mahin a tate thahlupsak a
Jeremiah52:11 Babylon kumpipa in Zedekiahʼ mittangte a khelkhiatsak khit ciangin kol bulh a
Jeremiah52:12 Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in a uk zawh kum sawm le kum kua a phak kum
Jeremiah52:13 Amah in Topaʼ biakinnpi a kipan kumpipaʼ inn le Jerusalem khua-a inn lian khempeuh a hal hi.
Jeremiah52:14 Amah tawh a om khawm a galkap khempeuh in Jerusalem khua kimkot a kulh khempeuh a susia hi.
Jeremiah52:15 Kumpi cing galkap mangpa Nebuzaradan in mizawng pen pawl khat
Jeremiah52:16 Ahih hangin kumpi cing galkap mangpa Nebuzaradan in leenggah lo a cing ding le lo a kho dingin gam sunga a zawng pente pawl khat a nusia lai hi.
Jeremiah52:17 Babylon mite in Topaʼ biakinnpi sungah a om sumngo khuamte
Jeremiah52:18 Tua banah
Jeremiah52:19 Biakpiakna a kizang keuneute
Jeremiah52:20 Solomon kumpipa in Topaʼ biakinn adingin a bawl khuampi nih
Jeremiah52:21 Tua khuamte khat ciangin pi sawm nih le pi sagih sang a
Jeremiah52:22 A tung lam pi sagih le alang ciang sumngo hi-in
Jeremiah52:23 Mang kawlsing a vekpi-in a kimkot ah za khat om a
Jeremiah52:24 Kumpi cing galkap mangpa in siampi lianpen pa Seraiah
Jeremiah52:25 Tua banah khuapi sung panin galkapte a uk galkap maang khat le khua sunga a kimu kumpipaʼ uliante sagih
Jeremiah52:26 Kumpi cing galkap mangpa Nebuzaradan in amaute paipihin Riblah khua-a Babylon kumpipa kiangah a tunpih hi.
Jeremiah52:27 Babylon kumpipa in zong Hamath gam Riblah khua ah amaute satin a that lum hi. Tu-a bangin Judah mite a gam panun sal dingin a kila khia hi.
Jeremiah52:28 Nebukhadnezzar in sal dingin a paipih mi phazah hih bang ahi hi: Kumpi a suah zawh a kum sagih kumin Judah mi tul thum sawm nih thum
Jeremiah52:29 a kum sawm le kum giat kumin Jerusalem khua panin Nebukhadnezzar in mi za giat sawm thum nih sal dingin a paipih hi.
Jeremiah52:30 Nebukhadnezzar in a uk zawh a kum sawm nih le thum kumin kumpi cing galkap mangpa Nebuzaradan in a sal dingin Judah mi za sagih sawm li nga a paikhiatpih hi. A vekpi-in mi tul li le za guk a pha hi.
Jeremiah52:31 Judah kumpipa Jehoiakhin sal a suah zawh kum sawm thum le kum sagih a cin ciangin Babylon ah Evil-merodak kumpi a suak hi. Tua kumpipa in Judah kumpipa Jehoiakhin hehpih a
Jeremiah52:32 Hoihtakin hopih a
Jeremiah52:33 Tua ahih manin Jehoiakhin in a thong puante a suah khia hi. A nuntak sungteng khempeuh kumpipaʼ sabuai ah nisimin an a ne hi.
Jeremiah52:34 A sih mateng a nuntak hun sungteng nisimin a kisap khempeuh kumpipa in a pia tawntung hi.
Lamentations1:1 Khat vei lai-in mi a dimtakin a teenna Jerusalem khuapi bangzah takin gamdai ahi hiam? Leitung bup in a zahtak khuapi tu-in meigong tawh a kibang ta hi. Leitung a om khuapi khempeuhteʼ lak panin a thupi pen khuapi tu-in salin a kiman khinzo hi.

Lamentations1:3 Judah mite

Lamentations1:22 A gitlohna hangun amaute tungah thu khen in. Ka mawhna hangin gim nong piak mah bangin amaute zong gim pia in. Gimna ka thuak manin ka tautau a
Lamentations2:1 Topa in a heh manin Jerusalem khuapi a mialcipsak hi. A vantung minthanna teng uh kisiatna a suaksak hi. Amah in a heh ni-in a Biakinnpi nangawn a susia hi.
Lamentations2:2 Topa in Judah gam a om khuate khempeuh hehpih loin a susia hi. Amah in a galdalna kulhpite khempeuh balzan gawpin a gam le a gam ukte a maizumsak hi.
Lamentations2:3 A hehna tawh Israel-teʼ thahatnate hong suksiatsak gawp a
Lamentations2:4 Amah in galte bangin a thalpi tawh hong ngim a
Lamentations2:5 Topa in galte bangin Israel-te a susia hi. Amah in kulhpite le a kumpi innte a siasa-in a nusia hi. Amah in a bei thei lo dahna Judah gam sungah a tungsak hi.
Lamentations2:6 Amah in biakna Biakinnpi a zan gawpsak hi. Amah in biakna ni siangtho nite le Sabbath nite a beisak hi. Kumpite le siampite in a nasia ama hehna a thuak khawm uh hi.
Lamentations2:7 Topa in a siangtho biakinnpi le a biakna tau deih nawn lo a
Lamentations2:8 Jerusalem kulhpi a kipuk ding Topa in a ngaihsut sa ahi hi. A vekpi-in a kisia khin dingin amah in a seh sa ahi hi. Tausangte le kulhpite tu-in kisia khin piikpeek ta hi.

Lamentations2:13 Ka it Jerusalem khuapi aw
Lamentations2:14 Na kamsangte un zuau thu longal thudang gen ding nei lo uh a

Ezekiel1:1 Kum sawm thum ka phak kum
Ezekiel1:2 Tua hun pen Kumpi Jehoiakhin salin a kimat zawh a kum ngana
Ezekiel1:3 Tua Babylon gam Khebar Gun gei ah ka om laitakin siampi Buziʼ tapa keimah Ezekiel in Topaʼ hong thugenna ka za a
Ezekiel1:4 Ka khuadak leh leilu lam panin huihpi a hong nung ka mu hi. Tua huihpi tawh a hong ton meiipi lak panin khua hong phia a
Ezekiel1:5 Tua huihpi laizang ah ganhing li a om tawh a kibang pian ka mu hi. Tua ka muhte in mihing lim pua napi-in
Ezekiel1:6 maitang li le kha li ciat a nei uh hi.
Ezekiel1:7 A khete uh mam zeza a
Ezekiel1:8 Maitang li le kha li ciat a neih ban uh ah
Ezekiel1:9 Tua ganhing lite in a kha nih ciat uh zalin
Ezekiel1:10 Tua ganhingte in maitang li ciat nei uh hi. Maitang ngeina lamah mihing mai
Ezekiel1:11 Tua ganhingte in a kha nih ciat uh zalin a zom a omteʼ kha mong dawn tawh kimatsak uh a
Ezekiel1:12 Tua ganhingte in maitang li ciat nei-in mun khempeuh a maingat suak uh ahih manin a painop uh ciangin a pumpi uh kihei kul loin a utna peuh uh ah pai thei pahpah uh hi.
Ezekiel1:13 Tua ganhingte lakah meikuang tawh a kibang a phia niloh om hi. Tua meikuang pen kuang pha mahmah a
Ezekiel1:14 Tua ganhingte khuaphia mah bangin kin zalzal kawikawi uh hi.
Ezekiel1:15 Tua ganhing lite ka et laitakin amaute in leengpei khat ciat a neih lam uh ka mu a
Ezekiel1:16 Tua leengpeite a vekpi-in kibang kim a
Ezekiel1:17 a utna lam peuhpeuh ah pai thei uh hi.
Ezekiel1:18 Tua leengpei kualte tungah mittang vive a dimin om hi.
Ezekiel1:19 Tua ganhingte a kin ciangin leengpeite tawh kin khawm a
Ezekiel1:20 Amauʼ utna peuhpeuh uh ah tua ganhingte pai uh a
Ezekiel1:21 Tua leengpeite pen ganhingteʼ khutnuai-a om ahih manin ganhingte pai leh pai-in
Ezekiel1:22 Tua ganhingteʼ lu tung sanah limlang tawh a kibawl a kuum kiukiau pian khat om hi.
Ezekiel1:23 Tua a kuum nuai ah
Ezekiel1:24 Tua ciangin amauteʼ leenna a khaging uh ka za hi. Tua a khaging pen tuipi ging
Ezekiel1:25 ahi zongin amauteʼ lu tung san a om a kuum tung san panin awging kiza lai hi.
Ezekiel1:26 Tua kuum tungzang ah
Ezekiel1:27 Tua tokhom tungah a tu ka muh pen meikhuk sunga kihalsan sumngo bangin taang heuhau a
Ezekiel1:28 Tua a taang khuavak in meii lakah sakhituihup a kai ciangin a neih mel nam tuamtuam khempeuh a nei kim hi. Topaʼ vangliatna lim pen tu-a ka gen bang ahi hi. Hih bang ka muh ciangin leilak ah ka bok suk a
Ezekiel2:1 Tua awging in

Ezekiel10:4 Kherub-teʼ tung panin Topaʼ minthanna vang hong pai khia-in biakinn kongah va om hi. Tua ciangin biakinn sungah meiipi hong kai a

Ezekiel10:10 Tua leengpeite a pianzia kibang kim a

Ezekiel10:12 A leengpei kualte a pei kanna khaute le a pei buppi dimin mittang om hi.
Ezekiel10:13 Hih leengpeite pen maang ka muh masakna sungate mah tawh a kibang ahi hi.

Ezekiel11:19 Amaute tungah lungsim thak le ngaihsutna thak ka pia ding hi. Amauteʼ suang lungtang paih khiatsakin mihing lungtang ka guan ding hi.

Ezekiel11:21 Ahi zongin a nin a muhdahhuai milim a bia nuamte ahihleh gim ka pia ding hi. Amauʼ gamtatna tawh a kizui-in gim ka pia ding hi

Ezekiel14:14 Noah

Ezekiel16:3 Topa Pasian in Jerusalem tungah ka gen hih thute gen in: Jerusalem aw
Ezekiel16:4 Nang na suah lai-in kuamah in hong don lo hi. Na lai hong kitansak lo a
Ezekiel16:5 Hihte khempeuh a hong hih dingin kuamah in nang hehpihna lungsim hong nei lo hi. Na suah lai-in kuamah in nang hong it lo ahih manin gamlak ah nang hong kipaidak lel hi.
Ezekiel16:6 “Tua ciangin na kiangah kong pai kha a

Ezekiel16:11 Kizepna a manphate nang kong pia a
Ezekiel16:12 Nakbahte
Ezekiel16:13 Tua bangin kham le ngun kibawl kizepnate tawh na kizem a

Ezekiel16:15 “Ahi zongin na melhoihna le na minthanna a sia lamin zangin

Ezekiel16:19 Na nek dingin a limci pen annel

Ezekiel16:23 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Gimna na thuak ding hi. Hih bang siatna nam khempeuh na gamta khin a
Ezekiel16:24 lam gei khempeuh ah milim biakna ding mun bawlin
Ezekiel16:25 Na melhoihna beelmang na kizut nelh hi. Na kimuh pih peuhpeuh tungah na pumpi na kipia a
Ezekiel16:26 A lan mahmah na veeng Egypt mite na luppih a
Ezekiel16:27 “Tu-in nangmah gim a pia ding le na nopsakna teng a la khia dingin ka khut ka liik khin hi. Nang hong mudahin
Ezekiel16:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh a dangte tawh lungkim zo nai lo na hih manin Assiria mite na nung delh lai hi. Tuate tawh na paktat a
Ezekiel16:29 Sum bawl Babylon mite tawh na paktat a
Ezekiel16:30 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: A bangci lawmlawm na hi hiam? Zumna mel thei loin hih bangin na paktat hi.
Ezekiel16:31 Kongzing citeng ah milim biakna ding mun na bawl a
Ezekiel16:32 A pasal it zaw loin
Ezekiel16:33 Numei paktatte sum tawh kiguai a
Ezekiel16:34 Nang pen a tuampian numei paktat na hi hi. Kuamah in na tua ci gamtat nadingin hong zol lo hi. Nang tungah sum tawh guaihna hong kipia loin nang in na pia zawsop hi. Tua ahih manin a tuampian mahmah na hi hi.
Ezekiel16:35 “Tua ahih ciangin a paktat Jerusalem aw
Ezekiel16:36 Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Nang in na puante suah khia-in

Ezekiel16:39 Na lunggulh miteʼ khut sungah kong pia dinga

Ezekiel16:44 Topa in
Ezekiel16:45 Nang pen na nuʼ ta taktak na hi hi. Na nu in a pasal le a tate mudah hi. A pasalte uh le a tate uh a mudah na sanggam numeite mah tawh na kibang hi. Nang le na sanggam numei ahi khuapi dangte in nu-in Hit mi nei-in
Ezekiel16:46 Na unu pen leilu lam a om Samaria le a khuaneute ahi hi.
Ezekiel16:47 Amauteʼ khekhap zui-in a muhdahhuai amauteʼ gamtatnate bek tawh na lungkim zo nai kei lai a
Ezekiel16:48 “Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih takpi mah bangin kong cih in ah: Nang le na khuaneuteʼ gamtat siat zahin na sanggamnu Sodom le a khuaneute gamtat sia ngei nai lo hi.
Ezekiel16:49 Na sanggamnuʼ mawhna pen: Amah le a tanute in nek ding tampi nei-in nuamsa mahmah in
Ezekiel16:50 Amaute kihisakin ka deih loh nate gamta uh ahih manin
Ezekiel16:51 Samaria in nangma gamtat siat zah lang gamta lo hi. Na sanggamnu sangin gamtat sia zaw mahmah na hih manin
Ezekiel16:52 Tu-in na mindaina teng na thuak kul hi. Na sanggam numeiteʼ mawhna sangin nangma mawhnate naksiat zaw lua ahih manin nang kiang panin amaute a mawh lo tawh kibang phial hi. Na sanggam numeite a siangtho bangsak phial na hih manin zahla inla maizum in.
Ezekiel16:53 “Ahi zongin
Ezekiel16:54 Na gamtatna sate hangin na maizum dinga

Ezekiel16:61 Na unu le na naunu na ngahkik ciangin na gamtatna sa teng phawkkikin na mai a zum ding hi. Nang tawh i thuciamna sungah a kihel loh hangin amaute pen nangma tanu bangin hong om ding uh hi.

Ezekiel22:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw
Ezekiel22:3 Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi
Ezekiel22:4 Na mi thahna hang le na milim bawlna hangin a mawh suak na hih manin tu-in nang adingin a ni cingin
Ezekiel22:5 A nai
Ezekiel22:6 Na sunga om Israel ulian khempeuh in amauʼ thatang muang uh a
Ezekiel22:7 A nu a pa a zahtak bawl kuamah om lo hi. Peemtate kikhem gawp a
Ezekiel22:8 Mun siangthote zong zahtakna mel kinei loin
Ezekiel22:9 Mi pawl khatte in midangte a sih theih nadingin zuau thu phuak uh hi. Mi pawl khat in milim biakna sa ne uh hi. Pawl khatte amauʼ lanna tawh kizui-in gamta tawntung hi.
Ezekiel22:10 Pawl khatte in a paʼ zi mawhpih uh a
Ezekiel22:11 Pawl khat in midangteʼ zi tawh nulepa mawhna bawl uh a
Ezekiel22:12 Pawl khat in sum deih manin mi that uh hi. Pawl khatte in a Israel mipih sum leitawi a late tungah nuamtak sa-in a meet lakna tawh hauhlawh uh hi. Amaute in kei hong mangngilh uh hi
Ezekiel22:13 “A man loin miʼ na na suhna le mi na thahna hangin ka khuttum ka zial ding hi.
Ezekiel22:14 Tua bangin kong hih ciangin hang nawn dingin ki-um a

Ezekiel22:16 Tua ahih ciangin minam dangte in nang hong mindaisak dinga

Ezekiel22:25 A uliante uh

Ezekiel23:13 Hih a naunu zong a u zah mahin sia taktak hi
Ezekiel23:14 “A paktatna nakpi takin hong sia semsem hi. Amah in Babylon ulianteʼ limte
Ezekiel23:15 
Ezekiel23:16 Amah in tua limte a muh phetin amaute lunggulh mahmah pah a

Ezekiel23:18 Amah numei paktat ahihna mi khempeuh theisakin
Ezekiel23:19 A paktatna uang semsem a
Ezekiel23:20 Sakoltal lan bangin a zang a gol
Ezekiel23:21 Tua hi a
Ezekiel23:22 “Oholibah aw
Ezekiel23:23 Babylon khua mite
Ezekiel23:24 Amaute in leilu lam panin nang hong sim ding uh a
Ezekiel23:25 Nangma tungah kei heh ka hih manin nangma tungah amaute hong heh gamtat ding uh hi. Na nak le na bilte hong at khiatsakin na tate hong thahsak ding uh hi. Na tanu le na tapate na kiang panin hong sutin a hingtangun hallum ding uh hi.
Ezekiel23:26 Na puante hong hawk khiatsakin
Ezekiel23:27 Na huknate le Egypt gam a kipan na gamtat hoih lohnate ka beisak ding hi. Milimte et-in na nei nawn kei dinga
Ezekiel23:28 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Na muhdah na etsat miteʼ khut sungah nang kong pia ding hi.
Ezekiel23:29 Amaute zong nangma tungah hong muhdah gamtat ding uh a
Ezekiel23:30 nangma tungah hih bang teng hong tungsak hi. Minam dangte tawh na paktat a
Ezekiel23:31 Na unuʼ khekhap teng mah tawn na hih manin amah gim ka piak bangin nang zong gim kong pia ding hi.
Ezekiel23:32 Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Na unuʼ hai mah na dawn dinga
Ezekiel23:33 Na unu Samariaʼ hai pen launa le siatna hai hi a
Ezekiel23:34 Tua hai a tawdat nangawn na dawn kang dinga

Ezekiel23:36 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a
Ezekiel23:37 Amaute in milim biakna tawh nulepa mawhna bawlin mi zong that lai uh hi. Milimte tawh mawhna gamta-in
Ezekiel23:38 Amauteʼ gamtatna tu-a bang teng bek hi lo lai hi. Ka biakinn ninsak uh a
Ezekiel23:39 Milim biakna-in ka tate a gawh khit uh ciangin tua ni mahin ka biakinn ah pai-in ninsak uh hi. Ka biakinn sungah hih bangin gamta tazen uh hi.
Ezekiel23:40 “Amaute in gamlapi-a a om mite a sam dingin kamtai sawl uh a
Ezekiel23:41 Lupna hoih mahmah tungah tu-in a mai uh ah sabuai limtakin koih uh hi. Tua sabuai tungah keima piak sa paknamtui le oliv thaute koih uh hi.
Ezekiel23:42 Lungnuamin a om mihonteʼ gamlumna kiza a
Ezekiel23:43 Nulepa mawhna bawlin a paat ngingei sa numei khat
Ezekiel23:44 Numei paktatte kiang a a hawh bangin amaute pai niloh uh hi. Tu-a bangin a gamtat hoih lo Oholah le Oholibah-te kiangah a paktat dingin amaute a pai uh hi.
Ezekiel23:45 Amaute in nulepa mawhna bawlin mi thahna tawh zong kipelh lo uh ahih manin midikte in nulepa mawhna bawlna hang le mi thahna hangin a mawhsak ding uh hi.
Ezekiel23:46 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Amaute lausak gawpin a nate uh a sut gawp dingin mihon khat paisak in.

Ezekiel24:7 Khuapi sungah mi kithahna om a

Ezekiel30:20 Zedekiah in a uk a kum sawm le kum khat kum
Ezekiel30:21 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw
Ezekiel30:22 Tua ahih manin Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen in: Kei pen Egypt kumpipa Faroʼ lang ka hi hi. A khut a dam lai pen le a kitan sa zong
Ezekiel30:23 Egypt mite pen
Ezekiel30:24 Tua ciangin Babylon kumpipaʼ khut ka khauhsak dinga
Ezekiel30:25 Amah ka tha neemsak dinga

Ezekiel31:1 Zedekiah in a uk a kum sawm le kum khat kum
Ezekiel31:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw
Ezekiel31:3 A hiangte hoihin pha mahmah a
Ezekiel31:4 A khangsak ding tui om a
Ezekiel31:5 Limtakin tui ngah ahih manin singkung dang khempeuh sangin a sang zaw hi. A hiangte golin sau mahmah hi.
Ezekiel31:6 Vasa nam khempeuh in a hiang tungah bu tom uh a
Ezekiel31:7 Tua singkung hoih mahmah a
Ezekiel31:8 Pasianʼ huanah a om taamtak hoihte tawh tehtheih ding hi lo a
Ezekiel31:9 A melhoihin ka bawl a
Ezekiel31:10 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian keimah in hih bangin ka ci hi. Tua sing in meiipi a bat dongin khangto a
Ezekiel31:11 Tua ahih manin tua singkung ka deih nawn kei hi. Gamdang kumpi khatʼ khut sungah ka pia dinga
Ezekiel31:12 Thukhualna a nei lo gamdang mite in tua singkung phukin a nusiacip ding uh hi. Mual khempeuh le guam khempeuh ah a hiang kitante a kia ding uh hi. A lim a beel minam khempeuh in taisan ta ding uh hi.
Ezekiel31:13 Vasate hong leengin tua sing puk tungah tuang ding uh a
Ezekiel31:14 Tua ahih ciangin tu a kipanin singkung khat beek
Ezekiel31:15 “Topa Pasian in ka cih in ah: Tua singkung in misiteʼ khua Leinuai a zuat ciangin
Ezekiel31:16 Misiteʼ omna Leinuai khua ah tua singkung ka khiat suk ciangin
Ezekiel31:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh a si sate a zuan dingin misiteʼ omna Leinuai ah amah tawh a pai khawm ding uh hi. Ama liim nuai a belte khempeuh

Ezekiel32:1 Zedekiah in a uk a kum sawm le kum nih kum
Ezekiel32:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw
Ezekiel32:3 Topa Pasian ahi keimah in kong cih in ah: Minam tampi hong kuansakin
Ezekiel32:4 Leilak ah nang hong kai khia-in
Ezekiel32:5 Mual teng guam teng
Ezekiel32:6 Na sisan tawh leitung khempeuh ka kawtsak dinga
Ezekiel32:7 Nang kong suksiat ni ciangin vanpi ka khuhcip dinga
Ezekiel32:8 Vantung khuavak khempeuh ka mialsak dinga
Ezekiel32:9 “Na theih ngei loh gamdangte ah salin kong omsak ciangin minam tampite lunggim ding hi.
Ezekiel32:10 Nang tunga kong bawlna thu minam tampite in lamdang sa ding uh hi. Ka namsau ka vik ciangin kumpite lau-in kigaih ding uh hi. Nang na puk ni ciangin a sih khak ding uh lau-in mi khempeuh liing kelkel ding uh hi.
Ezekiel32:11 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian in hih bangin ka ci hi: Babylon kumpipaʼ namsau na thuak ding hi.
Ezekiel32:12 Minam dang a gilo pente sung panin a galkapte uh a namsau uh doksakin
Ezekiel32:13 A tui nekna mun a omna khempeuh uh ah

Ezekiel32:18 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw
Ezekiel32:19 “Midang khempeuh sangin melhoih zaw hi lo na hi uh hiam? Ahi zongin pai unla
Ezekiel32:20 “Gal sung a a kithatte tawh si khawm ding uh hi. Egypt gam sunga om mi khempeuh a vatlum dingin namsau khat a baih sa-in om hi.

Ezekiel33:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw

Ezekiel33:17 “Ahi zongin na mipihte in

Ezekiel34:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a
Ezekiel34:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw
Ezekiel34:3 Tuunawi ne-in
Ezekiel34:4 Tuu zawngkhalte na khoi kei uh a
Ezekiel34:5 Tua tuute in a cing ding nei lo uh ahih manin kithehthang gawp uh a
Ezekiel34:6 Tua ahih manin ka tuute kithehthang gawp uh a
Ezekiel34:7 “Tua ahih manin no tuucingte aw
Ezekiel34:8 Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih takpi mah bangin
Ezekiel34:9 Tua ahih manin no tuucingte aw
Ezekiel34:10 Topa Pasian ahi keimah
Ezekiel34:11 “Topa Pasian keimah in note kiangah kong genin ah: Kei mahmah in ka tuute zongin ka kem ding hi.
Ezekiel34:12 Tuucingte in a kithehthang tuute kaikhawmin a kep bangin keimah in donin ka kem ding hi. Tua bang a lauhuai siat nading hun laitakin a kithehthangna uh mun khempeuh panin ka kaikhawm ding hi.
Ezekiel34:13 Gamdang panin amaute la khia-in ka kaikhawm dinga
Ezekiel34:14 Lungmuang takin Israel mual tung lo nona le guam sung mun nuamte le Israel gam lo nona mun khempeuh ah ka gamtasak ding hi.
Ezekiel34:15 Kei mahmah in ka tuute ka cing dinga
Ezekiel34:16 Keimah in a mangte zongin
Ezekiel34:17 “No ka tuuhonte aw
Ezekiel34:18 Note pawl khat
Ezekiel34:19 Ka tuu dangte in na tuatcil sa uh lopa ne-in na siknin sa uh tuite a dawn uh kul hi.
Ezekiel34:20 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian keimah in ka thugen ngai un: No tuu thaute le tuu gawngte kong khen ding hi.
Ezekiel34:21 Note in a cidam lote na ki uh tawh si gawpin
Ezekiel34:22 Keimah in ka tuuhonte ka hon dinga
Ezekiel34:23 Amaute a cing dingin ka nasem pa David ka koih dinga
Ezekiel34:24 Topa ahi keimah
Ezekiel34:25 Amaute lungmuang takin a om theih nadingun amaute tawh thuciamna khat ka bawl ding hi. Gam sung panin a lauhuai gamsa khempeuh ka beisak dinga
Ezekiel34:26 “Amaute thupha pia-in ka mual siangtho kiimah ka omsak ding hi. A kisap hunhunin thupha guahtui ka zusak ding hi.
Ezekiel34:27 Singkungte tampi tak gahin
Ezekiel34:28 Gamdang mite in hih gawpgawp nawn lo ding uh a
Ezekiel34:29 Amaute tungah logam hoih pia ding ka hih manin gam sungah gilkial dangtak om nawn lo ding hi. Minam dangte in amaute simmawh bawl nawn lo ding uh hi.
Ezekiel34:30 Israel mite ka hutna le amaute pen keima mi ahihna thu mi khempeuh in thei ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi.
Ezekiel34:31 “No ka ta ahi tuute aw

Ezekiel36:1 Topa in kei kiangah
Ezekiel36:2 Israel-teʼ galte in
Ezekiel36:3 Tua ahih ciangin mailam thu ding gen inla
Ezekiel36:4 Tua ahih manin no Israel mual tung gamte aw
Ezekiel36:5 “Topa Pasian ahi keimah in a kimkot ah a om minam dangte le a diakdiakin Edom mite tungah ka hehluatna tawh thu ka gen hi. Amaute in lungdamin nuihna le simmawhna tawh keima leitang la-in a tang uh hi.
Ezekiel36:6 Tua ahih ciangin Israel gam tawh kisai-in mailam thu gen khol inla
Ezekiel36:7 Topa Pasian ahi keimah in a kimkot ah a om minam dangte ka mindaisak ding khauh takin ka kiciam hi.
Ezekiel36:8 Ahi zongin Israel mual tung gamte ah no ka mi Israel-te adingin singkungte in teh le gah hong neikik ding uh a
Ezekiel36:9 Kei pen noteʼ lamah kong pang dinga
Ezekiel36:10 A mi-in zong kong pungsak dinga
Ezekiel36:11 A mihing a ganhingin kong pungsak dinga
Ezekiel36:12 No ka mi Israel-te
Ezekiel36:13 “Topa Pasian ahi keimah in kong genin ah: Israel mual tung gamte
Ezekiel36:14 Ahi zongin tu a kipanin mihing sa a ne

Ezekiel36:16 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a
Ezekiel36:17 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw
Ezekiel36:18 Tua ahih manin gam sungah amauteʼ mi thahna le a milimte uh tawh gam sungteng a nitsakna hangun ka hehna teng ka thuaksak hi.
Ezekiel36:19 Amauteʼ nuntakna zia le a gamtatna ziate uh tawh kizui-in amaute tungah thu ka khen a
Ezekiel36:20 Ahi zongin midangte in
Ezekiel36:21 Israel mite in a paina peuhpeuh uh gamdang mite lakah ka min siangtho hong daisak kawikawi uh ahih manin tua thu in ka lung hong himawhsak hi.
Ezekiel36:22 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian keimah in Israel mite tungah ka gen ding thute hih bangin gen in: Israel mite aw
Ezekiel36:23 Note in minam dangteʼ lakah na daisak sa uh a lian ka min siangtho pen tu-in minam dangteʼ lakah a sianthona ka langsak ding hi. Keimah in minam dangteʼ lakah ka sianthona ka lah nadingin note kong zang ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu amaute in hong thei ding uh hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi.
Ezekiel36:24 Gam khempeuh le minam khempeuhte lak panin note hong kaikhawmkikin na gam uh ah kong tunpihkik ding hi.
Ezekiel36:25 Note tungah tui siangtho kong theh dinga
Ezekiel36:26 Note sungah lungtang thak le lungsim thak kong guan dinga
Ezekiel36:27 Note sungah keima kha kong guang dinga
Ezekiel36:28 Tua ciangin na pu na pate uh tungah ka piak sa gamah na teeng ding uh a
Ezekiel36:29 Note hong ninsak thei ding na khempeuh panin kong hu ding hi. An tampi ka piangsak dinga
Ezekiel36:30 Na singgah kungte uh le na lo lai ante uh tampi tak ka phasak dinga
Ezekiel36:31 Na gamtatna sa uh na gitlohnate uh le na hoih lohnate uh na phawkkik ding uh a
Ezekiel36:32 Israel mite aw
Ezekiel36:33 “Na mawhna khempeuh panun note kong siansak khit ciangin na khuapite uh sungah hong teengsakkikin
Ezekiel36:34 Na lote uh a nawk kha ngei miteʼ muhna ah gammang tulak a bat ngei hangin
Ezekiel36:35 Hih leitang pen gammang tulak a bang ngei hi napi-in tu-in Eden Huan a batna le a kisusia
Ezekiel36:36 Tua ciangin noteʼ kimkot ah a om a suakta lai minam dangte in a sia sa khuapite lamkikin
Ezekiel36:37 “Tu-a teng bek hi loin a dang zong ka hih lai ding hi. Keima tung pan Israel mite huhna ka ngensak dinga
Ezekiel36:38 Tuhunin a sia-in a omcip khuapite pen a kiseh pawi hun ciangin biak nadingin a kipaipih

Ezekiel38:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw
Ezekiel38:3 Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi
Ezekiel38:4 Nang hong lehhei-in
Ezekiel38:5 Persia gam
Ezekiel38:6 Leilu lam gam pek a om Gomer gam a galkapte khempeuh le Beth-togarmah gam a galkapte khempeuh in nang hong panpih uh a
Ezekiel38:7 Tua ahih manin tu-in nang le na pawlte khempeuh a kigalging sa-in om unla
Ezekiel38:8 Minam tuamtuamte lak panin kikaikhawmkikin a gam uh a kitutkik zawh gallauna nei loin a om Israel miteʼ gam a sim dingin kum tampi khit ciangin kong sawl ding hi. Sau veipi sung kinusia-in gamkhing a suak ngei hi napi-in
Ezekiel38:9 Nang le na galkap honpite le nang hong pawlpih minam tampite in khuapi huih bangin na sim gawp ding uh a
Ezekiel38:10 “Topa Pasian ahi keimah in nang Gog tungah kong genin ah: Tua hun ding hong tun ciangin na lungsim sungah gitloh gamtat ding ngaihsut na kipan ding hi.
Ezekiel38:11 A khuapite in galnanna ding kulh nei loin
Ezekiel38:12 A sia ngeisa khuapite sungah a teeng mite luhin a nate uh na sut gawp ding hi. Tua mite pen minam tuamtuamte lak panin a kikaikhawmkik
Ezekiel38:13 Sheba mite le Dedan mite le Tarshish khuapite ah a teeng sumbukte in nang kiangah
Ezekiel38:14 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in kei kiangah
Ezekiel38:15 leilu lam pek a na omna gam panin sakol tung vive ah a tuang
Ezekiel38:16 khuapi huih in gam sung a nawk gawp bangin keima mi Israel-te na sim ding hi. A hun a tun ciangin
Ezekiel38:17 Ni khat ni ciangin Israel mite a sim dingin mi khat ka sawl ding hi
Ezekiel38:18 “Ahi zongin Gog in Israel gam a sim ni ciangin ka heh suak mahmah ding hi.
Ezekiel38:19 Tua ni ciangin ka hehluatna tawh Israel gamah nakpi takin zin liing hen
Ezekiel38:20 Ngasate le vasate
Ezekiel38:21 Gimna a tuamtuamte tawh Gog ka lausak gawp ding hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi. Ama mite khatlekhat namsau tawh kisat gawp ding uh hi.
Ezekiel38:22 Pulnatna le sisan luanna tawh amah gim ka pia ding hi. Amah le a galkap honte le amah a panpih minam tampite tungah guahpi
Ezekiel38:23 Hih bangin hihna tawh a lian a siangtho ka hihna thu
Ezekiel39:1 Topa Pasian in kei kiangah
Ezekiel39:2 Mun dang khat ah nang kong paisak dinga
Ezekiel39:3 Tua lai mun panin na veilam khut ah na tawi na thal hong bet khiatsakin
Ezekiel39:4 Nang le na galkap honte le nang hong panpih minam khempeuhte pen Israel mual tung gamah na si mang ding uh a
Ezekiel39:5 Topa Pasian in hih thu gen khin ka hih manin gamlak ah na tuk zeizai ding uh hi.
Ezekiel39:6 Kuamah in nawngkaisak loin nuam takin mite a om hithiatna Magog gam sung le tuipi gei-a gamte ka hal dinga
Ezekiel39:7 Keima mi Israel-te lakah ka min siangtho ka kitheisak dinga
Ezekiel39:8 Topa Pasian in
Ezekiel39:9 Israel gam khuapite ah a teeng mite kuan khia-in
Ezekiel39:10 Amaute in mei cih dingin a kinusia galhiamte nei uh ahih manin gamlak ah sing tom kul lo dinga
Ezekiel39:11 Topa in
Ezekiel39:12 Israel mite in a gam sung uh a siansakkik nadingin misi vuina in kha sagih sung hun bei ding hi.
Ezekiel39:13 Gam sunga om mi khempeuh in misi vuina ah huh ding uh a
Ezekiel39:14 Kha sagih a cin khit ciangin
Ezekiel39:15 Gam sungteng a zon kawikawina uh ah misi guh a muh simun
Ezekiel39:16 (Tua galkap honpiteʼ min tamin a gei ah khuapi khat om hi.) Tua bangin gam sung siangsak ding uh hi
Ezekiel39:17 Topa Pasian in kei kiangah
Ezekiel39:18 Tuutalte
Ezekiel39:19 Biakna dinga gawh bangin hih mite ka gawh ciangin vasate le ganhingte in a nek zawh zahzah uh a thaute ne ding uh a

Ezekiel40:1 Jerusalem khuapi a kilak zawh a kum sawm le kum lina kum
Ezekiel40:2 Ka maang sungah
Ezekiel40:3 Amah in tua khuapi nai ah hong paipih a
Ezekiel40:4 Tua mipa in kei kiangah
Ezekiel40:5 Ka muh pen biakinn na hi a
Ezekiel40:6 Tua ciangin nisuahna lam a om kulh kongpi ah amah pai a
Ezekiel40:7 Tua banah lampi khat om a
Ezekiel40:8 Hih inn dei gol zaw a teh ciangin pi 14 pha hi.
Ezekiel40:9 Hih inn dei pen biakinn tun nading lampi tawpna hi a
Ezekiel40:10 (Hih lampi pang tuak a om galvilna inn dei neute pen a golna kikim a
Ezekiel40:11 Tua ciangin a mipa in a lampi teh a
Ezekiel40:12 Tua galvilna inn dei neu mai ciatah letmat sawm nih sangin letmat sawm nih a sah kidalna khat a om hi. (Hih galvilna inn dei neute pen a dung a vai pi sawm tuak ahi hi.)
Ezekiel40:13 Tua ciangin inn dei neu kawm nung panin lampi kantanin a gal san a inn dei neu kawm nung dong teh a
Ezekiel40:14 Inndei nunung pen zomah biakinn tual om a
Ezekiel40:15 Kulh kong pua panin inn dei nawlnung kawm pua dong lampi sauna pi 84 a pha hi.
Ezekiel40:16 Hih inn dei neuteʼ kawm a pualam pangah tawlet neu om a
Ezekiel40:17 Tua ciangin a mipa in kongpi tawnin a tual ah hong paipih hi. A tual pualam kawm tawh kizomin inn dei sawm thum om a
Ezekiel40:18 Hih suangphah pen a tual kimkot ah om a
Ezekiel40:19 Tua ciangin a sung lam tual lut nadingin a sang zaw ah kongpi khat om hi. A mipa in hih kongpi nih kikal a teh ciangin pi 168 a pha hi.
Ezekiel40:20 Tua ciangin a mipa in a pualam tual paina ahi
Ezekiel40:21 Tua bangin a teh ciangin lampi pang tuak a om galvilna inn dei neu thumte
Ezekiel40:22 A inn dei gol zaw
Ezekiel40:23 Nisuahna lam pang a om bang teek mahin
Ezekiel40:24 Tua ciangin a mipa in leitaw lam pangah hong paipih a
Ezekiel40:25 Kongpi dang a omte mah bangin hih lai ah zong inn deite in tawlet nei uh hi. A kongpi lampi pen pi 84 sau-in pi 42 zai hi.
Ezekiel40:26 Tua kongpi lampi tun nadingin kahlei cial sagih mah om a
Ezekiel40:27 Hih lai ah zong tual sung nung paina kongpi lampi khat mah om hi. A mipa in konglekong kikal a teh ciangin pi 168 a pha hi.
Ezekiel40:28 Tua ciangin leitaw lam kongpi tawnin tual sung nungah hong paipih hi. A lampi a teh ciangin a dangte mah tawh kikim hi.

Ezekiel40:33 A galvilna inn dei neute

Ezekiel40:35 Tua ciangin leilu lam kongpi lampi ah hong paipih a

Ezekiel40:41 Tua ahih manin inn dei sungah sabuai li
Ezekiel40:42 Meihal biakna-in piak ding ganhingte bawl nadingin a kizang sabuai lite pen suang a kiseek ahi hi. Tua sabuaite letmat sawm nih sang a
Ezekiel40:43 Hih sabuaiteʼ kimkot ah khut peek cia bang a zai geihual kibawl hi. Biakna-in piak ding sa khempeuh hih sabuaite tungah kikoih hi.
Ezekiel40:44 Tua ciangin a pualam panin a tual sung nungah hong paipih a

Ezekiel40:46 leilu lam a nga inn dei pen biakna tau ah na a sem siampite-aʼ ding ahi hi. Tua siampite khempeuh pen Zadokʼ suan Levi mite vive ahi uh hi. Ama na a sem dingin Topaʼ omna ah amaute bek kipaisak hi
Ezekiel40:47 A mipa in hih tual sung nung a teh ciangin a dung a vai pi za khat le pi sawm guk le pi giat tuak a pha hi. A biakinn mai ah biakna tau khat a om hi.

Ezekiel41:1 Tua ciangin a mipa in a laizang a om inn dei ah hong paipih hi. Tua inn dei lutna lampi teh a
Ezekiel41:2 pi 18 zai a

Ezekiel41:4 Tua inn dei sung nung a teh ciangin a dung a vai pi 34 tuak a pha hi. Tua ciangin amah in kei kiangah
Ezekiel41:5 Tua ciangin amah in biakinn kawm pua nung teh a
Ezekiel41:6 Hih inn dei neute dawl thum pha a
Ezekiel41:7 Tua biakinn kawm pang bel a kibawl inn dei neute sungah kahlei om to a
Ezekiel41:8 Biakinn kimkot teng a lei kitawi to a
Ezekiel41:9 Inndei neute a kawm sahna pi giat pha a

Ezekiel41:16 a sual panin a kongvangneute ciang dong singpeek tawh kidap hi. A tawlette pen a pualam a kihui-in a kibawl ahi hi.
Ezekiel41:17 Biakinn sung lam kawmte pen kongkhak zang ciang dong lim kibawlte tawh kidim a
Ezekiel41:18 nisuh kungte le kherub limte vive ahi hi. A masa-in nisuh kung
Ezekiel41:19 A mihing maitang pen a pang khat lam a om nisuh kung lam nga a
Ezekiel41:20 sual panin kongkhak zang kikal sung khempeuh ah a dimin a om hi.
Ezekiel41:21 Biakinn deipi kongkhak khuamte pen a siik kikim vive ahi hi.

Ezekiel41:24 Tua kongkhakte pen a laizang ah a kituah

Ezekiel41:26 Hih inn deipi sung kawmte tungah a pualam a kihui tawlette om a

Ezekiel43:1 Tua khit ciangin a mipa in biakinn nisuahna lam a om kongpi ah hong paipih a
Ezekiel43:2 nisuahna lam panin Israel-teʼ Pasianʼ minthanna vang hong pai ka mu hi. Pasianʼ awging pen tuipi ging tawh kibang a
Ezekiel43:3 Hih ka maangmuhna pen
Ezekiel43:4 Topaʼ minthanna vang in nisuahna lam kongpi tawnin biakinn sungah a lut hi.
Ezekiel43:5 Tua ciangin Topaʼ kha in hong la-in a tual sung nungah hong paipih a
Ezekiel43:6 Tua lai mun panin kei kiangah a mipa a din laitakin biakinn sung panin Topa in kei hong hopihna ka za a
Ezekiel43:7 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw
Ezekiel43:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh a kumpite un a kongkhuam uh le a kongzawlte uh keima biakinn kongkhuam le kongzawlte tawh kimatin bawl uh a
Ezekiel43:9 Ahi zongin tu-in amaute in pasian dangte bia nawn loin
Ezekiel43:10 Tua ciangin Topa in a thugen hong zom lai a
Ezekiel43:11 Amaute a gamtatna sate uh hangin hong maizum theih uh leh
Ezekiel43:12 Biakinn tawh kisai ngeina in: Mual tung a om biakinn kimkot mun khempeuh pen biakna tawh kisai-in a siangtho ahi hi.
Ezekiel43:13 “Biakna tau golna pen hih bang hi ding hi. A teh nadingin biakinn tehna a kizang ngeite mah hi ding hi. A biakna tau bul kimkot pen letmat sawm nih sangin
Ezekiel43:14 A tau bul panin a tau zawl nuainung ciang pi li hi dinga
Ezekiel43:15 A tungnung pen
Ezekiel43:16 A biakna tau dawnzang pen a dung a vai a kikim hi dinga
Ezekiel43:17 Biakna tau a pai to a laizang san teng pen a dung a vai a kikim
Ezekiel43:18 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in kei kiangah
Ezekiel43:19 Zadokʼ suanlekhak Levi siampite pen keima na a sem dingin ka omna ah a hong pai dingte ahi uh hi. Topa Pasian keimah in hih thu kong pia hi. Mawhna hangin biakna-a piak dingin amaute tungah bawngtal khat na pia ding hi.
Ezekiel43:20 Nangmah in a sisan pawl khat la-in biakna tau kiu li-a om ki lite
Ezekiel43:21 Mawhna hangin biakna-in a kipia bawngtal pen la-in biakinn huang pualam
Ezekiel43:22 A zing ciangin paubaanna a om lo keeltal khat la-in mawhna hangin biakna-in na pia ding hi. Bawngtal si tawh na siansuah mah bangin hih keeltal si tawh zong biakna tau na siansuah ding hi.
Ezekiel43:23 Hih bangin siansuahna na man khit ciangin
Ezekiel43:24 Topa ahi keima kiangah nong paipih ding hi. Siampite in tua ganhingte tungah ci thehin
Ezekiel43:25 Mawhna hangin biakpiakna-in ni sagih sung nisimin
Ezekiel43:26 Siampite in ni sagih sung biakna tau apna bawlin zat theih dingin a baih sa-in omsak ding uh hi.
Ezekiel43:27 Hih bangin ni sagih sung a hih khit uh ciangin
Ezekiel44:1 Tua ciangin a mipa in nisuahna lam biakinn huang kongpi pua ah hong paipih a
Ezekiel44:2 Topa in kei kiangah
Ezekiel44:3 Ahi zongin hih lai ah gam uk na a sem laitak ulian pa pen keima omna ah biakna an siangtho a ne dingin hong pai thei ding hi. Amah hong pai ciangin inn deipi tawnin inn dei sung nung kongvang ah hong lutin tua lai mahah pusuak ding hi
Ezekiel44:4 Tua ciangin a mipa in leilu lam kongpi tawnin biakinn mai ah hong paipih a
Ezekiel44:5 Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah
Ezekiel44:6 A lehdo thei hih Israel mite tungah Topa Pasian keimah in ka gen thute
Ezekiel44:7 Keimah biakna-in sathaute le sasite nong piak uh ciangin
Ezekiel44:8 Ka biakinn sungah biakna ngeinate na zui kei uh a
Ezekiel44:9 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian in tu-in kong genin ah: Vun ki-at lo gamdang mite peuhmah ka biakinn sungah lut lo ding uh a
Ezekiel44:10 No Israel midangte bangin kei hong nusia-in milim a bia Levi mite in zong gim thuak ding uh hi.
Ezekiel44:11 Amaute in biakinn kongcin
Ezekiel44:12 Ahi zongin amaute in milim biakna lamah Israel mite makai-in mawhna sungah Israel mite tunpih uh ahih ciangin
Ezekiel44:13 Amaute in keima siampi na sem loin
Ezekiel44:14 Ahi zongin biakinn sunga nasep a kisam dangte a sem dingin amaute ka seh thei ding hi
Ezekiel44:15 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in keima kiangah
Ezekiel44:16 Ka biakinn sungah amaute lutin
Ezekiel44:17 A tual sung nung paina kongpi ah a lut uh ciangin saihadial puan silh ding uh hi. Tual sung nung sung le biakinn sungah na a sep laitakun samul puan peuhmah silh lo ding uh hi.
Ezekiel44:18 Amaute in saihadial puan khimin
Ezekiel44:19 Midangte a omna biakinn tual pua nungah a pusuah ma-un
Ezekiel44:20 “Amaute in a sam uh mettol lo ding uh a
Ezekiel44:21 Biakinn tual sung nungah a lut ma-un siampite in leenggahzu ne lo ding uh hi.
Ezekiel44:22 Meigong numei ahi a
Ezekiel44:23 “Amaute in ka mite tungah
Ezekiel44:24 Thu nei khat peuhpeuh a om ciangin
Ezekiel44:25 Siampite pen misi lawnna tawh kininsak lo ding uh hi. Ahi zongin
Ezekiel44:26 Amaute a kisiansuah khit uh nipikal khat ciang bekin
Ezekiel44:27 biakinn tual sung nungah pai-in biakinn sungah na a sepkik theih nadingun kisiansuahna biakna pia ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi.

Ezekiel45:1 “Israel minamte tungah piak dingin leitang a kihawm ciangin
Ezekiel45:2 Hih leitang sung panin biakinn ding tawh kisai-in a dung pi za giat sawm li
Ezekiel45:3 Hih biakna leitang siangtho sung panin siangtho pen mun le biakinn mun dingin a sau lam tai sawm
Ezekiel45:4 Hih a kiseh khia mun sungteng pen biakna leitang siangtho hi dinga
Ezekiel45:5 Hih banah
Ezekiel45:6 Khuapi huang sung dingin a dung tai sawm
Ezekiel45:7 “Gam sung a uk uliante adingin zong leitang kiseh khia ding hi. A siangtho leitang le khuapi huang panin kipanin nitumna lamah a gamgi ciang
Ezekiel45:8 Hih mun teng pen Israel gam sung panin Israel ulianteʼ neih hi ding hi. Tua ahih manin amaute in Israel mite bawlsia nawn lo ding uh a
Ezekiel45:9 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: No Israel a uk uliante aw
Ezekiel45:10 “Mi khempeuh in tawisuang man le tehna man zang ding uh hi.

Ezekiel45:12 A gik tehna pen
Ezekiel45:13 “Biakna na piak ding zia uh pen
Ezekiel45:14 sathau na neihzah uh sung pan seh za ah khat (bung tawh tehin bung sawm ciangin beem khat a seh)
Ezekiel45:15 tuu na neih sung uh panin za nih ciangin khat hi ding hi. Hihte pen an tawh biakna
Ezekiel45:16 Israel mi khempeuh in hihte pen biakna-in a piak dingin
Ezekiel45:17 Gam uk ulian pa in biakna-in piak ding ganhingte
Ezekiel45:18 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Kha khatna a ni masa ni-in paubaanna a om lo bawngtal khat biakna-in pia-in biakinn a siangsak ding na hi uh hi.

Ezekiel45:20 Tua bangmahin tua kha a ni sagih ni-in zong
Ezekiel45:21 “A kha masa a ni sawm le li ni-in Paisan Pawi na kipan ding uh a
Ezekiel45:22 Tua pawi bawl a kipat ni-in gam uk ulian pa in amah le mi khempeuh adingin mawhna hanga biakpiakna-in bawngtal khat pia ding hi.
Ezekiel45:23 Tua pawi ni sagih sung nisimin paubaanna a om lo bawngtal sagih le tuutal sagih la-in Topa tungah meihal biakna-in pia dinga
Ezekiel45:24 Bawngtal le tuutal a kipia zah tawh kizui-in an tawh biak nadingin an bung khat pai le sathau biing khat pai tawh pia khawm ding hi.
Ezekiel45:25 “A kha sagihna a ni sawm le nga ni-in nipikal khat sung a kibawl ding Buk Pawi kipan dinga
Ezekiel46:1 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Nisuahna lam a om
Ezekiel46:2 Siampite in meihal biakna le thunuam a biakna a piak laitakun
Ezekiel46:3 Sabbath ni le Khadet nisimin mi khempeuh in zong tua kongpi mai ah Topa bia-in kun ding uh hi.
Ezekiel46:4 Gam uk ulian pa in Sabbath ni-in meihal biak nadingin paubaanna a om lo tuuno guk le tuutal khat pia ding hi.
Ezekiel46:5 Tua ganhingte tawh a piak khawm ding an tawh biakpiak nadingin zong
Ezekiel46:6 Khadet ni ciangin paubaanna a om lo bawngtal khat
Ezekiel46:7 Tuate tawh piakkhop dingin an tawh biakpiak nadingin bawngtal le tuutalte khat ciangin an bung khat pai le tuunote tawh piakkhop ding pen ama piak nop zahzah hi ding hi. An bung khat a piakna ah sathau biing dim khat tawh kizuisak ding hi.
Ezekiel46:8 Gam uk ulian pa in a kuan lamin a tot lampi teng mah a ciah ciangin tawnin
Ezekiel46:9 “A kiseh pawi hunte ah Topa a bia dingin a hong pai mite khempeuh pen a hong lutna kongpi zui-in kilehkik lo ding uh a

Ezekiel46:11 Pawi nite le a kiseh pawi hunte ah an tawh biakna-in piak ding pen
Ezekiel46:12 Gam uk ulian pa in ama utthu in biakpiakna
Ezekiel46:13 “Gam uk ulian pa in meihal biakna-in piak dingin paubaanna a om lo kum khat a pha tuuno khat
Ezekiel46:14 Mangbuhnel lawh dim khat le a meek khop pih ding sathau hai khat tawh
Ezekiel46:15 Tua bangin tuuno
Ezekiel46:16 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Gam uk ulian pa in ama neihsa leitang mun khat peuhpeuh
Ezekiel46:17 Ahi zongin gam uk ulian pa in ama nasemte khat peuhpeuh tungah leitang a piak leh
Ezekiel46:18 Gam uk ulian pa in midangteʼ neihsa leitang laksak ngei lo ding hi. Ama tungah a kipia leitang sung panin a tapate khen khia bek ding hi. Ka miteʼ leitang laksakin
Ezekiel46:19 Tua ciangin a mipa in biakinn tual sung nung leitaw lamah a om kongpi gei-a inn deite ah hong paipih hi. Hih inn deite pen siampiteʼ zat ding a siangtho inn deite ahi hi. Amah in tua inn deiteʼ omna nitumna lam pang mong hong kawk a

Ezekiel47:3 A mipa in a tehna piciang tawi-in a tui luanna nisuahna lam pi tul khat za guk sawm giat ciang dong teh suk a
Ezekiel47:4 Tua ciangin pi tul khat za guk sawm giat ciang teh suk leuleu a
Ezekiel47:5 Tua ciangin pi tul khat za guk sawm giat ciang mah teh suk lai leuleu a
Ezekiel47:6 Tua ciangin amah in
Ezekiel47:7 tua lai mun ka tun ciangin a gun lang nih tuakah singkung tampi tak a po ka mu hi.
Ezekiel47:8 Amah in kei kiangah
Ezekiel47:9 Hih tui a luanna mun peuhpeuh ah ganhing namkim le ngasa tampi om hi. Hih tui in Si Tuipi tui siangsakkikin
Ezekiel47:10 Engedi khua panin Eneglaim khua ciang dong tuipi dungah ngasa bengte omin
Ezekiel47:11 Ahi zongin tuipi dunga om nawnglakte le bualte a om tuite siang lo dinga
Ezekiel47:12 Hih gun pang tuakah a gah nek dingin singkung nam khempeuh po ding hi. A tehte pulh ngei lo dinga
Ezekiel47:13 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in kei kiangah
Ezekiel47:14 Hih gam na pu na pate uh tanh dingin ka piak nading thu
Ezekiel47:15 “Leilu lam gamgi pen
Ezekiel47:16 tua panin Berothah le Sibraim khuapite ah (hih khuate pen Damaskas kumpi gam le Hamath kumpi gam kikalah om hi)
Ezekiel47:17 Leilu lam gamgi pen Mediterranean Tuipi a kipanin nisuahna lam manawhin Damaskas le Hamath gamgi a om Hazarenan khuapi ciang hi ding hi.
Ezekiel47:18 “Nisuahna lam gamgi pen
Ezekiel47:19 “Leitaw lam gamgi pen
Ezekiel47:20 “Nitumna lam gamgi pen
Ezekiel47:21 “Tua ahih ciangin hih gam sungteng
Ezekiel47:22 Note adingin na neih kip tawntung ding uh gamh hi ding hi. Hih leitang na hawm uh ciangin note lakah hong teengin ta a nei khin sa minam dangte zong note mah bangin tanh na pia ding uh hi. Amaute pen Israel minam taktakte mah bangin na ngaihsun ding uh a
Ezekiel47:23 Noteʼ lakah a teeng gamdang mite in amauʼ teenna minamte tawh leitang ngahkhawm ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu kong gen khin hi.

Ezekiel48:11 Hih mun teng pen Zadokʼ suanlekhak siampite ading ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel midangte a gamtat khialh uh ciangin Levi midangte bangin va zui lo uh a

Ezekiel48:14 Topa tungah a kipia hih leitang siangtho pen
Ezekiel48:15 “A om lai leitang
Ezekiel48:16 A khuapi golna a dung a vai-in a kikim hi dinga
Ezekiel48:17 Khuapi kimkot paisuak ah pi za li sawm nih paisuak a zai mun awng om ding hi.
Ezekiel48:18 Khuapi a kilam khit ciangin a siangtho leitang lamah a awng lai
Ezekiel48:19 Khuapi sungah nasemin a om mi peuhmah in Israel minam sung panin kuamah kideidanna om loin hih leitang kho thei ding uh hi.
Ezekiel48:20 Hih a kiseh khia leitang buppi pen a pang li-in tai sawm pai hi dinga

Daniel1:1 Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim kumpi a suah zawh a kum thumna kumin
Daniel1:2 Topa in kumpi Jehoiakim le biakinnpi na manphate kumpi Nebukhadnezzar a mansak hi. Amah in a mi matte Babylon gam ama pasian biakinn ah paipih a
Daniel1:3 Kumpipa in Israel salte sunga kumpi nam le mi lian namte lak pan mi pawl khat a teel khia dingin innsung maang lian pen Ashpenaz thu a pia hi.
Daniel1:4 Tua mite
Daniel1:5 Amaute pen kumpi inn sunga nasem dangte mah bangin nisimin an le leenggahzu tawh a vak dingin kumpipa in thu a pia hi. Tua bangin kum thum sung sinna a neih khit uh ciangin kumpipa mai ah amaute a kilakkik ding uh ahi hi.
Daniel1:6 Tua bangin a kiteelte
Daniel1:7 Innsung maang lian pen pa in amaute min thak phuah a
Daniel1:8 Daniel in kumpi inn sunga an le leenggahzu tawh a pumpi a thanghuaisak loh nadingin a lungsim a khensat hi. Amah in innsung maang lian pen Ashpenaz kiangah tua bang an a kipiak loh nadingin a ngen zaw hi.
Daniel1:9 Tua ciangin Pasian in Daniel tungah Ashpenaz in ngaihsut siamna a neih theih nadingin a bawlsak hi.
Daniel1:10 Ahih hangin Ashpenaz in Daniel kiangah
Daniel1:11 Tua ciangin Daniel zong Ashpenaz in amah le a dang thumte a cing dingin a koihpa kiangah a pai hi.
Daniel1:12 Amah in
Daniel1:13 Tua ciangin kumpipaʼ an a ne khangnote tawh hong en kak khawm inla
Daniel1:14 Amah in amauʼ ngetna bang mangin ni sawm sung ze-et dingin a thukim hi.
Daniel1:15 Ni sawm a cin khit ciangin amaute pen kumpi an nete sangin cidam zaw uh a
Daniel1:16 Tua ciangin a cing pa in kumpi an le leenggahzu pia loin amaute anteh an a pia hi.
Daniel1:17 Pasian in tua khangno lite lai theih siamna le pilna thukte a pia hi. Daniel pen maangmuhna le mangkhiat siamna a pia hi.
Daniel1:18 Kumpipaʼ seh sa kum thum a cin khit ciangin Ashpenaz in khangnote khempeuh kumpipa kiangah a paipih hi.
Daniel1:19 Kumpipa in amaute khempeuh hopih a
Daniel1:20 Kumpipa in bangbang thuhaksa nono a dot hangin
Daniel1:21 Sairas
Daniel2:1 Nebukhadnezzar kumpi a suah zawh a kum nihna kumin mang khat a man hi. A lungsim patau lua mahmah ahih manin a ihmu thei kei hi.
Daniel2:2 Tua ahih ciangin bang mang man cih a hilh dingin mitphial siamte
Daniel2:3 Amaute hong pai-in kumpipa mai ah a din uh ciangin kumpipa in
Daniel2:4 Amaute in Aram pau tawh
Daniel2:5 Kumpipa in
Daniel2:6 Ahi zongin ka mangmat le a khiatna nong gen theih uh leh
Daniel2:7 Amaute in
Daniel2:8 Kumpipa in
Daniel2:9 Ka mangmat nong gen theih kei uh leh note khempeuh thukhenna khat bek kong pia ding hi. No teng khempeuh in lungsim kikhatin zuau thu gengen leeng a ngaihsutna hong kikheel ding hi
Daniel2:10 Khongkhai theite in
Daniel2:11 Kumpipaʼ thudotna pen haksa lua mahmah ahih manin
Daniel2:12 Tua thu hangin kumpipa heh mahmah a
Daniel2:13 Tua ahih ciangin mipilte khempeuh thah lup khitna ding thu kipia a
Daniel2:14 Tua ciangin Daniel zong Babylon gam sunga mipil teng a that lum dingin a kisawl kumpi cing a ukpa Ariok kiangah kampau kidawm takin a va pai hi.

Daniel2:18 Amah in

Daniel2:20 “Pasianʼ min kiphat tawntung tahen; amah pilin a vanglian hi.
Daniel2:21 Amah in hun le khuahunte kheel a
Daniel2:22 Amah in thuthukpite le thusimte a lak khia hi. Amah in khuamial sunga kiseelte thei a
Daniel2:23 Nang pen ka pu ka pateʼ Pasian na hi a

Daniel2:25 Tua ciangin Ariok in thakhatin kumpipa kiangah Daniel paipih pah a
Daniel2:26 Kumpipa in Belteshazzar a kici Daniel kiangah
Daniel2:27 Daniel in
Daniel2:28 Ahih hangin thusim a lak thei vantungah Pasian khat a om hi. Amah in mai lamah bang thu hong piang ding cih nangmah Nebukhadnezzar kumpipa tungah a hong hilh zo hi.
Daniel2:29 Kumpipa na ihmut laitakin mailam a hong piang ding mang khat na man a
Daniel2:30 Tu-in midangte sangin ka pil zawk manin kei tungah tua thu a hong kilak hi loin
Daniel2:31 “Kumpipa aw
Daniel2:32 Tua milim lutang pen kham hoih mahmah tawh a kibawl ahi hi. A awm le a bante ngun tawh kibawl a
Daniel2:33 A khete sik tawh kibawl a
Daniel2:34 Tua banga na et laitakin mual tung panin suangtumpi khat kuama khuk lohin hong tuk a
Daniel2:35 Thakhatin sik
Daniel2:36 “Na mangmat pen tu-a teng ahi hi. Tu-in a khiatna kong gen ding hi.
Daniel2:37 Kumpipa aw
Daniel2:38 Amah in miʼ teenna leitung teng
Daniel2:39 Nangʼ khit ciangin nangʼ kumpi gam sangin a neu zaw kumpi gam a dang khat hong piang dinga
Daniel2:40 Tua khit ciangin kumpi gam lina hong piang dinga
Daniel2:41 A khepek le a khemete khen khat sik le khen khat tungman kigawm ahi na mu hi. Tua pen kumpi gam kikhenthang ding hi
Daniel2:42 A khemete khen khat sik hi a
Daniel2:43 Sik le tungman kigawm na muh mah bangin tua kumpi gam ukte in kigawm ding hanciamin zileta in a kimat ding uh hi. Ahih hangin sik le tungman a kimat theih loh mah bangin a kigawm thei kei ding uh hi.
Daniel2:44 Tua kumpite a maan laitakun vantung Pasian in a bei thei ngei lo ding kumpi gam a hong phut ding hi. Tua kumpi gam kuamah in zo zo lo dinga
Daniel2:45 Kuama lawn lohpi-in mual tung pan hong tuk suk suangtum in sik

Daniel5:18 A Lianpen Pasian in na pa Nebukhadnezzar kumpi lianin koih a

Daniel5:21 Mihingte lak panin amah kihawl khia a
