Daniel5:31 Media mi Darias kumpi a suak hi. (Tua laitakin Darias kum sawm guk le kum nih a pha hi.)
Daniel6:1 Darias in gam sung khempeuh a uk sawn dingin gam ukpi za le sawm nih dingin a ngaihsun hi.
Daniel6:2 Tua ahih ciangin amah in tua gam ukpite tungah a vaihawmpi ding le kumpi deih bang a sem dingin Daniel le a dang mi nih a teel hi.
Daniel6:3 Gam ukpi dangte le vaihawmpi dangte sangin Daniel nasep siam zaw diak se hi. Tua bangin siam zaw diak se ahih manin kumpipa in gam buppi ukin koih ding a ngaihsun hi.
Daniel6:4 Tua ahih ciangin vaihawmpi dangte le gam ukpite in Danielʼ nasepna en cikin a mawhna zon ding a hanciam uh hi. Ahih hangin Daniel pen a thuman le a citak khat ahih manin a mawhna le a simtatna a mu zo kei uh hi.
Daniel6:5 Tua banga nasep kizen lohna le a tatkhialhna a muh loh uh ciangin
Daniel6:6 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah amaute pai uh a
Daniel6:7 Ngattakin zuih ding thukham khat kumpipa in na bawl ding
Daniel6:8 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa aw
Daniel6:9 Tua mah bangin kumpi Darias in a min gelhin thupiakna lai a hawm khia hi.
Daniel6:10 Tua bang thupiakna lai kihawm khia khinzo ta hi
Daniel6:11 Tua ciangin amah a encik mite in Daniel in Pasian kiangah thu a nget a mu uh hi.
Daniel6:12 Amaute khempeuh kumpipa kiangah Daniel a heek dingin a pai uh hi. Amaute in
Daniel6:13 Tua ciangin amaute in kumpipa kiangah
Daniel6:14 Kumpipa in hih thu a zak ciangin lungmang a
Daniel6:15 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah tua mite hong paikik uh a
Daniel6:16 Tua ciangin kumpipa in humpinelkai kikhumna sungah Daniel a khiat dingun thu a pia hi. Amah in Daniel kiangah
Daniel6:17 Amaute in suangtum khat la uh a
Daniel6:18 Kumpipa a inn ah ciahkik a
Daniel6:19 Zingsang khuavak tung phetin kumpipa tho-in humpinelkai kikhumna ah a va pai pah hi.
Daniel6:20 Humpinelkai kikhumna a tun dektak laitakin aw liingkawmin
Daniel6:21 Daniel in
Daniel6:22 Pasian in a vantungmi hong sawl a
Daniel6:23 Kumpipa lungdam mahmah a
Daniel6:24 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Daniel a hek teng khempeuh a zi a ta ciat uh tawh humpinelkai kikhumna sungah khiat dingin thu a pia hi. Amaute humpinelkai kikhumna taw a tun ma-un humpi-nelkaite in bak khat suahin a guh a tangin a balzan gawp uh hi.
Daniel6:25 Tua ciangin Kumpi Darias in leitung a om minamkimte
Daniel6:26 Ka gam sunga om mi khempeuh in Danielʼ Pasian kihta-in a zahtak nadingun thu ka pia hi. “Bang hang hiam cih leh amah a nungta Pasian hi a
Daniel6:27 Amah pen a hon khia pa le a suaktasak pa hi a
Daniel6:28 Tua ahih manin Darias kumpi ahih laitak leh Persia mi Sairas kumpi ahih laitakin Daniel nuamsa-in a om hi.
Daniel7:1 Belshazzar
Daniel7:2 Mun khempeuh panin huihpi hong nungin tuipi tung a seem gawp hi.
Daniel7:3 Tua ciangin tuipi sung panin a kibang lo sa golpi li hong pusuak to uh hi.
Daniel7:4 A masa pen humpinelkai tawh kibang a
Daniel7:5 Tua ciangin a nihna sapi vompi tawh a kibang khat ka mu hi. A nung lam khe tawh dingin a ha tawh nakguh thum pet a
Daniel7:6 Ka et lai leh kamkei tawh a kibang sapi dang khat ka mu hi. A nungzang ah vasa kha tawh a kibang kha li a nei hi. Tua sapi in lutang li nei a
Daniel7:7 Ka et lai leh sapi lina ka mu hi. Tua sapi kihtakhuai mahmah a
Daniel7:8 Tua kite ka et laitakin tuateʼ lakah a dang ki neu khat hong po a
Daniel7:9 Ka et laitakin kumpi tokhomte a hong kikoih hi. A nungta tawntung mipa tua tokhomte khat tungah a tu hi. A puante vuk bangin ngo a
Daniel7:10 tua sung panin meikuang a hong leeng khia niloh hi. Ama nasem ding mihing tul za tampi om a
Daniel7:11 Ka et laitakin tua ki neu in kiphatsakna kamsia a pau ka za hi. Ka et lailai leh tua sapi lian a lina kithat a
Daniel7:12 Sapi dangte ahihleh a vangliatna uh kilak khiatsak a
Daniel7:13 Zan ka maangmuh hun sungin ka khuadak leh mihing tawh a kibang mi khat meii tungah a hong pai ka mu hi. A nungta tawntung mipa kiangah pai-in
Daniel7:14 Amah in vangliatna
Daniel7:15 Ka maangmuhnate in hong liing lawng sakin a hong patausak mahmah hi.
Daniel7:16 Ka pam a ding mite khat kiangah pai-in hihte khempeuh a khiatna hong hilh in
Daniel7:17 “Hih sapi lite pen leitung panin a hong khang khia ding kumpi gam li ahi hi.
Daniel7:18 Ahih hangin a Lianpen Pasianʼ mite in kumpi za ngah ding uh a
Daniel7:19 Tua ciangin a dangte tawh a kibang lo a kihtakhuai sik-ha le sumngo khecin a nei sapi lina thu ka thei nuam hi. Amah in nene-in na khempeuh tuancil gawp hi.
Daniel7:20 Tua ciangin a lu tungah ki sawm le
Daniel7:21 Ka et laitakin
Daniel7:22 Tua ciangin a nungta tawntung mipa hong pai a
Daniel7:23 Hih bangin hilh telna kei a hong kipia hi: “Sapi lina pen leitung a hong om ding kumpi gam lina ding hi a
Daniel7:24 “Ki sawmte pen tua kumpi gam sung panin a hong piang ding kumpi sawmte ahi uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpi dang khat hong piang leuleu dinga
Daniel7:25 “Amah in a Lianpen Pasian langpangin thu gen dinga
Daniel7:26 “Tua ciangin thukhenna hun hong kipan dinga
Daniel7:27 “Hih leitung kumpi gam
Daniel7:28 Hih tangthu a beina hi ta hi. Hih thu ka ngaihsut ciangin keimah Daniel ka lau mahmah a
Daniel8:1 Belshazzar kumpi a suah zawh a kum thumna kumin keimah Daniel in a nih veina maang ka mu hi.
Daniel8:2 Ka maangmuhna ah thakhatin Elam gam sunga om Susa khuapi kulh sungah a omin ka kingaihsun a
Daniel8:3 Ka khuadak toh leh gun gei ah tuutal khat adingin a om ka mu hi. Amah in a sau mahmah ki nih nei a
Daniel8:4 Tua tuutal in a ki tawh nitumna lam
Daniel8:5 A bangci hi ding hiam
Daniel8:6 Ki nih a nei gun gei-a a ding ka muh tuutal kiang a hong phak ciangin a thaneih zahin a si hi.
Daniel8:7 Heh lua mahmah ahih manin tua tuutal lai gawp a
Daniel8:8 Tua keeltal a thahatna hong khangto semsem a
Daniel8:9 Tua ki lite lak pan khatʼ tungah ki neu dang khat hong po a
Daniel8:10 Vantung galkapte nangawn a do zo zah dong dingin a thahatna hong khangto a
Daniel8:11 Amah in vantung galkap kumpipa nangawn do-in
Daniel8:12 Nisim biakpiaknate ah mawhna dim a
Daniel8:13 Vantungmi khat in a dang vantungmi khat kiangah thu a dot ka za a
Daniel8:14 Amah in
Daniel8:15 Keimah Daniel in maangmuhna a khatna thei nuamin ka hanciam hi. Thakhat thu-in mihing mel tawh a kibang khat ka mai ah a hong ding hi.
Daniel8:16 Ulai gun gal panin mihingʼ aw khat hong ging a
Daniel8:17 Gabriel hong pai-in ka kiangah hong dinga
Daniel8:18 Amah in thu a hong gen laitakin sibupin leilak ah ka tuk hi. Ahih hangin amah in hong dom to-in a hong dingsak hi.
Daniel8:19 Amah in
Daniel8:20 Na muh ki nih a nei tuutal pen Media le Persia gam kumpite a cihnopna ahi hi.
Daniel8:21 Keeltal pen Grik kumpi gam hi a
Daniel8:22 Ki po masa pen a kitan khit ciangin a nung a hong po ki lite pen tua gam panin kumpi gam li hong piang ding a cihnopna ahi hi. Ahih hangin tua gamte ahihleh a masa pen kumpi gam zahin a thahat kei ding uh hi.
Daniel8:23 “Tua kumpi gamte a bei ding hun a nai ciangin gilo lua mahmah ding uh ahih manin gim a kipia ding hi. Tua ciangin ama thu bek thu a sa
Daniel8:24 Amah thahat mahmah dinga
Daniel8:25 A lungsim daplan lua ahih manin zuauphuah siamna tawh a hih khempeuh a tangtun ding hi. Amah kiliansak lua-in theih kholh lohin mi tampi susia-in
Daniel8:26 Hih zingsang le nitak biakpiakna maangmuhna thu a hong kihilh telna pen a man ahi hi. Tu-in hih maangmuhna thu a hong tun ding hun sawtpi hi lai ding ahih manin imcip phot in
Daniel8:27 Keimah Daniel
Daniel9:1 Media mi ahi Ahasuerasʼ tapa Darias in Babylon gam teng a uk hi.
Daniel9:2 Amah kumpi a suah a kum masa kumin keimah Daniel in
Daniel9:3 An ngawlin
Daniel9:4 Topa ka Pasianʼ kiangah thu ngenin ka miteʼ mawhna ka pulak hi. Keimah in
Daniel9:5 “Kote ka hih uh leh ka gilo uh a
Daniel9:6 Ka kumpite uh
Daniel9:7 Topa
Daniel9:8 Ka kumpite uh
Daniel9:9 Nang pen hehpihna tawh kidimin mawhna na maisak a
Daniel9:10 Topa Pasian aw
Daniel9:11 Israel-te khempeuh in na gen sa thute le na thukhamte khempeuh a palsat khinzo uh hi. Na tungah khialhna kong bawl manun
Daniel9:12 Na gen sa bangin kote tung le ko hong ukte tungah na hong bawl zo hi. Leitung a om khuapi dang khatpeuh sangin Jerusalem khuapi a nasia zaw-in gim na pia hi.
Daniel9:13 Mosesʼ thukham sunga kigen gimna khempeuh ka thuak uh hi. Topa Pasian aw
Daniel9:14 Topa Pasian aw
Daniel9:15 “Koteʼ Topa Pasian aw
Daniel9:16 Nang na siangtho hi. Tua ahih ciangin Jerusalem tungah hong heh nawn peuhmah kei in. Tua pen na khuapi hi a
Daniel9:17 Pasian aw
Daniel9:18 Pasian aw
Daniel9:19 Topa aw
Daniel9:20 Keima mawhna le ka mipih Israel-teʼ mawhna pulakin
Daniel9:21 Thu ka nget laitakin ka maangmuh masak sunga ka muh mipa Gabriel
Daniel9:22 Amah in
Daniel9:23 Pasian tungah thum dingin na kisak laitakin amah in a hong za zo hi. Pasian in nang hong it ahih manin
Daniel9:24 “Na mite le khuapi siangtho
Daniel9:25 Hih thu ciamteh inla thei in: Jerusalem lamkikna ding thu a kipiak hun a kipan sathau kinilh pa hong pai dong kum sagih mun sagih sung hi ding hi. Jerusalem kongzing lampi nei le kulhpi nei-in kilamkik dinga
Daniel9:26 Tua hun a bei khit ciangin sathau kinilh pa thuman lopi-in a kithat ding hi. Galsim dingin a hong pai galkap maang lianpa in khuapi le biakinnpi a susia ding hi. A beina pen tuiciin tun bang hi dinga
Daniel9:27 Tua makai pa in mi tampite tawh kum sagih sung thuciamna kip bawl ding uh hi. Gan gawh biakna le biakpiakna
Daniel10:1 Sairas
Daniel10:2 Tua hun laitakin keimah Daniel
Daniel10:3 Zu le sa ahi a
Daniel10:4 Tua kum a kha masa
Daniel10:5 Ka nung lam ka et toh leh puan pak silhin kham kawnggak tawh a kawng a gak mi khat ka mu hi.
Daniel10:6 A pumpi
Daniel10:7 Tua maangmuhna keimah bek in ka mu hi. Ka gei-a om midangte in bangmah a mu kei uh hi. Amaute lau uh ahih manin tai mangin a bu uh hi.
Daniel10:8 Kei guak bek hong kinusia ahih manin tua a lamdang maangmuhna keimah guak bek mah in ka mu hi. Ka thaneih teng bei khin a
Daniel10:9 Tua mipaʼ kampau ka zak ciangin ka khuplamin leilak ah tuk sukin khua ka phawk nawn kei hi.
Daniel10:10 Tua laitakin ka khut khatin hong phong to a
Daniel10:11 Amah in
Daniel10:12 Tua ciangin amah in
Daniel10:13 Persia gam a cing vantungmi in ni sawm nih le khat sung kei a hong nial hi. Tua ciangin kei a hong huh dingin vantungmi thupite khat ahi Mikhael a hong pai hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Persia gam sungah keimah guak bek ka om hi.
Daniel10:14 Mailam hunah na mipihteʼ tunga hong tung ding thu a hilh khol dingin a hong pai ka hi hi. Hih pen mailam a hong piang lai ding maangmuhna ahi hi
Daniel10:15 Amah in hih thu a hong gen ciangin kei bangmah pau thei loin lei ka en suk gega mawk hi.
Daniel10:16 Tua ciangin pasal mel tawh a kibang mi khat thakhatin ka mai ah hong om a
Daniel10:17 A topaʼ mai ah a ding sila khat tawh ka kibang hi. Bangci bangin thu hong gen thei ding ka hi hiam? Husanʼ zawh nading thatang nangawn ka nei kei hi
Daniel10:18 Ahih hangin khatvei hong lenkik leuleu a

Daniel10:20 Amah in
Daniel10:21 
Daniel11:1 Israel a cing vantungmi pen kei hong huhpa le a hong dal pa ahi hi
Daniel11:2 Tua ciangin amah in
Daniel11:3 Tua ciangin a minthang kumpi khat a hong kilang ding hi. Amah in gam zaipi tak uk dinga
Daniel11:4 Ahih hangin a thahat pen laitakin a gam hong kitam dinga
Daniel11:5 “Egypt kumpipa a hong thahat ding hi. Ahi zongin a galkap maang lian pente khat thahat pen dinga
Daniel11:6 Kum sauvei sim khit ciangin Egypt kumpipa in a kipawl khawm theih nadingin Syria kumpipa le ama tanu a kiteengsak ding hi. Ahih hangin tua kipawlkhawmna kip lo dinga
Daniel11:7 “A sawt loin tua numeiʼ behte khat in Syria kumpi sim dinga
Daniel11:8 Amah in amauteʼ milim pasian-te le a na manpha ngun le khamte Egypt gamah a pua ding hi. Kum tawmvei sung bek kilemna a om ding hi.
Daniel11:9 Syria kumpipa in Egypt gam sim dinga
Daniel11:10 “Syria kumpipaʼ tate
Daniel11:11 Egypt kumpipa zong heh mahmah in Syria kumpipa sim gawp dinga
Daniel11:12 A galhatna hang le galkap tampi a thahna hangin kisathei mahmah dinga
Daniel11:13 Syria kumpipa khatvei kuankikin a masa sangin galkap a tam zaw a kaikhawm ding hi. A hun kicing ta a sak ciangin galkap tampi le galhiam kicing piikpeek tawh a kuan khia ding hi.
Daniel11:14 “Tua hun ciangin mi tampi tak in Egypt kumpipa a lehdo ding uh hi. Danielʼ mipihte ahi
Daniel11:15 Tua ahih ciangin Syria kumpipa in kulhpi tawh a ki-umcih khuapite luh zo-in a la khin ding hi. Egypt galkapte in gal dosuak zo nawn lo ding uh a
Daniel11:16 Galdo zo ding om nawn lo uh ahih manin a galte uh a ututin a gamta ding uh hi. Thuciam Gamah zong lutin a khut sungah tua gam a om ding hi.
Daniel11:17 “Syria kumpipa in a galkap neih khempeuh zangin galsim ding a ngaihsun ding hi. Olno takin a gualzawh theih nadingin a tanu le a galte tensak ding a ngaihsun ding hi. Ahih hangin a tangtung zo kei veve ding hi.
Daniel11:18 Tua khit ciangin tuipi tungtawnin minam dangte sim dinga
Daniel11:19 Kumpipa a kulhpi a zuankik dingin a gamah hong ciah dinga
Daniel11:20 “Tua ciangin kumpi dang khat in ama nung hong zuikik leuleu dinga
Daniel11:21 “Ama zomah Syria kumpi ding pen migilo
Daniel11:22 Ama thu a nial galkap honpite le Pasianʼ siampi liante khempeuh a mangthangsak ding hi.
Daniel11:23 Zuaugen siamna zangin minam dangte tawh kilemna a bawl ding hi. Minam tawmno khat bek a uk hangin a thahatna a khang semsem ding hi.
Daniel11:24 Amah in a pu a pateʼ hih ngei loh
Daniel11:25 “Egypt gam hang takin a sim theih nadingin galkap tampi a kaikhawm ding hi. Egypt-te in zong galkap tampi tawh nasia takin a na do ding uh hi. Ahi zongin Egypt kumpipa in khemna thuak ding ahih manin gal a zo kei ding hi.
Daniel11:26 Ama muan pen a thudot mipilte in amah leh bawlin a siasak ding uh hi. A galkapte tampi tak si ding ahih manin gal a lel ding hi.
Daniel11:27 Tua kumpi tegel in sabuai khat tungah tu-in an a nekhawm ding uh hi. Ahih hangin a ngaihsutna uh a hoih zawsang om tuan lo ahih manin a kikhem tuak ding uh hi. A hun tung nai lo ahih manin a deih bang uh a ngah zo kei uh hi.
Daniel11:28 Tua ciangin Syria kumpipa
Daniel11:29 “Tua nung ciangin Egypt gam simkik leuleu dinga
Daniel11:30 Rom mite
Daniel11:31 A galkapte pawl khat in biakinnpi le biakinnpi huang a ninsak ding uh hi. Amaute in nisim biakpiaknate khawlsak ding uh a
Daniel11:32 Kumpipa in tua biakna a nusia mite a thu zawh theih nadingin zuaugen siamna a zang ding hi. Ahih hangin Pasianʼ nung a zui mite ahih uh leh thahatin a gualzo ding uh hi.
Daniel11:33 Pilna a nei mite in a pilna uh midang tampite tawh a neikhawm ding uh hi. Ahih hangin tawl khat sung mi pawl khat in gal sung a sihna le meikuang sunga thahna a thuak ding uh hi. Mi pawl khatte in lawk gawpna le thongkiatna a thuak ding uh hi.
Daniel11:34 Tua bangin thahna a thuak laitakun
Daniel11:35 Mi pawl khat in thahna a thuak ding uh hi. Tua bangin a pianna thu pen beina a tun mateng sianthosakna le mipha le misia khentelna
Daniel11:36 “Syria kumpipa a ut bangbangin a gamta ding hi. Amah in
Daniel11:37 Kumpipa in a pu a pateʼ biak pasian le numeite in a it pasian a thusim kei ding hi. Pasian a kici peuhmah khat beek a thusim kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate sangin amah a lian zaw-in a kingaihsun hi.
Daniel11:38 Tua pasian-te sangin kulhpi a dal pasian a thupi sim zaw ding hi. Amah in kham
Daniel11:39 Amah in a kulhpi a ciang dingin pasian dang a biate a sawl ding hi. Amah in amah kumpi-in a sang mite minphatna
Daniel11:40 “Syria kumpipaʼ hun a bei dektak ciangin
Daniel11:41 Amah in Thuciamna Gam zong sim dinga
Daniel11:42 Amah in gam tampi tak sim dinga
Daniel11:43 Amah in Egypt gam sunga kiseel ngun le kham le a neihsa uh na manpha khempeuh a la ding hi. Amah in Libya le Ethiopia gam zong a zo ding hi.
Daniel11:44 Tua ciangin
Daniel11:45 Amah in a kumpi puanbuk lianpite biakinn dinna mual tung le tuipi kikalah a lam ding hi. Ahih hangin amah a si ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah a huh ding kuamah a om kei hi
Daniel12:1 Tua ciangin saihadial puan a silh vantungmi in
Daniel12:2 A si sa mi tampite in nuntakna a ngahkik ding uh hi. Pawl khatte nungta tawntung ding uh a
Daniel12:3 A pilte ahih uh leh vantung khuavak tawh a taang khawm ding uh hi. A pha-in gamtat ding mi tampi a hilhte pen aksi bangin a taang tawntung ding uh hi.
Daniel12:4 Tu-in Daniel aw
Daniel12:5 Tua ciangin keimah Daniel in gun pang tuak a ding mi nih ka mu hi.
Daniel12:6 Tua mite khat in puan pak silh a
Daniel12:7 Puan pak silhpa in a khut tegel vantung lamah laam to-in
Daniel12:8 A thugen za napi-in teltakin ka thei kei hi. Tua ahih ciangin
Daniel12:9 Amah in
Daniel12:10 Mi tampite kisiansuahin a hoih le a hoih lo a kikhentel ding uh hi. Migilote in bangmah thei tel thei lo uh ahih manin a gilo semsem ding uh hi. Ahih hangin mipilte in theih tel theihna a nei ding uh hi.
Daniel12:11 Amaute in nisim biakpiakna a khawlsak
Daniel12:12 Ni tul khat za thum sawm thum le nga sung muanhuai takin a ngak zo kenkante in thupha a ngah ding uh hi.
Daniel12:13 Nang Daniel na hih leh a tawp dong muanhuai takin om in. Tua ciangin na si dinga

Hosea4:1 Israel mite aw
Hosea4:2 Mite in thuciamna bawl napi-in a thuciamte uh palsat uh hi. Zuau genin
Hosea4:3 Tua ahih ciangin leitang keugaw-in a tunga teng khempeuh si dinga
Hosea4:4 Kuamah in mihonte mawhsak kei henla
Hosea4:5 A sun a zan cih om loin na nasepnate uh a kimanna mel om lo hi; kamsangte zong note bangmah hi lel hi. Na nu uh Israel ka susia ding hi.
Hosea4:6 Ka mite in kei hong phawk lo uh ahih manin ka susia ding hi. No siampite in kei hong phawk nuam loin
Hosea4:7 Siampi tam semsem leh kei tungah a khialhna uh tam semsem hi. Amauʼ minthanna pen mindaina ka suaksak ding hi.
Hosea4:8 Ka miteʼ mawhna amaute in hauhlawh uh a
Hosea4:9 Miteʼ thuak dingin a kilawm gimna mah siampite in zong thuak ding uh a
Hosea4:10 Amaute
Hosea4:11 Leenggahzu in ka miteʼ thungaihsut theihna beisak hi.
Hosea4:12 Ka mite in aisanin singthem peuh thudotin nei uh a
Hosea4:13 Amaute in mual sangte dawna biakna munte ah biakna pia uh a
Hosea4:14 Na tanute uh a paktat manin gim ka pia kei dinga
Hosea4:15 Kei tungah no Israel mite citak loin nong taisan hangun

Hosea4:17 Israel mite
Hosea4:18 Amaute

Hosea5:1 No siampite aw
Hosea5:2 Note in miteʼ kiat nadingin Shittim ah gum a thukpi-in na to uh hi; hih thu hangin note kong thuhilh ding hi.
Hosea5:3 Israel-teʼ gamtatna khempeuh ka thei khin a
Hosea5:4 Amauteʼ gamtatna in a Pasian kiang uh zuansak thei lo hi. Amaute in nakpi takin milim biaknopna lungsim nei uh ahih manin Topa phawk kha lo uh hi.
Hosea5:5 Israel-teʼ kiphatsakna pen amau mahʼ siat nading ahi hi. Amauʼ mawhna in amaute puksak dinga
Hosea5:6 Topa tungah biakna-in piak dingin a tuute uh le a bawngte uh paipih ding uh a
Hosea5:7 Topaʼ tungah amaute citak lo uh a
Hosea5:8 Galdo nading zaksakna in Gibeah khua ah tuutal ki tum unla
Hosea5:9 Gimthuak ni hun hong tun ciangin Israel mite in siatna thuak ding uh hi. A tung taktak ding thu
Hosea5:10 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Judah mi uliante in gisuang khinin midangteʼ leitang keeksak uh ahih manin amaute tungah ka heh a
Hosea5:11 Israel in zong gimna thuakin a cimawh hi ta hi; bang hang hiam cih le kei kiangah hong pai nuam loin piak ding bangmah a nei lote kiangah huhna ngen dingin pai hamtang hi.
Hosea5:12 Tua ahih manin Israel ka beitumsak dinga
Hosea5:13 Israel in ama cinatna kithei-in
Hosea5:14 Humpinelkaiʼ suk gawp bangin Israel le Judah ka su gawp ding hi. Keimah teekteek in amaute bal gawpin ka paisan ding hi. Amaute ka tal kaih gawp dinga
Hosea5:15 Ka mite in a mawhna hangun gimna thuakin kei hong zonkik mateng ka tua ci nusiat phot ding hi. A lungkham uh ciangin kei hong zong ding uh hi.
Hosea6:1 Amaute in
Hosea6:2 Ni nih sungin eite hong thahatsak dinga
Hosea6:3 Topa i theih zawh nadingin hanciam ni. Zingsang sialin pel loin khua a vak mah bangin pel loin eite kiangah amah hong pai dinga
Hosea6:4 Israel le Judah aw
Hosea6:5 Tua ahih manin note a hong thuhilh ding le note a hong taii dingin ka kamsangte kong sawl hi. No ka miteʼ gamtat ding ka deih zia kitel sinsen hi.
Hosea6:6 Keima deih pen nong it tawntung ding uh hizaw a
Hosea6:7 Ahi zongin ka ciamna gam a tun uh ciangin amaute in Adam khua ah ka thuciamna palsat uh a
Hosea6:8 Gilead pen migilo hontangteʼ omna khuapi hi a
Hosea6:9 Zawhthawh thu-in miʼ na a sut dingin a pangsim mite bangin siampite gamta uh a
Hosea6:10 Israel mite lakah siatna lianpi khat ka mu hi. Milim biakna tawh amaute kininsak uh hi.
Hosea6:11 No Judah mite zong gim kong piak ding hun kiseh khinzo hi. Ka mihingte a ngei uh bangsakkik ning
Hosea7:1 Israel-te a ci uh damsakkik ning
Hosea7:2 Amauʼ gamtat siatna khempeuh ka phawk lamtak amaute in ngaihsutin nei kha lo uh hi. Amauʼ mawhna in amaute gakcip a
Hosea7:3 Amaute in a zuaupi teng uh tawh kumpipa lungdamsak uh a
Hosea7:4 Amaute zuautatin citak lo uh hi. Amaute pen
Hosea7:5 Kumpipa in pawi a bawl ni-in amaute in uliante zu khamsakin haisak uh a
Hosea7:6 Tua bangin amauʼ sawm simna mei bangin hong kuang hi. Zan thapai-in a hehna uh mei bangin khukhu a
Hosea7:7 A hehluatna uh tawh amau a ukte a that lum uh hi. A kumpite uh khat khit khat a banbanin kithat a
Hosea7:8 Israel
Hosea7:9 A kipawl pih minam dangte in a thahatna teng uh teeptum a
Hosea7:10 Israel miteʼ kiphatsakna in amauʼ lang khat ah teci pang hi. Ahi zongin hih thu khempeuh ah zong
Hosea7:11 Israel pen a khemnop kawl vakhu hai tawh kibang hi. Egypt-te kiangah huhna va ngen masa uh a
Hosea7:12 Amaute a va pai laitakun ka ngen tawh amaute ka na siah dinga
Hosea7:13 Amaute in kei hong taisanin hong lehdo uh ahih manin gimna ngahin siatna tuak ding uh hi. Amaute ka hotkhiat nop hangin amaute in kei hong lehgen zawsop uh hi.
Hosea7:14 Amaute in lungsim takpi tawh kei tungah huhna hong ngen lo uh a
Hosea7:15 Amaute khoi-in a thahat mite suaksak napi-in
Hosea7:16 Amaute
Hosea8:1 Pataukohna peengkul tum in. Galte in muvanlai bangin ka gam a leenlak dingin hong kithawi uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka mite in ka thuciamna uh pelhin
Hosea8:2 Amaute in kei pen amauʼ Pasian
Hosea8:3 amaute in a hoih nate paai khia uh ahih manin a galte un delh ding uh hi.
Hosea8:4 Amaute in kei hong dong loin kumpi ding vaihawm uh a
Hosea8:5 Samaria khuapi mite in a biak kham bawng no ka deih kei hi. Tua a bia mite tungah ka heh hi. Amaute in mihoih a suah nading uh bang tanvei ngak lai ding ahi uh hiam?
Hosea8:6 Israel sunga om mi khat in tua milim bawl a
Hosea8:7 Paunak ah
Hosea8:8 Israel khempeuh kinawmvalhin kisusia dinga
Hosea8:9 A hon lak panin a tai khia
Hosea8:10 Tua bangin minam dangte a cial hangun keimah in amaute kaikhawmin gim ka pia veve ding hi. Assiria kumpipaʼ bawlsiatna tawh a sawt loin gimna a ngah ding uh hi.
Hosea8:11 Israel mite in mawhmaisak nading mun biakna tau tam bawl semsem leh mawh nading mun tam a behlap semsem a suak zawsop uh hi.
Hosea8:12 Amaute hilh nading sim zawh loh thukham tampi gelh taleng zong
Hosea8:13 Amaute in gan tawh biak ding utin
Hosea8:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite in amau a Piangsak pa mangngilh uh a
Hosea9:1 Israel mite aw
Hosea9:2 Ahi zongin tua ante
Hosea9:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ gam sungah na omsuak kei ding uh a
Hosea9:4 Gam dangah na om laitakun Topa tungah leenggahzu tawh biakna na pia kei ding uh a
Hosea9:5 A kiseh pawi hunte le Topaʼ pawi hun hong tun ciangin bang cih ding na hi uh hiam?
Hosea9:6 Lungkhamna hun hong tungin
Hosea9:7 Gim thuakna hun hong tung ta a
Hosea9:8 Ama mi Israel-te a vil dingin kamsang nasemin Pasian in kei hong sawl hi napi-in
Hosea9:9 A gamtatna uh gen theih lohin siahuai uh a
Hosea9:10 Topa in hih bangin gen hi: Israel kong muh cil-in hoih mahmah a
Hosea9:11 Israel-teʼ minliatna teng vasa bangin leeng mang dinga
Hosea9:12 Amaute in ta khoi mah ta le-uh zong
Hosea9:13 Tu-in ka mukhol khin hi. Mite in sabet-a a bet ding le
Hosea9:14 Topa aw
Hosea9:15 Topa in hih bangin gen hi: Amauʼ gamtat sia khempeuh Gilgal phual pan a kipan hi a
Hosea9:16 Israel mite ahihleh a zung a keu
Hosea9:17 Amaute in a thu ngai lo uh ahih manin ka Pasian in a mite a nial ding hi. Minam dangte lakah a vakvai mite a suak ding uh hi.
Hosea10:1 Israel mite ahihleh a gah pha mahmah leenggui tawh kibang hi. Cithei semsem leh biakna tau tam lam semsem uh hi. A gam sung uh cithei semsem leh biakna song a hoih bawl semsem uh hi.
Hosea10:2 A lungsim uh man lo ahih manin tu-in a mawhna uh thuak ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in amauʼ biakna taute suzanin
Hosea10:3 A sawt loin hih mite in
Hosea10:4 Amaute a kampi bek uh hi a
Hosea10:5 Bethaven khua-a bawng no milim a taanna uh hangin Samaria khuapi sunga a teeng mite lau-in liing ding uh a
Hosea10:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Assiria gam a kumpi lianpa tungah siah a piak dingin tua milim kipua khia ding hi. Thu kigen zui-in milim a biakna hangun Israel-te mindai-in maizum ding uh hi.
Hosea10:7 Tui tunga tuiphuan laam bangin a kumpite uh maimang ding hi.
Hosea10:8 Israel-te in milim bia-in mawhna a bawlna munte kisusia dinga
Hosea10:9 Gibeah khua ah a khialh uh a kipanin kei tungah hong khialhna uh Israel mite tawp nai lo hi. Tua ahih manin Gibeah khua ah gal in amaute pha ding hi.
Hosea10:10 Hih mimawhte thuhilh nadingin gim ka pia dinga
Hosea10:11 Israel pen limtakin a kihilh sa
Hosea10:12 Khai tuh bangin thuman tuhin
Hosea10:13 Ahi zongin note in thusia na tuh zawsop uh a
Hosea10:14 gal in na mite uh hong sim dinga
Hosea10:15 Israel mite aw
Hosea11:1 Israel a neu lai-in ka it mahmah a
Hosea11:2 Amaute kilim sap semsem leh ka maitang pan gamla pai semsem hi. Ka mite in Baal tungah biakna pia uh a
Hosea11:3 Ahi zongin Israel mite lam a pai theih nading a hilh pa keimah ka hi a

Hosea11:5 Tua bang hi napi

Hosea12:1 Israel mite

Hosea12:4 Vantungmi tawh kilaii-in a zo hi. Tua ciangin Jakob zong kapin ama tung panin hehpihna a ngen hi. Pasian in Bethel munah amah mu-in a hopih hi.

Hosea13:1 Efraim-te beh in thu a gen ciangin a dangte lau uh a
Hosea13:2 Tua hi napi-in amaute khial thuah semsem uh a
Hosea13:3 Tua ciangin amaute pen zingsang a kaai meii lum
Hosea13:4 Kei pen Egypt gam panin note a hong paikhiatpih noteʼ Topa Pasian ka hi hi. Tua hun lai-in kei sim loh Pasian dang na thei kei uh a
Hosea13:5 Sehnel gam keuna sungah note a hong kem pa keimah ka hi hi.
Hosea13:6 Ahi zongin gam hoihna mun tungin na gil uh a vah ciangin na lungsim uh kiphasakin kei nong mangngilh uh hi.
Hosea13:7 Tua ahih manin humpinelkai bangin note hong su gawpin
Hosea13:8 A no a kilaksak vompi bangin note hong su gawpin kong bal gawp ding hi. Humpinelkai bangin hong phualnek pahin
Hosea13:9 No Israel-te kong su gawp ding hi. Kua in note hong huh zo ding ahi hiam?
Hosea13:10 Na kumpi ding uh le na makai dingte uh nong ngen uh hi. Tu-in note hong hon dingin na hong nget uh na kumpipa uh koi ah om a
Hosea13:11 Na kumpi dingte uh kong ngawh piak a
Hosea13:12 Israel miteʼ mawhna le a khialhna teng uh limtakin kiciamteh a
Hosea13:13 Israel mite
Hosea13:14 Misi khua pan ka tan khia diam
Hosea13:15 Israel mite kiak bangin a pung ahi zongin sehnel gam panin nisuahna huih sa mahmah ka nungsak dinga
Hosea13:16 Israel-te in a Pasian uh lehdo uh ahih manin a mawhna uh thuak ding uh hi. Gal sungah amaute si ding uh a

Amos1:1 Tekoa khua-a a teeng tuucingte lakah Amos a kici mi khat om hi. Uzziah pen Judah kumpi hi-in Joashʼ tapa Jeroboam in Israel kumpi a sep laitak
Amos1:2 Amos in
Amos1:3 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Damaskas khua mite thum vei a khialh khit
Amos1:4 Tua ahih manin Hazael innkuante mei tawh ka hal dinga
Amos1:5 Damaskas khua kulhpi zawlte ka sutan dinga
Amos1:6 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Gaza khua mite thum vei a khialh khit
Amos1:7 Tua ahih ciangin Gaza khuapi kulh ka kaangsak dinga
Amos1:8 Ashdod khuapi ah a teeng mite ka la khia dinga
Amos1:9 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Taia khua mite thum vei a khialh khit
Amos1:10 Tua ahih ciangin Taia khuapi kulh ka kaang tumsak dinga
Amos1:11 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Edom mite thum vei a khialh khit
Amos1:12 Tua ahih ciangin Teman gam sung khempeuh ka kaang tumsak dinga
Amos1:13 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Ammon mite thum vei a khialh khit
Amos1:14 Tua ahih ciangin Rabbah khuapi kulh ka hal tum dinga
Amos1:15 A kumpipa uh le a uliante uh salin kiman ding hi.
Amos2:1 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Moab mite thum vei a khialh khit
Amos2:2 Tua ahih ciangin Moab gam sung khempeuh ka kaang tumsak dinga
Amos2:3 Tuate lakah Moab gam ukte ka sisak dinga
Amos2:4 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Judah mite thum vei a khialh khit
Amos2:5 Tua ahih ciangin Judah gam sungteng ka kaang tumsak dinga
Amos2:6 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Israel mite thum vei a khialh khit
Amos2:7 Amaute in mizawngteʼ lutang leivui lakah tuancil uh a
Amos2:8 Biakna tau gei khempeuh ah amaute lum uh a
Amos2:9 Ahi zongin amaute ka khualna hangin taamtak sing bangin a sang mahmah
Amos2:10 No ka mihingte
Amos2:11 Na tapate uh pawl khat kamsang dingin ka teel a

Amos3:2 Leitung minam khempeuh lakah note bek hong thei-in
Amos3:3 Mi nih
Amos3:4 A samat ding mu lopi-in
Amos3:5 Thang antah om lopi-in leilak a thang ah vasa mawk awk ahi hiam? A su khat om lopi-in
Amos3:6 Khuapi sungah pataukohna gal peengkul a kitum ciangin mite lau loin om mawk thei ahi hiam? Topaʼ tunsak lohpi-in khuapi sungah lauhuaina mawk tun ahi hiam?
Amos3:7 Topa Pasian in ama nasem kamsangte tungah ama geelna theisak masa lopi-in bangmah hih het lo hi.
Amos3:8 Humpinelkai a hawk ciangin lau loin ki-om thei ahi hiam? Topa Pasian in thu a gen ciangin kua in ama thu gen loin om thei ding ahi hiam?
Amos3:9 Samaria gam munmuanhuai ah a om mite le Egypt gam munmuanhuai ah a om mite tungah thu zasak unla

Amos3:14 Amauʼ khialhna hangin Israel gim ka piak ni ciangin
Amos3:15 Keimah in phalbi le khuakhal innte ka susia dinga

Amos4:2 Topa Pasian a siangtho ahih mah bangin

Amos4:9 Na ankungte uh lung nesakin ka vulsak a

Amos5:1 Israel mite aw
Amos5:2 Nungak Israel puk khin a

Amos5:4 Tua ahih manin Topa in Israel mite tungah hih bangin ci hi: Kei hong zong un; tua hileh na nungta ding uh hi.
Amos5:5 A bia dingin Beer-sheba ah pai kei un. Bethel ah kei hong zong kei un; a mawkna suak ding hi. Gilgal ah zong lut kei un; Gilgal mite
Amos5:6 Topa zong un; tua hileh na nungta ding uh hi. Amah na zon kei uh leh Josef mite tungah meikuang bangin amah hong kuang dinga
Amos5:7 Thutang lumletin thuman mite lei a denna
Amos5:8 Van a om aksi Seguk le Zawlzawngte bawlin
Amos5:9 Amah in kulh muanhuaite le mun muanhuaite thakhatin susia thei hi.

Amos5:11 Note in mizawngte tuancilin
Amos5:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh na khialhna tampite uh le na mawhna tampite uh a vekin ka thei khin hi. Thuman mite gimsakin
Amos5:13 Tua ahih manin hih bang hun siat hun laitakin thu ngaihsun thei mite
Amos5:14 Note na nuntak theih nadingun siatna gamta loin
Amos5:15 Thusia mudahin thupha deih unla
Amos5:16 Tua ahih ciangin Topa
Amos5:17 Note gim a pia dingin hong pai ding ka hih manin leenggui lo khempeuh ah kahna aw ging ding hi
Amos5:18 Topaʼ ni hong tun ding a ngaklah note adingin bangzah takin lauhuai ding ahi hiam? Note adingin tua ni a hoihna hong om ding ahi hiam? Tua ni pen lungzin ni hi a
Amos5:19 Humpinelkai kihta-in vompi a tuak pa tawh kibang ding hi. Tua ahih kei leh mi khat a inn ah hong tai a
Amos5:20 Topaʼ ni pen khuavak ni hi loin khuamial ni hi a
Amos5:21 Na biakna pawite uh mudahin ka deih kei a
Amos5:22 Meihal biakna le an tawh biakna nong paipih uh hangin tuate kong sang kei ding hi. Thunuam a biakpiak nadingin na hong paipih uh a thau mahmah ganhingte zong et-in ka nei vet kei ding hi.
Amos5:23 La sa-in na gamlumnate uh khawl un; na lasakna uh a gingte ka za nuam kei hi.
Amos5:24 Thutang
Amos5:25 Israel mite aw
Amos5:26 Tua hi napi tu-in note adingin na bawl tawm uh aksi pasian-te ahi Sakkuth le Kaivuan milimte na biak manun
Amos5:27 Damaskas khengin gamdang khat ah sal dingin note kong paisak ding hi

Amos7:3 Topa in zong a lungsim hong kheelkik a

Obadiah1:2 En un
Obadiah1:3 Na lungsim kiphatsakna un note a hong khem zo hi. Note in suang kulhpi beelin mual dawnah na ten manun
Obadiah1:4 Muvanlai bangin sangpi ah leengin
Obadiah1:5 Zanin na kiangah gutate le misuamte hong pai-in supna tampi na thuak hangin a deih teng bek uh hong guksak ding hi lo ahi hiam? Leenggah late in lo lai ah a sangte nusia laitei hi lo ahi uh hiam?

Obadiah1:12 Na sanggamte uh a tuahsiat ni-in mu nuam dah hoh un. Judah mite a kisiat ni-in lungdamin nuam kei un. A kisiat ni-in lungdam kei un. A cihmawh ni-in nuihsan kei un.
Obadiah1:13 Ka mite in haksatna a tuah ni-in a kongpi sungah tum kei un. A tuahsiat ni-in a thuaknate uh mu nuam kei un. A tuahsiat ni-in a sum a paite uh laksak kei un.
Obadiah1:14 A suakta sunte a khaktan dingin na ding kei ding uh hi. A cihmawh ni-in a hing lai sunteng

Zechariah12:14 le beh dang khempeuhte zong a behbehin
Zechariah13:1 “Tua ni hong tun ciangin Davidʼ suanlekhakte le Jerusalem khua miteʼ mawhna le nitna teng khempeuh a silsiang dingin tuinak khat hong phul ding hi.

Zechariah14:1 Topa in na hong sep hun hong tung ding hi. Jerusalem khuapi kiluh gawpin
Zechariah14:2 Jerusalem khuapi a sim dingin Topa in minam khempeuh kaikhawm ding hi. A khuapi kila-in
Zechariah14:3 Tua ciangin Topa hong kuan khia dinga
Zechariah14:4 Tua ciangin Jerusalem nisuahna lamah a om Oliv Mual tungah Topa a ding ding hi. Tua ciangin nisuahna lam pan nitumna lamah Oliv Mual kitamin phel nih suak dinga
Zechariah14:5 Hinnom kuam sung kivukcip dinga
Zechariah14:6 Tua ni hong tun ciangin khua dam
Zechariah14:7 khuamial hun cih zong om lo ding hi. Zan hun nangawnin sun khuavak bek om ding hi. Hih thu a pian ding hun

Zechariah14:9 Tua ciangin Topa pen leitung khempeuhʼ kumpi suak dinga

Zechariah14:12 Tua ciangin Jerusalem khuapi a sim minam dang khempeuhte tungah Topa in gimna lianpi tungsak ding hi. A khe-un a ding thei kimlai mahin a sa uh muat mang dinga
Zechariah14:13 Tua ni ciangin Topa in amaute amkhamsak gawp dinga
Zechariah14:14 Judah mite in Jerusalem khuapi hutna-in galte do ding uh a
Zechariah14:15 Galteʼ phual a om sakolte
Zechariah14:16 Tua bangin galte a kizawh gawp khit ciangin
Zechariah14:17 Minam khat peuhpeuh
Zechariah14:18 Tua gualzawhna pawi a bawl dingin Egypt mite a painop kei leh
Zechariah14:19 Gualzawhna pawi a bawl dingin a pai nuam lo Egypt mite le minam dang khempeuhte tungah a tung ding gimna pen tu-a bang ahi hi.
Zechariah14:20 Tua ni ciangin sakol khilongte khempeuh tungah
Zechariah14:21 Jerusalem khua sung le Judah gam sungah a om beelte khempeuh

Matthew5:1 Jesu in tua bangin mihon tampi tak a muh ciangin mual tung lamah kah to-in tu suk a
Matthew5:2 Tua ciangin a kam ka-in amaute tungah thu hilh ding kipan a
Matthew5:3 “Kha thu lamah zawngkhal a kisate sungah vantung ki-ukna thu om ahih manin thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi.
Matthew5:4 Dahin a thum a tau mite Pasian in amaute hehnem ding ahih manin thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi.
Matthew5:5 A lungnem mite in Pasianʼ ciam sa leitang ngah ding uh ahih manin thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi.
Matthew5:6 Pasianʼ deih teng sep ding a hanciamte Pasian in lungkimna ngahsak ding ahih manin thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi.
Matthew5:7 Midang a hehpih mite tungah Pasian in hehpihna pia ding ahih manin thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi.
Matthew5:8 Lungsim takpi tawh Pasian a zong mite in Pasian mu ding ahih manin thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi.
Matthew5:9 Kilem nading deihin a hanciam mite in Pasianʼ tate cihna ngah ding uh ahih manin thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi.
Matthew5:10 Pasianʼ deihna bangin a gamtat manin bawlsiatna a thuak mite vantung ki-ukna sungah a omte ahih manin thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi.
Matthew5:11 “Midangte in keima hangin a man lopi-in hong simmawhin hong bawlsia a
Matthew5:12 Note adingin vantungah thaman lianpi hong kikoih kholhsak ahih manin tua bang na tuah uh ciangin nuamin na lungdam un. Noteʼ hun ma-a kamsangte zong tua bangmahin a na kibawlsia ngei ahi hi.
Matthew5:13 “Note pen leitung mite adingin ci tawh na kibang uh hi. Ahi zongin ci a alna bei leh i alsakkik theih nading lampi om nawn lo hi. A kizat nading bangmah om nawn lo a
Matthew5:14 “Note pen leitung mite adingin khuavak tawh na kibang uh hi. Mual dawnah a om khua kiseelcip thei lo hi.
Matthew5:15 Mei a vak khit ciangin kuamah in lawh khuh lo hi. Meivakna mun sangah koih zaw a
Matthew5:16 Midangte in na gamtatna hoihte uh a muh ciangin vantungah a om na Pa uh min a phat theih nadingun mite mai ah na gamtat hoihna uh khuavak bangin na kilangsak un.
Matthew5:17 “Moses Thukham le kamsangteʼ thuhilhnate a phiat dingin hong pai hi
Matthew5:18 Hoihtakin na phawk ding uh thu panin: Vanlelei a bei mateng
Matthew5:19 Tua ahih manin hih thukhamte lak pan a neu pente khat bek nangawn zui kha loin
Matthew5:20 Tua ahih manin Pasianʼ deihna bangin gamtat nading thu ah Thukham hilh siate le Farisi mite sangin na cihtak zawk uh leh vantung ki-ukna sungah a om thei bek ding na hi uh hi.
Matthew5:21 “Tanglai mite tungah
Matthew5:22 Ahi zongin keʼn note kiangah kong genin ah: A sanggampa tungah a heh mi in thukhenna thuak kha thei ding hi. A sanggampa kiangah
Matthew5:23 Tua ahih manin Pasian tungah biakna a pia dingin biakna tau mai ah na om laitakin na sanggamte khat peuhpeuh na tungah a lungkim lohna thu na phawk leh
Matthew5:24 Pasian na biak nading nate
Matthew5:25 Nangma tungah mi khatpeuh lungkim loin zumah hong khiat leh
Matthew5:26 A mantakin kong genin ah: Na liau sum na piak khit dong matengin thong sung panin na suakta ngei kei ding hi.
Matthew5:27 “‘Mi zi tungah na mawh kei ding hi
Matthew5:28 Ahi zongin keʼn kong genin ah: Mawhpih nopna lungsim tawh numei khat a en mi peuhmah in a lungsimah tua numei tawh a mawh ahi hi.
Matthew5:29 Tua ahih manin na mit taklam in na mawh nading hong piansak leh khel khia inla paai in. Na pumpi bupin hell khuk sungah hong kikhul sangin na pumpi na khat pelhem leh nang adingin hoih zaw lai hi.
Matthew5:30 Na taklam khut in na mawh nading hong piansak leh sattan inla paai in. Na pumpi bupin hell khuk sungah hong kikhul sangin na pumpi na khat pelhem leh nang adingin hoih zaw lai hi.
Matthew5:31 “‘A zi a ma mi peuhmah in a zi tungah makna lai pia tahen
Matthew5:32 Ahi zongin keʼn note kiangah kong genin ah: Mi khat peuhmah in pasal dang tawh a mawhna hang lobuang
Matthew5:33 “Tanglai-in mite tungah
Matthew5:34 Ahi zongin keʼn note kiangah kong genin ah: Hih ding khat peuhpeuh na neih uh ciangin kiciamna na zang vet kei un. Kiciamna-in vantung na zang kei un - Pasianʼ tokhom hi veve hi.
Matthew5:35 Leitung zong kiciamna-in na zang kei un - Pasianʼ khengakna mah hi veve hi. Jerusalem khuapi zong kiciamna-in na zang kei un - Kumpi lian ahi Pasianʼ khuapi mah hi veve hi.
Matthew5:36 Kiciamna-in na lutang zong na zang kei in. Na lu tunga om samzang khat bek nangawn a kang sa vomsak thei loin
Matthew5:37 Na gen peuhmah ahi ahihleh
Matthew5:38 “Note in
Matthew5:39 Ahi zongin note kiangah keʼn kong genin ah: A gilote na thukkik kei un. Mi khatpeuh in na paang taklam hong bet leh a lang khat zong na dawh lai zaw in.
Matthew5:40 Mi khatpeuh in na puan sungsilh a ngah nop manin zumah hong khia-in hong laksak leh na puan tungsilh zong na pia thuah lai in.
Matthew5:41 Galkapte khatpeuh in tai khat sung a van pua dingin hong sawl leh a valin tai khat sung mah na puaksak lai in.
Matthew5:42 Mi khat peuhpeuh in na khat peuhpeuh hong nget leh na pia inla
Matthew5:43 “Note in
Matthew5:44 Ahi zongin keʼn note kiangah kong genin ah: Na galte uh na it unla
Matthew5:45 Tua hileh vantungah a om na Pa uh tate na hi thei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in mihoihte le misiate tungah a kibangin ni taangsak khawm a
Matthew5:46 Tua ahih manin no hong itte bek na it uh leh Pasian in bang thaman hong pia zenzen ding ahi hiam? Siahdongte nangawn in amau a itte it thei uh hi.
Matthew5:47 Na lawmte bek uh hopihin thupha na piak uh leh mi mawkmawkte sangin na hoihzawkna uh bang om ahi hiam? Gentail mite nangawn in tua bang ciang lel hih thei uh hi.
Matthew5:48 Tua ahih manin vantungah a om na Pa uh a cingtaak mah bangin note zong lungsim citakin na cingtaak nading uh na hanciam un.
Matthew6:1 “Biakna tawh kizomin na hoih khat peuhpeuh na sep uh ciangin miteʼ phat ding deihna tawh a kilang theithei dingin na sep khak loh nadingun na kingaihsun un. Tua bangin gamta le-uhcin
Matthew6:2 “Tua ahih manin mi cimawhte tungah huhna na piak uh ciangin
Matthew6:3 Ahi zongin note in mi cimawhte citna tawh na huh uh ciangin na lawm naihuai pente uh nangawn in hong theih loh nadingun pia unla
Matthew6:4 kuamah theisak kei un. Tua hileh kuama muh lohin na gamtatna uh a mu na Pa un note tungah thaman hong pia ding hi.
Matthew6:5 “Note in thu na nget uh ciangin miteʼ muh theih dingin a kineihkhem mite in kikhopna inn sung le kongzing lamka lai ah a nget nop se uh bangin na gamta kei un. Tua bangin a gamtate in thaman a ngah khinta ahihna uh limtakin phawk un.
Matthew6:6 Ahi zongin thu na nget uh ciangin na inn sung uh ah tumin kong khak unla
Matthew6:7 “Thu na nget uh ciangin i thunget sau leh Pasian in hong pia deuh ding hi
Matthew6:8 Tua na thunget ma nangawnun na Pa un noteʼ kisapna teng hong thei khin ahih manin Gentail mite na bang kei un.
Matthew6:9 Tua ahih manin thu na nget uh ciangin hih bangin na ngen un: ‘Vantung a om koteʼ Pa aw
Matthew6:10 Na ukna hun hong tung henla
Matthew6:11 Nisim khamkhop an hong pia in.
Matthew6:12 Kote tungah a hong mawhte mawhmaisakna ka neih bangun koʼ mawhna zong hong maisak in.
Matthew6:13 Ze-etna lian hong thuaksak keʼn. Giloʼ kiang pan hong hon khia in
Matthew6:14 Note in midangteʼ hong mawhna na maisak uh leh vantungah a om na Pa un zong noteʼ mawhna hong maisak ding hi.
Matthew6:15 Ahi zongin note in midangteʼ hong mawhna na maisak kei uh leh vantungah a om na Pa un zong noteʼ mawhna hong maisak lo ding hi.
Matthew6:16 “An na tan uh ciangin a kineihkhem mite bangin mai khingin om kei un. Amaute in an a tanlam uh mite in a theih ding uh a ut manun gilkial mai pua-in a om uh hi. Amaute in a antan thaman uh a ngah khinta ahih lamtak limtakin thei un.
Matthew6:17 Ahi zongin an na tan uh ciangin na mai uh phiatin na sam uh hiat un.
Matthew6:18 Tua hileh midangte in na an tanlam uh a theih loh hangin na muh theih loh na Pa un hong thei veve dinga
Matthew6:19 “Nget in ne-in a kekseu theihna
Matthew6:20 Nget in a nek theih lohna
Matthew6:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh na sum omna uh ah na lungsim uh om tawntung ding hi.
Matthew6:22 “Mittang pen pumpi adingin meivak tawh kibang hi. Na mit uh ciim leh na pumpi un hoihtakin khua mu thei hi.
Matthew6:23 Ahi zongin na mit uh maang leh na pumpi uh adingin khua a mial hi. Tua ahih manin noteʼ sunga a om khuavak pen a mial hileh tua mialna pen nasia mahmah ding hi.
Matthew6:24 “Kuamah
Matthew6:25 “Tua ahih ciangin note kiangah kong genin ah: Na nuntak nadingun bang ne-in bang dawn ding cih ahi a
Matthew6:26 “Vanah a leeng vasate ngaihsun dih un: Amaute in khai tuh lo
Matthew6:27 Na lunghihmawh manun kua in na khan uh kum bangzah sot to thei na hi uh hiam?
Matthew6:28 Bang hangin puansilh ding lunghimawh na hi uh hiam? Gamlak a om paakte a nuntak zia ngaihsun dih un: Amaute in amau adingin na lah sem lo
Matthew6:29 a hau mahmah Solomon nangawn a hoih penin a kizep ciangin zong hih paakte ban zo nai lo lai hi.
Matthew6:30 Tua ahih ciangin tu ni-in hingin
Matthew6:31 Tua ahih manin bang ne dinga
Matthew6:32 (Gentail mite in lunghihmawh penin a neihte uh hih bangte ahi hi.) Hih nate khempeuh na kisap lamtak uh vantungah a om na Pa un a thei hi.
Matthew6:33 Thudang khempeuh sangin Pasianʼ ukna le ama deihna na zuih theih nading uh thupi ngaihsut masa zaw un. Tua hileh hih na kisapna dangte khempeuh uh zong hong pia thuah veve ding hi.
Matthew6:34 “Tua ahih manin zing ciang hun ading ma lungkham masa kei un. Zing ciang thu ding ama thu-in omsak lel un. Tu ni thu pen tu ni thu mah tawh beisak unla
Matthew7:1 “Pasian in note hong mawhsak loh nadingin midangte va mawh saksak nawn kei un.
Matthew7:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh midangteʼ thu na khen zia uh tawh kizui-in note tungah hong khen dinga
Matthew7:3 Bang hangin na lawmteʼ mit sunga ninthem tang muhsak thei napi-in nangma mit sunga singluang tang phawk thei lo na hi hiam?
Matthew7:4 Nangma mit sungah singluang a tang kimlai
Matthew7:5 No a kineihkhem mite aw
Matthew7:6 “Uite tungah a siangtho nate pia kei un. Pia le-uhcin hong pet zawsop ding hi. Vokte mai ah na suang manphate uh lot kei un. Lot le-uhcin sikcip lel ding uh hi.
Matthew7:7 “Ngen un; na nget uh leh hong kipia ding hi. Zong un; na zon uh leh na mu ding uh hi. Kongkhak na kiu un; na kiuh uh leh hong kihon ding hi.
Matthew7:8 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh a ngente khempeuh in ngah ding uh a
Matthew7:9 Pa ahi note khatpeuh in na tate un anlum hong ngen leh suangtum pia ding na hi uh hiam?
Matthew7:10 Ngasa hong ngen leh gul pia ding na hi uh hiam?
Matthew7:11 Note mihoih lo hi napi-in na tate uh tungah na hoih piak ding ngaihsun thei na hih uh leh vantungah a om na Pa un a ngen mite tungah na hoihte hong pia zaw mahmah ding hi lo ahi hiam?
Matthew7:12 Tua ahih manin note tungah hong kibawl ding na deih bangun midangte tungah na bawl un. Moses Thukhamte le kamsangteʼ thuhilhnate pen hih mah a deihna ahi hi.
Matthew7:13 “Kong kawcik bek tawnin lut un. Hell khuk tun nading kongvang pen lianin a lampi baih a
Matthew7:14 Ahi zongin nuntak tawntungna tun nading kong kawcikin a lampi haksa a
Matthew7:15 “Kamsang taktak ahi lote na muh uh ciangin limtakin kikem un. Amaute in a tungtham ah tuu lim hong pua-in
Matthew7:16 Amauteʼ gamtatna tawh amauʼ pianzia na thei ding uh hi. Lingvom kung panin leenggah kilo ngei a
Matthew7:17 Tua ahih manin singkung cidamte in gah limci gah a
Matthew7:18 Singkung cidamte in gah gina lo gah ngei lo a
Matthew7:19 Gah limci a gah lo singkungte kiphukin meikhuk sungah kikhul hi.
Matthew7:20 Tua ahih manin amauʼ gamtatna tawh amauʼ pianzia na thei ding uh hi.
Matthew7:21 “Kei kiangah
Matthew7:22 Tua ni ciangin mi tampi in kei kiangah
Matthew7:23 Tua ciangin keimah in amaute kiangah
Matthew7:24 “Ka thuhilhna za-in a zui mi khempeuhte pen suang tungah a inn a lam mipil pa tawh kibang ding hi.
Matthew7:25 Guah hong zu-in
Matthew7:26 Hih ka thugente za napi-in a zui nuam lote pen sehnel tungah a inn a lam mihai pa tawh kibang ding hi.
Matthew7:27 Guah hong zu-in
Matthew7:28 Jesu in hih a thugente a man khit ciangin
Matthew7:29 Amah in Thukham hilh siate bangin thu gen loin

Matthew8:17 Kamsang Isaiah in

Matthew9:1 Tua lai panin gunkuang ah tuang leuleu-in tuili gal khat lam a om ama khua ah a va tungkik hi.
Matthew9:2 Mi pawl khat in khutlekhe zaw mi khat
Matthew9:3 Tua ciangin Thukham hilh siate pawl khat in a lungsim uh ah
Matthew9:4 Ahi zongin Jesu in amauteʼ ngaihsutna thei ahih manin
Matthew9:5 ‘Na mawhna hong kimaisak hi
Matthew9:6 Ahi zongin Mihing Tapa in leitungah mawhmaisak theih nading thu nei hi
Matthew9:7 Amah zong tho-in a inn ah a ciah pah hi.
Matthew9:8 Mihonte in hih thu a theih uh ciangin lau mahmah uh a
Matthew9:9 Tua lai mun panin Jesu a paikhiat ciangin siahdongpa Matthai a zumah tu-in a om mu a
Matthew9:10 Jesu in Matthaiʼ inn ah nitak an a nek laitakin siahdong dangte le thukham a khial midang tampite in zong Jesu le a nungzuite tawh an a nekhawm uh hi.

Matthew9:16 Kuamah in a ton nai lo puan bek thak tawh puan lui a phop kei hi. Tua bangin phop leh puan bek thak a ton ciangin a lui kaigawmin a vang a gol semsem ding hi.
Matthew9:17 Kuamah in savun um lui sungah leenggahzu thak thun lo hi. Kithun leh a savun um phukham dinga

Matthew9:20 Tua laitakin kum sawm le kum nih tawntung a si a luang numei khat Jesuʼ nungah hong pai-in a puan mongteep a lawngsim hi.
Matthew9:21 Tua numei in
Matthew9:22 Jesu zong hong kihei a
Matthew9:23 Jew mi ulian paʼ inn ah Jesu a tun ciangin tamngai tum mite le mihonpi a gamlum henhan a muh ciangin
Matthew9:24 “Na vekpi-un paikhia un. Hih numeino a si hi lo a
Matthew9:25 Ahi zongin mihonpite a pua lamah a kipai khiatsak khit ciangin tua numeino omna ah Jesu tumin a khut a va let ciangin tua numeino hong tho hi.
Matthew9:26 Hih thupiang tua gam khempeuh ah a kizel hi.
Matthew9:27 Tua lai panin Jesu a paikhiat ciangin mittaw mi nih in a nungah hong zui-in nakpi takin kiko uh a

Matthew10:1 Jesu in a nungzui sawm le nihte sam a
Matthew10:2 Tua sawltak sawm le nihteʼ min in: A masa-in Simon (Peter zong a kici pa) le a naupa Andru
Matthew10:3 Filip le Bartholomew
Matthew10:4 Simon (gam khual pa) le Jesu a lehhek Iskariotʼ tapa Judas ahi uh hi.
Matthew10:5 Jesu in hih mi sawm le nihte sawl a
Matthew10:6 Tuu bangin a mangthang Israel mite lakah va pai zaw un.
Matthew10:7 Na paina peuh uh ah
Matthew10:8 Cinate damsakin
Matthew10:9 Kham ahi a
Matthew10:10 Khualzinna ah an ngenin puak nading ip ahi a
Matthew10:11 “Khuapi ahi a
Matthew10:12 Inn khat peuhpeuh ah na lut uh ciangin a mite hopihin thupha na pia un.
Matthew10:13 Tua na hopihna uh inn sunga mite in note hong tunsak nop leh na hopihna thupha uh amaute tungah kip dinga
Matthew10:14 Inn khat peuhpeuh in ahi a
Matthew10:15 Thukhen ni ciangin tua khua miteʼ thuakna sangin Sodom khua le Gomorrah khua miteʼ thuakna ol zaw lai ding ahihna thu hoihtakin phawk un.
Matthew10:16 “Ngia hon lakah tuu a kikhah bangin note hong sawl khia ka hih manin gul bangin pilvang unla
Matthew10:17 Mi pawl khatte in note hong manin zumah hong paipih ding uh a
Matthew10:18 Keima hangin gam ukte le kumpite mai ah thu hong kisit ding hi. Hih bang na tuah uh ciangin thu hong sit mite le Gentail mite tungah Lungdamna Thu gen theih nading hunhoih a nei na hi uh hi.
Matthew10:19 Tua bangin thusitna a thuak dingin hong kipaipih ciangin
Matthew10:20 Thu na gen uh ciangin noteʼ gen hi loin
Matthew10:21 Unau le unau
Matthew10:22 Keima hangin Gentail mi khempeuh in note hong mudah ding uh hi. Ahi zongin a tawp dongin a thuak zo mite in hotkhiatna a ngah ding uh hi.
Matthew10:23 Khua khat ah note hong kibawlsiat leh khua dang khat ah tai un. Note kiangah kong genin ah: Israel khua khempeuh na khit ma-un Mihing Tapa hong pai ding hi.
Matthew10:24 “A siapa sangin a sang naupangte lian zaw ngei lo a
Matthew10:25 Tua ahih manin sang naupangte pen a siapa uh tawh a kibat uh leh a lungkim ding uh hi a
Matthew10:26 “Tua ahih manin kuamah kihta kei un. A kiseelte khatvei teitei kimu dinga
Matthew10:27 Zan khuamial sunga kong gente
Matthew10:28 Pumpi a thah khit ciangin kha a that thei lote na kihta kei un. Hell khuk sungah pumpi le kha a nihin a susia thei pa na kihta zaw un.
Matthew10:29 Gitta nih ciangin mat khatin kizuak lel hi lo ahi hiam? Tua hi napi-in na Pa uhʼ thukim lohin tua gittate khat nangawn lei ah mawk kiat lo hi.
Matthew10:30 Note ahihleh na lu tung uh a na sam mal phazah nangawn uh hong kiciamtehsak hi.
Matthew10:31 Tua ahih manin lau kei un. Gitta tampi sangin note na manpha zaw uh hi.
Matthew10:32 “Keima mi ahihna thu miteʼ theihin a gen khia mite
Matthew10:33 Ahi zongin keima mi ahihna thu miteʼ theihin a gen khia nuam lote
Matthew10:34 “Leitungah kilemna a omsak dingin hong pai hi
Matthew10:35 Tate le pate a kidosak ding
Matthew10:36 Mi khat adingin a gal lian penpen ama innkuan pih mite mah hong hi ding hi.
Matthew10:37 “Kei sangin a nu a pa a it zawte kei tawh kilawm lo a
Matthew10:38 Ama singlamteh mah pua tawm lopi-in ka nung hong zuite kei tawh kilawm lo hi.
Matthew10:39 Hih leitung nuntakna a hon nuamte in a nuntakna taktak taanlawh dinga
Matthew10:40 “Na thugen uh a hong sangte in keiʼ thu a hong sang hi a
Matthew10:41 Pasianʼ thugen ahihna hangin Pasianʼ thugen mi a sangte in Pasianʼ thugenteʼ thaman ngah dinga
Matthew10:42 Keima nungzui mi a neu pen khat nangawn

Matthew11:2 Tuiphumpa Johan in thong sung panin Jesuʼ nasepnate a zak ciangin Jesu kiangah a nungzuite sawl a
Matthew11:3 “Nang pen a hong pai ding pa na hi hiam
Matthew11:4 Jesu in amaute kiangah
Matthew11:5 Mittawte in khua mukik a
Matthew11:6 Kei hong umte pen a lungdamhuai mahmah ahi hi
Matthew11:7 Tua thu dong mite a ciahkhiat khit ciangin Jesu in mihonte kiangah Johanʼ thu gen a
Matthew11:8 Tua hi lo ahihleh bang a mu dingin kilamen na hi uh hiam? Puan hoih nono a silhpa a mu dingin kilamen maw? A taktakin ci lehang
Matthew11:9 Tua ahih kei leh bang a en dingin pai na hi uh hiam? Kamsang pa a en ding maw? Hi hi; kamsang pa a en dingin na pai uh a

Matthew11:11 Leitung mi khempeuh sung pan Tuiphumpa Johan a lian pen ahi hi. Ahi zongin vantung ki-ukna sungah a neu pen i cihte nangawn Johan sangin lian zaw lai hi.

Matthew11:14 Tua thu kigen sa na up nop uh leh
Matthew11:15 Tua ahih manin bil neite in na za ta un.

Matthew11:17 ‘Lam nading khuang kong tumsak uh hangin na lam nuam kei uh a

Matthew12:1 Tua zawh a sawt loin Sabbath ni khatin mangbuh lo nawkin Jesu a pai hi. A nungzuite a gil uh kial ahih manin mangbuh vuite zutin a ne uh hi.

Matthew12:3 Jesu in amaute kiangah
Matthew12:4 Pasianʼ inn sungah amah lut a

Matthew12:6 Note kiangah kong genin ah: Tua biakinn sangin a lian zaw khat hih lai ah hong om hi.
Matthew12:7 Lai Siangtho sungah
Matthew12:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh Mihing Tapa pen Sabbath ni a ukpa ahi hi

Matthew12:11 Jesu in amaute kiangah

Matthew12:17 
Matthew12:18 “Keimah in ka teel sa ka nasem pa

Matthew12:20 Amah in a zawngkhal mite dop bawl dinga
Matthew12:21 Gentail mite in amah bek mah lametin nei ding uh hi
Matthew12:22 Tua ciangin mi pawl khat in Jesu kiangah mit tawt le pau theih loh a thuah dawivei mi khat hong paipih uh hi. Jesu in amah damsak ahih manin amah hong pau thei-in khua zong hong mu thei hi.
Matthew12:23 Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in lamdang sa mahmah uh a
Matthew12:24 Ahi zongin Farisi mite in hih thu a zak uh ciangin
Matthew12:25 Jesu in amauteʼ ngaihsutna thei ahih manin amaute kiangah
Matthew12:26 Tua mah bangin Satan le Satan kihawl khia le-uh a ukna bangci kip theih ding ahi hiam?
Matthew12:27 Keimah in Beelzebul vangliatna tawh dawite hawl khia ka hih leh na mipihte un a kuaʼ vangliatna tawh hawl khia ahi uh hiam? Na mipihte un na ngaihsut khialhna uh hong kilangsak hi.
Matthew12:28 Noteʼ ngaihsut bang hi loin
Matthew12:29 Mi khatpeuh in mi thahat khat paʼ inn sungah lutin a neihsate a laksak theih nadingin tua inn nei a thahatpa a hencip masak phot ding kisam hi. A hencip zawh khit ciang bekin a inn ah lutin a neihsate la thei pan hi.
Matthew12:30 Kei hong pawlpih lo peuhmah keima lang hi uh a
Matthew12:31 Tua ahih manin note kiangah kong genin ah: Mihingteʼ kampau khialhna le gamtat khialhnate kimaisak thei dinga
Matthew12:32 Mihing Tapa langpangin a gensiate a mawhna uh kimaisak thei dinga
Matthew12:33 “Singgah limci a gah theih nadingin a kung a cidam phot ding kisam a
Matthew12:34 Gul bangin ngian a zang note aw
Matthew12:35 Mihoihte in a hoih a khol teng suah khia a
Matthew12:36 Note kiangah kong genin ah: Thukhen ni ciangin mi khempeuh in phattuamna a om lo a kampaunate uh khempeuh bangin thusitna a thuak ding uh hi.
Matthew12:37 Bang hang hiam cih leh nomau kampauna tawh kizui-in thu hong kikhen dinga
Matthew12:38 Tua ciangin Thukham hilh siate le Farisi mi pawl khat in Jesu kiangah
Matthew12:39 Ahi zongin Jesu in
Matthew12:40 Ngasa gilpi sungah sun thum le zan thum sung Jonah a om mah bangin Mihing Tapa zong sun thum le zan thum sung mah lei sungah om ding hi.
Matthew12:41 Jonah in amaute kiangah thu a hilh ciangin a mawhna panun kisikkik uh ahih manin thukhen ni ciangin Nineveh khua mite in note mawhsakna thu hong gen ding uh hi. Note kiangah kong genin ah: Tu mahmah in note kiangah Jonah sangin a lian zaw khat a om hi.
Matthew12:42 Leitaw lam gam kumpinu in Solomonʼ pilna thu a ngai dingin leitung phel khat kantanin hong pai ahih manin thukhen ni ciangin amah in note mawhsakna thu hong gen ding hi. Note kiangah kong genin ah: Tu mahmah in hih lai ah Solomon sangin a lian zaw khat a om hi.
Matthew12:43 “Mi khatpeuh sung panin dawi a kihawlkhiat khit ciangin a ten nading mun keuna zongin a vak kawikawi hi. Ahi zongin a ten nading mun a muh zawh loh ciangin

Matthew13:19 Mi pawl khat in Pasianʼ hong ukna tawh kisai a lungdamhuai thu za napi-in a thu thei tel lo uh ahih manin Dawimangpa hong pai-in amau lungsim sunga a kivawh thu a lakkhiatsak hi. Hih bangte pen lo lai lampi dung a tu khaicite tawh kibang hi.
Matthew13:20 Suang kitawphah leilak a tu khaicite pen Pasianʼ thu a zak ciangun lungdam takin a sangpahte a cihnopna ahi hi.
Matthew13:21 Ahi zongin amaute sungah thuktum zo lo ahih manin tawl khat sung bek um uh hi. Tua ahih manin Pasianʼ thu hangin haksatna ahi a
Matthew13:22 Lingbulsum omna leilak ah a tu khaicite pen Pasianʼ thu za napi-in amau nuntakna sung uh ah leitung lunghihmawhna le hauh nopnate in Pasianʼ thu vuknelh ahih manin bangmah a suak khia zo lote a cihnopna ahi hi.

Matthew18:1 Tua laitakin Jesu kiangah nungzuite hong pai uh a
Matthew18:2 Jesu in naupang khat samin amaute mai ah dingsak a
Matthew18:3 “A man mahmah in note kiangah kong genin ah: Note kikheelin naupang na bat kei uh leh vantung ki-ukna sungah na lut ngei kei ding uh hi.
Matthew18:4 Hih naupang bangin a kiniamkhiat mite
Matthew18:5 Keima min hangin hih bang naupang khat a limbawl mi in kei zong hong limbawl ahi hi.
Matthew18:6 “Ahi zongin kei a hong um hih naupangnote khatpeuh a khialsak mi pen a ngawng ah an gawina suang lianpi khat kikhihin tuipi thuk sungah kikhia suk le ama adingin hoih zaw thampek ding hi.
Matthew18:7 “Tua bangin mi a khialsak thei ding om ahih manin leitung mite adingin a dahhuai mahmah thu ahi hi. Tua bang pen a piang tawntung ding hi a
Matthew18:8 “Na khut ahi a
Matthew18:9 Na mit in hong khialhsak leh khel khia inla paikhia in. Mit kim nei-in hell khuk sungah hong kikhul sangin mit lang khat bek tawh nuntakna sungah lut lecin nang adingin hoih zaw ding hi.
Matthew18:10 “Hih naupangnote khatpeuh na simmawh khak loh nadingun kidawm un. Note kiangah kong genin ah: Amaute a kem vantung mite pen vantungah ka Pa kiangah om tawntung uh hi.
Matthew18:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh Mihing Tapa pen a mangthang mite a hon dingin a hong pai ahi hi.
Matthew18:12 Note in bangci ngaihsut na hi uh hiam? Mi khat in tuu za khat nei henla
Matthew18:13 Note kiangah kong genin ah: Tua a mang tuu a muh ciangin a mang lo tuu sawm kua le kuate tungah a lungdamna sangin a mang pen tungah a lungdamna lian zaw hi lo ahi hiam?
Matthew18:14 Tua mah bangin vantungah a om na Pa un hih naupangnote khat zong a sih ding a deih kei hi.
Matthew18:15 “Na sanggamte uh na tung uh ah hong khialh leh pai-in no tegel bek theihin a khialhna va gen un. Na thu uh a hong man leh na sanggampa uh a ngahkik na hi uh hi.
Matthew18:16 Ahi zongin na thu uh a hong man nop kei leh
Matthew18:17 Amah in tua miteʼ thu a man nop kei leh pawlpite tungah a thu ko un. Pawlpiteʼ thu nangawn a man nop kei leh Gentail mite le siahdongte bangin na ngaihsun un.
Matthew18:18 “Note kiangah a taktakin kong genin ah: Leitungah na kham peuhmah uh vantungah zong kikham dinga
Matthew18:19 Leitungah note nih thukimin na nget uh na khat peuhpeuh
Matthew18:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh keima minin mi nih le thum bek nangawn a kikhopna peuhpeuh ah kei ka om hi

Matthew18:22 Jesu in
Matthew18:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh vantung ki-ukna zia pen a nasemte in sum bangzah a ba hiam
Matthew18:24 Kumpipa in a sum ba sazian a et a kipat ciangin ama sum mak tampi a ba nasem khat hong kipaipih hi.
Matthew18:25 Tua nasem pa in a sum loh zo lo ahih manin amah a kipan a zi a tate le a neih khempeuh zuakin a leiba a loh nadingin kumpipa in thu a pia hi.
Matthew18:26 Tua ahih manin a nasem pa zong a mai ah hong bokin thum a
Matthew18:27 Kumpipa in khasiathuai sa ahih manin a leiba teng maisakin a khah hi.
Matthew18:28 “Ahi zongin tua nasem pa a paikhiat ciangin ama sum ngun peek za khat khawng a ba a nasep pih dang khat tawh a kituak hi. Tua pa a gawlin manin
Matthew18:29 A nasep pih pa zong a mai ah bokin hong thum a
Matthew18:30 Ahi zongin ama thumna sang nuam lo hi. A leiba a loh khit matengin thong ah a kia dingin a khumsak hi.
Matthew18:31 A nasep pih dangte in hih thupiang a theih uh ciangin dahhuai sa mahmah uh ahih manin
Matthew18:32 Tua ciangin kumpipa in tua nasem pa sam a
Matthew18:33 Nang ka hong hehpih mah bangin na nasep pih pa zong na hehpih ding kilawm hi lo ahi hiam?’ a ci hi.
Matthew18:34 Kumpipa zong a heh suak ahih manin a leiba khempeuh a loh khit matengin thong sungah a kikhum nadingin thu a pia hi.
Matthew18:35 “Tua mah bangin note in zong na lungsim uh ah na sanggamte uh mawhna na maisak nop kei uh leh vantungah a om ka Pa in note tungah zong tua bangmahin a hong bawl ding ahi hi

Matthew26:6 Bethany khua-a miphak ahi ngei Simon inn ah Jesu a om laitakin

Luke1:2 A kipat cil a kipanin amauʼ mit mahmah tawh a mu mite in hong gente uh a gelh uh ahi hi.
Luke1:3 Kei zong
Luke1:4 Nang tungah a hong kigen sa thute khempeuh a man taktak na theih nading deihsakna tawh ka hong gelh ahi hi.
Luke1:5 Judea gam a hong uk sawn kumpi Herod hun laitakin siampi Abijahʼ pawlteʼ sung panin Zekhariah minnei siampi khat a om hi. A ziʼ min Elizabeth hi a
Luke1:6 A nih tuakun Pasianʼ muhna ah a manin gamta uh a

Luke2:1 Tua hun laitakin gam tampi a uk Sisar Augustas in ama ukna gam sung mi a phazah a kitheih nadingin mi khempeuh min sazian a kilak nadingin thu a pia hi.
Luke2:2 Kuirinias in Syria gam a uk sawn hun laitakin hih bangin mi phazah kisimna thu hong piang hi.
Luke2:3 Tua ahih manin amau khua ciatah min pia dingin mi khempeuh a pai uh hi.
Luke2:4 Josef zong Davidʼ suante khat ahih manin Galilee gam sung Nazareth khua panin Davidʼ suahna khua ahi Judea gam Bethlehem khua ah a pai hi.
Luke2:5 Tua bangin min sazian kikhumsak dingin a pai ciangin teenpih dingin zuthawl a piak sa a lawmnu Mary tawh a pai khawm uh hi. A lawmnu naupaii hi a
Luke2:6 Bethlehem khua ah a tam sungun a nausuah ding hun hong tung hi.
Luke2:7 Zintun nading mun dang khempeuh mi dim khinta ahih manin ganbuk ah tung uh a

Luke2:14 “Van a sang belna ah a om Pasianʼ min thang henla

Luke2:18 Hih tuucingteʼ thugen a za mi khempeuh in lamdang a sa uh hi.

Luke2:20 Tuucingte zong ciahkik uh a

Luke2:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ Thukham sungah
Luke2:24 Topa Thukham sungah a kigelhna tawh kizui-in biakna-in vakhu nih ahi a

Luke2:26 Topaʼ hong ciam sa Khris a muh matengin a sih loh nading thu zong ama tungah Kha Siangtho in na gen khin hi.

Luke2:35 miteʼ lungsim tawng a kilatna hong hi ding hi. Dahna lungkhamna in namsau hiam bangin nangma lungsim mahmah zong hong sun kham ding hi

Luke2:42 Jesu

Luke6:15 Matthai

Luke6:17 Tua mual tung panin Jesu le a nungzui teelte pai suk uh a
Luke6:18 Tua mite pen ama thuhilhna a ngai ding le a natna uh panin damna a ngah nop manun a hong pai uh ahi hi. Dawi a vei mite zong hong pai uh a

Luke6:20 Tua ciangin Jesu in a nungzuite en a
Luke6:21 Tuhunin a gilkial note nidang ciangin na gil uh a vah ding hi. Tuhunin a dah note nidang ciangin na nuam ding uh hi.
Luke6:22 “Mihing Tapaʼ hangin mite in hong mudahin hong tuam koih a
Luke6:23 Vantungah na thaman ding uh lian mahmah ahih manin tua bang na tuah uh ciangin nuamin lungdamin na diang un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a pu a pate un zong tua bangmahin kamsangte tungah a bawl uh hi.
Luke6:24 “Ahi zongin tuhunin a hau note in nopsakna ngah khin na hih manun gimna na thuak ding uh hi.
Luke6:25 Tuhunin a gilvah note in gilkial gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Tuhunin a lungdam note dahin na kap ding uh hi.
Luke6:26 “Mi khempeuh in note hong pahtakbawl ciangin gimna a thuak ding na hi uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a pu a pate un zong tua bangmahin kamsang zuaute a pahtakbawl uh hi.
Luke6:27 “Ahi zongin ka thugen a za note kiangah kong cih in ah: Na galte uh na it unla
Luke6:28 No hong phuisamte thupha na pia unla
Luke6:29 Na paang lang khat a hong bengte
Luke6:30 A hong ngente peuhmah na pia unla
Luke6:31 Note tungah a hong kibawl ding na deih uh bangin midangte tungah na bawl un.
Luke6:32 “No hong itte bek it le-uhcin bang hangin thupha ngah ding na hi uh hiam? Mawhnei mite nangawn in amau a itte a it uh hi.
Luke6:33 No tungah a hoihin a hong gamtate tung bekah a hoihin gamta le-uhcin bang hangin thupha ngah ding na hi uh hiam? Mawhneite nangawn tua bangmahin gamta uh hi.
Luke6:34 Ngahkik ding na lametna uh mite tung bekah leitawi na piak uh leh bang hangin thupha ngah ding na hi uh hiam? Mawhneite nangawn in zong a piakzah mah uh a ngahkik dingin khatlekhat kileitawi uh hi.
Luke6:35 Tua bang lelin note na gamta kei ding uh hi. Na galte uh itin amaute tungah thupha bawl unla
Luke6:36 Tua ahih manin na Pa un hehpihna a neih bangin note in zong hehpihna lungsim nei ta un.
Luke6:37 “Midangteʼ thu khen kei un. Tua hileh no tungah zong Pasian in thu hong khen lo ding hi. Midangte mawhsak kei un. Tua hileh Pasian in note zong hong mawhsak lo ding hi. Midangteʼ mawhna maisak un. Tua hileh Pasian in noteʼ mawhna zong hong maisak ding hi.
Luke6:38 Midangte tungah pia un. Tua hileh Pasian in note tungah zong hong pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh midangte na piakna uh tawh kizui-in a henhen
Luke6:39 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah thu gentehna khat zong gen a
Luke6:40 Sangnaupang khat a siapa sangin lian zaw ngei lo hi; a sin ding khempeuh a theih khit ciangin a siapa tawh kikim pan bek ding hi.”
Luke6:41 “Bang hangin na mit sungah singluang a tang phawk kha loin na lawmteʼ mit sunga ninthem tang etsak na hi hiam?

Luke24:40 a khut le a khete a lak hi.

John5:1 Tua khit ciangin

John5:19 Tua ahih manin Jesu in amaute kiangah
John5:20 Pa in a Tapa itin
John5:21 Pa in mi si sate nangawn thosakin a nuntaksak mah bangin Tapa in zong a ut peuhpeuh nungtasak thei hi.
John5:22 Pa in kuama tungah thukhen nasep sem lo hi. Mi khempeuh in Pa a zahtak mah bangin Tapa a zahtak theih nadingun Pa in thukhen nasep khempeuh a Tapa tungah a pia hi. Tua ahih manin Tapa a zahtak lo mi khempeuh pen Tapa a sawl Pa Pasian zong a zahtak lo ahi uh hi.
John5:23 
John5:24 “A mantakin kong genin ah: Ka thugennate za-in kei hong sawl pa a um khempeuh a nungta paisuak ding hi ta hi. Mawhsak thukhenna ngah nawn loin
John5:25 A taktakin ci lehang: A si mite in Pasianʼ Tapaʼ aw a zak hun uh hong tung ding hi bek loin tu-in a hun hong tung khin hi ta a
John5:26 Pa in nuntakna a piak theih mah bangin Tapa in zong a piak theih nadingin Pa in a bawl hi.
John5:27 Amah pen Mihing Tapa ahih manin thu khen theih nading aana ama tungah a pia hi.
John5:28 Hih thu kong gen ciangin lamdang sa kei un. Han sungah a om misi khempeuh in ama aw za-in
John5:29 han sung panin a hong paikhiat uh hun hong tung ding hi. A gamtat hoih mite pen a nungta tawntung dingin hong thokik ding uh a
John5:30 “Keima thu guak tawh ka hih theih bangmah om lo hi. Pasianʼ hong genna bang bekin thu ka khen hi. Keima ut bangin sem loin kei hong sawl paʼ deih bangin sem ka hih manin ka thukhenna thuman hi.
John5:31 “Keima thu tawh kisai ah kei mahmah in teci pang leng kuamah in a thumanin sang thei lo ding hi.
John5:32 Tua ahih manin keima ading teci a pang ding mi khat om a
John5:33 Note in Johan kiangah thu a dong dingin mi na sawl uh a
John5:34 Keimah in mihingteʼ teci panna a kisam ka hi kei a
John5:35 Johan pen meivak bangin kuangin a taang hi a
John5:36 Ahi zongin Johanʼ teci panna sangin a lian zaw teci khat ka nei a
John5:37 Tua ban panin kei a hong sawl Pasian in zong keima adingin teci a pang hi. Note in Pasianʼ sawl paʼ thu um lo na hih manun Pasianʼ aw lah za ngei lo
John5:38 
John5:39 Nuntak tawntung ngah theih nading lametna tawh Lai Siangtho sung na lim sim mahmah uh a
John5:40 na nuntak theih nadingun kei kiangah nong pai nuam kei veve uh hi.
John5:41 “Hih bangin kong gen ciangin mihingte in hong pahtak ding ka deihna hi lo a
John5:42 noteʼ lungsim sungah Pasian itna na neih het lohna uh ka theihna hang hizaw hi.
John5:43 Ka Paʼ thu tawh kei hong pai napi-in na hong sang nuam kei uh hi. Tua hi napi-in midang khatpeuh ama thu tawh hong pai tawm leh na sang ding uh hi.
John5:44 Pasianʼ pahtak theih nading hanciam nuam loin
John5:45 Hih bangin kong gen ciangin ka Pa kiangah note a hong mawhsak ding pa hi
John5:46 Moses in keima thu gen belin nei ahih manin Moses um taktak hi le-uhcin kei zong na hong um ding uh hi.
John5:47 Ahi zongin Mosesʼ laigelh thute um lo na hih manun kei hong bangci up theih mah ding na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi.
John6:1 Tua khit ciangin Tiberias zong a kici Galilee Tuili gal khat lamah Jesu a pai hi.
John6:2 Jesu in cinate damsakin nalamdang lian pipi a bawlte mi tampi in mu khin uh ahih manin mi tampi tak in Jesu nung a zui uh hi.
John6:3 Jesu zong a mual tung lamah kah to-in a nungzuite tawh a tukhawm hi.
John6:4 Jew miteʼ Paisan Pawi hun nai mahmah ta hi.
John6:5 Jesu khuadak a
John6:6 (Jesu in a hih ding thei napi-in Filip a ze-etna-in hih bangin a dong lel ahi hi.)
John6:7 Filip in
John6:8 Tua laitakin a nungzuite sung panin Simon Peterʼ nau Andru in Jesu kiangah
John6:9 “Hih lai ah mangbuhham kibawl anlum nga le ngasa tawn nih sun-an a pua tangval khat om sam hi; tuate lah mihing hi zah lakah cihtaak ding ahi hiam?” ci hi.
John6:10 Ahi zongin Jesu in a nungzuite kiangah
John6:11 Jesu in anlum la-in Pasian tungah lungdamna a koh khit ciangin mihon a tute lakah a hawm hi. Tua mah bangin ngasa zong hih a
John6:12 Mi khempeuh in a kham khit uh ciangin a nungzuite kiangah
John6:13 Tua ahih manin mihonpi in anlum nga a nek khit uh ciangin a khamvalte uh kaikhawm uh a
John6:14 Jesuʼ nalamdang bawl a muh uh ciangin tua lai-a om mihonpite in
John6:15 Mihonte in thatang hat thu tawh kumpi-in amah a koih sawmna thu Jesu in a theih ciangin mual tung lamah amah guak a kihem khia hi.
John6:16 A nitak ciangin tui gei ah a nungzuite pai suk uh a
John6:17 gunkuang tungah tuangin Kapernaum khua lam manawhin a pai uh hi. Khua hong mial ta a
John6:18 Huih nakpi-in hong nung ahih manin tui hong kilok gawp hi.
John6:19 Tui gei panin tai thum tai li bang gunkuang a hawh khit uh ciangin tui tungah Jesu hong pai-in gunkuang lam a hong naih a mu uh hi. Amaute na lau mahmah uh ahih manin
John6:20 Jesu in amaute kiangah
John6:21 Tua ciangin amaute nuam mahmah uh a
John6:22 A zing ciangin tui gal khat ah a om lai mihonte in tui gei ah gunkuang khat a om lai mu uh a

John11:52 Jew mite ading bek hi loin a kithehthang Pasianʼ mi khempeuh pum khat a suah nadingin a kikaihkhop nading thu zong a gen khol ahi hi.
John11:53 Tua ahih manin tua hun a kipanin Jesu a thah theih nadingun a vaihawm uh hi.
John11:54 Tua ahih manin Judea gam sungah a kilangin Jesu khualzin nawn lo a
John11:55 Jew miteʼ Paisan Pawi hun hong nai ciangin
John11:56 Biakinn sungah kikhawmin a om laitakun Jesu a mu dingin amaute khuadak kawikawi-in kiho uh a
John11:57 Bang hang hiam cih leh siampi liante le Farisi mite in Jesu a mat theih nadingun
John12:1 Paisan Pawi hun a tun ding ni guk in a sap ni-in sihna panin a thawhsak Lazaras a teenna Bethany khua ah va tung hi.
John12:2 Amaute in nitak an na vak uh a
John12:3 Tua laitakin Mary in a manpha mahmah nard sathau namtui thawl khat hong paipih a
John12:4 Tua laitakin Jesuʼ nungzuite sung panin amah a lehhek ding Judas Iskariot in
John12:5 “Bang hangin hih sathau namtui ngun peek za thumin kizuakin a sumte mizawngte tungah kipia zaw lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi.
John12:6 Hih bangin kam a pauna pen mizawngte a khualna hang hi lo a
John12:7 Tua ahih manin Jesu in
John12:8 Mizawngte pen note tawh hong om khawm niloh dinga
John12:9 Bethany khua ah Jesu a omna thu a zak uh ciangin mihon tampi hong pai uh hi. Jesu a mu nuamin hong pai hi bek lo uh a
John12:10 Lazarasʼ hangin Jew mi tampite in amauʼ makaite taisanin Jesu um uh ahih manin siampi liante in Lazaras zong thah a sawm uh hi.
John12:11 
John12:12 A zing ciangin Paisan Pawi a siim mihonpite in Jerusalem khua ah Jesu hong pai nading thu a za uh hi.
John12:13 Tua ahih manin amah a dawn dingin Jerusalem panin mihonpi pai khia-in nisuh hiangte tawi kawmin
John12:14 Lai Siangtho sungah
John12:15 
John12:16 Tua hun laitakin a nungzuite in hih thu a khiatna thei lo uh hi. Ahi zongin Pasianʼ pianzia nei-in Jesu a thawhkik khit ciangin Lai Siangtho in amah a gen ahihna le ama adingin hih bangin a piang ahihna thu a nung phawk uh hi.
John12:17 Jesu in han sung panin Lazaras samin
John12:18 Jesu in tua bang nalamdang lian a bawlna thu mihonte in za khin uh ahih manin amah a dawn dingin a pai uh hi.
John12:19 Tua ciangin Farisi mite khatlekhat kiho uh a
John12:20 Pawi hun sungin Pasian bia dingin Jerusalem khua ah a hong pai mite lakah Grik mi pawl khat a om uh hi.
John12:21 Galilee gam Bethsaida khuami Filip kiangah amaute hong pai-in
John12:22 Filip in Andru kiangah a gen hi. Tua ciangin Andru le Filip pai khawmin Jesu kiangah a gen uh hi.
John12:23 Tua ciangin Jesu in
John12:24 A mantakin ci lehang
John12:25 Tua ahih manin hih leitung nuntakna a itte in a nuntakna taktak taanlawh dinga
John12:26 Ka nasemte keima omna ah a om theih nadingin ka na a sem nuam peuhmah in kei hong zui ding uh a
John12:27 Tua khit ciangin Jesu in
John12:28 Pa aw
John12:29 Tua kiim a ding mihonte in a awging za uh a
John12:30 Tua ciangin Jesu in
John12:31 Tu-in leitung thukhen ding hun hong tung ta a
John12:32 Leilak panin kei hong kikhai toh ciangin ka kiangah mi khempeuh ka kai ding hi
John12:33 (Hih bangin a gen ciangin ama sihna ding zia a genna ahi hi.)
John12:34 Tua ciangin mihonte in
John12:35 Jesu in
John12:36 Khuavak mite na suah theih nadingun khuavak na neih hun sungun tua khuavak um un
John12:37 Amauteʼ muhin Jesu in hih nalamdang khempeuh a bawl hangin amaute in um lo uh hi.
John12:38 Kamsang Isaiah in
John12:39 Tua ahih manin amaute in um nuam lo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Isaiah mah in
John12:40 “Amauteʼ natna ka damsak loh nadingin a mit un mu loin
John12:41 Isaiah in Jesuʼ neih Pasianʼ pianzia mu ahih manin hih bangin thu a gen ahi hi.
John12:42 Tua bang hitaseleh Jew mi ulian tampi in Jesu a um uh hi. Ahi zongin Farisi mite in kikhopna inn panin a hawlkhiat ding lau uh ahih manin a kilangin gen khia ngam lo uh hi.
John12:43 Pasianʼ pahtak ding sangin miteʼ pahtak ding ut zaw uh ahih manin a tua ci om ahi uh hi.
John12:44 Tua ciangin Jesu nakpi takin kiko a
John12:45 Kei hong mu khempeuh in kei hong sawl pa zong a mu ahi hi.
John12:46 Kei hong um mi khempeuh
John12:47 Ka thugenna za napi-in a zui lo mite tungah thu ka khen kei ding hi. Leitung mite mawhsakin thukhen dingin a hong pai ka hi kei a
John12:48 Kei hong nialin ka thugen a sang lo mite in thukhen ding khat nei uh hi. Nitawp ni ciangin keima thugente pen amauteʼ thukhen ding ahi hi.
John12:49 Bang hang hiam cih leh keima utthu tawh thu a mawk gen ka hi kei a
John12:50 Gen dingin a hong sawl thute in nuntak tawntung a piangsak thei ahihna thu ka thei hi. Tua ahih manin Pa in gen dingin a hong sawl teng bek a gen ka hi hi
John13:1 Tu-in Paisan Pawi hun ding ni khat bek in sam a
John13:2 Jesu le a nungzuite nitak an ne-in a tukhawm uh hi. Tua hun laitakin dawimangpa in Simon Iskariotʼ tapa Judasʼ lungsim sungah Jesu lehhek nading ngaihsutna koih khinzo hi.
John13:3 A Pa in ama khut sungah vangliatna khempeuh a piakna le Pasian in amah a sawl mah bangin tu-in Pasian kiangah a paikik ding ahihna thu zong a thei hi.

John13:29 Amah sumkem ahih manin hih pawi a zat ding a kisam na pawl khat a lei dingin a sawl hi ding hi; tua ahih kei leh zong mizawngte pawl khat tungah sum a pia dingin a sawl hi ding hi
