John14:1 Tua ciangin Jesu in a nungzuite kiangah
John14:2 Noteʼ om nading mun a bawl khol dingin a pai ding ka hi hi. Ka Paʼ inn sungah om nading mun tampi om hi. A om lo ding hileh hih bangin thu kong gen kei ding hi.
John14:3 Kei va pai-in noteʼ om nading mun ka va bawl kholh khit ciangin keima omna munah note na hong om theih nadingun note a hong la dingin ka hong paikik ding hi.
John14:4 Ka pai nading mun tun theih nading lampi na thei uh hi
John14:5 Tua laitakin Thomas in
John14:6 Jesu in ama kiangah
John14:7 Note in kei na hong theih nak uh leh ka Pa zong a thei na hi uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu a kipanin Pa thei-in a mu khinta na hi uh hi
John14:8 Tua ciangin Filip in
John14:9 Jesu in
John14:10 Kei pen Pa tawh pum khat ka hih lamtak um lo na hi hiam? Note tungah kong gen thute keima thu bek tawh a hong gen ka hi kei a
John14:11 Pa tawh pum khat ka hihna thu hoihtakin hong um un. Na hong up nai kei uh leh zong ka nalamdang bawlnate hangin hong um beek un.
John14:12 A mantakin ka hong genin ah
John14:13 Tapaʼ hangin Pasianʼ pianzia a kilat theih nadingin keima min paulamin na hong nget khempeuh uh kong pia ding hi.
John14:14 Keima min paulamin na hong nget nak uh leh kong pia ding hi
John14:15 Tua ciangin Jesu in
John14:16 Keimah in Pa kiangah ka ngen dinga
John14:17 Leitung mite in tua Kha Siangtho mu thei lo
John14:18 “Note a cimawh dingin ka hong nusia kei ding hi. Note kiangah ka hong paikik ding hi.
John14:19 Tawl khat khit ciangin leitung mite in kei hong mu nawn lo ding uh hi. Ahi zongin kei ka nuntak mah bangin note zong nungta ding na hih manun note in kei na hong mu ding uh hi.
John14:20 Tua hun ciangin Pa sungah kei ka omna thu le note sungah ka hong om mah bangin keima sungah na omna thu uh na thei ding uh hi.
John14:21 Keima thupiakte sangin a zuite in keimah hong it ahi uh hi. Kei hong it mite pen ka Pa in zong it dinga
John14:22 Tua ciangin Judas Iskariot ahi lo Judas dang khat in
John14:23 Jesu in
John14:24 Kei hong it lote in ka thugente zui lo ding uh hi. Tu-a na zak uh thute pen keima thu hi lo a
John14:25 “Note tawh ka hong om khawm hun sungin hih thute a hong gen ka hi hi.
John14:26 Ahi zongin Pa in keima tangin a hong sawl ding Huhpa Kha Siangtho a hong tun ciangin note tungah thu khempeuh hong hilh dinga
John14:27 Note tungah keima neih bang lungnopna kong pia ding hi. Tua ka hong piak ding lungnopna pen leitung mite in a piak theih a kip lo lungnopnate pawl hi lo hi. Tua ahih manin lau kei unla
John14:28 ‘Ka va paikhia dinga
John14:29 A thu hong pian taktak ciangin ka thugente na up theih nadingun a pian ma-in a hong gen khol ka hi hi.
John14:30 Tu-in hih leitung a ukpa hong tung ta ahih manin note kiangah thu kong gen man nawn kei ding hi. Amah in keima tungah aana nei lo hi.
John14:31 Ahi zongin leitung mite in Pa Pasian ka itna thu a theih nadingun Paʼ vaihawmna bangbangin a gamta ding ka hi hi. Tua ahih manin kithawi un; hih lai mun panin paikhia ta ni
John15:1 Tua ciangin Jesu in
John15:2 Amah in gah a nei lo ka hiang khempeuh sat khia a
John15:3 Note tungah ka hong thugennate hangin note a siang na suak khinzo uh hi.
John15:4 Kei tawh hong kizom paisuak le-uhcin kei zong note tawh a kizom paisuak ka hi ding hi. A hiang pen a gui tawh kizom kei leh gah a gah theih loh mah bangin note zong kei tawh na kizop kei uh leh gah na gah thei kei ding uh hi.
John15:5 “Kei pen leenggui ka hi a
John15:6 Kei tawh a kizom lo mite pen leenggui hiang bangin kipaai khia-in keutum hi. Tua bang hiangte meikhuk sungah kilawnin a kaang tum hi.
John15:7 Kei tawh na hong kizop uh a
John15:8 Gah tampi gah le-uhcin ka Paʼ minthanna a kilangsak na hi ding uh a
John15:9 Ka Pa in kei hong it zahin note hong it ka hih manin keima hong itna sungah om un.
John15:10 Ka Paʼ hong thupiakte zui-in ama itna sungah ka om mah bangin note in zong ka thupiaknate na hong zuih uh leh ka itna sungah a om na hi ding uh hi.
John15:11 Note hangin kei ka lungdam theih nading le noteʼ lungdamna a cingtaak a suah theih nadingin hih thute a hong gen ka hi hi.
John15:12 “Note tungah ka hong piak thu in: Note ka hong it zahin note khatlekhat na ki-it un.
John15:13 Lawmteʼ tang ding sih ngamna sangin lawmte itna a lian zaw om nawn lo hi.
John15:14 Ka hong thupiak bangin na gamtat uh leh ka lawmte na hi uh hi.
John15:15 Nasemte in a toteʼ nasepna bangmah thei lo ahih manin note pen nasemte ka hong ci nawn kei ding hi. Ka Paʼ tung panin ka zak thu khempeuh note kiangah hong gen khin ka hih manin note
John15:16 Note in kei na hong teel kei uh a
John15:17 Tua hi a
John15:18 “Leitung mite in note hong muhdah leh kei a hong mudah masa ahihna thu na thei un.
John15:19 Hih leitung mite tawh a kipawl hi le-uhcin leitung mite in amau pawlte hong it ding hi. Ahi zongin hih leitung mite lak panin note ka hong teel khia a
John15:20 ‘Sila pen a topa sangin lian zaw lo hi
John15:21 Ahi zongin amaute in kei hong sawl pa thei lo uh ahih manin keima mi na hihna uh hangin amaute in hih bangin hong bawl ding uh ahi hi.
John15:22 Kei hong pai kei-in amaute tungah thu a gen lo hi leng amaute in mawh pua lo ding uh hi. Ahi zongin tu-in ahihleh a mawhna thu uh ah kiphel nading a paulap ding uh bangmah om nawn lo hi.
John15:23 Kei hong mudahte in ka Pa zong a mudah ahi hi.
John15:24 Kuamah in a bawl ngei loh nalamdangte amaute lakah a bawl lo hi leng amaute in mawh pua lo ding uh hi. Ahi zongin amaute in ka nalamdang bawlte mu khin uh ahih manin kei le ka Pa a hong mudah khawm uh ahi hi.
John15:25 Amauteʼ Thukham sungah
John15:26 “Ahi zongin Thuman a hong lak ding Huhpa ahi Kha Siangtho ka Pa kiang panin ka hong sawl ding hi. Amah hong tun ciangin keima thu hong gen ding hi.
John15:27 A kipat cil a kipanin kei tawh om khawm na hih manun note in zong keima thu na gen ding uh hi.
John16:1 “Note na puk khak loh nadingun hih thute a hong gen ka hi hi.
John16:2 Amaute in a kikhopna uh innte panin note hong hawl khia ding uh hi. Note hong that mite pen Pasianʼ nasemin a kingaihsut ding uh hun hong tung ding hi.
John16:3 Amaute in ka Pa ahi a
John16:4 Hih bangin a hong gamtat hun uh hong tun ciangin kong gen thute na phawk theih nadingun a hong gen khol ka hi hi. “Note tawh hong om khawm ngawn ka hih manin a kipat tuung lamin hih thute kong gen kei hi.
John16:5 Tu-in ahihleh kei hong sawl pa kiangah a ciahkik ding ka hi hi. Tua hi napi-in
John16:6 Ahi zongin hih thute kong gen ciangin na lungsim uh dah mahmah hi.
John16:7 A taktakin ci lehang
John16:8 Amah hong tun ciangin leitung mite tungah mawhna thu
John16:9 Amaute in kei hong up loh manun a mawhna uh lak dinga
John16:10 Pa kiangah pai ding ka hih manin kei na hong mu nawn kei ding uh hi
John16:11 hih leitung a ukpa pen thukhenna a thuak khin ahihna thu zong lak ding hi.
John16:12 “Ka hong gen ding tampi tak om lai hi; ahi zongin hong gen lai leng note adingin tam lua ding hi.
John16:13 Tua ahih manin thuman hong lak ding Kha Siangtho hong tun ciangin thu khempeuh a manin hong hilh ding hi. Ama ngaihsut tawm thu hong gen ding hi lo a
John16:14 Amah in keima gen ding thute note tungah hong gen ding ahih manin Pasianʼ pianzia ka neihna hong kilangsak ding hi.
John16:15 Ka Paʼ neihsa khempeuh keima-aʼ suak khin ahih manin keima gen ding thute le a gen dingin ka sawl teng Kha Siangtho in note kiangah hong gen ding hi
John16:16 “Tawl khat khit ciangin na hong mu nawn kei ding uh a
John16:17 a nungzuite pawl khat kidong uh a
John16:18 Tawl khat a cihcih pen bang a cihnopna ahi hiam
John16:19 Jesu in amauteʼ theihnop lamtak phawk ahih manin amaute kiangah
John16:20 A taktakin ka hong genin ah
John16:21 Numei in a ta a suah hun a tun ciangin na sa ahih manin a dah hi. Ahi zongin a ta a suah khit ciangin leitungah naungek khat a piangsak khin ahihna hangin lungdamin a natna teng a mangngilh ta hi.
John16:22 Note zong tua mah tawh na kibang ding uh hi. Note zong tu-in na dah uh hangin note tawh kimukik ding ihih manin na lung uh dam mahmah dinga
John16:23 “Tua hun ciangin kei kiangah bangmah nong ngen nawn kei ding uh hi. A mantakin kong genin ah
John16:24 Tu ni ciang dong keima min suangin bangmah na ngen nai kei uh hi. Tua ahih manin ngen le-uhcin hong kipia ding ahih manin na lungdamna uh hong cingtaak ding hi.
John16:25 “Tu hun ciang dong hih thute thu gentehna zangin kong gen hi. Ahi zongin thu gentehna ka hong zat nawn loh hun hong tung dinga
John16:26 Tua hun hong tun ciangin
John16:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh note in kei hong itin
John16:28 Pa kiang panin hong pai-in leitung a hong tung ka hi a
John16:29 Tua ciangin a nungzuite in
John16:30 Tu-in na khempeuh na theih khitna thu ka phawk uh a
John16:31 Jesu in
John16:32 Note khempeuh kithehthangin na inn ciat uh zuanin kei bek na hong nusiat ding uh hun a hong tung ding hi bek loin tu-in a hong tung hi ta hi. Ahi zongin kei guak a hong kinusia hi lo a
John16:33 Keimah tawh na hong kipawlna uh hangin lungnopna na neih theih nadingun hih thu a hong gen ka hi hi. Leitung gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Ahi zongin keimah in leitung nate zo khinta ka hih manin lungnuamin om un
John17:1 Jesu in hih thute a gen khit ciangin vantung lam en to-in
John17:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh Tapa tungah na piak mi khempeuh tungah Tapa in nuntak tawntungna a piak theih nadingin mi khempeuh tungah ukna aana a neih nadingin Tapa tungah na hong piak sa ahi hi.
John17:3 Nang bek a man Pasian na hihna thu le nangmah in na hong sawl Jesu Khris hong theihna pen amaute adingin nuntak tawntung ngah nading lampi ahi hi.
John17:4 Nangmah in sep dingin na hong piak nasep khempeuh sem khinta ka hih manin leitungah na min a thangsak ka hi hi.
John17:5 Pa aw
John17:6 “Leitung mite sung panin keima khut sungah na hong piak mite tungah nangma min ka pulak khinzo ta hi. Tua mite in nangma thu mangin nangma mi hi uh a
John17:7 Tu-in amaute in keima neih khempeuh nangma hong piak ahihna thu a thei uh hi.
John17:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh gen dingin na hong sawl thu khempeuh amaute kiangah ka gen ciangin um uh a
John17:9 “Amaute adingin thu ka hong ngetsak hi. Leitung mite adingin a hong ngetsak hi loin keima khut sungah na hong piak mite nangma mi ahih manin tua mite adingin a hong ngetsak ka hi hi.
John17:10 Keima neih khempeuh nangma aʼ hi a
John17:11 Tu-in nangma kiangah kei a hong pai ta ding ka hih manin leitungah ka om nawn kei dinga
John17:12 Amaute tawh ka om khawm hun lai-in nangma hong piak na min vangliatna tawh amaute ka kem hi. Amaute ka hu a
John17:13 Tu-in nangma kiangah a hong pai ta ding ka hih manin keimah bangin amaute in lungdamna cingtaak a neih theih nadingun leitungah ka om lai-in hih thute a gen ka hi hi.
John17:14 Amaute tungah na thu ka gen khin hi. Ahi zongin keimah bangin amaute zong hih leitung mite tawh kipawl lo uh ahih manin leitung mite in a mudah uh hi.
John17:15 Leitung panin amaute na lakkhiat ding a hong ngetsak ka hi kei a
John17:16 Hih leitung tawh kei ka kipawl loh mah bangin amaute zong a kipawl lo uh ahi hi.
John17:17 Nangma thuman hilhna tawh amaute a siangtho nangma zat dingin na bawl in.
John17:18 Leitungah kei na hong sawl mah bangin kei zong leitung mahah amaute ka sawl hi.
John17:19 Nangma tungah thuman takin amaute zong hong ki-ap theih nadingun amaute ka khualna-in nangma tungah kei ka hong ki-ap hi.
John17:20 “Hih mite ading bek thu a hong ngetsak ka hi kei a
John17:21 Pa aw
John17:22 Nang le kei pum khat ihih mah bangin amaute zong pum khat a suah theih nadingun keima tungah na hong piak pianzia mah amaute tungah ka pia hi.
John17:23 Leitung mite in kei na hong sawlna thu a theih nading le kei na hong it mah bangin amaute na itna thu a theihna hangun amaute pum khat a suah taktak theih nadingun amaute lakah kei ka om a
John17:24 Pa aw
John17:25 A Thuman ka Pa aw
John17:26 Kei na hong itna zah itna mah amaute sungah omin

John18:2 Jesu le a nungzuite tua munah pai zelzel uh ahih manin Jesu a lehhek Judas in zong tua mun a thei hi.
John18:3 Tua ahih manin Judas zong
John18:4 Jesu in zong ama tungah a piang ding thu khempeuh thei khin ahih manin hong pai khia-in amaute kiangah
John18:5 Amaute in
John18:6 Jesu in
John18:7 Jesu in
John18:8 Tua ciangin Jesu in
John18:9 Hih bang a cihna pen
John18:10 Simon Peter in namsau kuah ahih manin a namsau dokin siampi lianpen paʼ silapa a sat leh a taklam bil a sat khia hi. Tua silapaʼ min Malkhus ahi hi.

Acts5:12 Sawltakte in mite lakah lim le nalamdang tampi a bawl uh hi. Thu um mi khempeuh Solomonʼ Talap ah kikhawmin a om uh hi.
Acts5:13 Midangte in thupi sa-in hoih sa mahmah uh a
Acts5:14 Topaʼ thu a um numei pasal tampi tak hong kibeh laplap uh hi.
Acts5:15 Hih bangin sawltakteʼ nasepna hangin kongzing ah cinate hong kipua a
Acts5:16 Jerusalem khua kiim a om khuapite panin mite hong pai-in
Acts5:17 Tua ciangin siampi lianpen pa le amah tawh a kipawl tua lai-a Saddusi mite in sawltakte haza-in thangpai uh ahih manin thu bawl ding a ngaihsun uh hi.
Acts5:18 Tua ahih manin sawltakte manin thong sungah a khum uh hi.
Acts5:19 Ahi zongin tua zanin Topaʼ vantungmi khat in thong kongkhakte hong a
Acts5:20 “Biakinn ah pai unla
Acts5:21 Ama gen mah bangin sawltakte zong zingsang ciangin biakinn ah pai-in thuhilh ding a kipan uh hi. Siampi lianpen pa le ama kikholhpihte in ulian kikhopna a cingtaak khat a om theih nadingin Jew mi upa khempeuh a kikhop nadingun a sam uh hi. Tua khit ciangin thong panin sawltakte va kai-in uliante mai ah a hong paipih nadingun palikte a sawl uh hi.
Acts5:22 Ahi zongin thong ah palikte a va tun uh ciangin sawltakte na om lo hi. Tua ahih manin uliante kiangah kilehkikin
Acts5:23 “Thongah ka tun uh ciangin a kongkhakte limtak mahin tawh kikalh a
Acts5:24 Biakinn ukpa le siampi liante in hih thu a zak uh ciangin hih sawltakte a bangci thu hi ding hiam
Acts5:25 Tua laitakin mi khat hong pai-in amaute kiangah
Acts5:26 Tua ciangin biakinn ukpa le a mite va pai-in sawltakte hong paipihkik uh hi. Mihonte in suang tawh amaute a den gawp khak ding lau uh ahih manin sawltakte ngongbawl loin thudam tawh a paipih uh hi.
Acts5:27 Tua ciangin uliante mai ah sawltakte dingsak uh a
Acts5:28 “Hih mipaʼ min tawh thu na hilh nawn loh nadingun khauh takin thu kong pia uh hi. Tu-in na gamtatna sate uh thei un. Jerusalem khua sung khempeuh ah thu na genthang uh a
Acts5:29 Ahi zongin Peter le sawltak dangte in
Acts5:30 Note in singlamteh tungah Jesu khai-in na thah khit uh ciangin i pu i pateʼ Pasian in sihna panin amah hingkiksak khinzo hi.
Acts5:31 Israel mite kisikkikin Pasian in a mawhna uh a maisak theih nadingin Ukpi le Honpa-in tua Jesu bawlin ama tak lamah a tusak hi.
Acts5:32 Hih thute thei-in teci a pangte pen ko sawltakte bek hi loin Kha Siangtho tawh zong ka hi uh a
Acts5:33 Uliante in hih thu a zak uh ciangin heh mahmah uh ahih manin sawltakte thah dingin a ngaihsun uh hi.
Acts5:34 Ahi zongin amaute sung panin Farisi mi Gamaliel
Acts5:35 tua khit ciangin a lawm uliante kiangah
Acts5:36 Tu ma lam tawl khat lai-in Thudas a kici mi khat hong khang hi. Mi lian khat ka hi hi
Acts5:37 Hih thu a pian khit ciangin
Acts5:38 Tu-in zong tua bangmahin thu hong piang leuleu hi. Note kiangah kong gen nop thu in: Hih mite bangmah cih kei unla
Acts5:39 Ahi zongin Pasian kiang panin a hong pai thu ahihleh na zo zo ngei kei ding uh hi. Pasian tawh a kido na hi ding uh hi
Acts5:40 Tua ahih manin uliante in Gamalielʼ thugen a mang uh hi. Sawltakte samkiksak uh a
Acts5:41 Uliante omna panin sawltakte paikhia uh a
Acts5:42 Nisimin biakinn sung le mite inn ah thu hilh uh a

Acts6:6 Amaute in sawltakte kiangah hih mite paipih uh a

Acts7:2 Stefen in
Acts7:3 ‘Na gam na lei
Acts7:4 Amah zong Khaldea gam panin pai khia-in Haran khua ah teeng hi. A pa a sih khit ciangin Pasian in tu-a na teenna uh hih gamah amah na lalsak leuleu hi.

Acts7:9 “I pupi dangte in Josef na haza uh a
Acts7:10 a thuakna khempeuh panin na hon khia hi. Egypt kumpipa Faroʼ mai ah Josef a tun ciangin Pasian in ama tungah pilna le a deihhuai gamtat hoih na guan hi. Tua ahih manin Faro in ama khutnuai ah a gam a uk sawn ding le a kumpi inn sung khempeuh a van dingin a koih hi.

Acts7:22 Egypt gam sunga pilna om khempeuh ama tungah kihilh a

Acts8:26 Topaʼ vantungmi khat in Filip kiangah

Acts10:45 Gentail mite tungah zong Pasian in a Kha Siangtho a piakkhongna thu a muh uh ciangin Joppa khua panin Peter tawh a hong pai khawm Jew mi thu umte in lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi.

Acts10:47 “Eite mah bangin hih mite in zong Kha Siangtho ngah uh hi. Tui sungah a kiphum ding uh kuaʼn kham thei ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a gen khit ciangin
Acts10:48 Jesu Khris min tawh amaute tui a kiphum nading uh a sawl hi. Tua ciangin amaute kiangah Peter a tam lai nadingin a thum uh hi.

Acts11:12 Lunghiang loin amaute ka zuih pah nadingin Kha Siangtho in kei tungah hong gen khinzo hi. Joppa khua panin hih i sanggam gukte in zong Sisaria khua ah hong zui uh a
Acts11:13 Tua ciangin amah in vantungmi khat a inn sungah a ding mu-in
Acts11:14 Amah in nang le na innkuan khempeuh un hotkhiatna na ngah nading uh thu hong gen ding hi
Acts11:15 Tua thu gen dingin ka kipat laitakin eite in Kha Siangtho i ngah cil huna mah bangin amaute tungah Kha Siangtho hong tung hi.
Acts11:16 Tua ciangin Topa in

Acts11:18 Amaute in hih thu a zak uh ciangin mawhsakna thu gen nawn lo uh a
Acts11:19 Stefen a kithah huna bawlsiatna hangin thu um mite tampi kithehthang uh hi. Mi pawl khatte Foenisia gam
Acts11:20 Ahi zongin Saipras gam mi le Sairin khuami thu um mi pawl khatte Antiok khua ah pai uh a
Acts11:21 Topa in nakpi takin amaute huh ahih manin mi tampi in thu umin Topa lamah a kihei uh hi.

Acts11:28 Amaute sung panin Agabas a kici kamsang pa hong dinga

Acts12:1 Hih hun pawl laitakin Herod Kumpipa in pawlpi mite pawl khat bawlsiat ding kipan hi.
Acts12:2 Johanʼ u James pen namsau tawh thatsak hi.
Acts12:3 Hih bangin thahna hangin Jew mite a lungdamna a theih ciangin Peter zong mansak leuleu hi. (Hih pen Silngo Sawh loh Anlum Pawi hunsung ahi hi.)
Acts12:4 Peter a kimat khit ciangin thong ah kikoih a
Acts12:5 Tua ahih manin thong sungah Peter kikhum a
Acts12:6 Herod in Peter thu sit dingin a lakkhiat ding ma a zan sungin
Acts12:7 Thakhatthu-in Peter gei ah Topaʼ vantungmi khat hong omin thong sung khempeuh khua a vak hi. Vantungmi in Peterʼ liangko lokin phong a
Acts12:8 Tua ciangin vantungmi in
Acts12:9 thong sung panin Peter in amah zui-in a paikhia hi. Ahi zongin tua vantungmiʼ gamtatna pen ahi takpi mah ahi hiam cih thei lo ahih manin maang a mu-in kingaihsun hi.
Acts12:10 Thongcingteʼ vilna mun a khatna le a nihna a khen khit uh ciangin khuapi sung lut nading sik kibawl thong kongpi a tung uh hi. Tua kongpi pen ama thu-in hong kihong tawm a
Acts12:11 Tua ciangin Peter in khua phawk a
Acts12:12 Hih thu a phawk khit ciangin Johan Marka nu Mary’ inn ah a pai hi. Tua lai ah mi tampi kikhawmin thu a na ngen uh hi.

Acts12:19 Peter a zon nadingun Herod in thu pia a
Acts12:20 Taia khua mite le Sidon khua mite tungah Herod heh mahmah ahih manin Herod tawh a kimu dingin hih khua nih mite hong pai khawm uh hi. A masa-in kumpi inn sunga ulian nasem ahi Blastus a pawlmat phot uh hi. Hih khua nihteʼ an nek tui dawn pen hih kumpipaʼ gam panin a ngah uh ahih manin Blastus makai sakin Herod kiangah va pai-in kilem nading thu a va gen uh hi.

Acts13:3 Amaute in zong an tangin

Acts13:6 Tua tuikulh tung khempeuh ah zin kawikawi-in Pafos khua a tun uh ciangin mitphial a bawl

Acts14:1 Ikonium khua a tun uh ciangin Paul le Barnabas zong Jew mite kikhopna inn ah pai uh a

Acts14:6 Sawltakte in tua thu a theih uh ciangin Likaonia gam sunga om Lystra khua
Acts14:7 tua a taina uh khuate ah Lungdamna Thu a hilh uh hi.
Acts14:8 A suah tung a kipanin lam a pai thei lo khe zaw mi khat Lystra khua ah a om hi.

Acts14:18 Hih bangin thu a genna uh tawh mihonte in amaute a biak loh nadingun a kho zo liailiai uh ahi hi.

Acts16:4 Thuhilhin a paina uh khua khempeuh a thu um mite kiangah Jerusalem khua-a om sawltakte le upate in zuih dingin a khensat uh ngeinate gen kawikawi uh a

Acts16:20 Rom ulian thukhente kiangah paipih uh a

Acts16:31 Amaute in

Acts16:34 Tua ciangin a inn ah amaute ciah pihin an a pia hi. Tu-in Pasian thu um uh ahih manin amah a kipan a innkuan pih khempeuh a lungdam mahmah uh hi.
Acts16:35 A zingsang ciangin Rom thukhen uliante in palikbute samin
Acts16:36 Tua ahih manin thongcing pa in zong Paul kiangah
Acts16:37 Ahi zongin Paul in palikbute kiangah

Acts17:1 Amfipolis khua le Apollonia khua nawkin amaute zin uh a
Acts17:2 A pai ngei zel mah bangin Paul zong kikhopna inn ah pai a
Acts17:3 Khris in sihna thuakin
Acts17:4 Mi pawl khat in a thugen uh man sa uh ahih manin Paul le Silas pawlpih uh a
Acts17:5 Tua bangin mi tampi in Paulʼ thugen a up uh ciangin Jew mite thangpai uh a
Acts17:6 Tua inn ah Paul le Silas a muh loh uh ciangin a innteek pa Jason le midang pawl khat kai khia-in uliante kiangah paipih uh a
Acts17:7 Jason in a inn ah amaute tungsak hi. Amaute in gam khempeuh a uk Kumpipaʼ thu palsat uh a
Acts17:8 Hih thu a zak uh ciangin mihonte le khua sung uliante heh mahmah uh a
Acts17:9 Jason le a lawmte a kitat nading uh sum a piaksak khit uh ciangin tua khua sung uliante in amaute a khah pan uh hi.
Acts17:10 Tua zan ciangin thu um mite in Berea khua ah Paul le Silas a paisak uh hi. Tua khua a tun uh ciangin Jew mite kikhopna inn ah a pai uh hi.
Acts17:11 Thesalonika khua mite sangin Berea khua mite in mipi lungsim nei zaw uh hi. Amaute in lawp mahmahna tawh Paulʼ thugente ngai uh a
Acts17:12 Mi tampi in Pasianʼ thu um a
Acts17:13 Berea khua ah zong Paul in Pasian thu a hilhna a zak uh ciangin Thesalonika khua panin Jew mite hong pai-in Berea khua ah zong mite hong holhthawh gawp uh hi.
Acts17:14 Tua ciangin thu um mite in tuipi gei ah Paul paikhiatpih uh a
Acts17:15 Tuipi gei ah Paul a paipih thu um mite in Athen khua ciang dong a va zui uh hi. Athen khua panin Berea khua ah hong ciahkik uh ciangin
Acts17:16 Paul in Athen khua ah Silas le Timoti ngakin a om laitakin tua khua sungah milim a dimin a om lamtak mu ahih manin a lungsim om mawk thei lo hi.

Acts17:19 Tua ahih manin amaute in Paul samin
Acts17:20 Tu-a na gengen ka zak uh thu pawl khatte
Acts17:21 (Athen khua mite le tua khua-a om gamdang mite in thu thak la thak ngaihsunin kikup ding sim loh thudang ngaihsutin nei lo uh hi.)
Acts17:22 Tua ahih manin Paul zong kikhopna mun Areopagas a kici mualbo tungah dingin
Acts17:23 Na khua sung uh ah ka pai kawmin na biakna munte uh ka et ciangin
Acts17:24 Tua Pasian pen leitung buppi le a tunga om khempeuh a piangsak Pasian hi a
Acts17:25 Amah pen mi khempeuh tungah nuntakna le na khempeuh a pia pa ahih manin mihingte in ama adingin na khat peuhpeuh a sepsak ding a kisam ahi kei hi.
Acts17:26 Mihing khat tung panin leitung minam khempeuh hong piangsakin
Acts17:27 Hih bangin ahihna pen mite in amah zongin a muh theih nading uh a deihna ahi hi. Ahi zongin eite kiang panin Pasian gamla om het lo hi.

Acts23:21 Ahi zongin lamkal ah Paul a pangsim dingin mihing sawm li val bang om uh ahih manin amauteʼ hong ngetna pia kei in. Tua mihing sawm lite in Paul a thah khit mateng uh anletui a nek loh nadingun kiciamna khat bawl khin uh hi. Amaute a kithawi sa-in om uh a

Acts23:23 Tua ciangin galkap mangpa in galkap bute nih samin
Acts23:24 Paulʼ tuan nading sakol pawl khat zong keng unla
Acts23:25 Tua ciangin galkap mangpa in hih a nuai-a bangin lai khat gelh hi:
Acts23:26 “A Lian Menzipa aw
Acts23:27 Jew mite in hih mipa manin that dektak uh hi. Rom gam mi ahih lam ka theih ciangin ka galkapte tawh pai-in ka va hon khia hi.
Acts23:28 Amauteʼ mawhsakna bang thu ahi hiam
Acts23:29 Thongkhiat nading le sihna thuak nadingin khialhna a bawlna bangmah ka mu kei hi. A mawhsaknate uh amauʼ thukham ngeina tawh kisai hi lel hi.
Acts23:30 Jew mite pawl khat in amah a thahsawmna thu hong kikoh ciangin nangma kiangah puak dingin ka ngaihsun hi. Amah a mawhsakte in nangma mai ah thu a hong gen nadingun amaute kiangah ka gen hi

Acts24:3 Hih thute hangin nang tungah mi khempeuh ka lungdam mahmah uh hi.

Acts27:1 Italy gamah teembaw tawh ka pai ding uh thu a khen khit uh ciangin Paul le thong kia dangte pawl khat
Acts27:2 Adramittium khua teembaw khawlna panin Asia gam lam manawh dingin a kithawi teembaw ah tuangin ka ding khia uh hi. Masedonia gam Thesalonika khuami Aristarkhas in zong kote hong zui hi.
Acts27:3 A zing ciangin Sidon khua ka tung uh a
Acts27:4 Tua lai panin ka ding leuleu uh a
Acts27:5 Silisia le Pamfilia gam tawh a kizom tuipi kantanin ka pai uh a
Acts27:6 Tua lai panin bupa in Alexandria khua pan Italy gam a manawh ding teembaw khat hong mu ahih manin tua teembaw tungah kote hong tuangsak hi.
Acts27:7 Tua lai panin ni tampi sung damdamin ka pai uh a
Acts27:8 Tuipi gei neh cintenin ka pai uh a
Acts27:9 Tua lai ah ni tampi sung taam ka hih manun Mawhmaisak Ni hun nangawn kheng khin ahih manin teembaw tawh pai lai ding lauhuai ta hi. Tua ahih manin Paul in amaute kiangah
Acts27:10 “Lawmte aw
Acts27:11 Ahi zongin galkap bupa in Paulʼ thugen sangin teembaw ukpa le teembaw nei paʼ thugen um zaw hi.
Acts27:12 Phalbi hun sungteng tua ka khawlna mun uh belh dingin hoih lo ahih manin
Acts27:13 Leitaw lam panin huih hong nun hiauhiau ciangin eiʼ deihna bang hi
Acts27:14 Ahi zongin a sawt kihal loin
Acts27:15 Teembaw hong mut gawpsak ahih manin nang zo nawn lo a
Acts27:16 Kauda tuikulh leitaw lam pang san ka tun uh ciangin tua tuikulh in huihpi tawm khat hong dal ahih manin
Acts27:17 Teembaw tungah gunkuang a koih khit uh ciangin
Acts27:18 Huihpi dai thei tuan lo ahih manin a zing ciangin teembaw puak vante tui sungah a lawn khia uh hi.
Acts27:19 A thai ciangin teembaw vanzatte pawl khat
Acts27:20 Ni tampi sung ni ahi a
Acts27:21 Teembaw hawlte an ne loin sau veipi a om khit uh ciangin amaute mai ah Paul hong dinga
Acts27:22 Ahi zongin tu-in note lunghimawh kei un. Teembaw sia bek dinga
Acts27:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh kei tawh a kipawl ka biak Pasianʼ vantungmi
Acts27:24 ‘Paul aw
Acts27:25 Tua ahih manin lawmte aw
Acts27:26 Tuikulh gei khat peuhpeuh ah huih in hong tun hamtang ding hi
Acts27:27 Tua bangin huihpiʼ mutin Mediterranean tuipi tungah teembaw tawh ka laam zawh uh a zan sawm le li zankim laitakin lei tawh kinai ta hi hang
Acts27:28 Khau mongah sik khihin tui thukna a teh uh ciangin pi za le sawm nih thuk a
Acts27:29 Ka teembaw uh le suang a kitah khak ding lau uh ahih manin teembaw nung lam panin teembaw khawlsakna sikkawipi li khia suk uh a
Acts27:30 Teembaw panin teembaw hawlte taikhiat sawm uh ahih manin teembaw tung panin gunkuang khia suk uh a
Acts27:31 Ahi zongin Paul in galkap bupa le galkapte kiangah
Acts27:32 Tua ahih manin galkapte in gunkuang a kikhihna khau sattatin a khah khia uh hi.
Acts27:33 Khua a vak kuan ciangin mite in an a nek nadingun Paul in hanthawn a
Acts27:34 An na nek nadingun kong thum hi. An ne loin na nungta zo kei ding uh hi. Tutungin bangmah na ci peuhmah kei ding uh hi
Acts27:35 Hih bangin thu a gen khit ciangin Paul in anlum la a
Acts27:36 Amaute khempeuh zong a lungsim uh hong nuam a
Acts27:37 Tua teembaw sunga om mi a vekpi-in za nih le sawm sagih le guk ka pha uh hi.
Acts27:38 Mi khempeuh in an a kinek khit ciangin teembaw a zan nadingin a sunga mangbuhte a lawn khia uh hi.
Acts27:39 Khua hong vak ciangin koi lai gam hiam
Acts27:40 Tua ahih ciangin teembaw khihna sikkawipi khaute sattatin tui sungah khia suk uh a
Acts27:41 Ahi zongin teembaw in sehnel hong phukha-in a tum hi. Teembaw mailam lei sungah tumin taang thei nawn lo a
Acts27:42 Thong kia mi khempeuh tui peekin a tai mang ding uh lau uh ahih manin galkapte in thongkiate thah a sawm uh hi.
Acts27:43 Ahi zongin galkap bupa in Paul suaktasak nuam ahih manin tua bangin a thah ding uh a kham hi. Tua ahih manin tuipeek thei khempeuh in teembaw panin a nawl ah tui va peekin
Acts27:44 a dangte in teembaw sing kitamte lenin a om nadingin thu a pia zaw hi. Tua bangin ka vekpi-un tui gei ah ka suakta uh hi.
