Romans1:1 Pasian kiang panin a hong pai Lungdamna Thu a hilh dingin Pasianʼ teelna tawh sawltak ahi
Romans1:2 Pasian in kamsangte tungtawnin hih Lungdamna Thu a gen sa hi a
Romans1:3 Tua thu pen eiteʼ Topa Jesu Khris ahi ama Tapaʼ thu ahi hi. Tua Tapa pen leitung si le sa lam panin Davidʼ suan hi a
Romans1:4 Kha Siangtho thu lamsang ah ci lehang misite lak panin vangliatna tawh a thawhsakkikna hangin Pasianʼ Tapa ahihna thu Pasian in a kilangsak hi.
Romans1:5 Minam khempeuh in ama thu umin a zuih theih nadingun Khris hangin sawltak nasep sep theih nading hamphatna thu Pasian in Khrisʼ na sep nadingin kote a hong pia hi.
Romans1:6 Pasianʼ sapna za-in Jesu Khris tawh a kipawl Rom khua-a a om note khempeuh zong tua minamte sungah a kihel na hi uh hi.
Romans1:7 Tua ahih manin Pasian in hong it a
Romans1:8 Jesu na upna thu uh leitung mi khempeuh in gen belin nei uh ahih manin tua Jesu hangin Pasian tungah ka lungdamna thu koh belin ka nei hi.
Romans1:9 Ama Tapa hangin Lungdamna Thu ka lungsim khempeuh tawh hilhin a na ka sep Pasian in hih ka thugente a man taktak ahihna thu hong thei hi.
Romans1:10 Thu ka nget simin note ka hong phawk tawntungna le ama deihna ahih nakleh khatvei teitei ciangin note kiangah ka hong pai theih nading ka utna thu Pasian in a thei hi.
Romans1:11 Kha thu ah note na thahat theih nadingun Pasian in a hong piak thuphate hong genpih nuam ka hih manin note tawh kimuh ding ka ut mahmah hi.
Romans1:12 Tua bang ka cih ciangin keiʼ upna in note hong tha khauhsakin
Romans1:13 Khris sungah sanggamte aw
Romans1:14 Nuntakna sang mite le nuntakna niam mite
Romans1:15 Rom khua-a a om note tungah zong Lungdamna Thu hilh ding ka lawp mahmah hi.
Romans1:16 Lungdamna Thu ka muang mahmah hi. Tua thu pen a masa-in Jew mi
Romans1:17 Lai Siangtho sungah
Romans1:18 Mihingte in a mawhna le a gitlohna hangun Pasianʼ thuman seelcip uh ahih manin van panin a hehna hong kilangsakin a gimpiakna ding zia hong kilangsak hi.
Romans1:19 Pasian mahmah in amaute tungah limtakin laktel ahih manin Pasianʼ thu teltakin a theih khit uh ciangin a gamtatna uh ahih manin Pasian in gim a pia ahi hi.
Romans1:20 Pasian in leitung a piansak cil a kipanin a kimu thei lo ama pianzia ahi tawntung vanglian pa le Pasian ahihna thute ama bawl sa nate tung panin teltakin hong kilang hi. Tua ahih manin
Romans1:21 Amaute in Pasian thei napi-in a zahtak dingun a kilawm bangin zahtak loin
Romans1:22 Amaute pil a kisak mahmah uh hangin a hai mahmah uh ahi hi.
Romans1:23 A hing tawntung Pasian bia loin
Romans1:24 Mihingte tua zahta-in hai lua uh ahih manin amau ututin a gamtat theih nadingun Pasian in khah khong vet a
Romans1:25 Amaute in a man ahi Pasianʼ thu um nuam lo uh a
Romans1:26 Tua ahih manin amau utna bangin a zumhuai pi-in a gamtat theih nadingun Pasian in a khah khong hi. A numeite un pasal tawh lup khop ngeina zang loin a numeipihte mah uh lunggulhin lum khawm uh a
Romans1:27 a pasalte uh zong numei tawh lum khawm loin pasalte mah lunggulhin lum khawm uh a
Romans1:28 Mite in a man ahi Pasianʼ thu ngaihsutin nei nuam lo uh ahih manin amauteʼ ngaihsut hoih lo bangin a gamtat theih nadingun Pasian in a khah khia hi. Tua ahih manin a gamtat dingun a kilawm lo pipi-in a gamta uh hi.
Romans1:29 Siatna nam khempeuh ahi
Romans1:30 mi gensiatna
Romans1:31 gamtat siatna
Romans1:32 Tua bangin a gamtate in sihna thuak ding hi
Romans2:1 Tua ahih ciangin midangteʼ thu a khen note pen kuakua hi ta le-uhcin na suakta tuan kei ding uh hi. Midangte na mawhsakna uh thute mah note zong gamta veve na hih manun
Romans2:2 Tua bang mawhna a gamtate
Romans2:3 Midangte a mawhna hangin thu khenin
Romans2:4 Pasian migi-in thu a diah hithiatna pen na kisikkik theih nading uh a deihna ahih lamtak phawk kha loin
Romans2:5 Lungsim khauhin na kisik nop lohna hangun Pasianʼ hehna le a manin a thukhenna a hong kilat Ni ding ciangin na gimthuak ding uh a nasia semsem dingin a bawl na hi uh hi.
Romans2:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in mi khempeuh a gamtatna uh tawh kizui-in thukkik ding hi.
Romans2:7 Pahtakna
Romans2:8 ahi zongin ama deihna bek zui-in
Romans2:9 Jew mi a kipan Gentail mi dongin a gamtat sia mi khempeuh in gimna le lungkhamna thuak ding uh hi.
Romans2:10 Tua mah bangin Jew mi a kipanin Gentail mi dongin a gamtat hoih mi khempeuh in minthanna
Romans2:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in kuamah deidan loin mi khempeuh tungah a kibangin thu a khen hi.
Romans2:12 Moses Thukham a nei lo Gentail mite a khialh uh ciangin thukham nei lopi mahin siatna thuak uh a
Romans2:13 Thukham zakna bek hangin Pasian tawh kipawlna a piang hi lo a
Romans2:14 Gentail mite in thukham a neih loh uh hangin amauʼ ngaihsut tawmna tawh thukhamʼ deihna bang a gamtat uh ciangin tua thukhamʼ deihna a zui uh hi a
Romans2:15 Amauʼ lungsim sungah thukhamʼ deihnate om khin ahihna thu a gamtatna un hong kilangsak hi. Amau mahmah zong khat veivei hoih kisa
Romans2:16 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian in mihingte lungsim sunga a ngaihsutnate uh
Romans2:17 Tu-in Jew mi ka hi uh
Romans2:18 Thukham thei na hih manun Pasianʼ deihnate na thei uh a
Romans2:19 Mittawte lam a lak ding
Romans2:20 mihaite a hilh ding
Romans2:21 Midangte a hilh note in
Romans2:22 “Numei tawh mawh kei un
Romans2:23 Note in thukham kisaktheih pih napi-in thukham palsatin Pasianʼ min na daisak uh hi.
Romans2:24 Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho sungah
Romans2:25 Thukham zui le-uhcin na vun atna uh man nei takpi mah hi. Ahi zongin thukham na zuih kei uh leh na vun atna uh a mawkna a suak ahi hi.
Romans2:26 Tua ahih manin vun ki-at lo Gentail mite in thukham a zuih nak uh leh Pasian in vun at mah bangin ngaihsun ding hi lo ahi hiam?
Romans2:27 Tua ahih manin thukham nei-in vun ki-at napi-in tua thukham a zui lo no Jew mite pen vun ki-at lo thukham a zui Gentail mite in thu hong khen ding hi lo ahi uh hiam?
Romans2:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh a pualam bek a Jew mi hihna le a pualam vun ki-atna lel bek in Jew mi taktak suaksak zo lo hi.
Romans2:29 Jew mi taktak i cihte pen
Romans3:1 Tua ahihleh Jew mite in Gentail mite sangin bang hamphatna nei zaw a
Romans3:2 Lam tampi ah a phattuamna a om hi. A masa penin
Romans3:3 Ahi zongin Jew mi pawl khatte in Pasianʼ thuciamna zui lo uh hi. Hih mi pawl khatteʼ thupalsatna hangin Pasian in a thuciamna maimangsak dingin ngaihsun na hi uh hiam?
Romans3:4 Tua bang hi het lo hi. Lai Siangtho sungah
Romans3:5 Pasian a manin gamta ahihna eiteʼ gamtat khialhna in kilangsak semsem ahih ciangin eite in bang gen ding nei nawn ihi hiam? Pasian in eite gim a hong piak ciangin a thuman lo ahi hiam? (Hih bangin thu ka gen ciangin leitung mihingteʼ kammal zat ngeite a zang ka hi hi.)
Romans3:6 Gim hong piakna ah a thuman lo hi het lo hi. A thuman lo hi zenzen leh bangci-in leitung mi khempeuhʼ thu khen thei ding ahi hiam?
Romans3:7 Keima zuautatna in Pasian a thumanna kilangsakin a min thangsak semsem ahihleh bang hangin mawhnei-in kei hong kiseh lailai ahi hiam?
Romans3:8 Thupha a pian nadingin gamtat sia gamta ni
Romans3:9 Tua ahihleh Gentail mite sangin ko Jew mite hampha zaw ka hi uh hiam? Bangmah hamphatna nei tuan lo hi ung. Jew mite le Gentail mite a kibangin mawhna khut sungah om uh hi
Romans3:10 Lai Siangtho sungah zong
Romans3:11 a man a thei kuamah om lo a
Romans3:12 Kuamah in Pasian ngaihsutna nei lo uh a
Romans3:13 A kam uh tawh mi that uh a
Romans3:14 A kam uh tawh mi samsia uh a
Romans3:15 Mi that pakpak uh a
Romans3:16 a paina khempeuh uh ah lungkhamna a piangsak uh hi.
Romans3:17 Nopna a pian nadingin gamta ngei lo uh a
Romans3:18 Pasian zahtak ding ngaihsutin nei lo uh hi
Romans3:19 Tua ahih manin kuamah in paulap a zon theih loh nading le mi khempeuh in Pasianʼ thukhenna a thuak theih nadingin Thukham a nei mite khempeuh in tua Thukham a zuih ding uh ahihna thu i thei hi.
Romans3:20 Thukham in mihingte a mawhna kilangsak thei bek ahih manin thukham zuihna hangin kuamah in Pasian tawh kipawl theihna ngah zo lo hi.
Romans3:21 Ahi zongin tu-in thukham zuihna hang hi loin thudang khat hangin Pasian tawh kipawl theih nading lampi hong kilang zo a
Romans3:22 Tua thu in: Jew mi le Gentail mi kuamah a kilamdanna om loin Jesu Khris upna hangin mi khempeuh in Pasian tawh kipawl theihna a ngah hi.
Romans3:23 Mi khempeuh mawh ciat uh a
Romans3:24 Ahi zongin Pasian in a hong hehpihna hangin Khris Jesu tawh hong tatkhiat manin amah tawh i kipawl theikik hi.
Romans3:25 Ama hong sihna hangin mawhna a kimaisak theih nadingin Pasian in Jesu hong pia a
Romans3:26 Ahi zongin tu hun ciangin Jesu a um mi khempeuh Pasian tawh a kipawl theih nading le amah thuman ahihna a kilatsak nadingin mihingteʼ mawhna tawh kisai-in na hong sem hi.
Romans3:27 Tua ahihleh mihingte in i kisialh pih ding bang om ahi hiam? Bangmah om lo hi. Bang bulphuh ding ihi hiam? Thukham zuihna bulphuh ding ihi hiam? Hi lo hi. I upna a bulphuh ding ihi hi.
Romans3:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khatpeuh Pasian tawh a kipawl theihna pen Thukham zuih zawhna hang hi loin upna hang hi
Romans3:29 Pasian
Romans3:30 Pasian khat bek hi a
Romans3:31 Tua ahihleh hih upna thu i gen ciangin Thukham a phiat ihi hiam? Hi lo hi; a kipsak semsem ihi hi.
Romans4:1 Tu-in eiteʼ pianna i pupi Abrahamʼ thu ngaihsun ni. Ama tunga thupiang hih bang ahi hi:
Romans4:2 Abraham in a sepna hangin amah tawh a kipawl dingin Pasian in sang hileh Abraham in kisialh pih ding thu a nei ahi hi. Ahi zongin Pasianʼ mai ah Abraham a kisialh nading bangmah thu om lo hi.
Romans4:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah
Romans4:4 Na a sem mipa a sep thaman kipia hi. Tua a nasepna thaman pen a thalawh sa ahih manin piakkhongin kingaihsutsak lo hi.
Romans4:5 Ahi zongin Pasianʼ maipha ngah nadingin nasepna suang loin upna a suang mipa pen Pasian in mimawh kimlai midik hi
Romans4:6 Tua ahih manin nasepna hang tawh hi loin Pasian in mi khat mi dikin a sanna hangin David in zong a lungdamna thu na gen a
Romans4:7 “Pasian in a mawhnate maisakin a khialhnate a seelcipsak mite thupha ngah ahi uh hi.
Romans4:8 Topa in a mawhnate a ciaptehsak loh mipa
Romans4:9 David in a gen hih thupha pen vun ki-atte bek in ngah thei ahi hiam? Hi lo hi; vun ki-at lote in zong ngah thei uh hi. Lai Siangtho in
Romans4:10 Hih mihoihin a san bang hun ahi hiam? Abraham a vun a ki-at ma ahi hiam
Romans4:11 Abraham a vun a ki-at ma-in a upna hangin Pasian in mihoihin a sanna lahtel nadingin a vun a kinung-at ahi hi. Tua ahih manin vun a ki-at loh hangin a upna uh hangin mihoihin a kisang mite khempeuh adingin Abraham pen kha thu lamah pupi ahi hi.
Romans4:12 A vun a ki-at ma-in i pupi Abraham a upna hangin a gamtat mah bangin a gamta
Romans4:13 Abraham le a suan a khakte in leitung luah ding hi
Romans4:14 Thukham zuihna hangin Pasianʼ thuciamnate a kingah ding hileh miteʼ upna pen a kimanna om loin
Romans4:15 Thukham in Pasianʼ heh nading piangsak hi. Ahi zongin thukham om kei leh thukham zui lo cih zong om thei lo hi.
Romans4:16 Tua ahih manin Abrahamʼ suanlekhakte khempeuh tungah Pasianʼ hehpihna piakkhong a suah theih nadingin Thukham a zuite bek in ngah loin
Romans4:17 Lai Siangtho sungah zong
Romans4:18 Lai Siangtho sungah
Romans4:19 Abraham kum za khat bang pha dektak ta a
Romans4:20 Amah in Pasianʼ thuciamna muanlah dingin ngaihsun lo a
Romans4:21 Pasian in a thuciam sa tungsak zo taktak ding hi
Romans4:22 Tua ahih manin
Romans4:23 “A upna pen hoihna-in kisang
Romans4:24 Sihna panin i Topa Jesu a hingsak pa a um eite khempeuh zong i upna hangin mihoihin hong kisang ding hi
Romans4:25 Eiteʼ mawhna hangin a si dingin Jesu kipia a
Romans5:1 Tu-in upna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl khinta ihih manin i Topa Jesu Khris hangin Pasian tawh a kilemkik ta ihi hi.
Romans5:2 Ama hangin upna tawh tu-a i omna Pasian hehpihna sungah a tung ihi a
Romans5:3 Haksatna i thuak laitak nangawnin i lungdam veve hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh haksatna in thuak zawh hatna piangsak a
Romans5:4 thuak zawh hatna in Pasianʼ pahtakna hong ngahsak a
Romans5:5 Pasian in eite tungah a hong piak a Kha Siangtho tawh eite sungah ama itna hong guang ahih manin hih lametna in eite hong lungkiasak ngei lo hi.
Romans5:6 Eite cimawhin i om laitakin Pasianʼ hoihsak hunin ei migilote adingin Khris hong si hi.
Romans5:7 Mihoih khat adingin a si ngam a om kha ahi zongin thukham zui zo mipa adingin sih ngam nading a thuhaksa mahmah khat ahi hi.
Romans5:8 Ahi zongin eite mawhna nei ihih laitakin eite adingin Khris hong si ahih manin Pasian in eite hong it mahmahna thu hong lak khin hi.
Romans5:9 Ama sihna hangin tu-in Pasian tawh kipawl thei ihih manin Pasianʼ hehna hangin gimna panin zong hong suaktasak zaw kan lai ding hi.
Romans5:10 Pasian tawh eite i kilangneih laitakin ama Tapaʼ sihna hangin amah tawh hong kilemsak ahihleh tu-in Pasian tawh kipawl khinta ihih manin Khris nuntakna in eite hong hon khia zo zaw kan ding hi lo ahi hiam?
Romans5:11 Tua teng bek hi lo lai a
Romans5:12 Mi khat hangin leitungah mawhna hong om a
Romans5:13 Thukham a om ma pekin leitungah mawhna na om khin a
Romans5:14 Ahi zongin Adam hun a kipan Moses hun dongin sihna in mite uk a
Romans5:15 Ahi zongin Pasianʼ hong piak letsong pen Adamʼ mawhna tawh kibang lo ahih manin tua tegel tehkak theih ding hi lo hi. Tua mi khat a khialhna hangin mi tampi a sihna pen a man mah ahi hi. Ahi zongin Pasianʼ hong itna le hong hehpihna nakpi takin lian zaw lai a
Romans5:16 Pasianʼ letsong le mi khatʼ mawhna a hatna zia kilamdang hi. Khialhna khat a om khit ciangin
Romans5:17 Mi khat bekʼ mawhna hangin sihna in hong uk ahihleh mi khat mah ahi Jesu Khris hangin nakpi takin a lian Pasianʼ hehpihna le mi hoih a sanna a ngah mite nungta-in thahat zaw kan ding uh hi.
Romans5:18 Tua hi a
Romans5:19 Mi khat in thu a man loh manin mi tampi mimawh a suahsak mah bangin mi khat in thu a manna hangin mi tampi in Pasian tawh kipawl theihna a ngah ding uh ahi hi.
Romans5:20 Khialhna a tam semsem nadingin thukham hong kipia hi. Ahi zongin khialhna a tamna munah Pasianʼ hehpihna hong lian zaw zel hi.
Romans5:21 Tua ahih manin mawhna thahatin hong sihsak mah bangin
Romans6:1 Tua ahihleh Pasianʼ hehpihna a liat theih nadingin mawhna bawlbawl ding ihi hiam?
Romans6:2 Tua bang hi dek lo ding hi. Mawhna thu ah a si eite in bangci-in mawhna bawl thei nawn ding ihi hiam?
Romans6:3 Khris Jesu tawh i kipawl theih nadingin ama sungah a kiphum eite pen ama sihna mahah zong a si khawm ihih lam thei lo na hi uh hiam?
Romans6:4 I Paʼ vangliatna tawh sihna panin Khris a kithawhkiksak mah bangin eite zong nuntakna thak i nuntak theih nadingin tui i kiphum ciangin amah tawh kiphum khawmin a si khawm ihi hi.
Romans6:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh ama sihna ah si khawmin pawl khat i suah leh amah a thawhkikna ah zong pawl khat suakin i thokhawm ding hi.
Romans6:6 Mawhna khutnuai ah eite i om nawn loh nadingin mawhnopna lungsim i neihna teng i sucip a
Romans6:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khat a sih ciangin mawhna vangliatna panin a suakta ahi hi.
Romans6:8 Ahi zongin Khris tawh i sih khawm leh amah tawh ei zong i hing khawm ding hi
Romans6:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh sihna panin Khris kihingkiksak khin a
Romans6:10 Ama sihna pen mawhna thu tawh kisai-a sihna hi a
Romans6:11 Tua mah bangin note zong Khris Jesu tawh kipawlin mawhna thu ah si-in
Romans6:12 Tua ahih ciangin na pumpi uh deihna na zuih loh nadingun na pumpi uh
Romans6:13 Mawhna gamtat nadingin na pumpi nate uh khat beek na zang nawn kei ding uh hi. Note pen misi hi napi-in a kihingkiksak mite bang na hih manun
Romans6:14 Note pen thukhamʼ sawlna hangin nasem hi loin Pasianʼ hong lah thuhoihteʼ hangin nasem na hih uh manin mawhnaʼ sawlna mangin na gamta nawn kei un.
Romans6:15 Eite pen thukhamʼ uk hi loin Pasianʼ hehpihna in hong uk ahih manin mawhna i gamta kei ding hi.
Romans6:16 Mi khatpeuhʼ thu a mang dingin ama khut sungah na kipiak uh ciangin a thu na mante uhʼ sila na hi uh hi. Mawhna na bawl uh leh sihna a thuak ding na hi uh a
Romans6:17 Nidangin silate bangin mawhnaʼ thu a mang hi napi-in
Romans6:18 Mawhnaʼ vangliatna panin na suakta khinta uh a
Romans6:19 Noteʼ theihtheih nadingin nisim nuntakna ziate tawh a hong genteh ka hi hi. Nidang lai-in hoih lohna le gitlohna a gamta dingin na pumpi uh na buppiak uh mah bangin
Romans6:20 Mawhna khut sungah na om laitakun Pasianʼ deihna bangin na gamtat ding uh kisam lo hi.
Romans6:21 Ahi zongin
Romans6:22 Ahi zongin tu-in mawhna bawlnopna panin suakta-in Pasianʼ khut sung mi na hi ta uh hi. Tua thu hangin na ngah uh na pen Pasian adingin a kipia khin nuntakna hi a
Romans6:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh mawhna in thaman hong piak pen sihna hi a
Romans7:1 Lawmte aw
Romans7:2 Gentehna-in
Romans7:3 Tua ahih manin a pasal a nuntak hun sungin pasal dang tawh a lup khop leh mi tawh a mawh kici hi. Ahi zongin a pasal a si hileh thukham tawh kisai-in a suakta hi a
Romans7:4 Sanggamte aw
Romans7:5 I leitung lungsim tawh i nuntak lai teng
Romans7:6 Ahi zongin nidangin a hong lencip thukham panin Pasian in eite hong suaktasak khin ahih manin tua thukham tawh kisai ah eite a si khin ihi hi. Lai sungah a kigelh thukham lui sungah nungta nawn loin
Romans7:7 Tua ahihleh Thukham mahmah pen a siahuai ahi hiam? A sia hi lo hi. Mawhna bang hiam cih Thukham in hong theitelsak hi. Thukham in
Romans7:8 Thukham a omna hangin mawhna in nuamtak sa-in hazatna a tuamtuam ka neih theih nading hong piangsak hi. Thukham om kei leh mawhna in bangmah sem thei lo hi.
Romans7:9 Thukham ka theih ma-in mi nungta ka hi ngei a
Romans7:10 Nuntak ngah nadingin a kibawl thukham pen keima adingin sihna hong hi zawsop hi.
Romans7:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh thukham a om manin mawhna in nuamtak sa a
Romans7:12 Tua ahih ciangin Thukham mahmah hitaleh thupiaknate hitaleh hoihin man a
Romans7:13 Tua ahihleh a hoih na khat in keiʼ sih nading hong piangsak ahi hiam? Hi lo hi. Tua sihna pen mawhnaʼ nasepna hi a
Romans7:14 Thukham pen i kha thu tawh kisai hi
Romans7:15 Ka hih nop teng hih kha loin ka hih nop loh teng keek mah hih zawsop ka hih manin keima gamtatna mahmah zong ka tel thei kei hi.
Romans7:16 Ka hih nop loh teng ka hih veve ciangin Thukham a deihhuai khat hi
Romans7:17 Tua ahih manin tua bangin a gamta taktak pen kei hi loin ka sunga om mawhna hizaw hi.
Romans7:18 Ka leitung pumpi sungah a hoih na khat beek om lo hi
Romans7:19 A hoih ka gamtat nop teng gamta loin
Romans7:20 Ka gamtat nop loh teng ka gamtat veve ciangin tua a gamta pen kei hi nawn loin ka sunga om mawhna a gamta ahihna a hong kilang hi.
Romans7:21 Tua ahih ciangin a hoih gamta nuam hi napi-in a sia bekbek a gamta kha ka hihna ka thei hi.
Romans7:22 Ka lungsim tawng taktak ah Pasianʼ thukham hoih ka sa hi.
Romans7:23 Ahi zongin keiʼ deih loh thudang khat in ka lungsimah na hong sem hi. Tua ka sunga na hong sem pen in mawhna thu ah kei hong mancip hi.
Romans7:24 Kei pen a lungkham mi ka hi ta hi. Kei a hong sisak ding hih lungsim lui panin kua in kei hong hon khia zo ding ahi hiam?
Romans7:25 I Topa Jesu Khris in hong hon khia zo ding ahih manin Pasian tungah ka lung a dam hi. Keiʼ om zia taktak ahihleh: Ka lungsim tawh Pasianʼ thu ka zui a
Romans8:1 Ahi zongin tu-in ahihleh Khris Jesu tawh kipawlin a nungta mite pen mawhna thukhenna tawh kipelh hi.
Romans8:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khris Jesu tawh a hong kipawlsak Kha Siangtho in mawhna le sihna a piangsak thukham panin kei hong suaktasak khinta hi.
Romans8:3 Mihingte thahat lo ihih manin Thukham in ahih zawh loh thute Pasian in a hih zo hi. Mawhna a beisak theih nadingin mihingte sunga om mawhna tungah thu a khenna-in ama Tapa hong sawl a
Romans8:4 Eiteʼ deihna bangin nungta loin Pasianʼ Kha Siangthoʼ deihna bangin a nungta eite sungah Thukhamʼ deihna teng a kicin theih nadingin Pasian in a Tapa a hong sawl ahi hi.
Romans8:5 Amau pumpi deihna bangin a nungtate
Romans8:6 I ngaihsutna
Romans8:7 Mi khatpeuh in ama pumpi deihna a ki-uksak ciangin Pasianʼ thukhamte zui lo ahih manin Pasianʼ gal suak a
Romans8:8 Amau pumpi deihna bangin a gamtate in Pasian lungdamsak thei lo uh hi.
Romans8:9 Note sungah Pasianʼ Kha Siangtho hong om nakleh nomau pumpi deihna bangin gamta loin Kha Siangtho deihna bangin na gamta ding uh hi. Khris lungsim a nei lote Khris tawh kipawl lo hi.
Romans8:10 Ahi zongin note sungah Khris hong om leh mawhna hangin na pumpi uh a si veve ding ahi zongin
Romans8:11 Sihna panin Jesu a thokiksak Pasianʼ Kha Siangtho note sungah hong om leh sihna panin Khris a hingkiksak pa mah in note sungah a om ama Kha Siangtho mah tawh a si thei pumpi a hong nungtasak ding hi.
Romans8:12 Tua ahih ciangin lawmte aw
Romans8:13 Na pumpi uh deihna zui-in na gamtat uh leh na si ding uh a
Romans8:14 Pasianʼ Kha Siangtho in a makaih mite
Romans8:15 Note tungah Pasian in a hong piak a Kha Siangtho in note na lau nadingun sila-in a hong bawl hi lo a
Romans8:16 Eite
Romans8:17 Eite pen ama ta ihih manin mite adingin a koih thuphate i ngah banah Khris adingin a koihte zong i ngahkhawm lai ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Khris in a thuak mah bangin i thuak nakleh amah a minthan mah bangin ei zong i minthang ding hi.
Romans8:18 Tu hun a i thuaknate pen Pasian in a hong piak ding minthanna tawh ka ngaihsut khawm ciangin gentham ka sa het kei hi.
Romans8:19 Pasianʼ bawl sa khempeuh in Pasianʼ tate a hong kilahkhiat hun ding lawp mahmah in a ngak uh hi.
Romans8:20 Pasianʼ bawl sate
Romans8:21 Pasianʼ bawl sate
Romans8:22 Tu hun ciang dong Pasianʼ bawl sa khempeuh nupi nausuak ding bangin na sa-in a tauna uh i thei hi.
Romans8:23 Pasianʼ bawl sa nate bek hi lo a
Romans8:24 Hih bangin lamenin i upna in eite hong hon khia khin hi. Ahi zongin i lamet pen i muh ciangin tua pen lamet hi nawn lo hi. Kua in a muh sa nate lamen nawn ahi hiam?
Romans8:25 I muh lohte i lamet ciangin lungduai takin i ngak thei hi.
Romans8:26 Tua ahih manin eite bangzahin gina lo hitale hang eite a hong huh dingin Kha Siangtho a hong pai hi. Eite in a kilawm bangin thunget ding nangawn i thei kei a
Romans8:27 Kha Siangtho in Pasianʼ deihna tawh kizui-in Pasianʼ mite adingin hong thumsak ahih manin mihingteʼ lungsim tawng thu a thei Pasian in Kha Siangthoʼ ngaihsutna a thei hi.
Romans8:28 Ama deihna bang a sem dingin Pasian in a hong sap
Romans8:29 Pasianʼ Tapa mi khempeuh lakah a upa pen a suah theih nadingin Pasian in a teel kholh sa mite
Romans8:30 Tua ahih manin ama sap mite a seh sa hi a
Romans8:31 Hih teng bang ahih khit ciangin bang gen ding om nawn ahi hiam? Pasian in eite hong kop pih peuh leh kua in eite hong zo zo ding ahi hiam?
Romans8:32 Ama Tapa nangawn siit loin eite khempeuh adingin hong pia khia ahih manin
Romans8:33 Pasian in mawh lo hi
Romans8:34 Tua ahih manin kua in amaute tungah thu khen thei nawn ding ahi hiam? Eite adingin a hong thumsak pa pen Pasianʼ tak lamah a tu
Romans8:35 Tua ahih manin bangin Khrisʼ itna tawh hong kikhensak zo ding ahi hiam? Haksatna
Romans8:36 Lai Siangtho sungah zong
Romans8:37 Eite a hong it paʼ hangin hih thu khempeuh ah a gualzo pente ihi hi.
Romans8:38 Bangmah in ama hong itna tawh hong kikhensak zo het lo ding hi
Romans8:39 leitung a om nate
Romans9:1 Kei
Romans9:2 Leitung si le sa ah ka mipihte adingin nakpi takin dahin ka lunggimna a khang hi.
Romans9:3 Hi thei ding hileh amauteʼ hoih nadingin keimah in Pasianʼ samsiatna thuakin Khris tawh kikhen nading ciang dong nangawnin amaute ka huh nuam hi.
Romans9:4 Amaute pen Pasianʼ teel Israel mite hi a
Romans9:5 le a thupi pupiteʼ suanlekhakte hi uh a
Romans9:6 Ahi zongin Pasianʼ thuciamnate a mawkna a suak hi sam lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mi khempeuh Pasianʼ teel mi hi khin lo hi.
Romans9:7 Abrahamʼ suanlekhak khempeuh zong Pasianʼ tate hi kim lo hi. Pasian in Abraham kiangah
Romans9:8 Tua ahih manin leitung ngeina tawh a suak tate pen Pasianʼ ta hi lo a
Romans9:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in hih bangin thuciamna bawl a
Romans9:10 Tua bek zong hi lo lai hi. Rebekah in eiteʼ pupi Isaac tawh tapa nih nei hi.
Romans9:11 Pasianʼ teelna pen a teel miteʼ nasepna hang hi loin Pasianʼ sapna tawh kisai zaw hi
Romans9:12 Rebekah kiangah Pasian in
Romans9:13 Tua mah bangin Lai Siangtho sungah
Romans9:14 Tua bang ahihleh Pasian thutang lo hi
Romans9:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in Moses kiangah
Romans9:16 Tua ahih ciangin miteʼ utna le sepna tawh kisai lo a
Romans9:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah Pasian in Faro kiangah
Romans9:18 Tua ahih manin Pasian in a hehpih nopte hehpih a
Romans9:19 Note in
Romans9:20 Lawmte aw
Romans9:21 Beelseek pa in tungman lom khat sung panin hun thupi diakin zat ding beel le zat mawkmawk ding beelin a ututin seek theih nading thu a nei hi.
Romans9:22 Tua mah bangin Pasian in zong a beisa hunah siatna a thuak dingin a kilawm mite susia loin a ki-ipipna mite tungah a hehna le a vangliatna a lah theih nading thu a neih mah bangin
Romans9:23 ama minthanna a lah theih nadingin ama minthanna a ngah dingin a hong seh sa eite tungah zong ama hehpihna a hong piak theih nading thu a nei hi.
Romans9:24 Tua bangin a hong sap eite pen Jew mite sung bek pan hi loin Gentail mite sung panin zong ahi hi.
Romans9:25 Hosea Lai Siangtho sungah
Romans9:26 ‘Ka mite hi kei uh teh
Romans9:27 Isaiah in Israel miteʼ thu a genna ah
Romans9:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in leitung mite thu hong khen baih ding hi
Romans9:29 Hih thu pen Isaiah mah in
Romans9:30 Tua ahihleh Pasian tawh kipawl theih nading hanciamna a nei lo Gentail mite pen upna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl thei a
Romans9:31 Pasian tawh a kipawl theih nadingin thukham zuihna tawh hanciam napi-in a zuih zawh lohna hangun Israel mite kipawl thei lo ahihleh a bangci thu ahi hiam?
Romans9:32 Amaute in upna suang loin nasepna a suan hang uh ahi hi. Amaute pen Lai Siangtho in a gen mah bangin
Romans9:33 Lai Siangtho in
Romans10:1 Sanggamte aw
Romans10:2 Amaute in Pasian a kin mahmah lamtak uh thei-in teci-in ka pang ngam hi. Ahi zongin amaute in a man lampi tawh kin kha lo uh hi.
Romans10:3 Amaute in Pasian tawh kipawl theih nading lampi man thei loin amau theih tawmna tawh hanciam kha uh ahih manin amah tawh kipawl theih nadingin lampi a khun zui kha lo uh hi.
Romans10:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh upna a nei mi khempeuh Pasian tawh a kipawl theih nadingin Khris in Thukham a beisak hi.
Romans10:5 Moses in a laigelhna sungah
Romans10:6 Ahi zongin upna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl theihna thu a kigenna ah
Romans10:7 
Romans10:8 Tua bang a cih ciangin
Romans10:9 Jesu pen Topa hi
Romans10:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh i lungsim ah i up taktakna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl theihna kingah a
Romans10:11 Lai Siangtho in
Romans10:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh Jew mi le Gentail mi a kideidanna om lo ahih manin Topa pen mi khempeuhʼ Topa hi kim a
Romans10:13 Lai Siangtho in zong
Romans10:14 Ahi zongin a up loh pa uh tungah kua in thu ngen thei ding ahi hiam? Ama thu za ngei kei leh kua in a thu um thei ding ahi hiam? Ama thu kigen kei leh kua in za thei ding ahi hiam?
Romans10:15 A gen dingin kisawl kei leh kua in a thu gen thei ding ahi hiam? Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho sungah
Romans10:16 Ahi zongin Isaiah in
Romans10:17 Tua ahih ciangin zakna panin upna hong piang thei a
Romans10:18 Tua ahihleh amaute in thu za lo uh ahi hiam? Lai Siangtho sungah
Romans10:19 Tua ahihleh Israel mite in a thei uh hiam? Moses mahmah in Pasianʼ min tawh thu na gen a
Romans10:20 Tua banah Isaiah in Pasianʼ min tawh hang takin thu na gen a
Romans10:21 Tua ciangin Israel mite tawh kisai-in
Romans11:1 Tua ahihleh Pasian in ama mi Israel-te nialin nusia mang khin ahi hiam? Tua bang hi dek lo hi. Kei mahmah zong Abrahamʼ suan Israel mite ka hi a
Romans11:2 Pasian in tanglai panin a teel sa mite nusia lo hi. Elijah in Israel mite mawhsakin Pasian kiangah nakpi takin thu a genna Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh thei lo na hi uh hiam?
Romans11:3 Tua sungah
Romans11:4 Ahi zongin Pasian in
Romans11:5 Tua mah bangin tuhunin zong Pasian in ama hehpihna tawh a teel sa mi tawm khat om lai hi.
Romans11:6 A teelna ah miteʼ nasepna bulphuhin a teel hi loin ama dikna hangin a teel hizaw hi. Pasian in mihingteʼ nasepna bulphuhin a teel hileh Pasianʼ dikna pen dikna kici thei lo ding hi.
Romans11:7 A thu om zia taktak hih bang ahi hi. Israel mi a tam zaw in a hanciamciam uh ngah lo uh hi. Pasianʼ teel mi tawm khat bek in ngah uh a
Romans11:8 Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho sungah
Romans11:9 Tua ciangin David in zong
Romans11:10 Khua a muh loh nadingun a mit uh taw henla
Romans11:11 Jew mite a puk uh ciangin sia paisuak ahi uh hiam? Sia paisuak lo uh hi. Amauʼ mawhna hangin Gentail mite in hotkhiatna ngah uh hi. Gentail mite in hotkhiatna a ngah pen Jew mite in enna lungsim a neih theih nading uh deihna ahi hi.
Romans11:12 Jew miteʼ mawhna pen leitung khempeuh thupha ngahna suak a
Romans11:13 Tu-in no Gentail mite tungah thu kong gen nuam hi: No Gentail mite adingin sawltak ka sep sungteng ka nasep a thupi mahmah in ka ngaihsun ding hi.
Romans11:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka mipihte in note hong en theih nading uh piangsak thei-in
Romans11:15 Amaute a kinialna hangin Pasian tawh leitung mi khempeuh kipawl theihna piang ahihleh amaute a kisan hun ciangin a si sate nangawn a hinkikna hong hi ta ding hi.
Romans11:16 Anlum a ki-em masa sung panin a them khat Pasian biakna-in a kipiak ciangin a anlum buppi zong Pasian-aʼ mah hi pah a
Romans11:17 A kiciing oliv kung a hiangte kisat khia-in gamlak oliv hiangte tawh kipeh hi. No Gentail-te pen tua gamlak oliv hiangte tawh a kibang na hi uh a
Romans11:18 Tua ahih manin oliv hiang a kisat khia tawh a kibang Jew mite simmawh bawl kha kei un. Note na kiphatsak theih nading uh a thu om lo hi. Note pen a hiang tawh a kibang lel na hi uh a
Romans11:19 Note in
Romans11:20 Tua pen thuman ahi hi. Amaute in a up lohna hangun a kisat khia hi a
Romans11:21 Pasian in oliv hiang ngeite dawm lo ahihleh note hong dawm tuan lo ding hi.
Romans11:22 Hih thu ah Pasian a migit mahmahna le a khauh mahmahna i mu hi. A khial mite tungah khauh mahmah a
Romans11:23 Tua ciangin Jew mite in zong a lungsim uh kheelin Pasian a up uh leh Pasian in a pehkik theih nading vangliatna nei ahih manin amaute zong amauʼ mun ngei mahah pehkik ding hi.
Romans11:24 Note pen na pian ngei uh gamlak oliv kung panin hong kisat khia-in noteʼ pian ngei ahi lo a kiciing oliv kung tungah hong kipeh thei ahihleh a kiciing oliv kung panin a kisat khia tawh a kibang Jew mite pen Pasian in amau omna ngei ah a pehkik ding ol zaw mahmah lai ding hi.
Romans11:25 Sanggamte aw
Romans11:26 Tua hi a
Romans11:27 Amauteʼ mawhna ka maisak ciangin hih ka thuciamna ka pia ding hi
Romans11:28 Jew mite in Lungdamna Thu um loin Pasianʼ gal ahihna pen no Gentail miteʼ hamphat nading hi a
Romans11:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in a teel mite le thupha a piak mite tawh kisai-in a thu dokkik lo hi.
Romans11:30 No Gentail mite in a beisa hunah Pasianʼ thu na mang kei uh a
Romans11:31 Tua mah bangin amauteʼ thuman lohna hangin note in Pasianʼ hehpihna na ngahna uh pen Jew mite in zong Pasianʼ hehpihna a ngahkik theih nading uh ahi hi.
Romans11:32 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in mi khempeuh tungah hehpihna a piak theih nadingin a thuman lohna hangun mi khempeuh thong kia a bangsak hi.
Romans11:33 Tua ahih manin Pasianʼ hong hehpihna nak liat mahmah a
Romans11:34 Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho in
Romans11:35 Amah in hong thukkik theih nadingin kuamah in ama tungah thupha va bawl ngei lo hi
Romans11:36 Bang hang hiam cih leh na khempeuh ama piansak hi a
Romans12:1 Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw
Romans12:2 Leitung mihingteʼ gamtat bangin gamta kei unla
Romans12:3 Pasian in kei tungah hehpihna hong piakkhongna hangin note tungah kong gen nop thu in: Note tawh a kituak zah valin kilian ngaihsut zaw kha kei un. Pasian in note tungah upna hong piakzah tawh kizui-in kingaihsun bek zaw unla
Romans12:4 I pumpi tungah zong na tampi i nei a
Romans12:5 Tua mah bangin eite mi tampi ihih hangin pum khat ihi a
Romans12:6 Tua ahih manin Pasian in hehpihna hong piakkhongna tawh kizui-in i siamna a tuamtuamte zang ciat ni. I siamna pen Pasianʼ thu gen theih nading siamna ahihleh i upna neihzah tawh kizui-in gen ni.
Romans12:7 Nasep nading siamna a nei ihih leh na sem ni. Hilh nading siamna a nei ihih leh hilh ni.
Romans12:8 Midangte hanthot theih nading siamna a nei ihih leh midangte hanthawn ni. Midangte hop theih nading a nei ihih leh citna taktak tawh hawm ni. Makaih theih nading siamna a nei ihih leh hoihtakin na sem ni. Midangte hehpih theih nading a nei ihih leh maitai takin hih ni.
Romans12:9 Na ki-itnate uh lungsim takpi tawh hisak unla
Romans12:10 Unau ki-itna lungsim nei unla
Romans12:11 Thadah kei unla
Romans12:12 Lamet na neihna hangun lungdamin om tawntung unla
Romans12:13 Na Khristian pihte uh a kisapna bangin na neihsate uh na hawm unla
Romans12:14 No a hong bawlsia mite
Romans12:15 A lungdam mite lungdam pih unla
Romans12:16 Mi deidan loin a kibangin en un. Kiphasak loin mi neute tawh kikhawl thei unla
Romans12:17 Midangteʼ gitlohnate thukkik kei unla
Romans12:18 Ahih theih lai teng mi khempeuh tawh na kilem nadingun hanciam un.
Romans12:19 Lawmte aw
Romans12:20 Tua ahih ciangin Lai Siangtho sungah
Romans12:21 Tua ahih manin gitlohna kizosak kei unla
Romans13:1 A kuamah peuh in hong ukteʼ thu na mang ciat un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasianʼ thukimpih lohin kuamah in ukna thu nei lo hi; ukna thu nei i cih mite pen Pasianʼ koih mite ahi hi.
Romans13:2 Tua ahih manin ukna thuneite a nialte pen Pasianʼ koih sa mite a nial suak a
Romans13:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh gam uk mite pen a gamtat hoih miteʼ kihtak ding hi lo a
Romans13:4 Ukna thuneite pen noteʼ hoih nadingin Pasianʼ nasemte ahi uh hi. Ahi zongin a sia-in na gamtat uh leh gim hong pia taktak ding uh ahih manin na lau ding uh ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen Pasianʼ nasemte hi a
Romans13:5 Tua ahih manin Pasianʼ gimpiak ding kihtakna hang bek hi loin
Romans13:6 Ukna thu a neite in amauʼ sep ding teng a kimtakin a sep uh ciangin Pasian adingin na a semte hi uh ahih manin tua thu hang mahin zong mangmu a pia na hi uh hi.
Romans13:7 Tua ahih manin phiangsiah piak dingte tungah pia-in
Romans13:8 Khatlekhat ki-it ding cih loh buang
Romans13:9 Thukham sungah
Romans13:10 Midangte a it mi peuhmah in amaute tungah siatna bawl het lo ahih manin itna i neih ciangin Thukham buppi a zui khinta ihi hi.
Romans13:11 Tu hun pen bang hun hi ta ahi hiam
Romans13:12 Zan khuamial bei dektak a
Romans13:13 Sun khuavak sunga om mite bangin a kilawmin gamta ni. Gualnopna le zukhamna
Romans13:14 Kidal nadingin
Romans14:1 Upna neu mite pawlbawl unla
Romans14:2 Mi pawl khat in na khempeuh ka nek theih ding hi
Romans14:3 Tua ahih manin a ne mite in a tang mite simmawh bawl kei henla
Romans14:4 Mi khatʼ nasemte tungah kua in thu khen thei ding na hi uh hiam? A gina le a gina lo a khen ding pa pen amauʼ Topa ahi hi. A Topa un hoih hi
Romans14:5 Mi pawl khatte in ni khatpeuh a dang sangin thupi zaw hi
Romans14:6 Ni khatpeuh thupi diak hi
Romans14:7 Ama ading bekin kuamah nungta lo a
Romans14:8 I nuntak leh Topa adingin a nungta ihi a
Romans14:9 Hih thu hangin Khris pen a site le a hingteʼ Topa ahih theih nadingin hong si-in hong nungtakik hi.
Romans14:10 Tua ahihleh bang hangin na Khristian pihte uh tungah thu khen a
Romans14:11 Lai Siangtho sungah
Romans14:12 Tua ahih manin a kuamah peuh in i gamtatna ciat Pasianʼ mai ah a va kigen tel ciat ding ihi hi.
Romans14:13 Tua ahih manin khatlekhat kimawhsakin thu kikhen kei unla
Romans14:14 Topa Jesu tawh kipawlin a lungsim ka theihna tawh
Romans14:15 An khatpeuh na nekna uh hangin na Khristian pihteʼ lungnopmawhna na piansak uh leh itna lungsim tawh a gamta na hi nawn kei uh hi. Na annekna uh tawh
Romans14:16 Tua ciangin note in hoih na sak uh thute
Romans14:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasianʼ Ukna pen nekledawn tawh a kisai thu hi lo a
Romans14:18 Hih bang danin Khrisʼ na a sem mite in Pasian lungdamsak a
Romans14:19 Tua ahih ciangin mi tawh kilem theih nading le kha thu ah khatlekhat thahatna i kipiak theih nading thute hanciam ciat ni.
Romans14:20 Annek huhau-in Pasianʼ sep sa thute susia kei ni. An khempeuh a kine thei ding ahi hi; ahi zongin tua nekna hangin mi khat peuhpeuh a puk ding ahihleh a khial ihi hi.
Romans14:21 Midangte in a puk lawh theih annekna
Romans14:22 Hih thu ah noʼ upna le noʼ ngaihsutnate
Romans14:23 Ahi zongin lunghimawh pipi-in a ne a om leh
Romans15:1 Upna lamah a thahat eite in upna zawngkhalteʼ ginat lohna i thuakpih ding kilawm hi; eima ut bangin i gamta kei ding hi.
Romans15:2 Midangte a upna uh hong khangin
Romans15:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khris zong ama nopsak theih nadingin gamta lo zaw hi. Lai Siangtho sungah
Romans15:4 Lai Siangtho sungah a om thu khempeuh pen eite hilh nading
Romans15:5 Note in lungsim kikhatin i Topa Jesu Khrisʼ Pa ahi Pasian na phatkhawm theih nadingun Pasian in thuak zawhna le thahatna hong pia henla
Romans15:6 
Romans15:7 Tua ahih ciangin Khris in note hong san mah bangin midangte in Pasian a phat theih nadingun note khatlekhat na kisang un.
Romans15:8 Hih banga kong genna pen
Romans15:9 le Gentail mite in zong ama hehpihna hangin Pasian a phat theih nadingun Khris a hong paina hang ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah
Romans15:10 tua ciangin
Romans15:11 tua ciangin
Romans15:12 tua ciangin Isaiah in
Romans15:13 Kha Siangthoʼ huhna tawh noteʼ lametna a khan semsem theih nadingin
Romans15:14 Thu upna sungah sanggamte aw
Romans15:15 Ahi zongin hih kong laikhakna sungah noteʼ phawkkik dingin thu ka hong genna pawl khatte ah kong telkheh mahmah hi. Tua bangin ka hong telkhehna thu pen
Romans15:16 Gentail mite tungah na a sem dingin Khris Jesu sawltak hih theih nading hamphatna lianpi Pasian in kei a hong piakna hang ahi hi. Gentail mite pen Kha Siangtho in Pasianʼ tungah a piak
Romans15:17 Tua ahih manin Khris tawh kikopin Pasian ading na ka sepna ah kei ka kisathei mahmah hi.
Romans15:18 Kha Siangthoʼ vangliatna tawh lim le nalamdangte zangin
Romans15:19 
Romans15:20 A tawntungin keima tup thu in: Mi khatpeuh in a pat sa nasep maban
Romans15:21 Lai Siangtho sungah zong
Romans15:22 Note kiangah ka hong pai pak theih lohna pen tu-a kong genna thu hang ahi hi.
Romans15:23 Ahi zongin hih gam kiim teng a ka nasepna man khinta ing a
Romans15:24 tu-in note tawh kimu thei ta dingin ka kilamen hi. Spain gam ka pai kawmin note kiang ka hong nawk nuam a
Romans15:25 Ahi zongin tu laitakin ahihleh Jerusalem khua-a Pasian mite a kihuhna a puak dingin ka va pai masa ding hi.
Romans15:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh Masedonia gam le Grik gam sunga om pawlpite in Jerusalem khua-a om Pasianʼ mi a zawngte huh nadingin sum piak ding amau thu-in a vaihawm tawm uh hi.
Romans15:27 Hih pen amau ngaihsut tawmna tawh lawptakin a huh uh ahi hi. A taktakin ci lehang hih mizawngte a huh dingun a kilawm mah ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Jew mite in kha thu tawh kisai nate Gentail mite hawm uh ahih manin Gentail mite in zong leitung nate tawh Jew mite a huh dingun a kilawm khat ahi hi.
Romans15:28 Amaute adingin a kikaikhawm hih sumte a cingin amaute tungah apin
Romans15:29 Note kiang ka hong tun ciangin Khris kiang panin thupha tampi tak ka hong puak ding lamtak ka thei hi.
Romans15:30 Lawmte aw
Romans15:31 Judea gam sunga a om thu um lo mite in kei hong gimsak khak loh nading le Jerusalem khua-a a om Pasian mite adingin nasepnate lungdam takin a hong san theih nadingun thu hong ngetsak un.
Romans15:32 Tua bangin thu hong ngetsak le-uhcin
Romans15:33 Nopsakna a hong pia Pasian in note khempeuh hong ompih tahen. Amen.
Romans16:1 Kenkhrea khua-a om pawlpite lakah na a sem
Romans16:2 Amah pen keimah a kipan mi tampi adingin lawm hoih mahmah khat ahih manin
Romans16:3 Khris Jesu sungah na ka sep khop pih Prisilla le Aquila na hopihsak un.
Romans16:4 Amaute pen kei adingin a si ngam uh ahi hi. Amaute tungah a lungdam kei guak bek zong hi loin
Romans16:5 Amauʼ inn-a kikhawm pawlpi mi khempeuh zong na hopihsak un. Asia gam sungah Khris thu a um masa pen pa ahi ka lawm it mahmah Epainetas zong na hopihsak un.
Romans16:6 Note adingin nakpi takin na a sem Mary zong na hopihsak un.
Romans16:7 Jew mipih ahih banah ka thongkiat pih ahi Andronikas le Junias zong na hopihsak un. Amaute pen keiʼ Khristian suah ma pekin a na suak khin sate na hi uh a
Romans16:8 Topa thu sungah ka lawm it mahmah ahi Ampliatas zong na hopihsak un.
Romans16:9 Khris nasepna sungah na ka sep khop pih uh ahi Urbanas le ka lawm Stakhus zong na hopihsak un.
Romans16:10 Khris tungah mi citak mahmah ahi Apelles zong na hopihsak un. Aristobulas innkuan pih mite zong na hopihsak un.
Romans16:11 Jew mipih Herodion le Narsissas innkuan sunga i Khristian sanggamte zong na hopihsak un.
Romans16:12 Topaʼ na a sem Trifana le Trifosa le Topa adingin na tampi tak a sem ka lawm it Persis zong na hopihsak un.
Romans16:13 Topaʼ nasepna sungah a kikhai mahmah Rufas le ta bangin kei a hong bawl tawntung ama nu zong na hopihsak un.
Romans16:14 Asinkritas
Romans16:15 Filologas le Julia
Romans16:16 Sanggam ki-itna taktak tawh note khatlekhat kinamin na kihopih un. Khris pawlpi khempeuh in zong hopihna kam hong khak uh hi.
Romans16:17 Lawmte aw
Romans16:18 Tua bang mite in i Topa Khrisʼ na a sem hi loin
Romans16:19 Lungdamna thu tawh kisai ah na cihtakna uh mi khempeuh in thei ahih manin hih thu ah kong lungdam pih mahmah hi. A hoih bang hiam
Romans16:20 Tua hileh eite tungah nopsakna a hong pia thei Pasian in Satan tuancilin noteʼ khenuai mi hong hisak baih ding hi. I Topa Jesu Khris hong hehpihna thupha
Romans16:21 Ka nasep pih Timoti in note hong hopih a
Romans16:22 Hih lai a gelhsak keimah Tertias in zong upna kikhat ihihna tawh ka hong hopih hi.
Romans16:23 Keima zintunna pa le pawlpiteʼ kikhopna inn nei pa zong ahi Gaias in zong hong hopih hi. Ka omna khuapi sumkem pa Erastas le i Khristian sanggam Kuartas in zong hong hopih uh hi.
Romans16:24 (I Topa Jesu Khris hehpihna thupha note khempeuh tungah hong om tahen. Amen.)
Romans16:25 Eite khempeuh in Pasian phat ni. Keima hilh Jesu Khris thu ahi Lungdamna Thu le tanglai-in a ki-imcip
Romans16:26 Ahi zongin mi khempeuh in Pasian umin a zuih theih nadingin tu-in kamsangteʼ laigelhnate le a nungta tawntung Pasianʼ thupiakna tawh tua thu ki-imcip pen a hong kipholak ta ahi hi.
Romans16:27 Thu khempeuh ah pilna a nei
1Corinthians1:1 Khris Jesuʼ sawltak dingin Pasian in a hong teel keimah Paul le thu upna sungah i sanggam Sosthenes in
1Corinthians1:2 Jesu Khris tawh kipawlna hangin Pasianʼ mi suakin
1Corinthians1:3 I Pa Pasian le Topa Jesu Khris in note tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen.
1Corinthians1:4 Jesu Khris hangin note tungah Pasian in hehpihna thupha hong pia ahih manin ka lungdamna thu
1Corinthians1:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khris tawh na kipawlna hangun
1Corinthians1:6 Note sungah Khris thu kip takin om ahih manin
1Corinthians1:7 i Topa Jesu Khris hong kilatkik ding ngakin na om hun sungun thupha na ngah loh uh khat beek om lo hi.
1Corinthians1:8 Ama hong kilatkik hun ciang dong
1Corinthians1:9 Ama Tapa ahi i Topa Jesu Khris tawh a kikhawl dingin a hong sam Pasian pen a citak Pasian hi a
1Corinthians1:10 Sanggamte aw
1Corinthians1:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh sanggamte aw
1Corinthians1:12 Tua bang ka cih ciangin note pawl khat in
1Corinthians1:13 Note in Khris na phel suah zenzen uh hi. Note adingin Paul in singlamteh tungah khaina thuak ahi hiam? Note
1Corinthians1:14 Krispas le Gaias cih sim loh note khat beek hong tuiphum lo ka hih manin ka nuam mahmah hi.
1Corinthians1:15 Tua bang hikeileh keima min tawh a kiphumin na kigen kha ding uh hi.
1Corinthians1:16 (Eh! Stefanas-te innkuan zong ka tuiphum mah hi. Tuate cih sim loh kuamah dang ka tuiphum lam ka thei kei hi.)
1Corinthians1:17 Khris in tuiphum nasep a sem dingin kei hong sawl lo a
1Corinthians1:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh sihna a thuak mite adingin singlamteh tungah Khris sihna thu pen a haihuai thu ahi hi. Ahi zongin hotkhiatna a ngah eite adingin Pasianʼ vangliatna ahi hi.
1Corinthians1:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah
1Corinthians1:20 Tua ahih manin tu hun a mipilte
1Corinthians1:21 Pasian in ama pilna hong zang a
1Corinthians1:22 A up theih nadingun Jew mite in nalamdang kal uh a
1Corinthians1:23 Ahi zongin kote in singlamteh tungah a kikhai Khrisʼ thu ka hilh uh a
1Corinthians1:24 Ahi zongin Pasian in a hong sap ei Jew mite le Gentail mite adingin Khris pen Pasianʼ vangliatna le Pasianʼ pilna ahi hi.
1Corinthians1:25 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasianʼ haina pen miteʼ pilna sangin sang zaw lai a
1Corinthians1:26 Sanggamte aw
1Corinthians1:27 Ahi zongin Pasian in mipilte a maizumsak nadingin mihaite hong teel a
1Corinthians1:28 Leitung mite in thupi a sakte uh a suksiat theih nadingin Pasian in leitung miteʼ simmawh a niamte
1Corinthians1:29 Tua ahih manin Pasianʼ mai ah mite a kisaktheih nading thu om lo hi.
1Corinthians1:30 Ahi zongin Pasian in Jesu Khris hangin note tungah nuntakna hong pia a
1Corinthians1:31 Tua ahih ciangin Lai Siangtho sungah
1Corinthians2:1 Sanggamte aw
1Corinthians2:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah ka om laitakin singlamteh tungah Jesu Khris a sihna thu sim loh thudang peuhmah ngaihsut loh dingin ka ngaihsut sa ahi hi.
1Corinthians2:3 Tua ahih manin note kiangah kong pai lai-in thaneemin
1Corinthians2:4 thu kong hilh ciangin zong leitung mipilteʼ zat kammalte le siamnate ka zang kei a
1Corinthians2:5 Tua ahih manin noteʼ thu upna pen mihingteʼ pilna hang hi loin
1Corinthians2:6 Ahi zongin kha thu lamah a khangham mite tungah pilna thu ka gen hi. Tua ka gen pilna pen tu-in a maimang kuankuan ta ding hih leitung miteʼ pilna le vangliatna thu hi lo hi.
1Corinthians2:7 Tua ka gen pilna thu pen miteʼ theih lo dingin Pasian in a ipcip Pasianʼ pilna thusim hi a
1Corinthians2:8 Hih leitung a uk mite kuamah in hih pilna thu thei lo uh hi. Thei hi le-uh
1Corinthians2:9 Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho sungah
1Corinthians2:10 Ahi zongin Pasian in a Kha Siangtho tawh eite tungah tua thusim a hong langsak hi. Tua Kha Siangtho in na khempeuh kan khia a
1Corinthians2:11 Mihing khatʼ ngaihsutna pen ama lungsim bek mah in a theih mah bangin Pasianʼ Kha Siangtho bek mah in Pasianʼ thu a cingin a thei hi.
1Corinthians2:12 Eiteʼ ngah lungsim pen leitung miteʼ lungsim hi lo a
1Corinthians2:13 Tua ahih manin hih bangin thu kong gen uh ciangin zong
1Corinthians2:14 Ahi zongin Kha Siangtho a nei lo mite in Pasianʼ Kha Siangtho in a hong piak nate sang thei lo uh hi. Kha Siangtho a nei mite bek in theithei uh ahih manin amaute in tel thei lo uh a
1Corinthians2:15 Kha Siangtho a nei mite in na khempeuh theithei uh a
1Corinthians2:16 Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho in
1Corinthians3:1 Sanggamte aw
1Corinthians3:2 Note in antak ne zo nai lo na hih manun nawitui ka hong tulh hi. Tu mahmah in zong nawi bek mah tulh ding a kisam lai na hi uh hi.
1Corinthians3:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasianʼ deihna bangin gamta loin
1Corinthians3:4 Pawl khat in
1Corinthians3:5 A taktakin ci lehang
1Corinthians3:6 Keima nasep pen khaici vawh hi a
1Corinthians3:7 Khaici vawh pa le tui buak pa a thupi hi lo a
1Corinthians3:8 Khaici vawh pa le tui buak pa a kizakim ahi hi. Pasian in komau sepna tuak tawh kizui-in thaman hong pia ding hi.
1Corinthians3:9 Kote pen Pasian adingin na a sem khawm mite ka hi uh a
1Corinthians3:10 Pasian in kei tungah a hong piak siamna zangin
1Corinthians3:11 Keima phuh sa khuam thupi teng ahi Jesu Khris cih sim loh kuamah dang in khuam thupi dang phut thei nawn lo ding hi.
1Corinthians3:12 Ahi zongin tua khuam tungah kham
1Corinthians3:13 Tua a kilam nate mei tawh a kize-et ding Ni hong tung dinga
1Corinthians3:14 Mi khat in tua khuamte tungah a lam nate bangmah a cih zawh kei leh a nasep thaman a ngah ding hi.
1Corinthians3:15 Ahi zongin mi khat in a lam nate a kattum leh amah a sum hi ding hi. Tua nate a lam pa ahihleh mei kat nading panin a suakta bang keekin a suakta bek ding hi.
1Corinthians3:16 Note pen Pasianʼ biakinn na hihna uh le note sungah Pasianʼ Kha Siangtho a teeng ahih lamtak na theih sa uh ahi hi.
1Corinthians3:17 Mi khatpeuh in Pasianʼ biakinn susia leh Pasian in tua mipa susia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasianʼ biakinn a siangtho hi a
1Corinthians3:18 Note khatpeuh hih leitung ngeina ah a pilin na kingaihsut uh leh a pil taktak na hih theih nadingun a hai na suak phot un.
1Corinthians3:19 Hih leitung mite in pilna hi
1Corinthians3:20 Tua ciangin
1Corinthians3:21 Tua ahih manin kuamah in midangteʼ siamna kisialh pih kei un. A taktakin ci lehang na khempeuh nomau aʼ hizaw hi.
1Corinthians3:22 Paul
1Corinthians3:23 Note pen Khris aʼ na hi uh a
1Corinthians4:1 Kote pen Khrisʼ nasem le Pasianʼ thusim a zeekte in nong ngaihsut ding uh ahi hi.
1Corinthians4:2 Nasem i cih mite pen a topa uh tungah citakin a thuman ding uh kisam hi.
1Corinthians4:3 Note na hi uh a
1Corinthians4:4 Ka kisuan nading thu bangmah ka thei het kei hi. Ahi zongin tua pen ka dik hi
1Corinthians4:5 Tua ahih manin a hun a tun ma-in kuamah mawhsakin thu khen kei un. Topa hong pai ciangin a tawpna thukhenna hong om dinga
1Corinthians4:6 Sanggamte aw
1Corinthians4:7 Note in bang kisaktheih pih na hi uh hiam? Tu-a na neih khempeuh uh Pasianʼ hong piak hi lo ahi hiam? Tua ahihleh hong kipia sa bek ahih manin a bang kisaktheih pih na hi uh hiam?
1Corinthians4:8 Na deih khempeuh uh nei khin na kisa uh a
1Corinthians4:9 Ko sawltakte pen vantungmi le leitung mi khempeuh in a et dingin mipiʼ mai ah thahna a thuak dingin thukhenna a kipia mi bangin Pasian in a zaneu penin hong koih tawntung tawh kibang ka sa hi.
1Corinthians4:10 Khris hangin mite mai ah kote mihai ka suak uh a
1Corinthians4:11 Tu ni ciang dong gilkial dangtakin puansilh ding nangawn nei loin ka om uh hi. Inn le lo zong nei loin hong kinot suk hong kinot to kawikawi hi.
1Corinthians4:12 Koteʼ nektawm ding ka thatang mahmah uh tawh nakpi takin ka sem uh hi. Hong kisamsiat ciangin thupha ka lehpiak uh a
1Corinthians4:13 Zahpihna kam tawh hong kihopih ciangin kam khum tawh ka dawng uh hi. Miteʼ muhna ah tu ni ciang dong ninbulom le leivui them bang bek ka hi uh hi.
1Corinthians4:14 Hih bangin lai ka hong gelh ciangin na maizum nading uh ka deihna hi lo a
1Corinthians4:15 Khris thu hong hilh ding mi a tul a za-in na nei uh ahi zongin pa a na neih ding uh kei bek a om ka hihna thu na phawk un. Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah lungdamna thu ka hong hilhna hangin Jesu Khris sungah nomauʼ pa ka suak hi.
1Corinthians4:16 Tua ahih manin keima gamtatzia na hong zuih nadingun kong thum hi.
1Corinthians4:17 Tua thu hangin note kiangah
1Corinthians4:18 Note kiangah kei hong hawh lo ding
1Corinthians4:19 Ahi zongin Topa in hong thukimpih nakleh kei ka hong hawh baih dinga
1Corinthians4:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasianʼ Ukna thu i cih pen kampi bek tawh genna hi lo a
1Corinthians4:21 Tua ahih manin note taii-in gim a hong pia dingin ka hong pai ding le itna le lungnemna lungsim tawh ka hong pai ding koi deih zaw na hi uh hiam?
1Corinthians5:1 Note lakah numei tawh paktatna nasia mahmah in
1Corinthians5:2 Tua bang kimlai bangci kisaktheih ding na hi uh hiam? Note na dah mahmah ding uh hizaw a
1Corinthians5:3 Note tawh ka pumpi-in ka hong omkhop loh hangin note tawh ka lungsim hong om khawm a
1Corinthians5:4 Note na kikhop khawm uh ciangin i Topa Jesu Khris vangliatna in eite hong ompih ahih manin
1Corinthians5:5 Topaʼ Ni hong tun ciangin tua bang miteʼ kha in hotkhiatna a ngah theih nadingin Satan in amau pumpi a gimsak dingin na pia khia ta un.
1Corinthians5:6 Note lakah hih bang gamtatna om napi-in na kisaktheih uh dahhuai mahmah hi. Silngo them khat in annel lompi a pawmsak theih lamtak thei lo na hi uh hiam?
1Corinthians5:7 Note na siangtho theih nadingun mawhna silngo luite na paikhia un. Tua hileh silngo sawh loh annel lom thak na hi ding uh a
1Corinthians5:8 Tua ahih ciangin mawhna le gitlohna ahi silngo lui a kisawh anlum tawh Paisan Pawi bawl loin
1Corinthians5:9 Lai ka hong gelhna sungah
1Corinthians5:10 Tua bang ka hong cih ciangin numei tawh a paktat
1Corinthians5:11 Tua ka hong laigelhna sungah ka cihnopna pen
1Corinthians5:12 Tua bang a pualam mite mawhsakin thu ka khen ding keiʼ nasep hi lo hi. Pasian in amauteʼ thu khen ngawn ding hi. Ahi zongin note in na pawlpih uh mite tungah thu na khen ding uh ahi hi. Lai Siangtho in
1Corinthians5:13 
1Corinthians6:1 Note khatlekhat thu na kineih uh ciangin Pasianʼ mi siangthote khensak zaw loin lawki thukhenteʼ mai na kitun ngam uh hi.
1Corinthians6:2 Pasianʼ mite in leitung miteʼ thu a khensak zaw ding ahih lam thei lo na hi uh hiam? Note pen leitung miteʼ thu a khensak ding na hih uh ciangin tua bang thu neute khen thei lo lawmlawm na hi uh hiam?
1Corinthians6:3 Eite pen vantung miteʼ thu nangawn a khensak ding ihih lamtak thei lo na hi uh hiam? Tua ahih manin hih leitung a noʼ thu neuneute leltak na khen theih zawk kan ding uh ahi hi.
1Corinthians6:4 Tua bang hi napi-in hih bang thu themthem hong pian ciangin pawlpi sungah bangmahin a kisim lo miteʼ mai kitun ding na hi uh hiam?
1Corinthians6:5 Note adingin zumhuai mahmah hi. Note khatlekhat na kithuneihnate uh a khen thei ding note lakah mipil khat beek om buang ding hi.
1Corinthians6:6 Tua hi napi
1Corinthians6:7 Note khatlekhat zum na kitut mahmah uh zong a gina het lo na hihna uh hong kilangsak hi. Bang hangin thuak zaw mai lo a
1Corinthians6:8 Note khatlekhat kisu-in
1Corinthians6:9 Migilote
1Corinthians6:10 a gutate
1Corinthians6:11 Note pawl khat
1Corinthians6:12 “Ka ut peuhpeuh ka hih theih nading thu om hi
1Corinthians6:13 “An pen i gilpi ading hi a
1Corinthians6:14 Pasian in sihna panin Topa thokiksak hi. Tua mah bangin eite zong ama vangliatna tawh hong thokiksak ding hi.
1Corinthians6:15 Na pumpi uh
1Corinthians6:16 Numei paktat tawh a pumpi a kizomsak pa pen tua numei tawh pum khat sakhat a suak ahih lamtak thei lo na hi uh hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in
1Corinthians6:17 Ahi zongin Topa tawh a kizomte pen kha thu tawh kisai-in amah tawh pum khat ahi uh hi.
1Corinthians6:18 Numei tawh mawhna na pelh un. Mi khat in a bawl mawhna tuamtuamte in ama pumpi su kha lo hi
1Corinthians6:19 Na pumpi uh
1Corinthians6:20 Note pen Pasian in a hong lei sa na hih manun na pumpi uh Pasianʼ minthan nadingin na zang un.
1Corinthians7:1 Tu-in nong laigelhna uh thu tawh kisai-in: Pasal in zi nei kei leh hoih zaw lo ding ahi hiam
1Corinthians7:2 Ahi zongin numei tawh paktatna tam lua ahih manin pasal in ama zi tuam nei henla
1Corinthians7:3 Pasal in a zi a luppih dingin a kilawm zahin luppih dinga
1Corinthians7:4 Zi in ama pumpi a ut bangin zang thei nawn loin a pasalʼ zat ding hi a
1Corinthians7:5 Thungetna-in hun na zat theih nadingun tawl khat sung tuam om ding thukim khawm masa lopi-in lup khop ding kinial kha kei un. Tua bangin tawl khat sung na tuam om khit uh ciangin noteʼ pumpiʼ deihna hangin Satanʼ ze-etna sungah na puk khak loh nadingun a ngeina bangin lup khop ding kipankik un.
1Corinthians7:6 Hih bangin kong gen ciangin a hoih pen hi
1Corinthians7:7 Mi khempeuh keimah bangin om ciat le-uh hoih ka sa hi. Ahi zongin mi khempeuh in Pasianʼ piak hih zawhna a tuamtuam nei a
1Corinthians7:8 Pasal nei nai lote le meigongte pen keimah bangin tanggawl om paisuak le-uh hoih ka sa hi.
1Corinthians7:9 Ahi zongin a pumpi uh a ki-uk zawh kei ding uh leh pasal nei le-uh hoih zaw hi. Nei nuam pipi a neih loh tentan sangin pasal neih hoih zaw hi.
1Corinthians7:10 A nei sate tungah
1Corinthians7:11 A ciah san leh zong pasal nei loin om paisuak hen. A om paisuak zawh kei leh a pasal ngei mah zuankik hen. Pasal in a zi ma kei tahen.
1Corinthians7:12 A dangte tungah
1Corinthians7:13 Numei khat in thu um lo mi khat pasal-in a neih leh
1Corinthians7:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh thu um lo pasal pen a ziʼ hangin thu um mi suak thei dinga
1Corinthians7:15 Ahi zongin thu um lo zi in ahi a
1Corinthians7:16 Thu um zi in
1Corinthians7:17 Mi khempeuh
1Corinthians7:18 Vun ki-at sa mi khat Pasian in a sap leh
1Corinthians7:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh vun atna le vun at lohna a thupi hi lo a
1Corinthians7:20 Tua ahih manin a kuamah peuh
1Corinthians7:21 Sila ahi mi khat Pasian in a sap leh phamawh lo hi; sila mahin ki-om thei veve hi. Ahi zongin suahtak theih nading lampi a om leh tua hunhoih hamphatna zang tahen.
1Corinthians7:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a sap sila ahi mi pen Topa adingin mi suakta hi a
1Corinthians7:23 Note pen Pasianʼ hong lei sa na hih manun miteʼ sila suak kei un.
1Corinthians7:24 Tua ahih manin sanggamte aw
1Corinthians7:25 Tu-in a nungak lai a tangval laite thu tawh kisai-in: Topa kiang panin thu ngahna ka neih loh hangin Topaʼ hehpihna tawh a muantaak ahi keima ngaihsutna kong gen ding hi.
1Corinthians7:26 Tu laitakin a om bangun om paisuak leh hoih zaw ding hi
1Corinthians7:27 Ahi zongin zi neite in kikhen ding ngaihsutin nei kei tahen. Nungak lai tangval laite in lawm zong kei tahen.
1Corinthians7:28 Ahi zongin pasal in zi a neih hangin a khial hi lo a
1Corinthians7:29 Sanggamte aw
1Corinthians7:30 a dahte pen a dah lo mah bangin kingaihsun uh henla
1Corinthians7:31 leitung na nuam takin a zangte pen a zang lo mah bangin kingaihsun ta uh hen. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih leitung pen sau veipi kip nawn lo ding hi.
1Corinthians7:32 Note
1Corinthians7:33 Ahi zongin zi neite in a zi a lungdamsak theih nadingun hih leitung vai kinin nei uh a
1Corinthians7:34 a ngaihsutna uh khen nih pha hi. Pasal a nei lo numeite in a lungsim le a pumpi uh Topa adingin zang nuam uh ahih manin Topaʼ nasep bek kinin nei uh hi. Ahi zongin pasal a nei numeite in a pasal uh a lungdamsak theih nadingun hih leitung vai kinin nei uh hi.
1Corinthians7:35 Hih bangin kong gen ciangin noteʼ haksat nading deihna hi loin noteʼ hoih nading ka deihna ahi hi. Note a kilawm a kituakin gamta-in
1Corinthians7:36 Teen pih dingin lawm dong khin napi-in kiteen nawn loh ding a ngaihsunteʼ thu panin: Teen pih kei leng a numei tungah a thuman lo hi ding cihna ahi a
1Corinthians7:37 Ahi zongin kuama sawl hi loin zi nei lo dingin a lungsimah khauh takin khensatin
1Corinthians7:38 Tua ahih manin a neite zong hoih a
1Corinthians7:39 Pasal a nei numei pen a pasal a nuntak lai teng suakta lo hi. A pasal a sih leh a deih peuhpeuh tawh kiteeng thei dinga
1Corinthians7:40 Ahi zongin keima ngaihsutna ah pasal a neih se sangin tua ci om leh lungdam zaw dingin ka um a
1Corinthians8:1 Tu-in milim biakna sa tawh kisai thu panin: Amaute in
1Corinthians8:2 Mi khat in thu a thei-in a kingaihsut leh a taktakin a theih dingin a kilawm zah a thei nai lo ahi hi.
1Corinthians8:3 Mi khat in Pasian a it leh Pasian in tua mipa a na thei hi.
1Corinthians8:4 Tua ahih manin biakna sa tawh kisai thu panin: Milim i cih pen bangmah a om lopi khat lim dingin a kibawl na hi a
1Corinthians8:5 Leitung le vantungah pasian le topa a kici tampi a om ahi zongin
1Corinthians8:6 eite adingin Pasian khat bek
1Corinthians8:7 Ahi zongin mi khempeuh in hih thu thei kim lo uh hi. Mi pawl khatte
1Corinthians8:8 Ahi zongin tua i nek ante in Pasian tawh i kizopna hong hoihsak tuan lo hi. I nek loh hangin siatna om tuan lo a
1Corinthians8:9 Ahi zongin noteʼ ut bangin gamtat theih nading thu na neihna uh hangin upna a neu laite a puksak na suahkhak loh nadingun hoihtakin kidawm un.
1Corinthians8:10 No thu thei-a a kineite

1Corinthians8:12 Tua bangin lungsim thaneemte gimsakin

1Corinthians9:1 Kei pen sawltak ka hi a
1Corinthians9:2 Midangte in sawltakin hong ngaihsun ta kei le-uh
1Corinthians9:3 Mite in kei hong mawhsak uh ciangin ka gen thu in:
1Corinthians9:4 Ka nasepna hangin an nek tui dawn hong kipiak ding mah ahi hi.
1Corinthians9:5 Sawltak dangte
1Corinthians9:6 Kei le Barnabas bek
1Corinthians9:7 Kuamah in ama sum bei-in galkap na sem lo uh hi. Leenggui suan napi-in a leenggah a ne lo kuamah om lo hi. Tuu cing napi-in a tuunawi a ne lo kuamah om lo hi.
1Corinthians9:8 Hih ka hong gente pen mihingteʼ zat ngeina hi a
1Corinthians9:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Moses Thukham sungah
1Corinthians9:10 Hih bang a gen ciangin ei mihingte hong cihnopna hi a
1Corinthians9:11 Note lakah kha thu tawh kisai khaici hong vawh ka hih manun
1Corinthians9:12 Midangte in note tung panin ngah theih nading thu nei uh ahihleh ko ka nei pha zaw lai uh hi. Ahi zongin note tung panin ngah theih nading thu a om hangin bangmah ka hong la kei uh a
1Corinthians9:13 Biakinn ah nasem dingin a kicial mite in biakinn mah panin an ngah uh a
1Corinthians9:14 Tua mah bangin lungdamna thu a hilhte in tua nasepna mah panin nuntakna a ngah nading uh Topaʼ thupiak ahi hi.
1Corinthians9:15 Ahi zongin hih ngah theih ding hamphatnate khempeuh ka la kei a
1Corinthians9:16 Lungdamna thu ka hilh hangin kisialh nading thu bangmah om lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua thu a hilh ding mahin a hong kisawl ahi hi. Tua ahih manin lungdamna thu hilh kei leng kei adingin a dahhuai mahmah ahi hi.
1Corinthians9:17 Keima utthu tawh a sem hi leng sep thaman ka lamen ding hi. Ahi zongin Pasian in a sem dingin hong sawl ahih manin ka sep ding nasep a sem ka hi hi.
1Corinthians9:18 Tua ahihleh ka sep thaman bang ahi hiam? Ka thaman pen
1Corinthians9:19 Kei pen kuama khutnuai mi hi loin a suakta mi hi napi-in
1Corinthians9:20 Jew mite lakah na ka sep ciangin amaute ka ngah zawh nadingin Jew mite khat mah bangin ka gamta a
1Corinthians9:21 Tua mah bangin Jew miteʼ Thukham in a huam loh Gentail mite lakah na ka sep ciangin amaute ka ngah zawh nadingin Gentail mite bangmahin ka gamta hi. Hih bangin ka gen ciangin Pasianʼ thukham a zui lo
1Corinthians9:22 Upna neu mite lakah na ka sep ciangin amaute ka ngah zawh nadingin amaute mah bangin ka gamta hi. Tua ahih manin ahih theihna lam peuhpeuh ah mite ka ngah zawh nadingin mi khempeuhʼ ngeina ka zui hi.
1Corinthians9:23 Hih bangin ka gamtatna pen amaute tungah Lungdamna Thu ka tut theih nading le keima nasep hoihtakin ka sep theih nading ka deihna ahi hi.
1Corinthians9:24 Tai kidemna ah mi khat bek in thaman a ngah ding hi napi-in a vekpi-un tai veve uh hi. Tua ahih manin thaman na ngah zawh nadingun na tai un.
1Corinthians9:25 Kimawlna sungah a kihel mi khempeuh in thu khempeuh ah a pumpi uh uk ciat uh hi. Amaute pen a kisia thei pak a ngah nadingun a hanciam uh hi a
1Corinthians9:26 Tua ahih manin ngimna nei lopi-in a mawk tai ka hi kei a
1Corinthians9:27 Kimawlna sungah midangte a kihel dingin a sam hi napi-in tua kimawlna ah a kihel zo lo mi ka suahkhak loh nadingin ka pumpi seekin hoihtakin ka ki-uk hi.
1Corinthians10:1 Sanggamte aw
1Corinthians10:2 Meiipi sung le tuipi sungah ama nungzui a suak dingin Moses sungah amaute na kiphum uh hi.
1Corinthians10:3 A vekpi-un kha tawh kisai an ne uh a
1Corinthians10:4 a vekpi mahun kha tawh kisai tui na dawn uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute a tonpih
1Corinthians10:5 Ahi zongin amaute a tam zaw tungah Pasian lungkim lo ahih manin gam sung tengah amauteʼ luanghawm kithehzak hi.
1Corinthians10:6 Amaute tungah a piangte khempeuh
1Corinthians10:7 amaute pawl khat in a biak bangin milim i bia kei ding hi. Lai Siangtho in
1Corinthians10:8 Amaute pawl khat bangin numei tawh paktatna i gamta kei ding hi. Ni khat thu-in mi tul sawm nih le tul thum a si uh hi.
1Corinthians10:9 Amaute pawl khat bangin Topa i ze-et kei ding hi. Gul in amaute na tu lum hi.
1Corinthians10:10 Amaute pawl khat bangin Pasian i phunsan kei ding hi. Vantung mite in amaute na sulum hi.
1Corinthians10:11 Leitung bei kuan hun sungah a om eite adingin hih thupiangte i etteh ding thu hi a
1Corinthians10:12 Lungkip takin ka om zo hi
1Corinthians10:13 Na tuah uh ze-etnate khempeuh pen miteʼ tuah ngeingeite mah ahi hi. Pasian in citakin a thuciamna lenkip ahih manin noteʼ thuak zawh loh ding ze-etna hong tuaksak lo ding hi. Ze-etna na tuah hun uh ciangin zong na thuak zawh nading uh thahatna hong guan ding ahih manin na suahtak zawh nading uh lampi hong honsak ding hi.
1Corinthians10:14 Tua ahih manin lawm itte aw
1Corinthians10:15 Thu ngaihsun thei mite tungah thugen bangin a hong gen ka hi hi. Ka thugente nomau mah in na ngaihsun tawm un.
1Corinthians10:16 Nekkhawm bawlna ah leenggahzu hangin Pasian tungah lungdamna ko-in i dawn ciangin Khris sisan hangin thuphate eite in zong a ngahkhawm cihna hi lo ahi hiam? I balnen anlum i nek ciangin zong Khris pumpi hangin thuphate mah a ngahkhawm cihna hi lo ahi hiam?
1Corinthians10:17 Anlum khat bek hi a
1Corinthians10:18 Israel miteʼ thu ngaihsun dih un. Biakna sa a ne khempeuh pen biakna tau tungah Pasian biakna thu ah a kipawl hi lo ahi uh hiam?
1Corinthians10:19 Hih bang ka cih ciangin bang ka cihnopna ahi hiam? Milim ahi a
1Corinthians10:20 Ka cihnopna pen
1Corinthians10:21 Note in Topa tawh nekkhawmna hai sung pan le dawi tawh nekkhawmna hai sung panin na dawn khawm thei kei ding uh hi. Topa tawh nekkhawmna an leh dawi tawh nekkhawmna an zong na nekhawm thei kei ding uh hi.
1Corinthians10:22 A nih tuakah kihel khawm lehang Topa a heh nadingin a gamta ihi dinga
1Corinthians10:23 “Ka ut peuhpeuh ka hih theih nading thu om hi
1Corinthians10:24 A kuamah peuh in noteʼ angsung ding bek zong kei unla
1Corinthians10:25 Na lungsim uh ah kisuanna a om loh nadingin sa zuakna ah a kizuak sa peuhpeuh bang sa ahi hiam
1Corinthians10:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in

1Corinthians10:28 Ahi zongin mi khatpeuh in

1Corinthians10:30 Keimah in Topa tungah lungdamna ko-in ne ka hih manin tua ka lungdamkohna thu ah bang hangin hong kimawhsak thei ding ahi hiam?” cithei kha ding hi.

1Corinthians11:1 Keimah in Khris gamtatzia ka zuih mah bangin note in zong keima gamtatzia hong zui ta un.
1Corinthians11:2 Note in kei hong phawk tawntungin kong hilh thu khempeuh zui na hih manun kong phat mahmah hi.
1Corinthians11:3 Ahi zongin na theih ding uh ka deih thu in: Mi khempeuhʼ lutang pen Khris hi a
1Corinthians11:4 Pasal khatpeuh in mihon biakna sungah a lukhu la khia lopi-in thungen ahi a
1Corinthians11:5 Tua mah bangin mihon biakna sungah numei khatpeuh in a lu khuh lopi-in thungen ahi a
1Corinthians11:6 Numeite in a lu a khuh kei ding uh leh a sam uh met vet uh hen. Tua ahih manin numeite in a sam uh a met ding a zumhuai mahmah khat ahih mah bangin a lu uh khuh ta uh hen.
1Corinthians11:7 Pasalte pen Pasianʼ lim le a minthanna a kilangsak ahih manin a lu uh a khuh ding uh kilawm lo hi. Ahi zongin numeite pen pasalteʼ minthanna a kilangsak ahi hi.
1Corinthians11:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh numei tung panin pasal kipiangsak lo a
1Corinthians11:9 Numei hangin pasal a kipiangsak hi lo a
1Corinthians11:10 Tua ahih ciangin a pasalte uh ukna nuai ah a om ahihna a lah nadingun vantung miteʼ muhna ah numeite in a lu uh a khuh ding uh kilawm hi.
1Corinthians11:11 Ahi zongin Topa thu sunga i nuntakna ah numeite pen pasal tawh loin a tangdin zo hi lo a
1Corinthians11:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh numei pen pasal tung panin a kipiangsak hi a
1Corinthians11:13 Hih thu nomau mah in ngaihsun tawm un. Numeite in a lu uh khuh lopi-in mihon biakna lakah Pasian kiangah thu a nget ding uh kilawm ahi hiam?
1Corinthians11:14 I pianpih ngeina mahmah ah zong pasalte in sam sau a hawi pen amau adingin a zumhuai thu ahihna
1Corinthians11:15 le numeite in sam sau a neih pen a minthanna uh ahihna thu hong kilangsak hi lo ahi hiam? Numeiteʼ sam sau pen a lu uh a tuam nadingin a kipia ahi hi.
1Corinthians11:16 Hih thu a nial nuam a om khak zenzen leh eite a kipan Pasian pawlpi mi a kuamah peuh in tu-a kong gen ngeina lobuang a dang a thei om lo hi
1Corinthians11:17 Ahi zongin a nuai-a thu tawh kisai-in note ka hong pakta kei hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh pawlpi kikhopna na neih uh ciangin phatna sangin siatna na piangsak zaw uh hi.
1Corinthians11:18 A masa penin
1Corinthians11:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh kua teng pawlpi mi citak ahi hiam
1Corinthians11:20 Nekkhawmna a bawl dingin note na kikhop uh ciangin Topaʼ Nekkhawmna a ne dingin na pai kei uh hi.
1Corinthians11:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh nekkhawmna ne dingin na pai uh ciangin pawl khatte amauʼ an tawh na tung masa-in ne pah uh ahih manin
1Corinthians11:22 Hih bangin na gamtat uh
1Corinthians11:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah kong gen thu pen Topa kiang panin ka ngah thu hi a
1Corinthians11:24 Pasian tungah lungdam a koh khit ciangin balnen a
1Corinthians11:25 Tua mah bangin nitak an a nek khit uh ciangin hai la a
1Corinthians11:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih bangin anlum ne-in hai sung panin leenggahzu na dawn simun
1Corinthians11:27 Tua ahih manin a kilawm lopi-in Topaʼ anlum ne-in
1Corinthians11:28 Tua ahih manin a kuamah peuh ki-entel masa phot uh henla
1Corinthians11:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ pumpi a khiatna thei lopi-in anlum ne-in hai panin leenggahzu a dawn mi pen a mahmah mawhsak thukhenna a kipiatawm ahi hi.
1Corinthians11:30 Tua bang mawhna hangin note tampi tak cina-in na zawngkhal uh a
1Corinthians11:31 Eite hoihtakin ki-entel masa peuh lehang Pasianʼ mawhsak thukhenna i thuak kei ding hi.
1Corinthians11:32 Ahi zongin eite in hih leitung mite tawh mawhsakna i thuak khawm loh nadingin Topa in eite hong thuhilhin gim hong pia hi.
1Corinthians11:33 Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw
1Corinthians11:34 Tua bangin na kikhop uh ciangin Pasianʼ thukhenna na thuakkhak loh nadingun a gilkial na om uh leh zong na inn uh ah an ne masa un. Thu dangdangte ahihleh ka hong pai ciangin kong gen ding hi.

1Corinthians13:3 Ka neih khempeuh midangte tungah pia-in

1Corinthians14:1 Na deih lian pen uh ki-itna na hisak un. Kha Siangthoʼ hong piak siamna a tuamtuamte sung panin thuhilh siamna neih ding na hanciam pha pen un.

1Corinthians14:11 Ahi zongin a kipau pau nam thei kei leng

1Corinthians14:17 Pasian tungah lungdam ko-in na thungetna a hoih mahmah hangin midangte in bangmah phattuamna ngah het lo hi.
1Corinthians14:18 Note khempeuh sangin pau lamdang pau thei zaw ka hih manin Pasian tungah ka lungdam hi.
1Corinthians14:19 Ahi ta zongin pawlpiteʼ biak kikhopna sungah pau lamdang kam tul sawm bang ka pau sangin midangteʼ phattuam nadingin a theih ding uh kammal nga bek ka pau zaw ding hi.

1Corinthians16:1 Tu-in Judea gam a om Pasian mite huh nading sum kaihkhop nading thu tawh kisai-in: Galatia gam a pawlpite in a hih ding zia uh ka gen bangin note in zong na hih un.
1Corinthians16:2 Kei ka hong pai ciangin sumpi kaihkhop tawm a om loh nadingin na ngahna uh tawh kizui-in Nipi simin na tuam koih unla
1Corinthians16:3 Kei ka hong tun ciangin Jerusalem khua ah na huhna uh sumte a puak dingin hoih na sak uh mite sawlin
1Corinthians16:4 Kei mahmah zong ka va pai ding hoih i sak leh amaute tawh ka va pai khawm ding hi.
1Corinthians16:5 Masedonia gam nawkin khualzin sawm ka hih manin tua gam sung ka zin khit ciangin no kiangah ka hong pai ding hi.
1Corinthians16:6 Note kiang panin mun dang ka zin nading peuhpeuh ah kei na hong huh theih nadingun note kiangah tomno sung bek hi loin phalbi hunsung tawntung bang ka hong taam thei kha ding hi.
1Corinthians16:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hong thukimpih nakleh khualzin kawmin a hong nawk bek hi loin
1Corinthians16:8 Ahi zongin hih Efesa khua mahah Pentekos Pawi hun ciang dong ka om ding hi.
1Corinthians16:9 Hong langpang tampi a om tei hangin limtakin na sep theih nading lam tampi tak a om hi.
1Corinthians16:10 Note kiangah Timoti hong pai zenzen khak leh
1Corinthians16:11 Kuamah in na simmawh bawl kha kei unla
1Corinthians16:12 I sanggam Apollos ahihleh
1Corinthians16:13 Kiging tawntungin na upna uh ah kip unla
1Corinthians16:14 Na sepna khempeuh uh ah ki-itna tawh na gamta un.
1Corinthians16:15 Sanggamte aw
1Corinthians16:16 Tua bang mite le amaute tawh tua bangmahin na a sem khawm miteʼ thu na man nadingun kong thum hi.

2Corinthians1:1 Jesu Khrisʼ sawltak ahi dingin Pasian in a hong seh keimah Paul le thu upna sungah i sanggam Timoti in
2Corinthians1:2 I Pa Pasian le Topa Jesu Khris in note khempeuh tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen.

2Corinthians1:4 Amah in koteʼ haksatna khempeuh ah hong huh ahih manin
2Corinthians1:5 Khris hangin gimna tampi ka thuak uh mah bangin amah in zong kote tungah huhna tampi mah a hong pia hi.
2Corinthians1:6 Kote in gimna ka thuak uh leh noteʼ phattuam nading le hotkhiatna na ngah nading uh ahi hi. Kote in huhna ka ngah uh leh zong
2Corinthians1:7 Note ka hong muanna uh kiam tuan lo hi. Koteʼ thuak bangin na thuak uh leh Pasian in kote hong huh mah bangin note zong hong huh ding hi.
2Corinthians1:8 Sanggamte aw
2Corinthians1:9 A si ding taktak hi ta hang
2Corinthians1:10 Tua zahin a lauhuai sih nading panin hong hon khia khinzo a
2Corinthians1:11 Kote adingin thu hong ngetsak un. Tua hileh mi tampi in kote adingin thu a hong ngetsaknate uh Pasian in a hong piakna hangin mi tampi mah in koteʼ tang dingin Pasian tungah lungdamna ko thei ding uh hi.
2Corinthians1:12 Koteʼ kisialh pih thu in: hih leitung a ka gamtatnate uh le a diakdiakin note tungah kong gamtatnate uh ah
2Corinthians1:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh note in sim thei-in a thu na theihtheih dingte bek uh a hong gelh ka hi uh hi. Tuhunin a cingin na theih lohte uh zong
2Corinthians1:14 Topa Jesu hong paikik Ni ciangin a cing takin thei ding na hih manun note hangin ka kisialh uh mah bangin note zong kote hangin na kisial ding uh hi.
2Corinthians1:15 Tu-a bangin piang taktak ding ci-in tel theih ka hih manin note in hamphatna nih vei na ngah nadingun ka geel a
2Corinthians1:16 Masedonia gam ka pai ciangin hong nawk masa-in
2Corinthians1:17 Hih bangin ka ngaihsutna pen a mawk kheel themthum hong sa na hi uh hiam? Leitung mihingte bangin angsung phattuam nading a om kei leh a gen sa thu a kheel themthumte bang hong sa na hi uh hiam?
2Corinthians1:18 Pasian a thuman a citak ahih mah bangin note tungah ka hong gente uh zong a kheel themthum ka hi kei uh hi.
2Corinthians1:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh Silvanas

2Corinthians1:22 Amah in eite pen ama aʼ ihihna ciaptehna eite tungah hong bawl a
2Corinthians1:23 Note kiangah kong pai lohna pen note ka hong dopna hizaw hi. Hih thu hong theih pih ka teci pen Pasian ahi hi.
2Corinthians1:24 Hih bangin um un
2Corinthians2:1 Tua ahih manin hong pai leng noteʼ dah nading hong piang ding ahih manin ka hong pai loh nadingin ka lungsim ka khensat hi.
2Corinthians2:2 Kei a hong lungdamsak ding note keʼn hong dahsak leng
2Corinthians2:3 Kei lungdam leng note khempeuh zong a lungdam ding na hihna uh teltakin thei ka hih manin
2Corinthians2:4 Tua lai ka gelh laitakin
2Corinthians2:5 Mi khatpeuh in heh nading a piansak ciangin kei bek a hong hehsak hi loin note khempeuh zong a hong hehsak ahi hi. Tua ahih manin tua bang mi tungah khauh tat lua nawn kei un.
2Corinthians2:6 Noteʼ gimpiakna sa pen kicing khinzo ka sa hi.
2Corinthians2:7 Tua ahih manin a mawhna maisak ta unla hehnem zaw un. Tua hikeileh dah lua-in siatlawh kha ding hi.
2Corinthians2:8 Amah na itkik ding uh ka hong thumna thu zong amah na theisak un.
2Corinthians2:9 Note in ze-etna bangzah ciang thuak zo-in
2Corinthians2:10 Note in mawhna na maisak uh ciangin kei zong a maisak ka hi hi. Mawhna maisak ding om ahihleh zong
2Corinthians2:11 Mawhna maisak kei lehang Satan in nuamtak sa-in eite tungah hong gualzo kha ding ahih manin mawhna a maisak ihi hi. Satanʼ nasepna zia a thei lo ihi kei hi.
2Corinthians2:12 Khris hangin lungdamna thu a hilh dingin Troas khua ka tun ciangin tua lai ah nasep theih nadingin Topa in lampi hong honsakna thu ka mu hi.
2Corinthians2:13 Ahi zongin tua lai ah i sanggampa Titus na om lo ahih manin ka lungsim om thei nawn lo hi. Tua ahih manin tua lai-a om mite nusia-in Masedonia gamah ka paisuak hi.
2Corinthians2:14 Ahi zongin Pasian tungah lungdam mahmah nading thu a om hi. Khris tawh ka kipawlna hangun gualzawhna tawh Khris a paina khempeuh ah Pasian in kote hong zuisak hi. Mun khempeuh ah paknamtui a kizelh bangin Khris thutheihna a kizelsak dingin Pasian in kote hong zang hi.
2Corinthians2:15 Hotkhiatna a ngah mite le a ngah lo mite lakah kote pen Khris in Pasian tungah a piak paknamtui tawh ka kibang uh hi.

2Corinthians3:11 Tawl khat sung bek a kimang na in minthanna nei ahihleh a kip tawntung na in minthanna lian zaw nei kan ding hi.

2Corinthians7:2 Kuama tungah kote hong khial lo
2Corinthians7:3 Hih bang ka hong cih ciangin note mawhsak nopna tawh thu a hong gen ka hi kei hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hong gen sa mah bangin note hong it mahmah ka hih manun note na hin uh leh hing khawm
2Corinthians7:4 Note hong muang mahmah in note hangin ka kisathei a
2Corinthians7:5 Masedonia gam ka tun khit uh ciang nangawnin tawldam cih om thei tuan lo a
2Corinthians7:6 Ahi zongin a lungkia mite a hanthawn Pasian in Titus hong tunna tawh kote hong tha khauhsak hi.
2Corinthians7:7 Ama hong tunna hang bek zong hi loin ama lungsim a thahat nadingin noteʼ gamtatna zong a hong zasak hi. Note in kei nong muhnopna thu uh
2Corinthians7:8 Ka hong laigelhna in note tawl khat sung a hong dahsak manin ka lungsim nuam lo ahi tei ta zongin tua ka hong laigelhna hangin ka kisik kei hi.
2Corinthians7:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh tu-in ka lung a dam hi. Note ka hong dahsak khakna hangin a lungdam hi loin note na dahna hangun na ngaihsutna uh kheel thei na hih manun a nuam ka hi hi. Tua na dahna uh Pasian in a hoih lamin hong zang ahih manin note adingin siatna a hong piangsak ka hi kei zaw uh hi.
2Corinthians7:10 Tua na dahna uh hotkhiatna ngah theih nadingin na lungsim uh na kheel nadingun Pasian in hong zang ahih manin dah nading bangmah om lo hi. Ahi zongin hih leitung dahna lelte in ahihleh sihna piangsak hi.
2Corinthians7:11 Hih noteʼ dahna pen Pasian in a hoih lamin hong zatsak ahih manin mawk om nawn loin lungsim takpi tawh kinna na nei uh a
2Corinthians7:12 Tua bangin lai ka hong gelh hangin a khial pa ahih kei leh a thuak pa ngaihsutna tawh hong gelh hi lo zaw-in
2Corinthians7:13 Tua ahih manin tu-in ka lung uh nuam mahmah hi. Koteʼ lungsim hong nuamsak bek hi loin

2Corinthians8:6 Tua mah bangin Titus in zong hih bang nasep nading hong pat khit ahih mah bangin midang huh nading na sepnate uh note lakah hong zawh pih vet dingin ka hanthawn uh hi.
2Corinthians8:7 Note pen thu upna
2Corinthians8:8 Hih bang kong gen ciangin thupiakna tawh a hong gen hi loin
2Corinthians8:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh i Topa Jesu zong hau mahmah napi-in ama zawnna tawh note mihau na suah theih nadingun noteʼ hangin mi zawngin hong kibawl ahih manin i Topa Jesu Khris hong itna bangzah takin lian hiam
2Corinthians8:10 Hih thu tawh kisai-in keima ngaihsutna panin: Note in ni kumin hih bang nasep ding utna lungsim a nei bek hi loin a pan khia masate na hih uh mah bangin na tangtut ding uh hoih pen hi.
2Corinthians8:11 Tua ahih manin na pat sa uh thu a bei dongin zomsuak unla
2Corinthians8:12 Piak nopna lungsim na neih nak uh leh na neih lohnate uh siksan hi loin na neihna uh tawh kizui-in na piak uh Pasian in hong sang ding hi.
2Corinthians8:13 Hih bangin kong gen ciangin midangte in noptuamna a ngah nadingin note in haksapi-in tuam gimpih ding ka cihna hi lo hi.
2Corinthians8:14 Tu laitakin note cithei na hih manun amau cihmawhnate ah huh le-uhcin
2Corinthians8:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in zong

2Corinthians8:19 Tua tham loin
