2Corinthians8:24 Tua ahih manin note ka hong kisialhpihna uh ah a kisial khial ka suah loh nading uh le pawlpi khempeuh in a theih tel nadingun hih ka sanggamte uh limtakin na limbawl un.
2Corinthians9:1 Judea gam a om Pasian mite huh nading tawh kisai-in lai kong gelh ding kisam nawn lo hi.
2Corinthians9:2 Noteʼ huhnopna thu ka theih khit sa hi a
2Corinthians9:3 Ahi zongin note ka hong kisialhpihna uh a mawkna a suahkhak loh nadingin na huh nading uh na kiging khol un
2Corinthians9:4 Tua bang hikeileh kei ka hong pai ciangin Masedonia gam a ka lawmte in hong zui kha zenzen henla
2Corinthians9:5 Tua ahih manin piak dingin na kamciam sa uh huhna sumte a baih sa-in a om theih nadingin hih ka sanggamte a hong mapai ding kisam ka sa hi. Tua hileh kei ka hong tun ciangin a baih sa-in na om dinga
2Corinthians9:6 Note in na phawk ding uh thu panin: Khaici tawm a vawhte in tawm mah la dinga
2Corinthians9:7 Pasian in piak nopna lungsim tawh a pia mite bek deih ahih manin
2Corinthians9:8 Note in na kisap khempeuh uh na neih theih nading uh le midangte huh nading zong na neih thuah theih nadingun Pasian in hong pia thei hi.
2Corinthians9:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in
2Corinthians9:10 Tua ahih manin vawh ding khaici le nek ding an hong pia Pasian in noteʼ cit piakna hangin nopsakna lian tampi na ngah theih nadingun note tungah a kisam khaici hong guanin a pungsak ding hi.
2Corinthians9:11 Kote tungtawnin noteʼ huhna sumte a ngahna uh hangin mi tampi in Pasian a phat theih nadingin note na cit gamtat zawh tawntung nadingun Pasian in hong hausak tawntung ding hi.
2Corinthians9:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh noteʼ huhna sumte in Pasianʼ mi a cimawhteʼ dong a hu bek hi loin
2Corinthians9:13 Note in na up uh Jesu hangin lungdamna thu ah na cihtakna uh le amaute le midang khempeuh tungah na cit piakna hangun mi tampite in Pasianʼ min phat ding uh hi.
2Corinthians9:14 Note tungah Pasian in hehpihna thupha a val a kanin hong piakna hangin amaute in note hong mu nuam mahmah in thu zong hong ngetsak ding uh hi.
2Corinthians9:15 A manphatna a kigen zo lo Pasianʼ hong piak hih thupha hangin Pasian tungah i lungdamna ko ciat ni.
2Corinthians10:1 Keimah Paul in Khris migitna le lungduaina tawh note kiangah kong thum hi. Kei pen note tawh ka hong om khawm laitakin a meidawi
2Corinthians10:2 Note kiangah ka hong pai ciangin ka hong hangsan khak loh nadingin na om nadingun kong thum hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung ngaihsutna tawh nasem hi
2Corinthians10:3 Kote pen leitungah a teeng mi ka hi mah uh hi; ahi zongin leitung lungsim ngimna tawh galdo ka hi kei uh hi.
2Corinthians10:4 Koteʼ zat galdona hiam pen leitung galhiam lelte hi lo a
2Corinthians10:5 Miteʼ ngaihsutna a man lote ka thal nial gawp zo uh a
2Corinthians10:6 Note thumanin na cihtakna uh a kitheihtel khit ciangin a thuman lo a citak lo khempeuh gimpiak ding ka kipan ta ding uh hi.
2Corinthians10:7 Note in na khatpeuh na ngaihsut uh ciangin a tungtham ah a kimu thei teng na siksan kha thei uh hi. Mi khatpeuh in Khris tawh ka kipawl hi
2Corinthians10:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh noteʼ siat nading hi loin noteʼ hoih nadingin Topa in kote tungah hong piak thuneihna hong nak zat lua-in ka kisialh pih hangin them khat zong ka maizum kei hi.
2Corinthians10:9 Hih bangin lai ka hong gelhna tawh note a hong lau gawpsak nuam ka hi kei hi.
2Corinthians10:10 Mi pawl khat in
2Corinthians10:11 Tua ahih manin lai ka hong gelhna sung uh ah ka thugente uh le note kiangah ka hong pai uh ciangin ka sepna dingte uh bangmah a kilamdang het lo ding ahihna thu tua mite in teltakin thei ta uh hen.
2Corinthians10:12 Kote ahihleh tua bangin a kiliansak mahmah mite tawh a kikimin ka kingaihsun ngam buang kei ding uh hi. Amaute khatlekhat ki-en kakin thupi kisa mahmah uh ahih manin mihai taktak ahi uh hi.
2Corinthians10:13 Ahi zongin kote ka kisialh nading uh kiciangtan a
2Corinthians10:14 Note kiangah Khris hangin lungdamna thu a hong hilh masate ka hih manun note kiangah thu ka hong hici gen uh ciangin a ciangtan khengvalin a gamta ka hi kei uh hi.

2Corinthians11:1 Ka hai ahi phial zongin ka haina mah hong thuakpih le-uhcin ka ut hi. Hong thuakpih taktak ta un.
2Corinthians11:2 Pasian in hong aam mahmah bangin note ka hong aam mahmah hi. Nungak le tangval nupa dingin a kigawm mah bangin khat bek ahi Khris tawh a kigawm dingin nungak siangtho bang na hi uh hi.
2Corinthians11:3 Ahi zongin gulpi in ama zuau ngian tawh Eve a khem zawh bangin na lungsim uh kihei-in Khris tungah na kipiaknate uh na nusiat khak ding uh ka lunghimawh hi.
2Corinthians11:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh koteʼ hilh ahi lo a dang Jesuʼ thu a hilh hong pai ciangin lungdam takin na sang pahpah uh a
2Corinthians11:5 Note in sawltak thupi mahmahte hi
2Corinthians11:6 Thugen siamna le pilna thuk ka nei kei kha mah ding hi. Hih thu tawh kisai-in ahihleh
2Corinthians11:7 Note kiangah Pasian hangin Lungdamna Thu kong hilh ciangin note tung panin thaman bangmah ka hong ngen het kei a
2Corinthians11:8 Note kiangah na ka sep laitakin pawlpi dangte in kei hong vak uh ahih manin
2Corinthians11:9 Note lakah na ka sep laitakin Masedonia gam panin a hong pai pawlpi mite in ka sapna khempeuh hong puak uh ahih manin note khat beek ka hong gimsak kei hi. A beisa hunah note ka hong gimsak khak loh mah bangin mailam hunah zong ka hong gimsak kha het kei ding hi.
2Corinthians11:10 Khris thuman keima sungah om ahih mah bangin no Akhaia gam sungah hih ka kisialhna thu mah kizom paisuak ding hi
2Corinthians11:11 Hih bangin kam ka pau ciangin note ka hong it loh man ahi hiam? Note ka hong itna hang hizaw hi. Hih thu Pasian in thei hi.
2Corinthians11:12 Tua sawltak dangte in
2Corinthians11:13 Amaute pen sawltak taktak hi loin
2Corinthians11:14 Tua pen lamdangsak ding hi lo hi. Satan nangawn Pasianʼ vantungmi tawh a kibangin kibawl tawm thei hi.
2Corinthians11:15 Tua ahih manin Satanʼ sawltakte pen thuman nasem bangin a kibawl manin lamdangsak ding hi lo hi. Hun bei ni ciangin amau gamtatna bangun thuak ngawn ding uh hi.
2Corinthians11:16 Kuamah in mihai-in hong ngaihsun kei hen
2Corinthians11:17 Tu-in kong gen ding thute pen Topaʼ hong sawl hi lo hi. Tu-a kisialhna kam ka hong pau ciangin mihai taktak mah bangin a pau ka hi hi.
2Corinthians11:18 Mi tampi in hih leitung ngeinate kisialh pih thei uh ahih manin kei zong ka hong kisial ding hi.
2Corinthians11:19 Note pil kisa mahmah na hih manun lungdam takin mihaite na sang pahpah uh hi.
2Corinthians11:20 Note

2Corinthians11:22 Amaute Hebru mi ahihleh kei zong Hebru mi mah ka hi hi. Amaute Abrahamʼ suan Israel mite ahihleh kei zong Abrahamʼ suan Israel mi mah ka hi hi.

2Corinthians11:25 Rom mite in thum vei hong sat a
2Corinthians11:26 Khual ka zinzinna lamin tuikhang lauhuaina
2Corinthians11:27 Nasem silbawlin ki-om tawntung a
2Corinthians11:28 Tua bang haksatna a tuamtuam ka thuak banah nisimin pawlpi a tuamtuamte adingin lunghimawhin ka lunggimpih lai hi.
2Corinthians11:29 A thaneem a om ciangin lungkhampihin kei zong ka thaneem a
2Corinthians11:30 Ka kisialh leh zong ka ginat lohna hong kilangsak nate hangin ka kisial bek hi.

2Corinthians12:1 Bangmah phattuam napi a om khol lo ahi zongin ka kisialsial lai ding hi. Tu-in Topa in maang hong muhsakna le ka muhte kong gen ding hi.
2Corinthians12:2 Tu ma kum sawm le kum li hun lai-in vantung a dawl tungnung pen ah Khristian khat kila to hi. A pumpi taktak hiam
2Corinthians12:3 Tua mipa pen Paradais ah a om ahi hi. A pumpi taktak tawh ahi hiam
2Corinthians12:4 Mite kiangah genkhiat sawn dingin a kiphal lo a lamdang mahmah thu a za hi.
2Corinthians12:5 Tua bang thu pen a kisialh taak mahmah thu hi napi-in ka kisialh pih kei hi. Kei a gina lo hi napi ama minthan nadingin Pasian in hong zang ahih manin tua thu pen a kisialh taak mahmah thu hi napi-in ka kisialh pih kei hi. Kei a gina lo hi napi ama minthan nadingin Pasian in hong zang ahih manin tua thu ka kisialh pih bek hi.
2Corinthians12:6 Hih ka muh thu pen thuman ahih manin a kisialh pih hi taleng zong mihai ka hi kei hi. Ahi zongin mite in keima sepna le keima genna a muh a zak banah a valin hong thupi ngaihsut khak ding uh ut lo ka hih manin hih thu ka kisialh pih nuam kei hi.
2Corinthians12:7 Ahi zongin hih a lamdang na tampite ka muhna hangin kisialin ka kisaktheih khak loh nadingin Satanʼ sawltak bangin na a sem
2Corinthians12:8 Tua natna tawh ka kipelh theih nadingin Topa kiangah thum vei tak thu ka ngen hi.
2Corinthians12:9 Ahi zongin Topa in kei kiangah
2Corinthians12:10 Kei ka thaneem mahmah laitakin a thahat mahmah suak ka hih manin Khris hangin ka thaneemna
2Corinthians12:11 Note in kei a hong pakta ding hi napi-in hong pakta lo na hih manun noteʼ bawlin mihai bangin kisialin ka gamta hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen bangmah pi ka hih loh hangin sawltak thupi mahmah in na ngaihsutte uh sangin them khat zong ka neu zaw tuan het kei hi.
2Corinthians12:12 Sawltak man taktak ka hihna lim a kilangsak nate
2Corinthians12:13 Note lakah na ka sepna hangin huhna bangmah kong nget loh cih sim loh
2Corinthians12:14 Tu-in kong hawh nading pen a thum vei nading hi ta a
2Corinthians12:15 Note kong huh theih nadingin lungdam takin ka neih khempeuh kong piak nop banah keima pumpi mahmah zong ka hong kipia nuam hi. Tua zah takin ka hong itna pen it lohna tengin hong nei zawsop ding na hi uh hiam?
2Corinthians12:16 Sumlepai vai-in note them khat zong ka hong gimsak het lohna na theih sa uh ahi hi. Ahi zongin mi pawl khatte in
2Corinthians12:17 Note kiangah ka hong paisak mite tungtawnin note kiang panin keima hamphat nading bang la ka hi hiam?
2Corinthians12:18 Note kiangah Titus a hong pai nading ka hahsawl a
2Corinthians12:19 Note mai ah ka mawhna uh a kiphelphel bang khatin na hong ngaihsut khak uh leh tua bang hi lo hi. Lawmte aw
2Corinthians12:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah ka hong tun ciangin noteʼ om zia ding ka deih bangin na om loh khak ding uh le note in keima maisuah na muhnop zia bangun na hong muh loh khak ding uh ka lunghimawh hi. Note lakah kitotna
2Corinthians12:21 Note kiangah ka hong tun ciangin a beisa hunah note tampi tak thaangtatin

2Corinthians13:3 Khris in keima tungtawnin thu hong gen taktak mah ahi hiam
2Corinthians13:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh thaneemna hangin singlamteh tungah a kikhai ahi zongin a hinkikna pen Pasianʼ vangliatna hang ahi hi. Amah tawh ka kipawl manun kote zong ka tha uh nem a
2Corinthians13:5 Thu um taktak mah ihi hiam
2Corinthians13:6 Na ki-ettel uh ciangin a cingtaak mi hikim dingin ka hong lamen hi.
2Corinthians13:7 Kote in ka nasepna uh a tangtun zo lo tawh ka kibang kha uh ahi zongin

2Corinthians13:9 Koteʼ deih bulpi pen note na cingtaak theih nading uh ahih manin noteʼ thahat laitakin kote ka thaneemna uh zong ka nuam veve uh hi.

2Corinthians13:12 Unau ki-itna tawh khatlekhat kihopihin na kinam un.

Galatians1:1 Mihingteʼ hong sehna le hong sawlna tawh sawltak na a sem hi loin
Galatians1:2 Kei tawh a om khawm i Khristian pihte in zong note hong hopih uh hi.
Galatians1:3 Eiteʼ Pa Pasian le Topa Jesu Khris in note khempeuh tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen.
Galatians1:4 A siahuai tu hunsung panin eite a hong suahtaksak nadingin eiteʼ Pa Pasianʼ deihna tawh kizui-in i mawhna hangin tua Jesu Khris a mahmah a hong kipiatawm ahi hi.
Galatians1:5 Pasianʼ min thang tawntung tahen! Amen.
Galatians1:6 A hong hehpihna tawh Khris hangin note a hong sam Pasian nusiakik pakin lungdamna thudang khat na sang malam na hih manun lamdang ka sa mahmah hi.

Galatians1:8 Note tungah ka hong hilh sa uh lungdamna thu tawh a kilehngatin
Galatians1:9 Ka hong gen ngeisa mah bangin kong genkikin ah: Noteʼ san sa lungdamna thu tawh a kilehngatin thudang a hong hilh mi peuhpeuh hell khuk sung tung tahen!

Galatians1:12 Mi khatpeuh tung panin ka ngah hi lo a
Galatians1:13 Jew biakna sungah ka om lai hunin Pasianʼ pawlpi tuamtuamte bawlsiat ding kin mahmah in
Galatians1:14 le ka khangualte lakah Jew biakna lamah a makai pen ka hihna thu le ka pu ka pate uh tang ngeinate a nak kin mahmah ka hihna a kipanin ka pianzia ngeisate khempeuh na zak sa na theih sa uh ahi hi.
Galatians1:15 Ahi zongin Pasian in a hong hehpihna tawh ka suah ma pekin kei hong teelin ama na a sem dingin hong sam khin hi. Keimah in ama Tapa hanga lungdamna thu

Galatians2:1 Tua zawh kum sawm le kum li khit ciangin Barnabas tawh Jerusalem khua ah ka paikik a
Galatians2:2 Pasianʼ hong sawlna tawh tua lai ah a pai ka hi hi. Ka nasepnate a mawkna a suahkhak ding ut lo ka hih manin makai lian a kineite tawh a tuamin kimuhna khat ka nei a
Galatians2:3 Kei tawh a kithuah Titus nangawn Grik mi hi napi-in a vun ki-atsak tuan lo hi.
Galatians2:4 Ahi zongin mi pawl khat in atsak nuam sam uh hi. Khris Jesu tawh ka kipawlna hangun suahtakna ka ngahna thu uh a kansim dingin amaute thu um mi kineihkhemin kote lakah hong kihel uh hi. Amaute in kote pen sila hong suaksak nuam uh ahi hi.
Galatians2:5 Lungdamna thuman taktak pelhem het loin note adingin a kipsuak theih nadingin amauteʼ deihna them khat zong ka zui het kei uh hi.
Galatians2:6 Jerusalem khua-a om makai lian a kinei mite in keiʼ nasepna tawh kisai thu ah bangmah gen thuah ding nei lo uh hi. (Pasian in maitang zahtak tuam nei tuan lo ahih manin hih bangin thu a gen ngam ka hi hi.)
Galatians2:7 Amaute in gen thuah ding a neih gen loh
Galatians2:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh Jew mite lakah sawltak nasep a sem dingin Peter a koih mah bangin Gentail mite lakah sawltak nasep a sem dingin Pasian in kei a hong koih hi.

Galatians2:10 Kote in amaute lakah a om mizawngte ka phawk ding uh hong kal bek a

Galatians2:13 Thu um Jew midangte zong hong meidawi suah a

Galatians2:15 A taktakin ci lehang kote pen ka pian ka pat-un Jew mi ka hi uh a
Galatians2:16 Ahi zongin Jesu Khris upna hang bek tawh Pasian tawh kipawl theihna kingahin
Galatians2:17 Tua ahihleh Khris ka upna hangun Pasian tawh kipawl theih nading ka hanciam uh ciangin mimawh mah ka hihna uh ka thei uh hi. Tua ahihleh Khris pen mawhna a piangsak a suak ding hiam? Suak het lo ding hi.
Galatians2:18 Thukham zuihna hang hi lo hi
Galatians2:19 Thukham tawh kisai-in ahihleh Pasian adingin ka nuntak theih nadingin tua Thukham mah in kei hong that khin ahih manin Thukham tawh kisai thu ah misi bang ka hi hi. Singlamteh tungah Khris a kithah lai-in kei zong amah tawh a si khawm ka hi hi.

Galatians3:3 Pasianʼ Kha Siangtho tawh na pat khit uh ciangin nomauʼ thatang hat thu tawh khup a sawm ding zahin hici hai lawmlawm na hi uh hiam?
Galatians3:4 A beisa huna na tuah sa uh thute khempeuh a mawkna suak khin zen ding ahi hiam? Tawm khat beek phattuamna hong pia thei tei dingin ka um hi.

Galatians3:16 Tu-in Pasian in Abraham le ama suan pa tungah thuciamna nei hi. Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelhna ah
Galatians3:17 Tu-in ka hong gen nop thu in: Pasian in Abraham tawh thuciamna bawl a
Galatians3:18 Pasianʼ hong piakkhong pen Thukham zuihna hang tawh a kingah hi mawk lehpiak ding hong ciamna hangin a kingah hi nawn lo ding hi. Ahi zongin Pasian in Abraham tungah letsong a piakna pen a thuciamnasa tawh kizui-in a piak ahi hi.
Galatians3:19 Tua ahihleh Thukham bangin a kimang ding ahi hiam? Khialhna cih bang ahi hiam
Galatians3:20 Ahi zongin Pasian in Abraham tungah thuciamna a bawl laitakin kuamah sawl sawn nei loin amah bek in a piak ahi hi.
Galatians3:21 Tua ahihleh Thukham le Pasianʼ thuciamnate a kilehngat ahi uh hiam? Hi het lo hi. Mihingte tungah hong kipia Thukham in nuntakna taktak hong pia thei hileh tua Thukham zuihna hangin mi khempeuh in Pasian tawh kipawl theihna ngah ding uh hi.

Galatians3:24 Tua hi a

Galatians6:4 A kuamah peuh in ama gamtatna ciat en tel henla

Galatians6:6 Pasian thu hilhna a za mipa in ama neih na hoihte khempeuh zong
Galatians6:7 Pasian a kikhem zo dingin ngaihsun kha kei un. Mi khempeuh in ama vawh nam khaici mah ngahkik ding hi.
Galatians6:8 Mi khatpeuh in ama leitung pumpi deihna khaici a vawh leh sihna ngah dinga
Galatians6:9 Tua ahih manin na hoih sep ding cimtak kei ni. Lungkia loin i sep nakleh a hun ciangin thaman i ngah ding hi.

Galatians6:11 Tu-in keima khut mahmah tawh laimal gol pipi-in lai ka hong gelh na mu uh hi.
Galatians6:12 Note in na vun uh na at nadingun a hong hah bawl mite in mihoih ahihna uh kilangsak nuamin
Galatians6:13 Vun-atna a zang mite nangawn in Thukham zui nuam tuan lo uh hi. Hih a pualam gamtatna thu note in na zuihna hangun kisial nuam uh ahih manin note in vun-atna na zat ding uh a hong deih uh ahi hi.

Ephesians2:1 A beisa hunah na thuman lohna uh le na mawhna uh hangin kha thu tawh kisai ah a si na hi uh hi.
Ephesians2:2 Tua hun lai-in leitung gitloh gamtatnate na zui uh a
Ephesians2:3 A taktakin eite khempeuh zong amaute mah i bang ngei a
Ephesians2:4 Tua bang hi napi-in Pasianʼ hong hehpihna le eite hong itna lian mahmah ahih manin
Ephesians2:5 i mawhna hangin kha thu tawh kisai-in misi ihih laitakin Khris tawh eite hong nungtasak hi. Pasianʼ hehpihna hangin hotkhiatna a ngah thei ihi hi.
Ephesians2:6 Khris Jesu tawh eite i kipawlna hangin vantungah amah tawh i uk khawm theih nadingin sihna panin Pasian in a hong thokhawmsak hi.
Ephesians2:7 Khris Jesu tungtawnin a hong lah ama hehpihna le a hong itna bangzah takin lianin lamdang ahi hiam
Ephesians2:8 Noteʼ upna hangin Pasianʼ hong hehpihna tawh hotkhiatna a ngah na hi uh hi. Noteʼ thalawhna hangin a ngah hi loin Pasianʼ hong piakkhong ahi hi.
Ephesians2:9 Noteʼ hanciamna tawh a ngah hi lo na hih manun na kisialh nading uh a thu om lo hi.
Ephesians2:10 Eite a hong bawlpa pen Pasian hi a
Ephesians2:11 Amau mahmah in amau pumpi tungah ahihna uh tawh vun a ki-at mite ka hi uh a ci Jew mite in
Ephesians2:12 Tua hun lai-in Khris tawh na kikhen uh a
Ephesians2:13 Ahi zongin a gamlapi ah a omngei hi napi-in tu-in Khris Jesu tawh na kipawlna hangun ama sihna in Pasian kiang hong tunpih hi.
Ephesians2:14 Khris mahmah in Gentail mite le Jew mite pawl khatin hong bawl ahih manin eite tungah nopsakna a hong pia pa ahi hi. Hih minam nihte khenin gal a piangsak dalna pen Khris in ama pumpi tawh a satkham hi.
Ephesians2:15 Amah tawh kipawlna hangin minam nihte pawl khat a suah theih nadingin minam a dei Jew Thukham le a ngeinate khempeuh phiatin

Ephesians3:1 No Gentail mite hangin Jesu Khris thu tawh kisai-in thong kia keimah Paul in Pasian kiangah thu ka ngen hi.
Ephesians3:2 Noteʼ phattuam nadingin Pasian in hong hehpihna tawh hih nasep a sem dingin a hong sawlna thu na theih sa uh ahi hi.
Ephesians3:3 Lai ka hong khak sate sungah a tomno-in kong gen sa bangin Pasian in ama thusim kei tungah hong hilh khinzo hi.
Ephesians3:4 Tua ka laigelh na sim le-uhcin Khris tawh kisai a thusim ka theihna thu na phawk ding uh hi.
Ephesians3:5 A beisa hunah tua thusim pen kuama tungah kigen lo a
Ephesians3:6 Tua thusim pen: Lungdamna thu a kihilhna hangin Gentail mite in Jew mite tawh Pasianʼ thupha ngahkhawm thei a
Ephesians3:7 Tua lungdamna thuhilh a sem dingin Pasian in a tuam vilvelin ama vangliatna tawh kei a hong seh hi.
Ephesians3:8 Pasianʼ mi khempeuh lakah kei a neu pen hi napi-in
Ephesians3:9 le Pasian in a geel sim thute a kisep khiatna thu mi khempeuh a musak dingin Pasian in kei tungah hih hamphatna hong pia hi. Tu hun laitakin vantung a uk van mite in pawlpiʼ hangin Pasianʼ pilna a nam tuamtuamin a muh theih nadingun na khempeuh a bawl Pasian in a beisa hunah hih thu khempeuh a imcip hi.

Ephesians3:11 Pasian in a tawntungin a ngimna a om sa bangin i Topa Khris Jesu nasepna tawh a ngimna a hong tungsak hi.
Ephesians3:12 Amah tawh i kipawlna le amah i muanna hangin kimuang takin Pasian kiangah pai theih nading hun i nei hi.
Ephesians3:13 Tua ahih manin note hangin ka thuakna pen noteʼ phattuam nading ahih manin tua ka thuakna thu hangin lungkiatna-in na nei kei un.
Ephesians3:14 Hih ama geelna teng ka ngaihsut ciangin

Ephesians5:3 Note pen Pasianʼ mi na hih manun note lakah nulepa khialhna
Ephesians5:4 A kilawm lo-a kampauna le ciamnuih hoih lo cihte zong na zang kei unla
Ephesians5:5 Nulepa khialhna a gamta mi
Ephesians5:6 Hih bang mawhnate i bawl hangin phamawh kei
Ephesians5:7 Tua ahih manin tua bangin a gamta mite tawh kisu kha vet kei un.

Ephesians5:14 Tua ahih manin la sungah
Ephesians5:15 Tua ahih ciangin hoihtakin kingaihsunin gamta unla

Ephesians5:17 Tua ahih manin hai om mawk kei unla
Ephesians5:18 Zu in mi siasak thei ahih manin zu ne kei unla
Ephesians5:19 La a tuamtuamte genin sakna tawh Topaʼ thu gen belin nei unla

Ephesians6:3 
Ephesians6:4 Pate aw
Ephesians6:5 Silate aw
Ephesians6:6 A hong pahtak ding uh deihna tawh amauteʼ muh sung bekin tua ci gamtat kei unla
Ephesians6:7 Mihingteʼ na a sem bang lelin kingaihsun loin Topaʼ na a sem bangin kingaihsun unla
Ephesians6:8 Salte ahi a
Ephesians6:9 Tote aw
Ephesians6:10 Tu a kipanin Topa tawh na kipawlna uh le ama vangliatna hangin na tha uh khauhsak ta un.
Ephesians6:11 Dawimangpaʼ hong hih nading khempeuh na dalzawh nadingun Pasianʼ galvan namkim na zang un.
Ephesians6:12 Eiteʼ do pen si le sa a nei leitung mite hi lo a
Ephesians6:13 Tua ahih manin hun haksat hun hong tun ciangin galteʼ hong sukna teng khempeuh nang zo-in
Ephesians6:14 Tua ahih ciangin kawnggak gak bangin thutak zang unla
Ephesians6:15 Kithawi a khedap bulh bangin Lungdamna Thu a hilh khia dingin kiging un.
Ephesians6:16 Tua banah
Ephesians6:17 Sik lukhu khuk bangin hotkhiatna nei unla
Ephesians6:18 Kha Siangtho tawh kopin a tawntungin Pasian kiangah na kisapna khempeuh uh ngenin na thum unla
Ephesians6:19 Thu ka hilh theih hun ding ciangin lungdamna thusim hang takin ka hilhkhiat theih nadingin Pasian in ka thugen ding hong hilh nadingin kei adingin zong thu na ngetsak ta un.
Ephesians6:20 Pasianʼ thu genin taangmi ka sepna hang mahin sikkhau khihna thuakin thong kia ka hih manin ka hilh dingin a kilawm bangin hang takin ka gen ngam nadingin thu hong ngetsak ta un.
Ephesians6:21 Ka septe le ka om zia khempeuh na theih nadingun Topa thu sungah i sanggam
Ephesians6:22 Koteʼ om zia na theih nading uh le amah in noteʼ lungsim hong thahatsak theih nadingin amah a hong paisak ka hi hi.
Ephesians6:23 Pa Pasian le Topa Jesu Khris in ulenaute khempeuh tungah nopsakna le itna
Ephesians6:24 Tatsat loin i Topa Jesu Khris a it tawntung mi khempeuh tungah hehpihna thupha hong tung tahen.
Philippians1:1 Jesu Khrisʼ sila keimah Paul le Timoti in Filippi khua-a om Khris tawh a kipawl Pasianʼ mite
Philippians1:2 I Pa Pasian le Topa Jesu Khris in note tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong pia tahen.
Philippians1:3 Note ka hong phawk simin ka biak Pasian tungah ka lungdamna ka ko hi.
Philippians1:4 Note in lungdamna thu na zak ni uh a kipanin tu ni ciang dong
Philippians1:5 
Philippians1:6 Note sungah hih nasep hoih a hong pan khia Pasian in Jesu Khris hong paikik hun ciang dong
Philippians1:7 Lungdamna thu hangin ka thongkiatna le lungdamna thu man hi
Philippians1:8 Jesu Khris lungsim zah mahin note ka hong it taktakna thu Pasian in a hong thei hi.
Philippians1:9 Note ading deihsakna tawh thu ka hong ngetsak thu in: Noteʼ lungsimah itna khang semsemin
Philippians1:10 Tua hileh Khris hong paikik ni ciangin paubaanna om loin a siangtho na hi ding uh hi.
Philippians1:11 Jesu Khris in note mihoih a hong suahsak theihna le mite in Pasian pahtawi-in a phat theihna thu
Philippians1:12 Sanggamte aw
Philippians1:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khris nasem ka hihna hangin thong kia ka hihna thu
Philippians1:14 Tua banah keima thongkiatna hangin hih lai-a om Khristiante a tam zaw in Topa muanna-in nei uh a
Philippians1:15 Mi pawl khatte in ahihleh hong hazatna le hong langpan nopna tawh Khris thu hilh uh a
Philippians1:16 Hih bang mite in
Philippians1:17 Pawl khatte in ahihleh lungsim hoih tawh hi loin ka thongkiatna ah na ka sak semsem theih nadingin kei hong demna-in Khris thu a hilh uh hi.
Philippians1:18 Ahi zongin phamawh ka sa kei hi. Lungsim hoih tawh a kihilh a
Philippians1:19 Note hong thungetsakna le Jesu Khris Kha Siangtho huhna tawh suakta ding hi ing
Philippians1:20 Ka si a
Philippians1:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khris ading bekin a nungta ka hi a
Philippians1:22 Leitung pumpi nungta lai hi leng na a manpha tampi sem thei ding ka hih manin
Philippians1:23 Hih thu nih khensat hak ka sa mahmah hi. Kei adingin hoih zaw thampek ahih manin leitung pumpi si-in Khris tawh om khawm ding ka ut hi.
Philippians1:24 Ahi zongin note adingin kei ka hin lai ding kisam pha zaw hi.
Philippians1:25 Hih thu a hoih pen ding hi
Philippians1:26 Tua ahih manin note kiangah ka hong hawhkik ciangin Jesu Khris tawh kipawlin na nuntakna uh ah kei nong kisialh pih nading uh thu tampi hong om lai ding hi.
Philippians1:27 Note tawh a om khawm dingin ka hong pai thei a
Philippians1:28 Note a hong gualzosak ding pa pen Pasian ahih manin na galte uh na kihta kei un. Hang takin om tawntung le-uhcin
Philippians1:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khrisʼ na sep nading hunpha zong note tungah a hong kipia hi a
Philippians1:30 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in note in na hong muh uh ka galdona le tu mahmah in ka do lailai na zak uh thute ah kei na hong do pih thei ding uh hi.

Philippians4:11 Bangbangin om taleng a lungkim thei dingin a kisin sa ka hih manin hih bang kong gen ciangin ka kitangsapna a hong pulak nuam ka hi kei hi.
Philippians4:12 Cihmawhna le cihtheihna a sin sa ka hi hi. Tua ahih manin ka hau a ka zawng zongin
Philippians4:13 Khris in a hong piak vangliatna tawh hihte khempeuh nawk zawh nading thahatna a nei ka hi hi.
Philippians4:14 Ahi zongin ka lungkham laitakin na hong huh manun hoih mahmah hi.

Philippians4:16 Thesalonika khua ah cimawhin ka om lai-in huhna nong puak uh khatvei bek hi lo hi.
Philippians4:17 Note tung panin na tampi ka ngah nop man hi lo a
Philippians4:18 Noteʼ hong piak nate kicing piikpeek hi. Epafroditas in noteʼ hong na khakte hong tunpih ahih manin ka kitangsapna khempeuh kicing kim hi. Hih nate pen Pasian biakna-in na piak uh
Philippians4:19 A na ka sep i Topa Pasian in ama hauhna tawh kizui-in Khris Jesu hangin noteʼ kitangsapna khempeuh hong pia ding hi.
Philippians4:20 I Pa Pasian in a tawntungin minthanna ngah tahen. Amen.
Philippians4:21 Khris Jesu sungah a om mi siangthote khempeuh na na hopihsak un. Kei tawh a om khawm kamsangte khempeuh in zong note hong hopih uh hi.

Philippians4:23 Topa Jesu Khris hehpihna thupha
Colossians1:1 Pasianʼ deihna tawh Jesu Khrisʼ sawltak dingin a hong kiseh keimah Paul le i sanggam Timoti in
Colossians1:2 Kolose khua ah a om Pasianʼ mi ahi
Colossians1:3 Note in Khris Jesu na muanna uh le Pasianʼ mite khempeuh na itna thu uh za ka hih manun note ading thu ka hong ngetsak uh ciangin i Topa Jesu Khrisʼ Pa Pasian tungah lungdamna ka ko tawntung uh hi.
Colossians1:4 
Colossians1:5 Thu dang na zak ma un
Colossians1:6 Note in Pasian hong hehpihna thu za-in
Colossians1:7 Hih thu pen
Colossians1:8 Amah in

Colossians1:11 Note in lungduai maitai takin thuak zo-in
Colossians1:12

Colossians1:14 tua a Tapa in eite hong khah khia a
Colossians1:15 Khris pen a kimu thei lo Pasianʼ lim hi a
Colossians1:16 Vantung le leitungah a om na khempeuh
Colossians1:17 Na khempeuh khat beek a om ma-in amah om khinta a
Colossians1:18 Na khempeuh ah amah a lian pen ahih theih nadingin
Colossians1:19 Tua Tapa in Pasianʼ pianzia a kimin a neih nading
Colossians1:20 Pasian in a Tapa zangin na khempeuh ama kiangah a kaihkik ding a seh sa ahi hi. Tua ahih manin singlamteh tungah a Tapa a sihna hangin amah tawh kilemkik theih nading hong omsak ahih manin
Colossians1:21 A beisa hunah noteʼ lungsim gitlohna le gamtat siatna hangin Pasian tawh kigamla-in Pasianʼ gal na hi uh hi.
Colossians1:22 Ahi zongin
Colossians1:23 Ahi zongin note in lungdamna thu na zak cil lai-un na neih uh lametna panin liing het loin
Colossians1:24 Tu-in ka pumpi-in ka thuakna tawh Khris in ama pumpi ahi pawlpi adingin a thuak ding a kisam lai teng a kitaangcingsak suak ka hih manin note adingin ka thuakna thu ah ka lung a dam hi.
Colossians1:25 Pasianʼ thu a kicing takin noteʼ phattuam nadingin a hilh dingin pawlpi nasem dingin Pasian in kei a hong bawl hi.
Colossians1:26 Tua thuhilh ding pen a beisa hunah a ki-imcip thu hi a
Colossians1:27 Pasian in mi khempeuh adingin a koihcing hih a thupi a deihhuai a thusim pen ama mite tungah pholak ding a sawm ahi hi. Tua thusim in: Khris tawh a kipawlte in Pasian tawh minthanna ngahkhawm ding hi
Colossians1:28 Tua ahih manin a milip tungah Khrisʼ thu ka hilh uh a
Colossians1:29 Hih bang a tangtun theih nadingin Khris in kei tungah a hong piak ka thahatna khempeuh zangin

Colossians2:7 Note tungah a hong kihilh sa bangin ama sungah zung thuk kha unla
Colossians2:8 Khris thu tawh a kituak lopi-in
Colossians2:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh mihing hong suahna sungah Khris in Pasianʼ pianzia khempeuh a kimtakin nei a
Colossians2:10 Khris tawh na kipawlna hangun nuntakna kicing na nei uh hi. Huih lak a ukte le aana neite khempeuh tungah amah a lutangpi hi lai hi.
Colossians2:11 Amah tawh na kipawlna uh hangin mihingte in pumpi vun a at uh bang hi loin
Colossians2:12 Note tui na kiphum uh ciangin Jesu tawh kiphum khawmin
Colossians2:13 A beisa hunah na mawhna uh hangin kha thu tawh kisai-in misi na hi uh a

Colossians3:2 Vantungah a om thute ngaihsutin nei unla
Colossians3:3 Note a si khin na hi uh a
Colossians3:4 Noteʼ nuntakna taktak Khris ahih manin amah hong kilat ciangin note zong amah tawh hong kilang khawmin amah tawh na minthang khawm ding uh hi.
Colossians3:5 Tua ahih manin nulepa mawhna
Colossians3:6 Ama thu a mang lo mite tungah hih bang gamtatna hangin Pasianʼ hehna hong tung ding hi.
Colossians3:7 Note pen hih bangin gamta-in a nungta ngeite na hi uh hi.
Colossians3:8 Ahi zongin tu-in hehna
Colossians3:9 Ngeina lui le gamtatna lui khempeuh a beisak khin na hihna uh kithei-in khatlekhat tungah zuau thu kigen nawn kei unla
Colossians3:10 ngeina thak tawh kituakin gamta un. Eite a hong piangsak Pasian a kicing takin i theih semsem nadingin amah a sun dingin a hong thakbawl tawntung ahi hi.
Colossians3:11 Tua ahih manin Gentail mi le Jew mi
Colossians3:12 Pasian in note hong itin

Colossians3:14 Hihte khempeuh banah

Colossians3:25 A man loin a gamtate in ahihleh a gamtatna bangun thuak ding uh hi. Pasian in kuamah deidan loin amauʼ gamtatna bang ciatin thu a khen ahi hi.
Colossians4:1 Tote aw
Colossians4:2 Lungsim takpi tawh thu ngen tawntung unla
Colossians4:3 Mite kiangah Khrisʼ thusim hilh theih nadingin Pasian in kote tungah hunpha hong piak theih nadingin thu hong ngetsak un. Ka thongkiatna pen hih thu hang mah ahi hi.
Colossians4:4 Miteʼ tel theih dingin a kitel takin ka gen theih nadingin thu hong ngetsak un.
Colossians4:5 A pualam mite tungah a kilawm a kituakin gamta unla
Colossians4:6 Kam na pau uh ciangin miʼ zaknop
Colossians4:7 Topaʼ nasepna ah citakin a manpha mahmah ka nasep pih uh ka sanggam uh Tikhikas in keiʼ thu a kicing takin note kiangah hong gen ding hi.
Colossians4:8 Hih lai-a koteʼ om zia hong gen ciangin noteʼ lungsim a nop theih nadingin amah a hong paisak ka hi hi.
Colossians4:9 Noteʼ khuapih mi
Colossians4:10 Kei tawh thong a kia khawm Aristarkhas in note hong hopih hi. Barnabasʼ sanggamnuʼ tapa Marka in zong hong hopih hi (amah hong pai ciangin hoihtakin na pawlbawl un
Colossians4:11 Justas zong a kici zel Jesu in zong note hong hopih hi. Vun-atna a zang Jew mi Khristian a hong suakte lak panin hih mi thumte bek
Colossians4:12 Jesu Khris nasem
Colossians4:13 Amah in note-aʼ ding a kipan Laodisia khua le Hierapolis khua mite adingin nakpi takin na a sepna thu ka thei hi.
Colossians4:14 I it siavuanpa Luka le Demas in zong hong hopih uh hi.
Colossians4:15 Laodisia khua-a om i sanggamte le Nymfas le ama inn-a a kikhawm pawlpi mite na hopihsak un.
Colossians4:16 Hih ka hong laikhak na sim khit uh ciangin Laodisia khua-a om pawlpite zong na simsak unla
Colossians4:17 Tua ciangin Arkhippas kiangah
Colossians4:18 Keimah Paulʼ khut mahmah tawh
1Thessalonians1:1 Keimah Paul le Silas le Timoti in Pa Pasian le Topa Jesu Khris sungah a om Thesalonika khua-a om pawlpi mite tungah lai ka hong khak uh hi. Pasian in note tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen.
1Thessalonians1:2 Note khempeuh hangin Pasian tungah lungdamna ko tawntungin
1Thessalonians1:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh i Pa Pasian kiangah thu ka nget simun noteʼ upna hangin na nuntak ziate uh
1Thessalonians1:4 Sanggamte aw
1Thessalonians1:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah Lungdamna Thu kong hilh lai-un kam bek tawh a hong gen hi loin
1Thessalonians1:6 Kote le Topaʼ gamtat bangin note na gamta uh a
1Thessalonians1:7 Tua ahih manin Masedonia gam le Akhaia gam sung khempeuh ah thu um mi khempeuhte adingin etteh hoih na suak uh hi.
1Thessalonians1:8 Noteʼ gamtatna ziateʼ hangin Masedonia le Akhaia gam sungteng bekah Topaʼ thu a kithei hi loin
1Thessalonians1:9 Note kiangah ka hong pai lai-un kote na hong limbawlna thu uh le a nungta a man Pasianʼ thu zui-in a bia ding le
1Thessalonians1:10 a hong tung ding Pasianʼ hehna panin eite a hong hon khia
1Thessalonians2:1 Sanggamte aw
1Thessalonians2:2 Note in na theih sa uh mah bangin Thesalonika khua ka hong tun ma-un Filippi khua ah simmawh bawlna le maizumna ka thuak uh hi. Tua bangin nakpi takin hong kilangbawlna hangin Pasian kiang panin a hong pai Lungdamna Thu note kiangah gen ngam nadingin i Pasian in kote sungah lungsim hanna a hong guan hi.
1Thessalonians2:3 Kote in thu kong hilh uh ciangin thuman lo
1Thessalonians2:4 Pasian in kote hong thei-in Lungdamna Thu a hilh dingin kilawm hong sa ahih mah bangin miteʼ lungdam theih nadingin thu a hilh hi loin koteʼ lungsim ngimna a hong thei Pasianʼ lungkim nadingin thu a hilh ka hizaw uh hi.
1Thessalonians2:5 Tua ahih manin note in na theih uh mah bangin miteʼ lungdam theih nading phatna kamte ka zang kei uh a
1Thessalonians2:6 Khris sawltakte ka hihna uh hangin phatna ka ngah ding uh a kilawm hi napi-in note le midangte
1Thessalonians2:7 Note kiangah ka hong om lai-un nupite in a tate uh itna tawh a bawl bangin note kong bawl uh hi.
1Thessalonians2:8 Note hong it mahmah ka hih manun Pasian kiang panin a hong pai Lungdamna Thu bek hong gen loin
1Thessalonians2:9 Sanggamte aw
1Thessalonians2:10 Note in hih thu na theih uh mah bangin Pasian in zong hong thei hi. Thu um note tungah kong gamtatnate uh siangtho-in thuman a
1Thessalonians2:11 Pa in a tate a bawl bangin note ka hong bawlna uh na thei uh hi.
1Thessalonians2:12 Note hong hehnemin ka hong hanthawn uh a
1Thessalonians2:13 Note kiangah Pasianʼ thu kong gen uh ciangin no thu um mite sungah ama thu tawh kisai-in Pasian in na hong sem ahih manin koteʼ thugente pen Pasianʼ thu taktak ahih mah bangin koteʼ thugenna na zak uh ciangin mihingʼ thu bangin ngaihsun loin Pasianʼ thu taktak mahin hong sang na hih manun
1Thessalonians2:14 Tua ahih manin sanggamte aw
1Thessalonians2:15 Tua Jew mite in Topa Jesu le kamsangte that uh a
1Thessalonians2:16 Gentail mite tungah hotkhiatna thu ka gen ding uh hong khaktan uh ahih manin amauʼ mawhna sate a behlap niloh a suak uh hi. Ahi zongin a tawpna ah Pasianʼ hehna amaute tungah a tung ta hi.
1Thessalonians2:17 Sanggamte aw
1Thessalonians2:18 Note kiangah hong hawhkik nuam ka hih manun note kiangah hawhkik ding ka hanciam zelzel hangun kong pai ding uh Satan in hong khaktan hi.
1Thessalonians2:19 Tua banga kong pai nopna uh pen
1Thessalonians2:20 Koteʼ thupi suahna le lungdamna pen note bek mah na hi takpi uh hi.
1Thessalonians3:1 A tawpna ah ka thuak zawh nawn loh uh ciangin Athen khua ah kei le Silas omin
1Thessalonians3:2 Khris Lungdamna Thu hilhna ah Pasian adingin kote tawh na a sem khawm i sanggampa Timoti hong paisak le-ung hoih pen ding hi
1Thessalonians3:3 hih bawlsiatna hangin note khat beek na puk loh nading uh deihna tawh a hong paisak ka hi uh hi. Hih bang bawlsiatna pen i thuak ding mah hi
1Thessalonians3:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh note tawh kong om khawm lai-un zong
1Thessalonians3:5 Tua ahih manin ka thuak zawh nawn loh ciangin noteʼ upna zia a thei dingin Timoti ka hong sawl hi. Dawimangpaʼ ze-etna in note hong puksak kha-in
1Thessalonians3:6 Ahi zongin tu-in note kiang panin Timoti hong tung khin a
1Thessalonians3:7 Tua ahih manin sanggamte aw
1Thessalonians3:8 Topaʼ thu ah kip takin om na hih manun tu-in ka husang thei ta uh hi.
1Thessalonians3:9 Tu-in note hangin Pasian tungah ka lungdamna uh ka ko thei ta uh a
1Thessalonians3:10 Pasian in eite maitang kimu-in hong omsak theih nading le noteʼ upna ka hong kicinsak theih nadingun a sun a zanin lungsim takpi tawh thu ka ngenngen uh hi.
1Thessalonians3:11 Tu-in eiteʼ Pa ahi Pasian le i Topa Jesu in note kiangah ka hong pai theih nading uh lampi hong honsak tahen.
1Thessalonians3:12 Kote in note ka hong it zahun
1Thessalonians3:13 Tua hileh i Topa Jesu a mi siangthote khempeuh tawh hong pai ciangin eiteʼ Pa ahi Pasianʼ mai ah kisuanna om het loin lungsim siangtho takin na om thei ding uh hi.
1Thessalonians4:1 Tu-in sanggamte aw
1Thessalonians4:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Jesu min tawh ka hong thuhilhnate uh na theih sa uh ahi hi.
1Thessalonians4:3 Note a siangtho-in nungta-in numei tunga mawhna tawh na kipelh siangtho nading uh Pasian in hong deih hi.
1Thessalonians4:4 Pasian a thei lo dawi biate in kilunggulhna hang bek tawh a pumpi uh a zat bang hi loin
1Thessalonians4:5 
1Thessalonians4:6 Hih bang thute ah kuamah in Khris sungah na sanggamte uh tungah na khialh loh nading uh le na khasiatsak loh nading uh hong deih hi. Pasian in hih bangin a gamta mite gim pia ding hi
1Thessalonians4:7 Eite a thanghuai gamtat dingin Pasian in a hong sam hi lo a
1Thessalonians4:8 Tua ahih manin hih thute a thudon lo mi in mite a thudon lo hi loin
1Thessalonians4:9 Ahi zongin thu up pih mite it ding tawh kisai-in bangmah gelh ding na kisam nawn kei uh hi. Khatlekhat na ki-it nading uh Pasian in note tungah hong hilh khinzo hi.
1Thessalonians4:10 Masedonia gam sunga om thu um mi khempeuh na it khin takpi uh hi. Tua ahih manin sanggamte aw
1Thessalonians4:11 Tu ma-a ka hong gen sa uh mah bangin kam tam nuam se loin hoihtakin om hithiatna
1Thessalonians4:12 Tua bangin gamta le-uhcin thu um lo mite in note hong zahtak ding uh a
1Thessalonians4:13 Sanggamte aw
1Thessalonians4:14 Jesu si-in thokik hi
1Thessalonians4:15 Topaʼ thugen note kiangah kong gen uh thu in: Topa hong paikik ni ciangin a nungta lai eite pen a si sa mite tawh i kimuh ma-in Topa tawh i kimu kei ding hi.
1Thessalonians4:16 Pasianʼ thupiakna awging lianpi
1Thessalonians4:17 Tua ciangin tua hun laitakin a nungta lai eite pen vankim lai ah Topa a dawn dingin amah a um a si sa mite tawh hong kilakhawm dinga
1Thessalonians4:18 Tua ahih ciangin note khatlekhat hih thu tawh na kihehnem un.
1Thessalonians5:1 Ahi zongin sanggamte aw
1Thessalonians5:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa hong pai ding Ni pen zan a gutate bangin theih kholh lohin hong tung ding hi
1Thessalonians5:3 Mite in
1Thessalonians5:4 Ahi zongin sanggamte aw
1Thessalonians5:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh note khempeuh
1Thessalonians5:6 Tua ahih ciangin midangte bangin eite mawk om hithiat loin khua phawkin pilvang ni.
1Thessalonians5:7 Zan khuamial pen miteʼ ihmut hithiat hun le zukham hun ahi hi.
1Thessalonians5:8 Ahi zongin eite pen khuavak gamtatna a nei sun khuavak mi ihih manin pilvang ni. Awmdal bangin upna le itna bulhin
1Thessalonians5:9 Pasian in ama hehna a thuak dingin eite a hong teel hi lo a
1Thessalonians5:10 Amah a hong paikik ciangin a hing ihi a
1Thessalonians5:11 Tua ahih manin tu laitakin na om zia uh mah bangin khatlekhat kihanthawnin na kihuh ciat ta un.
1Thessalonians5:12 Sanggamte aw
1Thessalonians5:13 Amauʼ nasepna hangin amaute nakpi takin it bawlin zahtak un. Note khatlekhat kilem takin na om un.
1Thessalonians5:14 Sanggamte aw
1Thessalonians5:15 Gitlohna lamsang kuamah kithuk loin
1Thessalonians5:16 Lungdam tawntungin
1Thessalonians5:17 thu ngen niloh unla
1Thessalonians5:18 bangbang hong piang taleh na lungdamna uh Pasian tungah ko tawntung un. Khris Jesu tawh kipawlin na nuntakna sung uh ah hih bangzia-in na om ding uh Pasian in a hong deih ahi hi.
1Thessalonians5:19 Kha Siangtho nasepna dongtangsak kei unla
1Thessalonians5:20 thuhilhnate simmawh bawl kei un.
1Thessalonians5:21 Thu khempeuh en tel pha unla
1Thessalonians5:22 a sia lamsang peuhmah pelh un.
1Thessalonians5:23 Nopsakna a hong pia Pasian in na khempeuh ah sianthona le kicinna hong pia henla
1Thessalonians5:24 Note a hong sam i Pa Pasian a thutak hi a
1Thessalonians5:25 Sanggamte aw
1Thessalonians5:26 Thu up pih mi khempeuh khatlekhat a siangtho ki-itna lungsim tawh kinamin na kihopih un.
1Thessalonians5:27 Thu um mi khempeuhʼ zak dingin hih lai na sim nadingun Topaʼ min tawh kong thum hi.
1Thessalonians5:28 I Topa Jesu Khris hehpihna thupha note tungah hong tung tahen.
2Thessalonians1:1 Keimah Paul le Silas le Timoti te in: Pasian le Topa Jesu Khris sungah a om
2Thessalonians1:2 Pa Pasian le Topa Jesu Khris in note tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen.
2Thessalonians1:3 Sanggamte aw
2Thessalonians1:4 Bawlsiatna le gimna na thuakna khempeuh uh ah na upna uh khahsuah loin thuak zo paisuak na hih manun midangte kiangah Pasianʼ pawlpi ka na kisialh pih uh hi.
2Thessalonians1:5 Tu-a na thuaknate uh hangin Pasianʼ Ukna sungah a om dingin a kilawm mi suak na hih manun Pasianʼ thukhenna a man ahihna hong kilangsak hi.
2Thessalonians1:6 Pasian in a manin na sem ding ahih manin note a hong gimsak mite tungah Pasian in gimna pia dinga
2Thessalonians1:7 tu-a gimna a thuak note le kote tungah zong nopsakna hong pia ding hi. Vantung panin Topa Jesu le a vanglian a vantung mite
2Thessalonians1:8 Pasian a thei lo mite le i Topa Jesu tawh kisai Lungdamna Thu a um lo mite tungah gimna a tungsak ding hi.
2Thessalonians1:9 Ama mite khempeuh le thu um mite khempeuh hangin minthanna le pahtawina a ngah dingin Topa hong pai Ni ciangin a noptuak mahmah Topaʼ minthanna huam sung panin amaute kihawl khia dinga
2Thessalonians1:10 
2Thessalonians1:11 Tua ahih manin ama hong sapna tawh a kilawm a kituak nuntakna na nuntak theih nading uh le ama vangliatna tawh a hoih na hih nop khempeuh uh hih zo-in
2Thessalonians1:12 Tua hileh
2Thessalonians2:1 Sanggamte aw
2Thessalonians2:2 Topaʼ hong pai ding ni hong tung khinta hi
2Thessalonians2:3 Ahi zongin kuama khem sa-in ta kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh nakpi takin Pasian langpanna lianpi le hell khuk sung a tung ding ahi A Gilopa hong kilat matengin tua Ni hong tung lo ding hi.
2Thessalonians2:4 Tua A Gilopa in miteʼ biak pasian a kici khempeuh le na khempeuh nial gawp ding hi. Tuate khempeuh sangin a lian zaw-in a kingaihsut banah
2Thessalonians2:5 Note tawh ka hong om khawm lai-in hih thute khempeuh hong gen khin ka hih manin na phawk lai ding uh hi.
2Thessalonians2:6 Ahi zongin tu laitakin tua bang a pian loh nadingin a kham khat om ahihna thu na thei uh hi. A hun a tun ciangin A Gilopa hong kilang ding hi.
2Thessalonians2:7 Kuamah kim in a phawk loh Gitloh Gamtatna kigamta khinta a
2Thessalonians2:8 A khamcip pa a kilakkhiat khit ciangin A Gilopa hong kilang dinga
2Thessalonians2:9 Satanʼ vangliatna tawh A Gilopa hong pai-in
2Thessalonians2:10 gitloh khemna a nam tuamtuam zangin
2Thessalonians2:11 Tua ahih manin Pasian in amaute lakah nasem dingin zuau thahatna paisak ahih manin amaute in a man lo thu um uh hi.
2Thessalonians2:12 Tua ahih manin thuman um loin
2Thessalonians2:13 Ahi zongin sanggamte aw
2Thessalonians2:14 Topa Jesu Khris tawh minthanna na ngahkhawm theih nadingun note tungah kong hilh uh Lungdamna Thu tawh hih nopsakna ah Pasian in note a hong sam ahi hi.
2Thessalonians2:15 Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw
2Thessalonians2:16 I Topa Jesu Khris mahmah leh
2Thessalonians2:17 note lungsimah thakhauhna hong guan henla
2Thessalonians3:1 Sanggamte aw
2Thessalonians3:2 Mi khempeuh in thu um nai lo uh ahih manin a gilo a siahuai mite panin Pasian in kote hong hotkhiat nadingin zong hong ngetsak un.
2Thessalonians3:3 Note ahihleh
2Thessalonians3:4 Note kiangah kong gen uh thute a kipat cil a kipanin na zuih uh mah bangin zui paisuak taktak ding
2Thessalonians3:5 Pasian bangin itna nei-in Khris thuak bangin na thuak zawh nadingun Topa in note lungsim hong bawlsak tahen.
2Thessalonians3:6 Sanggamte aw
2Thessalonians3:7 Koteʼ gamtatzia bangin a gamta ding na hihna uh teltakin na thei uh hi. Note tawh ka hong om khawm lai-un ka thadah om kei uh hi.
2Thessalonians3:8 Kuama an a khongin ka ne kei uh hi. Note khat peuhpeuh in nong suplawh khak loh nadingun a sun a zanin hahkat takin na ka sem uh hi.
2Thessalonians3:9 Hih bangin ka gamtatna uh pen noteʼ hong piakte a khongin ne-in a zang dingin a kilawm mah hi napi-in
2Thessalonians3:10 Note tawh ka hong om khawm lai-un
2Thessalonians3:11 Hih bangin thu ka hong genna uh pen note lakah mi pawl khatte thadahin na sem nuam lo uh a
2Thessalonians3:12 Tu-in tua bang mite in kuamah nawngkaisak nawn loin manmanin na sem hiathiatin amauʼ nuntak nadingun na a sep nadingun Topa Jesu Khris min tawh hanthawnin thu kong pia uh hi.
2Thessalonians3:13 Sanggamte aw
2Thessalonians3:14 Hih lai sunga ka hong gente uh a zui nuam lo mi khatpeuh a om leh tua mipa limtakin ciamteh unla
2Thessalonians3:15 Ahi zongin amah galbawl kei unla
2Thessalonians3:16 Eite tungah nopsakna a hong pia thei Topa in note tungah a tawntungin nopsakna hong pia henla
2Thessalonians3:17 Keimah Paul in kong hopih hi
2Thessalonians3:18 I Topa Jesu Khris hong hehpihna thupha note khempeuh tungah hong tung tahen.
1Timothy1:1 Eite a hong Hon Pasian le eiteʼ lamet Khris Jesuʼ thupiakna tawh Khris Jesuʼ sawltak ahi keimah Paul in
1Timothy1:2 Thu upna sungah ka tapa taktak ahi Timoti tungah lai ka hong khak hi. Pa Pasian le eiteʼ Topa Khris Jesu in dikna
1Timothy1:3 Masedonia gam lam manawhin ka pai lai-in Efesa khua ah na om ding ka hong sawl mah bangin tu-in zong tua khua mahah na om lai inla
1Timothy1:4 Phuahtawm tangthute le min tam pipi kizom deudau-a khangsimnate in upna tawh i ngah theih Pasianʼ vaihawmnate tangtungsak loin
1Timothy1:5 Hih bangin thupiakna pen
1Timothy1:6 Mi pawl khatte
1Timothy1:7 Thei kisa ngelin a gen kankan uh thute le amau kampauna mahmah zong bang gen ka hi hiam cih a thei het lo hi napi-in amaute pen Pasianʼ thukhamte a hilh dingin ut zaw lai uh hi.
1Timothy1:8 Thukham pen a kizat nading a kilawm ciangah zang thei lehang a hoih thu khat hi
1Timothy1:9 Ahi zongin i phawk dingah
1Timothy1:10 nulepa mawhna a gamtate
1Timothy1:11 Thuman ka cih pen thupha tawh kidimin a minthang Pasian in ka hilh dingin kei tungah a hong piak Lungdamna Thu ahi hi.
1Timothy1:12 Hih bangin na sep zawh nadingin thatang hatna a hong pia i Topa Khris Jesu tungah ka lungdam hi. Ama nasem dingin kei hong muangin hong seh ahih manin ka nuam hi.
1Timothy1:13 A beisa hunah amah gensia-in
1Timothy1:14 Pasian in gen zawh lohin kei hong hehpih a
1Timothy1:15 Khris Jesu
1Timothy1:16 A mawhnei pha bel ka hihna thu hang mahin
1Timothy1:17 Amah bek Pasian ahi
1Timothy1:18 Ka ta Timoti aw
1Timothy1:19 na upna le lungsim kisuang loin na omna thu kip takin len paisuak in. Mi pawl khatte in a lungsim kitheihna uh ah man a kisakna bangun gamta lo uh ahih manin a thu upna uh a mawkna a suah uh hi.
1Timothy1:20 Tua bang mite lakah Hymenaias le Alexander kihel uh a
1Timothy2:1 A masa penin kong gen nop thu in: Mi khempeuh adingin Pasian tungah ngetna
1Timothy2:2 Eite nuam takin om thei-in
1Timothy2:3 Hih bang gamtatnate pen eite hong Hon Pasianʼ muhna ah a hoih a kilawm thu ahi hi.
1Timothy2:4 Mi khempeuh in hotkhiatna ngahin
1Timothy2:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian khat bek om a
1Timothy2:6 Mi khempeuh a tan khia dingin tua Jesu hong kipiatawm a
1Timothy2:7 Hih ka gen thu pen zuau ahi lo
1Timothy2:8 Mun khempeuh ah a om pasal khempeuh in kuamah tawh kitotna le lungsim kinopmawhna nei het loin
1Timothy2:9 Tua mah bangin numeite zong a kilawm a kituak bekin kizemin kipuahin
1Timothy2:10 biakna lungsim neite adingin a kilawm ahih mah bangin gamtat hoih a neih ding uh ka deih hi.
1Timothy2:11 Numeite in gamdai takin kiniamkhiatna tawh thu ngai-in a sin ding uh ahi hi.
1Timothy2:12 Numeite in pasalte tungah aana nei-in thu a hilh ding ka phal kei hi. Gamdai takin a om ding uh ahi hi.
1Timothy2:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh a masa-in Adam kipiangsak a
1Timothy2:14 Adam in khemna thuak masa lo a
1Timothy2:15 Ahi zongin numei in a kilawm a kituakin upna
1Timothy3:1 Mi khatpeuh
1Timothy3:2 Tua ahih manin siate pen paubaanna a nei lo mi
1Timothy3:3 zu a kham lo mi
1Timothy3:4 A innkuan sung hoihtakin a uk zo mi
1Timothy3:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khatpeuh in a innkuan sung uk zia ding a theih kei leh Pasianʼ pawlpi kem thei lo ding hi.
1Timothy3:6 Khristian a suaktungte zong hi lo ding hi. Tua bang mi thakte kiphasak thei a
1Timothy3:7 Pawlpi mi ahi lo midangte in zong a zahtak mite hi ding hi. Tua hileh mindai kha lo dinga
1Timothy3:8 Pawlpi upa dingte zong a gamtat hoih
1Timothy3:9 Lungsim kisuanna a om lo
1Timothy3:10 A masa-in kize-et phot dinga
1Timothy3:11 A zite uh zong a gamtat hoih mi hi-in
1Timothy3:12 Upate pen zi khat bek a nei mi
1Timothy3:13 Pawlpi upa hoihtakin a sem thei mite pen mite in zahtak uh a
1Timothy3:14 Nang kiangah hong pai-in nang tawh kimu baih ding cih lametna tawh hih lai a hong gelh ka hi hi.
1Timothy3:15 Ahi zongin ka hong zekai khak zenzen leh thuman thutak khuampi le bulpi
1Timothy3:16 I biakna pen a thuthuk a thu lian taktak ahihna thu hih bangin i thei hi: Mihing lim pua-in amah hong kilang a
1Timothy4:1 Nidang ciangin a upna panun mi pawl khat pialin
1Timothy4:2 Tua bang zuau thuhilhnate pen zuau genin mi a khem
1Timothy4:3 Tua bang mite in zi neih le pasal neih ding le an pawl khat nek ding hoih lo hi
1Timothy4:4 Pasianʼ bawl sa na khempeuh a hoih hi a
1Timothy4:5 Pasianʼ thu le thungetna hang tawh tuate a hoih a suak ahi hi.
1Timothy4:6 Nang in na zuih sa upna thu le thuhilhna man na zuih kawmin hih ka hong thugente
1Timothy4:7 Pasianʼ thu tawh a kituak lo
1Timothy4:8 Pumpi kisekin kisinna manpha hi. Ahi zongin kha thu ah kisekin kisinna pen tu hun laitak le a hong tung ding hunah nuntakna hong pia thei ahih manin manpha zaw lai hi
1Timothy4:9 ci-a kigen pen a man taktak thu hi a
1Timothy4:10 A diakdiakin ei thu umte in mi khempeuh a Hon khia
1Timothy4:11 Ka hong gen sa thute na hilh sawn in.
1Timothy4:12 Khangno lai na hihna thu hangin miteʼ simmawh dingin na om kei inla
1Timothy4:13 Kei ka hong pai matengin mipi mai ah Lai Siangtho simna
1Timothy4:14 Kamsangteʼ thugennate le upate in na tungah a khut uh nga-in thu hong ngetsakna ahi nangma hih theih siamnate na valkhongsak kei in.
1Timothy4:15 Mi khempeuh in na khantohna hong muh theih nadingin hih thute limtakin ngaihsun inla
1Timothy4:16 Na gamtatna le na thuhilhnate ah hoihtakin kidawmin om lecin nangmah a kipan na thugen a za mite adingin phattuamna om ding ahih manin na nasepna ah hoihtakin om in.
1Timothy5:1 Nang sangin a u zaw mite taii bawl kei inla
1Timothy5:2 Nang sangin a u zaw numeite na nu bangin bawl inla
1Timothy5:3 Meigong taktak ahi numeite zahtak bawl in.
1Timothy5:4 Meigong numei khatpeuh in tate ahi a
1Timothy5:5 A kem a khoi ding a om lo meigong taktak ahi numeite in Pasian bek mah muan le suanin nei-in
1Timothy5:6 Ahi zongin a pumpi uh deihna zui-in a gamta meigong numeite pen a pumpi uh a nuntak hangin kha thu ah a si khin ahi uh hi.
1Timothy5:7 Amaute paubaanna a om loh nadingin hih ka hong thupiak sate amaute tungah gen sawn in.
1Timothy5:8 Mi khatpeuh in a beh a phung

2Timothy1:1 Khris Jesu tawh i kipawlna hangin hong kipia ding nuntakna thu a gen dingin Pasianʼ deihna tawh Khris Jesuʼ sawltak nasep a sem dingin a hong kisawl keimah Paul in
2Timothy1:2 Ka it ka ta Timoti tungah lai ka hong khak hi. Pa Pasian le i Topa Khris Jesu in dikna
2Timothy1:3 A sun a zanin ka thungetna ah nang ka hong phawk tawntung a
2Timothy1:4 Na khitui luannate phawk ka hih manin ka lung a dam theih nadingin nang tawh kimu nuamin a sun a zanin ka ngaihsun tawntung hi.
2Timothy1:5 Na pi Lois le na nu Eunis in a neih upna bangte pawl mah
2Timothy1:6 Tua ahih manin nang tungah ka khut nga-in thu ka hong ngetsak lai-in nangma tungah Pasian in hong piak siamna na sosuah nadingin ka hong phawksak hi.
2Timothy1:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in eite tungah meidawina lungsim hong guan lo a
2Timothy1:8 Tua ahih manin i Topaʼ thu gen nading thu ah ahi a
2Timothy1:9 Eiteʼ sep zawhna hang hi loin ama ngimna sa bang leh a dikna hangin Pasian in eite hong hon khia-in ama mi dingin a hong sam hi. Pasian in leitung a pianmapekin Khris Jesu tungtawnin tua dikna a hong piak hi a
2Timothy1:10 tu hun ciangin eite hong Honpa Khris Jesu tungtawnin a dikna hong langsak ta hi. Tua Jesu in sihna beisak a
2Timothy1:11 Hih a thak Lungdamna Thu hilhin a taangko ding le sawltak na a sem dingin kei a hong kikoih ahi hi.
2Timothy1:12 Tua ahih manin hih bang teng a thuak ka hi hi. Ahi zongin ka up pa ka thei a
2Timothy1:13 Keima tung panin na zak sa a man thute zui inla
2Timothy1:14 Eite sungah a hong teeng Kha Siangtho in a hong ap thuhoihte limtakin kem in.
2Timothy1:15 Na theih sa bangin Asia gam sunga om mi khempeuh in kei hong nusia uh a
2Timothy1:16 Onesiforas in tam veipi kei hong lungnuamsak ahih manin Pasian in a innkuan bupun hehpihna thupha pia tahen. Ka thongkiatna hangin amah maizum lo a
2Timothy1:17 Rom khua hong tun ciangin kei hong muh matengin hong zong pah hi.
2Timothy1:18 Topa in tua Ni ciangin ama tungah hehpihna thupha pia tahen. Efesa khua ah ka om lai-in nakpi takin kei a hong huhnate khempeuh na theih sa ahi hi.
2Timothy2:1 Ka ta aw

2Timothy2:4 Galkap a sem lai mipa in ama tungah a om bupa a lungkimsak theih nadingin na sem ahih manin tualsung miteʼ nasep tawh thuah khawm lo hi.
2Timothy2:5 Kimawl kidemna ah a kihel mi khatpeuh in kimawlna ngeina zui lopi-in gualzawh pahtawina ngah thei lo hi.

2Timothy2:7 Topa in thu khempeuh na theih nadingin hong huh ding ahih manin hih ka thugente khempeuh limtakin na ngaihsun in.

2Timothy2:9 Ama hangin a kingah Lungdamna Thu ka hilh manin gimna ka thuak a

2Timothy2:13 Amah le amah kikhem thei lo ahih manin eite i citak kei zongin amah citak veve ding hi
2Timothy2:14 Na mite thu kinialin a kitot loh nadingun Pasianʼ mai ah thupi takin na hilh khol in. Tua bang thu kinialna in a za mite phattuamna ngahsak loin a siasak bek ahi hi.

2Timothy3:9 Ahi zongin Jannes le Jambres-te tungah a piang sa thu mah bangin mi khempeuh in amauteʼ haina mu ding uh ahih manin a nasepna uh sau tung khol lo ding hi.

2Timothy4:1 Pasianʼ mai le a hingte hitaleh a site hitaleh mi khempeuhʼ thu a khen ding Khris Jesuʼ mai ah nakpi takin ka hong hanthawn hi. Amah Kumpi-in hong paikikin ukna hong kipan ding ahih manin
2Timothy4:2 hunhoih hunsia cih khen tuan loin Pasianʼ thu hilh ding na kin ngaihsut nading
2Timothy4:3 Mite in thuman a ngaih nop loh hun
2Timothy4:4 Amaute in thuman thutak ngai nuam nawn loin tangthu phuahtawm peuh ngaihsutpi-in nei ding uh hi.
2Timothy4:5 Ahi zongin nang na hih leh thu khempeuh ah na lungsim ki-ukin haksatnate na thuak inla
2Timothy4:6 Kei ka hih leh Pasian biakna-in hong kipiak ding hun hong tung ta hi. Hih leitung nuntakna ka nusiat ding hun hi ta hi.
2Timothy4:7 Kidemna ah ka hat tawpin ka hih khin a
2Timothy4:8 Thu a manin a khen Topa in tua Ni ciangin kei a hong piak ding thuman lukhu ahi gualzawhna thaman in tu-in kei hong ngak gige hi. Kei tung bekah a hong pia ding hi lo a
2Timothy4:9 Kei kiangah na hong pai baih theih nadingin hong hanciam in.
2Timothy4:10 Demas in hih leitung thu kin zaw ahih manin kei hong nusia-in Thesalonika khua ah a pai hi. Kresen
2Timothy4:11 Luka bek kei kiangah om hi. Marka in nasepna ah nakpi takin hong huh thei ahih manin na hong pai ciangin amah hong tonpih in.
2Timothy4:12 Tikhikas ahihleh Efesa khua ah ka paisak khin hi.
2Timothy4:13 Na hong pai ciangin Troas khua ah Karpas kiang a ka nusiat ka puan tualpi hong pua inla
2Timothy4:14 Sikseek pa Alexander in kei tungah siatna lianpi hong bawl hi. Ama gamtatna tawh kizui-in Topa in thuk ding hi.
2Timothy4:15 Amah in i thuhilhna nakpi takin nial ahih manin amah tawh kisai ah nangma pumpi kidawm mahmah in.
2Timothy4:16 Keimah kihut nading thu ka gen masak ni-in kuamah in hong kop pih loin hong taisan mang uh hi. Tua thu hangin mawhsakna thuak kei beek uh hen!

Philemon1:1 Khris Jesu hangin thong a kia keimah Paul le i sanggampa Timoti in
Philemon1:2 le na inn ah a hong kikhawm pawlpite le i sanggamnu Apfia le thu upna ah galkap khawm pih Arkhippas te tungah lai ka hong khak uh hi.
Philemon1:3 I Pa Pasian le Topa Jesu Khris in note tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen.
Philemon1:4 Pasianʼ mite khempeuh na itna thu le Topa Jesu na upna thu na za khin ka hih manin Pasian kiangah thu ka nget simin nangmah hong phawkin Pasian tungah lungdamna thu ka ko tawntung hi.
Philemon1:5

Philemon1:7 Sanggam aw

Philemon1:9 Hih bangin ka hong genna pen itna i neihna hang ahi hi. Tu laitakin Khris taangmi ahi keimah Paul zong
Philemon1:10 Tua ahih manin Khris hangin ka ta ahi Onesimas adingin ka hong thumsak hi. Thong sungah ka om sungun kha thu tawh kisai ah ama pa ka suak hi.
Philemon1:11 Nidangin nang adingin amah a kimanna bangmah om lo a
Philemon1:12 Keima pumpi zahin ngaihsutna tawh nang kiangah amah ka hong puakkik hi.
Philemon1:13 Lungdamna Thu hangin thongkia-in ka om sungin nangma tangin kei a hong huh dingin ka kiangah ka omsak nuam hi.
Philemon1:14 Ahi zongin nangma nasep hoihna pen keima hong kalh hi loin nangma uttawmna tawh na sep a suah theih nadingin nangma lungkimna om masa lopi-in bangmah ka hih nuam kei hi.
Philemon1:15 A tawntungin nang kiangah amah hong om paisuak theih nadingin tawl khat sung nang kiang panin Onesimas a paikhia zong hi kha thei ding hi.
Philemon1:16 Tu-in amah sal bek hi nawn loin sal sangin a thupi zaw
Philemon1:17 Tua ahih manin nasepna ah pawl khat taktakin kei na hong ngaihsut nakleh kei na hong limbawl ding zahin amah na lim bawl in.
Philemon1:18 Nang tungah hong khialh a
