Hebrews2:1 Tua ahih manin i zak sa thuman thutakte i khahsuah khak loh nadingin kiptak kho takin i letkip ding kisam hi.
Hebrews2:2 Vantung mite in hong gen thute thuman hi a
Hebrews2:3 Tua ahih manin a thupi mahmah hih hotkhiatna thudon loin i om leh suahtakna om thei ngei lo ding hi. A masa-in Topa mahmah in hotkhiatna thu hong pulak a
Hebrews2:4 Amauteʼ thugenna banah Pasian in vangliatna lim le nalamdang a tuamtuamte bawlna tawh hong gen beh lai hi. Tua banah ama hoihsak bangin Pasian in Kha Siangtho zong hong hawm lai hi.
Hebrews2:5 Eite in gen belin i neih a hong tung ding leitung pen Pasian in vantung miteʼ khut sungah koih lo hi.
Hebrews2:6 Lai Siangtho mun khat ah a kigenna ah
Hebrews2:7 Ahi zongin vantung mite sangin a neu zaw deuhin na bawl a
Hebrews2:8 na khempeuh na uksak hi
Hebrews2:9 Ahi zongin Pasianʼ hehpihna hangin mi khempeuh adingin Jesu a sih theih nadingin tawl khat sung vantung mite sangin a neu zaw-in a kibawlna i mu a
Hebrews2:10 Na khempeuh ama adingin a piangsak Pasian in tate tampi minthanna a ngahsak theih nadingin a thuakna tawh hotkhiatna thu ah a makai dingin Jesu a bawl ding a kilawm mah ahi hi.
Hebrews2:11 Mawhna panin mite a siangthosak pa le sianthosakna a ngah mite in
Hebrews2:12 “Pasian aw
Hebrews2:13 tua ciangin
Hebrews2:14 Tate a cih mite pen leitung cilesa a nei mite ahih manin
Hebrews2:15 Tua ahih manin sihna a kihtak manin sal bangin a om mite amah in hong suaktasak hi.
Hebrews2:16 Ama lunghihmawh pen vantung mite hi lo a
Hebrews2:17 Tua ahih manin mihingteʼ mawhna a kimaisak theih nadingin Pasianʼ na a sepna ah mite adingin hehpihna le cihtakna tawh Siampi Lianpen a suah theih nadingin a sanggamte tawh a kibangin mihing lim a hong puak ding a kisam ahi hi.
Hebrews2:18 Ama pumpi mahmah in ze-etna le gimna thuak ahih manin tu hun ciangin tua bang a thuakte a hong huh thei hi.
Hebrews3:1 Tua ahih manin Pasianʼ sapna a ngah mi siangthote aw
Hebrews3:2 Pasianʼ inn sungah na a sepna ah Moses a cihtak mah bangin hih siampi nasep a sem dingin a seh Pasianʼ tungah Jesu a citak hi.
Hebrews3:3 Ahi zongin inn a lam pa pen a inn sangin a minthan zawk mah bangin Moses sangin Jesu pahtawi zawk ding ahi hi.
Hebrews3:4 Inn khempeuh a lam na om ciat sam a
Hebrews3:5 Moses pen nasem khat hihna tawh Pasianʼ inn sungah thu khempeuh ah citak a
Hebrews3:6 Ahi zongin Khris pen Pasianʼ inn sung a uk Tapa ahihna tawh a citak ahi hi. I lametna thu tawh kisai-in lungsim hanna le muanna tawh i omsuak nakleh eite pen Pasianʼ inn ihi hi.
Hebrews3:7 Tua ahih ciangin Lai Siangtho sungah
Hebrews3:8 gamlak ah na om lai-un amah ze-etin
Hebrews3:9 Na pu na pate un kum sawm li sung ka nasepnate mu napi-in kei hong ze-et veve uh hi.
Hebrews3:10 Tua ahih manin amaute tungah ka heh a
Hebrews3:11 Ka heh manin ka kiciam a
Hebrews3:12 Sanggamte aw
Hebrews3:13 Lai Siangtho in
Hebrews3:14 A kipat tungin i neih lungmuanna kip takin i let ciat nakleh i vekpi-in Khris tawh pawl khat ihi hi.
Hebrews3:15 Lai Siangtho in
Hebrews3:16 Pasianʼ aw za napi-in amah a lehdo kuate ahi hiam? Moses in Egypt gam panin a paikhiatpih mi khempeuh ahi uh hi.
Hebrews3:17 Kum sawm li sung kuate tungah Pasian heh ahi hiam? Mawhna bawlin
Hebrews3:18 Thupi takin Pasian kiciamin
Hebrews3:19 Tua ahih manin a up lohna uh hangin tawlngakna munah a lut zawh lohna uh i thei hi.
Hebrews4:1 Ahi zongin tu-in eite va pai-in amah tawh i tawlngak khawm theih nadingin Pasian in thuciam hong nusiat khin ahih manin tua tawlngakna munah a lut lah na suahkhak loh nadingun lau-in kidawm ni.
Hebrews4:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Lungdamna Thu a zak uh mah bangin eite in zong i za hi. Amaute in Lungdamna Thu a zak uh ciangin upna tawh na sang lo uh ahih manin a thu zak uh amaute adingin a phattuamna om lo hi.
Hebrews4:3 Ahi zongin eite ihih leh amah in
Hebrews4:4 Lai Siangtho mun khat ah
Hebrews4:5 Hih thu mah na kigenkik a
Hebrews4:6 Lungdamna Thu a za masate in um lo uh ahih manin Pasian tawh va tawlnga khawm thei lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin va pai-in Pasian tawh a tawlnga khawm ding mi pawl khat om lai hi.
Hebrews4:7 “Tu ni
Hebrews4:8 Joshua in Pasianʼ tawlngakna munah mite tunpih khin hileh Pasian in a nidang khat thu nung gen nawn lo ding hi.
Hebrews4:9 Tua ahih manin tu-a thu om zia ah ci lehang ni sagih ni-in Pasian a tawlngak mah bangin Pasianʼ mite a tawlngak nading om lai hi.
Hebrews4:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh a nasepna panin Pasian a tawlngak mah bangin va pai-in Pasian tawh a tawlngate khempeuh zong a nasepna panun khawl ding uh hi.
Hebrews4:11 Tua ahih manin amaute in a up loh manun Pasianʼ tawlngakna munah a lut zawh loh uh bang hi loin va pai-in Pasian tawh i tawlngak khawm theih nadingin hanciam ciat ni.
Hebrews4:12 Pasianʼ thu nungta-in a gamtang hi a
Hebrews4:13 Pasianʼ mai ah seelcip theih ding bangmah om lo hi. Eite khempeuh i din nading paʼ mai ah a kipiangsak na khempeuh a kiliah a ki-im thei om loin kimu sinsen hi.
Hebrews4:14 Tua ahih manin eite in Pasianʼ omna vantung a va tung khin sa
Hebrews4:15 Eiteʼ neih Siampi Lianpen pa in i ginat lohna ah eite a hong hehpih thei lo ding hi lo hi; eite mah bangin ze-etna khempeuh a thuak hi a
Hebrews4:16 Tua ahih manin a kisap hunin
Hebrews5:1 Siampi lianpen ahi peuhpeuh mipa pen a miteʼ mawhna hangin Pasianʼ tungah biakna le letsong a piaksak dingin ama mipihte lak panin kiteelin nasep a kiguan ahi hi.
Hebrews5:2 Amah zong lam tampi ah a gina lo thei mi mah ahih manin thu thei lo mite le a khial mite tungah lungnem takin na sem thei hi.
Hebrews5:3 Amah zong mi ginalo mi mah ahih manin miteʼ mawhna hangin biakna a pia hi bek loin ama mawhna mahmah hangin zong biakna a pia ahi hi.
Hebrews5:4 Tua bangin pahtawina a nei siampi lianpen nasep pen a sem dingte amau utthu tawh a kisehtawm mawk hi lo hi; siampi lianpen a sem dingin a mahmah a kisehtawm hi lo a
Hebrews5:5 Tua mah bangin Khris zong
Hebrews5:6 Mun dang khat ah zong
Hebrews5:7 Leitungah mihingin Jesu a om lai-in sihna panin amah a hon khia thei ding Pasian tungah thu ngenin khitui naptui tawh thumin na kiko hi.
Hebrews5:8 Amah
Hebrews5:9 Tua bangin a cingtaak mi a suah khit ciangin ama thu a mang mite khempeuh adingin tawntung hotkhiatna a kipatna hong suak a
Hebrews5:10 Melkhizedek gui zui-in siampi lianpen dingin Pasian in a bawl hi.
Hebrews5:11 Hih thu tawh kisai-in i gen ding tampi a om hangin note in thu thei hak mahmah na hih manun i gen tel theih nading haksa hi.
Hebrews5:12 Tu-in note pen midang a hilh dingin sia na suah theih ding uh hun hi khin napi-in note mahmah pen Pasianʼ thu a bulpite hilh ding na kisam lai uh hi. Antak ne thei nai loin nawi bek a ne thei lai na hi uh hi.
Hebrews5:13 Nawi bek a ne laite pen naungek ahih manin a man le a man lo thu bangmah phawk thei nai lo uh hi.
Hebrews5:14 Ahi zongin antak i cih pen a sia le a pha a khen thei
Hebrews6:1 Tua ahih manin Khris thu a kipat cilna lelte nusia-in a thuthuk zawte ngaihsutin nei ni. Bangmahin a kimang lo nasepnate nusiat ding
Hebrews6:2 tuiphumna le khut ngakna thu
Hebrews6:3 Eite in mainawt ni. Pasian in hong thukimpih ahih nakleh i mainawt ding ahi hi.
Hebrews6:4 A tawpkik khin sate a kisikkik nadingin kibawl zo lo hi. Pasianʼ khuavak sungah amaute om khinin
Hebrews6:5 Pasianʼ thu a hoihna phawk khinin
Hebrews6:6 amaute a tawpkik leh
Hebrews6:7 A tungah a kia guahtuite hupin
Hebrews6:8 Ahi zongin tua leitang in lingkungte le sialtalling kungte hong posak leh Pasian in samsia-in
Hebrews6:9 Lawm itte aw
Hebrews6:10 Pasian
Hebrews6:11 Note khat ciatʼ lametna thu hong tun taktak theih nadingin a tawp dongin lawpin na thanop paisuak nading uh ka hong deihsak pha uh hi.
Hebrews6:12 Note thadah loin upna le lungduaina a nei mite bangin
Hebrews6:13 Pasian in Abrahamʼ tungah thu a ciam ciangin a tunsak takpi ding bek thu a ciam hi. Thu a ciam ciangin zong amah sangin a lian zaw kuamah om nawn lo ahih manin ama min tawh thu ciam a
Hebrews6:14 “Nang thupha hong pia-in suanlekhak tampi a nei dingin ka hong ciam hi
Hebrews6:15 Abraham in lungduai takin na ngak ahih manin Pasianʼ thuciam a ngah hi.
Hebrews6:16 Mi khat peuhpeuh in thu a ciam ciangin amah sangin a lian zaw khatʼ min tawh kiciam ahih manin
Hebrews6:17 Pasian in ama geelnasa a kheel ngei het lo ding ahihna thu a thuciamna a ngah ding mite tungah teltakin theisak nuam ahih manin a thuciam banah kiciamna khat a bawl lai hi.
Hebrews6:18 Tua hi a
Hebrews6:19 I lungsim a hong kipsak dingin tu-a bang lametna a nei ihi hi. Tua i lametna kician mahmah a
Hebrews6:20 Tua lai munah eiteʼ tangin Jesu na ma tun khinta a
Hebrews7:1 Abraham in a galsimna ah kumpite thatin gualzo-in a hong ciah ciangin A Lianpen Pasianʼ siampi ahih banah Jerusalem khua kumpi zong ahi Melkhizedek in Abraham na dawnin thupha a pia hi.
Hebrews7:2 Abraham in a na ngah khempeuh sung panin Melkhizedek tungah sawm-ah-khat a pia hi. Melkhizedek min a khiatna in
Hebrews7:3 Melkhizedekʼ pa le a nu a kipanin a suahna thu
Hebrews7:4 Tua ahih manin bangzah takin mi lian ahihna thu na thei uh hi. I pupi Abraham nangawn in zong gal sungah a ngah nate sung panin ama tungah sawm-ah-khat na pia hi.
Hebrews7:5 Levi suanlekhak sung panin siampi a sem mite pen Abrahamʼ suanlekhak mah hi napi-in
Hebrews7:6 Ahi zongin Melkhizedek ahihleh Leviʼ suanlekhak hi lo napi-in Abrahamʼ tung panin sawm-ah-khat na la-in thuciamna a ngah mipa zong thupha a na pia lai hi.
Hebrews7:7 A lian zawte in a neu zawte thupha a na piakna pen a man thu hi a
Hebrews7:8 Siampiteʼ lakna tawh kisai-in ahihleh a si thei mi mah ahi siampite in mite tung panin sawm-ah-khat a la uh hi. Ahi zongin Melkhizedekʼ lakna tawh kisai-in ahihleh Lai Siangtho in a gen mah bangin a nungta tawntung mipa in sawm-ah-khat a la ahi hi.
Hebrews7:9 Abraham in Melkhizedek tungah sawm-ah-khat a piak ciangin ama suan Levi in zong ama pupi Abraham tungtawnin a pia mah kici thei hi.
Hebrews7:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Melkhizedek in Abraham a na dawn laitakin Levi suak nai lo ahih manin a pupi Abrahamʼ sung mahah a om lai ahi hi.
Hebrews7:11 Israel mite in Leviʼ suanlekhak siampite tungtawnin Thukham ngah uh hi. Leviʼ suanlekhak siampiteʼ nasepna kicingtaak hileh Melkhizedek siampi nam zui-in siampi namdang a pian ding kisam nawn lo dinga
Hebrews7:12 Siampi nam kikheel ahih manin a thukham zong a kikheel ding kisam hi.
Hebrews7:13 Hih bang thute a kigenna i Topa pen a namtuam khat hi a
Hebrews7:14 I Topa pen Judah suan sung panin a piang ahih manin Moses in siampi thu a na gen ciangin hih Judah minam genin na nei lo hi.
Hebrews7:15 Melkhizedek tawh a kibang siampi namtuam khat hong pian ciangin hih thu hong kitel pha semsem hi.
Hebrews7:16 Amah pen mihingteʼ bawl ngeina zui-in siampi a suak hi lo a
Hebrews7:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in
Hebrews7:18 Ngeina lui pen gina loin
Hebrews7:19 Moses Thukham ahi ngeina lui in a cingtaaksak zawh bangmah om lo ahih manin eite in Pasian i naih theih nading lametna ahi ngeina thak hong kithun hi.
Hebrews7:20 Tua banah Pasianʼ kiciamna zong hong om lai hi. Midangte siampi-in a kibawl laitakin tua bang kiciamna na om lo hi.
Hebrews7:21 Ahi zongin Pasian in Jesu kiangah
Hebrews7:22 Hih bangin a kilamdang diakin a kibawlna in Jesu pen kiciamna hoih zaw ahihna thu hong kilangsak hi.
Hebrews7:23 A kilamdanna a dang khat in: Siampi dangte pen si thei-in a nasep zom paisuak thei lo ahih manin a mi malin tampi pha uh hi.
Hebrews7:24 Ahi zongin Jesu nungta tawntung ahih manin midang tungah a nasep ki-ap nawn loin a mahmah in siampi nasep sem paisuak hi.
Hebrews7:25 Tua hi a
Hebrews7:26 Tua bangin a siangtho
Hebrews7:27 Siampi lianpen dangte in nisimin amauʼ mawhna hangin biakna pia masa-in
Hebrews7:28 Moses Thukham in siampi lianpen a sem dingin cingtaakna a nei thei lo mihing mah na seh a
Hebrews8:1 Tu-in i gen nop thu pen hih bang ahi hi: Vantungah Pasianʼ tokhom tak lamah a tu tua bang Siampi Lianpen khat a nei ihi hi.
Hebrews8:2 Amah in
Hebrews8:3 Pasian tungah letsong a tuamtuamte a pia ding le ganhing tawh biakna a pia dingin siampi lianpen a sem peuhpeuhte a kiseh ahih mah bangin eiteʼ Siampi Lianpen pa in zong bang khat teitei a piak ding kisam hi.
Hebrews8:4 Jew Thukham tawh kizui-in Pasian tungah letsongte a pia ding siampite om khinta ahih manin leitungah Jesu a om lai hileh siampi hi thei het lo ding hi.
Hebrews8:5 Leitung a siampiteʼ sepsepte pen vantungah a om thu
Hebrews8:6 Tua ahih manin Pasian le mite kikalah Jesu in a bawl thuciamna pen na a hoih zaw piak nading thuciamna ahih mah bangin Jesu tungah a kipia siampi nasep pen siampi dang khempeuhteʼ sep sangin a lian zaw ahi hi.
Hebrews8:7 Thuciamna a masa kimang thei hileh thuciamna a nihna kisam nawn lo ding hi.
Hebrews8:8 Tua ahih manin Pasian in ama mite mawhsakna thu na gen a
Hebrews8:9 Egypt gam panin a paikhiatpih dingin a pu a pate uh ka khut tawh ka kaih lai a
Hebrews8:10 Ahi zongin tu-in Israel mite tawh ka bawl ding thuciamna hih bang ahi hi. Amaute sungah ka thukham ka guang dinga
Hebrews8:11 A neu pen pan a lianpen dongin mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh ahih manin ‘Topa thei in
Hebrews8:12 A mawhna a khialhna uh ah amaute ka hehpih dinga
Hebrews8:13 Pasian in thuciamna thak a gen ciangin thu ciamna lui pen a bei-in a seh ahi hi. Tua a bei thuciamna pen a maimang ta ahi hi.
Hebrews9:1 A masa thuciamna nangawn in biak zia ding le biak nading mun tawh kisai ngeina na nei tei sam hi.
Hebrews9:2 Puanbuk khat kibawl a
Hebrews9:3 Tua Siangtho Mun a kideina zomah Siangtho Pen Mun a kici a dei dang khat om leuleu hi.
Hebrews9:4 Tua sungah paknamtui hal nading kham kibawl biakna tau le kham tawh a kizut Thuciamna Singkuang om hi. Tua Thuciamna Singkuang sungah manna anlum a kikoihna kham beel
Hebrews9:5 Tua Thuciamna Singkuang tung sanah Pasianʼ ompihna lim ahi kherub nihte om a
Hebrews9:6 Hih bang tengin a kibawl khit ciangin a dei pua nung sungah nisim a nasep uh a sem dingin siampite a lut hi.
Hebrews9:7 Ahi zongin a dei sung nung sungah Siampi Lianpen pa bek kum khatin khatvei pai a
Hebrews9:8 A pua nung inn dei a om lai teng a sung nung ahi
Hebrews9:9 Hih bang om zia pen tu hun lai thu a lahna ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian tungah a kipia letsongte le ganhing tawh biaknate in a bia miteʼ lungsim siangsak zo lo hi.
Hebrews9:10 Zu le an le pumpi siansuahna ngeina tuamtuamte hi bek a
Hebrews9:11 Ahi zongin tu-in a hoih zaw thu a sem ding Siampi Lianpen Khris hong tung khinta a
Hebrews9:12 Siangtho Pen Mun ah a tawntungin a kimang dingin khatvei bek Khris a va lut ciangin biakpiak nadingin keel sisan le bawng no sisante va keng loin ama sisan va keng a
Hebrews9:13 Keel sisan
Hebrews9:14 tawntung Kha Siangtho hangin Pasian tungah a cingtaak biakpiak nadingin Khris in a piak ama sisan in na tam sem khia zo zaw dinga
Hebrews9:15 Thuciamna masa in a huam khak mite
Hebrews9:16 Mi khat in a sih khit ciangin a gamhluah dingin a deih pa lai-in ciamtehin a koih leh a laibawl pa a sih phot ding kisam hi.
Hebrews9:17 A laibawl pa a hin lai teng tua lai kizang thei lo a
Hebrews9:18 Tua mah bangin thuciamna masa zong sisan a kizat ciangin thu suak thei pan hi.
Hebrews9:19 Moses in zong mite tungah Thukham sunga om thute a piak lai-in bawng no sisan
Hebrews9:20 “Pasian in note tungah a hong piak thuciamna sisan ahi hi
Hebrews9:21 Tua banah Moses in Biakbuk le biakna-in a kizang a sunga na om khempeuh zong sisan a theh hi.
Hebrews9:22 Thukham kizatna sungah na khempeuh sisan tawh kisiansuah a
Hebrews9:23 A taktak ahi lo vantung limte pen hih bangin siansuahna kibawl hi. Ahi zongin vantung nate in hih sangin a hoih zaw biakpiakna kisam hi.
Hebrews9:24 Tua ahih manin a lim ahi mihingteʼ bawl Siangtho Mun sungah Jesu pai lo a
Hebrews9:25 Kum simin Siangtho Pen Munah Jew Siampi Lian pente amauʼ sisan ahi lo
Hebrews9:26 Tua bangin va pai zelzel hileh leitung piancil a kipanin a va thuak zelzel ding ahi hi. Ahi zongin amah biakna-in a va kipiakna hangin a kimang paisuak a suah theih nadingin mawhmaisak nadingin hun bei kuan ciangin amah khatvei a va kipia hi.
Hebrews9:27 Mi khempeuh khatvei si-in
Hebrews9:28 mi tampiteʼ mawhna a thuak dingin Khris zong khatvei bek a kipia hi. A nih veina hong kilatkik ciangin mawhna thu tawh kisai nasem ding hi nawn loin
Hebrews10:1 Jew Thukham pen mailam hunah a taktak a hong tung ding lim lah kholhna hi bek ahih manin tua Thukham tawh kizui-in a kum a kumin a kipia biakpiakna in Pasian kiang a zuan mite mi cingtaak suah zo ngei lo hi.
Hebrews10:2 Thukham zui-in Pasian a bia mite in mawhna panin siansuahna ngah zo uh hileh a lungsim uh ah kisuanna lungsim om nawn lo ding ahih manin biakpiakna piak kikkik kul nawn lo ding hi.
Hebrews10:3 Tua ahih manin biakpiakna a kipiak simin a kumkumin mite a mawhna uh a kiphawksak kikkik ahi hi.
Hebrews10:4 Tua hi a
Hebrews10:5 Tua ahih manin leitungah Khris hong pai ciangin Pasian kiangah
Hebrews10:6 Meihal biakna le mawhmaisak nadingin biaknate tawh nang na lungkim kei hi.
Hebrews10:7 Tua ahih manin
Hebrews10:8 “Ganhing le khawh sa tawh biakna na deih kei a
Hebrews10:9 tua banah
Hebrews10:10 Pasianʼ deihna bangin Jesu Khris gamta a
Hebrews10:11 Jew siampite nisimin a nasepna uh munah dingin a kibang biakpiakna mah pia niloh uh a
Hebrews10:12 Ahi zongin Khris in mawhna hangin khatvei a piak khit ciangin a tawntung adingin kimang ahih manin Pasianʼ taklam ah tu hithiat a
Hebrews10:13 Pasian in ama khe nuai ah a galte khempeuh a koihsak nading hun ngakin a om hi.
Hebrews10:14 Mawhna panin a sianthosak mite
Hebrews10:15 Kha Siangtho in zong hih thu hong theih pih ahih manin
Hebrews10:16 “Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Mailam hunah amaute tawh thuciamna khat ka bawl dinga
Hebrews10:17 “Amauteʼ mawhna le a gitloh gamtatnate uh ka ciamteh nawn kei ding hi
Hebrews10:18 Tua hi a
Hebrews10:19 Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw
Hebrews10:20 Ama pumpi mahmah ahi dalna puan tawnin nuntakna lampi ah i pai theih nadingin amah in lampi thak hong honsak hi.
Hebrews10:21 Pasianʼ inn sung a uk siampi lianpen zong i nei hi.
Hebrews10:22 Tua ahih manin mawhna thu ah kisuanna lungsim om nawn loin
Hebrews10:23 Pasian in piak dingin a hong ciam thu muang ngam ihih manin i lametna thu kip takin len ni.
Hebrews10:24 Khatlekhat ki-itin a hoih nate i sep nadingin kihanthawn ciat ni.
Hebrews10:25 Mi pawl khatte in kikhop a pelh bang hi loin
Hebrews10:26 Thuman thutak i theih khit ciangin mawhna i bawl hamtang lai leh i mawhna a kimaisak nadingin biakpiakna dang om nawn lo a
Hebrews10:27 a kihtakhuai thukhenna le Pasianʼ thu a nial mite a kaang tum ding meikuangpi bek om lai hi.
Hebrews10:28 Moses Thukham a zui lote pen mi nih le thum in mawh mah hi
Hebrews10:29 Tua bang ahihleh Pasianʼ Tapa a simmawh
Hebrews10:30 Bang hang hiam cih leh
Hebrews10:31 A nungta Pasianʼ khut sungah thumang loin i tun khak ding a lauhuai mahmah ahi hi.
Hebrews10:32 A beisa hun a note tungah thupiangte phawkkik un. Pasianʼ khuavak sungah na om khit uh ciangin haksatna tampi thuak napi-in tuate na lel kei uh hi.
Hebrews10:33 Mipiʼ mai ah hong kisimmawhin hong kibawlsia a
Hebrews10:34 Note in a hoih zaw
Hebrews10:35 Tua ahih manin thaman lianpi a hong ngahsak thei na lungsim hanna uh na khahsuah kei un.
Hebrews10:36 Pasianʼ deihna bangin gamta-in
Hebrews10:37 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah
Hebrews10:38 Ahi zongin keima mi a thuman mite in ka thu umin nungta ding uh a
Hebrews10:39 Eite pen nungkikin a maimang mite ihi kei a
Hebrews11:1 Upna nei i cih ciangin i muh theih nai loh i lamette ngah takpi ding
Hebrews11:2 Tanglai mite in upna a na neih manun Pasian in a na pakta hi.
Hebrews11:3 Pasianʼ kampauna tawh leitung le vantung piang a
Hebrews11:4 A upna hang mah tawh Abel in Kainʼ piakna sangin a san theih huai zaw biakpiakna Pasianʼ tungah a na pia hi. Pasian in ama biakna na sang ahih manin a upna hangin mihoih hi
Hebrews11:5 A upna hang mahin Enok zong sihna tawh kipelh hi. Pasian in ama kiangah la to ahih manin kuamah in Enok mu nawn lo hi. Amah a kilaktoh ma-in Enok in Pasianʼ lungkimna ngah hi
Hebrews11:6 Upna lo tawh kuamah in Pasian lungkimsak zo lo hi. Pasian kiang a zuan mi peuhmah in Pasian a om takpi ahihna thu le amah a zongte Pasian in thaman pia hi
Hebrews11:7 Noah in zong a upna hang mah tawh mailam a thupiang ding a muh theih lohpi mahin Pasianʼ thugenna na mang a
Hebrews11:8 Pasian in ama tungah piak dingin a ciam leitang ah Abraham a pai dingin a sap lai-in Abraham in Pasianʼ sapna a manna pen a upna hang mah ahi hi. A pai nading mun nangawn thei lopi-in a gam le a lei nusia-in a ding khia hi.
Hebrews11:9 Pasian in piak dingin a ciam gamah a upna hang mah tawh gam dangpi hi napi-in peemta-in va om phot a
Hebrews11:10 Pasian in geelin a lam
Hebrews11:11 Sarah a ta neih theih ding hun bei khin napi-in ama tungah thuciam pa zuau lo ding
Hebrews11:12 A cimang khinin a kingaihsun hih mi khatʼ suanlekhakte pen van a aksi zah leh tuipi gei-a sehnel zahin a tam hi.
Hebrews11:13 Hih mite khempeuh in amaute tungah piak dingin Pasianʼ ciam thute ngah nai lo uh a
Hebrews11:14 Tua bang mite in amau adingin a gam a lei ding uh a zong ahihna uh hong kilang hi.
Hebrews11:15 Amaute in a nusiat uh leitung ngaihsutpi penin a nei uh hileh hong ciahkik theih nading uh hun ngah ding uh hi.
Hebrews11:16 Ahi zongin amauteʼ lunggulh pen leitung sangin a hoih zaw vantung gam ahi hi. Pasian in amaute adingin khuapi khat na vaihawmsak ahih manin
Hebrews11:17 Pasian in Abraham a ze-et laitakin Abraham in a upna hang mah tawh Pasian biak nadingin a tapa Isaac na pia ngam hi. Pasian mah in Abraham tungah tapa kong pia ding ci-in a ciam hi napi-in
Hebrews11:18 Tua a piak ding tapa pen Pasian in
Hebrews11:19 Pasian in a si sa nangawn hingkiksak thei ding hi
Hebrews11:20 A tapa Jakob le Esau in mai lamah thupha ngah ding hi
Hebrews11:21 Jakob a sih kuan ciangin a ciangkhut dawnah kingamin Pasian bia a
Hebrews11:22 Josef a sih ding ciangin Egypt gam panin Israel mite a paikhiat nading thu le ama luanghawm a bawl nading zia a vaikhaknate zong a upna hang mah ahi hi.
Hebrews11:23 Moses a suah ciangin a nu le a pa in hoih sa mahmah in
Hebrews11:24 Moses a gol ciangin Faroʼ tanuʼ tapa kicih ding a ut nawn loh ngamna zong a upna hang mah ahi hi.
Hebrews11:25 Tomno sung mawhna sungah nuam takin om ding sangin Pasianʼ mite tawh gimna thuak khawm ding a ut zaw hi.
Hebrews11:26 Mai lamah a thaman ding mukhol thei ahih manin Egypt gam sunga hauhna le nopsaknate khempeuh sangin Khris hangin simmawhna thuak taak zaw tham hi
Hebrews11:27 Moses pen kumpipaʼ heh ding lau het loin Egypt gam panin paikhia a
Hebrews11:28 Mi That Vantungmi in Israel mite ta upa pen khempeuh a thah khak loh nadingin Paisan Pawi kipiangsakin
Hebrews11:29 Lei keu tunga pai bang keekin Israel mite in San Tuipi a kantan theihna uh zong a upna hang mah uh ahi hi. Amauteʼ pai bangin Egypt mite in pai ding a sawm uh ciangin tui in a tuumcip hi.
Hebrews11:30 Israel mite in Jerikho khuapi ni sagih sung a kimvel khit uh ciangin a kulhpi a cipna zong a upna uh hang mah ahi hi.
Hebrews11:31 Numei paktat Rahab in thukante limtakin na zin do a
Hebrews11:32 Tu-a bangin gengen lai ding ihi hiam? Gideon
Hebrews11:33 Hih mite khempeuh in zong a upna uh hang mah tawh kumpi gam tuamtuamte zo-in
Hebrews11:34 meikuangpi mitsak thei-in
Hebrews11:35 Numeite in a sihsuah mite uh
Hebrews11:36 Mi pawl khat in simmawhna
Hebrews11:37 Suang tawh a kidenglum
Hebrews11:38 Amaute adingin leitung mite kilawm zo lo uh ahih manin galtai bangin gamlak le mual tung khawngah vak kawikawi-in
Hebrews11:39 Hih miteʼ upna lian mahmah hi
Hebrews11:40 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in eite adingin a hoih zaw-in thu hong vaihawmsak a
Hebrews12:1 Tua hi a
Hebrews12:2 Eite hong makai-in i upna a hong cingtaaksak Jesu mitsuanin nei ni. Mai lamah a ngah ding lungdamna hangin maizumna kihta loin singlamteh tungah sihna hong thuak a
Hebrews12:3 Tua zahta-in mawhnei miteʼ langbawlna a thuaknate ngaihsun unla
Hebrews12:4 Tu ciang dong mawhna tawh na kidona uh ah sihna zah ciang dongin na dona uh om nai lo hi.
Hebrews12:5 Pasian in note
Hebrews12:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a it mite thuhilh a
Hebrews12:7 Pasianʼ hong thuhilhna na thuak ding mah uh ahi hi. Pasian in note ta-in hong ngaihsun ahih manin a thuak na hi uh hi. Pateʼ thuhilhna le taiina a thuak lo ta kuamah om lo hi.
Hebrews12:8 Tateʼ thuak bangin thuhilhna le taiina thuak loin hong kikoih mawk leh ta taktak hi loin zawlta na hi lel ding uh hi.
Hebrews12:9 Tua banah
Hebrews12:10 I leitung pate in amauʼ hoihsak bangin nuntak tomno sung ngaihsutna-in hong thuhilhin gim hong pia a
Hebrews12:11 Thuhilhna tawh gim hong kipiak ciangin nuam kisa het loin na kisa mahmah sam a
Hebrews12:12 Tua ahih ciangin a zaw nuangnuang na khutte uh le a no dakdak na khukte uh khauhsak un.
Hebrews12:13 Bai luangluangin a paite
Hebrews12:14 Mi khempeuh tawh na kilem theih nading uh hanciam un. Nuntak siangtho lo tawh kuamah in Topa mu zo lo ding ahih manin nuntak siangtho na nungta un.
Hebrews12:15 Pasianʼ hehpihna a ngah lah na hih khak loh nadingun na kidawm un. Zung kha a nei singkung hong khangin mi tampi gimsakin a siatsak bangin mite a siasak na hih khak loh nadingun na kidawm un.
Hebrews12:16 Numei tawh a mawh mite suak kha kei unla
Hebrews12:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Esau in a pa kiang panin thupha ngahkik nuamin khitui naptui tawh a nget hangin a gamtatna sa a bawlkik theih nading lampi om nawn lo ahih manin bangmah ngah thei tuan nawn lo hi.
Hebrews12:18 Israel mite in a tuah sa bangin note in Sinai Mual tunga meikuang
Hebrews12:19 peengkul tumna awging le a kihtakhuai awgingte na za nai kei uh hi. Israel mite in awging a zak uh ciangin kihta lua uh ahih manin a zakkik nawn loh nadingun a thum uh hi.
Hebrews12:20 “Ganhing nangawn in tua mual a sukkhak le kidenglum ding hi
Hebrews12:21 Tua pen nak lauhuai mahmah ahih manin Moses in zong
Hebrews12:22 Ahi zongin note pen Zion Mual
Hebrews12:23 vantungah a min a kikhum Pasianʼ ta upate a kikhopna
Hebrews12:24 thuciamna thak a hong vaihawm Jesu kiang
Hebrews12:25 Tua ahih manin note tungah thu a hong gen paʼ thugen na ngaih loh khak ding uh kidawm un. Hih leitungah thu a gen paʼ thu a ngai lote suakta lo ahih manin vantung panin thu a hong gen paʼ thugen ngai kei lehang i suakta kei zaw kan lai ding hi.
Hebrews12:26 Tua hun lai-in thu a gen ciangin leitung kiliing a
Hebrews12:27 “Khat vei liingsakkik lai ding
Hebrews12:28 Tua ahih manin a kiliingsak zo lo Pasianʼ gam i ngah manin lungdamin
Hebrews12:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh eiteʼ Pasian pen a kaang tum thei meikuang tawh a kibang ahi hi.
Hebrews13:1 Khris sungah unau bangin na ki-itna uh na zomsuak un.
Hebrews13:2 Khual mite hoihtakin zin na do ding uh na phawk un. Mi pawl khat in vantung mite zin do ahih lam a phawk lopi-in a do na hi gige uh hi.
Hebrews13:3 Amaute tawh thong a kia khawm bangin kingaihsunin thong sunga om mite na phawk un. Note zong leitung pumpi mah tawh a nungta lai na hih manun gimna a thuak mite na phawk un.
Hebrews13:4 Mi khempeuh in nupa thu thupi ngaihsut uh henla
Hebrews13:5 Sum deih luatna tawh na kipelh nadingun na nuntakna uh ah kikem unla
Hebrews13:6 Tua ahih manin kimuanna lungsim tawh hang takin
Hebrews13:7 Note tungah Pasianʼ thu a hong gen
Hebrews13:8 Jesu Khris pen zani
Hebrews13:9 Thuhilhna lamdang a tuamtuamte zui-in lam man panin pial kha kei un. A zui mite tungah bangmah phattuamna a piangsak thei lo an nek tui dawn tawh kisai ngeina zuihna in thahatna hong pia thei lo a
Hebrews13:10 Jew biakbuk ah na a sem siampite in biakna tau tungah a kipia biakna sate nek nading thu nei lo uh hi.
Hebrews13:11 Jew Siampi Lianpen pa in mawhna hangin biak nadingin Siangtho Pen Munah a ganhing sisan paipih a
Hebrews13:12 Tua mah bangin Jesu in zong ama sisan tawh miteʼ mawhna a siansak theih nadingin khuapi pua lamah a si hi.
Hebrews13:13 Tua ahih manin eite zong a pua lamah pai-in Jesu tawh maizumna thuak khawm ni.
Hebrews13:14 Eite adingin hih leitungah a kip khuapi om lo ahih manin a hong piang lai ding khuapi a zong ihi hi.
Hebrews13:15 Tua ahih manin Jesu tungtawnin amah i biakna-in i kam tawh ama min pulakin Pasian phat tawntung ni.
Hebrews13:16 Khatlekhat tungah thuhoih kibawlin na kihuh ding uh mangngilh kei un. Hih bang gamtatnate pen Pasian a lungkimsak thei biakna ahi hi.
Hebrews13:17 Na makaite uh thu na mang unla
Hebrews13:18 Kote adingin thu hong ngetsak niloh un. A tawntungin na a manin sepnopna lungsim nei ka hih manun ka lungsim uh ah kisuanna om loin siang mahmah hi.
Hebrews13:19 Note kiangah Pasian in kei hong paisakkik baih theih nadingin nakpi takin thu na na nget nading uh ka hong thum pha nuam hi.
Hebrews13:20 Ama sihna hangin Tuucing Lianpa suakin
Hebrews13:21 ama deihna bangin na na sep theih nadingun a kisam thuhoihte khempeuh note tungah hong guanin
Hebrews13:22 Sanggamte aw
Hebrews13:23 I sanggampa Timoti zong thong panin a suahtak khitna thu ka hong theisak nuam hi. Amah hong pai baih nakleh note kiangah ka hong pai ciangin ka hong tonpih ding hi.
Hebrews13:24 Na makaite uh le Pasianʼ mi khempeuh na hopihsak un. Italy gam panin a hong pai mite in note hong hopih uh hi.
Hebrews13:25 Note khempeuh tungah Pasianʼ hehpihna thupha hong tung tahen. Amen.
James1:1 Pasian le Topa Jesu Khris sila keimah James in Leitung mun khempeuh ah kithehthangin a om minam sawm le nihte tungah hopihna lai ka hong gelh hi.
James1:2 Sanggamte aw
James1:3 Tua bangin na upna uh hong kize-etna na thuak zawh uh ciangin na kipna uh hong kilangsak ahihna thu na thei uh hi.
James1:4 A kisam bangmah om loin a cingtaak na suah theih nadingun na thuakna uh hangin a tawntungin na kip paisuak nadingun na ngaihsun un.
James1:5 Pilna kisam na om uh leh Pasian kiangah ngen un. Mi khempeuh tungah Pasian dikin cingh mahmah ahih manin hong pia ding hi.
James1:6 Ahi zongin na nget uh ciangin hong pia takpi ding hi
James1:7 Tua bang mite
James1:8 
James1:9 Miniamte in liatna a ngah ciangin lungdam uh hen.
James1:10 Mihaute zong a niam uh ciangin lungdam veve uh hen. Lopa pak bangin a mangthang veve ding ahi uh hi.
James1:11 Ni hong suakin a sat ciangin lopate vul a
James1:12 A hoih takpi mah hiam
James1:13 Mi khat peuhpeuh in tua bang ze-etna a thuak ciangin
James1:14 Mi khatpeuh in ama deihna zui-in a gamtat ciangin mawhna a piangsak ahi hi.
James1:15 Lungsim utna a gol semsem ciangin mawhna hong piang a
James1:16 Sanggamte aw
James1:17 A hoih thu le na khempeuh
James1:18 Ama piansakte khempeuh lakah eite a masa pen i suah theih nadingin thuman thutak zangin ama utthu tawh eite a hong piangsak tawm ahi hi.
James1:19 Sanggamte aw
James1:20 Mihingteʼ hehna in Pasianʼ sep ding thuhoihte khaktan hi.
James1:21 Tua ahih manin ngeina hoih lote le gamtat siate khempeuh nusia unla
James1:22 Nomau kikhem tawmin thu zak bek tawh maisak kei unla
James1:23 Mi khat in thu a zak bek tawh maisakin a zakna bangin a zuih kei leh limlang ah a maitang a ki-en mipa tawh kibang bek hi.
James1:24 Limlang ah a ki-en mipa in amah hoihtakin a kimuh khit ciangin paikhia a
James1:25 Ahi zongin mite a suaktasak thei thukham cingtaak hoihtakin a et khit ciangin a thu ngai-in a mangngilh pah hi loin
James1:26 Mi khatpeuh in Khristian ka hi hi
James1:27 Pa Pasian in a siangtho biakna citakin a ngaihsut thu in: Tagahte le meigong numeite a haksatna uh ah hoihtakin kemin

James3:2 Eite khempeuh a khial thei zelzelte vive ihi hi. Kampauna ah a khial ngei lo mi a om leh a cingtaak mahmah hi a
James3:3 Sakol in i thu hong man theih nadingin kamkaih i bulh a
James3:4 Teembawte ngaihsun dih un. Teembaw lian mahmah a
James3:5 Tua mah bangin leii zong i pumpi na sung panin a neu mahmah khat hi napi-in thusia lian pipi piangsak zo hi. Gam khempeuh zong mei-ek neuno khat pan kipanin a kaang tum thei hi.
James3:6 Leii pen mei tawh kibang hi. I pumpi na sung panin a neuno khat hi napi-in i pumpi buppi a sia suah thei a
James3:7 Mihingte in gamsa
James3:8 Ahi zongin siattheih nading gukhal tawh a kidim
James3:9 I leii tawh eiteʼ pa ahi Topa i phat thei a
James3:10 Kam khat sung panin thupha le thusia pusuak khawm hi. Sanggamte aw
James3:11 Tuinak khat panin tui lim le tui lim lo hong luang khia khawm thei ahi hiam?
James3:12 Sanggamte aw
James3:13 Note lakah pilin thu thei a kisa a om leh kiniamkhiatin pilin
James3:14 Ahi zongin na lungsim uh ah enna
James3:15 Tua bang pilnate vantung panin a hong pai hi lo a
James3:16 Enna le huaihamna a om nakleh buaina le siatna nam khempeuh tawh kizom pahpah hi.
James3:17 Ahi zongin tung lam panin a kingah pilna a siangtho ahi hi. Mi tawh kilem thei-in dik a
James3:18 Kilemna a piangsak mite in lungnuam takin a tuh khaici in hoihna le dikna a piangsak hi.
James4:1 Note lakah a om kitotna le kilaiina koi panin hong piang ahi hiam? Deih luatna lungsim na neih manun noteʼ pumsung a kitoktok niloh ahi hi.
James4:2 Na na deih uh a
James4:3 Pasian kiangah na nget sun uh ciangin zong noteʼ nopsak nading bek ngenin

James4:5 Lai Siangtho sungah
James4:6 Lai Siangtho in
James4:7 Tua ahih manin Pasianʼ thu na mang un. Dawimangpa na nial un. Nial le-uhcin no kiang panin tai khia ding hi.
James4:8 Pasian kiang nai un. Amah in zong hong nai ding hi. Mawhneite in na khut uh sil siang unla
James4:9 Dahin
James4:10 Topa mai ah kiniamkhiat un. Tua hileh amah in hong lian bawl ding hi.
James4:11 Sanggamte aw
James4:12 Thukham a pia pa le thu a khen pa pen Pasian bek hi a
James4:13 Tu ni ahih kei leh zing ciangin tua khua tua khua ah va pai-in
James4:14 Zing ciangin na nuntakna uh bangci ding cih nangawn na thei kei uh hi. Meiilum tawl khat sung kaii-in a mangthang pak tawh a kibang lel na hi uh hi.
James4:15 Note in
James4:16 Ahi zongin note kihisakin na kisial uh hi. Tua bangte hoih het lo hi.
James4:17 A hoih a manin gamtat ding thei napi-in a gamta lote a mawh ahi hi.

James5:2 Na neihsate uh muat tum ta a

James5:4 Na lo uh a hong khawhsakte a thaman pia lo na hih manun tu-in amauteʼ phunna za un. An la dingin na sawl uh miteʼ phunna Vanglian Topa in za khinta hi.
James5:5 Hih leitung na nuntak sungun uang nekin na nop tat mahmah uh hi. Note hong kigawh hun ding kiginna-in a kithausak phitphet na hi uh hi.

James5:7 Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw
James5:8 Note zong na lungduai un. Topa hong pai ding hun nai ta ahih manin na lungsim uh na thahatsak un.

James5:14 A cina na om uh leh pawlpi upate sam un. Amaute in thu hong ngetsakin Topa min tawh sathau hong zut ding uh hi.
James5:15 Upna tawh thu a kinget ciangin Topa in cinate noptuamsakin
James5:16 Tua ahih manin na ci uh a dam nadingin khatlekhat tungah na mawhna uh kipulakin thu na kingetsak ta un. Mihoihteʼ thungetna in vang nei a

1Peter1:1 Jesu Khris sawltak keimah Peter in Pontas gam
1Peter1:2 Pa Pasian in ama ngimna sa bangin note hong teel a
1Peter1:3 I Topa Jesu Khrisʼ Pa Pasian tungah lungdam ni. Ama hong hehpih mahmahna hangin sihna panin Jesu Khris a thawhkiksakna tawh eite tungah nuntakna thak a hong pia hi. Tua ahih manin i lametna kiam ngei lo a
1Peter1:4 Pasian in ama mite adingin a koih thuphate i ngah nadingin lamenin i om hi. Tua thuphate sia ngei lo
1Peter1:5 Noteʼ upna hangin nitawp ni ciangin na ngah ding uh hotkhiatna nomau-aʼ ahihna a kilatsak nadingin Pasian in ama vangliatna tawh a hong kepsak ahi hi.
1Peter1:6 Tua ahih manin tu laitakin miteʼ bawlsiatna a tuamtuam na thuak manun tawl khat na lungkham uh ahi zongin hih bang thuakna hangin lungdam zaw un.
1Peter1:7 Hih bang thuaknate in a um takpi mah na hihna uh hong kilangsak hi. A sia thei khamte nangawn
1Peter1:8 Amah mu ngei lo napi-in na it uh a
1Peter1:9 Tua bangin na upna uh hangin kha thu ah hotkhiatna a ngah na hi uh hi.
1Peter1:10 Kamsangte in hih hotkhiatna thu mah kanin ngaihsut belin nei uh a
1Peter1:11 Khris in gimna thuakin
1Peter1:12 Vantung panin a hong kisawl Kha Siangthoʼ vangliatna tawh thu a gen thupuakteʼ tung panin na zak uh Thute mah kamsangte in a gen laitakun
1Peter1:13 Tua ahih manin na lungsim uh ki-ukin a kiging sa-in om unla
1Peter1:14 Pasianʼ thu na mang unla
1Peter1:15 Note a hong sam pa a siangtho ahih mah bangin note zong na gamtatna khempeuh uh ah na siangtho un.
1Peter1:16 Lai Siangtho sungah zong
1Peter1:17 Mi khempeuh amau gamtatna tawh kizui-in a kibang kimin thu a khen Pasian kiangah thu na nget uh ciangin
1Peter1:18 Na pu na pate uh nuntak zia
1Peter1:19 tuuno bangin paubaanna a om lo
1Peter1:20 Pasian in hih bang dingin leitung pianmapekin Khris a teel sa hi a
1Peter1:21 Sihna panin amah hingkiksakin minthanna a pia Pasian
1Peter1:22 Tu-in lungdamna thuman na zuihna hangun note kisiansuah khinin
1Peter1:23 A si thei nu le pate sung pan hi loin a si thei lo nu le pate sung panin a nungta tawntung Pasianʼ thu tawh naungek bangin a suakkik na hi uh hi.
1Peter1:24 Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho sungah
1Peter1:25 ahi zongin Topaʼ thu kip tawntung hi
1Peter2:1 Tua ahih manin gitlohna
1Peter2:2 Naungek suakcilte na bang unla
1Peter2:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh note in Topaʼ hoihna thu na thei khinzo uh hi.
1Peter2:4 Mite in bangmahin kimang lo hi
1Peter2:5 Note zong nuntakna a pia thei suangpi mah bangin kha thu tawh kisai biakinn lam nadingin na kizang unla
1Peter2:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah
1Peter2:7 Tua ahih manin no a um mite adingin amah pen a manpha suang hi a
1Peter2:8 a cihna leh
1Peter2:9 Ahi zongin note pen Pasian in a hong teelkhiat minam
1Peter2:10 Nidangin Pasianʼ mi na hih loh uh hangin tu-in ama mi na hi uh a
1Peter2:11 Ka itte aw
1Peter2:12 Gentail mite in note mihoih lo hi
1Peter2:13 Topaʼ hangin leitung ukna aana neiteʼ thu na mang un. Kumpipaʼ thu ahi a
1Peter2:14 a gamtat siate gim pia-in
1Peter2:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh thu thei loin a mot paupau mihaite
1Peter2:16 Sila ahi lo mi bangin gamta unla
1Peter2:17 Mi khempeuh zahtak bawlin thu up pih mite na it unla
1Peter2:18 Nasemte aw
1Peter2:19 Pasianʼ thu na ngaihsutna uh tawh a kilawm lopi mahin gimna na thuak uh leh na thuakna uh hangin Pasian in thupha hong pia ding hi.
1Peter2:20 Note na gamtat khialhna uh hangin hong kisat ciangin lungduai takin na thuak manun bangmah phattuamna om lo hi. Ahi zongin a manin gamta napi-in gimna na thuak uh ciangin lungduai takin na thuak uh leh Pasian in thupha hong pia ding hi.
1Peter2:21 Khris mahmah in zong note adingin thuakin
1Peter2:22 Khialhna bangmah gamta lo a
1Peter2:23 Amah a kizahko ciangin na ko thuk lo hi. Gimna a thuak ciangin na tawng gawp lo a
1Peter2:24 Eite
1Peter2:25 Note
1Peter3:1 Tua mah bangin zite aw
1Peter3:2 na gamtat hoihna uh a muh uh ciangin Pasian thu hong um ding uh hi.
1Peter3:3 Na hoih nadingun puatham kizepna ahi sambawlna
1Peter3:4 Pasianʼ muhna ah a manpha mahmah ahi lungsim puak zia
1Peter3:5 A beisa hunah Pasian muangin thu um numeite in a pasalte uh thu mangin
1Peter3:6 Sarah zong tu-a bangmahin gamta a
1Peter3:7 Tua mah bangin pasalte aw
1Peter3:8 A tawpna ah kong gen nop thu in: Lungsim le ngaihsutna kikhat nei-in unau ki-itna lungsim nei unla
1Peter3:9 Hong bawlsiate siatna tawh thukkik loin hong samsia mite samsiakik kei unla
1Peter3:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in
1Peter3:11 Gitlohna pelhin hoih gamtat uh henla
1Peter3:12 Topa in a thuman mite mu a
1Peter3:13 Note in a hoih gamtat ding utin hanciam le-uhcin kua in hong bawlsia ding ahi hiam?
1Peter3:14 A hoihin na gamtat manun gimna na thuak uh leh zong Pasian in thupha hong pia ding hi. Mite kihta kei unla
1Peter3:15 Na lungsim sung uh ah Khris zahtak bawl unla
1Peter3:16 Khris nungzui na hihna hangun na gamtat hoihna uh hong gensia-in hong simmawh bawl a om ciangin a maizum theih nadingun na lungsim uh ah kisuanna a om het lo dingin na siangtho om un.
1Peter3:17 Gamtat sia-in i om sangin Pasianʼ deihna ahih nakleh i gamtat hoihna hangin gimna i thuak hoih zaw hi.
1Peter3:18 Khris mahmah zong note adingin si a
1Peter3:19 Tua kha nuntakna tawh va pai-in thongkia-in a om khate kiangah thu a va hilh hi.
1Peter3:20 Noah in teembaw a bawl hun laitakin Pasian in lungduai takin ngak hi napi-in hih kha a nei mite pawl khat in Pasianʼ thu mang lo uh hi. Teembaw sungah a om mi giat bek
1Peter3:21 Tui pen note a hong hon khia tuiphumna lim hi a
1Peter3:22 Tu-in vantungah tua Khris pai khin a
1Peter4:1 Khris in ama pumpi-in thuak ahih manin note in zong tua bang lungsim mah nei-in na kithakhauhsak ding uh ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh pumpi-in a thuak mite peuhmah
1Peter4:2 Tua ahih manin tu a kipanin na leitung nuntak sung uh mihingteʼ deihna bangin gamta loin Pasianʼ deihna bangin na gamtat ding uh ahi hi.
1Peter4:3 A beisa hunah dawi biateʼ gamtat bangin a hoih khop khat na gamta khinta uh a
1Peter4:4 Tu-in note in dawi biate pawlpih nawn loin ututin na pheng tat loh uh ciangin lamdang sa-in note hong ko sia uh hi.
1Peter4:5 Ahi zongin amaute in a site le a hingteʼ thu a khen dingin a om Pasianʼ mai ah thudotna thuak ding uh hi.
1Peter4:6 Tua thu hang mahin
1Peter4:7 Na khempeuh a bei nading hun hong nai ta hi. Nomau pumpi ki-uk tawm thei-in pilvang unla
1Peter4:8 Itna in mawhna tampi khuhcip thei ahih manin lungsim takpi tawh khatlekhat ki-it ding thupi ngaihsut pha pen un.
1Peter4:9 Khatlekhat maitai takin zinleleeng na kido un.
1Peter4:10 Pasianʼ piak na a zatsiamte bangin Pasianʼ kiang panin na ngah uh nate
1Peter4:11 Minthanna le vangliatna a nei tawntung Pasian in Jesu Khris hangin thu khempeuh ah phatna a ngah theih nadingin thuhilhte in Pasianʼ thu na hilh unla
1Peter4:12 Ka itte aw
1Peter4:13 Tua bangin Khris tawh thuak khawm le-uhcin ama minthanna hong kilat ciangin note lungdam mahmah ding na hih manun
1Peter4:14 Khris nungzui hihna hangin miteʼ kosiatna na thuak uh leh note sungah a minthang Kha Siangtho ahi Pasianʼ Kha Siangtho hong om ahihna lim ahih manin a hampha mahmah na hi uh hi.
1Peter4:15 Ahi zongin mi thahna
1Peter4:16 Ahi zongin Khristian hihna hangin gimna na thuak uh leh kuamah in maizum ngaihsut kei unla
1Peter4:17 Tu-in thukhen kipat hun ding hong tung ta-in Pasianʼ mi eite tungah hong kipan ahihleh Pasian kiang panin hong pai Lungdamna Thu a um lo mite adingin bangzahin lungkham huai ding ahi hiam?
1Peter4:18 Lai Siangtho in
1Peter4:19 Tua ahih ciangin Pasianʼ deihna bangin gimna a thuak mite gamtat hoihin
1Peter5:1 Keima pumpi mahmah zong pawlpi upa hi-in
1Peter5:2 Pasian in noteʼ khut sungah a hong piak tuuhonte hoihtakin na cing unla
1Peter5:3 Noteʼ kep dingin a hong kipia tuute
1Peter5:4 Tuucing pipa hong pai ciangin a mual ngei lo minthanna lukhu a hong pia ding hi.
1Peter5:5 Tua mah bangin no khangno zaw deuhte in zong a khanghamteʼ thu na mang un. Lai Siangtho in
1Peter5:6 Pasian in ama hoihsak hun ciangin note hong lap toh theih nadingin a thahat Pasianʼ khutnuai ah kiniamkhiatin na om un.
1Peter5:7 Pasian in note hong kem ahih manin na lungkhamnate khempeuh uh ama kiang tunpih un.
1Peter5:8 Note pilvangin khua phawk un. Na gal uh ahi Dawimangpa
1Peter5:9 Leitungah thu um dang khempeuh in zong noteʼ thuak mah bangin a thuak ahihna thu thei unla
1Peter5:10 Tawl khat na thuak khit uh ciangin
1Peter5:11 Tua Pasian in a tawntungin ukna vangliatna nei paisuak tahen. Amen.
1Peter5:12 Thu upna sungah mi citakin ka ngaihsut Silasʼ huhna tawh hih lai tomno gelhin amah ka hong puasak hi. Hih thute pen Pasianʼ hong hehpihna taktak hi
1Peter5:13 Note mah bangin Pasian in a teel
1Peter5:14 Khristian ki-itna tawh khatlekhat kinamin na kihopih un. Khris thu um note khempeuh tungah nopsakna thupha hong tung tahen.
2Peter1:1 Jesu Khris nasem le sawltak ahi keimah Simon Peter in: Eiteʼ Pasian le Honpa ahi Jesu Khris a thumanna hangin koteʼ upna zah mahin upna manpha a nei mite tungah lai ka hong khak hi.
2Peter1:2 Pasian le i Topa Jesu na theihna uh hangin hehpihna le nopsakna thupha note tungah tampi tak hong tung tahen.
2Peter1:3 Ama minthanna le a hoihnate a neikhawm dingin a hong sam pa i theihna hangin Pasianʼ deih bangin biakna mantak i nuntak theih nadingin ama vangliatna in eiteʼ kisap na khempeuh a hong pia hi.
2Peter1:4 Amah in piak dingin a hong ciam a manpha mahmah nate hih bangzia-in hong pia a
2Peter1:5 Hih thu hangin na upna ban uh ah gamtat hoihna na behlap unla
2Peter1:6 na thutheihna uh pumpi ki-uk zawhna tawh na behlap unla
2Peter1:7 Pasianʼ deih bangin na gamtatna uh sanggam ki-itna tawh na behlap un; na sanggam ki-itna uh itna thukpi tawh na behlap zawh nadingun na hanciam un.
2Peter1:8 Hih bang hoihnate a kicingin na neih uh leh i Topa Jesu Khris na theihna uh ah thahatin kimanna na nei ding uh hi.
2Peter1:9 Ahi zongin hih bang hoihna a nei lo mite pen mittaw-in a gamla a mu thei lo mite hi a
2Peter1:10 Tua ahih manin sanggamte aw
2Peter1:11 Tua hileh eiteʼ Topa le Honpa Jesu Khris Uk tawntungna sungah nuam takin na lut thei ding uh hi.
2Peter1:12 Tua ahih manin note in hih thute thei khinin
2Peter1:13 Ka nuntak lai teng hih thute ka hong phawksak kikkik ding thuhoih khat hi
2Peter1:14 I Topa Jesu Khris in teltakin hong gen khin ahih manin hih leitung pumpi ka nusiat baih nading thu ka thei hi.
2Peter1:15 Tua ahih manin ka sih khit ciangin hih thute na phawk kikkik theih nadingun ka hih theih zahin ka hanciam ding hi.
2Peter1:16 I Topa Jesu Khris a vangliatna le a hong paikik nading thute note kiangah kong gen uh ciangin mihingteʼ phuahtawm tuanthute siksanin a hong gen hi loin
2Peter1:17 Vanglian Minthang pa in
2Peter1:18 Mual siangtho tungah amah tawh ka om khawm laitakun vantung panin hong ging awte komau mahmah in ka za uh hi.
2Peter1:19 Tua ahih manin kamsangteʼ gen thute a man taktak ahihna thu ka tel theih uh hi. Noteʼ lungsimah Zingsol hong suakin khua a hong vak matengin khuamial lak a mei taang bangin hih thute ngaihsun le-uhcin hoih mahmah ding hi.
2Peter1:20 Na phawk ding uh a thupi mahmah khat in: Lai Siangtho sunga om thugen kholhnate
2Peter1:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh mihingte in a deih manin mailam thugen kholh theihna a kingah hi lo a
2Peter2:1 Mite lakah kamsang man lo a omngei mah bangin note lakah sia man lo hong om ding hi. Siatna a piangsak thei thuhilhna a man lo hong lutpih simin
2Peter2:2 Tua bang hi napi-in mi tampi tak in amauʼ gamtat hoih lohna zui ding uh a
2Peter2:3 Hih sia man lote in a huaiham manun note kiang panin sum a ngah theih nadingun phuahtawm thu hong gen ding uh hi. Ahi zongin sawt pek a kipanin amauteʼ thu a Khen ding pa a kiging sa-in om niloh a
2Peter2:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh vantung mite nangawn in khialhna a neih ciangin Pasian in khah khong loin hell khuk sungah khia a
2Peter2:5 Pasian in tanglai mite khah khong loin amah a um lo mite
2Peter2:6 Pasian in Sodom le Gomorrah khuapite tungah thu khenin mei tawh hal tum a
2Peter2:7 Ngeina bangin a gamta lo mite in Lot a lungkhamsakna panun Pasian in mihoih Lot a hon khia hi.
2Peter2:8 Tua mihoih pa
2Peter2:9 Tua ahih manin Topa in tua bang mihoihte a gimna uh panin suaktasakin
2Peter2:10 Pasianʼ thu nialin amau pumpi deihna zui-in a gamta mite gim pia phadiak hi. Hih sia man lote kiphasakin hangsan mahmah uh a
2Peter2:11 Hih sia man lote sangin hat zaw-in a vanglian zaw vantung mite nangawn in Topaʼ mai ah minthanna a nei vantung mite gensia ngam lo
2Peter2:12 Ahi zongin mat ding le thah dingin a piang gamlak ganhing gilote bangin a pianpih lungsim uh zui-in gamta uh a
2Peter2:13 mite a gimsak mah bangun amaute tungah gimna kipia ding hi. A ut bangbangun suntangpi-in gamtat ding nuam a sa uh hi. Tua bang mite in note tawh ankuang hong um khawmin
2Peter2:14 Numei bekbek etnopin nei uh a
2Peter2:15 Thuman lampi nusia-in gammang uh a
2Peter2:16 Balaam in ama mawhna hangin taiina a thuak hi. A pau thei lo la
2Peter2:17 Hih bang mite pen a kangcip khin sa ciktui
2Peter2:18 Amaute kiphasakin hai pau uh a
2Peter2:19 Amaute pen siatna a piangsak thei zongsatna lelin sila hinapi-un mite tungah suahtak nading thu a gen uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mite pen
2Peter2:20 I Topa le Honpa Jesu Khris theihna hangin leitung siatna sung panin suakta khin napi-un
2Peter2:21 Tua bang mite in amaute tungah a kipia thu siangthote thei-in a nusiatkik sangun thuman lampi a thei ngei het lo uh hileh amau adingin hoih zaw thampek ding hi.
2Peter2:22 Paunak ah
2Peter3:1 Ka itte aw
2Peter3:2 Tanglai pek a kamsang siangthoteʼ thugen kholhte le note lakah sawltak na a semte in Topa le Honpaʼ thupiakte a hong gen sawn uh thute na phawkkik ding uh ka deih hi.
2Peter3:3 A masa penin na theih ding uh panin: Hun nunung lam ciangin amau pumpi deihna zui-in a gamta mi pawl khat hong om dinga
2Peter3:4 “Amah a hong paikik nading a thuciamna a bangci ahi hiam? I pu i pate zong si khinta uh a
2Peter3:5 Amaute in a kitheih mawh bawl uh thu pen: Tanglai pekin Pasian in ama kampauna tawh vantung le leitung na piangsak hi. Tui sung panin tui mah tawh leitung na piangsak a
2Peter3:6 tui tawh a piansak leitung pen tui mah tawh na susia leuleu hi.
2Peter3:7 Tu-in tua Pasianʼ kampauna mah tawh
2Peter3:8 Ahi zongin ka itte aw
2Peter3:9 Mi pawl khatteʼ ngaihsut bangin Topa in a kamciamna a hong tungsak hak hi zenzen lo hi. Note khat beek in siatna na thuakkhak ding uh deih loin na vekpi-un na kisik ding uh deih ahih manin hong pai nai lohna pen note hong khualna hizaw hi.
2Peter3:10 Ahi zongin theih kholh lohpi-in guta bangin Topa hong pai ding Ni hong tung ding hi. Tua Ni ciangin nakpi takin a ging in vantungte maimang sakin
2Peter3:11 Hih nate khempeuh hih bangin kisusia mang khin ding ahih manin note a bangci mi dingin kilawm cih limtakin na ngaihsun un. A siangtho nuntakna nei-in Pasianʼ deihna bangin na gamta unla
2Peter3:12 vantungte mei in kangtumin
2Peter3:13 Eite in Pasianʼ hong ciam sa
2Peter3:14 Tua ahih ciangin ka itte aw
2Peter3:15 I sanggam Paul in Pasianʼ piak pilna zangin note kiangah lai a hong gelhnate sungah a gen mah bangin note khempeuh in hotkhiatna na ngah theih nading uh hun hong piakna-in Topa hong zekai ahihna thu na phawk un.
2Peter3:16 Lai a hong gelhna sungah a thugente tu-ate mah a gen nuam ahi hi. A laigelhna sungah a telhak thu tampi om a
2Peter3:17 Tua ahih ciangin ka itte aw
2Peter3:18 Hehpihna thu le i Topa le Honpa Jesu Khris theihna thu ah na khangto semsem zaw un. Tu hun a kipanin a tawntungin amah in minthanna ngah paisuak tahen. Amen.
1John1:1 Leitung piancil lai pek a kipanin a om sa ahi nuntakna a pia thei Thu tawh kisai
1John1:2 Hih nuntakna pen a kimu thei a hong suah ciangin kote mahmah in ka mu uh hi. Tua ahih manin kote tungah a hong kilak
1John1:3 Pa Pasian le a Tapa Jesu Khris tawh kote pawl khatin ka om uh mah bangin note zong kote tawh pawl khat nong suah theih nading uh deihna-in ka muh sa uh le ka zak sa uh thute a hong gen ka hi uh hi.
1John1:4 Koteʼ lungdamna a cingtaak theih nadingin hih lai a hong gelh ka hi uh hi.
1John1:5 Ama kiang panin za-in note tungah kong gen uh thu in: Pasian
1John1:6 Tua ahih manin Pasian tawh ka kipawl hi
1John1:7 Ahi zongin amah
1John1:8 Mawhna ka nei kei hi
1John1:9 Ahi zongin Pasian kiangah i mawhnate va pulak lehang
1John1:10 Pasian in a mawh hi
1John2:1 Ka itte aw
1John2:2 Tua Jesu hangin eiteʼ mawhna hong kimaisak a
1John2:3 Eite in ama thupiaknate i zuih leh amah a thei taktak ihihna hong kilang hi.
1John2:4 Mi khatpeuh in
1John2:5 Ahi zongin ama thu a zui mite pen Pasian a itna a kicingtaak taktak mi ahi hi. Hih bangin i gamtat leh Pasian tawh a kipawl taktak ihihna i thei hi.
1John2:6 Pasian tawh ka kipawl hi
1John2:7 Kong it lawmte aw
1John2:8 Ahi zongin note kiangah ka hong gelh thupiakna pen na zak ngei loh uh thu thak hi a
1John2:9 Mi khatpeuh in khuavak gamtatna ka gamta hi
1John2:10 A Khristian mipihte a it mite pen khuavak gamtatna a gamta hi a
1John2:11 Ahi zongin a Khristian mipihte a mudah mite pen khuamial sungah omin khuamial gamtatna a gamta uh hi a
1John2:12 Ka tate aw
1John2:13 Pate aw
1John2:14 Pate aw
1John2:15 Hih leitung nate le Pasian tawh a kizom lo thute deih luatin nei kei un. Mi khatpeuh in hih leitung nate a deih luat leh amah in Pa Pasian it taktak thei lo hi.
1John2:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh pumpi deihna
1John2:17 Leitung nate le leitung deihnate a beibei ding hi ta a
1John2:18 Tate aw
1John2:19 Khrisʼ gal ahi hih mite pen eiʼ pawl hi ngei napi-in hong taisan uh hi. Eiʼ pawl taktak hileh eite tawh om khawm paisuak ding uh ahih manin
1John2:20 Ahi zongin Khris in note tungah Kha Siangtho hong pia khin ahih manin note khempeuh in a man na thei uh hi.
1John2:21 Tua ahih manin note kiangah lai ka hong gelhna pen note in a man na theih lohna hang uh hi loin
1John2:22 Tua ahihleh zuau thu gen i cihte kuate ahi hiam? Jesu pen Khris hi lo hi
1John2:23 Tapa a nialte in Pa zong a nial hi a
1John2:24 Note in ahihleh a kipat cil a kipan na zak uh thute hoihtakin na zui un. A kipat cil a kipan na zak uh thute hoihtakin na zuih nak uh leh Tapa tawh kipawlin
1John2:25 Khris in eite tungah piak dingin a hong ciam sa thu pen hih nuntak tawntungna ahi hi.
1John2:26 Note khempeuh a hong sawm miteʼ thu tu-a zah tawh khin phot ni.
1John2:27 Khris in note tungah ama Kha Siangtho hong pia khin a
1John2:28 Ka itte aw
1John2:29 Khris
1John3:1 Pa Pasian in eite bangzah takin hong itna thu thei un. Ama hong itna lian mahmah ahih manin eite pen Pasianʼ tate hong kici a
1John3:2 Ka lawm itte aw
1John3:3 Khris a siangtho mah bangin amah tawh kibat ding a lamen khempeuh in zong a nuntakna uh siangthosak ding hi.
1John3:4 Mawhna i cih pen thukham palsatna ahih manin a mawh mi khempeuh thukham palsat ahi uh hi.
1John3:5 Khris pen mawhna a nei het lo hi a
1John3:6 Tua ahih manin Khris tawh a kipawl mite in mawhna bawl nawn lo uh a
1John3:7 Ka it tate aw
1John3:8 A kipat cil a kipanin Dawimangpa in mawhna bawl tawntung ahih manin mawhna a bawl mi khempeuhte zong Dawimangpaʼ mi ahi hi. Hih Dawimangpaʼ nasepna a beisak dingin Pasianʼ Tapa a hong pai hi.
1John3:9 Pasianʼ tate in mawhna bawlbawl lo uh hi. Pasianʼ tate hi a
1John3:10 Hih pen Pasian tate le Dawimangpaʼ tate a kilamdanna ahi hi. A manin gamta loin
1John3:11 A kipat cil a kipanin na zak tawntung uh thu pen khatlekhat i ki-it nading thu ahi hi.
1John3:12 Dawimangpaʼ mi ahi
1John3:13 Tua ahih manin lawmte aw
1John3:14 Ei Khristiante khatlekhat ki-it ihih manin sihna khut sung panin pai khia-in nuntakna khut sungah a lut khinta ihihna thu i thei khinzo hi. Itna lungsim a nei lote pen sihna khut sung mahah a om lai uh ahi hi.
1John3:15 A Khristian mipih a mudah mi peuhmah mi that hi a
1John3:16 Itna i cih bangci theih ding ihi hiam cih leh: Khris in eite adingin a nuntakna hong pia hi. Ei zong i Khristian mipihte adingin i nuntakna i piak ngam ding ahi hi.
1John3:17 Mi khat hau mahmah henla
1John3:18 Ka it tate aw
1John3:19 Tua ahih manin tu-a bangin i om leh a thuman Pasian tawh a kipawl ihihna le ama mai ah lungmuang takin a om thei ding ihihna i thei ding hi.
1John3:20 I lungsimah ei mawh i kisak leh zong
1John3:21 Tua ahih manin ka it lawmte aw
1John3:22 Ama thupiaknate zui-in ama lungkim nadingin gamta ihih manin ama kiang panin i nget peuhpeuh i ngah hi.
1John3:23 Ama hong thupiakna in: A Tapa Jesu Khris umin zui-in
1John3:24 Pasianʼ thupiakna a zui mi khempeuh
1John4:1 Ka it lawmte aw
1John4:2 Pasianʼ Kha sawlna tawh thugente le a dangte bangci khen theih ding na hi uh hiam cih leh: Jesu Khris pen mihing bangin hong pai hi
1John4:3 Ahi zongin hih thu a nial mi peuhmah
1John4:4 Ka it tate aw
1John4:5 Kamsang a kineihkhemte in leitung thu gen uh a
1John4:6 Ahi zongin note pen Pasianʼ mite na hi uh hi. Pasian a thei mi peuhmah in koteʼ thugen hong ngai uh a
1John4:7 Ka it lawmte aw
1John4:8 Pasian pen ki-itna ahih manin itna a nei lo mite in Pasian thei lo uh hi.
1John4:9 Pasian in eite hong itna hong bangci lah hiam cih leh: Ama hangin eite in nuntakna i ngah theih nadingin a Tapa neihsun Pasian in leitungah a hong paisak hi.
1John4:10 Hih ka gen itna pen eite in Pasian i itna thu hi lo a
1John4:11 Ka it lawmte aw
1John4:12 Kuamah in Pasian mu ngei lo hi. Ahi zongin eite khatlekhat i ki-it leh eite tawh Pasian hong om khawm a
1John4:13 Pasian in eite tungah a hong piak Kha Siangtho hangin Pasian le eite a om khawm ihihna leh Pasian in eite hong ompih ahihna thu i thei hi.
1John4:14 Pa Pasian in leitung mite a hon khia dingin a Tapa a hong paisakna thu kote in thei-in midang kiangah gen belin ka nei uh hi.
1John4:15 Jesu pen Pasianʼ Tapa hi
1John4:16 Tua hi a
1John4:17 Thukhen Ni ciangin kisuanna nei het loin i om theih nadingin eite in a cingtaak itna a nei ihi hi. Khris mah bangin hih leitung i nuntakna ah nungta-in gamta ihih manin tua bang kisuanna a nei lo ding ihi hi.
1John4:18 Itna nei lehang launa om lo a
1John4:19 Pasian in eite hong it masa ahih manin eite in itna i nei thei hi.
1John4:20 Mi khatpeuh in
1John4:21 Khris in eite tungah hong thupiakna in: Pasian a it mi in a Khristian mipihte zong it ding hi
1John5:1 Jesu
1John5:2 Pasian itin ama thupiakte i zuihna tawh Pasian tate a it ihih lam i kithei ding hi.
1John5:3 Pasian i it ciangin ama thupiakte a zui ihi hi. Eite adingin ama thupiakte zuih ding a haksa lua hi lo hi.
1John5:4 Pasianʼ ta ahite peuhmah in leitung nate zo uh a
1John5:5 Kuate in leitung nate zo ding ahi hiam i cih leh
1John5:6 Hih Jesu Khris pen tui tawh kiphumna le a sisan luangin sihna tawh a hong pai hi a
1John5:7 Hih thu ah teci a pang thum om a
1John5:8 tuate pen Kha
1John5:9 Mihingteʼ teci panna sang thei ihih leh Pasianʼ teci panna i san theih ding thupi zaw hi. Pasian in ama Tapaʼ thu tu-a bangin teci hong pang hi.
1John5:10 Tua ahih manin Pasianʼ Tapa a um mi peuhmah in Pasianʼ teci panna a sang ahi hi. Ahi zongin Pasianʼ thugen a um lo mi peuhmah in ama Tapa thu teci pangin a gennate a um lo uh ahih manin Pasian pen zuaugen a suaksak ahi uh hi.
1John5:11 Tu-in Pasianʼ teci panna in: Pasian in ama Tapa tungtawnin eite tungah nuntak tawntungna a hong pia hi.
1John5:12 Pasianʼ Tapa tawh a kipawl peuhmah in nuntak tawntungna nei a
1John5:13 Pasianʼ Tapa a um mite in nuntak tawntungna a nei na hih lamtak uh na theih nadingun hih lai a hong gelh ka hi hi.
1John5:14 Eite in ama deihna tawh kituakin i nget nakleh i nget khempeuh Pasian in hong pia ding hi
1John5:15 Eiteʼ ngetna khempeuh amah in na za hi
1John5:16 Mi khatpeuh in a Khristian mipihte a sih nading zah ciang ahi lo mawhna a gamta a muh leh ama adingin thu ngetsak tahen. Ama thungetna bangin Pasian in a nuntakna suksak lo ding hi. Hih pen sihna zah ciang mawhna ahi lote ka cihna ahi hi. Ahi zongin sih nading zah ciang ahi mawhna om a
1John5:17 Gamtat khialhna khempeuh mawhna hi a
1John5:18 Pasianʼ tate in mawhna bawlbawl lo uh hi. Pasianʼ Tapa in amaute kem a
1John5:19 Leitung midang khempeuh Dawimangpaʼ khut sungah a om ahi zongin eite pen Pasianʼ mi ihihna thu i thei hi.
1John5:20 Pasianʼ Tapa hong pai-in eite thu hong theisak ahih manin Pasian taktak a thei ihihna thu i thei hi. A Tapa Jesu Khris tawh i kipawlna hangin Pasian taktak mah tawh a kipawl thei ihi hi. Tua Jesu pen Pasian taktak mah hi a
1John5:21 Ka itte aw
2John1:1 A khangham bel keimah Johan in Teeltuam ahi
2John1:2 Thuman thei ihih manin a tawntungin tua thu ah i kip ding hi.
2John1:3 Pa Pasian le a Tapa Jesu Khris in dikna
2John1:4 Pa Pasian in eite hong thupiakna bangmahin na pawlpi mite pawl khat in thu a mantakin a zuihna uh mu ka hih manin ka nuam mahmah hi.
2John1:5 Tua ahih ciangin ka hong it tonu aw
2John1:6 Itna thu kong gen ciangin Pasianʼ thupiakte zui ding cihna ahi hi. A kipat cil a kipan na zak sa uh ahi hih thupiakna pen na khan tawntungun zui-in itna na nei ta un.
2John1:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh leitungah midangte a khem tampi hong om ta a
2John1:8 Tua ahih ciangin na sep sa uh thuman taan kha loin
2John1:9 Khrisʼ thuhilhna zui loin a khengvalin a pai mite pen Pasian tawh a kipawl lo ahi hi. Ahi zongin a thuhilhna a zuite pen Pa Pasian le a Tapa tawh a kipawl ahi uh hi.
2John1:10 Tua ahih manin Khrisʼ hilh ahi hih thute a hilh lo midang khatpeuh note kiangah a hong pai leh na inn uh ah zong na tungsak kei unla
2John1:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua bang mite ading thupha a deihsak mite pen amauʼ nasep hoih lohna ah zong a kipawl ahi uh hi.
2John1:12 Gen ding tampi ka neih lai hangin lai-in hong gelh lo zaw-in
2John1:13 Teeltuam ahi hih lai-a om pawlpi mite in hopihna kam hong khak uh hi.
3John1:1 A khangham bel keimah Johan in Lungsim takpi tawh ka hong it ka lawm Gaias tungah lai ka hong khak hi.
3John1:2 Ka lawm it Gaias aw
3John1:3 Nang a mantakin a gamta na hih takpi mah bangin
3John1:4 Tate bangin ka hong neih mite a mantakin a gamtatna uh ka zakna hangin ka lungdamna sangin a dang lungdamna lian zaw bangmah om lo hi.
3John1:5 Ka hong it lawm Gaias aw
3John1:6 Amaute na limbawlna thu
3John1:7 Amaute pen Pasianʼ nasem dingin a khualzin khia uh hi a
3John1:8 Tua ahih manin Pasian thuman nasepna ah nasem khawm mite ihih theih nadingin ei Khristiante in hih bang mite i huh ding ahi hi.
3John1:9 Na pawlpite kiangah lai ka gelh ngei hi. Ahi zongin na pawlpi sungah mi lian pen a ut Diotrefes in ka thugen hong mang nuam lo hi.
3John1:10 Tua ahih manin kong pai ciangin kote hong gensiatna
3John1:11 Ka hong it lawm Gaias aw
3John1:12 Mi khempeuh in Demetrias phatkim uh a
3John1:13 Gen ding tampi ka neih hangin lai-in gelhkhiat ding kong sawm kei zaw hi.
3John1:14 Nang tawh kimu baih thei dingin kilamen ka hih manin
3John1:15 Nangma tungah nopsakna thupha hong tung tahen. Hih lai-a om i lawmte in hong hopih uh hi. Tua lai-a om i lawmte khempeuh a milipin na hopihsak in.
Jude1:1 Jesu Khrisʼ sila ka hih banah Jamesʼ nau keimah Jude in: Pasianʼ sapna hangin Jesu Khris kepna sungah Pasian itna tawh a om mite tungah lai ka hong khak hi.
Jude1:2 Note khempeuh tungah hehpihna le itna thupha tampi tak hong tung tahen.
Jude1:3 Ka itte aw
Jude1:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasianʼ thu a ngaihsun lo mi pawl khat
Jude1:5 Note in na theih sa uh ahi ta zongin ka hong phawksak nop thu in: Topa in Egypt gam panin Israel mite hon khia khin napi-in amah a um lo mite a nung ciangin susia gawp hi.
Jude1:6 Amauʼ aana neih huam sung bekah om loin a omna panun a paikhia vantung mite zong leinuai khuamial sungah sikkol kibulhin amauʼ thu a kikhen ding Ni lianpi ngakin Pasian in a koihcip hi.
Jude1:7 Sodom khua le Gomorrah khua le a kiim a om khuapi mite zong tua vantung mite mah bangin gamta uh a
Jude1:8 Tua mite mah bangin hih mite zong thumu-in kinei-in amau pumpi thanghuaisak uh a
Jude1:9 Vantung mi lian pa Mikhael nangawn tua bangin gamta ngam lo hi. Mosesʼ luanghawm kituhin Dawimangpa tawh a kitot laitakin Mikhael in Dawimangpa zahkona kammal zang ngam loin
Jude1:10 Ahi zongin hih mite in a theih tel loh uh thute simmawh bawl uh a
Jude1:11 Hih mite adingin dahhuai mahmah hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Kainʼ gamtat bangin gamta-in
Jude1:12 Noteʼ annek khopna ah zumna mel nei loin hong om gawp uh ahih manin hong siat suah uh a
Jude1:13 a sepna uh tawh amau mahʼ maizum nading a piangsak tuipi hualte le Pasian in amauteʼ om nadingin lei sung khuamial thukpi a koihsak tawntung
Jude1:14 Tanglai pekin Adam pan khang sagihna Enok in zong hih thu mah na gen khol a
Jude1:15 Pasianʼ deihna bangin a gamtat lohna hang uh le kam hoih lo pipi zangin Pasian a gensiatnate uh hangin Pasianʼ deihna bangin a gamta lo mite tungah thu khenin mawhsakna pia ding hi

Jude1:17 Ahi zongin ka itte aw
Jude1:18 Amaute in note kiangah
Jude1:19 Hih mite in pawl kikhenna piangsakin

Jude1:21 I Topa Jesu Khris in a hong hehpihna tawh nuntak tawntungna hong piak ding na ngakkawmun Pasianʼ itna sungah na kip un.
Jude1:22 A um taktak zo lote hehpih unla
Jude1:23 meiphual sung panin dawhkhiat bangin midangte na hon khia un. Mi pawl khatteʼ mawhna ah note zong na siat khak loh nadingun kidop kawmna tawh na huh unla

Revelation20:12 A lian a neu misite tua tokhom mai ah dingin laibute a kilem ka mu hi. Tua ciangin a nungta mite a kigelhna laibu a dang khat zong a kilem ka mu hi. Amauteʼ gamtatna tua laibute sungah a kigelhna tawh kizui-in misite tungah thu a kikhen hi.
Revelation20:13 Tuipi sungah a om misite
Revelation20:14 Tua ciangin Sihna le Misiteʼ Gam
Revelation20:15 A nungta mite a kigelhna laibu sungah a min a om lo peuhmah meiphual pi sungah kilawn hi.
Revelation21:1 Tua ciangin van thak khat le lei thak khat ka mu hi. Van masa le lei masa maimang khin a
Revelation21:2 Mothak khat a pasal tawh a kituah dingin a kizem bangin vantung Pasian kiang panin Khuapi Siangtho ahi Jerusalem khua thak a hong pai suk ka mu hi.
Revelation21:3 Tokhom panin nakpi takin awging khat ka za a
Revelation21:4 Amauteʼ mit panin khitui khempeuh nulsak ding hi. Thu lui sate maimang khinta ahih manin sihna
Revelation21:5 Tua ciangin tokhom tungah a tupa in
Revelation21:6 Tua ciangin amah in
Revelation21:7 A gualzo mi khempeuh in kei tung panin a ngah ding thu in: Kei pen amauteʼ Pasian ka hi dinga
Revelation21:8 Ahi zongin a meidawite
Revelation21:9 Tua ciangin gimna nunung sagihte a dimin a om hai sagih a tawi vantungmi sagihte sung panin khat kei kiangah hong pai-in thu hong gen a
Revelation21:10 Tua laitakin Kha Siangtho tawh ka kidim a
Revelation21:11 Tua khuapi pen Pasianʼ vang tawh tee ziazua a
Revelation21:12 A kulh sahin sang mahmah a
Revelation21:13 Nisuahna lamah kongpi thum
Revelation21:14 Tua khuapi kulh pen kulh tawphah suang sawm le nih tungah a kiciang hi a
Revelation21:15 Keima kiangah thu a hong gen vantungmi in tua khuapi
Revelation21:16 Tua khuapi a pang kikim linlian a
Revelation21:17 A kulhpi zong ama zat tehna tawh a teh ciangin pi za nih sawm khat guk a sang hi.
Revelation21:18 A kulhpi dingin jasper suangmanpha kiciang a
Revelation21:19 Tua khuapi kulh suangtawphahte pen suangmanpha namkim tawh kizem hi. A masa-in jasper suangmanpha
Revelation21:20 a ngana ah onik suangmanpha
Revelation21:21 A kongpi sawm le nihte kep sawm le nih tawh a kibawl hi a
Revelation21:22 A Vanglian Topa Pasian le Tuuno pen khuapi biakinn hi ta ahih manin tua khua sungah biakinn dang ka mu kei hi.
Revelation21:23 Pasianʼ minthanna vang pen khuavak hi a
Revelation21:24 Tua a taang sungah leitung mite lam pai ding uh a
Revelation21:25 Zan khuamial hun cih om lo ding ahih manin kulh kongpite khak hun cih om loin a tawntungin kihong paisuak ding hi.
Revelation21:26 Leitung miteʼ hauhna le liatna teng tua khuapi sung hong kitun pih ding hi.
Revelation21:27 Ahi zongin a siang lo
Revelation22:1 Tua ciangin vantungmi in Pasian le Tuuno tokhom panin a hong luang khia
Revelation22:2 khuapi sung lampi laizang ah a luang hi. Tua gun pang tuakah nuntakna singkung po a
Revelation22:3 Pasianʼ samsiatna a ngah peuhpeuh tua khua sungah om lo hi. Tua khuapi sungah Pasian le Tuunoʼ tokhom om dinga
Revelation22:4 Amaute in ama maitang mu ding uh a
Revelation22:5 Topa Pasian pen amauteʼ khuavak hi-in
Revelation22:6 Tua ciangin vantungmi in kei kiangah
Revelation22:7 Jesu in
Revelation22:8 Keimah Johan in hih thute za-in ka muh ahi hi. Hih thute za-in ka muh ciangin hih thute kei tungah a hong lak vantungmi a bia dingin a khe phung ah ka bok suk hi.
Revelation22:9 Ahi zongin amah in
Revelation22:10 Tua ciangin vantungmi in kei kiangah
Revelation22:11 A gilo mite gilo lailai henla
Revelation22:12 Tua ciangin Jesu in
Revelation22:13 Kei pen a masa le a nunung
Revelation22:14 Khuapi kulh kongpi sungah a lut theih nading le nuntakna singgah a nek theih nadingun a puan uh a siangin a sawp mite
Revelation22:15 Ahi zongin a lampial mite
Revelation22:16 “Keimah Jesu in pawlpite adingin hih thute nang kiangah a hong gen dingin ka vantungmi ka hong sawl hi. Kei pen Davidʼ zung le a suan ahi
Revelation22:17 Kha Siangtho le Mothak in Jesu kiangah
Revelation22:18 Keimah Johan in hih laibu sungah a kigelh thu a za mi khempeuh ka hong hilhkholh nopna panin: A thu a behlap na om uh leh Pasian in zong hih laibu sungah a kigelh gimnate note tungah hong behlap dinga
Revelation22:19 hih laibu sungah a kigelh thute a hem khia na om uh leh Pasian in zong hih laibu sungah a kigelh nuntakna singgah le Khuapi Siangtho sungah na ngah ding uh hamphatnate note kiang panin hong hepkhiatsak ding hi.
Revelation22:20 Hih thu khempeuh hong genin teci a pang mipa in
